    await _saveSharedLinks();

    if (typeof renderSharedLinksPanel === 'function') {
      try { renderSharedLinksPanel(); } catch {}
    }
  }

  async function _revokeSharedLink(id) {
    const log = await _loadSharedLinks();
    const entry = log.find(e => e.id === id);
    if (!entry) return false;
    if (entry.revoked) return true;
    if (!entry.deletionUrl) {
      notify.warn('No deletion URL stored for this share — can\'t revoke.');
      return false;
    }
    try {
      const res = await fetch(entry.deletionUrl).then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null);

      entry.revoked = true;
      entry.revokedAt = Date.now();
      entry.revokeServerResponse = res;
      await _saveSharedLinks();
      if (res && res.success) {
        notify.success('Share link revoked.');
      } else {
        notify.info('Marked revoked locally. The server may need up to 24h to fully drop the file.');
      }
      try { renderSharedLinksPanel(); } catch {}
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[shared-links] revoke failed:', e);
      notify.warn('Revoke request failed — see console.');
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function renderSharedLinksPanel() {
    const list = $('sharedLinksList');
    if (!list) return;
    const det = $('sharedLinksDetails');
    if (det && !det.open) return;
    const log = await _loadSharedLinks();
    const now = Date.now();
    if (!log.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div class="library-empty" style="font-size:0.7rem">no upload-shares yet — links you share via persona / config upload appear here so you can revoke them within 3 days</div>`;
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = log.slice(0, 30).map(e => {
      const ageHours = (now - (e.createdAt || 0)) / 36e5;
      const expiresIn = e.expiresAt ? ((e.expiresAt - now) / 86400000) : null;
      const revokeWindowOpen = ageHours < 72;
      const expiryStatus = e.revoked
        ? '<span style="color:#a47b3a">revoked</span>'
        : (expiresIn != null && expiresIn < 0)
          ? '<span style="color:#a47b3a">expired</span>'
          : (expiresIn != null)
            ? `expires in ${expiresIn < 1 ? Math.round(expiresIn * 24) + 'h' : Math.round(expiresIn) + 'd'}`
            : 'permanent';
      const created = new Date(e.createdAt || 0).toLocaleString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
      const sizeStr = e.sizeBytes ? ` · ${Math.round(e.sizeBytes / 1024)}kb` : '';
      const canRevoke = !e.revoked && revokeWindowOpen && e.deletionUrl;
      return `
        <div class="shared-link-entry" data-id="${escapeHtml(e.id)}">
          <div class="shared-link-head">
            <strong>${escapeHtml(e.name || e.kind || 'share')}</strong>
            <span class="shared-link-meta">${escapeHtml(e.kind)}${sizeStr} · ${escapeHtml(created)}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="shared-link-status">${expiryStatus}</div>
          <div class="shared-link-actions">
            <button class="btn-link" data-action="copy" data-id="${escapeHtml(e.id)}" type="button">copy link</button>
            ${canRevoke
              ? `<button class="btn-link revoke" data-action="revoke" data-id="${escapeHtml(e.id)}" type="button">revoke</button>`
              : ''}
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('button[data-action]').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const id = btn.dataset.id;
        const action = btn.dataset.action;
        const entry = (await _loadSharedLinks()).find(e => e.id === id);
        if (!entry) return;
        if (action === 'copy') {
          try {
            await navigator.clipboard.writeText(entry.shareUrl || entry.url);
            notify.success('Link copied.');
          } catch { notify.warn('Clipboard write failed.'); }
        } else if (action === 'revoke') {
          const ok = await confirmAsync('Revoke this share link? Anyone with the link will get a 404 (within ~24h).');
          if (ok) await _revokeSharedLink(id);
        }
      });
    });
  }

  let _directorAuditFilter = 'all';
  async function renderDirectorAuditPanel() {
    const list = $('directorAuditList');
    if (!list) return;
    const det = $('directorAuditDetails');
    if (det && !det.open) return;
    const log = await _loadDirectorAudit();
    const filtered = _directorAuditFilter === 'all'
      ? log
      : log.filter(e => e.kind === _directorAuditFilter);
    if (!filtered.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div class="library-empty" style="font-size:0.7rem">no audit entries yet — entries are recorded as the Director works</div>`;
      _renderAuditPatternCallouts([]);
      return;
    }

    list.innerHTML = filtered.slice(0, 50).map(e => _renderAuditEntry(e)).join('');

    _renderAuditPatternCallouts(log);
  }

  function _renderAuditPatternCallouts(log) {
    const wrap = $('directorAuditDetails');
    if (!wrap) return;
    const callouts = [];
    if (Array.isArray(log) && log.length) {

      try {
        const recs = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'recommendation').slice(0, 6);
        if (recs.length >= 4) {
          const keys = recs.map(r => `${r.rec?.persona || '?'}|${r.rec?.method || '?'}`);

          let run = 1;
          for (let i = 1; i < keys.length; i++) {
            if (keys[i] === keys[0]) run++;
            else break;
          }
          if (run >= 4) {
            const [persona, method] = keys[0].split('|');
            callouts.push(
              `Director picked <strong>${escapeHtml(persona)}</strong> + <strong>${escapeHtml(method)}</strong> for the last ${run} sessions in a row. ` +
              `If you'd like more variety, rate a few sessions or manually pick a different combination — the adaptive weights will catch up.`
            );
          }
        }
      } catch {}

      try {
        const ratings = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'rating');
        const recsCount = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'recommendation').length;
        const fortnightAgo = Date.now() - 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
        const recentRatings = ratings.filter(r => (r.ts || 0) > fortnightAgo);
        if (recsCount >= 5 && recentRatings.length === 0) {
          callouts.push(
            `No rating-driven adaptive updates in the last 2 weeks across ${recsCount} session${recsCount === 1 ? '' : 's'}. ` +
            `The Director can only learn from ratings — try the 1-5 stars on a few sessions to nudge it.`
          );
        }
      } catch {}

      try {
        const recs = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'recommendation').slice(0, 8);
        const ratings = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'rating' && Number.isFinite(e.rating));
        if (recs.length >= 4) {
          const recKeys = recs.map(r => `${r.rec?.persona || '?'}|${r.rec?.method || '?'}`);

          const counts = recKeys.reduce((acc, k) => { acc[k] = (acc[k] || 0) + 1; return acc; }, {});
          const topKey = Object.entries(counts).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0];
          if (topKey && topKey[1] >= 3) {
            const [persona, method] = topKey[0].split('|');

            const matchingRatings = ratings.filter(r =>
              (r.rec?.persona === persona || r.rec?.method === method) &&
              Number.isFinite(r.rating)
            ).slice(0, 5);
            if (matchingRatings.length >= 2) {
              const meanRating = matchingRatings.reduce((s, r) => s + r.rating, 0) / matchingRatings.length;
              if (meanRating < 3) {
                callouts.push(
                  `Director keeps picking <strong>${escapeHtml(persona)}</strong> + <strong>${escapeHtml(method)}</strong> ` +
                  `(${topKey[1]} of last ${recs.length}) but recent ratings of that combo average ${meanRating.toFixed(1)}/5. ` +
                  `Worth a manual override — try a different persona or method on the next session.`
                );
              }
            }
          }
        }
      } catch {}

      try {
        const recs = log.filter(e => e.kind === 'recommendation' && e.profileFlags).slice(0, 5);
        if (recs.length >= 4) {
          const postures = new Set(recs.map(r => r.profileFlags?.posture).filter(Boolean));
          const copres   = new Set(recs.map(r => r.profileFlags?.coPresence).filter(Boolean));
          if (postures.size === 1 && copres.size === 1) {
            const p = [...postures][0], c = [...copres][0];

            if ((p && p !== 'sitting') || (c && c !== 'alone')) {
              callouts.push(
                `Recent recommendations are tuned for <strong>${escapeHtml(p)}</strong>, ` +
                `<strong>${escapeHtml(c)}</strong>. ` +
                `If your context has changed, update the profile so the Director sees it.`
              );
            }
          }
        }
      } catch {}
    }

    let calloutEl = $('auditPatternCallouts');
    if (!callouts.length) {
      if (calloutEl) calloutEl.remove();
      return;
    }
    if (!calloutEl) {
      calloutEl = document.createElement('div');
      calloutEl.id = 'auditPatternCallouts';
      calloutEl.style.cssText = 'margin: 6px 0 10px; padding: 7px 9px; background: rgba(201,168,85,0.06); border-left: 2px solid rgba(201,168,85,0.45); font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5;';
      const list = $('directorAuditList');
      if (list && list.parentNode) {
        list.parentNode.insertBefore(calloutEl, list);
      }
    }
    calloutEl.innerHTML = callouts.map(c => `<div style="margin-bottom:5px">${c}</div>`).join('');
    const last = calloutEl.lastElementChild;
    if (last) last.style.marginBottom = '0';
  }

  function _renderAuditEntry(e) {
    const ts = new Date(e.ts).toLocaleString(undefined, {
      month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
    });
    if (e.kind === 'recommendation') {
      const rec = e.rec || {};
      const cc = rec._cluster_c || null;
      const blocked = cc?.blockedMethods?.length
        ? `<div class="audit-detail">blocked: <code>${escapeHtml(cc.blockedMethods.join(', '))}</code></div>` : '';
      const personaBoost = cc?.personaTimeBoost
        ? `<div class="audit-detail">time-of-day persona boost: <code>${escapeHtml(JSON.stringify(cc.personaTimeBoost).slice(0, 80))}</code></div>` : '';
      const conf = rec._confidence || {};
      const confTxt = `p=${(conf.persona ?? '?')} m=${(conf.method ?? '?')} s=${(conf.soundscape ?? '?')} ln=${(conf.length ?? '?')}`;
      const flags = e.profileFlags || {};
      const flagBits = [];
      if (flags.posture)        flagBits.push(`posture=${flags.posture}`);
      if (flags.coPresence)     flagBits.push(`copres=${flags.coPresence}`);
      if (flags.spiritualFrame) flagBits.push(`frame=${flags.spiritualFrame}`);
      if (flags.susceptibility) flagBits.push(`hip=${flags.susceptibility}`);
      if (flags.hasHealthNotes) flagBits.push('healthNotes✓');
      return `
        <div class="audit-entry kind-recommendation">
          <div class="audit-head">
            <span class="audit-kind">recommendation</span>
            <span>${escapeHtml(ts)}</span>
          </div>
          <div><strong>${escapeHtml(rec.persona || '—')}</strong> · ${escapeHtml(rec.method || '—')} · ${escapeHtml(rec.length || '—')} · ${escapeHtml(rec.soundscape || '—')}</div>
          <div class="audit-detail">confidence: <code>${escapeHtml(confTxt)}</code></div>
          ${flagBits.length ? `<div class="audit-detail">profile: <code>${escapeHtml(flagBits.join(' · '))}</code></div>` : ''}
          ${blocked}
          ${personaBoost}
          ${e.adaptiveSnapshot ? `<div class="audit-detail">difficulty: <code>${e.adaptiveSnapshot.difficulty ?? '—'}</code>${e.adaptiveSnapshot.recoveryMode ? ' <strong>· recovery mode</strong>' : ''}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
      `;
    }
    if (e.kind === 'rating') {
      const t = e.touched || {};
      const before = e.before || {};
      const after  = e.after  || {};
      const fmtMut = (label, key, beforeVal, afterVal) =>
        (key && Number.isFinite(beforeVal) && Number.isFinite(afterVal))
          ? `<div class="audit-detail">${label} <strong>${escapeHtml(key)}</strong>: <code>${beforeVal} → ${afterVal}</code></div>` : '';
      return `
        <div class="audit-entry kind-rating">
          <div class="audit-head">
            <span class="audit-kind">A/B rating</span>
            <span>${escapeHtml(ts)}</span>
          </div>
          <div><strong>${escapeHtml(e.preset || '—')}</strong> rated ${e.rating}/5 → reward ${e.reward >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${e.reward}</div>
          ${fmtMut('persona',    t.persona,    before.p,  after.p)}
          ${fmtMut('method',     t.method,     before.m,  after.m)}
          ${fmtMut('soundscape', t.soundscape, before.s,  after.s)}
          ${fmtMut('length',     t.length,     before.ln, after.ln)}
        </div>
      `;
    }
    return `<div class="audit-entry"><div class="audit-head"><span class="audit-kind">${escapeHtml(e.kind)}</span><span>${escapeHtml(ts)}</span></div></div>`;
  }

  try {
    Object.defineProperty(window, 'HNE', {
      value: Object.freeze({
        tier: () => (typeof getAITier === 'function' ? getAITier() : 'perchance'),
        profile: () => (typeof getProfile === 'function' ? { ...getProfile(), changeLog: undefined } : null),
        adaptive: async () => { try { return await getAdaptive(); } catch { return null; } },
        history: async (n = 5) => { try { return ((await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []).slice(0, n).map(r => ({ id: r.id, date: new Date(r.date).toISOString(), persona: r.guide, method: r.method, mood: `${r.preMood ?? '?'}→${r.postMood ?? '?'}`, completed: r.completed })); } catch { return []; } },
        smartDirector: () => !!state.smartDirectorEnabled,
        bias: () => state.directorBias ?? 0,

        audit: (n = 20) => (_aiAuditLog || []).slice(0, n).map(e => ({
          when: new Date(e.ts).toISOString(),
          provider: e.provider,
          source: e.source,
          bytes: e.bytes,
          ...(e.contextBytes != null ? { contextBytes: e.contextBytes, taskBytes: e.taskBytes } : {}),
        })),

        directorAudit: async (n = 20) => {
          try {
            const log = await _loadDirectorAudit();
            return (log || []).slice(0, n).map(e => ({
              when: new Date(e.ts).toISOString(),
              kind: e.kind,
              ...(e.kind === 'recommendation' ? {
                rec: { persona: e.rec?.persona, method: e.rec?.method, length: e.rec?.length, soundscape: e.rec?.soundscape },
                blockedMethods: e.rec?._cluster_c?.blockedMethods || null,
                difficulty: e.adaptiveSnapshot?.difficulty ?? null,
                recoveryMode: e.adaptiveSnapshot?.recoveryMode || false,
              } : {}),
              ...(e.kind === 'rating' ? {
                preset: e.preset, rating: e.rating, reward: e.reward,
                touched: e.touched,
              } : {}),
            }));
          } catch { return []; }
        },

        sharedLinks: async (n = 20) => {
          try {
            const log = await _loadSharedLinks();
            return (log || []).slice(0, n).map(e => ({
              id: e.id,
              kind: e.kind,
              name: e.name,
              shareUrl: e.shareUrl,
              created: new Date(e.createdAt).toISOString(),
              expires: e.expiresAt ? new Date(e.expiresAt).toISOString() : null,
              revoked: !!e.revoked,
              hasDeletionUrl: !!e.deletionUrl,
            }));
          } catch { return []; }
        },

        storage: () => (typeof checkStorageBudget === 'function' ? checkStorageBudget() : null),

        clearMetrics: async (confirm) => {
          if (confirm !== true) {
            console.warn('[HNE.clearMetrics] pass `true` to actually wipe metrics history. This does NOT touch session history or memory.');
            return false;
          }
          if (typeof clearMetricsHistory !== 'function') return false;
          await clearMetricsHistory();
          console.log('[HNE.clearMetrics] metrics history wiped');
          return true;
        },

        project: () => {
          try {
            return (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.knownProject)
              ? { ...root.knownProject }
              : null;
          } catch { return null; }
        },
      }),
      writable: false, configurable: false,
    });
  } catch {}

  const PHASE_DURATIONS = {
    micro:    { introduction: 12, permission: 8,  settling: 15,  induction: 30,  deepener: 15,  level: 10,  work: 60,   praise: 12, reward: 20, lightener: 15,  wake: 12, reintroduction: 20, teaching: 25,  training: 45,  mission: 20,  goal: 30,  pendulation: 35 },
    quick:    { introduction: 20, permission: 15, settling: 30,  induction: 90,  deepener: 30,  level: 20,  work: 120,  praise: 20, reward: 30, lightener: 30,  wake: 20, reintroduction: 30, teaching: 45,  training: 75,  mission: 30,  goal: 50,  pendulation: 55 },
    short:    { introduction: 30, permission: 20, settling: 60,  induction: 180, deepener: 60,  level: 40,  work: 240,  praise: 30, reward: 45, lightener: 45,  wake: 30, reintroduction: 45, teaching: 75,  training: 150, mission: 45,  goal: 75,  pendulation: 75 },
    medium:   { introduction: 45, permission: 25, settling: 120, induction: 300, deepener: 180, level: 60,  work: 360,  praise: 45, reward: 60, lightener: 60,  wake: 40, reintroduction: 60, teaching: 90,  training: 240, mission: 60,  goal: 100,  pendulation: 110 },
    long:     { introduction: 60, permission: 30, settling: 150, induction: 420, deepener: 300, level: 90,  work: 540,  praise: 60, reward: 75, lightener: 75,  wake: 50, reintroduction: 75, teaching: 120, training: 360, mission: 75,  goal: 130,  pendulation: 150 },

    extended: { introduction: 75, permission: 35, settling: 180, induction: 480, deepener: 360, level: 100, work: 720,  praise: 75, reward: 90,  lightener: 90,  wake: 60, reintroduction: 90,  teaching: 150, training: 480, mission: 90,  goal: 160,  pendulation: 180 },
    deep:     { introduction: 90, permission: 40, settling: 210, induction: 540, deepener: 420, level: 120, work: 900,  praise: 90, reward: 105, lightener: 105, wake: 70, reintroduction: 105, teaching: 180, training: 600, mission: 100, goal: 190,  pendulation: 210 },
    marathon: { introduction:100, permission: 45, settling: 240, induction: 600, deepener: 540, level: 180, work: 1080, praise:100, reward: 120, lightener: 120, wake: 80, reintroduction: 120, teaching: 200, training: 720, mission: 120, goal: 220,  pendulation: 240 },
  };

  const _FALLBACK_PERSONA = { id: 'fallback', name: 'Guide', tagline: '', category: 'contemplative', systemPrompt: '' };
  const _FALLBACK_METHOD = METHODS[0];
  const getMethod = () => METHODS.find(m => m.id === state.selectedMethodId) || _FALLBACK_METHOD;
  const getPersona = () => (state.personas.find(p => p.id === state.selectedPersonaId) || state.personas[0]) ?? _FALLBACK_PERSONA;
  const PERSONA_KEY = 'stillness_personas_v1';

  const PERSONA_SCHEMA_VERSION = 2;

  function getPersonaRole(persona) {
    if (!persona) return '';

    if (persona.isSelf || persona.id === SELF_PERSONA_ID) {
      return _buildSelfRoleInstruction();
    }
    return persona.roleInstruction || persona.systemPrompt || '';
  }

  function normalizePersona(p) {
    if (!p || typeof p !== 'object') return p;
    const role = p.roleInstruction || p.systemPrompt || '';
    return {

      id:       p.id,
      name:     p.name,
      tagline:  p.tagline || '',
      category: p.category || 'contemplative',

      roleInstruction: role,
      systemPrompt:    role,

      uuid:                  p.uuid || _genPersonaUuid(),
      reminderMessage:       p.reminderMessage || '',
      imagePromptPrefix:     p.imagePromptPrefix || '',
      imagePromptSuffix:     p.imagePromptSuffix || '',
      metaTitle:             p.metaTitle || '',
      metaDescription:       p.metaDescription || '',
      metaImage:             p.metaImage || '',
      creationTime:          p.creationTime || Date.now(),
      customData:            (p.customData && typeof p.customData === 'object') ? p.customData : {},
      schemaVersion:         PERSONA_SCHEMA_VERSION,

      recommendedSpeechRate: Number.isFinite(p.recommendedSpeechRate) ? p.recommendedSpeechRate : null,
      recommendedVisual:     p.recommendedVisual     || null,
      recommendedSoundscape: p.recommendedSoundscape || null,

      ...(p.isCustom    && { isCustom:    true }),
      ...(p.isCommunity && { isCommunity: true }),
      ...(p.packName    && { packName:    p.packName }),

      ...(p.hidden      && { hidden:      true }),
    };
  }

  function _genPersonaUuid() {

    if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) {
      try { return crypto.randomUUID(); } catch {}
    }
    return 'p-' + Date.now().toString(36) + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10);
  }

  let _personaCache = null;

  async function _initStorage() {

    _personaCache = await idbGet(PERSONA_KEY);
    if (!_personaCache) {
      try {
        const lsRaw = localStorage.getItem(PERSONA_KEY);
        if (lsRaw) { _personaCache = JSON.parse(lsRaw); await idbSet(PERSONA_KEY, _personaCache); localStorage.removeItem(PERSONA_KEY); }
      } catch {}
    }
    if (!Array.isArray(_personaCache)) _personaCache = [];

    try {
      const legacyHistory = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      if (Array.isArray(legacyHistory) && legacyHistory.length) {
        const normalizedHistory = legacyHistory.map(normalizeHistoryEntry).sort((a,b)=>(b.date||0)-(a.date||0));

        await _writeHistoryCompact(normalizedHistory);
      }
    } catch {}
    try {
      const analytics = await idbGet(ANALYTICS_KEY) || await idbGet('stillness_analytics_v2');
      if (analytics) await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, normalizeAnalyticsData(analytics));
    } catch {}
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem('stillness_settings_v4') || localStorage.getItem('stillness_settings_v3') || localStorage.getItem('stillness_settings_v2');
      if (raw && !localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_KEY)) {
        localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(normalizeSettings(JSON.parse(raw))));
      }
    } catch {}

    if (navigator.storage?.persist) await navigator.storage.persist();
  }

  const loadCustomPersonas = () => _personaCache || [];
  const saveCustomPersonas = arr => { _personaCache = arr; idbSet(PERSONA_KEY, arr); return true; };

  const GAIN_FOR_MODE = { off: 0, subtle: 0.3, dramatic: 1.0 };
  function setAudioReactiveMode(mode) {
    if (!(mode in GAIN_FOR_MODE)) mode = 'off';
    state.audioReactiveMode = mode;
    state.audioReactive.gain = GAIN_FOR_MODE[mode];

    document.querySelectorAll('[data-audio-mode]').forEach(btn => {
      btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.audioMode === mode);
    });
  }

  const BASS_BINS   = [0, 5];
  const MID_BINS    = [6, 40];
  const TREBLE_BINS = [41, 100];

  function _avgBins(buf, lo, hi) {
    let sum = 0, count = 0;
    const end = Math.min(hi, buf.length - 1);
    for (let i = lo; i <= end; i++) { sum += buf[i]; count++; }
    return count > 0 ? sum / (count * 255) : 0;
  }
  function _rmsBins(buf) {
    let sum = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < buf.length; i++) sum += buf[i] * buf[i];
    return Math.sqrt(sum / buf.length) / 255;
  }

  function updateAudioReactiveFrame() {
    const a = state.audioReactive;

    const haveSoundscape = (typeof drone !== 'undefined') && drone && drone.analyser && a._fftBuffer;
    const now = performance.now();

    if (haveSoundscape) {
      drone.analyser.getByteFrequencyData(a._fftBuffer);
      a.bass    = _avgBins(a._fftBuffer, BASS_BINS[0],   BASS_BINS[1]);
      a.mid     = _avgBins(a._fftBuffer, MID_BINS[0],    MID_BINS[1]);
      a.treble  = _avgBins(a._fftBuffer, TREBLE_BINS[0], TREBLE_BINS[1]);
      a.overall = _rmsBins(a._fftBuffer);
    } else {
      a.bass = a.mid = a.treble = a.overall = 0;
    }

    const dt = (now - a._voicePulseSpawnedAt) / 300;
    a.voicePulse = Math.max(0, 1 - dt);
    a.voiceEnvelope = a.voiceEnvelope * 0.85 + a.voicePulse * 0.15;

    a.active = haveSoundscape || a.voiceEnvelope > 0.02;
  }

  function startAudioReactiveLoop() {
    const a = state.audioReactive;
    if (a._rafHandle) return;
    let _lastTickMs = performance.now();
    const tick = () => {
      if (!a._rafHandle) return;
      updateAudioReactiveFrame();
      tickStateEngine();

      const nowMs = performance.now();
      const frameSec = Math.min(0.1, (nowMs - _lastTickMs) / 1000);
      _lastTickMs = nowMs;
      if (state.runtimeRulesEnabled) {
        tickRulesEngine(frameSec);
        tickTriggerWindows();
      }

      tickPlaybackDynamics(frameSec);

      _tickDynamicPacing(frameSec);
      a._rafHandle = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    a._rafHandle = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }

  function stopAudioReactiveLoop() {
    const a = state.audioReactive;
    if (a._rafHandle) { cancelAnimationFrame(a._rafHandle); a._rafHandle = null; }
    a.bass = a.mid = a.treble = a.overall = 0;
    a.voicePulse = 0; a.voiceEnvelope = 0; a.active = false;
  }

  function getAudioMod() {
    const a = state.audioReactive;
    if (!a || !a.active || a.gain === 0) {
      return { overall: 0, bass: 0, mid: 0, treble: 0, pulse: 0, envelope: 0 };
    }

    const dim = state.ambientDimScale ?? 1.0;

    let breathBoost = 1.0;
    if (state.adaptiveBreathPacing && state._mic?.status === 'active' && state._mic.ema != null) {
      const normalized = Math.min(1, state._mic.ema / 0.3);
      breathBoost = 1.0 + normalized * 0.3;
    }
    const g = a.gain * dim;
    return {
      overall:  a.overall       * g,
      bass:     a.bass          * g,
      mid:      a.mid           * g,
      treble:   a.treble        * g,
      pulse:    a.voicePulse    * g * breathBoost,
      envelope: a.voiceEnvelope * g,
    };
  }

  const ENGINE_DEFAULT_WEIGHTS = {
    voiceEnvelope: 0.55,
    audioOverall:  0.30,
    voicePresence: 0.15,
  };
  const ENGINE_EMA_ALPHA      = 0.05;
  const VOICE_PRESENCE_THRESHOLD = 0.12;

  let _engineSmoothedEngagement = 0;
  let _engineLastVoiceAt        = 0;
  let _enginePhaseEnteredAt     = 0;
  let _engineLastPhase          = null;
  const _engineExternalSignals  = {};

  if (!state.engineState) {
    state.engineState = {
      voiceEnvelope: 0, voicePulse: 0, audioOverall: 0, engagement: 0,
      sessionSec: 0, completedFraction: 0, sinceVoiceSec: 0,
      currentPhase: null, phaseKind: null, phaseSec: 0,
      playing: false, paused: false,
    };
  }

  function setEngineSignal(name, value, weight = 0.3) {
    _engineExternalSignals[name] = {
      value:  Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value)),
      weight: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, weight)),
    };
  }
  function clearEngineSignals() {
    Object.keys(_engineExternalSignals).forEach(k => delete _engineExternalSignals[k]);
  }

  function _engineDeriveEngagement(voiceEnv, audioOverall, voicePresence, playing) {
    if (!playing) return _engineSmoothedEngagement;
    const weights = { ...ENGINE_DEFAULT_WEIGHTS };
    const signals = { voiceEnvelope: voiceEnv, audioOverall, voicePresence };
    for (const [name, { value, weight }] of Object.entries(_engineExternalSignals)) {
      signals[name] = value;
      weights[name] = weight;
    }
    const totalWeight = Object.values(weights).reduce((s, w) => s + w, 0) || 1;
    let raw = 0;
    for (const [name, w] of Object.entries(weights)) {
      raw += (signals[name] ?? 0) * (w / totalWeight);
    }
    raw = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, raw));
    _engineSmoothedEngagement += ENGINE_EMA_ALPHA * (raw - _engineSmoothedEngagement);
    return +_engineSmoothedEngagement.toFixed(3);
  }

  function tickStateEngine() {
    const now     = Date.now();
    const playing = !!state._sessionStartTime && !state.paused;
    const ar      = state.audioReactive || {};
    const voiceEnv     = ar.voiceEnvelope || 0;
    const voicePulse   = ar.voicePulse || 0;
    const audioOverall = ar.overall || 0;

    if (state.paused || state._hiddenStartedAt) {
      if (_engineLastVoiceAt) _engineLastVoiceAt = now;
      if (_enginePhaseEnteredAt) _enginePhaseEnteredAt = now;
    }

    if (voiceEnv >= VOICE_PRESENCE_THRESHOLD) _engineLastVoiceAt = now;
    const voicePresence = voiceEnv >= VOICE_PRESENCE_THRESHOLD ? 1 : 0;
    const sinceVoiceSec = _engineLastVoiceAt ? (now - _engineLastVoiceAt) / 1000 : Infinity;

    const curPhase = state._currentPhase || null;
    if (curPhase !== _engineLastPhase) {
      _enginePhaseEnteredAt = now;
      _engineLastPhase = curPhase;
    }
    const phaseSec = playing && _enginePhaseEnteredAt ? (now - _enginePhaseEnteredAt) / 1000 : 0;

    let sessionSec = 0;
    if (state._sessionStartTime) {
      let inactiveMs = state._inactiveTotalMs || 0;
      if (state._inactiveStartedAt) inactiveMs += (now - state._inactiveStartedAt);
      sessionSec = Math.max(0, (now - state._sessionStartTime - inactiveMs) / 1000);
    }

    const estTotalSec = (state._estimatedTotalSec || 0);
    const completedFraction = estTotalSec > 0 ? Math.min(1, sessionSec / estTotalSec) : 0;

    state.engineState = {
      voiceEnvelope: voiceEnv,
      voicePulse,
      audioOverall,
      engagement:    _engineDeriveEngagement(voiceEnv, audioOverall, voicePresence, playing),
      sessionSec:    +sessionSec.toFixed(2),
      completedFraction: +completedFraction.toFixed(3),
      sinceVoiceSec: Number.isFinite(sinceVoiceSec) ? +sinceVoiceSec.toFixed(2) : null,
      currentPhase:  curPhase,
      phaseKind:     curPhase ? phaseBase(curPhase) : null,
      phaseSec:      +phaseSec.toFixed(2),
      playing,
      paused:        !!state.paused,
    };
  }

  function getEngineMetric(metric) {
    const es = state.engineState || {};
    switch (metric) {
      case 'voiceEnvelope':     return es.voiceEnvelope ?? 0;
      case 'voicePulse':        return es.voicePulse ?? 0;
      case 'audioOverall':      return es.audioOverall ?? 0;
      case 'engagement':        return es.engagement ?? 0;
      case 'sessionSec':        return es.sessionSec ?? 0;
      case 'completedFraction': return es.completedFraction ?? 0;
      case 'sinceVoiceSec':     return es.sinceVoiceSec ?? 0;
      case 'phaseSec':          return es.phaseSec ?? 0;

      case 'attention':         return _engineExternalSignals?.attention?.value ?? 0;
      case 'wakefulness':       return _engineExternalSignals?.wakefulness?.value ?? 0;
      case 'faceDetected':      return state._webcam?.faceDetected ? 1 : 0;
      case 'ambientBrightness': return state.ambientBrightness ?? 0.5;

      // Round 29 — heart-rate-derived metrics for the rules engine and HUD.
      // `heartRate` and `relaxation` come from the external-signals map
      // (populated by sensorBridge); `heartRateBpm` is the raw BPM from
      // sensorBridge directly. All return 0 (not null) when unavailable
      // so condition arithmetic stays well-defined — rules should AND
      // their threshold check with `bridgeConnected` if a 0 reading
      // would otherwise be a false positive.
      case 'heartRate':         return _engineExternalSignals?.heartRate?.value ?? 0;
      case 'relaxation':        return _engineExternalSignals?.relaxation?.value ?? 0;
      case 'heartRateBpm':      return (typeof sensorBridge !== 'undefined' && sensorBridge.getCurrentBpm)
                                  ? (sensorBridge.getCurrentBpm() ?? 0)
                                  : 0;

      case 'liveIntensity':     return state._rampActiveIntensity ?? state.liveControl?.intensityScale ?? 1;
      case 'liveSpeed':         return state.liveControl?.speedScale ?? 1;
      case 'liveRandomness':    return state.liveControl?.randomness ?? 0;
      case 'rampActive':        return state.rampSettings?.enabled ? 1 : 0;
      default:

        if (typeof metric === 'string' && metric.startsWith('var:')) {
          const v = state.sessionVariables?.[metric.slice(4).toLowerCase()];
          if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
          if (typeof v === 'boolean') return v ? 1 : 0;
          if (typeof v === 'string') { const n = Number(v); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; }
          return 0;
        }
        return 0;
    }
  }

  function evalEngineCondition(condition) {
    if (!condition) return false;
    const { metric, op, value } = condition;

    if (metric === 'phaseKind' || metric === 'currentPhase') {
      const es = state.engineState || {};
      const actual = String(es[metric] || '');
      const expected = String(value || '');
      if (op === '==') return actual === expected;
      if (op === '!=') return actual !== expected;
      return false;
    }
    const actual = getEngineMetric(metric);
    switch (op) {
      case '<':  return actual <  value;
      case '>':  return actual >  value;
      case '<=': return actual <= value;
      case '>=': return actual >= value;
      case '==': return Math.abs(actual - value) < 0.001;
      case '!=': return Math.abs(actual - value) >= 0.001;
      default:   return false;
    }
  }

  function resetStateEngine() {
    _engineSmoothedEngagement = 0;
    _engineLastVoiceAt        = 0;
    _enginePhaseEnteredAt     = 0;
    _engineLastPhase          = null;
    clearEngineSignals();
    state.engineState = {
      voiceEnvelope: 0, voicePulse: 0, audioOverall: 0, engagement: 0,
      sessionSec: 0, completedFraction: 0, sinceVoiceSec: 0,
      currentPhase: null, phaseKind: null, phaseSec: 0,
      playing: false, paused: false,
    };
  }

  const RULES_VALID_ACTIONS = new Set([
    'pause', 'resume', 'emergencyExit', 'notifyMessage', 'showOnScreenText',
    'duckAudio', 'unduckAudio', 'setSpeechRate', 'setSoundscapeVolume',

    'setVar',

    'setIntensity', 'setSpeed', 'setRandomness', 'setRamp',
  ]);
  const RULES_VALID_METRICS = new Set([
    'voiceEnvelope', 'voicePulse', 'audioOverall', 'engagement',
    'sessionSec', 'completedFraction', 'sinceVoiceSec',
    'phaseSec', 'phaseKind', 'currentPhase',

    'attention', 'wakefulness', 'faceDetected', 'ambientBrightness',

    // Round 29 — heart-rate-aware rule metrics. heartRate / relaxation
    // are normalized 0-1 (engagement-scale); heartRateBpm is the raw
    // value (e.g. for `heartRateBpm < 70` rules). Available whether the
    // user runs a generic adapter or HR-OBS Monitor v2.
    'heartRate', 'relaxation', 'heartRateBpm',

    'liveIntensity', 'liveSpeed', 'liveRandomness', 'rampActive',
  ]);

  const RULES_VAR_METRIC_RE = /^var:[a-z_][a-z0-9_]{0,31}$/;
  function _isValidRuleMetric(metric) {
    if (typeof metric !== 'string') return false;
    return RULES_VALID_METRICS.has(metric) || RULES_VAR_METRIC_RE.test(metric);
  }
  const RULES_VALID_OPS = new Set(['<', '>', '<=', '>=', '==', '!=']);

  function _rulesUid() {
    return 'r_' + Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
  }

  function normalizeRule(r) {
    const raw = r || {};
    const cond = raw.condition || {};
    const act  = raw.action || {};
    return {
      id:          typeof raw.id === 'string' && raw.id ? raw.id : _rulesUid(),
      enabled:     raw.enabled !== false,
      name:        typeof raw.name === 'string' && raw.name ? raw.name : 'Rule',
      condition: {
        metric: _isValidRuleMetric(cond.metric) ? cond.metric : 'engagement',
        op:     RULES_VALID_OPS.has(cond.op)         ? cond.op     : '<',
        value:  Number.isFinite(cond.value) || typeof cond.value === 'string' ? cond.value : 0.3,
      },
      durationSec: Number.isFinite(raw.durationSec) ? Math.max(0, raw.durationSec) : 5,
      cooldownSec: Number.isFinite(raw.cooldownSec) ? Math.max(0, raw.cooldownSec) : 30,
      action: {
        type:  RULES_VALID_ACTIONS.has(act.type) ? act.type : 'notifyMessage',
        param: act.param ?? null,
      },
    };
  }

  const _runtimeRuleState = {};

  function _getRuntimeRuleState(id) {
    if (!_runtimeRuleState[id]) _runtimeRuleState[id] = { conditionHeldSec: 0, lastFiredSec: -Infinity };
    return _runtimeRuleState[id];
  }

  function clearRuntimeRuleState() {
    Object.keys(_runtimeRuleState).forEach(k => delete _runtimeRuleState[k]);
  }

  async function executeRuleAction(rule) {
    const { type, param } = rule.action;
    const n = rule.name;
    try {
      switch (type) {
        case 'pause':
          if (!state.paused) togglePause();
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": paused`);
          break;
        case 'resume':
          if (state.paused) togglePause();
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": resumed`);
          break;
        case 'emergencyExit':
          notify.warn(`Rule "${n}": initiating rescue`);
          emergencyEnd();
          break;
        case 'notifyMessage':
          notify.info(String(param || 'Rule fired: ' + n).slice(0, 200));
          break;
        case 'showOnScreenText': {
          if (!param) break;
          _showRuleOverlay(String(param).slice(0, 200));
          break;
        }
        case 'setVar': {

          if (param && typeof param === 'object' && typeof param.name === 'string') {
            const ok = setSessionVariable(param.name, param.value);
            if (ok) notify.info(`Rule "${n}": var ${param.name} = ${param.value}`);
          }
          break;
        }
        case 'setIntensity': {

          const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
          const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, Number(param?.value ?? param) || 1));
          lc.intensityScale = v;
          const el = $('liveCtrlIntensity'); if (el) { el.value = v; const sv = $('liveCtrlIntensityV'); if (sv) sv.textContent = v.toFixed(2) + '×'; }
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": intensity → ${v.toFixed(2)}×`);
          break;
        }
        case 'setSpeed': {
          const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
          const v = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, Number(param?.value ?? param) || 1));
          lc.speedScale = v;
          const el = $('liveCtrlSpeed'); if (el) { el.value = v; const sv = $('liveCtrlSpeedV'); if (sv) sv.textContent = v.toFixed(2) + '×'; }
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": speed → ${v.toFixed(2)}×`);
          break;
        }
        case 'setRandomness': {
          const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
          const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(param?.value ?? param) || 0));
          lc.randomness = v;
          const el = $('liveCtrlRandom'); if (el) { el.value = v; const sv = $('liveCtrlRandomV'); if (sv) sv.textContent = Math.round(v * 100) + '%'; }
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": randomness → ${Math.round(v * 100)}%`);
          break;
        }
        case 'setRamp': {

          if (!param || typeof param !== 'object') break;
          const r = state.rampSettings || (state.rampSettings = loadRampSettings());
          if (typeof param.enabled === 'boolean') r.enabled = param.enabled;
          if (['time','engagement','step','adaptive'].includes(param.mode))   r.mode = param.mode;
          if (['linear','exponential','sine'].includes(param.curve))          r.curve = param.curve;
          if (['max','add','replace'].includes(param.blendMode))              r.blendMode = param.blendMode;
          if (Number.isFinite(param.startVal)) r.startVal = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, param.startVal));
          if (Number.isFinite(param.endVal))   r.endVal   = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, param.endVal));

          const en = $('rampEnable'); if (en) en.checked = r.enabled;
          const mp = $('rampPanel'); if (mp) mp.style.display = r.enabled ? '' : 'none';
          const md = $('rampMode'); if (md) md.value = r.mode;
          const cv = $('rampCurve'); if (cv) cv.value = r.curve;
          const sv = $('rampStart'); if (sv) sv.value = r.startVal;
          const ev = $('rampEnd');   if (ev) ev.value = r.endVal;
          const bl = $('rampBlend'); if (bl) bl.value = r.blendMode;
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": ramp updated`);
          break;
        }
        case 'duckAudio': {

          if (typeof drone !== 'undefined' && drone?.duck) {
            const level = Number.isFinite(Number(param)) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(param))) : 0.1;
            drone.duck('rules', level);
          }
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": ducked`);
          break;
        }
        case 'unduckAudio':
          if (typeof drone !== 'undefined' && drone?.unduck) {
            drone.unduck('rules');
          }
          break;
        case 'setSpeechRate': {

          const raw = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, Number.isFinite(Number(param)) ? Number(param) : 1));
          const rate = gateSpeechRate(raw);
          state.speechRate = rate;

          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": speech rate → ${rate.toFixed(2)}×`);
          break;
        }
        case 'setSoundscapeVolume': {
          const raw = Number.isFinite(Number(param)) ? Number(param) : 0.35;
          const vol = gateSoundscapeVolume(raw);
          state.droneVolume = vol;
          if (typeof drone !== 'undefined' && drone?.setVolume) drone.setVolume(vol);
          const slider = $('droneVolume'); if (slider) slider.value = Math.round(vol * 100);
          const lbl = $('droneVolVal'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = Math.round(vol * 100);
          notify.info(`Rule "${n}": soundscape volume → ${Math.round(vol * 100)}%`);
          break;
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[rules] action failed:', rule.name, type, e);
    }
  }

  function _showRuleOverlay(text) {
    if (!document.getElementById('rule-overlay-style')) {
      const s = document.createElement('style');
      s.id = 'rule-overlay-style';
      s.textContent = `@keyframes ruleOverlayFade { 0%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-45%)} 15%{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)} 75%{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)} 100%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-55%)} }`;
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    }
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.style.cssText = `position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
      z-index:9000;background:rgba(4,4,7,0.85);border:0.5px solid rgba(196,154,60,0.35);
      border-radius:12px;padding:20px 30px;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text);
      font-family:var(--font-body);text-align:center;max-width:70vw;
      backdrop-filter:blur(8px);pointer-events:none;
      animation:ruleOverlayFade 2.5s ease forwards`;
    el.textContent = text;
    document.body.appendChild(el);
    setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 2600);
  }

  let DEFAULT_RUNTIME_RULES = [];

  function _activeRuntimeRules() {
    const r = state.runtimeRules;
    if (Array.isArray(r)) return r;
    return DEFAULT_RUNTIME_RULES;
  }

  function tickRulesEngine(frameSec) {
    const rules = _activeRuntimeRules();
    if (!rules.length) return;
    const es = state.engineState;
    if (!es || !es.playing) return;
    const now = es.sessionSec;
    for (const rule of rules) {
      if (!rule.enabled) continue;
      const rs = _getRuntimeRuleState(rule.id);
      const condMet = evalEngineCondition(rule.condition);
      if (condMet) {
        rs.conditionHeldSec += frameSec;
        if (rs.conditionHeldSec >= rule.durationSec) {
          const cooldownElapsed = now - rs.lastFiredSec;
          if (rs.lastFiredSec === -Infinity || cooldownElapsed >= rule.cooldownSec) {
            rs.lastFiredSec = now;
            rs.conditionHeldSec = 0;
            executeRuleAction(rule);
          }
        }
      } else {
        rs.conditionHeldSec = 0;
      }
    }
  }

  DEFAULT_RUNTIME_RULES = [
    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Gentle nudge on prolonged narrator silence',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'sinceVoiceSec', op: '>', value: 45 },
      durationSec: 0,
      cooldownSec: 300,
      action: { type: 'notifyMessage', param: 'Still here — take your time.' },
    }),
    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Lower soundscape during deep work phases',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'phaseKind', op: '==', value: 'work' },
      durationSec: 8,
      cooldownSec: 60,
      action: { type: 'duckAudio', param: 0.18 },
    }),
    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Restore soundscape when leaving work phase',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'phaseKind', op: '!=', value: 'work' },
      durationSec: 2,
      cooldownSec: 10,
      action: { type: 'unduckAudio', param: null },
    }),

    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Re-alert nudge when eyes stay closed during Wake/Reintroduction',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'wakefulness', op: '<', value: 0.35 },
      durationSec: 15,
      cooldownSec: 60,
      action: { type: 'showOnScreenText', param: 'Take your time opening your eyes.' },
    }),
    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Pause when user has left the camera view',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'faceDetected', op: '==', value: 0 },
      durationSec: 60,
      cooldownSec: 120,
      action: { type: 'pause', param: null },
    }),
    normalizeRule({
      name: 'Gentle hint that user can close their eyes anytime',
      enabled: true,
      condition: { metric: 'attention', op: '>', value: 0.7 },
      durationSec: 600,
      cooldownSec: 1800,
      action: { type: 'notifyMessage', param: 'You can close your eyes anytime.' },
    }),
  ];

  function _trigUid() {
    return 't_' + Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
  }

  function normalizeTrigger(t) {
    const raw = t || {};
    const cond = raw.condition || {};
    const normalizeAct = (a) => ({
      type:  a && (RULES_VALID_ACTIONS.has(a.type) || a.type === 'none') ? a.type : 'none',
      param: a?.param ?? null,
    });
    return {
      id:           typeof raw.id === 'string' && raw.id ? raw.id : _trigUid(),
      enabled:      raw.enabled !== false,
      name:         typeof raw.name === 'string' && raw.name ? raw.name : 'Trigger',
      atSec:        Number.isFinite(raw.atSec)        ? Math.max(0, raw.atSec)        : 60,
      windowDurSec: Number.isFinite(raw.windowDurSec) ? Math.max(1, raw.windowDurSec) : 10,
      condition: {
        metric: _isValidRuleMetric(cond.metric) ? cond.metric : 'engagement',
        op:     RULES_VALID_OPS.has(cond.op)         ? cond.op     : '>=',
        value:  Number.isFinite(cond.value) || typeof cond.value === 'string' ? cond.value : 0.6,
      },
      successAction: normalizeAct(raw.successAction),
      failureAction: normalizeAct(raw.failureAction),
      cooldownSec:   Number.isFinite(raw.cooldownSec) ? Math.max(0, raw.cooldownSec) : 120,
    };
  }

  const _triggerWindowState = {};

  function _getTriggerWindowState(id) {
    if (!_triggerWindowState[id]) _triggerWindowState[id] = { status: 'idle', openedAt: 0, lastFiredAt: -Infinity };
    return _triggerWindowState[id];
  }

  function clearTriggerWindowState() {
    Object.keys(_triggerWindowState).forEach(k => delete _triggerWindowState[k]);
  }

  function executeTriggerAction(action, triggerName, outcome) {
    if (!action || action.type === 'none') return;

    executeRuleAction({ name: `${triggerName} ${outcome}`, action });
  }

  function _activeRuntimeTriggers() {
    const t = state.runtimeTriggers;
    if (Array.isArray(t)) return t;
    return DEFAULT_RUNTIME_TRIGGERS;
  }

  function tickTriggerWindows() {
    const triggers = _activeRuntimeTriggers();
    if (!triggers.length) return;
    const es = state.engineState;
    if (!es || !es.playing) return;
    const now = es.sessionSec;

    for (const trigger of triggers) {
      if (!trigger.enabled) continue;
      const ws = _getTriggerWindowState(trigger.id);

      if (ws.status === 'idle') {
        const cooldownOk = now - ws.lastFiredAt >= trigger.cooldownSec;
        if (now >= trigger.atSec && cooldownOk) {
          ws.status   = 'open';
          ws.openedAt = now;
        }
      }

      if (ws.status === 'open') {
        const elapsed = now - ws.openedAt;
        const condMet = evalEngineCondition(trigger.condition);
        if (condMet) {
          ws.status      = 'success';
          ws.lastFiredAt = now;
          executeTriggerAction(trigger.successAction, trigger.name, '✓');

          setTimeout(() => { if (_triggerWindowState[trigger.id]) _triggerWindowState[trigger.id].status = 'idle'; }, 500);
        } else if (elapsed >= trigger.windowDurSec) {
          ws.status      = 'failed';
          ws.lastFiredAt = now;
          executeTriggerAction(trigger.failureAction, trigger.name, '✗');
          setTimeout(() => { if (_triggerWindowState[trigger.id]) _triggerWindowState[trigger.id].status = 'idle'; }, 500);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  const DEFAULT_RUNTIME_TRIGGERS = [
    normalizeTrigger({
      name: 'Mid-session engagement check',
      enabled: true,
      atSec: 480,
      windowDurSec: 30,
      condition: { metric: 'engagement', op: '>=', value: 0.4 },
      successAction: { type: 'none', param: null },
      failureAction: { type: 'notifyMessage', param: 'Drifted? That can be part of it.' },
      cooldownSec: 999999,
    }),
  ];

  const WEBCAM_INFER_FPS         = 8;
  const WEBCAM_BRIGHTNESS_FPS    = 2;
  const EAR_CLOSED_THRESHOLD     = 0.20;
  const EAR_OPEN_THRESHOLD       = 0.32;
  const FACE_PRESENCE_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000;
  const AMBIENT_EMA_ALPHA        = 0.05;
  const AMBIENT_DIM_DARK_THRESHOLD   = 0.25;
  const AMBIENT_DIM_BRIGHT_THRESHOLD = 0.70;

  const RIGHT_EYE_IDX = [33, 160, 158, 133, 153, 144];
  const LEFT_EYE_IDX  = [362, 385, 387, 263, 373, 380];

  const MP_VISION_VERSION = '0.10.14';
  const MP_VISION_ESM_URL = `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@${MP_VISION_VERSION}/+esm`;
  const MP_WASM_PATH      = `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@${MP_VISION_VERSION}/wasm`;
  const MP_MODEL_PATH     = 'https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/face_landmarker/face_landmarker/float16/1/face_landmarker.task';

  let _mpFaceLandmarker = null;
  let _mpLoadPromise    = null;

  async function _loadFaceLandmarker() {
    if (_mpFaceLandmarker) return _mpFaceLandmarker;
    if (_mpLoadPromise)    return _mpLoadPromise;
    _mpLoadPromise = (async () => {
      const mod = await import(MP_VISION_ESM_URL);

      const lib = mod.FaceLandmarker ? mod : (mod.default || {});
      const FaceLandmarker  = lib.FaceLandmarker;
      const FilesetResolver = lib.FilesetResolver;
      if (!FaceLandmarker || !FilesetResolver) {
        throw new Error('MediaPipe imports missing — CDN may be unreachable or version changed');
      }
      const filesetResolver = await FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks(MP_WASM_PATH);
      _mpFaceLandmarker = await FaceLandmarker.createFromOptions(filesetResolver, {
        baseOptions: { modelAssetPath: MP_MODEL_PATH, delegate: 'GPU' },
        runningMode: 'VIDEO',
        numFaces: 1,
        outputFaceBlendshapes: false,
        outputFacialTransformationMatrixes: false,
      });
      return _mpFaceLandmarker;
    })();
    try { return await _mpLoadPromise; }
    finally { _mpLoadPromise = null; }
  }

  function _euclideanDist(a, b) {
    const dx = a.x - b.x, dy = a.y - b.y;
    return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  }

  function _eyeAspectRatio(landmarks, eyeIdx) {
    const p = eyeIdx.map(i => landmarks[i]);
    if (p.some(x => !x)) return null;
    const v1 = _euclideanDist(p[1], p[5]);
    const v2 = _euclideanDist(p[2], p[4]);
    const h  = _euclideanDist(p[0], p[3]);
    if (h < 1e-6) return null;
    return (v1 + v2) / (2 * h);
  }

  function _computeWakefulness(rawEAR, phaseKind) {
    if (rawEAR == null) return null;
    const closed = rawEAR < EAR_CLOSED_THRESHOLD;
    const open   = rawEAR > EAR_OPEN_THRESHOLD;
    switch (phaseKind) {
      case 'settling':
      case 'induction':
      case 'deepener':
      case 'level':
      case 'work':
      case 'affirm':

        return closed ? 0.9 : (open ? 0.5 : 0.7);
      case 'lightener':

        return 0.5;
      case 'wake':

        return open ? 0.95 : (closed ? 0.3 : 0.6);
      case 'reintroduction':

        return open ? 0.95 : (closed ? 0.1 : 0.5);
      default:
        return 0.5;
    }
  }

  function requestWebcamConsent() {
    return new Promise(resolve => {
      const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
      backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
      backdrop.style.zIndex = 9999;
      backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
        <h3 style="margin:0 0 12px;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:500">Enable webcam awareness?</h3>
        <div style="font-size:0.84rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)">
          Your webcam will be used <strong>locally only</strong> to detect:
        </div>
        <ul style="margin:8px 0 12px 18px;padding:0;font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.65;color:var(--text-dim)">
          <li>Whether you're present (for automatic pausing)</li>
          <li>Eye state — phase-appropriate (closed eyes are <em>good</em> during trance)</li>
          <li>Room brightness (for visualizer comfort)</li>
        </ul>
        <div style="font-size:0.76rem;color:var(--text);background:rgba(120,180,240,0.06);border:0.5px solid rgba(120,180,240,0.2);padding:10px 12px;line-height:1.55">
          <strong style="display:block;margin-bottom:4px">What is NOT collected:</strong>
          <span>No frames saved to disk · No data leaves this device · No identity or facial recognition</span>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.55">
          Processing happens in your browser via Google's MediaPipe (loaded from a CDN on first use, ~3–5MB WASM + model).
          You can disable anytime via the camera icon during the session. <strong>This permission applies to this session only.</strong>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:18px">
          <button id="webcamConsentNo"  class="preview-btn">Not now</button>
          <button id="webcamConsentYes" class="preview-btn primary">Enable webcam</button>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
      const cleanup = (val) => { backdrop.remove(); resolve(val); };
      backdrop.querySelector('#webcamConsentNo')?.addEventListener('click', () => cleanup(false));
      backdrop.querySelector('#webcamConsentYes')?.addEventListener('click', () => cleanup(true));

      backdrop.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === backdrop) cleanup(false); });
    });
  }

  async function startWebcam() {
    const w = state._webcam;
    if (w.status === 'active' || w.status === 'requesting' || w.status === 'loading') return;

    if (!navigator.mediaDevices?.getUserMedia) {
      w.status = 'error';
      w.errorMessage = 'getUserMedia not supported in this browser/context';
      _renderWebcamStatus();
      notify.warn('Webcam not supported in this browser');
      return;
    }

    w.status = 'requesting';
    w.errorMessage = null;
    _renderWebcamStatus();

    try {

      w.stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
        video: { width: { ideal: 320 }, height: { ideal: 240 }, facingMode: 'user' },
        audio: false,
      });

      if (!w.videoEl) {
        w.videoEl = document.createElement('video');
        w.videoEl.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1px;height:1px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:-1;';
        w.videoEl.muted = true;
        w.videoEl.autoplay = true;
        w.videoEl.playsInline = true;
        w.videoEl.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        document.body.appendChild(w.videoEl);
      }
      w.videoEl.srcObject = w.stream;
      await w.videoEl.play().catch(() => {});

      w.status = 'loading';
      _renderWebcamStatus();
      await _loadFaceLandmarker();

      w.status   = 'active';
      w.enabled  = true;
      w.lastFaceAt = 0;
      _renderWebcamStatus();
      _startWebcamLoops();
      notify.info('Webcam awareness on — local processing only');
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[webcam] start failed:', e);
      w.status = 'error';
      w.errorMessage = e?.message || String(e);
      _renderWebcamStatus();

      if (e?.name === 'NotAllowedError')      notify.warn('Camera permission denied');
      else if (e?.name === 'NotFoundError')   notify.warn('No camera found');
      else if (e?.name === 'NotReadableError') notify.warn('Camera is in use by another application');
      else                                     notify.warn('Webcam error: ' + (e?.message || 'unknown'));
      stopWebcam();
    }
  }

  function stopWebcam() {
    const w = state._webcam;
    if (w.inferTimerHandle)      { clearInterval(w.inferTimerHandle);      w.inferTimerHandle = null; }
    if (w.brightnessTimerHandle) { clearInterval(w.brightnessTimerHandle); w.brightnessTimerHandle = null; }
    if (w.stream) {
      try { w.stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); } catch {}
      w.stream = null;
    }
    if (w.videoEl) {
      try { w.videoEl.srcObject = null; w.videoEl.remove(); } catch {}
      w.videoEl = null;
    }
    w.status        = 'idle';
    w.enabled       = false;
    w.faceDetected  = false;
    w.rawEAR        = null;
    w.motion        = 0;
    w._brightnessCanvas = null;
    w._brightnessCtx    = null;

    if (typeof clearEngineSignals === 'function') {

      try {
        const sigs = _engineExternalSignals;
        if (sigs) { delete sigs.attention; delete sigs.wakefulness; }
      } catch {}
    }
    state.ambientBrightness = 0.5;
    state.ambientDimScale   = 1.0;
    _renderWebcamStatus();
  }

  function _startWebcamLoops() {
    const w = state._webcam;
    const inferIntervalMs      = Math.round(1000 / WEBCAM_INFER_FPS);
    const brightnessIntervalMs = Math.round(1000 / WEBCAM_BRIGHTNESS_FPS);
    w.inferTimerHandle = setInterval(() => {
      try { _tickWebcamInfer(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[webcam] infer tick failed:', e); }
    }, inferIntervalMs);
    w.brightnessTimerHandle = setInterval(() => {
      try { _tickWebcamBrightness(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[webcam] brightness tick failed:', e); }
    }, brightnessIntervalMs);
  }

  function _tickWebcamInfer() {
    const w = state._webcam;
    if (w.status !== 'active' || !w.videoEl || !_mpFaceLandmarker) return;
    if (w.videoEl.readyState < 2) return;

    const result = _mpFaceLandmarker.detectForVideo(w.videoEl, performance.now());
    const faces  = result?.faceLandmarks || [];
    const facePresent = faces.length > 0;

    if (facePresent) {
      w.faceDetected = true;
      w.lastFaceAt   = Date.now();
      const lm = faces[0];
      const earR = _eyeAspectRatio(lm, RIGHT_EYE_IDX);
      const earL = _eyeAspectRatio(lm, LEFT_EYE_IDX);
      const ear  = (earR != null && earL != null) ? (earR + earL) / 2 : (earR ?? earL);
      w.rawEAR = ear;
    } else {

      if (w.lastFaceAt && Date.now() - w.lastFaceAt > FACE_PRESENCE_TIMEOUT_MS) {
        w.faceDetected = false;
        w.rawEAR = null;
      }
    }

    if (typeof setEngineSignal === 'function') {
      setEngineSignal('attention', w.faceDetected ? 0.8 : 0.0, 0.25);
      const phaseKind   = state.engineState?.phaseKind || null;
      const wakefulness = _computeWakefulness(w.rawEAR, phaseKind);
      if (wakefulness != null) {
        setEngineSignal('wakefulness', wakefulness, 0.15);
      }
    }
    _renderWebcamStatus();
  }

  function _tickWebcamBrightness() {
    const w = state._webcam;
    if (w.status !== 'active' || !w.videoEl || w.videoEl.readyState < 2) return;

    if (!w._brightnessCanvas) {

      w._brightnessCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      w._brightnessCanvas.width = 16;
      w._brightnessCanvas.height = 12;
      w._brightnessCtx = w._brightnessCanvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
    }
    try {
      w._brightnessCtx.drawImage(w.videoEl, 0, 0, 16, 12);
      const data = w._brightnessCtx.getImageData(0, 0, 16, 12).data;
      let sum = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {

        sum += 0.299 * data[i] + 0.587 * data[i + 1] + 0.114 * data[i + 2];
      }
      const meanLuma = sum / (data.length / 4) / 255;

      const prev = state.ambientBrightness ?? 0.5;
      state.ambientBrightness = prev + AMBIENT_EMA_ALPHA * (meanLuma - prev);

      const b = state.ambientBrightness;
      let scale;
      if (b < AMBIENT_DIM_DARK_THRESHOLD)        scale = 0.6;
      else if (b < 0.45)                          scale = 0.6 + (b - AMBIENT_DIM_DARK_THRESHOLD) * 2.0;
      else if (b > AMBIENT_DIM_BRIGHT_THRESHOLD)  scale = 1.2;
      else if (b > 0.55)                          scale = 1.0 + (b - 0.55) * 1.33;
      else                                        scale = 1.0;
      state.ambientDimScale = scale;
    } catch (e) {

      console.warn('[webcam] brightness sample failed:', e);
    }
  }

  function _renderWebcamStatus() {
    const dot = document.getElementById('webcamStatusDot');
    if (!dot) return;
    const w = state._webcam;
    let color = 'transparent', title = 'Webcam off', opacity = 0;
    switch (w.status) {
      case 'requesting': color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; title = 'Requesting camera permission…'; opacity = 0.8; break;
      case 'loading':    color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; title = 'Loading face detection model…'; opacity = 0.8; break;
      case 'active':
        opacity = 1;
        if (w.faceDetected) { color = '#7dc87a'; title = 'Webcam active — face detected (local processing only)'; }
        else                { color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; title = 'Webcam active — no face detected'; }
        break;
      case 'error': color = '#ff6b6b'; title = 'Webcam error: ' + (w.errorMessage || 'unknown'); opacity = 0.9; break;
      case 'idle':  color = 'transparent'; title = 'Webcam off'; opacity = 0; break;
    }
    dot.style.background = color;
    dot.style.opacity = String(opacity);
    dot.title = title;
  }

  const MIC_TICK_MS = 20;
  const MIC_FALLING_EDGE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 200;
  const MIC_NOISE_HEADROOM = 0.02;
  const MIC_INHALE_HEADROOM = 0.05;
  const MIC_CALIBRATION_MS = 2000;
  const MIC_RECENT_BREATHS_MAX = 5;
  const MIC_FALLBACK_AFTER_SILENT = 3;

  async function startMic() {
    const m = state._mic;
    if (m.status === 'active' || m.status === 'requesting') return;
    if (!navigator.mediaDevices?.getUserMedia) {
      m.status = 'error';
      m.errorMessage = 'getUserMedia not supported';
      _renderMicStatus();
      notify.warn('Microphone API not supported in this browser.');
      return;
    }
    m.status = 'requesting';
    _renderMicStatus();
    let stream;
    try {

      stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
        audio: {
          echoCancellation: false,
          noiseSuppression: false,
          autoGainControl: false,
        },
      });
    } catch (e) {
      m.status = 'error';
      m.errorMessage = e?.message || 'permission denied';
      _renderMicStatus();

      if (e?.name === 'NotAllowedError') {
        notify.warn('Microphone permission denied — adaptive pacing falls back to fixed timer.');
      } else {
        notify.warn('Could not access microphone — adaptive pacing falls back to fixed timer.');
      }
      return;
    }
    m.stream = stream;
    try {

      const Ctx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
      m.audioCtx = new Ctx();
      m.sourceNode = m.audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
      m.analyser = m.audioCtx.createAnalyser();
      m.analyser.fftSize = 256;
      m.analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.4;
      m.sourceNode.connect(m.analyser);

      m._fftBuffer = new Uint8Array(m.analyser.fftSize);

      m.ema = 0.04;
      m.noiseFloor = 0.04;
      m.inhaling = false;
      m.lastExhaleAt = 0;
      m.consecutiveSilent = 0;
      m.recentBreaths = [];
      m._calibrationStartAt = Date.now();
      m._calibrationMaxEma = 0;
      m._lastBelowFloorAt = 0;
      m.status = 'active';
      _renderMicStatus();
      m.tickHandle = setInterval(_tickMic, MIC_TICK_MS);
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[mic] init failed:', e);
      m.status = 'error';
      m.errorMessage = e?.message || 'audio context failed';
      _renderMicStatus();
      stopMic();
    }
  }

  function stopMic() {
    const m = state._mic;
    if (m.tickHandle) { clearInterval(m.tickHandle); m.tickHandle = null; }
    if (m.stream) {
      try { m.stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); } catch {}
      m.stream = null;
    }
    if (m.audioCtx) {
      try { m.audioCtx.close(); } catch {}
      m.audioCtx = null;
    }
    m.sourceNode = null;
    m.analyser = null;
    m._fftBuffer = null;
    m.status = 'idle';
    m.errorMessage = null;
    _renderMicStatus();
  }

  function _tickMic() {
    const m = state._mic;
    if (m.status !== 'active' || !m.analyser || !m._fftBuffer) return;
    if (state.paused || document.hidden) return;
    m.analyser.getByteTimeDomainData(m._fftBuffer);

    let sumSq = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < m._fftBuffer.length; i++) {
      const v = (m._fftBuffer[i] - 128) / 128;
      sumSq += v * v;
    }
    const rms = Math.sqrt(sumSq / m._fftBuffer.length);

    m.ema = m.ema * 0.8 + rms * 0.2;

    if (m._calibrationStartAt && Date.now() - m._calibrationStartAt < MIC_CALIBRATION_MS) {
      if (m.ema > m._calibrationMaxEma) m._calibrationMaxEma = m.ema;
      return;
    }
    if (m._calibrationStartAt) {
      m.noiseFloor = Math.max(0.02, m._calibrationMaxEma + MIC_NOISE_HEADROOM);
      m._calibrationStartAt = 0;
      console.debug('[mic] calibrated noise floor:', m.noiseFloor.toFixed(4));
    }

    const now = Date.now();
    if (!m.inhaling && m.ema > m.noiseFloor + MIC_INHALE_HEADROOM) {
      m.inhaling = true;
      m._lastBelowFloorAt = 0;
    } else if (m.inhaling) {
      if (m.ema <= m.noiseFloor) {
        if (m._lastBelowFloorAt === 0) m._lastBelowFloorAt = now;
        else if (now - m._lastBelowFloorAt >= MIC_FALLING_EDGE_DEBOUNCE_MS) {

          _onExhaleEnd();
          m.inhaling = false;
          m._lastBelowFloorAt = 0;
        }
      } else {
        m._lastBelowFloorAt = 0;
      }
    }
    _renderMicStatus();
  }

  function _onExhaleEnd() {
    const m = state._mic;
    const now = Date.now();
    if (m.lastExhaleAt) {
      const interval = now - m.lastExhaleAt;

      if (interval >= 1000 && interval <= 30000) {
        m.recentBreaths.push(interval);
        if (m.recentBreaths.length > MIC_RECENT_BREATHS_MAX) {
          m.recentBreaths.shift();
        }
      }
    }
    m.lastExhaleAt = now;
    m.consecutiveSilent = 0;

    try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('hne:exhale-end', { detail: { at: now } })); } catch {}
  }

  function waitForExhale(targetMs, maxMs) {
    const m = state._mic;
    if (!state.adaptiveBreathPacing || m.status !== 'active' || m.consecutiveSilent >= MIC_FALLBACK_AFTER_SILENT) {

      return interruptibleSleep(targetMs);
    }
    const ceiling = maxMs || Math.round(targetMs * 1.5);
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      let resolved = false;
      const cleanup = () => {
        window.removeEventListener('hne:exhale-end', onExhale);
        clearTimeout(timeoutHandle);
      };
      const onExhale = () => {
        if (resolved) return;
        resolved = true;
        cleanup();

        setTimeout(resolve, 250);
      };
      const timeoutHandle = setTimeout(() => {
        if (resolved) return;
        resolved = true;
        cleanup();

        m.consecutiveSilent++;
        if (m.consecutiveSilent >= MIC_FALLBACK_AFTER_SILENT) {
          notify.info('Adaptive breath pacing falling back to fixed timer (no breath detected).');
        }
        resolve();
      }, ceiling);
      window.addEventListener('hne:exhale-end', onExhale, { once: true });
    });
  }

  function _renderMicStatus() {
    const dot = document.getElementById('micStatusDot');
    const text = document.getElementById('micStatusText');
    const row = document.getElementById('micStatusRow');
    if (!dot || !text || !row) return;
    const m = state._mic;
    const isVisible = m.status !== 'idle';
    row.style.display = isVisible ? '' : 'none';
    if (!isVisible) return;
    let color = '#888', label = 'listening…';
    if (m.status === 'requesting') { color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; label = 'requesting permission…'; }
    else if (m.status === 'error') { color = '#ff6b6b'; label = 'error: ' + (m.errorMessage || 'unknown'); }
    else if (m.status === 'active') {
      if (m._calibrationStartAt) { color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; label = 'calibrating noise floor…'; }
      else if (m.consecutiveSilent >= MIC_FALLBACK_AFTER_SILENT) { color = '#888'; label = 'fallback: fixed timer'; }
      else if (m.lastExhaleAt && Date.now() - m.lastExhaleAt < 3000) {
        color = '#7dc87a';
        const avg = m.recentBreaths.length
          ? Math.round(m.recentBreaths.reduce((s, x) => s + x, 0) / m.recentBreaths.length / 100) / 10
          : null;
        label = avg ? `breath detected · avg ${avg}s` : 'breath detected';
      } else if (m.inhaling) { color = 'var(--neon-cyan)'; label = 'inhale…'; }
      else { color = '#7dc87a'; label = 'listening…'; }
    }
    dot.style.background = color;
    text.textContent = label;
  }

  const SAFETY_DEFAULTS = {
    maxSpeechRate:        1.5,
    minSpeechRate:        0.6,
    maxSoundscapeVolume:  0.85,
    emergencyCooldownSec: 30,
    maxSessionMinutes:    60,
  };

  function getSafetyConfig() {
    return { ...SAFETY_DEFAULTS, ...(state.safetyConfig || {}) };
  }

  function gateSpeechRate(requested) {
    const c = getSafetyConfig();
    const r = Number(requested);
    if (!Number.isFinite(r)) return 1.0;

    const relaxed = (typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function') && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
    const lo = relaxed ? 0.4 : c.minSpeechRate;
    const hi = relaxed ? 2.0 : c.maxSpeechRate;
    const clamped = Math.max(lo, Math.min(hi, r));
    if (!relaxed && Math.abs(clamped - r) > 0.001) {
      notify.warn(`Safety: speech rate clamped from ${r.toFixed(2)}× to ${clamped.toFixed(2)}×`);
    }
    return clamped;
  }

  function gateSoundscapeVolume(requested) {
    const c = getSafetyConfig();
    const v = Number(requested);
    if (!Number.isFinite(v)) return 0;

    const relaxed = (typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function') && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
    const hi = relaxed ? 1.0 : c.maxSoundscapeVolume;
    const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(hi, v));
    if (!relaxed && Math.abs(clamped - v) > 0.001) {
      notify.warn(`Safety: soundscape volume clamped from ${Math.round(v*100)}% to ${Math.round(clamped*100)}%`);
    }
    return clamped;
  }

  function getEmergencyCooldownRemaining() {
    if (!state._cooldownUntil) return 0;
    return Math.max(0, Math.ceil((state._cooldownUntil - Date.now()) / 1000));
  }

  function checkSessionLengthSafety() {
    const c = getSafetyConfig();
    const m = getScriptMetrics(state.fullScript || '');
    if ((m.estimatedMin || 0) > c.maxSessionMinutes) {
      return {
        warn: true,
        message: `This session is estimated at ${m.estimatedMin} minutes — over the ${c.maxSessionMinutes}-minute soft cap. Consider a shorter session, or proceed if you're sure.`,
      };
    }
    return null;
  }

  function _renderSafetyPanel() {
    const c = getSafetyConfig();
    const setVal = (id, v) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = v; };
    setVal('safety_minSpeechRate',        c.minSpeechRate.toFixed(1));
    setVal('safety_maxSpeechRate',        c.maxSpeechRate.toFixed(1));
    setVal('safety_maxSoundscapeVolume',  Math.round(c.maxSoundscapeVolume * 100));
    setVal('safety_emergencyCooldownSec', c.emergencyCooldownSec);
    setVal('safety_maxSessionMinutes',    c.maxSessionMinutes);
  }

  function _resetSafetyConfig() {
    state.safetyConfig = { ...SAFETY_DEFAULTS };
    _renderSafetyPanel();
    saveUserSettings();
    notify.info('Safety limits reset to defaults');
  }

  const SESSION_MODES = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.SESSION_MODES) || [];

  const ADULT_ELIGIBLE_BRACKETS = new Set(['21-24','25-34','35-44','45-54','55-64','65+']);
  function _userIsAdultEligible() {
    try {

      if (state._debug?.showAdult) return true;
      const ageEl = $('pfAge');
      if (!ageEl || !ADULT_ELIGIBLE_BRACKETS.has(ageEl.value)) return false;
      const adultEl = $('pfAdultUnlock');
      return !!adultEl?.checked;
    } catch { return false; }
  }

  function _renderSessionModeDropdown() {
    const sel = $('sessionModeSelect');
    if (!sel) return;
    const eligible = _userIsAdultEligible();
    const cur = sel.value || 'standard';
    sel.innerHTML = '';
    for (const mode of SESSION_MODES) {
      if (mode.adultGated && !eligible) continue;
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = mode.id;
      opt.textContent = `${mode.icon || '○'} ${mode.name}`;

      if (mode.adultGated) opt.textContent += ' · 🔞';
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    }

    const stillVisible = Array.from(sel.options).some(o => o.value === cur);
    sel.value = stillVisible ? cur : 'standard';
    if (!stillVisible && cur !== 'standard') {

      try { applySessionMode('standard'); } catch {}
    }

    const m = SESSION_MODES.find(x => x.id === sel.value);
    if (m) {
      const ic = $('sessionModeIcon');        if (ic) ic.textContent = m.icon || '○';
      const desc = $('sessionModeDescription'); if (desc) desc.textContent = m.description || '';
    }
  }

  function applySessionMode(modeId) {
    const mode = SESSION_MODES.find(m => m.id === modeId);
    if (!mode) { notify.warn(`Unknown session mode: ${modeId}`); return; }

    if (mode.adultGated && !_userIsAdultEligible()) {
      notify.warn(`Session mode "${mode.name}" requires age 21+ and the mature-content opt-in. Falling back to Standard.`);
      return applySessionMode('standard');
    }

    state.activeSessionMode = mode.id;

    if (mode.rules === null) {
      state.runtimeRules = null;
    } else {
      state.runtimeRules = mode.rules.map(r => normalizeRule(r));
    }
    if (mode.triggers === null) {
      state.runtimeTriggers = null;
    } else {
      state.runtimeTriggers = mode.triggers.map(t => normalizeTrigger(t));
    }

    if (mode.safetyOverrides) {
      const cur = state.safetyConfig || { ...SAFETY_DEFAULTS };
      const ov = mode.safetyOverrides;
      state.safetyConfig = {
        ...cur,
        ...(Number.isFinite(ov.maxSpeechRate)        && { maxSpeechRate:        Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, ov.maxSpeechRate)) }),
        ...(Number.isFinite(ov.minSpeechRate)        && { minSpeechRate:        Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, ov.minSpeechRate)) }),
        ...(Number.isFinite(ov.maxSoundscapeVolume)  && { maxSoundscapeVolume:  Math.max(0.0, Math.min(1.0, ov.maxSoundscapeVolume)) }),
        ...(Number.isFinite(ov.emergencyCooldownSec) && { emergencyCooldownSec: Math.max(0, Math.min(300, ov.emergencyCooldownSec)) }),
        ...(Number.isFinite(ov.maxSessionMinutes)    && { maxSessionMinutes:    Math.max(5, Math.min(180, ov.maxSessionMinutes)) }),
      };
      _renderSafetyPanel();
    } else if (mode.id === 'standard') {

      state.safetyConfig = { ...SAFETY_DEFAULTS };
      _renderSafetyPanel();
    }

    if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(mode, 'rampSettings')) {
      const target = (mode.rampSettings === null)
        ? { ...RAMP_DEFAULTS }
        : { ...RAMP_DEFAULTS, ...mode.rampSettings };
      saveRampSettings(target);
      state.rampSettings = loadRampSettings();

      try {
        const r = state.rampSettings;
        const en = $('rampEnable'); if (en) en.checked = !!r.enabled;
        const mp = $('rampPanel');  if (mp) mp.style.display = r.enabled ? '' : 'none';
        const md = $('rampMode');   if (md) md.value = r.mode;
        const cv = $('rampCurve');  if (cv) cv.value = r.curve;
        const sv = $('rampStart');  if (sv) sv.value = r.startVal;
        const ev = $('rampEnd');    if (ev) ev.value = r.endVal;
        const bl = $('rampBlend');  if (bl) bl.value = r.blendMode;
      } catch {}
    } else if (mode.id === 'standard') {

      saveRampSettings({ ...RAMP_DEFAULTS });
      state.rampSettings = loadRampSettings();
    }
    if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(mode, 'pacingSettings')) {
      const target = (mode.pacingSettings === null)
        ? { ...PACING_DEFAULTS }
        : _normalizePacingSettings({ ...PACING_DEFAULTS, ...mode.pacingSettings });
      savePacingSettings(target);
      state.pacingSettings = loadPacingSettings();

      try {
        const p = state.pacingSettings;
        const en = $('pacingEnable'); if (en) en.checked = !!p.enabled;
        const mp = $('pacingPanel');  if (mp) mp.style.display = p.enabled ? '' : 'none';
        const set = (id, v) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = v; };
        set('pacingMin',    p.minSpeed);
        set('pacingMax',    p.maxSpeed);
        set('pacingCurve',  p.curve);
        set('pacingSmooth', p.smoothingSec);
        set('pacingLock',   p.lockDuringSec);
      } catch {}

      _resetDynamicPacing();
    } else if (mode.id === 'standard') {
      savePacingSettings({ ...PACING_DEFAULTS });
      state.pacingSettings = loadPacingSettings();
      _resetDynamicPacing();
    }

    clearRuntimeRuleState();
    clearTriggerWindowState();

    saveUserSettings();
    notify.info(`Session mode: ${mode.name}`);
  }

  const PLAYBACK_DYNAMICS_DEFAULTS = {
    enabled:        false,
    mode:           'engagement',
    startScale:     0.90,
    endScale:       1.10,
    curve:          'sine',
    engagementMin:  0.85,
    engagementMax:  1.15,
    smoothingSec:   8,
  };

  let _playbackDynamicsState = {
    smoothedScale: 1.0,
    lastTickMs:    0,
    lastApplyMs:   0,
  };

  function getPlaybackDynamicsConfig() {
    return { ...PLAYBACK_DYNAMICS_DEFAULTS, ...(state.playbackDynamics || {}) };
  }

  function _pdCurve(progress, shape) {
    const p = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress));
    switch (shape) {
      case 'linear':      return p;
      case 'sine':        return 0.5 - 0.5 * Math.cos(Math.PI * p);
      case 'exponential': return p * p;
      default:            return p;
    }
  }

  function _pdComputeTargetScale() {
    const c = getPlaybackDynamicsConfig();
    if (!c.enabled) return null;
    const es = state.engineState;
    if (!es?.playing) return null;

    let intensity = 0;
    if (c.mode === 'time' || c.mode === 'adaptive') {
      const progress = es.completedFraction || 0;
      intensity = Math.max(intensity, _pdCurve(progress, c.curve));
    }
    if (c.mode === 'engagement' || c.mode === 'adaptive') {
      const eng = es.engagement || 0;
      intensity = Math.max(intensity, eng);
    }

    const lo = (c.mode === 'engagement') ? c.engagementMin : c.startScale;
    const hi = (c.mode === 'engagement') ? c.engagementMax : c.endScale;
    return lo + (hi - lo) * intensity;
  }

  function tickPlaybackDynamics(frameSec) {
    const target = _pdComputeTargetScale();
    if (target == null) return;

    const c = getPlaybackDynamicsConfig();

    const alpha = Math.min(1, frameSec / Math.max(0.5, c.smoothingSec));
    _playbackDynamicsState.smoothedScale += alpha * (target - _playbackDynamicsState.smoothedScale);

    const nowMs = Date.now();
    if (nowMs - _playbackDynamicsState.lastApplyMs < 1000) return;
    _playbackDynamicsState.lastApplyMs = nowMs;

    const baseRate = state._baseSpeechRate ?? state.speechRate ?? 1.0;

    const phaseMult = state._phaseRateMult ?? 1.0;

    const paceBias = Math.max(-3, Math.min(3, Math.round(Number(state.directorPace) || 0)));
    const paceMult = 1 + paceBias * 0.04;
    const rawNew = baseRate * phaseMult * paceMult * _playbackDynamicsState.smoothedScale;
    state.speechRate = gateSpeechRate(rawNew);
  }

  function resetPlaybackDynamics() {
    _playbackDynamicsState = { smoothedScale: 1.0, lastTickMs: 0, lastApplyMs: 0 };

    state._phaseRateMult = 1.0;
