  }

  function _diffText(before, after) {
    before = before || ''; after = after || '';
    if (before === after) return { hasChange: false, meetsThreshold: false };
    const denom = Math.max(before.length, after.length, 1);
    const dist = _lev(before, after);
    const pct = dist / denom;
    return {
      hasChange: true,
      meetsThreshold: pct >= DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.textChangePct,
      detail: {
        beforeLen: before.length,
        afterLen: after.length,
        changePct: +pct.toFixed(3),

        before: before.slice(0, 40),
        after:  after.slice(0, 40),
      },
    };
  }

  function _parseCSVEntries(raw) {
    if (!raw) return [];

    return String(raw)
      .split(/[\n,]+/)
      .map(s => s.trim().toLowerCase())
      .filter(Boolean);
  }

  function _diffCSV(before, after) {
    const a = new Set(_parseCSVEntries(before));
    const b = new Set(_parseCSVEntries(after));
    const added = [...b].filter(x => !a.has(x));
    const removed = [...a].filter(x => !b.has(x));
    const kept = [...a].filter(x => b.has(x));
    const changeCount = added.length + removed.length;
    if (changeCount === 0) return { hasChange: false, meetsThreshold: false };
    return {
      hasChange: true,
      meetsThreshold: changeCount >= DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.csvChangeCount,
      detail: { added, removed, kept },
    };
  }

  function _diffImage(before, after) {

    const lastTags = (before && before.tags) || [];
    const newTags  = (after  && after.tags)  || [];
    const a = new Set(lastTags);
    const b = new Set(newTags);
    if (!a.size && !b.size) return { hasChange: false, meetsThreshold: false };
    if (!a.size) {

      return {
        hasChange: true,
        meetsThreshold: true,
        detail: {
          summary: after.summary || '',
          tags: newTags,
          prompt: (after.prompt || '').slice(0, 200),
          reason: 'first-snapshot',
        },
      };
    }
    const inter = [...a].filter(x => b.has(x));
    const union = new Set([...a, ...b]);
    const jaccard = inter.length / union.size;
    if (jaccard >= DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.imageSimilarityMax) {
      return { hasChange: false, meetsThreshold: false };
    }
    return {
      hasChange: true,
      meetsThreshold: true,
      detail: {
        summary: after.summary || '',
        tags: newTags,
        prompt: (after.prompt || '').slice(0, 200),
        similarity: +jaccard.toFixed(3),
      },
    };
  }

  const diffBouncers = {};

  async function summarizeImagePrompt({ prompt, negativePrompt }) {

    const STOP = new Set(['the','and','with','for','that','this','from','into','over','very','more','less','really','some','just','only','also','than','then','when','make','made','very','highly']);

    const fallback = () => {
      const words = String(prompt || '').toLowerCase().match(/[a-z][a-z-]{2,}/g) || [];
      const tags = [...new Set(words.filter(w => !STOP.has(w)))].slice(0, 6);
      return {
        summary: tags.slice(0, 6).join(', ') || 'untagged image',
        tags,
        prompt: String(prompt || '').slice(0, 200),
        source: 'fallback',
      };
    };

    if (!state.remoteProcessingOptIn) return fallback();
    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || !root.aiTextPlugin) return fallback();

    const instruction = [
      'Summarize this image generation prompt in exactly 6-10 words, focusing on visual aesthetic.',
      'Output STRICT JSON only: {"summary":"…","tags":["…","…"]}',
      'Tags: 3-6 short aesthetic descriptors (adjectives + subject nouns). Lowercase, no prose.',
      `Prompt: ${String(prompt || '').slice(0, 400)}`,
      negativePrompt ? `Negative: ${String(negativePrompt).slice(0, 200)}` : '',
    ].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

    try {
      try { logAICall('perchance', 'image-tag', instruction); } catch {}
      const data = await root.aiTextPlugin({
        instruction,
        startWith: '{',
        stopSequences: ['\n\n\n', '\n\n[[', '\n[['],
        hideStartWith: false,
      });
      const raw = String(data?.text || data || '').trim();

      const s = raw.indexOf('{'), e = raw.lastIndexOf('}');
      if (s < 0 || e <= s) return fallback();
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw.slice(s, e + 1));
      if (!parsed.summary || !Array.isArray(parsed.tags)) return fallback();
      return {
        summary: String(parsed.summary).slice(0, 120),
        tags: parsed.tags.map(t => String(t).toLowerCase().trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 6),
        prompt: String(prompt || '').slice(0, 200),
        source: 'llm',
      };
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[DB] image summary LLM failed, using fallback:', e);
      return fallback();
    }
  }

  const PROFILE_KEY = 'stillness_profile_v1';
  let _profileSaveTimeout = null;
  let _profileChangeLog = [];

  function commitChangeLogEntry(source, type, diff, meta = {}) {
    const entry = {
      ts: Date.now(),
      source,
      type,
      diff,
      meta: { trigger: meta.trigger || 'idle' },
    };
    _profileChangeLog.unshift(entry);
    if (_profileChangeLog.length > DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.logCap) {
      _profileChangeLog.length = DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.logCap;
    }
    saveProfile();
    renderProfileDiffs();
  }

  function renderProfileDiffs() {
    if (typeof renderTimeline === 'function') renderTimeline();
  }

  function getProfile() {
    return {
      name: $('pfName')?.value?.trim() || '',
      useFirstName: !!$('pfUseFirstName')?.checked,
      personalSymbol: $('pfPersonalSymbol')?.value?.trim() || '🧠',
      pronouns: $('pfPronouns')?.value || '',
      age: $('pfAge')?.value || '',

      adultUnlock: !!$('pfAdultUnlock')?.checked,
      experience: $('pfExperience')?.value || 'beginner',
      about: $('pfAbout')?.value?.trim() || '',
      appearance: $('pfAppearance')?.value?.trim() || '',
      goals: $('pfGoals')?.value?.trim() || '',

      preferredEnvironments:  $('pfPreferredEnvironments')?.value?.trim() || '',
      vocalPace:              $('pfVocalPace')?.value || '',
      energyPattern:          $('pfEnergyPattern')?.value || '',
      sensorySensitivities:   $('pfSensorySensitivities')?.value?.trim() || '',

      typicalTime:            $('pfTypicalTime')?.value || '',
      practiceSpace:          $('pfPracticeSpace')?.value || '',
      posture:                $('pfPosture')?.value || '',
      coPresence:             $('pfCoPresence')?.value || '',

      currentThemes:          $('pfCurrentThemes')?.value?.trim() || '',
      currentStressors:       $('pfCurrentStressors')?.value?.trim() || '',
      currentWins:            $('pfCurrentWins')?.value?.trim() || '',
      healthNotes:            $('pfHealthNotes')?.value?.trim() || '',

      metaphorDensity:        $('pfMetaphorDensity')?.value || '',
      authorityStyle:         $('pfAuthorityStyle')?.value || '',
      touchComfort:           $('pfTouchComfort')?.value || '',
      spiritualFrame:         $('pfSpiritualFrame')?.value || '',

      susceptibility:         $('pfSusceptibility')?.value || '',

      safePlace:              $('pfSafePlace')?.value?.trim() || '',
      powerObject:            $('pfPowerObject')?.value?.trim() || '',
      resourceMemory:         $('pfResourceMemory')?.value?.trim() || '',

      ..._buildProfileShareFlags(),

      rfBreath:          $('pfRfBreath')?.value || '',
      trackLabel:        $('pfTrackLabel')?.value || 'auto',
      anchorSound:       $('pfAnchorSound')?.value || 'off',
    };
  }

  function _buildProfileShareFlags() {
    const el = document.getElementById('pfShareAll');
    const on = el ? !!el.checked : true;
    return {
      shareAge:        on,
      shareAppearance: on,
      shareGoals:      on,
      categoryShares:  on
        ? {}
        : { practiceContext: false, lifeContext: false, style: false, susceptibility: false, anchors: false },
    };
  }

  function _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed() {
    try {
      const ageEl = $('pfAge');
      if (!ageEl) return false;
      return !!ageEl.value;
    } catch { return false; }
  }

  function applyProfileToForm(profile, opts = {}) {
    const p = profile || {};
    const setVal = (id, value, fallback = '') => {
      const el = $(id);
      if (el) el.value = value ?? fallback;
    };
    setVal('pfName', p.name, '');

    const useName = $('pfUseFirstName');
    if (useName) useName.checked = !!p.useFirstName;
    setVal('pfPersonalSymbol', p.personalSymbol, '🧠');
    setVal('pfPronouns', p.pronouns, '');

    let _migratedAge = p.age;
    if (_migratedAge === '18-24') _migratedAge = '18-20';
    setVal('pfAge', _migratedAge, '');

    const adultEl = $('pfAdultUnlock');
    if (adultEl) {
      const ageEligible = ['21-24','25-34','35-44','45-54','55-64','65+'].includes(_migratedAge);
      adultEl.checked = !!p.adultUnlock && ageEligible;
      adultEl.disabled = !ageEligible;
      const lbl = $('pfAdultUnlockLabel');
      if (lbl) lbl.style.opacity = ageEligible ? '1' : '0.5';
    }
    setVal('pfExperience', p.experience, 'beginner');
    setVal('pfAbout', p.about, '');
    setVal('pfAppearance', p.appearance, '');
    setVal('pfGoals', p.goals, '');

    setVal('pfPreferredEnvironments', p.preferredEnvironments, '');
    setVal('pfVocalPace', p.vocalPace, '');
    setVal('pfEnergyPattern', p.energyPattern, '');
    setVal('pfSensorySensitivities', p.sensorySensitivities, '');

    setVal('pfTypicalTime', p.typicalTime, '');
    setVal('pfPracticeSpace', p.practiceSpace, '');
    setVal('pfPosture', p.posture, '');
    setVal('pfCoPresence', p.coPresence, '');

    setVal('pfCurrentThemes', p.currentThemes, '');
    setVal('pfCurrentStressors', p.currentStressors, '');
    setVal('pfCurrentWins', p.currentWins, '');
    setVal('pfHealthNotes', p.healthNotes, '');

    setVal('pfMetaphorDensity', p.metaphorDensity, '');
    setVal('pfAuthorityStyle', p.authorityStyle, '');
    setVal('pfTouchComfort', p.touchComfort, '');
    setVal('pfSpiritualFrame', p.spiritualFrame, '');

    setVal('pfSusceptibility', p.susceptibility, '');
    if (typeof _refreshSusceptibilityDisplay === 'function') {
      try { _refreshSusceptibilityDisplay(); } catch {}
    }

    setVal('pfSafePlace', p.safePlace, '');
    setVal('pfPowerObject', p.powerObject, '');
    setVal('pfResourceMemory', p.resourceMemory, '');

    setVal('pfRfBreath',         p.rfBreath,         '');
    setVal('pfTrackLabel',       p.trackLabel,       'auto');
    setVal('pfAnchorSound',      p.anchorSound,      'off');

    if (typeof _refreshRfBreathDisplay  === 'function') { try { _refreshRfBreathDisplay();  } catch {} }
    if (typeof applyTrackLabels         === 'function') { try { applyTrackLabels();         } catch {} }
    if (typeof _refreshAnchorTapDisplay === 'function') { try { _refreshAnchorTapDisplay(); } catch {} }

    const shareAll = $('pfShareAll');
    if (shareAll) {
      const cs = (p && typeof p.categoryShares === 'object') ? p.categoryShares : {};
      const anyCatOff = ['practiceContext','lifeContext','style','susceptibility','anchors']
        .some(k => cs[k] === false);
      shareAll.checked =
        (p.shareAge        !== false) &&
        (p.shareAppearance !== false) &&
        (p.shareGoals      !== false) &&
        !anyCatOff;
    }
    const nameEl = $('sidebarDisplayName');

    if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = p.name || 'Practitioner';
    const avatarEl = $('sidebarAvatar');
    if (avatarEl) avatarEl.textContent = p.personalSymbol || '🧠';
    if (opts.save !== false) saveProfile();
  }

  function saveProfile() {
    clearTimeout(_profileSaveTimeout);
    _profileSaveTimeout = setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const profile = getProfile();

        profile.changeLog = _profileChangeLog.slice(0, DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.logCap);
        if (_kv) await _kv.settings.set(PROFILE_KEY, profile);
        localStorage.setItem(PROFILE_KEY, JSON.stringify(profile));

        const nameEl = $('sidebarDisplayName');
        if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = profile.name || 'Practitioner';
      } catch {}
    }, 1000);
  }

  async function loadProfile() {
    try {
      let p = null;
      if (_kv) { try { p = await _kv.settings.get(PROFILE_KEY); } catch {} }
      if (!p) { const raw = localStorage.getItem(PROFILE_KEY); if (raw) p = JSON.parse(raw); }
      if (!p) return;

      _profileChangeLog = Array.isArray(p.changeLog) ? p.changeLog : [];
      applyProfileToForm(p, { save: false });

      if (typeof renderProfileDiffs === 'function') renderProfileDiffs();
    } catch {}
  }

  const TRACKED_FIELDS = [
    { id: 'pfGoals',                  type: 'csv'  },
    { id: 'pfAbout',                  type: 'text' },
    { id: 'intentionInput',           type: 'text' },
    { id: 'userAffirmations',         type: 'csv'  },
    { id: 'bgPromptInput',            type: 'csv'  },
    { id: 'pfPreferredEnvironments',  type: 'csv'  },
    { id: 'pfSensorySensitivities',   type: 'text' },

    { id: 'pfCurrentThemes',          type: 'text' },
    { id: 'pfCurrentStressors',       type: 'text' },
    { id: 'pfCurrentWins',            type: 'text' },
    { id: 'pfHealthNotes',            type: 'text' },

    { id: 'pfSafePlace',              type: 'text' },
    { id: 'pfPowerObject',            type: 'text' },
    { id: 'pfResourceMemory',         type: 'text' },
  ];

  const PROFILE_FIELD_SCHEMA = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.PROFILE_FIELD_SCHEMA) || [];

  const _PROFILE_FIELD_TO_CATEGORY = (() => {
    const map = {};
    for (const [catKey, cat] of Object.entries(PROFILE_FIELD_SCHEMA)) {
      for (const f of cat.fields) {
        map[f.key] = catKey;
        map[f.id]  = catKey;
      }
    }
    return map;
  })();

  function getProfileGrouped(profile = null) {
    const p = profile || (typeof getProfile === 'function' ? getProfile() : {});
    const grouped = {};
    for (const [catKey, cat] of Object.entries(PROFILE_FIELD_SCHEMA)) {
      const values = {};
      let nonEmptyCount = 0;
      for (const f of cat.fields) {
        const v = p[f.key];
        values[f.key] = v;
        if (v !== '' && v != null) nonEmptyCount++;
      }
      grouped[catKey] = {
        label: cat.label,
        values,
        _meta: {
          fieldCount: cat.fields.length,
          nonEmptyCount,
          shared: _isCategoryShared(catKey, p),
        },
      };
    }
    return grouped;
  }

  const _CATEGORY_SHARE_KEYS = [
    'practiceContext', 'lifeContext', 'style', 'susceptibility', 'anchors',
  ];

  function _isCategoryShared(catKey, profile = null) {
    if (catKey === 'identity') return true;
    if (!_CATEGORY_SHARE_KEYS.includes(catKey)) return true;
    const p = profile || (typeof getProfile === 'function' ? getProfile() : {});
    const cs = p.categoryShares || {};

    return cs[catKey] !== false;
  }

  function _readCategorySharesFromForm() {
    const out = {};
    for (const k of _CATEGORY_SHARE_KEYS) {
      const cb = $('pfCatShare_' + k);
      if (cb) out[k] = !!cb.checked;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _applyCategorySharesToForm(p) {
    const cs = (p && typeof p.categoryShares === 'object') ? p.categoryShares : {};
    for (const k of _CATEGORY_SHARE_KEYS) {
      const cb = $('pfCatShare_' + k);
      if (cb) cb.checked = cs[k] !== false;
    }
  }

  function initDiffBouncers() {

    TRACKED_FIELDS.forEach(({ id, type }) => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el) return;
      const bouncer = new DiffBouncer({
        source: id,
        type,
        getState: () => el.value || '',
        onCommit: (diff, _current, meta) => commitChangeLogEntry(id, type, diff, meta),
      });

      bouncer.lastSnapshot = el.value || '';
      diffBouncers[id] = bouncer;
      el.addEventListener('input', () => bouncer.ping());
    });

    diffBouncers.bgImage = new DiffBouncer({
      source: 'bgImage',
      type: 'image',
      getState: () => diffBouncers.bgImage._latestState || null,
      onCommit: (diff, _current, meta) => commitChangeLogEntry('bgImage', 'image', diff, meta),
    });

    document.getElementById('sessionHistoryDetails')?.addEventListener('toggle', e => {
      if (e.target.open) renderChangeLog();
    });

    document.getElementById('directorAuditDetails')?.addEventListener('toggle', e => {
      if (e.target.open) {
        try { renderDirectorAuditPanel(); } catch (err) { console.warn('[director audit render]', err); }
      }
    });

    document.getElementById('sharedLinksDetails')?.addEventListener('toggle', e => {
      if (e.target.open) {
        try { renderSharedLinksPanel(); } catch (err) { console.warn('[shared links render]', err); }
      }
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('#directorAuditDetails .audit-chip').forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const f = chip.dataset.auditFilter || 'all';
        _directorAuditFilter = f;
        document.querySelectorAll('#directorAuditDetails .audit-chip').forEach(c => c.classList.toggle('active', c === chip));
        renderDirectorAuditPanel().catch(() => {});
      });
    });

    $('directorAuditExportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      try {
        const log = await _loadDirectorAudit();
        const json = JSON.stringify(log, null, 2);
        if (navigator.clipboard?.writeText) {
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(json);
          notify.success(`Director audit copied to clipboard (${log.length} entries).`);
        } else {

          const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
          ta.value = json;
          ta.style.position = 'fixed';
          ta.style.opacity  = '0';
          document.body.appendChild(ta);
          ta.focus(); ta.select();
          try { document.execCommand('copy'); notify.success(`Director audit copied to clipboard (${log.length} entries).`); }
          catch { notify.warn('Copy failed — open DevTools and call HNE.directorAudit() instead.'); }
          ta.remove();
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn('[audit export]', err);
        notify.warn('Could not copy audit — see console.');
      }
    });

    $('directorAuditClearBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      if (!await confirmAsync('Clear the Director audit log?\n\nEntries are local-only and recreatable; this cannot be undone.')) return;
      _directorAuditCache = [];
      try { await idbSet(DIRECTOR_AUDIT_KEY, []); } catch {}
      renderDirectorAuditPanel().catch(() => {});
      notify.info('Director audit cleared.');
    });

    console.log('[DB] diff bouncers initialized:', Object.keys(diffBouncers).length);
  }

  function _escDB(s) { return String(s).replace(/[<>&"']/g, c => ({ '<':'&lt;', '>':'&gt;', '&':'&amp;', '"':'&quot;', "'":'&#39;' }[c])); }

  function _relTimeDB(ts) {
    const now = Date.now();
    const d = Math.floor((now - ts) / 1000);
    if (d < 60) return 'just now';
    if (d < 3600) return Math.floor(d / 60) + 'm ago';
    if (d < 86400) return Math.floor(d / 3600) + 'h ago';
    if (d < 86400 * 2) return 'yesterday';
    if (d < 86400 * 7) return Math.floor(d / 86400) + 'd ago';
    return new Date(ts).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  }

  let _timelineFilter = 'all';

  async function renderTimeline() {
    const list = document.getElementById('timelineList');
    const count = document.getElementById('timelineCount');
    if (!list) return;

    const profileEntries = (_profileChangeLog || []).map(e => ({
      ts: e.ts,
      category: 'profile',
      sourceId: e.source,
      type: e.type,
      diff: e.diff,
    }));

    if (typeof _loadAuditLog === 'function' && !_aiAuditLoaded) {
      try { await _loadAuditLog(); } catch {}
    }
    const aiEntries = (_aiAuditLog || []).map(e => ({
      ts: e.ts,
      category: 'ai',
      provider: e.provider,
      sourceId: e.source,
      bytes: e.bytes,
      contextBytes: e.contextBytes,
      taskBytes: e.taskBytes,
    }));

    let sessionEntries = [];
    try {
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      sessionEntries = history.slice(0, 30).map(s => ({
        ts: s.date || 0,
        category: 'session',
        guide: s.guide || '?',
        method: s.method || '?',
        duration: Math.round((s.durationSec || 0) / 60),
        completed: !!s.completed,
        preMood: s.preMood,
        postMood: s.postMood,
      }));
    } catch {}

    const all = [...profileEntries, ...aiEntries, ...sessionEntries].sort((a, b) => (b.ts || 0) - (a.ts || 0));

    const filtered = (_timelineFilter === 'all') ? all : all.filter(e => e.category === _timelineFilter);

    if (count) {
      const parts = [
        profileEntries.length ? `${profileEntries.length} edits` : '',
        aiEntries.length ? `${aiEntries.length} AI` : '',
        sessionEntries.length ? `${sessionEntries.length} sessions` : '',
      ].filter(Boolean);
      count.textContent = parts.length ? `(${parts.join(', ')})` : '';
    }

    if (!filtered.length) {
      const filterMsg = _timelineFilter === 'all'
        ? 'no activity yet — edit your profile or run a session.'
        : `no ${_timelineFilter} entries yet.`;
      list.innerHTML = `<div class="tl-empty">${filterMsg}</div>`;
      return;
    }

    const now = Date.now();
    const dayMs = 86400000;

    list.innerHTML = filtered.slice(0, 80).map(e => _renderTimelineEntry(e, now, dayMs)).join('');
  }

  function _renderTimelineEntry(e, now, dayMs) {
    const ageDays = Math.max(0, (now - (e.ts || 0)) / dayMs);
    const w = Math.exp(-ageDays / 14);
    const opacity = Math.max(0.4, w).toFixed(2);
    const rel = _relTimeDB(e.ts || 0);
    const cat = e.category;
    let label = '', body = '';
    if (cat === 'profile') {
      const srcLabel = id => ({
        pfGoals: 'goals', pfAbout: 'about', pfAppearance: 'appearance', pfName: 'name',
        intentionInput: 'intention', userAffirmations: 'affirmations',
        bgPromptInput: 'bg prompt', bgImage: 'image',
        pfPreferredEnvironments: 'environments', pfSensorySensitivities: 'sensitivities',

        pfCurrentThemes: 'themes', pfCurrentStressors: 'stressors',
        pfCurrentWins: 'wins', pfHealthNotes: 'health notes',
        pfSafePlace: 'safe place', pfPowerObject: 'power object',
        pfResourceMemory: 'resource memory',
      }[id] || id);
      label = srcLabel(e.sourceId);
      if (e.type === 'csv' && e.diff) {
        const addHtml = (e.diff.added || []).map(a => `<span class="cl-chip cl-add">+${_escDB(a)}</span>`).join('');
        const remHtml = (e.diff.removed || []).map(r => `<span class="cl-chip cl-rem">−${_escDB(r)}</span>`).join('');
        body = addHtml + remHtml || '<em>no entries shifted</em>';
      } else if (e.type === 'text' && e.diff) {
        const pct = Math.round((e.diff.changePct || 0) * 100);

        if (e.diff.before != null || e.diff.after != null) {
          const beforeStr = (e.diff.before || '').trim();
          const afterStr = (e.diff.after || '').trim();
          const arrow = beforeStr
            ? `<em style="opacity:0.6">${_escDB(beforeStr)}…</em> → <em>${_escDB(afterStr)}…</em>`
            : `<em>${_escDB(afterStr)}…</em>`;
          body = `<span style="opacity:0.7">${pct}% changed</span> — ${arrow}`;
        } else {
          body = `<span style="opacity:0.7">${pct}% changed</span> — <em>${_escDB(e.diff.preview || '')}…</em>`;
        }
      } else if (e.type === 'image' && e.diff) {
        const tags = (e.diff.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="cl-chip">${_escDB(t)}</span>`).join('');
        body = `<div>${_escDB(e.diff.summary || '')}</div><div style="margin-top:3px">${tags}</div>`;
      } else {
        body = '<em>(unknown entry type)</em>';
      }
    } else if (cat === 'ai') {
      label = e.sourceId || 'unknown';
      const fmt = b => (b || 0) >= 1024 ? `${((b || 0) / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB` : `${b || 0} B`;
      const total = fmt(e.bytes);

      const split = (e.contextBytes != null)
        ? ` <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.92em">(${fmt(e.contextBytes)} ctx + ${fmt(e.taskBytes)} task)</span>`
        : '';
      body = `${_escDB(e.provider || '?')} · ${total}${split} sent <span style="color:var(--text-faint)">(content not logged)</span>`;
    } else if (cat === 'session') {
      label = `${_escDB(e.guide)} · ${_escDB(e.method)}`;
      const moodBit = (e.preMood != null && e.postMood != null)
        ? ` · mood ${e.preMood}→${e.postMood}${(e.postMood - e.preMood >= 0 ? ' +' : ' ')}${e.postMood - e.preMood}`
        : '';
      const compBit = e.completed ? '✓ finished' : '⏸ ended early';
      body = `${e.duration}m · ${compBit}${moodBit}`;
    }
    return `<div class="tl-entry tl-cat-${cat}" style="opacity:${opacity}">
      <div class="tl-head"><span class="tl-cat">${cat}</span> · <span class="tl-ts">${_escDB(rel)}</span> · <span style="color:var(--text);font-weight:500">${_escDB(label)}</span></div>
      <div class="tl-body">${body}</div>
    </div>`;
  }

  function renderChangeLog() { renderTimeline(); }

  async function getTimeOfDayPick(hour) {
    try {
      const a = await getAnalytics();
      if (!a) return null;
      const hourCount = (a.hr && a.hr[hour]) || 0;

      if (hourCount < 3) return null;

      const topKey = (map) => {
        let best = null, bestN = 0;
        for (const k of Object.keys(map || {})) {
          if (map[k] > bestN) { best = k; bestN = map[k]; }
        }
        return bestN >= 3 ? best : null;
      };
      const personaId = topKey(a.p);
      const methodId  = topKey(a.m);
      if (!personaId && !methodId) return null;
      return { personaId, methodId, hourCount };
    } catch (e) { return null; }
  }

  async function inferModality() {
    try {
      const scores = { visual: 0, auditory: 0, kinesthetic: 0 };

      if (state.vizOverride && !['none', 'candle', 'colorwash'].includes(state.vizOverride)) scores.visual++;
      if (state.hud?.fixationDot !== false) scores.visual++;

      if (state.cfgTextDisplay !== false) scores.auditory++;
      if (state.soundscape && state.soundscape !== 'none') scores.auditory++;
      if ((state.audioReactiveMode || 'subtle') !== 'off') scores.auditory++;

      const a = await getAnalytics();
      if (a && a.m) {
        const SOMATIC_METHODS = new Set(['hand-heaviness', 'arm-catalepsy', 'progressive', 'body-awareness',
          'floating-body', 'glove-anesthesia', 'heartbeat-sync', 'breath-478', 'pain-dial', 'arm-drop']);
        let somaticPlays = 0, totalPlays = 0;
        for (const k of Object.keys(a.m)) {
          totalPlays += a.m[k];
          if (SOMATIC_METHODS.has(k)) somaticPlays += a.m[k];
        }
        if (totalPlays >= 5 && (somaticPlays / totalPlays) > 0.4) scores.kinesthetic += 2;
      }

      const entries = Object.entries(scores).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
      const [winner, wScore] = entries[0];
      const [, runner] = entries[1];
      if (wScore < 2 || (wScore - runner) < 1) return null;
      return winner;
    } catch (e) { return null; }
  }

  state._inferredModality = state._inferredModality || null;
  async function refreshInferredModality() {
    try { state._inferredModality = await inferModality(); }
    catch { state._inferredModality = null; }
  }

  setTimeout(() => { refreshInferredModality().catch(() => {}); }, 1500);

  function getProfileContext() {

    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      sdLog('getProfileContext returning empty — Smart Director off');
      return '';
    }
    const p = getProfile();
    const parts = [];

    if (p.name && p.useFirstName) parts.push(`The subject's name is ${p.name}. You may address them by name occasionally; do not overuse it.`);
    if (p.pronouns) parts.push(`Pronouns: ${p.pronouns}.`);

    if (p.age && p.shareAge !== false)               parts.push(`Age range: ${p.age}.`);
    if (p.experience)                                parts.push(`Experience: ${p.experience}.`);
    if (p.about)                                     parts.push(`About the subject: ${p.about}.`);
    if (p.appearance && p.shareAppearance !== false) parts.push(`Appearance: ${p.appearance}.`);
    if (p.goals && p.shareGoals !== false)           parts.push(`Goals: ${p.goals}.`);

    if (p.preferredEnvironments && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Preferred imagery environments: ${p.preferredEnvironments}. Lean toward these when picking metaphors.`);
    }
    if (p.sensorySensitivities && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Sensory sensitivities to AVOID: ${p.sensorySensitivities}. Do not include any of these themes; if forced to, replace with a neutral alternative.`);
    }
    if (p.vocalPace) {
      const paceHint = {
        slow:   'Long pauses, very deliberate phrasing — write each thought on its own line with a paragraph break between, ellipses (…) within sentences for held moments.',
        medium: 'Balanced pacing — short paragraphs with normal sentence spacing.',
        fast:   'Tighter phrasing, fewer pauses, keeps momentum — sentences can run together inside a paragraph.',
      }[p.vocalPace];
      if (paceHint) parts.push(`Pacing preference: ${p.vocalPace}. ${paceHint}`);
    }
    if (p.energyPattern) {
      const energyHint = {
        morning:  'Most alert in the morning — script can be slightly more direct/assertive without overwhelming.',
        evening:  'Most alert in the evening — comfortable with introspective, dimmer-lit imagery.',
        variable: 'Variable energy — favour adaptive language that meets them wherever they are.',
      }[p.energyPattern];
      if (energyHint) parts.push(`Energy pattern: ${p.energyPattern}. ${energyHint}`);
    }

    if (_isCategoryShared('practiceContext', p)) {
    if (p.typicalTime) {
      const timeHint = {
        morning:    'Morning practice — closeout can be alerting/energizing; reintroduction primes the day ahead.',
        midday:     'Midday practice — closeout returns them to active engagement; brief and clear reintro.',
        afternoon:  'Afternoon practice — moderate alerting closeout; ok to leave slightly settled.',
        evening:    'Evening practice — gentle closeout; can leave them in a softer state for the rest of the night.',
        'late-night': 'Late-night practice — for sleep intentions, drift into silence with NO count-up. For other intentions, softest possible reintro.',
        varies:     'Practice time varies — closeout should be moderate / context-neutral.',
      }[p.typicalTime];
      if (timeHint) parts.push(`Typical time: ${p.typicalTime}. ${timeHint}`);
    }
    if (p.practiceSpace) {
      const spaceHint = {
        bedroom:           'Practices in bedroom — bedroom imagery is safe; can reference bed/blankets/pillow naturally.',
        'quiet-room':      'Practices in a quiet room — good for full immersion; standard environmental framing.',
        'shared-space':    'Practices in a shared space — keep volume modest in script (no shouts, no sudden loud cues), softer "wake" instructions.',
        outdoors:          'Practices outdoors — script can reference real environmental sounds (wind, birds, distant traffic) as integration cues, not distractions.',
        'public-headphones':'Practices in public with headphones — NO instructions to vocalize, sigh, hum, or move arms/body visibly. Internal-only somatic cues.',
        varies:            'Practice space varies — keep environmental references generic.',
      }[p.practiceSpace];
      if (spaceHint) parts.push(`Practice space: ${p.practiceSpace}. ${spaceHint}`);
    }
    if (p.posture) {
      const postureHint = {
        'lying-supine':    'Posture: lying on back. Body metaphors work best from feet-upward or center-outward. Avoid "feet on floor" type anchors.',
        'lying-side':      'Posture: lying on side. Avoid symmetrical body metaphors (both arms equally) — favor "the upper hand", "the resting cheek".',
        'seated-upright':  'Posture: seated upright. Spine + crown imagery works well; "sit tall" cues fit naturally.',
        'seated-reclined': 'Posture: seated reclined. Hybrid — works for both spine awareness and lying-style sinking metaphors.',
        walking:           'Posture: WALKING. CRITICAL: NEVER instruct deep eye-closure, dissociation, balance-altering imagery, or anything that compromises physical safety. Eyes-open meditation only. No "let your knees buckle" or "sink into the chair" — those are dangerous while walking.',
        varies:            'Posture varies — keep body metaphors flexible.',
      }[p.posture];
      if (postureHint) parts.push(`Posture: ${p.posture}. ${postureHint}`);
    }
    if (p.coPresence) {
      const coHint = {
        alone:    'Practicing alone — full freedom for vocal/somatic instructions.',
        partner:  'Practicing with a close partner present — script can reference shared presence subtly; avoid framing solitude as required.',
        shared:   'Others nearby in shared space — keep voice softer, no instructions to vocalize, normalize external sounds rather than treating them as distractions.',
        public:   'In public — internal experience only. NO instructions to vocalize, gesture, or dramatically shift posture.',
      }[p.coPresence];
      if (coHint) parts.push(`Co-presence: ${p.coPresence}. ${coHint}`);
    }
    }

    if (_isCategoryShared('lifeContext', p)) {
    if (p.currentThemes && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Current life themes: ${p.currentThemes}. Hold these as the larger arc the user is moving through; the session can reference them as the backdrop without making them the explicit topic unless intention asks.`);
    }
    if (p.currentStressors && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Active stressors right now: ${p.currentStressors}. Acknowledge these gently if relevant; never force engagement with them — the user may want a session that gives them space FROM these, not into them.`);
    }
    if (p.currentWins && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Recent wins / forward momentum: ${p.currentWins}. Reference these as evidence of capacity already demonstrated — "the same part of you that [X] is the part that's here now…". Do NOT congratulate or dwell; integrate as quiet groundedness.`);
    }
    if (p.healthNotes && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`Physical considerations: ${p.healthNotes}. The script MUST respect these — no instructions that would aggravate the listed conditions. Avoid prolonged holds, sudden movements, or imagery that could trigger discomfort. The app is not a substitute for clinical care; never offer medical advice.`);
    }
    }

    if (_isCategoryShared('style', p)) {
    if (p.metaphorDensity) {
      const mdHint = {
        minimal:  'Metaphor density: MINIMAL. Direct instructional language. Few or no metaphors. "Notice your breath" rather than "feel the breath like a tide".',
        balanced: 'Metaphor density: BALANCED. Mix concrete instruction with occasional sensory metaphor.',
        rich:     'Metaphor density: RICH. Layered poetic imagery, sustained metaphor, sensory abundance. The user enjoys the texture of language as part of the trance experience.',
      }[p.metaphorDensity];
      if (mdHint) parts.push(mdHint);
    }
    if (p.authorityStyle) {
      const asHint = {
        directive:      'Authority style: DIRECTIVE. Clear instructions. "Close your eyes. Take a breath. Notice." Confident leading.',
        balanced:       'Authority style: BALANCED. Mix of clear directives and permissive invitations as appropriate.',
        permissive:     'Authority style: PERMISSIVE. Invitations rather than commands: "you might notice", "perhaps you can feel", "in your own time". Ericksonian phrasing.',
        conversational: 'Authority style: CONVERSATIONAL. Warm, peer-like. As if speaking to a friend who has chosen this practice with you. Less formal hypnotist register.',
      }[p.authorityStyle];
      if (asHint) parts.push(asHint);
    }
    if (p.touchComfort) {
      const tcHint = {
        full:  'Body-touch comfort: FULL. Instructions like "place your hand on your chest" or "fingertips on the inside of your wrist" are welcome as somatic anchors.',
        light: 'Body-touch comfort: LIGHT. Fingertip-only or symbolic touch ok ("touch your thumb to your forefinger"); avoid "place your whole hand on…" type instructions.',
        none:  'Body-touch comfort: NONE. NO instructions to physically touch the body. Use breath, attention, or imagined sensation as anchors instead.',
      }[p.touchComfort];
      if (tcHint) parts.push(tcHint);
    }
    if (p.spiritualFrame && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      const sfHint = {
        secular:           'Spiritual frame: SECULAR ONLY. Avoid spirit/soul/divine/sacred/blessed/prayer language. Keep framing psychological and physiological.',
        nondenominational: 'Spiritual frame: NONDENOMINATIONAL. Spirit/soul/sacred language is welcome but NOT specific to any tradition. No deity names, no theology.',
        buddhist:          'Spiritual frame: BUDDHIST-flavored. Vocabulary like awareness, presence, impermanence, equanimity, the witnessing mind, dharma is welcome.',
        christian:         'Spiritual frame: CHRISTIAN-flavored. Grace, peace, prayer, divine presence language welcome. No specific denomination unless About specifies.',
        'earth-based':     'Spiritual frame: EARTH-BASED / pagan. Nature-as-sacred, elemental imagery, cycles, ancestor presence are welcome.',
        other:             'Spiritual frame: OTHER (see About for details). Default to nondenominational unless About clarifies.',
      }[p.spiritualFrame];
      if (sfHint) parts.push(sfHint);
    }
    }

    if (_isCategoryShared('anchors', p)) {
    if (p.safePlace && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`SAFE PLACE (use this — do NOT invent a generic one): "${p.safePlace}". Reference it during deepening or when constructing sanctuary imagery. It belongs to the listener, not the script.`);
    }
    if (p.powerObject && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`POWER OBJECT: "${p.powerObject}". Anchor it: when the listener encounters or thinks of this object in daily life, the trance state recalls itself. Reference once during work-phase peak.`);
    }
    if (p.resourceMemory && p.shareGoals !== false) {
      parts.push(`RESOURCE MEMORY (a real positive moment they can re-enter): "${p.resourceMemory}". Use during work-phase peak — invoke the felt sense of that moment as the present-tense state. NOT "remember when X happened" but "the same warmth that was in your chest then is here now".`);
    }
    }

    if (_isCategoryShared('susceptibility', p) && p.susceptibility !== '' && p.susceptibility != null) {
      const sn = Number(p.susceptibility);
      if (Number.isFinite(sn) && sn <= 3) {
        parts.push(
          'HYPNOTIC SUSCEPTIBILITY: LOW (' + sn + '/10). The listener has demonstrated low responsiveness on the HIP brief. ' +
          'DO NOT promise involuntary sensations they may not feel — avoid "your hand is getting heavier", "you\'ll find yourself drifting deeper", "you cannot open your eyes", "your arm is becoming light". ' +
          'DO NOT use depth language ("deeper", "going under", "deep trance", "somnambulism"). ' +
          'INSTEAD: frame the session as attention training and physiological relaxation. Use concrete sensory observation ("notice three sounds in this room", "feel the contact between your back and the chair") rather than imagery requiring vivid mental visualization. ' +
          'Use verifiable cues only — breath, posture, count, point of contact, named muscle groups. ' +
          'When using affirmations or reframes, frame them as cognitive rehearsal the listener consciously agrees with, not as suggestions sinking into the unconscious. ' +
          'The benefits — slower breath, lower heart rate, calmer attention, parasympathetic activation — are physiological and don\'t require any specific feeling state. Make this implicit in the writing; don\'t lecture about it.'
        );
      } else if (Number.isFinite(sn) && sn >= 7) {
        parts.push(
          'HYPNOTIC SUSCEPTIBILITY: HIGH (' + sn + '/10). The listener responds strongly to direct suggestion. ' +
          'Direct/declarative language is welcome ("your hand is heavy now", "going deeper", "you can\'t open your eyes until I say"). ' +
          'Ideomotor suggestions (hand levitation, arm catalepsy) are appropriate convincers. ' +
          'Depth language and rapid-deepening counts work well.'
        );
      }

    }

    if (state._inferredModality) {
      const guidance = {
        visual:       'Lean into visual descriptions (light, color, distance, scenes the user can see in their mind).',
        auditory:     'Lean into auditory descriptions (sounds, rhythms, the texture of the voice itself, named sounds).',
        kinesthetic:  'Lean into bodily sensation (weight, warmth, breath, where in the body the experience lands).',
      }[state._inferredModality];
      if (guidance) parts.push(`Inferred preferred modality: ${state._inferredModality}. ${guidance}`);
    }

    const srcLabel = id => ({
      pfGoals:'goals', pfAbout:'about',
      intentionInput:'intention', userAffirmations:'affirmations',
      bgPromptInput:'bg-prompt', bgImage:'image-gen',
      pfPreferredEnvironments:'environments', pfSensorySensitivities:'sensitivities',
      pfCurrentThemes:'themes', pfCurrentStressors:'stressors',
      pfCurrentWins:'wins', pfHealthNotes:'health-notes',
      pfSafePlace:'safe-place', pfPowerObject:'power-object',
      pfResourceMemory:'resource-memory',
    }[id] || id);
    try {
      const recent = (_profileChangeLog || []).slice(0, 10);
      if (recent.length) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const dayMs = 86400000;
        const weighted = recent.map(e => {
          const ageDays = Math.max(0, (now - e.ts) / dayMs);
          const w = Math.exp(-ageDays / 14);
          return { e, ageDays, w };
        }).filter(x => x.w >= 0.1);
        const lines = weighted.map(({ e }) => {
          const rel = _relTimeDB(e.ts);
          if (e.type === 'csv' && e.diff) {
            const add = (e.diff.added || []).slice(0, 3).join(',');
            const rem = (e.diff.removed || []).slice(0, 3).join(',');
            const bits = [];
            if (add) bits.push('+' + add);
            if (rem) bits.push('-' + rem);
            return `${rel} · ${srcLabel(e.source)}: ${bits.join(' ')}`.trim();
          } else if (e.type === 'text' && e.diff) {
            return `${rel} · ${srcLabel(e.source)}: ${Math.round((e.diff.changePct || 0) * 100)}% text change`;
          } else if (e.type === 'image' && e.diff) {
            const tags = (e.diff.tags || []).slice(0, 4).join(',');
            const sum = e.diff.summary || (tags ? `[${tags}]` : '');
            return `${rel} · image: ${sum}`;
          }
          return `${rel} · ${srcLabel(e.source)}`;
        }).filter(Boolean);
        if (lines.length) parts.push('Recent changes: ' + lines.join(' | '));

        const veryRecent = weighted.filter(x => x.ageDays <= 7 && (x.e.type === 'text' || x.e.type === 'csv'));
        if (veryRecent.length) {
          const fields = [...new Set(veryRecent.map(x => srcLabel(x.e.source)))];
          parts.push(`This is the first session since the user updated their ${fields.join(' and ')}; lean into the change rather than echoing prior sessions.`);
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {  }

    // Roadmap #19 — Surface today's priming answers as ambient context
    // for the AI. The questionnaire's primary effect is on the user
    // (the act of answering primes expectancy), but feeding the answers
    // through to the AI lets the script gently match the user's
    // self-rated openness — direct language for high willingness, more
    // permissive for low. Only the most recent (≤4 hour) entry counts.
    try {
      const log = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('hne.primingLogV1') || '[]');
      const fresh = log.filter(e => e.ts > Date.now() - 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000).pop();
      if (fresh) {
        const avg = (fresh.openness + fresh.imagination + fresh.willingness) / 3;
        let hint = '';
        if (avg <= 2) hint = 'low — the listener self-reported low openness/willingness in the last hour. Lean permissive: invitations rather than commands, no pressure to feel anything specific, validate their critical mind explicitly';
        else if (avg >= 4) hint = 'high — the listener self-reported high openness/willingness. Direct and confident language is appropriate; you can lead more firmly';
        else hint = 'moderate — default balanced approach';
        parts.push(`Listener's self-rated state right now (1–5 scale): openness ${fresh.openness}, imagination ${fresh.imagination}, willingness ${fresh.willingness}. Tone: ${hint}.`);
      }
    } catch {}

    // ── Roadmap #21 — IFS / parts-aware framing overlay ───────────────
    // Composes with any persona. Adds prompt instruction that re-shapes
    // how the script addresses internal resistance.
    const ifsMode = $('pfIfsMode')?.value || 'off';
    if (ifsMode === 'skeptic') {
      parts.push(
        'PARTS-AWARE FRAMING (skeptic): Throughout the script, occasionally address THE PART OF THE LISTENER THAT DOESN\'T BELIEVE THIS WORKS directly. Use phrases like "and the part of you that\'s tracking whether this is working can keep doing that — that\'s its job", "the analytical part is welcome to stay analytical", "the curious part can come along; the skeptical part can stay back and watch". Never argue with the skeptical part. Never ask the listener to suspend disbelief. The skeptical part remaining active is COMPATIBLE with the practice, not opposed to it. Use this register about once per phase — not constantly, not absent.'
      );
    } else if (ifsMode === 'parts') {
      parts.push(
        'PARTS-AWARE FRAMING (IFS-style): Address the listener as having multiple parts — the part that\'s tired, the part that\'s skeptical, the part that\'s here to do the practice, the part that\'s already been working hard today. Never claim all parts agree. Never push for unanimity. Phrases like "we\'re not asking all of you to come; just the part that\'s curious", "the protective part can stay nearby", "the tired part doesn\'t have to do anything tonight — it can just witness". This composition is essential — the listener\'s internal multiplicity is honored, not overridden.'
      );
    } else if (ifsMode === 'felt-sense') {
      parts.push(
        'FELT-SENSE FRAMING (Gendlin Focusing): Body-first throughout. Whenever you\'d normally ask the listener to imagine, picture, or visualize something, instead ask where in the body this question or topic lives. "Where does the tightness sit right now? Just below the breastbone, or higher? Notice the shape of it. Don\'t name it yet — let the body answer first." The script never demands imagery; it always returns to bodily sensation as the primary site of work. Cognitive observations are welcome but always tested against "and how does that land in the body right now?"'
      );
    }

    const result = parts.length > 0 ? '\nSUBJECT PROFILE: ' + parts.join(' ') : '';
    sdLog('getProfileContext built', { fieldCount: parts.length, charCount: result.length });
    return result;
  }

  const FRESHNESS_COUNT = 4;
  const FRESHNESS_MIN_TAGS = 0;
  const FRESHNESS_ROTATION_CAP = 30;
  let _recentAnchors = [];

  function deriveProfileTags() {
    const tags = new Set();
    const p = getProfile();

    if (p.experience === 'beginner') tags.add('slow');
    if (p.experience === 'advanced') tags.add('dense');

    const goals = (p.goals || '').toLowerCase();
    if (/(sleep|insomnia|bedtime)/.test(goals)) tags.add('sleep');
    if (/(calm|relax|anxiety|stress)/.test(goals)) tags.add('calm');
    if (/(focus|concentration|productivity)/.test(goals)) tags.add('focus');
    if (/(creative|art|write)/.test(goals)) tags.add('creative');
    if (/(confidence|self)/.test(goals)) tags.add('confidence');

    const intention = ($('intentionInput')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
    if (/(water|ocean|river|rain)/.test(intention)) tags.add('water');
    if (/(warm|sun|fire|glow)/.test(intention)) tags.add('warm');
    if (/(cool|cold|ice|winter)/.test(intention)) tags.add('cool');

    const envs = (p.preferredEnvironments || '').toLowerCase();
    if (/(beach|ocean|sea|water|river|lake|stream)/.test(envs)) tags.add('water');
    if (/(forest|wood|tree|moss)/.test(envs))                    tags.add('forest');
    if (/(mountain|alpine|peak|valley)/.test(envs))              tags.add('mountain');
    if (/(garden|meadow|flower)/.test(envs))                     tags.add('garden');
    if (/(desert|dune|sand)/.test(envs))                         tags.add('warm');
    if (/(snow|ice|winter|cold)/.test(envs))                     tags.add('cool');
    if (/(library|study|book)/.test(envs))                       tags.add('focus');
    if (/(home|cozy|cabin|hearth|fire)/.test(envs))              tags.add('warm');

    try {
      const imgEntries = (_profileChangeLog || []).filter(e => e.source === 'bgImage').slice(0, 5);
      imgEntries.forEach(e => (e.diff?.tags || []).forEach(t => tags.add(t)));
    } catch {}
    return [...tags];
  }

  function buildFreshnessBlock() {
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) return '';

    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || typeof root.freshSeeds !== 'function') return '';
    try {
      const tags = deriveProfileTags();
      if (tags.length < FRESHNESS_MIN_TAGS) return '';
      const phrases = root.freshSeeds({
        profileTags: tags,
        n: FRESHNESS_COUNT,
        excludeSet: _recentAnchors,
      });
      if (!phrases || !phrases.length) return '';

      _recentAnchors.push(...phrases);
      if (_recentAnchors.length > FRESHNESS_ROTATION_CAP) {
        _recentAnchors = _recentAnchors.slice(-FRESHNESS_ROTATION_CAP);
      }
      sdLog('freshness block built', { count: phrases.length, tags });
      return `\nOPTIONAL ANCHORS (use only if they fit the moment — ignore otherwise):\n${phrases.map(p => '  • ' + p).join('\n')}`;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[freshSeeds] pick failed:', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  async function buildLivingProfile() {
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      sdLog('buildLivingProfile skipped — Smart Director off');
      return null;
    }
    try {
      const stated = getProfile();
      const memory = await getMemory();
      const adaptive = await getAdaptive();
      const history = ((await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []).map(normalizeHistoryEntry);
      const analytics = await getAnalytics();

      const moodSessions = history.filter(s => s.completed && s.preMood != null && s.postMood != null).slice(0, 5);
      const recentMoodDeltas = moodSessions.map(s => s.postMood - s.preMood);
      const avgRecentMoodDelta = recentMoodDeltas.length > 0
        ? recentMoodDeltas.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / recentMoodDeltas.length
        : null;

      const recent10 = history.slice(0, 10);
      const completionRate = recent10.length > 0
        ? recent10.filter(s => s.completed).length / recent10.length
        : null;

      const recentDepths = history.slice(0, 5).map(s => s.depth).filter(d => d != null);
      const avgRecentDepth = recentDepths.length > 0
        ? recentDepths.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / recentDepths.length
        : null;

      const topKey = (map) => {
        const entries = Object.entries(map || {});
        if (!entries.length) return null;
        return entries.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0][0];
      };

      const living = {
        version: 1,
        updatedAt: Date.now(),
        stated: {
          name: stated.name,
          useFirstName: stated.useFirstName,
          pronouns: stated.pronouns,
          age: stated.age,
          experience: stated.experience,
          about: stated.about,
          appearance: stated.appearance,
          goals: stated.goals,
        },
        observed: {
          longTermProfile: memory.longTermProfile || '',
          rollingPatterns: memory.rollingWindow || '',
          digestCount: memory.sessionDigests?.length || 0,
        },
        adaptive: {
          traits: adaptive.traits || {},
          difficulty: adaptive.difficulty || {},
          memorySummary: adaptive.memorySummary || '',
          topPersona: topKey(analytics.p),
          topMethod: topKey(analytics.m),
          topIntention: topKey(analytics.i),
        },
        snapshot: {
          sessionCount: history.length,
          completedCount: history.filter(s => s.completed).length,
          emergencyExitCount: analytics.comp?.emergency || 0,
          completionRate,
          recentMoodDeltas,
          avgRecentMoodDelta,
          avgRecentDepth,
          lastSessionAt: history[0]?.date || null,
          daysSinceLast: history[0]?.date
            ? Math.floor((Date.now() - history[0].date) / 86400000)
            : null,
        },
      };

      sdLog('buildLivingProfile', living);
      return living;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('buildLivingProfile failed:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }

  function computeDirectorBrief(living, session = {}) {
    if (!living) return null;
    const snap = living.snapshot;

    const globalBias = Math.max(-3, Math.min(3, Math.round(Number(state.directorBias) || 0)));
    const domain = (session.intention && state.intentionType) || state.intentionType || null;
    const domainOffset = domain && state.directorBiasByDomain
      ? Math.round(Number(state.directorBiasByDomain[domain]) || 0)
      : 0;
    const bias = Math.max(-3, Math.min(3, globalBias + domainOffset));
    const brief = {
      generatedAt: Date.now(),
      bias,
      forSession: {
        persona: session.persona || null,
        method: session.method || null,
        intention: session.intention || null,
        length: session.length || null,
      },
      coldStart: false,
      recoveryMode: false,
      recommendations: {},
      warnings: [],
      reasoning: [],
    };

    const coldStartLimit     = Math.max(0, 3 - bias);
    const recoveryMoodLimit  = -2 - bias * 0.5;
    const completionFloor    = 0.5 - bias * 0.05;
    const daysSinceRentry    = 14 + bias * 3;
    const positivePacingFloor = 1.5 - bias * 0.3;
    sdLog('computeDirectorBrief thresholds', { bias, coldStartLimit, recoveryMoodLimit, completionFloor, daysSinceRentry, positivePacingFloor });

    if (snap.completedCount < coldStartLimit) {
      brief.coldStart = true;
      brief.reasoning.push(
        snap.completedCount === 0
          ? 'No completed sessions yet — using defaults and keeping things grounded.'
          : `Only ${snap.completedCount} completed session${snap.completedCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} so far — still calibrating.`
      );
      sdLog('computeDirectorBrief: cold start', brief);
      return brief;
    }

    const lastThree = snap.recentMoodDeltas.slice(0, 3);
    if (lastThree.length === 3 && lastThree.every(d => d <= recoveryMoodLimit)) {
      brief.recoveryMode = true;
      brief.recommendations.suggestedDepth = 'light';
      brief.recommendations.suggestedLength = 'short';
      brief.recommendations.skipIntensification = true;
      brief.warnings.push('Last 3 sessions ended with notable mood decline.');
      brief.reasoning.push(`Recovery mode triggered — recent sessions trended mood-negative (threshold ≤ ${recoveryMoodLimit}). Recommending a gentler, shorter session and skipping intensification.`);
      sdLog('computeDirectorBrief: recovery mode', brief);
      return brief;
    }

    if (snap.completionRate != null && snap.completionRate < completionFloor) {
      brief.recommendations.suggestedLength = 'short';
      brief.warnings.push(`Recent completion rate is ${Math.round(snap.completionRate * 100)}%.`);
      brief.reasoning.push(`Recent completion rate is low (${Math.round(snap.completionRate * 100)}% < ${Math.round(completionFloor * 100)}%) — suggest a shorter session to rebuild the habit.`);
    }

    const emergencyCap = bias >= 3 ? 3 : 2;
    if (snap.emergencyExitCount >= emergencyCap && snap.completedCount < 10) {
      brief.recommendations.maxDepth = 'medium';
      brief.reasoning.push(`${snap.emergencyExitCount} emergency exits on record with limited completed history — capping suggested depth at medium.`);
    }

    if (living.stated.experience === 'beginner' && bias < 3) {
      brief.recommendations.maxDepth = brief.recommendations.maxDepth || 'medium';
      brief.reasoning.push('Self-identifies as beginner — capping suggested depth at medium.');
    }

    if (snap.avgRecentMoodDelta != null && snap.avgRecentMoodDelta >= positivePacingFloor) {
      brief.reasoning.push(`Average mood delta is +${snap.avgRecentMoodDelta.toFixed(1)} — current pacing is working; stay the course.`);
    }

    if (snap.daysSinceLast != null && snap.daysSinceLast >= daysSinceRentry) {
      brief.recommendations.suggestedDepth = brief.recommendations.suggestedDepth || 'light';
      brief.reasoning.push(`${snap.daysSinceLast} days since last session (≥ ${daysSinceRentry}) — treat as a re-entry and keep this one gentle.`);
    }

    sdLog('computeDirectorBrief', brief);
    return brief;
  }

  function formatDirectorBriefForPrompt(brief) {
    if (!brief) return '';
    const parts = [];
    const bias = brief.bias || 0;

    if (brief.coldStart) {
      const coldBase = 'Early practitioner — follow defaults and keep the session welcoming and grounded.';
      const toneNote = _toneDirectiveFromBias(bias);
      return '\nDIRECTOR BRIEF: ' + coldBase + (toneNote ? ' ' + toneNote : '');
    }

    if (brief.recoveryMode) {
      parts.push('Recovery mode — keep this session lighter and shorter than usual. No intensification, no peak-state work. Gentle, supportive, reassuring tone.');
    }

    const r = brief.recommendations;
    const directives = [];
    if (r.suggestedDepth) directives.push(`aim for ${r.suggestedDepth} depth`);
    if (r.maxDepth)       directives.push(`do not exceed ${r.maxDepth} depth`);
    if (r.suggestedLength)directives.push(`favor a ${r.suggestedLength}-length pacing`);
    if (r.skipIntensification && !brief.recoveryMode) directives.push('skip intensification language');
    if (directives.length) parts.push('Adjustments: ' + directives.join('; ') + '.');

    if (brief._triggerInfo) {
      const ti = brief._triggerInfo;
      if (ti.fires >= 3) {
        parts.push(`Trigger "${ti.trigger}" has fired ${ti.fires} times in real life. Reinforce confidently — language like "now stronger than ever", "deeper each time".`);
      } else if (ti.fires >= 1) {
        parts.push(`Trigger "${ti.trigger}" has fired ${ti.fires} time${ti.fires === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Reinforce with quiet confidence.`);
      } else if (ti.daysSinceCraft >= 7) {
        parts.push(`Trigger "${ti.trigger}" hasn't fired in real life yet. Consider phrasing it more vividly or tying it to a more reliable everyday cue.`);
      }
    }

    const toneNote = _toneDirectiveFromBias(bias);
    if (toneNote) parts.push(toneNote);

    if (parts.length === 0) return '';

    const tier = (typeof getAITier === 'function') ? getAITier() : 'perchance';
    if (tier === 'anthropic' || tier === 'openai') {
      const sections = ['DIRECTOR BRIEF: ' + parts.join(' ')];
      if (brief.reasoning?.length) {
        sections.push('Rationale: ' + brief.reasoning.slice(0, 4).join(' / '));
      }
      if (brief.warnings?.length) {
        sections.push('Warnings: ' + brief.warnings.slice(0, 3).join(' / '));
      }
      return '\n' + sections.join('\n');
    }
    return '\nDIRECTOR BRIEF: ' + parts.join(' ');
  }

  function _toneDirectiveFromBias(bias) {
    if (bias <= -2) return 'Tone calibration: favor grounded, careful, gently reassuring language. Avoid pushing intensity or urgency.';
    if (bias === -1) return 'Tone calibration: lean slightly cautious and unhurried.';
    if (bias === 1)  return 'Tone calibration: lean slightly forward with warm momentum.';
    if (bias >= 2)  return 'Tone calibration: favor forward-momentum, energizing language. Trust the practitioner to engage fully with deeper work.';
    return '';
  }

  let _affirmIdxGlobal = 0;
  function resetAffirmRotation() { _affirmIdxGlobal = 0; }

  function resolveTokens(text, opts = {}) {
    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return text || '';
    if (text.indexOf('\u007B\u007B') === -1) return text;

    const profile = opts.profile || getProfile();
    const useName = !!profile.useFirstName && !!profile.name;
    const userValue = opts.user != null ? String(opts.user) : (useName ? profile.name : 'you');

    let narValue = opts.persona;
    if (narValue == null) {
      try { narValue = getPersona()?.name || ''; } catch { narValue = ''; }
    }
    narValue = narValue || 'the narrator';

    let intentionValue = opts.intention;
    if (intentionValue == null) {
      intentionValue = ($('intentionInput')?.value || '').trim();
    }

    let affirmArr = opts.affirmations;
    if (!Array.isArray(affirmArr)) {
      const raw = ($('userAffirmations')?.value || '').trim();
      affirmArr = raw ? raw.split(/\r?\n/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : [];
    }
    const nextAffirm = () => {
      if (!affirmArr.length) return '';
      const v = affirmArr[_affirmIdxGlobal % affirmArr.length];
      _affirmIdxGlobal++;
      return v;
    };

    return text.replace(/\{\{\s*([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*\}\}/g, (match, rawName) => {
      const name = rawName.toLowerCase();
      switch (name) {
        case 'user':        return userValue;
        case 'nar':
        case 'guide':
        case 'persona':     return narValue;
        case 'intention':   return intentionValue || match;
        case 'affirmation': return nextAffirm() || match;

        case 'safeplace':
        case 'safe_place':
          return (profile.safePlace && profile.shareGoals !== false)
            ? profile.safePlace
            : 'a place where you feel completely safe';
        case 'powerobject':
        case 'power_object':
          return (profile.powerObject && profile.shareGoals !== false)
            ? profile.powerObject
            : 'something you carry that grounds you';
        case 'resourcememory':
        case 'resource_memory':
          return (profile.resourceMemory && profile.shareGoals !== false)
            ? profile.resourceMemory
            : 'a moment when you felt completely yourself';
        default: {

          const v = state.sessionVariables?.[name];
          if (v === undefined || v === null) return match;
          if (typeof v === 'boolean') return v ? 'yes' : 'no';
          if (typeof v === 'number') {

            return Number.isInteger(v) ? String(v) : String(+v.toFixed(2));
          }
          return String(v);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  function setSessionVariable(name, value) {
    if (typeof name !== 'string') return false;
    const norm = name.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]{0,31}$/.test(norm)) return false;
    if (!state.sessionVariables) state.sessionVariables = {};

    let v = value;
    if (typeof v === 'string') {
      const n = Number(v);
      if (Number.isFinite(n) && v.trim() !== '') v = n;
    }
    state.sessionVariables[norm] = v;
    try { _renderVariablesPanel?.(); } catch {}
    return true;
  }
  function getSessionVariable(name) {
    if (typeof name !== 'string') return null;
    const norm = name.trim().toLowerCase();
    return state.sessionVariables?.[norm] ?? null;
  }
  function deleteSessionVariable(name) {
    if (typeof name !== 'string') return false;
    const norm = name.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (state.sessionVariables && norm in state.sessionVariables) {
      delete state.sessionVariables[norm];
      try { _renderVariablesPanel?.(); } catch {}
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  const HNE_VAR_DEFS_KEY = 'hne_session_variable_defs_v1';

  function loadVariableDefs() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_VAR_DEFS_KEY);
      if (!raw) return {};
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && !Array.isArray(parsed)) ? parsed : {};
    } catch { return {}; }
  }
  function saveVariableDefs(defs) {
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_VAR_DEFS_KEY, JSON.stringify(defs || {})); }
    catch {}
  }

  function _renderVariablesPanel() {
    const list = $('sessionVariablesList');
    const count = $('sessionVariablesCount');
    if (!list) return;
    const defs = loadVariableDefs();
    const live = state.sessionVariables || {};
    const names = Object.keys(defs).sort();
    if (count) count.textContent = `(${names.length})`;
    if (!names.length) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;padding:6px 0">No variables defined.</div>';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = names.map(name => {
      const def = defs[name] || {};
      const initial = def.initial ?? '';
      const liveVal = (name in live) ? live[name] : initial;
      return `<div class="hne-var-row" data-name="${escapeHtml(name)}" style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)">
        <code style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.72rem;min-width:80px">{{${escapeHtml(name)}}}</code>
        <input type="text" class="_var_initial" value="${escapeHtml(String(initial))}" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border:0.5px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.15));color:var(--text);border-radius:3px;font-size:0.7rem;padding:3px 6px;width:120px;font-family:monospace" title="Initial value at session start">
        <span style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);min-width:90px;font-family:monospace" title="Current runtime value">live: ${escapeHtml(String(liveVal))}</span>
        <button type="button" class="_var_delete btn secondary" style="padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.66rem;margin-left:auto" title="Delete this variable">×</button>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    list.querySelectorAll('.hne-var-row').forEach(row => {
      const name = row.getAttribute('data-name');
      row.querySelector('._var_initial')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        const defs2 = loadVariableDefs();
        if (defs2[name]) {
          defs2[name].initial = e.target.value;
          saveVariableDefs(defs2);
        }
      });
      row.querySelector('._var_delete')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete variable "${name}"?`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
        if (!ok) return;
        const defs2 = loadVariableDefs();
        delete defs2[name];
        saveVariableDefs(defs2);
        deleteSessionVariable(name);
        _renderVariablesPanel();
        notify.info(`Variable "${name}" deleted.`);
      });
    });
  }

  function _applyVariableInitials() {
    const defs = loadVariableDefs();
    if (!state.sessionVariables) state.sessionVariables = {};
    for (const [name, def] of Object.entries(defs)) {
      if (!(name in state.sessionVariables)) {
        let v = def?.initial;
        if (typeof v === 'string') {
          const n = Number(v);
          if (Number.isFinite(n) && v.trim() !== '') v = n;
          else if (v === 'true') v = true;
          else if (v === 'false') v = false;
        }
        state.sessionVariables[name] = v;
      }
    }
  }

  $('sessionVariableAddBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const nameEl = $('sessionVariableNewName');
    const valEl  = $('sessionVariableNewValue');
    if (!nameEl) return;
    const name = (nameEl.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]{0,31}$/.test(name)) {
      notify.warn('Variable name must be 1-32 chars: lowercase letters, digits, underscore. First char must be letter or underscore.');
      return;
    }
    const defs = loadVariableDefs();
    if (defs[name]) {
      notify.warn(`Variable "${name}" already exists.`);
      return;
    }
    defs[name] = { initial: valEl?.value ?? '', _created: Date.now() };
    saveVariableDefs(defs);
    setSessionVariable(name, defs[name].initial);
    if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    if (valEl)  valEl.value  = '';
    _renderVariablesPanel();
    notify.success(`Variable "${name}" added.`);
  });
  $('sessionVariablesDetails')?.addEventListener('toggle', e => {
    if (e.target.open) _renderVariablesPanel();
  });

  setTimeout(() => { try { _renderVariablesPanel(); } catch {} }, 200);

  $('sessionVarExportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const defs = loadVariableDefs();
    if (!Object.keys(defs).length) { notify.warn('No variables to export.'); return; }
    shareKit.downloadJson('hne-variables-bundle', shareKit.envelope('session-variables', defs));
  });
  $('sessionVarShareBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const defs = loadVariableDefs();
    if (!Object.keys(defs).length) { notify.warn('No variables to share.'); return; }
    await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
      shareKit.envelope('session-variables', defs),
      { fileLabel: 'variables', modalTitle: 'Share session variables' }
    );
    await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
  });

  $('sessionSuggestionsRefreshBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    try { _renderSessionSuggestions(); }
    catch (e) { console.warn('[suggestions refresh]', e); }
  });

  $('sessionSuggestionsDetails')?.addEventListener('toggle', e => {
    e.currentTarget.dataset.userToggled = '1';
  });
  $('sessionVarImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const choice = await confirmAsync('Import variables from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
    let parsed = null;
    if (choice) {
      const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json');
      if (!file) return;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); }
      catch (e) { notify.error('Not valid JSON: ' + e.message); return; }
    } else {
      parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import session variables');
      if (!parsed) return;
    }
    await _importVariablesEnvelope(parsed);
  });

  async function _importVariablesEnvelope(parsed) {
    let incoming = null;
    try {
      if (parsed?.kind === 'session-variables') incoming = parsed.data || {};
      else if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && !Array.isArray(parsed) && !parsed.kind) {
        incoming = parsed;
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected session-variables or raw map');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }

    const existing = loadVariableDefs();
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const [rawName, def] of Object.entries(incoming || {})) {
      const name = String(rawName).trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]{0,31}$/.test(name)) continue;
      const safe = {
        initial: def?.initial ?? def?.value ?? '',
        _created: Number(def?._created) || Date.now(),
      };
      if (existing[name]) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Variable "${name}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!ok) continue;
        existing[name] = safe;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing[name] = safe;
        added++;
      }
    }
    saveVariableDefs(existing);
    _renderVariablesPanel();
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
  }

  const ANALYTICS_KEY = 'stillness_analytics_v3';

  async function getAnalytics() {
    try {
      const data = await idbGet(ANALYTICS_KEY) || await idbGet('stillness_analytics_v2');
      if (data) return normalizeAnalyticsData(data);
    } catch {}
    return {
      v: 3,

      p: {},
      m: {},
      i: {},
      s: {},
      z: {},
      ln: {},
      am: {},
      vc: {},

      hr: new Array(24).fill(0),
      dw: new Array(7).fill(0),

      mood: { preSum: 0, postSum: 0, deltaSum: 0, n: 0, postN: 0 },
      comp: { total: 0, finished: 0, emergency: 0 },
      dur: { sum: 0, n: 0 },
      shape: { phaseSum: 0, workSum: 0, affirmSum: 0, n: 0 },

      cfg: { rate: [], pitch: [], vol: [], drone: [] },

      feat: {},

      ts: Date.now(),
    };
  }

  async function recordAnalytics(record, wasEmergency) {
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      sdLog('recordAnalytics skipped — Smart Director off');
      return;
    }
    try {
      const a = await getAnalytics();

      const inc = (map, key) => { if (key) map[key] = (map[key] || 0) + 1; };
      inc(a.p, record.personaId);
      inc(a.m, record.methodId);
      inc(a.i, record.intention);
      inc(a.s, record.soundscape);
      inc(a.z, record.vizOverride || state.vizOverride || 'auto');
      inc(a.ln, record.length);
      inc(a.am, record.affirmationMode || 'woven');
      inc(a.vc, record.voiceName || 'default');

      const d = new Date(record.date);
      a.hr[d.getHours()] = (a.hr[d.getHours()] || 0) + 1;
      a.dw[d.getDay()] = (a.dw[d.getDay()] || 0) + 1;

      if (record.preMood != null) {
        a.mood.preSum += record.preMood;
        a.mood.n++;
      }

      a.comp.total++;
      if (wasEmergency) a.comp.emergency++;
      else if (record.completed) a.comp.finished++;

      if (record.durationSec > 0) {
        a.dur.sum += record.durationSec;
        a.dur.n++;
      }

      _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'rate',  (record.speechRate  || 0.65));
      _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'pitch', (record.voicePitch  || 0.85));
      _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'vol',   (record.voiceVolume ?? 1.0));
      _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'drone', (record.droneVolume ?? 0.35));

      const metrics = record.metrics || {};
      a.shape.phaseSum += metrics.phaseCount || (Array.isArray(record.phaseOrder) ? record.phaseOrder.length : 0);
      a.shape.workSum += record.workBlockCount || metrics.workBlocks || 0;
      a.shape.affirmSum += metrics.affirmBlocks || 0;
      a.shape.n++;

      a.ts = Date.now();
      await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, a);

      refreshInferredModality().catch(() => {});

      if (typeof _refreshSelfMemorySnapshot === 'function') _refreshSelfMemorySnapshot().catch(() => {});
    } catch(e) { console.error('Analytics write failed:', e); }
  }

  async function recordPostMood(postVal) {
    try {
      const a = await getAnalytics();
      a.mood.postSum += postVal;
      a.mood.deltaSum += postVal - (state._preMood ?? 5);
      a.mood.postN = (a.mood.postN || 0) + 1;
      await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, a);
    } catch {}
  }

  const FEAT = { AFFIRMATIONS: 1, PROGRAMS: 2, CUSTOM_PERSONA: 4, SKIP_SCRIPT: 8, TIMING_FIX: 16, SHARE: 32, BACKUP: 64, DOUBLE_INDUCT: 128, PRE_GEN: 256, CLOUD_UPLOAD: 512, COMMENTS: 1024, SCRIPT_LIBRARY: 2048 };
  const _FEAT_BIT_TO_NAME = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(FEAT).map(([n, b]) => [b, n]));

  function _migrateFeatBitmask(featRaw) {
    if (featRaw && typeof featRaw === 'object' && !Array.isArray(featRaw)) return featRaw;
    if (typeof featRaw !== 'number' || featRaw === 0) return {};
    const map = {};
    for (const [bit, name] of Object.entries(_FEAT_BIT_TO_NAME)) {
      if (featRaw & Number(bit)) map[name] = 0;
    }
    return map;
  }

  async function markFeatureUsed(bit) {
    try {
      const name = _FEAT_BIT_TO_NAME[bit];
      if (!name) return;
      const a = await getAnalytics();

      if (typeof a.feat !== 'object' || Array.isArray(a.feat)) {
        a.feat = _migrateFeatBitmask(a.feat);
      }

      if (!a.feat[name]) {
        a.feat[name] = Date.now();
        await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, a);
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  function featUsed(analytics, bit) {
    const name = _FEAT_BIT_TO_NAME[bit];
    if (!name || !analytics) return false;
    const f = analytics.feat;
    if (typeof f === 'number') return !!(f & bit);
    return !!(f && f[name]);
  }

  async function rebuildAnalytics(historyArr) {
    try {
      const existing = await getAnalytics();

      const feat = (existing.feat && typeof existing.feat === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.feat))
        ? { ...existing.feat }
        : _migrateFeatBitmask(existing.feat);
      const a = { v: 3, p: {}, m: {}, i: {}, s: {}, z: {}, ln: {}, am: {}, vc: {},
        hr: new Array(24).fill(0), dw: new Array(7).fill(0),
        mood: { preSum: 0, postSum: 0, deltaSum: 0, n: 0, postN: 0 },
        comp: { total: 0, finished: 0, emergency: 0 },
        dur: { sum: 0, n: 0 }, shape: { phaseSum: 0, workSum: 0, affirmSum: 0, n: 0 },

        cfg: { rate: [], pitch: [], vol: [], drone: [] },
        feat, ts: Date.now() };
      const inc = (map, key) => { if (key) map[key] = (map[key] || 0) + 1; };
      for (const r of historyArr) {
        inc(a.p, r.personaId); inc(a.m, r.methodId); inc(a.i, r.intention);
        inc(a.s, r.soundscape); inc(a.z, r.vizOverride || 'auto'); inc(a.ln, r.length); inc(a.am, r.affirmationMode || 'woven'); inc(a.vc, r.voiceName || 'default');
        const d = new Date(r.date); a.hr[d.getHours()]++; a.dw[d.getDay()]++;
        if (r.preMood != null) { a.mood.preSum += r.preMood; a.mood.n++; }
        if (r.postMood != null) { a.mood.postSum += r.postMood; a.mood.deltaSum += (r.postMood - (r.preMood ?? 5)); a.mood.postN = (a.mood.postN || 0) + 1; }
        a.comp.total++;
        if (r.completed) a.comp.finished++;
        else a.comp.emergency++;
        if (r.durationSec > 0) { a.dur.sum += r.durationSec; a.dur.n++; }

        _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'rate',  (r.speechRate  || 0.65));
        _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'pitch', (r.voicePitch  || 0.85));
        _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'vol',   (r.voiceVolume ?? 1.0));
        _cfgPush(a.cfg, 'drone', (r.droneVolume ?? 0.35));
        const metrics = r.metrics || {};
        a.shape.phaseSum += metrics.phaseCount || (Array.isArray(r.phaseOrder) ? r.phaseOrder.length : 0);
        a.shape.workSum += r.workBlockCount || metrics.workBlocks || 0;
        a.shape.affirmSum += metrics.affirmBlocks || 0;
        a.shape.n++;
      }
      await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, a);
    } catch(e) { console.error('Analytics rebuild failed:', e); }
  }

  function deriveInsights(a) {
    const topKey = obj => Object.entries(obj).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || null;
    const topN = (obj, n) => Object.entries(obj).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]).slice(0, n).map(e => e[0]);
    const avgMood = a.mood.n > 0 ? (a.mood.preSum / a.mood.n).toFixed(1) : null;

    const postN = a.mood.postN || 0;
    const avgPost = postN > 0 && a.mood.postSum > 0 ? (a.mood.postSum / postN).toFixed(1) : null;
    const avgDelta = postN > 0 ? (a.mood.deltaSum / postN).toFixed(1) : null;
    const avgDur = a.dur.n > 0 ? Math.round(a.dur.sum / a.dur.n) : 0;
    const peakHour = a.hr.indexOf(Math.max(...a.hr));
    const peakDay = a.dw.indexOf(Math.max(...a.dw));
    const dayNames = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'];
    return {
      favPersona: topKey(a.p), favMethod: topKey(a.m), favSoundscape: topKey(a.s),
      favIntention: topKey(a.i), favViz: topKey(a.z), favLength: topKey(a.ln),
      topPersonas: topN(a.p, 3), topMethods: topN(a.m, 3),
      avgPreMood: avgMood, avgPostMood: avgPost, avgImprovement: avgDelta,
      avgDurationSec: avgDur, completionRate: a.comp.total > 0 ? Math.round(a.comp.finished / a.comp.total * 100) : 0,
      peakHour, peakDayName: dayNames[peakDay] || '—',
      totalSessions: a.comp.total,
      avgSpeechRate: (a.cfg.rate?.length > 0) ? _cfgMean(a.cfg.rate).toFixed(2) : null,
      avgPhaseCount: a.shape?.n > 0 ? (a.shape.phaseSum / a.shape.n).toFixed(1) : null,
      avgWorkBlocks: a.shape?.n > 0 ? (a.shape.workSum / a.shape.n).toFixed(1) : null,
      favAffirmationMode: topKey(a.am || {}),
      favVoice: topKey(a.vc || {}),
      featuresUsed: Object.entries(FEAT)
        .filter(([, bit]) => featUsed(a, bit))
        .map(([name]) => name.toLowerCase().replace('_', ' ')),
    };
