  }

  const ADAPTIVE_KEY = 'stillness_adaptive_v1';

  const TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY = 'stillness_trigger_fires_v1';

  function defaultAdaptive() {
    return {
      v: 1,

      traits: {
        compliance: 0.5,
        sensitivity: 0.5,
        stability: 0.5,
        noveltySeeking: 0.5,
        depthTolerance: 0.5,
        controlPref: 0.5,
        sensoryAudio: 0.5,
        sensoryVisual: 0.5,
      },

      w: { p: {}, m: {}, s: {}, ln: {} },

      memorySummary: '',
      memorySessCount: 0,

      difficulty: 0.3,

      recoveryMode: false,

      ts: 0,
    };
  }

  async function getAdaptive() {
    try { const d = await idbGet(ADAPTIVE_KEY); if (d?.v === 1) return d; } catch {}
    return defaultAdaptive();
  }

  function deriveSignals(analytics, history) {
    const a = analytics, h = history || [];
    const clamp = (v, lo = 0, hi = 1) => Math.max(lo, Math.min(hi, v));
    const compRate = a.comp.total > 0 ? a.comp.finished / a.comp.total : 0.5;
    const postN = a.mood.postN || 0;
    const avgDelta = postN > 0 ? a.mood.deltaSum / postN : 0;
    const emergRate = a.comp.total > 0 ? a.comp.emergency / a.comp.total : 0;

    const recent = h.filter(s => s.preMood != null && s.postMood != null).slice(0, 10);
    const deltas = recent.map(s => s.postMood - s.preMood);
    const deltaVar = deltas.length > 1 ? deltas.reduce((s, d) => s + Math.pow(d - avgDelta, 2), 0) / deltas.length : 1;

    const mEntries = Object.values(a.m || {});
    const mTotal = mEntries.reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0) || 1;
    const mEntropy = -mEntries.reduce((s, v) => { const p = v / mTotal; return s + (p > 0 ? p * Math.log2(p) : 0); }, 0);
    const maxEntropy = Math.log2(Math.max(mEntries.length, 1)) || 1;

    const lenMap = { micro: 0, quick: 0.15, short: 0.3, medium: 0.45, long: 0.6, extended: 0.75, deep: 0.88, marathon: 1 };
    const lenEntries = Object.entries(a.ln || {});
    const lenTotal = lenEntries.reduce((s, [, v]) => s + v, 0) || 1;
    const avgLen = lenEntries.reduce((s, [k, v]) => s + (lenMap[k] ?? 0.5) * v, 0) / lenTotal;

    const authPersonas = ['commander','headmistress','interrogator','drill-instructor','dominatrix','surgeon'];
    const authCount = authPersonas.reduce((s, id) => s + (a.p[id] || 0), 0);
    const totalPersona = Object.values(a.p || {}).reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0) || 1;

    const soundNone = (a.s?.none || 0) / (a.comp.total || 1);
    const vizAuto = (a.z?.auto || 0) / (a.comp.total || 1);
    return {
      completionRate: compRate,
      avgImprovement: clamp(avgDelta / 5 + 0.5),
      moodVariance: clamp(1 - deltaVar / 10),
      noveltyEntropy: clamp(mEntropy / maxEntropy),
      depthNorm: clamp(avgLen),
      controlRatio: clamp(authCount / totalPersona),
      emergencyRate: emergRate,
      audioUsage: clamp(1 - soundNone),
      visualUsage: clamp(1 - vizAuto),
    };
  }

  function updateTraits(traits, sig) {
    const lerp = (old, target, rate = 0.15) => old + (target - old) * rate;
    return {
      compliance:     lerp(traits.compliance, sig.completionRate),
      sensitivity:    lerp(traits.sensitivity, sig.avgImprovement),
      stability:      lerp(traits.stability, sig.moodVariance),
      noveltySeeking: lerp(traits.noveltySeeking, sig.noveltyEntropy),
      depthTolerance: lerp(traits.depthTolerance, sig.depthNorm),
      controlPref:    lerp(traits.controlPref, sig.controlRatio),
      sensoryAudio:   lerp(traits.sensoryAudio, sig.audioUsage),
      sensoryVisual:  lerp(traits.sensoryVisual, sig.visualUsage),
    };
  }

  function computeReward(record, wasEmergency) {
    const delta = (record.postMood ?? 5) - (record.preMood ?? 5);
    return delta + (record.completed ? 1 : -1) - (wasEmergency ? 2 : 0);
  }

  function updateWeights(w, record, reward) {
    const decay = 0.98;
    const apply = (map, key) => { if (!key) return; for (const k in map) map[k] *= decay; map[key] = (map[key] || 0) + reward; };
    apply(w.p, record.personaId);
    apply(w.m, record.methodId);
    apply(w.s, record.soundscape);
    apply(w.ln, record.length);
  }

  function computeDifficulty(sig, currentDiff) {
    const target = sig.completionRate * 0.4 + sig.avgImprovement * 0.3 + sig.depthNorm * 0.3;
    return currentDiff + (target - currentDiff) * 0.1;
  }

  function checkEquilibrium(sig, adaptive) {
    if (sig.emergencyRate > 0.3 || sig.completionRate < 0.5 || sig.avgImprovement < 0.3) {
      return { recoveryMode: true, difficulty: Math.max(0.1, adaptive.difficulty - 0.15) };
    }
    return { recoveryMode: false, difficulty: adaptive.difficulty };
  }

  const _C1_POSTURE_BLOCK = {

    walking:    new Set(['hand-heaviness', 'arm-catalepsy', 'progressive', 'floating-body', 'glove-anesthesia', 'magnetic-hands', 'arm-drop']),

    'lying-side': new Set(['progressive', 'body-awareness', 'floating-body']),
  };

  const _C3_HEALTH_BLOCKS = [
    { re: /\bmigraine|seizure|epilep/i, methods: ['shock-induction']  },
    { re: /\bpregnan/i,                  methods: ['shock-induction', 'eye-roll'] },
    { re: /\bptsd|trauma|dissociat/i,    methods: ['eye-roll', 'shock-induction', 'fractionation', 'confusion'] },
    { re: /\bpsychosis|schizo/i,         methods: ['confusion', 'fractionation', 'time-distortion'] },
    { re: /\bvertigo|dizz|inner ear/i,   methods: ['floating-body', 'spiral'] },
  ];

  const _C4_MYSTICAL_TAGS = new Set(['spiritual', 'mystic', 'sacred']);

  const _C6_LOW_SUSCEPT_BLOCK = new Set([
    'eye-roll', 'dave-elman', 'shock-induction', 'rapid-induction',
    'magnetic-hands', 'instant-induction',
  ]);

  const _C6_LOW_SUSCEPT_PROMOTE = {
    'highway':        0.6,
    'betty-erickson': 0.6,
    'confusion':      0.5,
    'fractionation':  0.6,
    'progressive':    0.55,
    'breath-478':     0.55,
    'hand-heaviness': 0.6,
    'body-awareness': 0.5,
    'ericksonian':    0.45,
  };

  function _personaCountByHour(history) {

    const map = {};
    for (const r of history || []) {
      if (!r?.personaId || !r.date) continue;
      const h = new Date(r.date).getHours();
      if (!map[r.personaId]) map[r.personaId] = new Array(24).fill(0);
      map[r.personaId][h]++;
    }
    return map;
  }

  function getRecommendation(adaptive, analytics, profile, history) {

    const topW = (weightMap, countMap, minSamples = 3, minSeparation = 0.15, blockSet = null) => {
      let entries = Object.entries(weightMap || {}).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);

      if (blockSet && blockSet.size) entries = entries.filter(([k]) => !blockSet.has(k));
      if (!entries.length) return { id: null, confidence: 0 };
      const [top, second] = entries;
      const topCount = (countMap || {})[top[0]] || 0;
      if (topCount < minSamples) return { id: null, confidence: 0 };
      const separation = second ? (top[1] - second[1]) : top[1];
      const denom = Math.max(Math.abs(top[1]) + Math.abs(second?.[1] ?? 0), 0.01);
      const confidence = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, separation / denom));
      if (confidence < minSeparation) return { id: null, confidence };
      return { id: top[0], confidence };
    };
    const aP = analytics?.p || {}, aM = analytics?.m || {}, aS = analytics?.s || {}, aL = analytics?.ln || {};

    let methodBlockSet = null;
    let personaBoost = null;
    let soundscapeBoost = null;
    let methodBoost = null;
    if (profile) {

      const postureBlock = _C1_POSTURE_BLOCK[profile.posture];
      if (postureBlock) methodBlockSet = new Set(postureBlock);

      const notes = String(profile.healthNotes || '');
      if (notes) {
        for (const rule of _C3_HEALTH_BLOCKS) {
          if (rule.re.test(notes)) {
            if (!methodBlockSet) methodBlockSet = new Set();
            for (const m of rule.methods) methodBlockSet.add(m);
          }
        }
      }

      if (profile.coPresence === 'shared' || profile.coPresence === 'public') {
        soundscapeBoost = { drone: 0.5, brown: 0.5, pink: 0.4, rain: 0.3, fan: 0.3 };
      }

      if (profile.spiritualFrame === 'secular' && typeof METHODS !== 'undefined') {
        const mysticalIds = new Set(
          METHODS.filter(m => Array.isArray(m.tags) && m.tags.some(t => _C4_MYSTICAL_TAGS.has(t)))
                 .map(m => m.id)
        );
        if (mysticalIds.size) {
          if (!methodBlockSet) methodBlockSet = new Set();
          for (const m of mysticalIds) methodBlockSet.add(m);
        }
      }

      const susceptRaw = profile.susceptibility;
      if (susceptRaw !== '' && susceptRaw != null) {
        const sn = Number(susceptRaw);
        if (Number.isFinite(sn) && sn <= 3) {
          if (!methodBlockSet) methodBlockSet = new Set();
          for (const m of _C6_LOW_SUSCEPT_BLOCK) methodBlockSet.add(m);
          methodBoost = { ..._C6_LOW_SUSCEPT_PROMOTE };
        }
      }
    }

    let personaWeights = adaptive.w.p;
    if (history && history.length >= 5) {
      const hour = new Date().getHours();
      const byHour = _personaCountByHour(history);
      let bestPersona = null, bestCount = 0;
      for (const pid in byHour) {
        const c = byHour[pid][hour] || 0;
        if (c > bestCount) { bestCount = c; bestPersona = pid; }
      }

      if (bestPersona && bestCount >= 3) {
        personaWeights = { ...adaptive.w.p };
        personaWeights[bestPersona] = (personaWeights[bestPersona] || 0) + 0.5 * bestCount;
        personaBoost = { id: bestPersona, count: bestCount, hour };
      }
    }

    let soundscapeWeights = adaptive.w.s;
    if (soundscapeBoost) {
      soundscapeWeights = { ...adaptive.w.s };
      for (const k in soundscapeBoost) {
        soundscapeWeights[k] = (soundscapeWeights[k] || 0) + soundscapeBoost[k];
      }
    }

    let methodWeights = adaptive.w.m;
    if (methodBoost) {
      methodWeights = { ...adaptive.w.m };
      for (const k in methodBoost) {
        methodWeights[k] = (methodWeights[k] || 0) + methodBoost[k];
      }
    }

    const personaPick    = topW(personaWeights,        aP);
    const methodPick     = topW(methodWeights,         aM, 3, 0.15, methodBlockSet);
    const soundscapePick = topW(soundscapeWeights,     aS, 3, 0.10);
    const lengthPick     = topW(adaptive.w.ln,         aL);
    const rec = {
      persona:    personaPick.id,
      method:     methodPick.id,
      soundscape: soundscapePick.id,
      length:     lengthPick.id,

      _confidence: {
        persona:    personaPick.confidence,
        method:     methodPick.confidence,
        soundscape: soundscapePick.confidence,
        length:     lengthPick.confidence,
      },

      _cluster_c: (methodBlockSet || personaBoost || soundscapeBoost || methodBoost) ? {
        blockedMethods:  methodBlockSet  ? [...methodBlockSet]   : null,
        personaTimeBoost: personaBoost,
        soundscapeBoost:  soundscapeBoost ? Object.keys(soundscapeBoost) : null,
        methodBoost:      methodBoost     ? Object.keys(methodBoost)     : null,
      } : null,
    };

    if (adaptive.recoveryMode) rec.length = 'short';
    else if (adaptive.difficulty > 0.7) rec.length = rec.length || 'long';
    else if (adaptive.difficulty < 0.3) rec.length = rec.length || 'short';

    try {
      recordDirectorAudit('recommendation', {
        rec: { ...rec },
        adaptiveSnapshot: _summarizeAdaptive(adaptive),
        analyticsTotals: {
          completions: analytics?.comp?.total || 0,
          attempts:    analytics?.comp?.attempts || 0,
        },
        profileFlags: profile ? {
          posture:        profile.posture || null,
          coPresence:     profile.coPresence || null,
          spiritualFrame: profile.spiritualFrame || null,
          susceptibility: profile.susceptibility || '',
          hasHealthNotes: !!(profile.healthNotes && String(profile.healthNotes).trim()),
        } : null,
        historyLen: Array.isArray(history) ? history.length : 0,
      });
    } catch {}
    return rec;
  }

  function getAdaptivePromptBlock(adaptive) {
    if (!adaptive || adaptive.ts === 0) return '';
    const t = adaptive.traits;
    const lines = ['\n[ADAPTIVE CONTEXT — do not reveal these values]'];
    if (t.compliance < 0.4) lines.push('- User often stops early. Keep sessions engaging and check in more.');
    if (t.sensitivity > 0.7) lines.push('- User responds strongly to suggestions. Use moderate intensity.');
    else if (t.sensitivity < 0.3) lines.push('- User needs stronger, more direct suggestions to feel effects.');
    if (t.stability < 0.4) lines.push('- Mood responses vary widely. Prioritize grounding and safety.');
    if (t.noveltySeeking > 0.7) lines.push('- User enjoys variety. Introduce fresh metaphors and techniques.');
    else if (t.noveltySeeking < 0.3) lines.push('- User prefers familiar patterns. Reinforce known-effective approaches.');
    if (t.depthTolerance > 0.7) lines.push('- User tolerates deep trance. Allow longer pauses and deeper language.');
    else if (t.depthTolerance < 0.3) lines.push('- Keep trance light. Shorter pauses, more conversational tone.');
    if (t.controlPref > 0.65) lines.push('- User prefers authoritative direction.');
    else if (t.controlPref < 0.35) lines.push('- User prefers gentle, permissive approach.');
    if (adaptive.recoveryMode) lines.push('- RECOVERY MODE: Simplify. Shorter pauses. More grounding. Extra gentleness.');
    const diffLabel = adaptive.difficulty > 0.65 ? 'advanced' : adaptive.difficulty > 0.35 ? 'intermediate' : 'beginner';
    lines.push(`- Difficulty level: ${diffLabel} (${adaptive.difficulty.toFixed(2)})`);
    if (adaptive.memorySummary) lines.push(`- Memory: ${adaptive.memorySummary}`);
    return lines.length > 1 ? lines.join('\n') : '';
  }

  async function updateMemorySummary(adaptive, history) {
    if (!history.length || adaptive.memorySessCount < 5) return adaptive.memorySummary;
    const recent = history.slice(0, 8).map(s => `${s.guide}/${s.method} ${s.length} mood:${s.preMood ?? '?'}→${s.postMood ?? '?'} ${s.completed ? '✓' : '✗'}`).join('; ');
    try {

      const data = await aiGenerate(
        `You are analyzing a hypnosis user's recent sessions. Write a 1-2 sentence behavioral summary noting: what works best, what to avoid, emotional trajectory. Be concise and clinical.\n\nRecent sessions: ${recent}\n\nPrevious summary: ${adaptive.memorySummary || 'none'}\n\nNew summary:`,
        { stopSequences: ['\n\n'] }
      );
      if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') return adaptive.memorySummary;
      const text = (data.generatedText || '').trim().slice(0, 250);
      return text || adaptive.memorySummary;
    } catch { return adaptive.memorySummary; }
  }

  async function updateAdaptiveProfile(sessionRecord, wasEmergency) {
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      sdLog('updateAdaptiveProfile skipped — Smart Director off');
      return;
    }
    try {
      const adaptive = await getAdaptive();
      const analytics = await getAnalytics();
      const history = ((await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []).map(normalizeHistoryEntry);

      const sig = deriveSignals(analytics, history);

      adaptive.traits = updateTraits(adaptive.traits, sig);

      const reward = computeReward(sessionRecord, wasEmergency);
      updateWeights(adaptive.w, sessionRecord, reward);

      adaptive.difficulty = computeDifficulty(sig, adaptive.difficulty);

      const eq = checkEquilibrium(sig, adaptive);
      adaptive.recoveryMode = eq.recoveryMode;
      adaptive.difficulty = eq.difficulty;

      adaptive.memorySessCount = (adaptive.memorySessCount || 0) + 1;
      if (adaptive.memorySessCount >= 5) {
        adaptive.memorySummary = await updateMemorySummary(adaptive, history);
        adaptive.memorySessCount = 0;
      }
      adaptive.ts = Date.now();
      await idbSet(ADAPTIVE_KEY, adaptive);
    } catch(e) { console.error('Adaptive update failed:', e); }
  }

  function validateStep(n) {
    if (n === 1) return !!getPersona();
    if (n === 2) return !!getMethod();
    if (n === 3) {
      const skipCraft = ['trance', 'sleep'].includes(state.intentionType);
      return !!state.craftedSuggestion || skipCraft;
    }
    if (n === 4) return true;
    if (n === 5) return true;
    if (n === 6) return !!state.fullScript;
    return true;
  }

  function clearGeneratedScriptUi() {
    state.fullScript = null;
    state.parsedScript = null;
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = [];
    state.scriptSections = [];
    if (typeof _scriptEditedSinceGen !== 'undefined') _scriptEditedSinceGen = false;
    if ($('scriptText')) $('scriptText').value = '';
    if ($('scriptStats')) $('scriptStats').innerHTML = '';
    if ($('scriptPreview')) $('scriptPreview').classList.remove('visible');
    if ($('phaseEditorPanel')) $('phaseEditorPanel').style.display = 'none';
    if ($('genProgress')) $('genProgress').style.display = 'none';
    if ($('scriptBuildProgress')) $('scriptBuildProgress').style.display = 'none';
    if ($('generateScriptBtn')) showEl('generateScriptBtn', true);
  }

  function getAITier() {
    if (state.extAiProvider === 'anthropic' && state._extAiKey) return 'anthropic';
    if (state.extAiProvider === 'openai'    && state._extAiKey) return 'openai';
    return 'perchance';
  }

  const AI_AUDIT_KEY = 'stillness_ai_audit_v1';
  const AI_AUDIT_CAP = 100;
  let _aiAuditLog = [];
  let _aiAuditLoaded = false;
  async function _loadAuditLog() {
    if (_aiAuditLoaded) return;
    try { _aiAuditLog = (await idbGet(AI_AUDIT_KEY)) || []; }
    catch { _aiAuditLog = []; }
    _aiAuditLoaded = true;
  }
  let _auditSaveTimer = null;
  function _scheduleAuditSave() {
    clearTimeout(_auditSaveTimer);
    _auditSaveTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
      try { await idbSet(AI_AUDIT_KEY, _aiAuditLog); } catch {}
    }, 1500);
  }
  function logAICall(provider, source, instruction, parts) {
    if (!_aiAuditLoaded) _loadAuditLog();
    const bytes = (typeof instruction === 'string') ? instruction.length : 0;

    let contextBytes, taskBytes;
    if (Array.isArray(parts)) {
      contextBytes = 0;
      taskBytes = 0;
      for (const p of parts) {
        const len = (p?.text?.length) || 0;
        if (p?.name === 'sharedContext' || p?.name === 'priorSummary') contextBytes += len;
        else if (p?.name === 'taskBlock' || p?.name === 'diversity') taskBytes += len;
      }
    }
    _aiAuditLog.unshift({
      ts: Date.now(),
      provider: provider || 'unknown',
      source: source || 'unknown',
      bytes,
      ...(contextBytes != null ? { contextBytes, taskBytes } : {}),
    });
    if (_aiAuditLog.length > AI_AUDIT_CAP) _aiAuditLog.length = AI_AUDIT_CAP;
    _scheduleAuditSave();
  }

  _loadAuditLog().catch(() => {});

  async function aiGenerate(instruction, opts = {}) {
    const provider = state.extAiProvider || 'perchance';

    try { logAICall(provider, opts.source || 'unknown', instruction, opts.parts); } catch {}

    const asResult = (text, stopReason, note) => {
      const t = (text || '').trim();
      if (!t || stopReason === 'error') return { generatedText: '', stopReason: 'error', _note: note || 'empty or errored' };
      return { generatedText: t, stopReason: stopReason || 'stop' };
    };
    if (provider === 'anthropic' && state._extAiKey) {
      try {
        const res = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': state._extAiKey, 'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01', 'anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access': 'true' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ model: opts.model || 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: opts.maxTokens || 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: instruction }] }),
        });
        if (!res.ok) {
          console.warn(`Anthropic API HTTP ${res.status}, falling back to Perchance`);

        } else {
          const data = await res.json();
          if (data.error) {
            console.warn('Anthropic API returned error:', data.error);
          } else {
            const text = data.content?.[0]?.text || '';
            const stop = data.stop_reason === 'end_turn' || data.stop_reason === 'stop_sequence' ? 'stop'
              : data.stop_reason === 'max_tokens' ? 'max_tokens' : 'stop';
            const result = asResult(text, stop, 'anthropic empty');
            if (result.stopReason !== 'error') return result;
          }
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('Anthropic API failed, falling back to Perchance:', e); }
    }
    if (provider === 'openai' && state._extAiKey) {
      try {
        const res = await fetch('https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${state._extAiKey}` },
          body: JSON.stringify({ model: opts.model || 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: instruction }], max_tokens: opts.maxTokens || 2048 }),
        });
        if (!res.ok) {
          console.warn(`OpenAI API HTTP ${res.status}, falling back to Perchance`);
        } else {
          const data = await res.json();
          if (data.error) {
            console.warn('OpenAI API returned error:', data.error);
          } else {
            const text = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '';
            const finish = data.choices?.[0]?.finish_reason;
            const stop = finish === 'stop' ? 'stop' : finish === 'length' ? 'max_tokens' : 'stop';
            const result = asResult(text, stop, 'openai empty');
            if (result.stopReason !== 'error') return result;
          }
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('OpenAI API failed, falling back to Perchance:', e); }
    }

    if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.aiTextPlugin) {
      try {

        const userStops = opts.stopSequences || ['\n\n\n'];
        const stopSequences = Array.from(new Set([...userStops, '\n\n[[', '\n[[']));
        const data = await root.aiTextPlugin({ ...opts, instruction, stopSequences, hideStartWith: true });
        if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') return asResult('', 'error', 'perchance ai error');
        return asResult(data.generatedText, data.stopReason, 'perchance empty');
      } catch (e) { console.warn('Perchance AI threw:', e); return asResult('', 'error', 'perchance threw'); }
    }
    return asResult('', 'error', 'no provider available');
  }

  const METRICS_HISTORY_KEY     = 'hne_metrics_history_v1';
  const METRICS_RETAIN_DAYS     = 180;

  let _metricsDays = null;
  const metricsHistoryReady = (async () => {
    try { _metricsDays = (await idbGet(METRICS_HISTORY_KEY)) || []; }
    catch { _metricsDays = []; }
    if (!Array.isArray(_metricsDays)) _metricsDays = [];
  })();

  function _metricsDateStr(ts) {
    const d = new Date(ts);
    return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}`;
  }

  function _metricsEmptyDay(date, source = 'app') {
    return {
      date, source,
      sessionCount:        0,
      totalRuntimeSec:     0,
      completedCount:      0,
      interruptedCount:    0,
      emergencyExitCount:  0,
      intentionMix:        {},
      methodMix:           {},
      personaMix:          {},
      avgPostMood:         null,
      avgMoodDelta:        null,
      avgDepth:            null,
      _moodSamples:        [],
      _deltaSamples:       [],
      _depthSamples:       [],
    };
  }

  async function _saveMetricsHistory() {
    if (!_metricsDays) return;

    const cutoff = new Date();
    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - METRICS_RETAIN_DAYS);
    const cutStr = _metricsDateStr(cutoff);
    _metricsDays = _metricsDays.filter(d => d.date >= cutStr);

    const forStorage = _metricsDays.map(({ _moodSamples, _deltaSamples, _depthSamples, ...d }) => d);
    try { await idbSet(METRICS_HISTORY_KEY, forStorage); } catch {}
  }

  async function recordSessionInMetricsHistory(record, completionState) {
    await metricsHistoryReady;
    if (!record || !_metricsDays) return;
    const date = _metricsDateStr(record.date || Date.now());
    let day = _metricsDays.find(d => d.date === date);
    if (!day) {
      day = _metricsEmptyDay(date, 'app');
      _metricsDays.unshift(day);
    }

    if (!day._moodSamples)  day._moodSamples  = day.avgPostMood  != null ? [day.avgPostMood]  : [];
    if (!day._deltaSamples) day._deltaSamples = day.avgMoodDelta != null ? [day.avgMoodDelta] : [];
    if (!day._depthSamples) day._depthSamples = day.avgDepth     != null ? [day.avgDepth]     : [];

    day.sessionCount++;
    day.totalRuntimeSec += record.durationSec || 0;

    if (completionState === 'completed')           day.completedCount++;
    else if (completionState === 'emergency')      day.emergencyExitCount++;
    else                                           day.interruptedCount++;

    if (record.intention)       day.intentionMix[record.intention]   = (day.intentionMix[record.intention]   || 0) + 1;
    if (record.methodId)        day.methodMix[record.methodId]       = (day.methodMix[record.methodId]      || 0) + 1;
    if (record.personaId)       day.personaMix[record.personaId]     = (day.personaMix[record.personaId]    || 0) + 1;

    if (Number.isFinite(record.postMood)) {
      day._moodSamples.push(record.postMood);
      day.avgPostMood = +(day._moodSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._moodSamples.length).toFixed(2);
      if (Number.isFinite(record.preMood)) {
        const delta = record.postMood - record.preMood;
        day._deltaSamples.push(delta);
        day.avgMoodDelta = +(day._deltaSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._deltaSamples.length).toFixed(2);
      }
    }
    if (Number.isFinite(record.depth)) {
      day._depthSamples.push(record.depth);
      day.avgDepth = +(day._depthSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._depthSamples.length).toFixed(2);
    }

    await _saveMetricsHistory();
  }

  async function updateMetricsHistoryWithPostCheckin({ postMood, preMood, depth }) {
    await metricsHistoryReady;
    if (!_metricsDays || !_metricsDays.length) return;
    const today = _metricsDateStr(Date.now());
    const day = _metricsDays.find(d => d.date === today);
    if (!day) return;

    if (!day._moodSamples)  day._moodSamples  = [];
    if (!day._deltaSamples) day._deltaSamples = [];
    if (!day._depthSamples) day._depthSamples = [];
    if (Number.isFinite(postMood)) {
      day._moodSamples.push(postMood);
      day.avgPostMood = +(day._moodSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._moodSamples.length).toFixed(2);
      if (Number.isFinite(preMood)) {
        const delta = postMood - preMood;
        day._deltaSamples.push(delta);
        day.avgMoodDelta = +(day._deltaSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._deltaSamples.length).toFixed(2);
      }
    }
    if (Number.isFinite(depth)) {
      day._depthSamples.push(depth);
      day.avgDepth = +(day._depthSamples.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / day._depthSamples.length).toFixed(2);
    }
    await _saveMetricsHistory();
  }

  async function getDailyMetricsHistory(maxDays = METRICS_RETAIN_DAYS) {
    await metricsHistoryReady;
    return (_metricsDays || []).slice(0, maxDays);
  }

  async function getMetricsTrendSummary(opts = {}) {
    const windowDays = opts.windowDays || 7;
    const compareDays = opts.compareDays || 14;
    const days = await getDailyMetricsHistory(windowDays + compareDays);
    if (days.length < 3) return null;
    const recent = days.slice(0, windowDays);
    const prior  = days.slice(windowDays, windowDays + compareDays);

    const sum = (arr, key) => arr.reduce((a, d) => a + (d[key] || 0), 0);
    const avgNonNull = (arr, key) => {
      const vals = arr.map(d => d[key]).filter(v => Number.isFinite(v));
      return vals.length ? vals.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0) / vals.length : null;
    };

    const recentSessions  = sum(recent, 'sessionCount');
    const recentCompleted = sum(recent, 'completedCount');
    const priorSessions   = sum(prior, 'sessionCount');
    const priorCompleted  = sum(prior, 'completedCount');

    if (recentSessions === 0) return null;

    const recentCompletionRate = recentSessions ? recentCompleted / recentSessions : null;
    const priorCompletionRate  = priorSessions  ? priorCompleted  / priorSessions  : null;
    const completionDelta = (recentCompletionRate != null && priorCompletionRate != null)
      ? recentCompletionRate - priorCompletionRate
      : null;

    return {
      windowDays,
      recentSessionCount:  recentSessions,
      recentCompletionRate,
      completionDelta,
      avgPostMood:    avgNonNull(recent, 'avgPostMood'),
      avgMoodDelta:   avgNonNull(recent, 'avgMoodDelta'),
      avgDepth:       avgNonNull(recent, 'avgDepth'),
      avgRuntimeSec:  recentSessions ? sum(recent, 'totalRuntimeSec') / recentSessions : null,
    };
  }

  async function clearMetricsHistory() {
    _metricsDays = [];
    try { await idbDel(METRICS_HISTORY_KEY); } catch {}
  }

  const MEMORY_KEY = 'stillness_memory_v1';
  async function getMemory() {
    const m = await idbGet(MEMORY_KEY);
    return m || { sessionDigests: [], rollingWindow: '', longTermProfile: '', lastRollingAt: 0, lastProfileAt: 0 };
  }
  async function saveMemory(m) { await idbSet(MEMORY_KEY, m); }

  async function digestSessionScript(script, record) {
    if (!script || script.length < 100) return null;
    const truncated = script.slice(0, 2000);
    const instruction = `Summarize this hypnosis session script in 2-3 sentences. Note: key imagery/metaphors, specific suggestions delivered, induction method, emotional tone. Be clinical and specific — this feeds a personalization system.

TIP: Ensure summaries use full, natural, readable sentences with correct grammar.
NOTE: Don't append commentary or word counts. Just do the task and end your response.

Script excerpt:
${truncated}

Session: guide=${record.guide || '?'}, method=${record.method || '?'}, mood Δ=${(record.postMood ?? 5) - (record.preMood ?? 5)}, depth=${record.depth ?? '?'}/10

Summary:`;
    try {
      const data = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n\n', '\n---'] });
      if (data.stopReason === 'error') return null;
      return (data.generatedText || '').trim().replace(/\n+/g, ' ').replace(/---$/, '').trim().slice(0, 300);
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  async function updateRollingMemory(memory) {
    if (memory.sessionDigests.length - memory.lastRollingAt < 5) return;
    const recent = memory.sessionDigests.slice(0, 10).map(d => d.digest).filter(Boolean).join('\n- ');
    if (!recent) return;
    const instruction = `You are analyzing a hypnosis user's recent session summaries. Write a 3-4 sentence behavioral analysis: what imagery/methods produce the best results, what to emphasize in future sessions, what to avoid. Previous analysis: "${memory.rollingWindow || 'none'}"

Recent sessions:
- ${recent}

Updated analysis (full, natural, readable sentences with correct grammar):`;
    try {
      const data = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n\n'] });
      if (data.stopReason !== 'error') {
        memory.rollingWindow = (data.generatedText || '').trim().replace(/\n+/g, ' ').trim().slice(0, 500);
        memory.lastRollingAt = memory.sessionDigests.length;
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  async function updateLongTermProfile(memory) {
    if (memory.sessionDigests.length - memory.lastProfileAt < 15) return;
    const profile = getProfileContext();
    const instruction = `Write a ~150 word practitioner profile for a hypnosis user based on their data. Note: primary use case, best methods/guides, imagery preferences, depth patterns, session length preference, key insights about what works.

Profile data: ${profile}
Rolling analysis: ${memory.rollingWindow || 'none'}
Total sessions: ${memory.sessionDigests.length}

Practitioner profile (full, natural sentences):`;
    try {
      const data = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n\n\n'] });
      if (data.stopReason !== 'error') {
        memory.longTermProfile = (data.generatedText || '').trim().slice(0, 600);
        memory.lastProfileAt = memory.sessionDigests.length;
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  async function updateSessionMemory(script, record) {
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      sdLog('updateSessionMemory skipped — Smart Director off');
      return;
    }
    try {
      const memory = await getMemory();
      const digest = await digestSessionScript(script, record);
      if (digest) {
        const entry = {
          sessionId: record.date,
          date: record.date,
          digest,
          depth: record.depth,
          moodDelta: (record.postMood ?? 5) - (record.preMood ?? 5),

          intention: record.intention || null,
          preMood:   Number.isFinite(record.preMood)  ? record.preMood  : null,
          postMood:  Number.isFinite(record.postMood) ? record.postMood : null,
        };
        memory.sessionDigests.unshift(entry);
        while (memory.sessionDigests.length > 30) memory.sessionDigests.pop();

        embedAndStoreDigest(entry.sessionId, digest, record.intentionText).catch(() => {});
      }
      await updateRollingMemory(memory);
      await updateLongTermProfile(memory);
      await saveMemory(memory);
    } catch (e) { console.error('Memory update failed:', e); }
  }

  function resetWizardForNewSession(opts = {}) {
    const preserveSelections = opts.preserveSelections !== false;
    state.currentStep = 1;
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: false, 2: false, 3: false, 4: false, 5: false, 6: false };
    state._skippedToScript = false;
    state.abortFlag = false;
    state.paused = false;
    state.craftedSuggestion = null;

    state._preMood = 5;
    state._preTension = 5;
    state._preEnergy = 5;
    document.querySelectorAll('.mood-emoji.selected').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('selected'));
    const tEl = $('preTensionSlider'); if (tEl) tEl.value = 5;
    const tVal = $('preTensionVal'); if (tVal) tVal.textContent = '5';
    const eEl = $('preEnergySlider'); if (eEl) eEl.value = 5;
    const eVal = $('preEnergyVal'); if (eVal) eVal.textContent = '5';

    if (state._sessionTags) state._sessionTags.clear(); else state._sessionTags = new Set();
    document.querySelectorAll('#sessionTagChips .session-tag-chip.selected').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
    document.querySelectorAll('#customTagChips .session-tag-chip.selected').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));

    if (typeof _updateReadinessScore === 'function') _updateReadinessScore();
    if (!preserveSelections) {
      state.selectedPersonaId = 'driver';
      state.selectedMethodId = 'highway';
      state.intentionType = 'trigger';
      state.length = 'medium';
      $('intentionInput').value = '';

      applyAdaptiveRecommendations();
    }
    clearGeneratedScriptUi();
    switchScreen('setup-wizard');
    goToStep(1);
    updateStepUI();
  }

  async function applyAdaptiveRecommendations() {
    try {
      const adaptive = await getAdaptive();
      const analytics = await getAnalytics();

      if (!adaptive || !analytics || (analytics.comp?.total || 0) < 3) return;

      const profile = (typeof getProfile === 'function') ? getProfile() : null;
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      const rec = getRecommendation(adaptive, analytics, profile, history);

      state._lastAdaptiveRec = rec;
      if (rec.persona && state.personas.find(p => p.id === rec.persona)) state.selectedPersonaId = rec.persona;
      if (rec.method && METHODS.find(m => m.id === rec.method)) state.selectedMethodId = rec.method;
      if (rec.length) { state.length = rec.length; const el = $('lengthSelect'); if (el) el.value = rec.length; }
      if (rec.soundscape) { state.soundscape = rec.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = rec.soundscape !== 'none'; const el = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (el) el.value = rec.soundscape; }
      renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
    } catch(e) { console.debug('Adaptive recommendations skipped:', e); }
  }

  function goToStep(n) {
    if (n < 1 || n > TOTAL_STEPS) return;

    if (state._sessionStartTime && !state._finishing) {
      console.warn('[goToStep] blocked — session in progress; use end & re-alert first.');
      return;
    }

    if (n > state.currentStep) {
      for (let i = state.currentStep; i < n; i++) {
        if (!validateStep(i)) {

          const stepNames = { 1: 'Choose a guide', 2: 'Choose a method', 3: 'Set your intention', 6: 'Generate the script' };
          const reason = stepNames[i] || `Complete step ${i}`;
          notify.warn(`${reason} before continuing.`);

          if (state.currentStep !== i) {
            state.currentStep = i;
            updateStepUI();
          }
          return;
        }
        state.stepsCompleted[i] = true;
      }
    }

    if (n < state.currentStep && state._skippedToScript) {
      state._skippedToScript = false;
    }

    if (state.currentStep === 1 && n !== 1 && typeof clearAllPersonaChats === 'function') {
      clearAllPersonaChats();
    }
    state.currentStep = n;

    if (typeof _stopAllPreviews === 'function') _stopAllPreviews();
    updateStepUI();
    if (n === 5) { renderConfigSummary(); renderPresetDropdown(); }
    if (n === 6) { refreshSummary(); showEl('generateScriptBtn', true); }
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });

    const stepNames = { 1: 'Choose Your Guide', 2: 'Choose Your Method', 3: 'Set Your Intention', 4: 'Add Your Own Affirmations', 5: 'Configure the Session', 6: 'Generate Your Session' };
    const announce = $('ariaStepAnnounce');
    if (announce) announce.textContent = `Step ${n} of ${TOTAL_STEPS}: ${stepNames[n] || ''}`;

    const heading = document.querySelector(`.step-content[data-step="${n}"] .step-title`);
    if (heading) { heading.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1'); heading.focus(); }
  }

  function updateStepUI() {

    document.querySelectorAll('.step-content').forEach(el => {
      el.classList.toggle('active', parseInt(el.dataset.step) === state.currentStep);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('.step-item').forEach(el => {
      const n = parseInt(el.dataset.step);
      const isSkipped = state._skippedToScript && n < state.currentStep && !state.stepsCompleted[n];
      el.classList.toggle('current', n === state.currentStep);
      el.classList.toggle('completed', n < state.currentStep && !isSkipped);
      el.classList.toggle('skipped', isSkipped);
      el.classList.toggle('clickable', n < state.currentStep && !isSkipped);
    });

    if (state._skippedToScript) {
      for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
        const el = $('stepValue' + i);
        if (el && !state.stepsCompleted[i]) el.textContent = 'skipped';
      }
    } else {
      $('stepValue1').textContent = state.stepsCompleted[1] ? getPersona().name : '';
      $('stepValue2').textContent = state.stepsCompleted[2] ? getMethod().name : '';
      let s3 = '';
      if (state.stepsCompleted[3]) {
        if (state.craftedSuggestion) s3 = 'crafted ✓';
        else if (state.intentionType === 'trance') s3 = 'pure trance';
      }
      $('stepValue3').textContent = s3;
      $('stepValue4').textContent = state.stepsCompleted[4] ? (($('userAffirmations')?.value || '').trim() ? 'custom ✓' : 'none') : '';
      $('stepValue5').textContent = state.stepsCompleted[5] ? state.length : '';
    }
    $('stepValue6').textContent = state.fullScript ? 'ready ✓' : '';

    $('btnBack').hidden = state.currentStep === 1;
    $('btnNext').hidden = state.currentStep === TOTAL_STEPS;
    $('btnNext').disabled = !validateStep(state.currentStep);
    const backLabels = {
      2: '← guide',
      3: '← method',
      4: '← intention',
      5: '← affirmations',
      6: state._skippedToScript ? '← pasted script setup' : '← session settings'
    };
    const nextLabels = {
      1: 'choose a method →',
      2: 'set your intention →',
      3: 'add affirmations →',
      4: 'choose session settings →',
      5: 'review & generate script →'
    };
    $('btnBack').textContent = backLabels[state.currentStep] || '← back';
    $('btnNext').textContent = nextLabels[state.currentStep] || 'next →';

    const skipBtn = $('btnSkipToScript');
    if (skipBtn) skipBtn.hidden = state.currentStep !== 1;

    if (state.currentStep === 6) {
      const sp = $('scriptPreview');
      if (sp) sp.classList.add('visible');
      if (typeof renderPhaseEditor === 'function') {
        try { renderPhaseEditor(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[step6] phase editor render failed:', e); }
      }

      try { _renderSessionSuggestions(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[step6] suggestions render failed:', e); }
    }
  }

  function refreshSummary() {
    $('summaryGuide').textContent = getPersona().name;
    $('summaryMethod').textContent = getMethod().name;
    $('summaryLength').textContent = `${state.length.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + state.length.slice(1)} · ${getWorkBlockCount()} work block${getWorkBlockCount() === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
    const rawIntent = $('intentionInput').value.trim();
    const intentFallback = state.intentionType === 'sleep' ? '(sleep induction)'
      : state.intentionType === 'trance' ? '(pure trance)'
      : '(no theme)';
    const intent = rawIntent || intentFallback;
    const affCount = (($('userAffirmations')?.value || '').split(/\n+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean)).length;
    if ($('summaryAffirmations')) $('summaryAffirmations').textContent = affCount ? `${affCount} custom · ${($('affirmationMode')?.value || 'woven')}` : 'none';
    $('summaryIntention').textContent = intent.length > 60 ? intent.substring(0, 57) + '...' : intent;
    updateBriefPreview();
  }

  function renderPersonaGrid() {
    const grid = $('personaGrid');
    grid.innerHTML = '';

    const isUnlockable = p => !!p.hidden && !p.isCustom && !p.isSelf;
    const isVisible = p => !isUnlockable(p) || !!state._unlocks?.[p.id];
    const adultEligible = (typeof _userIsAdultEligible === 'function') ? _userIsAdultEligible() : false;
    const isAdultVisible = p => !p.adultGated || adultEligible;

    let categoryMatched;
    if (state.personaFilter === 'all') {
      categoryMatched = state.personas;
    } else if (state.personaFilter === 'adult') {
      categoryMatched = state.personas.filter(p => p.adultGated);
    } else {
      categoryMatched = state.personas.filter(p => p.category === state.personaFilter);
    }
    const filtered = categoryMatched.filter(isVisible).filter(isAdultVisible);
    filtered.forEach(p => {
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      const isUnlocked = isUnlockable(p);
      card.className = `card category-${p.category || 'contemplative'}`
        + (p.id === state.selectedPersonaId ? ' selected' : '')
        + (p.isCustom ? ' is-custom' : '')
        + (p.isSelf ? ' is-self' : '')
        + (isUnlocked ? ' is-unlocked-guide' : '');
      card.dataset.personaId = p.id;
      const categoryLabel = p.isSelf ? 'mirror · debug' : (p.category || 'contemplative');
      const unlockedRibbon = isUnlocked
        ? '<div class="card-unlock-ribbon" style="position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-warm, #d4a772);background:rgba(212,167,114,0.08);padding:2px 6px;border:1px solid rgba(212,167,114,0.3)">✦ unlocked</div>'
        : '';

      const adultRibbon = p.adultGated
        ? '<div class="card-adult-ribbon" style="position:absolute;top:6px;left:6px;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--neon-magenta, #d896d8);background:rgba(216,150,216,0.08);padding:2px 6px;border:1px solid rgba(216,150,216,0.3);font-weight:600">🔞 21+</div>'
        : '';

      const ps = state._pickerStats?.persona?.[p.id];
      let usageBadge = '';
      if (ps && ps.total >= 2) {
        const compPct = Math.round((ps.completed / ps.total) * 100);
        const moodPart = ps.deltaN >= 2
          ? ` · Δ${ps.deltaSum / ps.deltaN >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(ps.deltaSum / ps.deltaN).toFixed(1)}`
          : '';
        usageBadge = `<div class="card-usage-badge" style="position:absolute;bottom:6px;right:8px;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.04em;color:var(--text-faint);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums" title="Your history with ${escapeHtml(p.name)}: ${ps.total} session${ps.total === 1 ? '' : 's'}, ${compPct}% completion${ps.deltaN >= 2 ? `, average mood Δ ${ps.deltaSum / ps.deltaN >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(ps.deltaSum / ps.deltaN).toFixed(1)}` : ''}">${ps.total}× · ${compPct}%${moodPart}</div>`;
      }
      card.style.position = 'relative';
      card.innerHTML = `${unlockedRibbon}${adultRibbon}${usageBadge}<div class="card-category-label">${escapeHtml(categoryLabel)}</div><div class="card-name">${escapeHtml(p.name)}${p.isSelf ? ' <span class="self-badge" title="Built from your profile + Smart Director memory">YOU</span>' : ''}</div><div class="card-tagline">${escapeHtml(p.tagline)}</div>${p.isCustom ? `<div class="card-actions"><button class="card-action-btn" data-action="edit">edit</button><button class="card-action-btn" data-action="delete">×</button></div>` : ''}`;
      card.addEventListener('click', e => {
        if (e.target.dataset.action === 'edit') { e.stopPropagation(); openPersonaEditor(p.id); return; }
        if (e.target.dataset.action === 'delete') { e.stopPropagation(); deletePersona(p.id); return; }
        state.selectedPersonaId = p.id;

        try { autoSelectVoiceForPersona(); } catch (e) {  }
        saveUserSettings();
        renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); hideScript(); updateStepUI();
      });
      grid.appendChild(card);

      if (!p.isSelf && typeof personaPortraitGet === 'function') {
        personaPortraitGet(p.id).then(url => {
          if (!url) return;

          if (!card.isConnected) { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); return; }
          const layer = document.createElement('div');
          layer.className = 'card-portrait-bg';
          layer.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:url(' + url + ');background-size:cover;background-position:center top;opacity:0.18;pointer-events:none;z-index:0';
          card.insertBefore(layer, card.firstChild);

          card.querySelectorAll('.card-category-label, .card-name, .card-tagline, .card-actions, .card-usage-badge, .card-unlock-ribbon')
            .forEach(el => { el.style.position = el.style.position || 'relative'; el.style.zIndex = '1'; });
        }).catch(() => {});
      }
    });
    const addCard = document.createElement('div');
    addCard.className = 'card add-new';
    addCard.innerHTML = '<span>+ create custom</span>';
    addCard.addEventListener('click', () => openPersonaEditor(null));
    grid.appendChild(addCard);

    const importCard = document.createElement('div');
    importCard.className = 'card add-new';
    importCard.innerHTML = '<span>📄 import lore</span><span class="card-tagline" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:4px">.txt URL → persona</span>';
    importCard.addEventListener('click', () => openImportLoreModal());
    grid.appendChild(importCard);

    if (state.personaFilter === 'all') {
      try { renderHiddenPersonaHint(); } catch (e) {  }
    }

    _applyTimeOfDayBadge('persona');
  }

  async function _applyTimeOfDayBadge(kind) {
    try {
      const hour = new Date().getHours();
      const pick = await getTimeOfDayPick(hour);
      if (!pick) return;
      const targetId = kind === 'persona' ? pick.personaId : pick.methodId;
      const grid = kind === 'persona' ? $('personaGrid') : $('methodGrid');
      if (!grid || !targetId) return;

      grid.querySelectorAll('.tod-badge').forEach(b => b.remove());
      const card = grid.querySelector(`.card[data-${kind}-id="${CSS.escape(targetId)}"]`);
      if (!card) return;
      const nameEl = card.querySelector('.card-name');
      if (!nameEl) return;
      const badge = document.createElement('span');
      badge.className = 'tod-badge';
      const hourLabel = (hour < 5 || hour >= 21) ? 'late' : (hour < 12 ? 'morning' : (hour < 17 ? 'afternoon' : 'evening'));
      badge.textContent = `your ${hourLabel}`;
      badge.title = `You've used this guide ${pick.hourCount} time${pick.hourCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} around this hour.`;
      nameEl.appendChild(badge);
    } catch (e) {  }
  }
  function renderPersonaDetail() {
    const p = getPersona();
    const el = $('personaDetail');
    if (!p) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
    const isSelf = !!p.isSelf;

    const roleText = getPersonaRole(p);
    const roleBlock = isSelf
      ? `<details style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim)"><summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--neon-cyan)">show what I'm telling the AI about you (${roleText.length} chars)</summary><pre style="white-space:pre-wrap;font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.5;background:var(--bg-soft);padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);margin-top:6px;color:var(--text);max-height:280px;overflow:auto">${escapeHtml(roleText)}</pre></details>`
      : `<div>${escapeHtml(roleText)}</div>`;

    const portraitInner = isSelf
      ? `<div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--neon-cyan);letter-spacing:0.05em">${escapeHtml(((typeof getProfile === 'function' && getProfile().name) || 'you').slice(0,1).toUpperCase())}</div>`
      : `<span class="persona-portrait-placeholder" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-align:center;line-height:1.4;padding:6px">no portrait yet</span>`;
    const portraitButton = isSelf
      ? ''
      : `<button id="generatePortraitBtn" class="preview-btn" style="font-size:0.7rem;padding:3px 10px">🎨 generate portrait</button>`;
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="persona-detail-row" style="display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start">
      <div id="personaPortraitBox" data-persona-id="${escapeHtml(p.id)}" style="flex:0 0 96px;width:96px;height:96px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;position:relative">
        ${portraitInner}
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
        <div class="detail-title">${escapeHtml(p.name)}${isSelf ? ' <span class="self-badge" style="margin-left:6px">DEBUG</span>' : ''}</div>
        ${roleBlock}
        <div class="pc-toggle-row">
          ${portraitButton}
          <button id="personaChatToggleBtn" class="pc-toggle" data-persona-id="${escapeHtml(p.id)}">💬 ${isSelf ? 'talk to yourself' : ('try out <span class="pc-toggle-name">' + escapeHtml(p.name) + '</span>')}</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pc-panel" id="personaChatPanel" data-persona-id="${escapeHtml(p.id)}">
      <div class="pc-header">
        <div class="pc-name">${isSelf ? 'a conversation with yourself' : ('talking with ' + escapeHtml(p.name))}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center">
          <button type="button" class="pc-help-btn" id="personaChatHelpBtn" title="commands &amp; tips">?</button>
          <button type="button" class="pc-close" id="personaChatCloseBtn" aria-label="close chat">✕</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-transcript" id="personaChatTranscript"></div>
      <div class="pc-suggestions" id="personaChatSuggestions"></div>
      <div class="pc-input-row">
        <textarea id="personaChatInput" class="pc-input" rows="1" placeholder="${isSelf ? 'ask yourself anything… or /help, [System: …]' : ('ask ' + escapeHtml(p.name) + ' anything… or /help, [System: …]')}"></textarea>
        <button type="button" class="pc-send" id="personaChatSendBtn">send</button>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-footer">
        <div class="pc-footer-status" id="personaChatStatus">Ephemeral — clears when you switch guides or change steps.</div>
        <button type="button" class="pc-commit" id="personaChatCommitBtn">use ${isSelf ? 'this mirror' : escapeHtml(p.name)} →</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    if (!isSelf) {

      _hydratePersonaPortrait(p.id);

      $('generatePortraitBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const btn = $('generatePortraitBtn');
        if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ generating…'; }
        const url = await generatePersonaPortrait(p);
        if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = url ? '🔄 regenerate portrait' : '🎨 generate portrait'; }
        if (url) _setPortraitImage(url, p.id);
      });
    }

    _wirePersonaChat(p);
  }

  async function _hydratePersonaPortrait(personaId) {
    const url = await personaPortraitGet(personaId);
    if (!url) return;
    _setPortraitImage(url, personaId);

    const btn = $('generatePortraitBtn');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = '🔄 regenerate portrait';
  }

  function _setPortraitImage(url, expectedPersonaId) {
    const box = $('personaPortraitBox');
    if (!box) return;
    if (expectedPersonaId && box.dataset.personaId !== expectedPersonaId) {

      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      return;
    }
    box.innerHTML = `<img src="${url}" alt="portrait" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover">`;
  }

  const PERSONA_CHAT_MAX_TURNS = 6;
  const _personaChats = {};

  function _personaChatStarters(persona) {
    if (persona && persona.isSelf) {
      return [
        "what's actually been on my mind?",
        'what am I avoiding right now?',
        'what would I tell myself if I really listened?',
        "what's the truest thing I haven't said yet?",
      ];
    }
    return [
      'how would you start a session with me?',
      "what's your style?",
      "what makes you different from other guides?",
      'tell me what to expect.',
    ];
  }

  function _personaChatInstruction(persona, history, userMsg, directive = '') {
    const role = getPersonaRole(persona) || `You are ${persona.name}, a hypnosis guide.`;
    const isSelf = !!persona.isSelf;

    const messages = history.concat([{ role: 'user', text: userMsg }])
      .map(m => m.role === 'user'
        ? `[[User]]: ${m.text}`
        : `[[${persona.name}]]: ${m.text}`)
      .join('\n');

    const instructionTask = isSelf
      ? `You are speaking as the user themself — their inner voice, reflected back. The "user" in the [[User]] turns IS you; the [[${persona.name}]] turns are your own deeper / quieter / honest voice replying. First-person throughout. Don't perform wisdom — be honest, be uncertain where uncertainty lives. 1-3 sentences per reply.`
      : `You are ${persona.name}. The user is considering choosing you as their hypnosis guide for a session, and is asking you questions to get a feel for your voice and style. This is a SHORT preview chat, NOT a hypnosis session — do not induce trance, do not give a script. Reply in your own voice as defined above. Keep replies brief (1-3 sentences). Stay fully in character — your voice, vocabulary, and cadence are the answer.`;

    const directiveBlock = directive
      ? `\n\n>>> ONE-OFF STEERING (apply to this reply only, then return to normal voice): ${directive}`
      : '';
    return `<ROLE>
${role}
</ROLE>

${instructionTask}${directiveBlock}

<MESSAGES>
${messages}
</MESSAGES>

>>> TASK: Write the next message from ${persona.name}, in voice. Keep it short.`;
  }

  function _wirePersonaChat(persona) {
    if (!persona) return;
    const toggleBtn = $('personaChatToggleBtn');
    const panel = $('personaChatPanel');
    const closeBtn = $('personaChatCloseBtn');
    const transcript = $('personaChatTranscript');
    const suggestions = $('personaChatSuggestions');
    const input = $('personaChatInput');
    const sendBtn = $('personaChatSendBtn');
    const commitBtn = $('personaChatCommitBtn');
    const status = $('personaChatStatus');
    if (!panel || !transcript) return;

    const renderTranscript = () => {
      const history = _personaChats[persona.id] || [];
      if (!history.length) {
        transcript.innerHTML = `<div class="pc-empty">Say hello, or pick a starter below.</div>`;
        suggestions.style.display = '';
      } else {
        transcript.innerHTML = history.map(m =>
          m.role === 'user'
            ? `<div class="pc-msg user">${escapeHtml(m.text)}</div>`
            : `<div class="pc-msg persona"><span class="pc-msg-name">${escapeHtml(persona.name)}</span>${escapeHtml(m.text)}</div>`
        ).join('');

        suggestions.style.display = history.length === 0 ? '' : 'none';
        transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
      }

      const turns = history.filter(m => m.role === 'user').length;
      const remaining = PERSONA_CHAT_MAX_TURNS - turns;
      if (remaining <= 0) {
        if (status) status.textContent = `Preview cap reached — pick this guide if it's a fit.`;
        if (input) { input.disabled = true; input.placeholder = 'preview cap reached'; }
        if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = true;
      } else if (turns > 0) {
        if (status) status.textContent = `${remaining} more question${remaining === 1 ? '' : 's'} in this preview.`;
      } else {
        if (status) status.textContent = `Ephemeral — clears when you switch guides or change steps.`;
      }
    };

    const renderSuggestions = () => {
      const starters = _personaChatStarters(persona);
      suggestions.innerHTML = starters.map(s =>
        `<button type="button" class="pc-suggest">${escapeHtml(s)}</button>`
      ).join('');
      suggestions.querySelectorAll('.pc-suggest').forEach(b => {
        b.addEventListener('click', () => {
          input.value = b.textContent;
          sendChat();
        });
      });
    };

    const parseChatInput = (raw) => {
      const t = String(raw || '').trim();
      if (!t) return { kind: 'empty' };
      const sys = t.match(/^\[\s*(?:system|sys)\s*:\s*([\s\S]+?)\s*\]\s*$/i);
      if (sys) return { kind: 'system', directive: sys[1].trim() };
      const slash = t.match(/^\/([a-z]+)(?:\s+([\s\S]+))?$/i);
      if (slash) return { kind: 'command', cmd: slash[1].toLowerCase(), args: (slash[2] || '').trim() };
      return { kind: 'message', text: t };
    };

    const renderSystemMessage = (text, opts = {}) => {
      const empty = transcript.querySelector('.pc-empty');
      if (empty) empty.remove();
      const el = document.createElement('div');
      el.className = 'pc-msg system' + (opts.error ? ' error' : '');
      el.innerHTML = `<span class="pc-msg-tag">${escapeHtml(opts.tag || 'system')}</span>${escapeHtml(text)}`;
      transcript.appendChild(el);
      transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
    };

    const renderHelpCard = () => {
      const empty = transcript.querySelector('.pc-empty');
      if (empty) empty.remove();
      const isSelf = !!persona.isSelf;
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'pc-help-card';
      const baseRows = [
        ['<code>[System: …]</code>', 'one-off steering for the next reply only — try <code>[System: be more direct]</code> or <code>[System: shorter, 1 sentence]</code>'],
        ['<code>/regen</code>', 'redo the last reply'],
        ['<code>/clear</code>', "clear this guide's chat history"],
        ['<code>/help</code>', 'show this card'],
      ];
      const selfRows = isSelf ? [
        ['<code>/honestly</code>', 'next reply — strip the wisdom-performing layer; raw is fine'],
        ['<code>/question</code>', 'instead of reflecting, have the mirror ask YOU a question'],
        ['<code>/show</code>', 'dump what the AI is being told about you (debug)'],
      ] : [];
      card.innerHTML = `<button class="pc-help-close" aria-label="close help">✕</button>
        <h4>commands</h4>
        ${baseRows.concat(selfRows).map(([k, v]) => `<div class="pc-help-row"><span>${k}</span><span>${v}</span></div>`).join('')}`;
      transcript.appendChild(card);
      transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
      card.querySelector('.pc-help-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => card.remove());
    };

    let _streaming = false;
    let _pendingDirective = '';

    const sendToAI = async (userText) => {
      if (_streaming) return;
      _streaming = true;
      sendBtn.disabled = true;
      const placeholder = document.createElement('div');
      placeholder.className = 'pc-msg persona streaming';
      placeholder.innerHTML = `<span class="pc-msg-name">${escapeHtml(persona.name)}</span><span class="pc-msg-body"></span>`;
      transcript.appendChild(placeholder);
      transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
      const bodyEl = placeholder.querySelector('.pc-msg-body');
      const directive = _pendingDirective;
      _pendingDirective = '';
      try {

        const aiHistory = (_personaChats[persona.id] || []).filter(m => m.role === 'user' || m.role === 'persona');
        const instruction = _personaChatInstruction(persona, aiHistory.slice(0, -1), userText, directive);
        let acc = '';
        if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.aiTextPlugin) {
          const startWith = `[[${persona.name}]]:`;
          const streamObj = root.aiTextPlugin({
            instruction,
            startWith,
            hideStartWith: true,
            stopSequences: ['\n[[User]]:', '\n\n[[', '\n[[', '\n\n\n'],
            onChunk: (data) => {
              if (data.isFromStartWith) return;
              const chunk = data.textChunk || '';
              if (!chunk) return;
              acc += chunk;
              const cleaned = acc.replace(/^\s*\[\[[^\]]+\]\]:\s*/, '').trim();
              bodyEl.textContent = cleaned;
              transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
            },
          });
          const data = await streamObj;
          if (data?.stopReason === 'error' && !acc) throw new Error('plugin error');
        } else {
          const data = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n[[User]]:'] });
          acc = (data?.generatedText || '').trim();
          bodyEl.textContent = acc.replace(/^\s*\[\[[^\]]+\]\]:\s*/, '').trim();
        }
        let finalText = (acc || '').replace(/^\s*\[\[[^\]]+\]\]:\s*/, '').trim();
        if (!finalText) throw new Error('empty reply');
        placeholder.classList.remove('streaming');
        bodyEl.textContent = finalText;
        _personaChats[persona.id].push({ role: 'persona', text: finalText });
        renderTranscript();
      } catch (e) {
        placeholder.classList.remove('streaming');
        bodyEl.textContent = `(${persona.name} couldn't respond — try again in a moment)`;
        bodyEl.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
        bodyEl.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
      } finally {
        _streaming = false;
        sendBtn.disabled = false;
      }
    };

    const sendChat = async () => {
      if (_streaming) return;
      const raw = input.value || '';
      input.value = '';

      input.style.height = 'auto';
      const parsed = parseChatInput(raw);
      if (parsed.kind === 'empty') return;
      const history = _personaChats[persona.id] = _personaChats[persona.id] || [];

      if (parsed.kind === 'command') {
        const handled = await handleSlashCommand(parsed.cmd, parsed.args);
        if (!handled) renderSystemMessage(`unknown command: /${parsed.cmd}. type /help for a list.`, { error: true });
        return;
      }

      if (parsed.kind === 'system') {
        _pendingDirective = parsed.directive;
        renderSystemMessage(parsed.directive, { tag: 'steering' });
        return;
      }

      if (history.filter(m => m.role === 'user').length >= PERSONA_CHAT_MAX_TURNS) return;
      history.push({ role: 'user', text: parsed.text });
      renderTranscript();
      await sendToAI(parsed.text);
    };

    const handleSlashCommand = async (cmd, args) => {
      const isSelf = !!persona.isSelf;
      const history = _personaChats[persona.id] = _personaChats[persona.id] || [];
      switch (cmd) {
        case 'help':
        case '?':
          renderHelpCard();
          return true;

        case 'clear': {
          _personaChats[persona.id] = [];
          renderTranscript();
          renderSystemMessage('chat cleared.');
          return true;
        }

        case 'regen': {

          let lastUserIdx = -1;
          for (let i = history.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (history[i].role === 'user') { lastUserIdx = i; break; }
          }
          if (lastUserIdx < 0) {
            renderSystemMessage('nothing to regenerate yet.', { error: true });
            return true;
          }
          const lastUserText = history[lastUserIdx].text;

          _personaChats[persona.id] = history.slice(0, lastUserIdx + 1);
          renderTranscript();
          renderSystemMessage('regenerating…');
          await sendToAI(lastUserText);
          return true;
        }

        case 'honestly': {
          if (!isSelf) {
            renderSystemMessage('/honestly only works with the Self persona (debug mode).', { error: true });
            return true;
          }

          _pendingDirective = 'Strip away any wisdom-performing layer. Be raw, even if rough. Speak the way someone actually talks to themselves at 2am, not the way a guide speaks to a client. Imperfect honesty over polished insight.';
          renderSystemMessage('next reply will be unvarnished. send a message to continue.', { tag: 'steering' });
          return true;
        }

        case 'question': {
          if (!isSelf) {
            renderSystemMessage('/question only works with the Self persona (debug mode).', { error: true });
            return true;
          }
          _pendingDirective = 'Instead of reflecting back, ask the user (yourself) ONE question that cuts to what is actually going on. Just the question — no preamble, no setup, no answer. The kind of question that you would only ask yourself if you were really paying attention.';
          renderSystemMessage('next reply will be a question instead of a reflection.', { tag: 'steering' });
          return true;
        }

        case 'show': {
          if (!isSelf) {
            renderSystemMessage('/show only works with the Self persona (debug mode).', { error: true });
            return true;
          }

          const aiHistory = history.filter(m => m.role === 'user' || m.role === 'persona');
          const sample = _personaChatInstruction(persona, aiHistory, '<your next message would go here>', _pendingDirective);

          const empty = transcript.querySelector('.pc-empty');
          if (empty) empty.remove();
          const el = document.createElement('div');
          el.className = 'pc-msg system';
          el.innerHTML = `<span class="pc-msg-tag">debug · payload</span><pre style="white-space:pre-wrap;font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:0.74rem;line-height:1.45;margin:6px 0 0;color:var(--text);max-height:280px;overflow:auto">${escapeHtml(sample)}</pre>`;
          transcript.appendChild(el);
          transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
          return true;
        }
      }
      return false;
    };

    if (toggleBtn) {
      toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const isOpen = panel.classList.contains('visible');
        if (isOpen) {
          panel.classList.remove('visible');
        } else {
          panel.classList.add('visible');
          renderSuggestions();
          renderTranscript();
          setTimeout(() => input?.focus(), 50);
        }
      });
    }
    if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.remove('visible'));
    const helpBtn = $('personaChatHelpBtn');
    if (helpBtn) helpBtn.addEventListener('click', renderHelpCard);
    if (sendBtn) sendBtn.addEventListener('click', sendChat);
    if (input) {
      input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {

        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          sendChat();
        }
      });

      input.addEventListener('input', () => {
        input.style.height = 'auto';
        input.style.height = Math.min(input.scrollHeight, 120) + 'px';
      });
    }
    if (commitBtn) {
      commitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {

        clearAllPersonaChats();
        notify.success(`${persona.name} is your guide. Choose a method →`);
        goToStep(2);
      });
    }
  }

  function clearAllPersonaChats() {
    for (const k of Object.keys(_personaChats)) delete _personaChats[k];
  }

  function renderMethodGrid() {
    const grid = $('methodGrid');
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    const filtered = state.methodFilter === 'all' ? METHODS : METHODS.filter(m => m.category === state.methodFilter);
    const lockState = state._methodLockState;
    filtered.forEach(m => {
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      const lockReason = lockState?.reasonFor?.(m.category) || '';
      const isLocked = !!lockReason;
      card.className = `card category-${m.category}` + (m.id === state.selectedMethodId ? ' selected' : '') + (isLocked ? ' locked' : '');
      card.dataset.methodId = m.id;
      if (isLocked) card.title = lockReason;
      const lockBadge = isLocked ? `<span class="card-badge" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--text-faint);color:var(--text-faint)">🔒 locked</span>` : '';

      const ms = state._pickerStats?.method?.[m.id];
      let usageBadge = '';
      if (!isLocked && ms && ms.total >= 2) {
        const compPct = Math.round((ms.completed / ms.total) * 100);
        const moodPart = ms.deltaN >= 2
          ? ` · Δ${ms.deltaSum / ms.deltaN >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(ms.deltaSum / ms.deltaN).toFixed(1)}`
          : '';
        usageBadge = `<div class="card-usage-badge" style="position:absolute;bottom:6px;right:8px;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.04em;color:var(--text-faint);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums" title="Your history with ${escapeHtml(m.name)}: ${ms.total} session${ms.total === 1 ? '' : 's'}, ${compPct}% completion${ms.deltaN >= 2 ? `, average mood Δ ${ms.deltaSum / ms.deltaN >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(ms.deltaSum / ms.deltaN).toFixed(1)}` : ''}">${ms.total}× · ${compPct}%${moodPart}</div>`;
      }
      card.style.position = 'relative';
      card.innerHTML = `${usageBadge}<div class="card-category-label">${escapeHtml(m.category)}</div><div class="card-name">${escapeHtml(m.name)}${m.recommended ? `<span class="card-badge">recommended</span>` : ''}${lockBadge}</div><div class="card-tagline">${escapeHtml(m.tagline)}</div><div class="card-tags">${m.tags.map(t => `<span class="card-tag">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('')}</div>`;
      card.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (isLocked) {
          notify.info(lockReason);
          return;
        }
        state.selectedMethodId = m.id;
        saveUserSettings();

        if (!state._soundscapeOverridden) {
          state.soundscape = m.drone ? 'drone' : 'none';
          state.droneEnabled = m.drone;
          const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect');
          if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = state.soundscape;
        }
        renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail(); hideScript(); updateStepUI();
      });
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });

    _applyTimeOfDayBadge('method');
  }

  let _GLOSS_MARKUP_RE_CACHE = null;
  function _buildGlossRegex() {
    if (typeof GLOSSARY === 'undefined') return null;
    const keys = Object.keys(GLOSSARY).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
    return keys.length
      ? new RegExp('\\b(' + keys.map(k => k.replace(/[-/\\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g, '\\$&')).join('|') + ')\\b', 'gi')
      : null;
  }
  function markGlossaryTerms(html) {
    if (!html) return html;
    if (!_GLOSS_MARKUP_RE_CACHE) _GLOSS_MARKUP_RE_CACHE = _buildGlossRegex();
    if (!_GLOSS_MARKUP_RE_CACHE) return html;
    return html.replace(_GLOSS_MARKUP_RE_CACHE, (m) => {
      const key = m.toLowerCase();
      if (typeof _GLOSS_LC === 'undefined' || !_GLOSS_LC[key]) return m;
      return `<span class="gloss-term" data-gloss="${key}">${m}</span>`;
    });
  }

  function renderMethodDetail() {
    const m = getMethod();
    const el = $('methodDetail');
    if (!m) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }

    const detailHtml = markGlossaryTerms(escapeHtml(m.detail));

    const dupBtn = !m._custom
      ? `<button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="methodDupToMineBtn" style="margin-top:10px;font-size:0.66rem;padding:3px 10px" title="Create an editable copy of this method in your custom methods">⎘ duplicate to mine</button>`
      : '';
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="detail-title">${escapeHtml(m.name)}</div><div>${detailHtml}</div>${dupBtn}`;
    if (!m._custom) {
      $('methodDupToMineBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {

        _openCustomMethodEditor();

        setTimeout(() => {
          const $$ = id => document.getElementById(id);
          if ($$('_cm_name') && !$$('_cm_name').value) {
            $$('_cm_name').value = m.name + ' (copy)';
            const tagline = $$('_cm_tagline');   if (tagline) tagline.value = m.tagline || '';
            const tags    = $$('_cm_tags');      if (tags)    tags.value    = (m.tags || []).join(', ');
            const cat     = $$('_cm_category');  if (cat)     cat.value     = VALID_METHOD_CATEGORIES.includes(m.category) ? m.category : 'therapeutic';
            const viz     = $$('_cm_visual');    if (viz)     viz.value     = m.visual || 'colorwash';
            const pacing  = $$('_cm_pacing');    if (pacing)  pacing.value  = m.pacing || 'permissive';
            const drone   = $$('_cm_drone');     if (drone)   drone.checked = !!m.drone;
            const detail  = $$('_cm_detail');    if (detail)  detail.value  = m.detail || '';
          }
        }, 60);
      });
    }
  }
  function updateIntentionHint() {
    const type = $('intentionType').value;
    state.intentionType = type;
    const typeData = INTENTION_TYPES[type];
    $('intentionTypeHint').textContent = typeData ? typeData.hint : '';
    hideCrafted();

    const skipCraft = ['trance', 'sleep'].includes(type);
    const craftBtn = $('craftBtn');
    const intentionInput = $('intentionInput');
    const intentionLabel = intentionInput?.previousElementSibling;

    if (skipCraft) {
      if (craftBtn) craftBtn.style.display = 'none';
      if (craftBtn?.nextElementSibling) craftBtn.nextElementSibling.style.display = 'none';
      if (intentionInput) intentionInput.style.display = 'none';
      if (intentionLabel) intentionLabel.style.display = 'none';
      showEl('affirmationGroup', false);
    } else {
      if (craftBtn) craftBtn.style.display = '';
      if (craftBtn?.nextElementSibling) craftBtn.nextElementSibling.style.display = '';
      if (intentionInput) intentionInput.style.display = '';
      if (intentionLabel) intentionLabel.style.display = '';
      showEl('affirmationGroup', true);
    }

    updateStepUI();
  }
  function updateBriefPreview() {
    const p = getPersona(); const m = getMethod();
    const rawIntent = $('intentionInput').value.trim();
    const intentFallback = state.intentionType === 'sleep' ? '[sleep induction]'
      : state.intentionType === 'trance' ? '[pure trance]'
      : '[no theme]';
    const intention = rawIntent || intentFallback;
    const el = $('briefPreview');
    if (!p) { el.textContent = ''; return; }
    const action = m.category === 'demonstration' ? `demonstrate the <strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong> effect` : `use the <strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong> method`;
    el.innerHTML = `<strong>Hey ${escapeHtml(p.name)}</strong> — ${action} for a <strong>${escapeHtml(state.length)}</strong> session on the theme: <strong>"${escapeHtml(intention)}"</strong>${state.craftedSuggestion ? ' (with the crafted suggestion embedded)' : ''}. Write the full script.`;
  }

  function renderConfigSummary() {
    const p = getPersona(), m = getMethod();
    const el = $('configSummary');
    if (!el || !p || !m) return;

    const catColors = {
      contemplative: 'var(--accent)', showman: 'var(--accent-warm)',
      somatic: 'var(--accent-green)', authoritarian: '#d46a6a',
      therapeutic: '#8a9aaa', demonstration: 'var(--accent-purple)',
      rapid: '#d4a74a', advanced: '#e06888',
    };
    const pColor = catColors[p.category] || 'var(--text-dim)';
    const mColor = catColors[m.category] || 'var(--text-dim)';

    el.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:140px">
          <div style="font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:4px">guide</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text);font-weight:500">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.68rem;color:${pColor};margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(p.category)}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:140px">
          <div style="font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:4px">method</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text);font-weight:500">${escapeHtml(m.name)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.68rem;color:${mColor};margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(m.category)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`;

    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect');
    const ssHint = $('soundscapeHint');
    if (ssSelect && ssHint) {

      const recommendations = {
        highway: 'drone', spiral: 'drone', confusion: 'drone',
        'breath-478': 'none', progressive: 'ocean', ericksonian: 'rain',
        'heartbeat-sync': 'heartbeat', 'floating-body': 'binaural',
        'time-distortion': 'binaural', somnambulism: 'binaural',
        'double-induction': 'brown',
      };
      const rec = recommendations[m.id];

      if (rec && ssSelect.value === state.soundscape && !state._soundscapeOverridden) {
        ssSelect.value = rec; state.soundscape = rec; state.droneEnabled = rec !== 'none';
      }
      if (m.drone) ssHint.textContent = `Recommended for ${escapeHtml(m.name)}. Procedurally generated — never loops.`;
      else ssHint.textContent = 'Optional. Procedurally generated — never loops. Use headphones for binaural.';
    }

    const speedHint = $('speechRateHint');
    if (speedHint) {
      if (m.category === 'rapid') speedHint.textContent = 'Rapid methods work well at normal or slightly faster speed.';
      else if (m.category === 'advanced') speedHint.textContent = 'Advanced methods benefit from a slow, deliberate pace.';
      else if (p.category === 'authoritarian') speedHint.textContent = 'Authoritarian guides often work well at a slightly faster pace.';
      else speedHint.textContent = 'Slower is more hypnotic.';
    }

    const lengthHint = $('lengthHint');
    if (lengthHint) {
      if (m.category === 'rapid') lengthHint.textContent = 'Rapid methods are designed to be short. "Short" is usually plenty.';
      else if (m.category === 'advanced') lengthHint.textContent = 'Advanced methods benefit from longer sessions to build depth.';
      else if (state.intentionType === 'sleep') lengthHint.textContent = 'Sleep sessions work best at medium or long — give yourself time to drift off.';
      else lengthHint.textContent = '';
    }

    const warnEl = $('configWarning');
    if (warnEl) {
      const warnings = [];
      if (m.category === 'advanced' && state.length === 'short') {
        warnings.push('Advanced methods may not reach full depth in a short session. Consider medium or long.');
      }
      if (p.category === 'authoritarian' && m.category === 'therapeutic' && m.pacing === 'permissive') {
        warnings.push('An authoritarian guide with a permissive method is an unusual combination. It can work, but the tones may clash.');
      }
      if (state.intentionType === 'sleep') {
        warnings.push('Sleep sessions skip wake and reintroduction. You will not be re-alerted — the session ends in silence.');
      }
      if (warnings.length) {
        warnEl.style.display = 'block';
        warnEl.innerHTML = '<strong>Note:</strong> ' + warnings.join(' · ');
      } else {
        warnEl.style.display = 'none';
      }
    }
  }
