      const layer = $('bgLayer');
      if (layer) layer.style.display = '';
      document.body.classList.add('bg-active');
      if (this.source === 'ai') this.startRotation();
      else if (this.source === 'local-image' || this.source === 'url') {  }
      else if (this.source === 'local-video') { const v = $('bgLocalVideo'); if (v && v.src) v.play().catch(() => {}); }
      else if (this.source === 'youtube') { const y = $('bgYoutubeUrl'); if (y?.value) this.setYouTube(y.value); }
    },

    clear() {
      this.stopRotation();
      this.stopFolderSlideshow();

      this._softMotionGen = (this._softMotionGen || 0) + 1;

      this.queue.forEach(u => { try { URL.revokeObjectURL(u); } catch {} });
      this.queue = [];
      const imgs = [$('bgImg0'), $('bgImg1')];
      imgs.forEach(i => {
        if (i) {
          i.src = '';
          i.classList.remove('active');

          i.style.cssText = '';
        }
      });
      const vid = $('bgLocalVideo'); if (vid) { vid.pause(); vid.src = ''; vid.style.display = 'none'; }
      const yt = $('bgYoutubeWrap'); if (yt) { yt.style.display = 'none'; }
      const yf = $('bgYoutube'); if (yf) yf.src = '';
      if (this._localObjectUrl) { URL.revokeObjectURL(this._localObjectUrl); this._localObjectUrl = null; }
      const layer = $('bgLayer');
      if (layer) {
        layer.style.display = 'none';

        layer.classList.remove('bg-flipping');
      }
      document.body.classList.remove('bg-active');
    }
  };

  const BG_MANIFEST_KEY = 'bg_manifest';

  const BG_MAX_IMAGES = 80;

  async function bgCacheStore(dataUrl, prompt, seed) {
    const id = 'bg_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 6);
    const blob = await fetch(dataUrl).then(r => r.blob());
    const manifest = (await idbGet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY)) || [];

    await idbSet('bg_img_' + id, blob);

    const evictedEntries = [];
    while (manifest.length >= BG_MAX_IMAGES) {
      let evictIdx = manifest.findIndex(m => !m.favorited);
      if (evictIdx === -1) {

        console.warn('[bgCache] all entries are favorited; evicting oldest to make room');
        evictIdx = 0;
      }
      const [removed] = manifest.splice(evictIdx, 1);
      if (removed) evictedEntries.push(removed);
    }

    manifest.push({
      id,
      prompt: prompt || '',
      createdAt: Date.now(),
      seed: (typeof seed === 'number' && Number.isFinite(seed)) ? seed : null,
      favorited: false,
    });
    await idbSet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY, manifest);

    for (const old of evictedEntries) {
      try { await idbDel('bg_img_' + old.id); }
      catch (e) { console.warn('[bgCache] failed to delete evicted blob', old.id, e); }
    }

    const countEl = $('bgCacheCount'); if (countEl) countEl.textContent = manifest.length;
    _maybeRefreshGallery();
    return id;
  }
  async function bgCacheGetManifest() { return (await idbGet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY)) || []; }
  async function bgCacheGetUrl(id) {
    const blob = await idbGet('bg_img_' + id);
    return blob ? URL.createObjectURL(blob) : null;
  }
  async function bgCacheGetAllUrls() {
    const manifest = await bgCacheGetManifest();
    const urls = [];
    for (const entry of manifest) {
      const url = await bgCacheGetUrl(entry.id);
      if (url) urls.push(url);
    }
    return urls;
  }
  async function bgCacheDelete(id) {
    await idbDel('bg_img_' + id);
    const manifest = (await idbGet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY)) || [];
    const next = manifest.filter(m => m.id !== id);
    await idbSet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY, next);
    const countEl = $('bgCacheCount'); if (countEl) countEl.textContent = next.length;
    _maybeRefreshGallery();
  }
  async function bgCacheClear() {
    const manifest = (await idbGet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY)) || [];
    for (const entry of manifest) await idbDel('bg_img_' + entry.id);
    await idbSet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY, []);
    const countEl = $('bgCacheCount'); if (countEl) countEl.textContent = '0';
    _maybeRefreshGallery();
  }

  const _bgDownloadInflight = new Set();
  function _bgDownloadExtFromMime(mime) {

    if (!mime || typeof mime !== 'string') return 'jpg';
    const m = mime.toLowerCase();
    if (m.includes('jpeg') || m.includes('jpg')) return 'jpg';
    if (m.includes('png')) return 'png';
    if (m.includes('webp')) return 'webp';
    if (m.includes('gif')) return 'gif';
    return 'jpg';
  }
  async function bgCacheDownload(id) {
    if (_bgDownloadInflight.has(id)) return;
    _bgDownloadInflight.add(id);
    setTimeout(() => _bgDownloadInflight.delete(id), 1500);
    const blob = await idbGet('bg_img_' + id);
    if (!blob) return;
    const ext = _bgDownloadExtFromMime(blob.type);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = id + '.' + ext;
    a.click();
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
  }

  async function bgCacheToggleFavorite(id) {
    const manifest = (await idbGet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY)) || [];
    const entry = manifest.find(m => m.id === id);
    if (!entry) return null;
    entry.favorited = !entry.favorited;
    await idbSet(BG_MANIFEST_KEY, manifest);
    return entry.favorited;
  }

  function bgCacheSortManifest(manifest, mode, favOnly) {
    let view = (manifest || []).slice();
    if (favOnly) view = view.filter(m => m.favorited === true);
    switch (mode) {
      case 'oldest':
        view.sort((a, b) => (a.createdAt || 0) - (b.createdAt || 0));
        break;
      case 'favorites':

        view.sort((a, b) => {
          const fa = a.favorited === true ? 1 : 0;
          const fb = b.favorited === true ? 1 : 0;
          if (fa !== fb) return fb - fa;
          return (b.createdAt || 0) - (a.createdAt || 0);
        });
        break;
      case 'seed':

        view.sort((a, b) => {
          const sa = (typeof a.seed === 'number') ? a.seed : Infinity;
          const sb = (typeof b.seed === 'number') ? b.seed : Infinity;
          if (sa !== sb) return sa - sb;
          return (b.createdAt || 0) - (a.createdAt || 0);
        });
        break;
      case 'newest':
      default:
        view.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt || 0) - (a.createdAt || 0));
        break;
    }
    return view;
  }

  const PORTRAIT_KEY = id => 'persona_portrait_' + id;

  const PORTRAIT_STYLE_BY_CATEGORY = {
    contemplative: 'soft watercolor wash, muted blue-gray palette, gentle indirect lighting, calm contemplative expression',
    showman:       'theatrical lighting with warm rim glow, confident charismatic expression, slightly dramatic angle',
    somatic:       'soft body-aware silhouette, organic flowing forms, warm earth tones, grounded presence',
    authoritarian: 'high contrast charcoal sketch, formal upright pose, focused steady gaze, monochromatic',
  };
  const PORTRAIT_NEGATIVE = 'text, watermark, logo, signature, nsfw, multiple faces, distorted face, anatomical errors, low quality, blurry, deformed, nudity';

  function _buildPortraitPrompt(persona) {
    const styleHint = PORTRAIT_STYLE_BY_CATEGORY[persona.category] || PORTRAIT_STYLE_BY_CATEGORY.contemplative;

    const tagline = (persona.tagline || '').replace(/\([^)]*\)/g, '').trim() || 'a hypnotic guide';

    const prefix = (persona.imagePromptPrefix || '').trim();
    const suffix = (persona.imagePromptSuffix || '').trim();
    const useCategoryHint = !(prefix && suffix);
    const parts = [
      'stylized minimal half-body portrait illustration',
      prefix,
      tagline,
      useCategoryHint ? styleHint : '',
      'soft glowing background, looking ahead with serene focus, ethereal mood, fine art illustration',
      suffix,
      'no background text, no signature',
    ].filter(Boolean);
    return parts.join(', ');
  }

  async function personaPortraitGet(personaId) {
    try {
      const blob = await idbGet(PORTRAIT_KEY(personaId));
      return blob ? URL.createObjectURL(blob) : null;
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  async function personaPortraitSet(personaId, blob) {
    await idbSet(PORTRAIT_KEY(personaId), blob);
  }

  async function personaPortraitDelete(personaId) {
    await idbDel(PORTRAIT_KEY(personaId));
  }

  const _portraitInflight = new Map();
  async function generatePersonaPortrait(persona) {
    if (!persona || !persona.id) return null;

    if (_portraitInflight.has(persona.id)) return _portraitInflight.get(persona.id);

    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || !root.textToImagePlugin) {
      notify.warn('Image plugin unavailable — portraits require Perchance hosting.');
      return null;
    }
    if (!state.remoteProcessingOptIn) {
      notify.warn('Portraits require remote processing opt-in (in Options).');
      return null;
    }

    const promise = (async () => {
      try {
        const prompt = _buildPortraitPrompt(persona);

        const result = await root.textToImagePlugin({
          prompt,
          negative: PORTRAIT_NEGATIVE,
        });
        const dataUrl = result?.dataUrl || String(result || '');
        if (!dataUrl || !dataUrl.startsWith('data:')) {
          notify.warn(`Portrait generation returned no image for ${persona.name}.`);
          return null;
        }
        const blob = await fetch(dataUrl).then(r => r.blob());
        await personaPortraitSet(persona.id, blob);
        notify.success(`Portrait generated for ${persona.name}.`);
        return URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[persona portrait] generation failed:', e);
        notify.error('Portrait generation failed — see console.');
        return null;
      } finally {
        _portraitInflight.delete(persona.id);
      }
    })();
    _portraitInflight.set(persona.id, promise);
    return promise;
  }

  function _suggestionHash(suggestion) {
    if (!suggestion) return '0';

    const key = `${suggestion.trigger || ''}|${suggestion.coreResponse || ''}`;
    return String(_hashSeed(key));
  }
  const SYMBOL_KEY = id => 'suggestion_symbol_' + id;
  const SYMBOL_NEGATIVE = 'text, words, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, signature, branded, photorealistic faces, multiple people, low quality, blurry, deformed';

  function _buildSymbolPrompt(suggestion) {
    if (!suggestion) return '';

    const trigger = (suggestion.trigger || 'a moment of awareness').slice(0, 60);
    const response = (suggestion.coreResponse || 'a felt shift').slice(0, 60);
    return [
      'minimal abstract symbolic illustration',
      'representing: ' + trigger,
      'evoking: ' + response,
      'soft glowing focal point, ethereal mood, dreamlike atmosphere',
      'muted palette, ink wash texture, hypnotic geometry',
      'centered composition, no background text',
    ].join(', ');
  }

  async function suggestionSymbolGet(hash) {
    try {
      const blob = await idbGet(SYMBOL_KEY(hash));
      return blob ? URL.createObjectURL(blob) : null;
    } catch { return null; }
  }
  async function suggestionSymbolSet(hash, blob) {
    await idbSet(SYMBOL_KEY(hash), blob);
  }
  async function suggestionSymbolDelete(hash) {
    await idbDel(SYMBOL_KEY(hash));
  }

  const _symbolInflight = new Map();
  async function generateSuggestionSymbol(suggestion) {
    if (!suggestion) return null;
    const hash = _suggestionHash(suggestion);
    if (_symbolInflight.has(hash)) return _symbolInflight.get(hash);
    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || !root.textToImagePlugin) {
      notify.warn('Image plugin unavailable — symbols require Perchance hosting.');
      return null;
    }
    if (!state.remoteProcessingOptIn) {
      notify.warn('Symbols require remote processing opt-in (in Options).');
      return null;
    }
    const promise = (async () => {
      try {
        const prompt = _buildSymbolPrompt(suggestion);

        const result = await root.textToImagePlugin({
          prompt,
          negative: SYMBOL_NEGATIVE,
        });
        const dataUrl = result?.dataUrl || String(result || '');
        if (!dataUrl || !dataUrl.startsWith('data:')) {
          notify.warn('Symbol generation returned no image.');
          return null;
        }
        const blob = await fetch(dataUrl).then(r => r.blob());
        await suggestionSymbolSet(hash, blob);
        notify.success('Symbol generated.');
        return URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[suggestion symbol] generation failed:', e);
        notify.error('Symbol generation failed — see console.');
        return null;
      } finally {
        _symbolInflight.delete(hash);
      }
    })();
    _symbolInflight.set(hash, promise);
    return promise;
  }

  let _galleryRenderGen = 0;
  let _galleryOpen = false;

  async function renderBgGallery() {
    const grid = $('bgGalleryGrid');
    const info = $('bgGalleryInfo');
    const countEl = $('bgCacheCount');
    if (!grid) return;

    const myGen = ++_galleryRenderGen;
    const manifestRaw = await bgCacheGetManifest();
    if (myGen !== _galleryRenderGen) return;
    if (countEl) countEl.textContent = manifestRaw.length;

    const sortSelect = $('bgGallerySortSelect');
    const sortMode = state.bgGallerySort || 'newest';
    if (sortSelect && sortSelect.value !== sortMode) sortSelect.value = sortMode;
    const favBtn = $('bgGalleryFavFilterBtn');
    const favOnly = state.bgGalleryFavOnly === true;
    if (favBtn) {
      favBtn.classList.toggle('active', favOnly);
      favBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', favOnly ? 'true' : 'false');
    }

    const view = bgCacheSortManifest(manifestRaw, sortMode, favOnly);
    const favCount = manifestRaw.filter(m => m.favorited === true).length;
    if (info) {
      const totalStr = `${manifestRaw.length} image${manifestRaw.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
      const favStr = favCount > 0 ? ` · ${favCount} favorite${favCount === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : '';
      const filterStr = favOnly && favCount !== manifestRaw.length ? ` · showing ${view.length}` : '';
      info.textContent = totalStr + favStr + filterStr;
    }
    if (!view.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = manifestRaw.length === 0
        ? '<div class="sublabel" style="text-align:center;padding:20px">No cached images yet. Generate some with the preview button or during a session.</div>'
        : '<div class="sublabel" style="text-align:center;padding:20px">No images match the current filter.</div>';
      return;
    }

    grid.innerHTML = view.map((c, idx) => {
      const seedTag = (typeof c.seed === 'number') ? `<div class="bg-seed-tag" title="seed">#${c.seed}</div>` : '';
      const favClass = c.favorited === true ? ' is-fav' : '';
      const favActive = c.favorited === true ? ' active' : '';
      const favIcon = c.favorited === true ? '★' : '☆';
      return `
      <div class="bg-gallery-item${favClass}" data-id="${c.id}" data-idx="${idx}" title="${c.prompt ? c.prompt.replace(/"/g, '&quot;').slice(0, 200) : 'click to view'}">
        <img alt="" loading="lazy" style="background:#111">
        <button class="bg-del" data-id="${c.id}" title="delete" aria-label="delete">✕</button>
        <button class="bg-dl"  data-id="${c.id}" title="download" aria-label="download">⬇</button>
        <button class="bg-fav${favActive}" data-id="${c.id}" title="${c.favorited === true ? 'unfavorite' : 'favorite'}" aria-label="favorite" aria-pressed="${c.favorited === true ? 'true' : 'false'}">${favIcon}</button>
        ${seedTag}
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    for (const entry of view) {
      if (myGen !== _galleryRenderGen) return;
      const url = await bgCacheGetUrl(entry.id);
      if (myGen !== _galleryRenderGen) {
        if (url) URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        return;
      }
      const img = grid.querySelector(`.bg-gallery-item[data-id="${entry.id}"] img`);
      if (img && url) {
        img.src = url;
      } else if (url) {

        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      }
    }

    grid.querySelectorAll('.bg-del').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        await bgCacheDelete(btn.dataset.id);

        renderBgGallery();
      });
    });
    grid.querySelectorAll('.bg-dl').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        bgCacheDownload(btn.dataset.id);
      });
    });
    grid.querySelectorAll('.bg-fav').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        await bgCacheToggleFavorite(btn.dataset.id);
        renderBgGallery();
      });
    });

    grid.querySelectorAll('.bg-gallery-item').forEach(itemEl => {
      itemEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {

        if (e.target.closest('button')) return;
        const idx = Number(itemEl.dataset.idx);
        if (Number.isFinite(idx)) bgLightbox.open(view, idx);
      });
    });
  }

  function _maybeRefreshGallery() {
    if (_galleryOpen) renderBgGallery();
  }

  function buildBgStyleChips() {
    const root = $('bgStyleChips');
    const countEl = $('bgStyleChipCount');
    const clearBtn = $('bgStyleClearBtn');
    if (!root) return;
    const active = new Set(Array.isArray(state.bgActiveStylePresetIds) ? state.bgActiveStylePresetIds : []);

    const byCat = {};
    for (const cat of BG_STYLE_CATEGORIES) byCat[cat.id] = [];
    for (const preset of BG_STYLE_PRESETS) {
      if (!byCat[preset.cat]) byCat[preset.cat] = [];
      byCat[preset.cat].push(preset);
    }
    const rows = BG_STYLE_CATEGORIES.map(cat => {
      const items = byCat[cat.id] || [];
      if (!items.length) return '';
      const chips = items.map(p => {
        const cls = active.has(p.id) ? 'bg-style-chip active' : 'bg-style-chip';

        const tip = (p.prompt || '').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
        return `<button type="button" class="${cls}" data-style-id="${p.id}" title="${tip}" aria-pressed="${active.has(p.id) ? 'true' : 'false'}">${p.label}</button>`;
      }).join('');
      return `<div class="bg-style-cat-row"><span class="bg-style-cat-label">${cat.label}</span>${chips}</div>`;
    }).join('');
    root.innerHTML = rows;
    if (countEl) countEl.textContent = active.size > 0 ? `· ${active.size} active` : '';
    if (clearBtn) clearBtn.disabled = active.size === 0;

    root.querySelectorAll('.bg-style-chip').forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const id = chip.dataset.styleId;
        if (!id) return;
        const cur = new Set(Array.isArray(state.bgActiveStylePresetIds) ? state.bgActiveStylePresetIds : []);
        if (cur.has(id)) cur.delete(id); else cur.add(id);
        state.bgActiveStylePresetIds = Array.from(cur);
        buildBgStyleChips();
        try { saveUserSettings(); } catch (e) {  }

        try {
          if (diffBouncers.bgImage) diffBouncers.bgImage.ping?.();
        } catch (e) {  }
      });
    });
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target && e.target.id === 'bgStyleClearBtn' && !e.target.disabled) {
      state.bgActiveStylePresetIds = [];
      buildBgStyleChips();
      try { saveUserSettings(); } catch (err) {}
    }
  });

  const bgLightbox = {
    view: [],
    index: 0,
    _bound: false,

    _fsScale: 1,
    _fsPanX: 0, _fsPanY: 0,
    _fsMinScale: 1,
    _fsMaxScale: 8,
    _fsDrag: null,
    _fsPinch: null,
    _fsSwipe: null,

    open(view, index) {
      if (!Array.isArray(view) || view.length === 0) return;
      this.view = view;
      this.index = Math.max(0, Math.min(index | 0, view.length - 1));
      this._bindOnce();
      const modal = $('bgLightboxModal');
      if (modal) modal.classList.add('visible');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      this._loadCurrent();
    },
    close() {

      this.exitFullscreen({ silent: true });
      const modal = $('bgLightboxModal');
      if (modal) modal.classList.remove('visible');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';

      for (const id of ['bgLightboxImg', 'bgFsImg']) {
        const img = $(id);
        if (img && img.src && img.src.startsWith('blob:')) {
          try { URL.revokeObjectURL(img.src); } catch {}
          img.src = '';
        }
      }
    },
    next() {
      if (this.index >= this.view.length - 1) return;
      this.index++;
      this._loadCurrent();
      if (this._isFullscreen()) this._fsLoadCurrent();
    },
    prev() {
      if (this.index <= 0) return;
      this.index--;
      this._loadCurrent();
      if (this._isFullscreen()) this._fsLoadCurrent();
    },

    async _loadCurrent() {
      const entry = this.view[this.index];
      if (!entry) return;
      const img = $('bgLightboxImg');
      const meta = $('bgLightboxMeta');
      const promptEl = $('bgLightboxPrompt');
      const favBtn = $('bgLightboxFavorite');
      const prevBtn = $('bgLightboxPrev');
      const nextBtn = $('bgLightboxNext');

      if (img && img.src && img.src.startsWith('blob:')) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(img.src); } catch {}
      }
      const url = await bgCacheGetUrl(entry.id);
      if (img && url) img.src = url;
      if (meta) {
        const parts = [`${this.index + 1} / ${this.view.length}`];
        if (typeof entry.seed === 'number') parts.push(`seed ${entry.seed}`);
        if (entry.createdAt) {
          const d = new Date(entry.createdAt);
          parts.push(d.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + d.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }));
        }
        meta.textContent = parts.join(' · ');
      }
      if (promptEl) {

        const p = entry.prompt || '';
        promptEl.textContent = p.length > 240 ? p.slice(0, 237) + '…' : p;
      }
      if (favBtn) {
        favBtn.classList.toggle('active', entry.favorited === true);
        favBtn.textContent = entry.favorited === true ? '★ favorited' : '☆ favorite';
        favBtn.title = entry.favorited === true ? 'unfavorite (f)' : 'favorite (f)';
      }
      if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = this.index <= 0;
      if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = this.index >= this.view.length - 1;
    },

    enterFullscreen() {
      const fs = $('bgFullscreenModal');
      if (!fs) return;
      this._bindFullscreenOnce();
      fs.classList.add('visible');
      this._fsResetZoom();
      this._fsLoadCurrent();
    },
    exitFullscreen(opts = {}) {
      const fs = $('bgFullscreenModal');
      if (!fs || !fs.classList.contains('visible')) return;
      fs.classList.remove('visible');

      const fsImg = $('bgFsImg');
      if (fsImg && fsImg.src && fsImg.src.startsWith('blob:')) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(fsImg.src); } catch {}
        fsImg.src = '';
      }
      this._fsDrag = null;
      this._fsPinch = null;
      this._fsSwipe = null;
    },
    _isFullscreen() {
      return $('bgFullscreenModal')?.classList.contains('visible') === true;
    },

    async _fsLoadCurrent() {
      const entry = this.view[this.index];
      if (!entry) return;
      const img = $('bgFsImg');
      const meta = $('bgFsMeta');
      const prevBtn = $('bgFsPrev');
      const nextBtn = $('bgFsNext');
      if (img && img.src && img.src.startsWith('blob:')) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(img.src); } catch {}
      }
      const url = await bgCacheGetUrl(entry.id);
      if (img && url) {
        img.src = url;
        img.classList.add('no-transition');
        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          this._fsResetZoom();
          requestAnimationFrame(() => img.classList.remove('no-transition'));
        });
      }
      if (meta) {
        const parts = [`${this.index + 1} / ${this.view.length}`];
        if (typeof entry.seed === 'number') parts.push(`seed ${entry.seed}`);
        meta.textContent = parts.join(' · ');
      }
      if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = this.index <= 0;
      if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = this.index >= this.view.length - 1;
    },

    _fsApplyTransform() {
      const img = $('bgFsImg');
      if (!img) return;
      img.style.transform = `translate(${this._fsPanX}px, ${this._fsPanY}px) scale(${this._fsScale})`;
      const lbl = $('bgFsZoomLabel');
      if (lbl) lbl.textContent = `${Math.round(this._fsScale * 100)}%`;
    },
    _fsResetZoom() {
      this._fsScale = 1; this._fsPanX = 0; this._fsPanY = 0;
      this._fsApplyTransform();
    },

    _fsZoomAt(factor, focalX, focalY) {
      const newScale = Math.max(this._fsMinScale, Math.min(this._fsMaxScale, this._fsScale * factor));
      if (newScale === this._fsScale) return;
      const stage = $('bgFsStage');
      if (!stage) { this._fsScale = newScale; this._fsApplyTransform(); return; }
      const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
      const sx = focalX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
      const sy = focalY - rect.top  - rect.height / 2;
      const ratio = newScale / this._fsScale;
      this._fsPanX = sx - (sx - this._fsPanX) * ratio;
      this._fsPanY = sy - (sy - this._fsPanY) * ratio;
      this._fsScale = newScale;
      this._fsApplyTransform();
    },

    _bindOnce() {
      if (this._bound) return;
      this._bound = true;
      const self = this;
      const modal = $('bgLightboxModal');

      $('bgLightboxClose')?.addEventListener('click', () => self.close());
      $('bgLightboxPrev') ?.addEventListener('click', () => self.prev());
      $('bgLightboxNext') ?.addEventListener('click', () => self.next());
      $('bgLightboxFullscreen')?.addEventListener('click', () => self.enterFullscreen());
      $('bgLightboxFavorite')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const entry = self.view[self.index];
        if (!entry) return;
        const newVal = await bgCacheToggleFavorite(entry.id);
        if (newVal !== null) {
          entry.favorited = newVal;
          self._loadCurrent();
          renderBgGallery();
        }
      });
      $('bgLightboxDelete')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const entry = self.view[self.index];
        if (!entry) return;

        await bgCacheDelete(entry.id);
        self.view.splice(self.index, 1);
        if (self.view.length === 0) { renderBgGallery(); self.close(); return; }
        if (self.index >= self.view.length) self.index = self.view.length - 1;
        self._loadCurrent();
        if (self._isFullscreen()) self._fsLoadCurrent();
        renderBgGallery();
      });

      modal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (self._isFullscreen()) return;
        if (e.target === modal) self.close();
      });

      document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {

        if (self._isFullscreen()) return;
        if (!modal?.classList.contains('visible')) return;
        switch (e.key) {
          case 'Escape':     e.preventDefault(); self.close(); break;
          case 'ArrowLeft':  e.preventDefault(); self.prev();  break;
          case 'ArrowRight': e.preventDefault(); self.next();  break;
          case 'Enter':      e.preventDefault(); self.enterFullscreen(); break;
          case 'f': case 'F': e.preventDefault();
            $('bgLightboxFavorite')?.click(); break;
          case 'Delete': case 'Backspace': e.preventDefault();
            $('bgLightboxDelete')?.click(); break;
        }
      });
    },

    _bindFullscreenOnce() {
      if (this._fsBound) return;
      this._fsBound = true;
      const self = this;
      const fs = $('bgFullscreenModal');
      const stage = $('bgFsStage');
      const img = $('bgFsImg');

      $('bgFsClose')?.addEventListener('click', () => self.exitFullscreen());
      $('bgFsPrev') ?.addEventListener('click', () => { self.prev();  });
      $('bgFsNext') ?.addEventListener('click', () => { self.next(); });
      $('bgFsZoomIn') ?.addEventListener('click', () => self._fsZoomAt(1.25, window.innerWidth / 2, window.innerHeight / 2));
      $('bgFsZoomOut')?.addEventListener('click', () => self._fsZoomAt(0.8,  window.innerWidth / 2, window.innerHeight / 2));
      $('bgFsZoomFit')?.addEventListener('click', () => self._fsResetZoom());

      fs?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === fs) self.exitFullscreen();
      });

      document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (!self._isFullscreen()) return;
        switch (e.key) {
          case 'Escape':     e.preventDefault(); self.exitFullscreen(); break;
          case 'ArrowLeft':  e.preventDefault(); self.prev();  break;
          case 'ArrowRight': e.preventDefault(); self.next();  break;
          case '+': case '=': e.preventDefault();
            self._fsZoomAt(1.25, window.innerWidth / 2, window.innerHeight / 2); break;
          case '-': case '_': e.preventDefault();
            self._fsZoomAt(0.8,  window.innerWidth / 2, window.innerHeight / 2); break;
          case '0':          e.preventDefault(); self._fsResetZoom(); break;
        }
      });

      stage?.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const factor = e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.12 : 0.89;
        self._fsZoomAt(factor, e.clientX, e.clientY);
      }, { passive: false });

      img?.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        if (self._fsScale <= 1.0001) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        self._fsDrag = { startX: e.clientX, startY: e.clientY, panX: self._fsPanX, panY: self._fsPanY };
        img.classList.add('dragging');
      });
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        if (!self._fsDrag) return;
        self._fsPanX = self._fsDrag.panX + (e.clientX - self._fsDrag.startX);
        self._fsPanY = self._fsDrag.panY + (e.clientY - self._fsDrag.startY);
        self._fsApplyTransform();
      });
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
        if (self._fsDrag) { self._fsDrag = null; img?.classList.remove('dragging'); }
      });

      const SWIPE_THRESHOLD = 50;
      const SWIPE_AXIS_RATIO = 1.4;
      stage?.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
        if (e.touches.length === 1) {
          const t = e.touches[0];
          if (self._fsScale > 1.0001) {
            self._fsDrag = { startX: t.clientX, startY: t.clientY, panX: self._fsPanX, panY: self._fsPanY };
            self._fsSwipe = null;
          } else {

            self._fsSwipe = { startX: t.clientX, startY: t.clientY };
            self._fsDrag = null;
          }
        } else if (e.touches.length === 2) {
          self._fsDrag = null; self._fsSwipe = null;
          const [a, b] = e.touches;
          const dx = b.clientX - a.clientX, dy = b.clientY - a.clientY;
          self._fsPinch = { startDist: Math.hypot(dx, dy), startScale: self._fsScale };
        }
      }, { passive: true });
      stage?.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
        if (e.touches.length === 1 && self._fsDrag) {
          const t = e.touches[0];
          self._fsPanX = self._fsDrag.panX + (t.clientX - self._fsDrag.startX);
          self._fsPanY = self._fsDrag.panY + (t.clientY - self._fsDrag.startY);
          self._fsApplyTransform();
          e.preventDefault();
        } else if (e.touches.length === 2 && self._fsPinch) {
          const [a, b] = e.touches;
          const dist = Math.hypot(b.clientX - a.clientX, b.clientY - a.clientY);
          const target = self._fsPinch.startScale * (dist / self._fsPinch.startDist);
          const midX = (a.clientX + b.clientX) / 2;
          const midY = (a.clientY + b.clientY) / 2;
          self._fsZoomAt(target / self._fsScale, midX, midY);
          e.preventDefault();
        }

      }, { passive: false });
      stage?.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {

        if (self._fsSwipe && e.changedTouches.length > 0) {
          const t = e.changedTouches[0];
          const dx = t.clientX - self._fsSwipe.startX;
          const dy = t.clientY - self._fsSwipe.startY;
          if (Math.abs(dx) >= SWIPE_THRESHOLD && Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy) * SWIPE_AXIS_RATIO) {
            if (dx < 0) self.next(); else self.prev();
          }
        }
        if (e.touches.length === 0) { self._fsDrag = null; self._fsPinch = null; self._fsSwipe = null; }
      });

      img?.addEventListener('dblclick', (e) => {
        if (self._fsScale > 1.0001) self._fsResetZoom();
        else self._fsZoomAt(2, e.clientX, e.clientY);
      });
    },
  };

  let highwayRAF = null;
  let vizRAF = null;
  let stageResizeObs = null;

  function hexToRgb(hex) {
    let h = hex.replace('#','');
    if (h.length === 3) h = h[0]+h[0]+h[1]+h[1]+h[2]+h[2];
    const r = parseInt(h.slice(0,2),16), g = parseInt(h.slice(2,4),16), b = parseInt(h.slice(4,6),16);
    return `${Number.isFinite(r)?r:128},${Number.isFinite(g)?g:128},${Number.isFinite(b)?b:128}`;
  }

  function renderTunnel(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, rgb = hexToRgb(color), maxR = Math.hypot(cx,cy)*1.1, RINGS = 18;
    const mod = getAudioMod();

    const velMul = 1 + mod.bass * 1.2;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    for (let i = RINGS; i >= 0; i--) {
      const frac = ((i/RINGS) + (t*0.18*velMul)) % 1, r = frac*maxR, alpha = (1-frac)*0.65+0.05;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${alpha})`; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5+(1-frac)*3; ctx.stroke();
    }

    if (!renderTunnel._voiceRings) { renderTunnel._voiceRings = []; renderTunnel._lastSpawn = 0; }
    const now = performance.now();
    if (mod.pulse > 0.6 && now - renderTunnel._lastSpawn > 333) {
      renderTunnel._lastSpawn = now;
      renderTunnel._voiceRings.push({ t: now });
      if (renderTunnel._voiceRings.length > 8) renderTunnel._voiceRings.shift();
    }
    for (const ring of renderTunnel._voiceRings) {
      const age = (now - ring.t) / 1000;
      if (age > 2) continue;
      const prog = age / 2;
      const rr = prog * maxR;
      const ra = (1 - prog) * 0.7 * mod.pulse + (1 - prog) * 0.3;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, rr, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,215,140,${ra})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 2 + (1-prog) * 2;
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx,cy,0,cx,cy,maxR*0.15);
    g.addColorStop(0,`rgba(${rgb},0.7)`); g.addColorStop(1,`rgba(${rgb},0)`);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,maxR*0.15,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderPendulumViz(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, rx = W*0.38, ry = H*0.38, rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.18)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let i = 0; i <= 2400; i++) {
      const frac = i/2400, s = (t - frac*4);
      const x = cx + rx*Math.sin(s*1.23+0.4)*Math.cos(s*0.71);
      const y = cy + ry*Math.sin(s*0.97+1.1)*Math.cos(s*1.03);
      i===0 ? ctx.moveTo(x,y) : ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.6)`; ctx.lineWidth = 1.2; ctx.stroke();
  }

  function renderVortex(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, rgb = hexToRgb(color), maxR = Math.min(W,H)*0.44, ARMS = 6;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    for (let arm = 0; arm < ARMS; arm++) {
      const baseAngle = (arm/ARMS)*Math.PI*2 + t*0.6;
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let i = 0; i <= 300; i++) {
        const frac = i/300, angle = baseAngle + frac*Math.PI*3;
        const r = frac * maxR * (0.8 + 0.2*Math.sin(t*1.5+arm));
        const x = cx + r*Math.cos(angle), y = cy + r*Math.sin(angle);
        i===0 ? ctx.moveTo(x,y) : ctx.lineTo(x,y);
      }
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${0.35+0.25*Math.sin(t+arm)})`; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.stroke();
    }
  }

  function renderMandala(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, petals = 8, rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();

    const speedMul = 1 + mod.overall;
    const armBright = 0.7 + mod.pulse * 0.3;
    const petalScale = 1 + mod.bass * 0.35;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${armBright})`; ctx.shadowColor = color; ctx.shadowBlur = 12 + mod.pulse * 18;
    for (let layer = 0; layer < 4; layer++) {
      const R = (layer+1)*Math.min(W,H)*0.1 * petalScale;
      const spin = t*(layer%2===0 ? 0.2 : -0.15)*speedMul + layer*0.4;
      ctx.globalAlpha = (0.6-layer*0.1); ctx.lineWidth = 1.8-layer*0.3;
      for (let p = 0; p < petals; p++) {
        const base = (p/petals)*Math.PI*2 + spin, tip = base + Math.PI/petals;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx,cy);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx+R*1.5*Math.cos(base+0.3),cy+R*1.5*Math.sin(base+0.3),cx+R*Math.cos(tip),cy+R*Math.sin(tip));
        ctx.stroke();
      }
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,R*0.4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1; ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  }

  function renderLissajous(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, R = Math.min(W,H)*0.42, rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`; ctx.lineWidth = 1.8;
    ctx.shadowColor = color; ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
    const a = 3, b = 2, delta = t*0.4;
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let i = 0; i <= 600; i++) {
      const th = (i/600)*Math.PI*2;
      const x = cx + R*Math.sin(a*th+delta), y = cy + R*Math.sin(b*th);
      i===0 ? ctx.moveTo(x,y) : ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.08; ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1; ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  }

  function renderColorWash(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const hue = (t*12 + parseInt(color.replace('#',''),16)%360) % 360, hue2 = (hue+40)%360;
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(W*0.4,H*0.4,0,W/2,H/2,Math.max(W,H)*0.7);
    grad.addColorStop(0,`hsla(${hue},70%,35%,1)`);
    grad.addColorStop(0.5,`hsla(${hue2},60%,20%,1)`);
    grad.addColorStop(1,`hsla(${(hue+180)%360},50%,8%,1)`);
    ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const vig = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2,H/2,H*0.2,W/2,H/2,H*0.75);
    vig.addColorStop(0,'transparent'); vig.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)');
    ctx.fillStyle = vig; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  }

  function renderCanvasPulse(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, rgb = hexToRgb(color), maxR = Math.min(W,H)*0.46;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
      const phase = (t*0.45 + i/6) % 1, r = phase*maxR, alpha = (1-phase)*0.7;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${alpha})`; ctx.lineWidth = 2+(1-phase)*5; ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,10+4*Math.sin(t*3),0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`; ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderBreathingCircle(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, maxR = Math.min(W,H)*0.38, rgb = hexToRgb(color);

    const cycle = 19, phase = t % cycle;

    if (phase < 0.05 && t > 0.1) vibrateBreath();
    let frac;
    if (phase < 4) frac = phase / 4;
    else if (phase < 11) frac = 1;
    else frac = 1 - (phase - 11) / 8;
    frac = frac * frac * (3 - 2 * frac);

    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const warmthShift = mod.envelope * 25;
    const haloBoost = mod.bass * 0.35;

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const r = maxR * 0.3 + maxR * 0.7 * frac;

    for (let ring = 4; ring >= 0; ring--) {
      const ringFrac = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, frac - ring * 0.04));
      const rr = maxR * 0.3 + maxR * 0.7 * ringFrac * (3 - 2 * ringFrac);
      const alpha = 0.08 + ring * 0.04;

      const hue = 210 - frac * 30 - warmthShift;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, rr, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 50%, 60%, ${alpha})`; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.stroke();
    }

    if (haloBoost > 0.02) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, maxR * (1.05 + haloBoost * 0.25), 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${210 - warmthShift}, 55%, 62%, ${haloBoost * 0.8})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 3 + haloBoost * 4;
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    const mainHue = 210 - frac * 40 - warmthShift;
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, r * 0.3, cx, cy, r);
    grad.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${mainHue}, 55%, 55%, 0.35)`);
    grad.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${mainHue}, 45%, 40%, 0.08)`);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 50%, 60%, 0.5)`; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

    let label = '';
    if (phase < 4) label = 'breathe in';
    else if (phase < 11) label = 'hold';
    else label = 'breathe out';
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 40%, 70%, 0.6)`;
    ctx.font = '0.8rem -apple-system, sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText(label, cx, cy + r + 24);

    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, 4 + 2 * frac, 0, Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 50%, 70%, 0.8)`; ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderBreathingResonance(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, maxR = Math.min(W,H)*0.38, rgb = hexToRgb(color);

    const rawBpm = parseFloat($('pfRfBreath')?.value);
    const bpm = (Number.isFinite(rawBpm) && rawBpm >= 4.5 && rawBpm <= 7) ? rawBpm : 5.5;
    const cycle = 60 / bpm;
    const inhaleSec = cycle * 0.4;
    const phase = t % cycle;

    if (phase < 0.05 && t > 0.1 && typeof vibrateBreath === 'function') vibrateBreath();

    let frac;
    if (phase < inhaleSec) {
      frac = phase / inhaleSec;
    } else {
      frac = 1 - (phase - inhaleSec) / (cycle - inhaleSec);
    }
    frac = frac * frac * (3 - 2 * frac);

    const mod = (typeof getAudioMod === 'function') ? getAudioMod() : { envelope: 0, bass: 0 };
    const warmthShift = mod.envelope * 25;
    const haloBoost = mod.bass * 0.35;

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.10)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const r = maxR * 0.3 + maxR * 0.7 * frac;

    for (let ring = 3; ring >= 0; ring--) {
      const ringFrac = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, frac - ring * 0.05));
      const rr = maxR * 0.3 + maxR * 0.7 * ringFrac * (3 - 2 * ringFrac);
      const alpha = 0.10 + ring * 0.05;

      const hue = 175 + frac * 35 - warmthShift;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, rr, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 50%, 60%, ${alpha})`; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.stroke();
    }

    if (haloBoost > 0.02) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, maxR * (1.05 + haloBoost * 0.25), 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${190 - warmthShift}, 55%, 62%, ${haloBoost * 0.8})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 3 + haloBoost * 4;
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    const mainHue = 175 + frac * 50 - warmthShift;
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, r * 0.3, cx, cy, r);
    grad.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${mainHue}, 55%, 55%, 0.40)`);
    grad.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${mainHue}, 45%, 40%, 0.08)`);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 50%, 65%, 0.55)`; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

    const label = phase < inhaleSec ? 'breathe in' : 'breathe out';
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 40%, 70%, 0.65)`;
    ctx.font = '0.8rem -apple-system, sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText(label, cx, cy + r + 24);

    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 30%, 60%, 0.40)`;
    ctx.font = '0.62rem -apple-system, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillText(`${bpm.toFixed(1)} bpm · resonance`, cx, cy + r + 42);

    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, 4 + 2 * frac, 0, Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${mainHue}, 50%, 70%, 0.85)`; ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderGanzfeld(ctx, W, H, t, color) {

    const hue = 12 + Math.sin(t * 0.05) * 4;
    const sat = 75 + Math.sin(t * 0.03) * 5;
    const lt  = 38 + Math.sin(t * 0.07) * 4;

    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${hue},${sat}%,${lt}%)`;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const noiseAlpha = 0.05;
    for (let y = 0; y < H; y += 16) {
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x += 16) {
        const n = (Math.sin(x * 12.9898 + y * 78.233 + t * 0.5) * 43758.5453) % 1;
        const v = (n - Math.floor(n)) * 0.5 + 0.5;
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,${Math.floor(180 * v)},${Math.floor(120 * v)},${noiseAlpha})`;
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, 16, 16);
      }
    }

    if (t < 30) {
      const dotAlpha = Math.max(0, (30 - t) / 30) * 0.25;
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,220,200,${dotAlpha.toFixed(3)})`;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(W/2, H/2, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  function renderMoire(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, maxR = Math.max(W, H) * 0.8;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(136,136,136,0.45)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;

    for (let r = 6; r < maxR; r += 12) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke();
    }

    const ox = cx + Math.cos(t * 0.15) * 18;
    const oy = cy + Math.sin(t * 0.12) * 14;
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(136,136,136,0.4)';
    for (let r = 6; r < maxR; r += 12) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, oy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke();
    }

    const vig = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, maxR * 0.2, cx, cy, maxR * 0.6);
    vig.addColorStop(0, 'transparent'); vig.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)');
    ctx.fillStyle = vig; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  }

  function renderStarfield(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2, STARS = 200, focal = 180, rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    if (!renderStarfield._pool) {
      renderStarfield._pool = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < STARS; i++) renderStarfield._pool.push({
        x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 600, y: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 600,
        z: Math.random() * 600, psx: 0, psy: 0
      });
    }
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    const speed = 1.5 + Math.sin(t * 0.3) * 0.5;
    for (const s of renderStarfield._pool) {
      const psx = s.psx, psy = s.psy;
      s.z -= speed;
      if (s.z < 1) { s.x = (Math.random()-0.5)*600; s.y = (Math.random()-0.5)*600; s.z = 600; s.psx = cx; s.psy = cy; continue; }
      const sx = s.x / s.z * focal + cx;
      const sy = s.y / s.z * focal + cy;
      s.psx = sx; s.psy = sy;
      if (sx < 0 || sx > W || sy < 0 || sy > H) continue;
      const brightness = Math.min(1, (600 - s.z) / 400);
      const size = Math.max(0.5, (1 - s.z / 600) * 3);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${brightness})`;

      if (psx > 0 && Math.abs(sx - psx) < 40) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(psx, psy); ctx.lineTo(sx, sy);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${brightness * 0.5})`; ctx.lineWidth = size * 0.5; ctx.stroke();
      }
      ctx.fillRect(sx - size/2, sy - size/2, size, size);
    }
  }

  function renderCandle(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const cx = W/2, cy = H * 0.4, rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const jx = cx + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
    const jy = cy + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3;
    const baseR = 30 + Math.sin(t * 2.5) * 5 + Math.sin(t * 4.1) * 3;

    const outer = ctx.createRadialGradient(jx, jy, 0, jx, jy, baseR * 3);
    outer.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},0.15)`);
    outer.addColorStop(0.4, `rgba(${rgb},0.05)`);
    outer.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = outer; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const inner = ctx.createRadialGradient(jx, jy - 4, 0, jx, jy, baseR);
    inner.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255,240,200,0.7)');
    inner.addColorStop(0.3, `rgba(${rgb},0.4)`);
    inner.addColorStop(0.7, `rgba(${rgb},0.08)`);
    inner.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(jx, jy, baseR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = inner; ctx.fill();

    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(jx, jy - 2, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,240,0.9)'; ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderGammaFlicker(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(8,12,18)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const reducedMotion = state.caps?.reducedMotion === true;
    const honourReducedMotion = reducedMotion && !_audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
    const freqHz = honourReducedMotion ? 0.2 : 40;

    const phase = (Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * freqHz * t) + 1) / 2;

    const baseAlpha = 0.05 + phase * 0.10;

    const voiceBoost = (!honourReducedMotion && state.audioReactive)
      ? Math.min(0.05, (state.audioReactive.voiceEnvelope || 0) * 0.08)
      : 0;
    const alpha = baseAlpha + voiceBoost;

    const cx = W/2, cy = H/2;
    const radius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.45;
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, radius);
    grad.addColorStop(0,    `rgba(${rgb},${alpha.toFixed(3)})`);
    grad.addColorStop(0.6,  `rgba(${rgb},${(alpha * 0.4).toFixed(3)})`);
    grad.addColorStop(1,    'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.45)`;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderFlowField(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const N = W < 500 ? 250 : 600;
    if (!renderFlowField._p) {
      renderFlowField._p = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) renderFlowField._p.push({ x: Math.random()*W, y: Math.random()*H, px: 0, py: 0 });
    }
    const ps = renderFlowField._p;

    if (ps.length < N) while (ps.length < N) ps.push({ x: Math.random()*W, y: Math.random()*H, px: 0, py: 0 });

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter';

    const scale = 0.003, speed = 0.5;
    for (const p of ps) {
      p.px = p.x; p.py = p.y;

      const nx = p.x * scale, ny = p.y * scale, nt = t * 0.08;
      const angle = (Math.sin(nx * 3.1 + nt) + Math.cos(ny * 2.7 - nt * 0.7) + Math.sin((nx + ny) * 1.4 + nt * 0.3)) * Math.PI;
      p.x += Math.cos(angle) * speed;
      p.y += Math.sin(angle) * speed;

      if (p.x < 0) p.x += W; if (p.x > W) p.x -= W;
      if (p.y < 0) p.y += H; if (p.y > H) p.y -= H;

      const dx = p.x - p.px, dy = p.y - p.py;
      if (Math.abs(dx) < 20 && Math.abs(dy) < 20) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(p.px, p.py); ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.3)`; ctx.lineWidth = 0.8; ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';

    const vig = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, Math.min(W,H)*0.2, W/2, H/2, Math.min(W,H)*0.6);
    vig.addColorStop(0, 'transparent'); vig.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)');
    ctx.fillStyle = vig; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  }

  function renderPlasma(ctx, W, H, t, color) {

    const rW = 192, rH = Math.round(rW * H / W);
    if (!renderPlasma._img || renderPlasma._img.width !== rW) {
      renderPlasma._off = (typeof OffscreenCanvas !== 'undefined') ? new OffscreenCanvas(rW, rH) : document.createElement('canvas');
      renderPlasma._off.width = rW; renderPlasma._off.height = rH;
      renderPlasma._img = renderPlasma._off.getContext('2d').createImageData(rW, rH);

      renderPlasma._sin = new Float32Array(1024);
      for (let i = 0; i < 1024; i++) renderPlasma._sin[i] = Math.sin(i * Math.PI * 2 / 1024);
    }
    const data = renderPlasma._img.data, sinLut = renderPlasma._sin;
    const S = v => sinLut[((v % 1024) + 1024) % 1024 | 0];

    for (let y = 0; y < rH; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < rW; x++) {
        const v = S(x * 3 + t * 40) + S(y * 4 - t * 30) + S((x + y) * 2 + t * 20) + S(Math.sqrt(x*x + y*y) * 2 - t * 50);
        const hue = ((v + 4) / 8 * 360 + t * 15) % 360;

        const c = 0.42, x2 = c * (1 - Math.abs((hue / 60) % 2 - 1));
        let r1=0,g1=0,b1=0;
        const h = Math.floor(hue / 60) % 6;
        if (h===0){r1=c;g1=x2;}else if(h===1){r1=x2;g1=c;}else if(h===2){g1=c;b1=x2;}
        else if(h===3){g1=x2;b1=c;}else if(h===4){r1=x2;b1=c;}else{r1=c;b1=x2;}
        const m = 0.18;
        const idx = (y * rW + x) * 4;
        data[idx] = (r1+m)*255; data[idx+1] = (g1+m)*255; data[idx+2] = (b1+m)*255; data[idx+3] = 255;
      }
    }
    const offCtx = renderPlasma._off.getContext('2d');
    offCtx.putImageData(renderPlasma._img, 0, 0);
    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;
    ctx.drawImage(renderPlasma._off, 0, 0, W, H);
  }

  function makeKaleidoscope(subRenderer, folds = 6) {
    return function(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
      const cx = W/2, cy = H/2;

      if (!makeKaleidoscope._off || makeKaleidoscope._off.width !== W) {
        makeKaleidoscope._off = document.createElement('canvas');
        makeKaleidoscope._off.width = W; makeKaleidoscope._off.height = H;
      }
      const offCtx = makeKaleidoscope._off.getContext('2d');
      subRenderer(offCtx, W, H, t, color);

      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      const wedgeAngle = Math.PI * 2 / folds;
      for (let i = 0; i < folds; i++) {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        ctx.rotate(wedgeAngle * i);
        if (i % 2 === 1) ctx.scale(-1, 1);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(Math.max(W, H), 0);
        ctx.arc(0, 0, Math.max(W, H), 0, wedgeAngle);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.clip();
        ctx.translate(-cx, -cy);
        ctx.drawImage(makeKaleidoscope._off, 0, 0);
        ctx.restore();
      }
    };
  }

  function renderAurora(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();

    const crestMul = 1 + mod.envelope * 1.8;
    const bandShift = mod.bass * 60;
    const opacityBoost = mod.treble * 0.4;
    for (let b = 0; b < 4; b++) {
      const ph = b * 1.7 + t * 0.0004;
      const baseY = H * 0.25 - bandShift
        + Math.sin(ph) * H * 0.12 * crestMul
        + Math.sin(ph * 0.7 + b) * H * 0.06 * crestMul;
      const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, baseY - 100, 0, baseY + 140);
      grad.addColorStop(0, 'transparent');
      grad.addColorStop(0.3, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.035 + b * 0.008 + opacityBoost).toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(0.7, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.05 - b * 0.008 + opacityBoost).toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    }
  }

  function renderRain(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    if (!renderRain._drops) { renderRain._drops = []; for (let i = 0; i < 120; i++) renderRain._drops.push({ x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H, len: 8 + Math.random() * 18, speed: 4 + Math.random() * 6 }); }
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.15)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.25)`; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    for (const d of renderRain._drops) {
      d.y += d.speed; if (d.y > H) { d.y = -d.len; d.x = Math.random() * W; }
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(d.x, d.y); ctx.lineTo(d.x - 0.5, d.y + d.len); ctx.stroke();
    }
  }

  function renderSacredGeo(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color), cx = W/2, cy = H/2, R = Math.min(W,H) * 0.18;
    const rot = t * 0.00015;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${0.15 + Math.sin(t * 0.001) * 0.05})`; ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
    const pts = [[0,0]]; for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) pts.push([Math.cos(i * Math.PI/3) * R, Math.sin(i * Math.PI/3) * R]);
    for (let ring = 0; ring < 2; ring++) for (const [px,py] of pts) {
      const r = R * (ring === 0 ? 1 : 1.73);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx + px * (ring+1) * Math.cos(rot) - py * Math.sin(rot), cy + px * (ring+1) * Math.sin(rot) + py * Math.cos(rot), r, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke();
    }
  }

  function renderWaveform(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color), cy = H/2;
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const a = state.audioReactive;
    const haveAudio = a && a.active && a._fftBuffer && mod.overall > 0.01;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, cy);
    if (haveAudio) {

      const buf = a._fftBuffer;
      const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(buf.length / Math.min(W, 128)));
      const ampScale = H * 0.35 * (0.6 + mod.overall);
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x++) {
        const idx = Math.floor((x / W) * buf.length / step) * step;
        const v = (buf[idx] / 255) - 0.5;
        const y = cy + v * ampScale * Math.sin(x / W * Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y);
      }
    } else {

      const freq = 0.02 + Math.sin(t * 0.0003) * 0.015;
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x++) {
        const amp = H * 0.15 * (1 + Math.sin(t * 0.0005) * 0.3);
        ctx.lineTo(x, cy + Math.sin(x * freq + t * 0.002) * amp * Math.sin(x / W * Math.PI));
      }
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${0.4 + mod.envelope * 0.4})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2 + mod.bass * 1.2;
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function renderSmoke(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    if (!renderSmoke._puffs) { renderSmoke._puffs = []; for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) renderSmoke._puffs.push({ x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H, r: 60 + Math.random() * 120, vx: (Math.random()-0.5)*0.3, vy: (Math.random()-0.5)*0.2 }); }
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.02)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);

    const turbMul = 1 + mod.overall * 1.5;
    const densityBoost = 1 + mod.envelope * 0.6;
    for (const p of renderSmoke._puffs) {

      p.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.015 * turbMul;
      p.vy += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.012 * turbMul;

      p.vx *= 0.985; p.vy *= 0.985;
      p.x += p.vx; p.y += p.vy;
      if (p.x < -p.r) p.x = W + p.r; if (p.x > W + p.r) p.x = -p.r;
      if (p.y < -p.r) p.y = H + p.r; if (p.y > H + p.r) p.y = -p.r;
      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(p.x, p.y, 0, p.x, p.y, p.r);
      grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.025 * densityBoost).toFixed(4)})`); grad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fillRect(p.x - p.r, p.y - p.r, p.r * 2, p.r * 2);
    }
  }

  function renderFireflies(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const COUNT = Math.max(20, Math.round(40 * (state.vizSettings.complexity || 1)));
    if (!renderFireflies._fl || renderFireflies._fl.length !== COUNT) {
      renderFireflies._fl = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < COUNT; i++) {
        renderFireflies._fl.push({
          x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H,
          vx: (Math.random()-0.5) * 0.4, vy: (Math.random()-0.5) * 0.4,
          phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
          period: 2 + Math.random() * 4,
          size: 1.5 + Math.random() * 1.5,
        });
      }
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0,0,0,${(state.vizSettings.trail || 0.12).toFixed(3)})`;
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const speedMul = 1 + mod.overall * 0.5;
    const bright   = 0.55 + mod.envelope * 0.45;
    for (const f of renderFireflies._fl) {

      f.vx += (Math.random()-0.5) * 0.04;
      f.vy += (Math.random()-0.5) * 0.04;
      f.vx *= 0.96; f.vy *= 0.96;
      f.x += f.vx * speedMul; f.y += f.vy * speedMul;
      if (f.x < -10) f.x = W + 10; if (f.x > W + 10) f.x = -10;
      if (f.y < -10) f.y = H + 10; if (f.y > H + 10) f.y = -10;

      const blink = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(t * (Math.PI * 2 / f.period) + f.phase);
      const a = blink * bright * (0.6 + mod.bass * 0.4);
      const glowR = f.size * (3 + mod.bass * 4);
      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(f.x, f.y, 0, f.x, f.y, glowR);
      grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(a*0.9).toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(0.4, `rgba(${rgb},${(a*0.3).toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(f.x, f.y, glowR, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  function renderRipples(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    if (!renderRipples._r) { renderRipples._r = []; renderRipples._lastSpawn = 0; renderRipples._lastAuto = 0; }
    const now = performance.now();

    const autoEvery = 1400 + Math.random() * 1000;
    if (now - renderRipples._lastAuto > autoEvery) {
      renderRipples._lastAuto = now;
      renderRipples._r.push({
        x: W * (0.2 + Math.random() * 0.6),
        y: H * (0.2 + Math.random() * 0.6),
        born: now, life: 4500 + Math.random() * 1500,
      });
    }

    if (mod.pulse > 0.5 && now - renderRipples._lastSpawn > 250) {
      renderRipples._lastSpawn = now;
      renderRipples._r.push({ x: W/2, y: H/2, born: now, life: 4000 });
    }

    renderRipples._r = renderRipples._r.filter(r => now - r.born < r.life);
    if (renderRipples._r.length > 30) renderRipples._r.splice(0, renderRipples._r.length - 30);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0,0,0,${0.12 + (state.vizSettings.trail || 0.12) * 0.4})`;
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const RING_BASE = 4;
    const ringCount = RING_BASE + Math.round(mod.bass * 3);
    const maxR = Math.hypot(W,H) * 0.55;
    for (const rp of renderRipples._r) {
      const age = (now - rp.born) / rp.life;
      for (let i = 0; i < ringCount; i++) {
        const offset = i / ringCount;
        const localAge = (age + offset) % 1;
        const r = localAge * maxR;
        const a = (1 - localAge) * 0.55 * (1 - age * 0.6);
        if (a < 0.02) continue;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(rp.x, rp.y, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${a.toFixed(3)})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 1 + (1 - localAge) * 1.4;
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
  }

  function renderInk(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const COUNT = Math.max(5, Math.round(8 * (state.vizSettings.complexity || 1)));
    if (!renderInk._b || renderInk._b.length !== COUNT) {
      renderInk._b = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < COUNT; i++) {
        renderInk._b.push({
          x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H,
          baseR: 80 + Math.random() * 140,
          phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
          period: 6 + Math.random() * 6,
          drift: (Math.random() * Math.PI * 2),
          speed: 0.15 + Math.random() * 0.2,
        });
      }
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    const widen = 1 + mod.bass * 0.6;
    const bright = 0.06 + mod.envelope * 0.05;
    for (const b of renderInk._b) {

      b.drift += (Math.random()-0.5) * 0.02;
      b.x += Math.cos(b.drift) * b.speed;
      b.y += Math.sin(b.drift) * b.speed;
      if (b.x < -b.baseR) b.x = W + b.baseR; if (b.x > W + b.baseR) b.x = -b.baseR;
      if (b.y < -b.baseR) b.y = H + b.baseR; if (b.y > H + b.baseR) b.y = -b.baseR;

      const breathe = 1 + 0.18 * Math.sin(t * (Math.PI * 2 / b.period) + b.phase);
      const r = b.baseR * breathe * widen;
      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(b.x, b.y, 0, b.x, b.y, r);
      grad.addColorStop(0,    `rgba(${rgb},${bright.toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(0.45, `rgba(${rgb},${(bright*0.5).toFixed(3)})`);
      grad.addColorStop(1,    'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.fillRect(b.x - r, b.y - r, r*2, r*2);
    }
  }

  function renderPocketWatch(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const speed = state.vizSettings?.speed || 1.0;
    const intensity = state.vizSettings?.intensity || 1.0;

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.18)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const ax = W / 2;
    const ay = H * 0.05;

    const chainLen = Math.min(H * 0.55, 320);

    const watchR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.07 + 16;

    const swingPeriod = 3.2 / Math.max(0.4, Math.min(1.6, speed));
    const omega = (Math.PI * 2) / swingPeriod;

    const slowEnv = 0.85 + 0.15 * Math.sin(t * 0.13);
    const maxAngle = (25 * Math.PI / 180) * intensity * slowEnv;
    const angle = Math.sin(t * omega) * maxAngle;

    const wx = ax + Math.sin(angle) * chainLen;
    const wy = ay + Math.cos(angle) * chainLen;

    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.35)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(ax, ay);
    ctx.lineTo(wx, wy);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ax, ay, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.55)`;
    ctx.fill();

    const rimGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(wx, wy, watchR * 0.7, wx, wy, watchR * 1.6);
    rimGlow.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.20 + mod.envelope * 0.18).toFixed(3)})`);
    rimGlow.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = rimGlow;
    ctx.fillRect(wx - watchR * 1.6, wy - watchR * 1.6, watchR * 3.2, watchR * 3.2);

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(wx, wy, watchR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${(0.55 + mod.envelope * 0.3).toFixed(3)})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
    ctx.stroke();

    const faceGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(wx - watchR * 0.3, wy - watchR * 0.3, 0, wx, wy, watchR);
    faceGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,250,235,${(0.08 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.12).toFixed(3)})`);
    faceGrad.addColorStop(0.7, `rgba(${rgb},0.10)`);
    faceGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.25)');
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(wx, wy, watchR - 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = faceGrad;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.45)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
      const a = (i / 12) * Math.PI * 2;
      const r1 = watchR - 4, r2 = watchR - (i % 3 === 0 ? 9 : 6);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(wx + Math.cos(a) * r1, wy + Math.sin(a) * r1);
      ctx.lineTo(wx + Math.cos(a) * r2, wy + Math.sin(a) * r2);
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    const swingFrac = Math.abs(Math.sin(t * omega));
    const glintFrac = 1 - swingFrac;
    const glintAngle = -Math.PI / 4 + Math.sin(t * omega * 2) * 0.6;
    const glintBright = 0.15 + glintFrac * 0.65 + mod.bass * 0.2;
    const gx = wx + Math.cos(glintAngle) * (watchR - 5);
    const gy = wy + Math.sin(glintAngle) * (watchR - 5);
    const glintGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(gx, gy, 0, gx, gy, watchR * 0.45);
    glintGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,255,240,${glintBright.toFixed(3)})`);
    glintGrad.addColorStop(0.4, `rgba(255,255,240,${(glintBright * 0.3).toFixed(3)})`);
    glintGrad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = glintGrad;
    ctx.fillRect(gx - watchR * 0.5, gy - watchR * 0.5, watchR, watchR);

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(wx, wy, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderSpinningCoin(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const speed = state.vizSettings?.speed || 1.0;

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.16)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const cx = W / 2;
    const cy = H * 0.5;
    const baseR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.16 + 24;

    const spinPeriod = 2.0 / Math.max(0.3, Math.min(1.8, speed));
    const spinAngle = (t * Math.PI * 2 / spinPeriod) % (Math.PI * 2);

    const faceFactor = Math.abs(Math.cos(spinAngle));

    const wobble = (3 * Math.PI / 180) * (0.5 + mod.bass * 1.5) * Math.sin(t * 0.7);

    const ry = Math.max(2, baseR * faceFactor);
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(cx, cy);
    ctx.rotate(wobble);

    const halo = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, baseR * 0.5, 0, 0, baseR * 1.7);
    halo.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.18 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.18).toFixed(3)})`);
    halo.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = halo;
    ctx.fillRect(-baseR * 1.7, -baseR * 1.7, baseR * 3.4, baseR * 3.4);

    const sheen = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, -ry, 0, ry);
    const faceBright = 0.45 + faceFactor * 0.4 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.15;
    sheen.addColorStop(0,    `rgba(${rgb},${faceBright.toFixed(3)})`);
    sheen.addColorStop(0.45, `rgba(${rgb},${(faceBright * 0.55).toFixed(3)})`);
    sheen.addColorStop(0.55, `rgba(${rgb},${(faceBright * 0.55).toFixed(3)})`);
    sheen.addColorStop(1,    `rgba(${rgb},${(faceBright * 0.85).toFixed(3)})`);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.ellipse(0, 0, baseR, ry, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = sheen;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.ellipse(0, 0, baseR, ry, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();

    if (faceFactor > 0.18) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.ellipse(0, 0, baseR * 0.45, ry * 0.45, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${(0.5 * faceFactor).toFixed(3)})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    const glintIntensity = Math.pow(faceFactor, 3) * (0.6 + mod.bass * 0.4);
    if (glintIntensity > 0.05) {
      const gx = -baseR * 0.35;
      const gy = -ry * 0.35;
      const glintGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(gx, gy, 0, gx, gy, baseR * 0.55);
      glintGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,255,240,${glintIntensity.toFixed(3)})`);
      glintGrad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(255,255,240,${(glintIntensity * 0.4).toFixed(3)})`);
      glintGrad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
      ctx.fillStyle = glintGrad;
      ctx.fillRect(-baseR, -ry, baseR * 2, ry * 2);
    }

    ctx.restore();
  }

  function renderHandPendulum(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    const speed = state.vizSettings?.speed || 1.0;
    const intensity = state.vizSettings?.intensity || 1.0;

    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.10)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const ax = W / 2;
    const ay = Math.max(14, H * 0.12);
    const stringLen = Math.min(H * 0.62, 360);

    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.18)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(W * 0.20, ay - 6);
    ctx.lineTo(W * 0.80, ay - 6);
    ctx.stroke();

    for (let tx = 0.30; tx <= 0.70; tx += 0.10) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(W * tx, ay - 6);
      ctx.lineTo(W * tx, ay - 2);
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    const baseSpeed = (Math.PI * 2) * Math.max(0.3, Math.min(1.6, speed));
    const wx = baseSpeed / 2.5;
    const wy = baseSpeed / 3.7;
    const ampX = (Math.PI / 8) * intensity;
    const ampY = (Math.PI / 16) * intensity;
    const angX = Math.sin(t * wx) * ampX;
    const angY = Math.sin(t * wy + 0.8) * ampY;

    const bx = ax + Math.sin(angX) * stringLen;
    const by = ay + Math.cos(angX) * stringLen + Math.sin(angY) * stringLen * 0.3;

    if (!renderHandPendulum._trail) renderHandPendulum._trail = [];
    const trail = renderHandPendulum._trail;
    trail.push({ x: bx, y: by });
    const TRAIL_LEN = 60;
    while (trail.length > TRAIL_LEN) trail.shift();
    if (trail.length > 1) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(trail[0].x, trail[0].y);
      for (let i = 1; i < trail.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(trail[i].x, trail[i].y);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.18)`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.45)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(ax, ay);
    ctx.lineTo(bx, by);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ax, ay, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ax - 1.2, ay - 1.2, 1.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,0.45)`;
    ctx.fill();

    const bobR = 9 + mod.bass * 4;
    const halo = ctx.createRadialGradient(bx, by, 0, bx, by, bobR * 3.2);
    halo.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.22 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.20).toFixed(3)})`);
    halo.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.06 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.08).toFixed(3)})`);
    halo.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = halo;
    ctx.fillRect(bx - bobR * 3.2, by - bobR * 3.2, bobR * 6.4, bobR * 6.4);

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(bx, by, bobR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    const bobGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(bx - bobR * 0.4, by - bobR * 0.4, 0, bx, by, bobR);
    bobGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,255,240,${(0.55 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.25).toFixed(3)})`);
    bobGrad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${rgb},0.65)`);
    bobGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${rgb},0.20)`);
    ctx.fillStyle = bobGrad;
    ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderSpiralPreview(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.18)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
    const maxR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.46;
    const turns = 4.5;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.4;
    ctx.shadowColor = color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = 6;
    ctx.beginPath();
    const rotation = t * 0.6;
    const STEPS = 220;
    for (let i = 0; i <= STEPS; i++) {
      const frac = i / STEPS;
      const angle = frac * turns * Math.PI * 2 + rotation;
      const r = frac * maxR;
      const x = cx + r * Math.cos(angle);
      const y = cy + r * Math.sin(angle);
      i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  }

  function renderPulsePreview(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
    const maxR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.46;

    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const phase = (t * 0.85 + i / 3) % 1;
      const r = phase * maxR;
      const a = (1 - phase) * 0.6;
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${a.toFixed(3)})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 + (1 - phase) * 1.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  }

  function renderHighwayPreview(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

    const vx = W / 2;
    const vy = H * 0.40;

    const STRIPES = 5;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.85)`;
    ctx.shadowColor = color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
    for (let i = 0; i < STRIPES; i++) {
      const phase = ((t * 0.7) + i / STRIPES) % 1;

      const depth = phase * phase;
      const y = vy + (H - vy) * depth;
      const halfWidth = (W * 0.42) * depth;
      const alpha = 0.2 + depth * 0.7;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1 + depth * 2;
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${alpha.toFixed(3)})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(vx - halfWidth, y);
      ctx.lineTo(vx - halfWidth * 0.18, y);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(vx + halfWidth * 0.18, y);
      ctx.lineTo(vx + halfWidth, y);
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb},0.20)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.6;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, vy);
    ctx.lineTo(W, vy);
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function renderNeuralBloomPreview(ctx, W, H, t, color) {
    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);
    const mod = getAudioMod();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
    const baseR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.18;
    const breath = baseR * (1.0 + 0.10 * Math.sin(t * 0.8) + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.20);

    const halo = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, breath * 3.2);
    halo.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.30 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.20).toFixed(3)})`);
    halo.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${rgb},${(0.10 + mod.voiceEnvelope * 0.10).toFixed(3)})`);
    halo.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = halo;
    ctx.fillRect(cx - breath * 3.2, cy - breath * 3.2, breath * 6.4, breath * 6.4);

    const orbGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx - breath * 0.3, cy - breath * 0.3, 0, cx, cy, breath);
    orbGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255,255,255,0.85)`);
    orbGrad.addColorStop(0.6, `rgba(${rgb},0.70)`);
    orbGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${rgb},0.20)`);
    ctx.fillStyle = orbGrad;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, breath, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    const ringR = breath * 2.2 + mod.bass * 6;
    const PARTICLES = 36;
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${rgb},${(0.55 + mod.pulse * 0.30).toFixed(3)})`;
    for (let i = 0; i < PARTICLES; i++) {
      const angle = (i / PARTICLES) * Math.PI * 2 + t * 0.4;
      const wobble = 0.85 + 0.15 * Math.sin(t * 1.7 + i * 0.6);
      const px = cx + Math.cos(angle) * ringR * wobble;
      const py = cy + Math.sin(angle) * ringR * wobble;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(px, py, 1.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }

  const VIZ_RENDERERS = {
    tunnel: renderTunnel,
    'pendulum-viz': renderPendulumViz,
    vortex: renderVortex,
    mandala: renderMandala,
    lissajous: renderLissajous,
    colorwash: renderColorWash,
    'canvas-pulse': renderCanvasPulse,
    breathing: renderBreathingCircle,
    'breathing-resonance': renderBreathingResonance,
    ganzfeld: renderGanzfeld,
    moire: renderMoire,
    starfield: renderStarfield,
    candle: renderCandle,
    flowfield: renderFlowField,
    plasma: renderPlasma,
    'kaleidoscope-flow': makeKaleidoscope(renderFlowField, 6),
    'kaleidoscope-plasma': makeKaleidoscope(renderPlasma, 8),
    aurora: renderAurora,
    rain: renderRain,
    'sacred-geo': renderSacredGeo,
    waveform: renderWaveform,
    smoke: renderSmoke,

    fireflies: renderFireflies,
    ripples: renderRipples,
    ink: renderInk,
    'gamma-flicker': renderGammaFlicker,

    'pocket-watch': renderPocketWatch,
    'spinning-coin': renderSpinningCoin,
    'hand-pendulum': renderHandPendulum,

    spiral: renderSpiralPreview,
    pulse: renderPulsePreview,
    highway: renderHighwayPreview,
    'neural-bloom': renderNeuralBloomPreview,
  };

  const PHASE_VIZ_SPEED = { settling: 0.5, induction: 1.0, deepener: 0.7, work: 0.9, lightener: 0.75, wake: 0.95, reintroduction: 0.8, emergence: 0.95 };

  const _previewDrone = new SoundscapeEngine();
  let _previewDroneTimeout = null;

  async function previewSoundscape() {
    const type = $('soundscapeSelect')?.value;
    if (!type || type === 'none') { notify.info('Select a soundscape first.'); return; }
    await stopSoundscapePreview();
    try {
      await _previewDrone.start(state.droneVolume, type);
      togglePreviewBtns('sound', true);

      $('soundPreviewHint').textContent = 'playing ' + type + '...';

      _previewDroneTimeout = setTimeout(() => stopSoundscapePreview(), 10000);
    } catch(e) { notify.warn('Could not start audio preview.'); }
  }

  async function stopSoundscapePreview() {
    clearTimeout(_previewDroneTimeout);
    await _previewDrone.stop();
    togglePreviewBtns('sound', false);

    $('soundPreviewHint').textContent = 'Listen to a 10-second preview.';
  }

  let _vizPreviewRaf = null;
  let _vizPreviewStart = 0;

  function startVizPreview() {
    stopVizPreview();
    const sel = $('vizSelect')?.value;
    const vizKey = sel === 'auto' ? (getMethod().visual) : sel;
    const renderer = VIZ_RENDERERS[vizKey];
    if (!renderer) {

      const wrap = $('vizPreviewWrap');
      if (wrap) { wrap.style.display = 'block'; }
      const canvas = $('vizPreviewCanvas');
      if (canvas) { const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height); ctx.fillStyle = '#4a6a84'; ctx.font = '13px -apple-system, sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText(vizKey === 'none' ? 'Black screen — no visual' : vizKey + ' (non-canvas preview)', canvas.width/2, canvas.height/2); }
      $('vizPreviewLabel').textContent = vizKey;
      togglePreviewBtns('viz', true);

      return;
    }

    const wrap = $('vizPreviewWrap');
    const canvas = $('vizPreviewCanvas');
    if (!wrap || !canvas) return;
    wrap.style.display = 'block';
    canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth || 300;
    canvas.height = 120;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: false });

    const accentFallback = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim() || '#6b94b8';
    _vizPreviewStart = performance.now();
    $('vizPreviewLabel').textContent = vizKey;
    togglePreviewBtns('viz', true);

    function frame() {
      const t = ((performance.now() - _vizPreviewStart) / 1000) * (state.vizSettings.speed || 1.0);
      const color = state.vizColor || accentFallback;
      try { renderer(ctx, canvas.width, canvas.height, t, color); } catch(e) {}
      _vizPreviewRaf = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    }
    _vizPreviewRaf = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  function stopVizPreview() {
    if (_vizPreviewRaf) { cancelAnimationFrame(_vizPreviewRaf); _vizPreviewRaf = null; }
    const wrap = $('vizPreviewWrap');
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'none';
    togglePreviewBtns('viz', false);

  }

  let _voicePreviewing = false;

  const NB_PHASE_PALETTES = {
    settling:        { a: [0.10, 0.15, 0.35], b: [0.15, 0.40, 0.45] },
    induction:       { a: [0.15, 0.40, 0.45], b: [0.30, 0.15, 0.45] },
