    deepener:        { a: [0.30, 0.15, 0.45], b: [0.50, 0.10, 0.40] },
    work:            { a: [0.50, 0.10, 0.40], b: [0.80, 0.60, 0.20] },
    affirmation:     { a: [0.50, 0.10, 0.40], b: [0.80, 0.60, 0.20] },
    affirm:          { a: [0.50, 0.10, 0.40], b: [0.80, 0.60, 0.20] },
    lightener:       { a: [0.80, 0.60, 0.20], b: [0.85, 0.55, 0.25] },
    wake:            { a: [0.85, 0.55, 0.25], b: [0.30, 0.70, 0.85] },
    reintroduction:  { a: [0.30, 0.70, 0.85], b: [0.90, 0.95, 1.00] },
    _default:        { a: [0.10, 0.20, 0.40], b: [0.30, 0.10, 0.50] },
  };

  const NB_VS_BG = `#version 300 es
    in vec2 aPos;
    out vec2 vUv;
    void main() { vUv = aPos * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(aPos, 0.0, 1.0); }
  `;
  const NB_FS_BG = `#version 300 es
    precision highp float;
    in vec2 vUv;
    uniform float uTime;
    uniform vec3  uColorA;
    uniform vec3  uColorB;
    out vec4 fragColor;
    float hash(vec2 p){ return fract(sin(dot(p, vec2(127.1, 311.7))) * 43758.5453); }
    float noise(vec2 p){
      vec2 i = floor(p), f = fract(p);
      float a = hash(i), b = hash(i+vec2(1,0)), c = hash(i+vec2(0,1)), d = hash(i+vec2(1,1));
      vec2 u = f*f*(3.0-2.0*f);
      return mix(a,b,u.x) + (c-a)*u.y*(1.0-u.x) + (d-b)*u.x*u.y;
    }
    float fbm(vec2 p){ float v=0.0, a=0.5; for(int i=0;i<4;i++){ v+=a*noise(p); p*=2.0; a*=0.5; } return v; }
    void main() {
      vec2 p = vUv * 3.0;
      float n = fbm(p + uTime*0.05);
      vec3 c = mix(uColorA, uColorB, smoothstep(0.3, 0.7, n));
      fragColor = vec4(c, 1.0);
    }
  `;
  const NB_VS_ORB = `#version 300 es
    in vec2 aPos;
    uniform vec2  uResolution;
    uniform vec2  uCenter;       // pixel offset from canvas center
    uniform float uRadius;
    out vec2 vPos;
    void main() {
      vec2 scaled = aPos * uRadius;
      vec2 pixel = scaled + uCenter;
      vec2 ndc = pixel / uResolution * 2.0;
      gl_Position = vec4(ndc.x, -ndc.y, 0.0, 1.0);
      vPos = aPos;
    }
  `;
  const NB_FS_ORB = `#version 300 es
    precision highp float;
    in vec2 vPos;
    uniform vec3  uColor;
    uniform float uGlow;
    out vec4 fragColor;
    void main() {
      float r = length(vPos);
      if (r > 1.0) discard;
      float core = smoothstep(0.6, 0.0, r);
      float halo = smoothstep(1.0, 0.5, r) * uGlow;
      vec3 c = uColor * (core + halo * 0.6);
      fragColor = vec4(c, core + halo * 0.4);
    }
  `;
  const NB_VS_PARTICLE = `#version 300 es
    in float aPhase;
    uniform float uTime;
    uniform float uRadius;
    uniform float uPtSize;
    uniform vec2  uResolution;
    uniform float uSpin;
    out float vFade;
    void main() {
      float angle = aPhase * 6.2831853 + uTime * uSpin;
      vec2 pos = vec2(cos(angle), sin(angle)) * uRadius;
      vec2 ndc = pos / uResolution * 2.0;
      gl_Position = vec4(ndc.x, -ndc.y, 0.0, 1.0);
      gl_PointSize = uPtSize;
      vFade = 0.5 + 0.5 * sin(aPhase * 30.0 + uTime * 0.7);
    }
  `;
  const NB_FS_PARTICLE = `#version 300 es
    precision highp float;
    in float vFade;
    uniform vec3 uColor;
    out vec4 fragColor;
    void main() {
      vec2 c = gl_PointCoord * 2.0 - 1.0;
      float r = length(c);
      if (r > 1.0) discard;
      float glow = smoothstep(1.0, 0.2, r);
      fragColor = vec4(uColor * glow * vFade, glow * vFade);
    }
  `;

  function _nbToGL1(src, isFrag) {
    let s = src.replace(/#version 300 es\s*\n?/, '').replace(/in /g, isFrag ? 'varying ' : 'attribute ');
    if (isFrag) {
      s = s.replace(/out vec4 fragColor;/, '').replace(/fragColor/g, 'gl_FragColor');
    } else {
      s = s.replace(/out /g, 'varying ');
    }
    return s;
  }

  function _nbCompile(gl, vsSrc, fsSrc, isGL2) {
    const vs = gl.createShader(gl.VERTEX_SHADER);
    gl.shaderSource(vs, isGL2 ? vsSrc : _nbToGL1(vsSrc, false));
    gl.compileShader(vs);
    if (!gl.getShaderParameter(vs, gl.COMPILE_STATUS)) { console.error('[NB] vs compile:', gl.getShaderInfoLog(vs)); return null; }
    const fs = gl.createShader(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER);
    gl.shaderSource(fs, isGL2 ? fsSrc : _nbToGL1(fsSrc, true));
    gl.compileShader(fs);
    if (!gl.getShaderParameter(fs, gl.COMPILE_STATUS)) { console.error('[NB] fs compile:', gl.getShaderInfoLog(fs)); return null; }
    const p = gl.createProgram();
    gl.attachShader(p, vs); gl.attachShader(p, fs); gl.linkProgram(p);
    if (!gl.getProgramParameter(p, gl.LINK_STATUS)) { console.error('[NB] link:', gl.getProgramInfoLog(p)); return null; }
    return p;
  }

  const neuralBloomRenderer = {
    canvas: null,
    gl: null,
    ctx2d: null,
    mode: null,
    _rafHandle: null,
    _ro: null,
    _smoothRadius: null,
    _frameTimes: [],
    _degraded: false,
    _particleCount: 300,
    _lastPhase: null,
    _targetColorA: null,
    _targetColorB: null,
    colorA: null,
    colorB: null,
    bursts: null,
    burstCursor: 0,
    startMs: 0,
    _lastFrameAt: 0,

    start(stage) {
      this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      this.canvas.className = 'neural-bloom-canvas';
      this.canvas.style.cssText = 'position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none; background:#000;';
      this.canvas.width = stage.clientWidth;
      this.canvas.height = stage.clientHeight;
      stage.insertBefore(this.canvas, stage.firstChild);

      this.gl = this.canvas.getContext('webgl2');
      if (this.gl) { this.mode = 'webgl2'; this._initGL(); }
      else {
        this.gl = this.canvas.getContext('webgl') || this.canvas.getContext('experimental-webgl');
        if (this.gl) {
          this.mode = 'webgl1';

          try { this.gl.getExtension('OES_standard_derivatives'); } catch {}
          this._initGL();
        } else {
          this.ctx2d = this.canvas.getContext('2d');
          this.mode = 'canvas2d';
          this._initCanvas2D();
        }
      }
      console.log('[NB] renderer mode:', this.mode);

      this._smoothRadius = null;
      this._frameTimes = [];
      this._degraded = false;
      this._particleCount = 300;
      this.bursts = Array.from({ length: 5 }, () => ({ spawnTime: -1, angleBase: 0 }));
      this.burstCursor = 0;
      this._lastPhase = null;
      this._targetColorA = null;
      this._targetColorB = null;
      this.startMs = performance.now();
      this._lastFrameAt = this.startMs;

      this._ro = new ResizeObserver(() => {
        this.canvas.width = stage.clientWidth;
        this.canvas.height = stage.clientHeight;
        if (this.gl) this.gl.viewport(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      });
      this._ro.observe(stage);

      this._startLoop();
    },

    _initGL() {
      const gl = this.gl;
      const isGL2 = this.mode === 'webgl2';
      gl.viewport(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      this.bgProg       = _nbCompile(gl, NB_VS_BG,       NB_FS_BG,       isGL2);
      this.orbProg      = _nbCompile(gl, NB_VS_ORB,      NB_FS_ORB,      isGL2);
      this.particleProg = _nbCompile(gl, NB_VS_PARTICLE, NB_FS_PARTICLE, isGL2);
      if (!this.bgProg || !this.orbProg || !this.particleProg) {

        console.warn('[NB] GL shader compile failed — falling back to canvas2d');
        this.gl = null;
        this.mode = 'canvas2d';
        this.ctx2d = this.canvas.getContext('2d');
        this._initCanvas2D();
        return;
      }
      this.bgUniforms = {
        uTime:   gl.getUniformLocation(this.bgProg, 'uTime'),
        uColorA: gl.getUniformLocation(this.bgProg, 'uColorA'),
        uColorB: gl.getUniformLocation(this.bgProg, 'uColorB'),
      };
      this.orbUniforms = {
        uResolution: gl.getUniformLocation(this.orbProg, 'uResolution'),
        uCenter:     gl.getUniformLocation(this.orbProg, 'uCenter'),
        uRadius:     gl.getUniformLocation(this.orbProg, 'uRadius'),
        uColor:      gl.getUniformLocation(this.orbProg, 'uColor'),
        uGlow:       gl.getUniformLocation(this.orbProg, 'uGlow'),
      };
      this.particleUniforms = {
        uTime:       gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uTime'),
        uRadius:     gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uRadius'),
        uPtSize:     gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uPtSize'),
        uResolution: gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uResolution'),
        uSpin:       gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uSpin'),
        uColor:      gl.getUniformLocation(this.particleProg, 'uColor'),
      };

      this.quad = gl.createBuffer();
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.quad);
      gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, new Float32Array([-1,-1, 1,-1, -1,1, 1,1]), gl.STATIC_DRAW);

      const phases = new Float32Array(300);
      for (let i = 0; i < 300; i++) phases[i] = i / 300;
      this.particleBuf = gl.createBuffer();
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.particleBuf);
      gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, phases, gl.STATIC_DRAW);

      this.colorA = [0.10, 0.20, 0.40];
      this.colorB = [0.30, 0.10, 0.50];
    },

    _initCanvas2D() {
      this.ctx2d.fillStyle = '#0a0a0c';
      this.ctx2d.fillRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      this.colorA = [0.10, 0.20, 0.40];
      this.colorB = [0.30, 0.10, 0.50];
    },

    _startLoop() {
      const tick = () => {
        if (state.abortFlag) { this.stop(); return; }
        if (!this._rafHandle) return;
        this._renderFrame();
        this._rafHandle = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      };
      this._rafHandle = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    },

    _updatePalette() {
      const target = NB_PHASE_PALETTES[state._currentPhase] || NB_PHASE_PALETTES._default;
      if (!this._targetColorA) {
        this._targetColorA = target.a.slice(); this._targetColorB = target.b.slice();
        this.colorA = target.a.slice(); this.colorB = target.b.slice();
      }
      if (this._lastPhase !== state._currentPhase) {
        this._lastPhase = state._currentPhase;
        this._targetColorA = target.a.slice(); this._targetColorB = target.b.slice();
      }

      const k = 0.0055;
      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        this.colorA[i] += (this._targetColorA[i] - this.colorA[i]) * k;
        this.colorB[i] += (this._targetColorB[i] - this.colorB[i]) * k;
      }
    },

    _updateBursts(mod) {
      if (mod.pulse > 0.6) {
        const a = state.audioReactive;
        if (performance.now() - a._lastBurstAt >= 333) {
          a._lastBurstAt = performance.now();
          this.bursts[this.burstCursor] = { spawnTime: performance.now(), angleBase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2 };
          this.burstCursor = (this.burstCursor + 1) % 5;
        }
      }
    },

    _tickFrameGuard() {
      const now = performance.now();
      const dt = now - this._lastFrameAt;
      this._lastFrameAt = now;
      this._frameTimes.push(dt);
      if (this._frameTimes.length > 30) this._frameTimes.shift();
      if (!this._degraded && this._frameTimes.length === 30) {
        const avg = this._frameTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / 30;
        if (avg > 33) {
          console.log('[NB] frame time degraded (avg ' + avg.toFixed(1) + 'ms) — reducing particles');
          this._degraded = true;
          this._particleCount = 150;
        }
      }
    },

    _renderFrame() {
      this._tickFrameGuard();
      this._updatePalette();
      const mod = getAudioMod();
      this._updateBursts(mod);

      if (this.mode === 'webgl2' || this.mode === 'webgl1') this._renderGL(mod);
      else if (this.mode === 'canvas2d') this._renderCanvas2D(mod);
    },

    _renderGL(mod) {
      const gl = this.gl;
      gl.viewport(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      gl.clearColor(0, 0, 0, 1);
      gl.clear(gl.COLOR_BUFFER_BIT);

      gl.useProgram(this.bgProg);
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.quad);
      const bgAPos = gl.getAttribLocation(this.bgProg, 'aPos');
      gl.enableVertexAttribArray(bgAPos);
      gl.vertexAttribPointer(bgAPos, 2, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
      gl.uniform1f(this.bgUniforms.uTime, (performance.now() - this.startMs) / 1000);
      gl.uniform3fv(this.bgUniforms.uColorA, this.colorA);
      gl.uniform3fv(this.bgUniforms.uColorB, this.colorB);
      gl.drawArrays(gl.TRIANGLE_STRIP, 0, 4);

      gl.enable(gl.BLEND);
      gl.blendFunc(gl.SRC_ALPHA, gl.ONE);

      const targetRadius = Math.min(this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height) * 0.12
        * (1 + mod.overall * 0.5 + mod.envelope * 0.3);
      this._smoothRadius = this._smoothRadius == null
        ? targetRadius
        : this._smoothRadius + (targetRadius - this._smoothRadius) * 0.08;
      gl.useProgram(this.orbProg);
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.quad);
      const orbAPos = gl.getAttribLocation(this.orbProg, 'aPos');
      gl.enableVertexAttribArray(orbAPos);
      gl.vertexAttribPointer(orbAPos, 2, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
      gl.uniform2f(this.orbUniforms.uResolution, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      gl.uniform2f(this.orbUniforms.uCenter, 0, 0);
      gl.uniform1f(this.orbUniforms.uRadius, this._smoothRadius);
      gl.uniform3f(this.orbUniforms.uColor, 0.6 + mod.bass * 0.4, 0.8, Math.max(0, 1.0 - mod.bass * 0.3));
      gl.uniform1f(this.orbUniforms.uGlow, 0.4 + mod.envelope * 0.6);
      gl.drawArrays(gl.TRIANGLE_STRIP, 0, 4);

      gl.useProgram(this.particleProg);
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.particleBuf);
      const partAPhase = gl.getAttribLocation(this.particleProg, 'aPhase');
      gl.enableVertexAttribArray(partAPhase);
      gl.vertexAttribPointer(partAPhase, 1, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
      gl.uniform1f(this.particleUniforms.uTime, (performance.now() - this.startMs) / 1000);
      gl.uniform1f(this.particleUniforms.uRadius, Math.min(this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height) * 0.28 + mod.bass * 80);
      gl.uniform1f(this.particleUniforms.uPtSize, 4);
      gl.uniform2f(this.particleUniforms.uResolution, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
      gl.uniform1f(this.particleUniforms.uSpin, 0.1 + mod.overall * 0.8);
      gl.uniform3f(this.particleUniforms.uColor, 0.8, 0.9, 1.0);
      gl.drawArrays(gl.POINTS, 0, this._particleCount);

      gl.useProgram(this.orbProg);
      gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.quad);
      gl.enableVertexAttribArray(orbAPos);
      gl.vertexAttribPointer(orbAPos, 2, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
      for (const burst of this.bursts) {
        if (burst.spawnTime < 0) continue;
        const age = (performance.now() - burst.spawnTime) / 1000;
        if (age >= 1.0) { burst.spawnTime = -1; continue; }

        const alpha = age < 0.15 ? age / 0.15 : (1 - (age - 0.15) / 0.85);
        const dist = age * Math.min(this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height) * 0.45;
        for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
          const theta = burst.angleBase + (i / 20) * Math.PI * 2;
          gl.uniform2f(this.orbUniforms.uCenter, Math.cos(theta) * dist, Math.sin(theta) * dist);
          gl.uniform1f(this.orbUniforms.uRadius, 8);
          gl.uniform3f(this.orbUniforms.uColor, 1.0, 0.85, 0.6);
          gl.uniform1f(this.orbUniforms.uGlow, alpha * 1.5);
          gl.drawArrays(gl.TRIANGLE_STRIP, 0, 4);
        }
      }
      gl.uniform2f(this.orbUniforms.uCenter, 0, 0);

      gl.disable(gl.BLEND);
    },

    _renderCanvas2D(mod) {
      const ctx = this.ctx2d;
      const W = this.canvas.width, H = this.canvas.height;

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10,10,12,0.15)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

      const rgb = (c) => `rgb(${Math.round(c[0]*255)},${Math.round(c[1]*255)},${Math.round(c[2]*255)})`;
      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, 0, W/2, H/2, Math.max(W, H) * 0.7);
      grad.addColorStop(0, rgb(this.colorA));
      grad.addColorStop(1, rgb(this.colorB));
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.12;
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

      const targetR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.12 * (1 + mod.overall * 0.5 + mod.envelope * 0.3);
      this._smoothRadius = this._smoothRadius == null ? targetR : this._smoothRadius + (targetR - this._smoothRadius) * 0.08;
      const orbR = this._smoothRadius;
      const orbGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, 0, W/2, H/2, orbR);
      orbGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(220,240,255,0.9)');
      orbGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(120,180,240,0)');
      ctx.fillStyle = orbGrad;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(W/2, H/2, orbR, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();

      const t = (performance.now() - this.startMs) / 1000;
      const spin = 0.1 + mod.overall * 0.8;
      const particleR = Math.min(W, H) * 0.28 + mod.bass * 60;
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(200,230,255,0.7)';
      const count = Math.min(50, this._particleCount);
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        const angle = (i / count) * Math.PI * 2 + t * spin;
        const x = W/2 + Math.cos(angle) * particleR;
        const y = H/2 + Math.sin(angle) * particleR;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      }

      for (const burst of this.bursts) {
        if (burst.spawnTime < 0) continue;
        const age = (performance.now() - burst.spawnTime) / 1000;
        if (age >= 1.0) { burst.spawnTime = -1; continue; }
        const alpha = age < 0.15 ? age / 0.15 : (1 - (age - 0.15) / 0.85);
        const dist = age * Math.min(W, H) * 0.45;
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,210,140,${alpha})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
          const theta = burst.angleBase + (i / 20) * Math.PI * 2;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(W/2 + Math.cos(theta) * 40, H/2 + Math.sin(theta) * 40);
          ctx.lineTo(W/2 + Math.cos(theta) * (40 + dist), H/2 + Math.sin(theta) * (40 + dist));
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }
    },

    stop() {
      if (this._rafHandle) { cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafHandle); this._rafHandle = null; }
      if (this._ro) { this._ro.disconnect(); this._ro = null; }
      if (this.canvas && this.canvas.parentNode) this.canvas.parentNode.removeChild(this.canvas);
      this.canvas = this.gl = this.ctx2d = null;
      this.mode = null;
    },
  };

  const INTENSE_VIZ_LIST = new Set([
    'flowfield','plasma','kaleidoscope-flow','kaleidoscope-plasma',
    'starfield','tunnel','vortex'
  ]);

  let _lastReducedMotionToastAt = 0;

  const _PHASE_TEMP_MAP = {
    settling:       'cool',
    induction:      'cool',
    deepener:       'deep',
    level:          'deep',
    work:           'warm',
    affirm:         'warm',
    lightener:      'cool',
    wake:           'cool',
    reintroduction: 'cool',
    emergence:      'cool',
  };
  function _updatePhaseColorTemp(phase) {
    const cls = document.body.classList;
    cls.remove('phase-temp-cool', 'phase-temp-warm', 'phase-temp-deep');
    const baseKind = (typeof phaseBase === 'function')
      ? phaseBase(phase)
      : String(phase || '').replace(/-\d+$/, '');
    const temp = _PHASE_TEMP_MAP[baseKind];
    if (temp) cls.add('phase-temp-' + temp);
  }

  let _personalSymbolBlobUrl = null;

  let _originalFaviconHref = null;
  function _getOrCreateFaviconLink() {
    let link = document.querySelector('link[rel~="icon"]');
    if (!link) {
      link = document.createElement('link');
      link.rel = 'icon';
      document.head.appendChild(link);
    }
    return link;
  }
  async function _setSessionFavicon() {
    const suggestion = state.craftedSuggestion;
    if (!suggestion) return;
    if (typeof suggestionSymbolGet !== 'function' || typeof _suggestionHash !== 'function') return;
    let url;
    try {
      const hash = _suggestionHash(suggestion);
      url = await suggestionSymbolGet(hash);
    } catch { return; }
    if (!url) return;
    const link = _getOrCreateFaviconLink();
    if (_originalFaviconHref == null) _originalFaviconHref = link.href || '';
    link.href = url;

    try {
      if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.faviconPlugin?.set) root.faviconPlugin.set(url);
    } catch {}
  }
  function _resetSessionFavicon() {
    if (_originalFaviconHref == null) return;
    const link = _getOrCreateFaviconLink();
    link.href = _originalFaviconHref;
    try {
      if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.faviconPlugin?.set && _originalFaviconHref) {
        root.faviconPlugin.set(_originalFaviconHref);
      }
    } catch {}
    _originalFaviconHref = null;
  }

  async function _updatePersonalSymbolOverlay(phase) {
    const stage = $('stage');
    if (!stage) return;
    const baseKind = (typeof phaseBase === 'function') ? phaseBase(phase) : String(phase || '').replace(/-\d+$/, '');
    const isWork = baseKind === 'work';
    const existing = stage.querySelector('.personal-symbol-overlay');
    if (!isWork) {

      if (existing) {
        existing.classList.remove('visible');

        setTimeout(() => { try { existing.remove(); } catch {} }, 1600);
      }
      return;
    }

    const suggestion = state.craftedSuggestion;
    if (!suggestion) return;
    if (typeof suggestionSymbolGet !== 'function' || typeof _suggestionHash !== 'function') return;
    try {
      const hash = _suggestionHash(suggestion);
      const url = await suggestionSymbolGet(hash);
      if (!url) return;

      if (existing && existing.dataset.symbolHash === hash) {
        existing.classList.add('visible');
        return;
      }

      if (existing) existing.remove();

      if (_personalSymbolBlobUrl && _personalSymbolBlobUrl !== url) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(_personalSymbolBlobUrl); } catch {}
      }
      _personalSymbolBlobUrl = url;
      const overlay = document.createElement('div');
      overlay.className = 'personal-symbol-overlay';
      overlay.dataset.symbolHash = hash;
      overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.src = url;
      img.alt = '';
      img.draggable = false;
      overlay.appendChild(img);

      stage.appendChild(overlay);

      requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('visible'));
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[symbol overlay] update failed:', e);
    }
  }

  function setupVisual(visualType) {

    try {
      const prm = matchMedia?.('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')?.matches;
      const safetiesRelaxed = typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function' && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
      if (prm && !safetiesRelaxed && INTENSE_VIZ_LIST.has(visualType)) {
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - _lastReducedMotionToastAt > 60000) {
          _lastReducedMotionToastAt = now;
          if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
            notify.info(`Reduced-motion: "${visualType}" swapped to "candle" for safety.`);
          }
        }

        if (state.vizOverride !== 'auto') state.vizOverride = 'candle';
        const vs = $('vizSelect'); if (vs && vs.value !== 'candle') vs.value = 'candle';
        visualType = 'candle';
      }
    } catch {  }

    try {
      const profile = typeof getProfile === 'function' ? getProfile() : null;
      const safetiesRelaxed = typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function' && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
      if (!safetiesRelaxed && profile?.posture === 'walking' && INTENSE_VIZ_LIST.has(visualType)) {
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - _lastReducedMotionToastAt > 60000) {
          _lastReducedMotionToastAt = now;
          if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
            notify.info(`Walking posture: "${visualType}" disabled for safety. Use candle or none.`);
          }
        }
        if (state.vizOverride !== 'auto') state.vizOverride = 'none';
        const vs = $('vizSelect'); if (vs) vs.value = 'none';
        visualType = 'none';
      }
    } catch {  }

    const stage = $('stage');

    if (vizRAF) { cancelAnimationFrame(vizRAF); vizRAF = null; }
    if (highwayRAF) { cancelAnimationFrame(highwayRAF); highwayRAF = null; }
    if (stageResizeObs) { stageResizeObs.disconnect(); stageResizeObs = null; }
    if (neuralBloomRenderer && neuralBloomRenderer.mode) neuralBloomRenderer.stop();
    Array.from(stage.children).forEach(c => {
      if (!c.classList.contains('fixation-dot') && !c.classList.contains('audio-indicator')
        && !c.classList.contains('persona-indicator') && !c.classList.contains('method-indicator')
        && !c.classList.contains('session-progress-wrap')
        && !c.classList.contains('personal-symbol-overlay')) c.remove();
    });

    if (visualType === 'neural-bloom') {
      neuralBloomRenderer.start(stage);
      return;
    }

    const renderer = VIZ_RENDERERS[visualType];
    if (renderer) {
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.className = 'highway-canvas';
      canvas.width = stage.clientWidth; canvas.height = stage.clientHeight;
      stage.insertBefore(canvas, stage.firstChild);
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

      const accentFallback = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim() || '#6b94b8';

      stageResizeObs = new ResizeObserver(() => { canvas.width = stage.clientWidth; canvas.height = stage.clientHeight; });
      stageResizeObs.observe(stage);
      (function draw(ts) {

        if (state.abortFlag || !canvas.isConnected) return;
        const speed = (PHASE_VIZ_SPEED[state._currentPhase] || 1.0) * (state.vizSettings.speed || 1.0);
        const color = state.vizColor || accentFallback;
        renderer(ctx, canvas.width, canvas.height, (ts/1000)*speed, color);
        vizRAF = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
      })(0);
      return;
    }

    if (visualType === 'highway') {
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.className = 'highway-canvas';
      canvas.width = stage.clientWidth; canvas.height = stage.clientHeight;
      stage.insertBefore(canvas, stage.firstChild);
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

      stageResizeObs = new ResizeObserver(() => { canvas.width = stage.clientWidth; canvas.height = stage.clientHeight; });
      stageResizeObs.observe(stage);
      const lines = []; for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) lines.push({ y: (canvas.height / 8) * i, speed: 1.2 + Math.random() * 0.4 });
      (function draw() {

        if (state.abortFlag || !canvas.isConnected) return;
        const mod = getAudioMod();
        const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.18)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(212,220,232,0.55)'; ctx.lineWidth = 4 + mod.bass * 2.4;

        const speedMul = 1 + mod.overall * 0.6;
        lines.forEach(l => { l.y += l.speed * speedMul; if (l.y > H + 40) l.y = -40; ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(1,(l.y/H)*1.2)*0.7; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(W/2, l.y); ctx.lineTo(W/2, l.y+28); ctx.stroke(); });
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
        const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H*0.38, 20, W/2, H*0.38, H*0.5); g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)');
        ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
        highwayRAF = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
      })();
    } else if (visualType === 'spiral') {
      const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','svg');
      svg.setAttribute('class','spiral-svg'); svg.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 100 100');
      let d = 'M 50 50 ';
      for (let t=0;t<30;t+=0.1) { const r=0.5*t; d += `L ${(50+r*Math.cos(t)).toFixed(2)} ${(50+r*Math.sin(t)).toFixed(2)} `; }
      const p = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');

      const spiralColor = state.vizColor || '#6b94b8';
      const sr = parseInt(spiralColor.slice(1,3),16) || 107;
      const sg = parseInt(spiralColor.slice(3,5),16) || 148;
      const sb = parseInt(spiralColor.slice(5,7),16) || 184;
      p.setAttribute('d',d); p.setAttribute('stroke',`rgba(${sr},${sg},${sb},0.4)`); p.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.4'); p.setAttribute('fill','none');
      svg.appendChild(p); stage.insertBefore(svg, stage.firstChild);
    } else {

      const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className = 'pulse-rings';
      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { const r = document.createElement('div'); r.className = 'pulse-ring'; wrap.appendChild(r); }
      stage.insertBefore(wrap, stage.firstChild);
    }
  }
  const stopVisuals = () => {
    if (highwayRAF) cancelAnimationFrame(highwayRAF); highwayRAF = null;
    if (vizRAF) cancelAnimationFrame(vizRAF); vizRAF = null;
    if (stageResizeObs) { stageResizeObs.disconnect(); stageResizeObs = null; }
    if (neuralBloomRenderer && neuralBloomRenderer.mode) neuralBloomRenderer.stop();
  };

  function openImportLoreModal() {
    const m = $('importLoreModal');
    if (!m) return;

    const fields = ['importLoreUrl', 'importLoreText', 'importLoreName', 'importLoreTagline'];
    fields.forEach(id => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = ''; });
    const cat = $('importLoreCategory'); if (cat) cat.value = 'contemplative';
    const status = $('importLoreFetchStatus'); if (status) { status.textContent = ''; status.style.color = ''; }
    const count = $('importLoreCharCount'); if (count) count.textContent = '0 chars';
    m.classList.add('visible');
    setTimeout(() => $('importLoreUrl')?.focus(), 60);
  }

  function closeImportLoreModal() {
    const m = $('importLoreModal');
    if (m) m.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  async function fetchLoreUrl() {
    const url = ($('importLoreUrl')?.value || '').trim();
    const status = $('importLoreFetchStatus');
    const text = $('importLoreText');
    const count = $('importLoreCharCount');
    if (!url) {
      if (status) { status.textContent = 'enter a URL first, or paste the text below.'; status.style.color = 'var(--neon-magenta)'; }
      return;
    }
    if (status) { status.textContent = 'fetching…'; status.style.color = 'var(--text-dim)'; }
    try {

      const resp = await fetch(url, { mode: 'cors', redirect: 'follow' });
      if (!resp.ok) {
        if (status) { status.textContent = `✗ HTTP ${resp.status} — server returned an error.`; status.style.color = 'var(--neon-magenta)'; }
        return;
      }
      const body = await resp.text();
      const trimmed = (body || '').trim();
      if (!trimmed) {
        if (status) { status.textContent = '✗ URL returned empty response.'; status.style.color = 'var(--neon-magenta)'; }
        return;
      }

      const capped = trimmed.length > 8000 ? trimmed.slice(0, 8000) : trimmed;
      if (text) text.value = capped;
      if (count) count.textContent = `${capped.length} chars` + (trimmed.length > 8000 ? ' (truncated to 8000)' : '');
      if (status) { status.textContent = `✓ loaded ${capped.length.toLocaleString()} chars` + (trimmed.length > 8000 ? ' — truncated to 8000' : ''); status.style.color = 'var(--accent-green)'; }

      const nameField = $('importLoreName');
      if (nameField && !nameField.value.trim()) {
        try {
          const u = new URL(url);
          const last = u.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean).pop() || u.hostname;

          const cleaned = last.replace(/\.(txt|md|html?)$/i, '').replace(/[-_]+/g, ' ').trim();
          if (cleaned) nameField.value = cleaned.replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()).slice(0, 40);
        } catch {  }
      }
    } catch (e) {

      if (status) {
        status.textContent = '✗ fetch blocked (likely CORS) — paste the text below instead.';
        status.style.color = 'var(--neon-magenta)';
      }
    }
  }

  function saveImportedLore() {
    const text = ($('importLoreText')?.value || '').trim();
    const name = ($('importLoreName')?.value || '').trim();
    const tagline = ($('importLoreTagline')?.value || '').trim();
    const category = ($('importLoreCategory')?.value || 'contemplative').trim();
    if (text.length < 50) {
      notify.error('Lore is too short — at least 50 characters.');
      return;
    }
    if (!name) {
      notify.error('Give the persona a name.');
      $('importLoreName')?.focus();
      return;
    }
    const id = 'custom_' + Date.now();
    const persona = normalizePersona({
      id,
      name: name.slice(0, 40),
      tagline: (tagline || '(imported)').slice(0, 80),
      roleInstruction: text.slice(0, 8000),
      category,
      isCustom: true,
    });
    const custom = loadCustomPersonas();
    custom.push(persona);
    if (!saveCustomPersonas(custom)) {
      notify.error('Could not save: browser storage may be full.');
      return;
    }
    state.selectedPersonaId = id;
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.CUSTOM_PERSONA);
    refreshPersonas();
    renderPersonaGrid();
    renderPersonaDetail();
    closeImportLoreModal();
    notify.success(`Imported "${persona.name}" — ${text.length.toLocaleString()} chars`);
  }

  $('importLoreFetchBtn')?.addEventListener('click', fetchLoreUrl);
  $('importLoreSaveBtn')?.addEventListener('click', saveImportedLore);
  $('importLoreCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportLoreModal);
  $('importLoreModal')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {

    if (e.target.id === 'importLoreModal') closeImportLoreModal();
  });
  $('importLoreText')?.addEventListener('input', () => {
    const text = $('importLoreText')?.value || '';
    const count = $('importLoreCharCount');
    if (count) count.textContent = `${text.length} chars`;
  });
  $('importLoreUrl')?.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {

    if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); fetchLoreUrl(); }
  });

  let _gbCurrentSpec = {};
  let _gbStepStatus  = {};
  let _gbStepError   = {};
  let _gbToken       = 0;
  let _gbInputContext = null;

  const GB_STEPS = ['identity', 'voice', 'reminder', 'imageAccents'];
  const GB_STEP_LABELS = {
    identity:     'Identity',
    voice:        'Voice instruction',
    reminder:     'Reminder anchor',
    imageAccents: 'Image accents',
  };
  const GB_STEP_ICONS = {
    pending: '○', running: '◐', done: '●', failed: '⚠',
  };

  const GUIDE_BUILDER_DEPTH_HINTS = {
    minimal:  '2-3 sentences. No vocabulary palette listing — just the core voice.',
    standard: '4-6 sentences with concrete vocabulary cues and 1-2 things to avoid.',
    rich:     '7-10 sentences — vocabulary palette, signature phrases, cadence notes, things to avoid, mood anchor.',
  };

  function gbParseSections(text) {
    const out = {};
    if (!text) return out;
    const re = /\[([A-Z_]+)\]\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*\[[A-Z_]+\]|\s*$)/g;
    let m;
    while ((m = re.exec(text)) !== null) {
      out[m[1]] = (m[2] || '').trim();
    }
    return out;
  }

  function gbValidateCategory(s) {
    const valid = new Set(['contemplative', 'authoritarian', 'showman', 'somatic']);
    const c = (s || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '');
    return valid.has(c) ? c : null;
  }

  function buildIdentityInstruction(idea, categoryPref) {
    const catDirective = categoryPref === 'auto'
      ? `Choose the CATEGORY that best fits the idea. Options:
  - contemplative: quiet, mystical, archetypal, slow cadence
  - authoritarian: direct, commanding, declarative, no questions
  - showman: theatrical, performative, dramatic, varied cadence
  - somatic: body-focused, sensory, references weight/breath/texture`
      : `The user has chosen CATEGORY: ${categoryPref}. Use this exact value.`;
    return `ROLE: hypnosis-guide persona designer.
ACTION: Given the user's idea, decide on the guide's NAME, CATEGORY, and TAGLINE.
RULES:
- NAME: a single distinctive name. First name only is fine, or first + role title (e.g. "Mara", "Teacher Yoshi", "The Cartographer"). Max 60 chars.
- ${catDirective}
- TAGLINE: a short evocative phrase that captures the vibe — fits as a sub-card label. Max 80 chars. No quotes around it.
OUTPUT FORMAT — exactly these section markers, nothing else:
[NAME]
<single line, just the name>
[CATEGORY]
<one word: contemplative | authoritarian | showman | somatic>
[TAGLINE]
<single line>
[END]
USER IDEA:
${idea}`;
  }

  function buildVoiceInstruction(idea, name, category, tagline, depth) {
    const depthHint = GUIDE_BUILDER_DEPTH_HINTS[depth] || GUIDE_BUILDER_DEPTH_HINTS.standard;
    return `ROLE: hypnosis-guide voice designer.
ACTION: Write the VOICE INSTRUCTION for this guide — the prompt that tells the future AI narrator HOW to speak as this persona.

PERSONA CONTEXT:
  Name: ${name}
  Category: ${category}
  Tagline: ${tagline}

VOICE INSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS:
- Write in second person ("You ARE X. You speak in Y."). It's an instruction TO the future AI narrator.
- Include: vocabulary palette, cadence/rhythm, signature phrases or move types, what TO reference, what to AVOID.
- Flowing prose, no markdown, no numbered lists, no bullet points.
- Length target: ${depthHint}
- Vivid, specific, distinctive. Generic guides are forgettable.
- Match the category archetype:
  - contemplative: quiet, slow, archetypal, references presence/breath/silence
  - authoritarian: declarative, commanding, brief sentences, no questions
  - showman: theatrical, dramatic, varied cadence, deliberate flourishes
  - somatic: body-focused, weight/breath/temperature/texture references

OUTPUT: ONLY the voice instruction text. No section markers. No preamble. No labels. No quotes around it.

USER IDEA (for context):
${idea}`;
  }

  function buildReminderInstruction(voice) {
    return `ROLE: hypnosis-guide voice editor.
ACTION: Distill this VOICE INSTRUCTION into a short REMINDER (1-2 sentences) that captures its single most distinctive constraint. The reminder will be appended to phase prompts mid-script to anchor the AI's voice across long generations.
RULES:
- 1-2 sentences max
- Pick the constraint most likely to drift if not reminded (a vocabulary rule, a cadence rule, an avoid rule)
- Phrase as an instruction (e.g. "Remember: never use questions. Speak only in declaratives.")
OUTPUT: ONLY the reminder text. No preamble. No quotes.

VOICE INSTRUCTION:
${voice}`;
  }

  function buildImageAccentsInstruction(name, category, voice) {

    const voiceShort = (voice || '').slice(0, 600);
    return `ROLE: image prompt designer for a hypnosis app.
ACTION: Design IMAGE_PREFIX (2-6 keywords prepended to portrait/background image prompts — lighting, palette, mood) and IMAGE_SUFFIX (2-6 keywords appended — style anchor) that visually match this guide.

PERSONA CONTEXT:
  Name: ${name}
  Category: ${category}
  Voice excerpt: ${voiceShort}

GUIDELINES:
- PREFIX: atmospheric — lighting type, color palette, time of day, mood word. Examples: "soft watercolor, dawn light", "candlelit interior, warm amber", "blue hour mist, hushed".
- SUFFIX: stylistic anchor — medium and rendering quality. Examples: "fine art illustration, no text", "cinematic film still, 35mm grain", "loose ink wash, painterly".
- Keep each line under 100 chars. No quotes.

OUTPUT FORMAT — exactly these section markers:
[IMAGE_PREFIX]
<keywords>
[IMAGE_SUFFIX]
<keywords>
[END]`;
  }

  function gbRenderStepRows() {
    const list = $('gbStepList');
    if (!list) return;
    list.innerHTML = GB_STEPS.map(step => {
      const status = _gbStepStatus[step] || 'pending';
      const icon = GB_STEP_ICONS[status] || '○';
      const label = GB_STEP_LABELS[step] || step;

      const regenVisible = status !== 'pending';
      const regenDisabled = status === 'running';
      return `
        <div class="gb-step is-${status}" data-step="${step}">
          <div class="gb-step-head">
            <span class="gb-step-icon">${icon}</span>
            <span class="gb-step-label">${label}</span>
            <div class="gb-step-actions">
              <button type="button" class="gb-step-regen" data-regen="${step}"
                      ${regenVisible ? '' : 'style="display:none"'}
                      ${regenDisabled ? 'disabled' : ''}
                      title="Regenerate just this step">↻</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="gb-step-content" data-content="${step}"></div>
        </div>
      `;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('[data-regen]').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const step = btn.getAttribute('data-regen');
        gbRunStep(step,  true);
      });
    });

    GB_STEPS.forEach(step => gbRenderStepContent(step));
  }

  function gbSetStepStatus(step, status, errMsg) {
    _gbStepStatus[step] = status;
    if (errMsg) _gbStepError[step] = errMsg;
    else delete _gbStepError[step];
    const row = document.querySelector(`#gbStepList .gb-step[data-step="${step}"]`);
    if (row) {
      row.className = `gb-step is-${status}`;
      const iconEl = row.querySelector('.gb-step-icon');
      if (iconEl) iconEl.textContent = GB_STEP_ICONS[status] || '○';
      const regen = row.querySelector('.gb-step-regen');
      if (regen) {
        regen.style.display = status === 'pending' ? 'none' : '';
        regen.disabled = status === 'running';
      }
    }
    gbUpdateSaveButton();
  }

  function gbRenderStepContent(step, liveText) {
    const el = document.querySelector(`#gbStepList [data-content="${step}"]`);
    if (!el) return;

    if (liveText != null) {
      el.textContent = liveText;
      return;
    }
    if (_gbStepStatus[step] === 'failed') {
      el.textContent = _gbStepError[step] || 'failed — tap ↻ to retry';
      return;
    }
    if (step === 'identity') {
      const parts = [];
      if (_gbCurrentSpec.name) parts.push(_gbCurrentSpec.name);
      if (_gbCurrentSpec.category) parts.push(`(${_gbCurrentSpec.category})`);
      const t = _gbCurrentSpec.tagline ? `\n"${_gbCurrentSpec.tagline}"` : '';
      el.textContent = parts.length ? parts.join(' · ') + t : '';
    } else if (step === 'voice') {
      el.textContent = _gbCurrentSpec.voice || '';
    } else if (step === 'reminder') {
      el.textContent = _gbCurrentSpec.reminder || '';
    } else if (step === 'imageAccents') {
      const lines = [];
      if (_gbCurrentSpec.imagePrefix) lines.push(`prefix · ${_gbCurrentSpec.imagePrefix}`);
      if (_gbCurrentSpec.imageSuffix) lines.push(`suffix · ${_gbCurrentSpec.imageSuffix}`);
      el.textContent = lines.join('\n');
    }
  }

  function gbUpdateSaveButton() {
    const btn = $('gbSaveBtn');
    if (!btn) return;

    const ready = _gbStepStatus.identity === 'done' && _gbStepStatus.voice === 'done';
    btn.disabled = !ready;
    btn.title = ready ? 'Save this guide and select it' : 'Identity and Voice must complete before saving';
  }

  async function gbStepIdentity(idea, categoryPref) {
    gbSetStepStatus('identity', 'running');
    const tokenAtStart = _gbToken;
    let acc = '';
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(buildIdentityInstruction(idea, categoryPref), {
        source: 'guide-builder-identity',
        maxTokens: 200,
        onChunk: (data) => {
          if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) throw new Error('cancelled');
          acc += data.textChunk || '';
          gbRenderStepContent('identity', acc);
        },
      });
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      const text = (acc || result?.generatedText || '').trim();
      const parsed = gbParseSections(text);
      if (!parsed.NAME) {
        gbSetStepStatus('identity', 'failed', 'no NAME in response');
        return false;
      }
      _gbCurrentSpec.name = parsed.NAME.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '').slice(0, 60);
      _gbCurrentSpec.category = gbValidateCategory(parsed.CATEGORY)
        || (categoryPref !== 'auto' ? categoryPref : 'contemplative');
      _gbCurrentSpec.tagline = (parsed.TAGLINE || '').replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '').slice(0, 100);
      gbSetStepStatus('identity', 'done');
      gbRenderStepContent('identity');
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      if (e?.message === 'cancelled' || tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      gbSetStepStatus('identity', 'failed', e?.message || 'failed');
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function gbStepVoice(idea, depth) {
    if (!_gbCurrentSpec.name) {
      gbSetStepStatus('voice', 'failed', 'identity step must complete first');
      return false;
    }
    gbSetStepStatus('voice', 'running');
    const tokenAtStart = _gbToken;
    let acc = '';
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(buildVoiceInstruction(idea, _gbCurrentSpec.name, _gbCurrentSpec.category, _gbCurrentSpec.tagline, depth), {
        source: 'guide-builder-voice',
        maxTokens: depth === 'rich' ? 800 : depth === 'minimal' ? 250 : 500,
        onChunk: (data) => {
          if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) throw new Error('cancelled');
          acc += data.textChunk || '';
          gbRenderStepContent('voice', acc);
        },
      });
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      const text = (acc || result?.generatedText || '').trim();
      if (!text || text.length < 30) {
        gbSetStepStatus('voice', 'failed', 'response too short — retry');
        return false;
      }

      const cleaned = text.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
      _gbCurrentSpec.voice = cleaned;
      gbSetStepStatus('voice', 'done');
      gbRenderStepContent('voice');
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      if (e?.message === 'cancelled' || tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      gbSetStepStatus('voice', 'failed', e?.message || 'failed');
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function gbStepReminder() {
    if (!_gbCurrentSpec.voice) {
      gbSetStepStatus('reminder', 'failed', 'voice step must complete first');
      return false;
    }
    gbSetStepStatus('reminder', 'running');
    const tokenAtStart = _gbToken;
    let acc = '';
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(buildReminderInstruction(_gbCurrentSpec.voice), {
        source: 'guide-builder-reminder',
        maxTokens: 200,
        onChunk: (data) => {
          if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) throw new Error('cancelled');
          acc += data.textChunk || '';
          gbRenderStepContent('reminder', acc);
        },
      });
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      const text = (acc || result?.generatedText || '').trim().replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
      _gbCurrentSpec.reminder = text.slice(0, 500);
      gbSetStepStatus('reminder', 'done');
      gbRenderStepContent('reminder');
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      if (e?.message === 'cancelled' || tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      gbSetStepStatus('reminder', 'failed', e?.message || 'failed');
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function gbStepImageAccents() {
    if (!_gbCurrentSpec.name || !_gbCurrentSpec.voice) {
      gbSetStepStatus('imageAccents', 'failed', 'identity + voice must complete first');
      return false;
    }
    gbSetStepStatus('imageAccents', 'running');
    const tokenAtStart = _gbToken;
    let acc = '';
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(buildImageAccentsInstruction(_gbCurrentSpec.name, _gbCurrentSpec.category, _gbCurrentSpec.voice), {
        source: 'guide-builder-image-accents',
        maxTokens: 250,
        onChunk: (data) => {
          if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) throw new Error('cancelled');
          acc += data.textChunk || '';
          gbRenderStepContent('imageAccents', acc);
        },
      });
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      const text = (acc || result?.generatedText || '').trim();
      const parsed = gbParseSections(text);
      _gbCurrentSpec.imagePrefix = (parsed.IMAGE_PREFIX || '').slice(0, 200);
      _gbCurrentSpec.imageSuffix = (parsed.IMAGE_SUFFIX || '').slice(0, 200);
      if (!_gbCurrentSpec.imagePrefix && !_gbCurrentSpec.imageSuffix) {
        gbSetStepStatus('imageAccents', 'failed', 'no parseable accents in response');
        return false;
      }
      gbSetStepStatus('imageAccents', 'done');
      gbRenderStepContent('imageAccents');
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      if (e?.message === 'cancelled' || tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return false;
      gbSetStepStatus('imageAccents', 'failed', e?.message || 'failed');
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function gbRunStep(step, isRegen) {
    if (!_gbInputContext) return;
    const { idea, categoryPref, depth } = _gbInputContext;
    if (isRegen) {

      if (step === 'identity') {
        _gbCurrentSpec.name = ''; _gbCurrentSpec.category = ''; _gbCurrentSpec.tagline = '';
      } else if (step === 'voice') {
        _gbCurrentSpec.voice = '';
      } else if (step === 'reminder') {
        _gbCurrentSpec.reminder = '';
      } else if (step === 'imageAccents') {
        _gbCurrentSpec.imagePrefix = ''; _gbCurrentSpec.imageSuffix = '';
      }
      gbRenderStepContent(step, '');
    }
    if (step === 'identity') {
      const ok = await gbStepIdentity(idea, categoryPref);

      if (ok && isRegen) {

        await gbStepVoice(idea, depth);
        await gbStepReminder();
        await gbStepImageAccents();
      }
    } else if (step === 'voice') {
      const ok = await gbStepVoice(idea, depth);
      if (ok && isRegen) {

        await gbStepReminder();

        await gbStepImageAccents();
      }
    } else if (step === 'reminder') {
      await gbStepReminder();
    } else if (step === 'imageAccents') {
      await gbStepImageAccents();
    }
  }

  async function gbRunAll() {
    if (!_gbInputContext) return;
    const { idea, categoryPref, depth } = _gbInputContext;
    const status = $('gbPreviewStatus');
    if (status) {
      status.textContent = 'Building your guide — 4 focused calls. You can save once Identity + Voice complete.';
      status.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
    }

    _gbCurrentSpec = {};
    _gbStepStatus  = { identity: 'pending', voice: 'pending', reminder: 'pending', imageAccents: 'pending' };
    _gbStepError   = {};
    gbRenderStepRows();
    gbUpdateSaveButton();

    const tokenAtStart = _gbToken;
    if (!await gbStepIdentity(idea, categoryPref)) {
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;
      if (status) {
        status.textContent = 'Identity step failed. Tap ↻ on that row to retry, or edit your idea.';
        status.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      }
      return;
    }
    if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;
    if (!await gbStepVoice(idea, depth)) {
      if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;
      if (status) {
        status.textContent = 'Voice step failed. Tap ↻ to retry. (Identity is saved — you can also save without voice if you want a placeholder.)';
        status.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      }
      return;
    }
    if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;

    await gbStepReminder();
    if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;
    await gbStepImageAccents();
    if (tokenAtStart !== _gbToken) return;
    if (status) {
      const failedCount = Object.values(_gbStepStatus).filter(s => s === 'failed').length;
      if (failedCount === 0) {
        status.textContent = '✓ Ready — review each step and save. Use ↻ on any row to regenerate just that piece.';
        status.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
      } else {
        status.textContent = `✓ Core guide ready (${failedCount} optional step${failedCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} failed — you can save anyway or retry).`;
        status.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
      }
    }
  }

  function openGuideBuilder() {
    const modal = $('guideBuilderModal');
    if (!modal) return;
    modal.classList.add('visible');
    $('gbStageInput').style.display = '';
    $('gbStagePreview').style.display = 'none';
    $('gbInputStatus').textContent = '';
    _gbCurrentSpec = {};
    _gbStepStatus = {};
    _gbStepError = {};
    _gbInputContext = null;
    setTimeout(() => $('gbIdeaInput')?.focus(), 50);
  }

  function closeGuideBuilder() {
    _gbToken++;
    $('guideBuilderModal')?.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  function gbStartFromInput() {
    const idea = ($('gbIdeaInput')?.value || '').trim();
    const categoryPref = $('gbCategorySelect')?.value || 'auto';
    const depth = $('gbDepthSelect')?.value || 'standard';
    const status = $('gbInputStatus');
    if (!idea) {
      if (status) {
        status.textContent = 'Type a few words about the kind of guide you want.';
        status.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      }
      $('gbIdeaInput')?.focus();
      return;
    }

    _gbToken++;
    _gbInputContext = { idea, categoryPref, depth };
    $('gbStageInput').style.display = 'none';
    $('gbStagePreview').style.display = '';
    gbRunAll();
  }

  function gbSaveSpec() {
    const spec = _gbCurrentSpec;
    if (!spec?.name || !spec?.voice) {
      notify.warn('Need at least Identity and Voice complete before saving.');
      return;
    }
    const id = 'custom_gb_' + Date.now();
    const persona = normalizePersona({
      id,
      name: spec.name,
      tagline: spec.tagline || '(custom — built)',
      roleInstruction: spec.voice,
      category: spec.category || 'contemplative',
      reminderMessage: spec.reminder || '',
      imagePromptPrefix: spec.imagePrefix || '',
      imagePromptSuffix: spec.imageSuffix || '',
    });
    const custom = loadCustomPersonas();
    custom.push(persona);
    if (!saveCustomPersonas(custom)) {
      notify.error('Could not save: browser storage may be full.');
      return;
    }
    state.selectedPersonaId = id;
    markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.CUSTOM_PERSONA);
    refreshPersonas();
    renderPersonaGrid();
    renderPersonaDetail();
    closeGuideBuilder();
    notify.success(`Saved "${spec.name}" — selected as your guide for this session.`);
  }

  $('openGuideBuilderBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openGuideBuilder);
  $('gbGenerateBtn')?.addEventListener('click', gbStartFromInput);
  $('gbCancelBtn1')?.addEventListener('click', closeGuideBuilder);
  $('gbCancelBtn2')?.addEventListener('click', closeGuideBuilder);
  $('gbBackBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    _gbToken++;
    $('gbStageInput').style.display = '';
    $('gbStagePreview').style.display = 'none';
  });
  $('gbRegenBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    _gbToken++;
    gbRunAll();
  });
  $('gbSaveBtn')?.addEventListener('click', gbSaveSpec);
  $('guideBuilderModal')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'guideBuilderModal') closeGuideBuilder();
  });
  $('gbIdeaInput')?.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'Enter') {
      e.preventDefault();
      gbStartFromInput();
    }
  });

  function openPersonaEditor(id) {
    state.editingPersonaId = id;
    $('personaModalTitle').textContent = id ? 'edit persona' : 'create custom persona';
    if (id) {
      const p = state.personas.find(x => x.id === id);
      $('personaFormName').value = p.name;
      $('personaFormTagline').value = p.tagline;
      $('personaFormPrompt').value = getPersonaRole(p);
      $('personaFormCategory').value = p.category || 'contemplative';

      $('personaFormReminder').value         = p.reminderMessage   || '';
      $('personaFormImagePrefix').value      = p.imagePromptPrefix || '';
      $('personaFormImageSuffix').value      = p.imagePromptSuffix || '';
      $('personaFormMetaTitle').value        = p.metaTitle         || '';
      $('personaFormMetaDescription').value  = p.metaDescription   || '';
      $('personaFormRecommendedRate').value  = p.recommendedSpeechRate ?? '';
      $('personaFormRecommendedVisual').value = p.recommendedVisual    || '';
      $('personaFormRecommendedSound').value  = p.recommendedSoundscape || '';
    } else {
      $('personaFormName').value = '';
      $('personaFormTagline').value = '';
      $('personaFormPrompt').value = '';
      $('personaFormCategory').value = 'contemplative';

      ['personaFormReminder','personaFormImagePrefix','personaFormImageSuffix',
       'personaFormMetaTitle','personaFormMetaDescription','personaFormRecommendedRate',
       'personaFormRecommendedVisual','personaFormRecommendedSound'].forEach(id => {
        const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = '';
      });
    }
    $('personaModal').classList.add('visible');
  }
  const closePersonaEditor = () => { $('personaModal').classList.remove('visible'); state.editingPersonaId = null; };
  function savePersonaFromForm() {
    const name = $('personaFormName').value.trim();
    const tagline = $('personaFormTagline').value.trim();
    const role = $('personaFormPrompt').value.trim();
    const category = $('personaFormCategory').value || 'contemplative';
    if (!name || !role) { notify.warn('Name and voice instruction required.'); return; }

    const rateRaw = parseFloat($('personaFormRecommendedRate').value);
    const v2Fields = {
      reminderMessage:       ($('personaFormReminder').value          || '').trim().slice(0, 500),
      imagePromptPrefix:     ($('personaFormImagePrefix').value       || '').trim().slice(0, 200),
      imagePromptSuffix:     ($('personaFormImageSuffix').value       || '').trim().slice(0, 200),
      metaTitle:             ($('personaFormMetaTitle').value         || '').trim().slice(0, 100),
      metaDescription:       ($('personaFormMetaDescription').value   || '').trim().slice(0, 200),
      recommendedSpeechRate: Number.isFinite(rateRaw) ? Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, rateRaw)) : null,
      recommendedVisual:     ($('personaFormRecommendedVisual').value || '').trim().slice(0, 40) || null,
      recommendedSoundscape: ($('personaFormRecommendedSound').value  || '').trim().slice(0, 40) || null,
    };

    let custom = loadCustomPersonas();
    if (state.editingPersonaId) {

      custom = custom.map(p => p.id === state.editingPersonaId
        ? normalizePersona({ ...p, name, tagline, roleInstruction: role, category, ...v2Fields })
        : p);
    } else {

      const id = 'custom_' + Date.now();
      custom.push(normalizePersona({ id, name, tagline: tagline || '(custom)', roleInstruction: role, category, ...v2Fields }));
      state.selectedPersonaId = id;
      markFeatureUsed(FEAT.CUSTOM_PERSONA);
    }
    if (!saveCustomPersonas(custom)) { notify.error('Could not save: browser storage may be full.'); return; }
    refreshPersonas(); renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); closePersonaEditor();
  }
  async function deletePersona(id) {
    if (!await confirmAsync('Delete this persona?')) return;
    saveCustomPersonas(loadCustomPersonas().filter(p => p.id !== id));
    if (state.selectedPersonaId === id) state.selectedPersonaId = 'driver';

    personaPortraitDelete(id).catch(() => {});
    refreshPersonas(); renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail();
  }

  let _aiInProgress = false;

  async function craftSuggestion() {
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('An AI call is already in progress.'); return; }

    const rough = resolveTokens($('intentionInput').value.trim());
    const skipTypes = ['trance', 'sleep'];
    if (!rough && !skipTypes.includes(state.intentionType)) { notify.warn('Describe what you want first.'); return; }
    const type = INTENTION_TYPES[state.intentionType];
    if (!type) { notify.warn('Select an intention type first.'); return; }
    _aiInProgress = true;
    const progressLabel = $('craftProgressLabel');
    setLoading('craftBtn', true);
    setLoading('recraftBtn', true);
    $('craftProgress').classList.add('visible');
    progressLabel.textContent = 'crafting your suggestion — about 2–3 minutes...';
    const stopTimer = makeElapsedTimer(s => { progressLabel.textContent = `crafting... ${s}s elapsed`; });

    const headerBlock = `You are a master hypnotherapist converting a user's rough intention into a technically-precise, RICH hypnotic suggestion package.

TYPE: ${type.label}
USER'S ROUGH DESCRIPTION: "${rough}"

UNIVERSAL RULES:
• Second person ("you")
• Presupposition ("you'll notice" not "you will feel") [For convincer/novelty: direct present-tense fine]
• Somatic anchoring (tie states to physical sensations)
• Automaticity ("automatically", "without effort")
• Progressive intensification
• Future-pacing ("from now on")
• Positive construction only
• Specificity — concrete, sensory, embodied

DEPTH MANDATE: Do NOT be parsimonious. Produce SUBSTANTIVE output. Each field is used downstream to generate a multi-phase session script — sparse output produces sparse, repetitive sessions.

TYPE-SPECIFIC GUIDANCE:
${type.guidance}`;
    const profileBlock = getProfileContext();
    const schemaBlock = `
Output EXACTLY this JSON, no other text, no markdown fences:
{
  "craftedSuggestion": "Complete hypnotic suggestion, 6-9 sentences, ready to deliver verbatim. Second person. Build progressively — opening, deepening, embedding, reinforcing.",
  "trigger": "Specific trigger phrase, or 'ongoing state'",
  "coreResponse": "Specific response/effect, 3-7 words",
  "reinforcementPhrases": ["6 to 8 short variants — 5 to 12 words each. Different angles on the same suggestion: somatic, cognitive, behavioral, future-paced, embedded-command, dissociative."],
  "somaticAnchors": ["4 to 6 specific body sensations + locations the suggestion ties to. e.g. 'warmth in the solar plexus', 'lightness across the brow', 'release at the jaw hinge'. Used by work-phase generation for embodiment."],
  "counterIntuitive": ["2 to 3 OPTIONAL paradoxical reframes (Ericksonian hooks). Empty array if not appropriate to the intention."],
  "explanation": "ONE sentence on the technique used"
}`;
    const instruction = trimToTokenBudget([
      { name: 'header',   text: headerBlock,  priority: 5 },
      { name: 'profile',  text: profileBlock, priority: 2 },
      { name: 'schema',   text: schemaBlock,  priority: 5 },
    ], 900);

    try {
      try { logAICall('perchance', 'craft-suggestion', instruction); } catch {}
      const data = await root.aiTextPlugin({ instruction, startWith: '{', stopSequences: ['\n\n\n', '\n\n[[', '\n[['], hideStartWith: true });

      if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') throw new Error('AI generation encountered an error.');
      let text = (data.generatedText || '').trim();
      if (!text) throw new Error('AI returned empty text — please try again.');
      if (!text.startsWith('{')) text = '{' + text;
      const lb = text.lastIndexOf('}'); if (lb > -1) text = text.substring(0, lb + 1);
      state.craftedSuggestion = JSON.parse(text);
      showCrafted();
      updateStepUI();
      notify.success('Suggestion crafted successfully.');
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); notify.warn('Crafting failed: ' + e.message + '. Try again.'); }
    finally {
      _aiInProgress = false;
      stopTimer();
      setLoading('craftBtn', false, 'craft hypnotic suggestion →');
      setLoading('recraftBtn', false);
      $('craftProgress').classList.remove('visible');
    }
  }

  async function generateAffirmationsFromProfile() {
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('An AI call is already in progress.'); return; }
    if (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false) {
      notify.warn('Enable Smart Director (Settings) to use profile-driven generation.');
      return;
    }
    const textarea = $('userAffirmations');
    if (!textarea) return;
    const existing = textarea.value.trim();
    if (existing) {
      const ok = await confirmAsync('Replace your existing affirmations with AI-drafted ones?');
      if (!ok) return;
    }

    _aiInProgress = true;
    const btn = $('generateAffirmationsBtn');
    const label = $('generateAffirmationsBtnLabel');
    const hint = $('generateAffirmationsHint');
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
    if (label) label.textContent = '⏳ drafting…';
    if (hint) hint.textContent = '';
    const stopTimer = makeElapsedTimer(s => { if (label) label.textContent = `⏳ drafting… ${s}s`; });

    try {

      const persona = getPersona();
      const method = getMethod();
      const intention = resolveTokens($('intentionInput')?.value?.trim() || '');
      const intentionType = INTENTION_TYPES[state.intentionType] || INTENTION_TYPES.emotional;
      const profileBlock = getProfileContext();

      const personaRole = getPersonaRole(persona);
      const voiceBlock = personaRole
        ? `\n\nPERSONA VOICE — match this completely:\n${personaRole}\n\nThe affirmations MUST sound like ${persona.name} wrote them. Pull from the vocabulary, cadence, and signature phrasing above.`
        : '';

      const headerBlock = `You are ${persona.name}, drafting personal affirmations for the listener's hypnosis session.

The listener did not write their own affirmations and asked you to draft some. Generate 8 to 12 affirmations they will hear during the session, in your voice. More affirmations = less repetition during long sessions, so don't be parsimonious.

INTENTION TYPE: ${intentionType.label}
USER'S INTENTION: "${intention || '(none specified — use the profile and intention type as guidance)'}"
METHOD: ${method.name}`;

      const rulesBlock = `
AFFIRMATION RULES:
• First person, present tense ("I am…", "I notice…", "I allow…")
• Short — 4 to 12 words each
• Positively framed (state what IS, not what isn't)
• Specific to the user's profile and intention — not generic platitudes
• Each line should stand alone as a complete suggestion
• Use the user's pronouns and any specific details from their profile
• Avoid clichés like "I am enough" — be specific to what the user is working on
• VARIETY: Different angles — somatic, cognitive, behavioral, emotional, future-paced, identity-statement, dissociated-from-judgment. Don't repeat the same angle twice.
• CRITICAL: Match the persona voice above. A Commander's affirmations sound like commands. The Inner Voice's affirmations sound like a thought just below words. The Old Master's are short and elemental. Don't write generic affirmations.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
One affirmation per line. No numbering, no bullets, no quotes around lines, no preamble, no commentary. Just the affirmations themselves, separated by newlines. 8 to 12 lines total.`;

      let lowHipRehearsalBlock = '';
      try {
        const susc = Number($('pfSusceptibility')?.value);
        if (Number.isFinite(susc) && susc <= 3) {
          lowHipRehearsalBlock = `

LOW-SUSCEPTIBILITY FRAMING (the listener has scored ${susc}/10 on the HIP brief):
Frame these affirmations as cognitive rehearsal the listener consciously agrees with — NOT as suggestions for the unconscious to absorb.
• Prefer "I am someone who practices ___" / "I notice ___ when I ___" / "When ___ happens, I choose ___" over "I AM ___" identity-claims.
• Action and behavior phrasings beat trait-claim phrasings ("I take a breath before responding" > "I am calm").
• Rehearse SKILLS and CHOICES, not magical state-transformations ("I let the urge pass without acting" > "the urge has no power over me").
• These should pass a skeptic's test — feel true on conscious reflection, not require belief or surrender to "land".`;
        }
      } catch {}

      const instruction = trimToTokenBudget([
        { name: 'header',        text: headerBlock,          priority: 5 },
        { name: 'voice',         text: voiceBlock,           priority: 5 },
        { name: 'profile',       text: profileBlock,         priority: 3 },
        { name: 'rules',         text: rulesBlock,           priority: 5 },
        { name: 'lowHipRehears', text: lowHipRehearsalBlock, priority: 4 },
      ], 900);

      const result = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n\n', '\n---'] });

      if (!result || !result.generatedText) throw new Error(result?._note || 'no text returned');

      const lines = result.generatedText.split('\n')
        .map(l => l.trim())
        .filter(Boolean)

        .map(l => l.replace(/^[-•*\d.)\s]+/, '').replace(/^["'""'']\s*/, '').replace(/\s*["'""'']\s*$/, '').trim())
        .filter(l => l.length >= 3 && l.length <= 200)
        .slice(0, 12);

      if (lines.length === 0) throw new Error('AI output had no usable affirmations');

      const joined = lines.join('\n');

      textarea.value = joined.slice(0, 500);

      diffBouncers.userAffirmations?.ping();

      if (typeof updateStepUI === 'function') updateStepUI();

      saveUserSettings();

      notify.success(`Drafted ${lines.length} affirmation${lines.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} from your profile.`);
      if (hint) hint.textContent = 'You can edit these freely — they\'re just a starting point.';
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[affirmations] generation failed:', e);
      notify.warn('Could not draft affirmations: ' + (e.message || 'unknown error'));
    } finally {
      _aiInProgress = false;
      stopTimer();
      _refreshAffirmationsBtnState();
    }
  }

  function _refreshAffirmationsBtnState() {
    const btn = $('generateAffirmationsBtn');
    const label = $('generateAffirmationsBtnLabel');
    const hint = $('generateAffirmationsHint');
    if (!btn || !label) return;
    const sdOn = state.smartDirectorEnabled !== false;
    const hasContent = !!($('userAffirmations')?.value?.trim());
    btn.disabled = !sdOn || _aiInProgress;
    if (!sdOn) {
      label.textContent = '✨ generate from profile';
      btn.title = 'Smart Director must be enabled (in Settings) to use profile-driven generation';
      if (hint) hint.textContent = 'Smart Director is off — enable it in Settings to use this.';
    } else if (_aiInProgress) {
      btn.title = 'Another AI call is in progress';
    } else {
      label.textContent = hasContent ? '✨ regenerate' : '✨ generate from profile';
      btn.title = hasContent
        ? 'Replace your affirmations with newly drafted ones'
        : 'Drafts a few affirmations from your profile and intention';
      if (hint && hint.textContent.startsWith('Smart Director is off')) hint.textContent = '';
    }
  }

  function showCrafted() {
    const c = state.craftedSuggestion;
    $('craftedText').textContent = c.craftedSuggestion;
    $('craftedText').style.display = 'block';
    $('craftedEditable').style.display = 'none';
    $('saveEditBtn').style.display = 'none';

    const richBits = [`<strong>trigger:</strong> ${escapeHtml(c.trigger || '—')}  ·  <strong>effect:</strong> ${escapeHtml(c.coreResponse || '—')}<br><strong>technique:</strong> ${escapeHtml(c.explanation || '—')}`];
    if (Array.isArray(c.reinforcementPhrases) && c.reinforcementPhrases.length) {
      const items = c.reinforcementPhrases.map(p => `<li style="margin:2px 0">${escapeHtml(p)}</li>`).join('');
      richBits.push(`<div style="margin-top:8px"><strong>reinforcement phrases:</strong><ul style="margin:4px 0 0 18px;padding:0;font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim)">${items}</ul></div>`);
    }
    if (Array.isArray(c.somaticAnchors) && c.somaticAnchors.length) {
      const items = c.somaticAnchors.map(a => escapeHtml(a)).join(' · ');
      richBits.push(`<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.78rem"><strong>somatic anchors:</strong> <span style="color:var(--text-dim)">${items}</span></div>`);
    }
    if (Array.isArray(c.counterIntuitive) && c.counterIntuitive.length) {
      const items = c.counterIntuitive.map(p => `<li style="margin:2px 0">${escapeHtml(p)}</li>`).join('');
      richBits.push(`<details style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.78rem"><summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-faint)">paradoxical / Ericksonian hooks (${c.counterIntuitive.length})</summary><ul style="margin:4px 0 0 18px;padding:0;color:var(--text-dim)">${items}</ul></details>`);
    }
    $('craftedMeta').innerHTML = richBits.join('');
    $('craftedPreview').classList.add('visible');

    _refreshCraftedSymbol(c);
  }
  async function _refreshCraftedSymbol(suggestion) {
    const wrap = $('craftedSymbolWrap');
    const img = $('craftedSymbolImg');
    const btn = $('craftedSymbolBtn');
    if (!wrap || !img || !btn) return;
    if (!suggestion) {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = '🎨 symbol';
      return;
    }
    const hash = _suggestionHash(suggestion);
    const url = await suggestionSymbolGet(hash);
    if (url) {

      const prev = img.src;
      if (prev && prev.startsWith('blob:')) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(prev); } catch {}
      }
      img.src = url;
      wrap.style.display = '';
      btn.textContent = '🎨 regenerate symbol';
    } else {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = '🎨 symbol';
    }
  }
  function hideCrafted() { state.craftedSuggestion = null; $('craftedPreview').classList.remove('visible'); hideScript(); }
  function toggleEditCrafted() {
    const t = $('craftedText'), e = $('craftedEditable'), s = $('saveEditBtn');
    e.value = state.craftedSuggestion.craftedSuggestion;
    t.style.display = 'none'; e.style.display = 'block'; s.style.display = 'inline-block';
  }
  function saveEditCrafted() {
    state.craftedSuggestion.craftedSuggestion = $('craftedEditable').value.trim();
    showCrafted(); hideScript();
  }

  function getWorkBlockCount() {
    if (state.length === 'marathon') return 8;
    if (state.length === 'deep')     return 7;
    if (state.length === 'extended') return 6;
    if (state.length === 'long')     return 5;
    if (state.length === 'medium')   return 2;
    return 1;
  }

  function getPhaseLabel(phaseId) {
    if (!phaseId) return 'Phase';
    const base = phaseId.replace(/-\d+$/, '');
    const idx = phaseId.includes('-') ? phaseId.split('-').pop() : '';
    const labels = {
      introduction: 'Introduction',
      permission: 'Permission',
      settling: 'Settling',
      induction: 'Induction',
      deepener: idx ? `Deepener ${idx}` : 'Deepener',
      level: idx ? `Level ${idx}` : 'Level',
      lightener: idx ? `Lightener ${idx}` : 'Lightener',
      wake: 'Wake',
      reintroduction: 'Reintroduction',
      emergence: 'Emergence',
      work: idx ? `Work ${idx}` : 'Work',
      affirm: idx ? `Affirmation ${idx}` : 'Affirmation',
      sounding: idx ? `Sounding ${idx}` : 'Sounding',
      custom: idx ? `Custom ${idx}` : 'Custom',
      teaching: idx ? `Teaching ${idx}` : 'Teaching',
      training: idx ? `Training ${idx}` : 'Training',
      mission: idx ? `Mission ${idx}` : 'Mission',
      goal: idx ? `Goal ${idx}` : 'Goal',
      praise: idx ? `Praise ${idx}` : 'Praise',
      reward: idx ? `Reward ${idx}` : 'Reward',
    };
    return labels[base] || phaseId;
  }

  function phaseIdToMarker(phaseId) {
    return String(phaseId || 'work').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-');
  }

  function markerToPhaseId(marker) {
    return String(marker || '').toLowerCase();
  }

  const PHASE_MARKER_CAPTURE_RX = /===\s*([A-Z0-9-]+)\s*===/gi;
  const PHASE_MARKER_SPLIT_RX = /(===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===)/gi;
  const PHASE_MARKER_STRIP_RX = /===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===/gi;

  function stripLeadingPhaseHeader(text, phaseId = '') {
    let out = String(text || '').replace(/^﻿/, '').trimStart();

    out = out.replace(/^===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===\s*(?:\r?\n)?/i, '');

    const base = String(phaseId || '').replace(/-\d+$/, '');
    const num = (String(phaseId || '').match(/-(\d+)$/) || [])[1];
    const labelMap = {
      settling: 'settling',
      induction: 'induction',
      deepener: 'deepener',
      level: 'level',
      lightener: 'lightener',
      wake: 'wake',
      reintroduction: 'reintroduction',
      emergence: 'emergence',
      work: num ? `work(?:\s*[-:]?\s*${num})?` : 'work(?:\s*[-:]?\s*\d+)?',
      affirm: num ? `affirm(?:ation)?(?:\s*[-:]?\s*${num})?` : 'affirm(?:ation)?(?:\s*[-:]?\s*\d+)?',
    };
    const phaseRx = labelMap[base];
    if (phaseRx) {
      const headingOnly = new RegExp(`^(?:[#>*-]+\s*)?(?:phase\s*[:\-]\s*)?(?:${phaseRx})\s*:?(?:\r?\n)+`, 'i');
      out = out.replace(headingOnly, '');
      const bareLine = new RegExp(`^(?:phase\s*[:\-]\s*)?(?:${phaseRx})\s*:?\s*(?:\r?\n)+`, 'i');
      out = out.replace(bareLine, '');
    }
    return out.trim();
  }

  function stripAllPhaseMarkers(text) {
    return String(text || '').replace(/===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===/gi, ' ');
  }

  const PHASE_BASE_RX = /-\d+$/;
  const phaseBase = id => String(id || '').replace(PHASE_BASE_RX, '');

  const PHASE_PAIR_GROUP = {
    induction: 'trance',
    wake: 'trance',
    reintroduction: 'trance',
    deepener: 'depth',
    lightener: 'depth',
  };

  const SAFE_ENDING_PHASES = ['lightener', 'wake', 'reintroduction'];

  function getSessionPhaseBlueprint() {

    const deepenerCount = state.length === 'marathon' ? 2 : 1;
    const phases = ['settling', 'induction'];
    for (let d = 1; d <= deepenerCount; d++) {
      phases.push(deepenerCount > 1 ? `deepener-${d}` : 'deepener');

      if (deepenerCount > 1 && d < deepenerCount) {
        phases.push(deepenerCount > 2 ? `level-${d}` : 'level');
      }
    }
    const workCount = getWorkBlockCount();
    const userAff = $('userAffirmations')?.value?.trim();
    const hasAff = !!userAff;
    for (let i = 1; i <= workCount; i++) {

      phases.push(workCount > 1 ? `work-${i}` : 'work');
      if (hasAff) phases.push(workCount > 1 ? `affirm-${i}` : 'affirm');
    }
    if (state.intentionType === 'sleep') {

      return _applyPhaseExtras(phases);
    }

    for (let l = deepenerCount; l >= 1; l--) {
      phases.push(deepenerCount > 1 ? `lightener-${l}` : 'lightener');
    }
    phases.push('wake', 'reintroduction');
    return _applyPhaseExtras(phases);
  }

  function _applyPhaseExtras(phases) {
    const extras = Array.isArray(state._phaseExtras) ? state._phaseExtras : null;
    if (!extras || !extras.length) return phases;

    let sections = phases.map(phaseId => ({ phaseId, text: '' }));
    for (const rawKind of extras) {
      const kind = String(rawKind || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!['teaching','training','mission','goal','praise','reward','introduction','permission'].includes(kind)) continue;
      const existingCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === kind).length;
      const newId = existingCount > 0 ? `${kind}-${existingCount + 1}` : kind;
      const insertIdx = findPhaseInsertionIdx(sections, kind);
      sections.splice(insertIdx, 0, { phaseId: newId, text: '' });
    }

    ['teaching','training','mission','goal'].forEach(kind => {
      const indexes = sections.map((s, i) => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === kind ? i : -1).filter(i => i >= 0);
      if (indexes.length >= 2) {
        indexes.forEach((idx, n) => {
          sections[idx] = { ...sections[idx], phaseId: `${kind}-${n + 1}` };
        });
      }
    });
    return sections.map(s => s.phaseId);
  }

  function countPhaseBase(sections, base) {
    return sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === base).length;
  }

  function findPhaseInsertionIdx(sections, kind) {
    const idxOf = (pred) => sections.findIndex(pred);
    const lastIdxOf = (pred) => {
      let last = -1;
      sections.forEach((s, i) => { if (pred(s)) last = i; });
      return last;
    };
    if (kind === 'introduction') {

      return 0;
    }
    if (kind === 'permission') {

      const lastIntro = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'introduction');
      const beforeSettling = idxOf(s => ['settling','induction','deepener','work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastIntro >= 0) return lastIntro + 1;
      if (beforeSettling >= 0) return beforeSettling;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'settling') {

      const lastPreamble = lastIdxOf(s => ['introduction','permission'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      return lastPreamble >= 0 ? lastPreamble + 1 : 0;
    }
    if (kind === 'induction') {

      const afterSettling = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'settling');
      const anchor = idxOf(s => ['deepener','work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (anchor >= 0) return anchor;
      if (afterSettling >= 0) return afterSettling + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'deepener') {

      const lastDeepener = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener');
      if (lastDeepener >= 0) return lastDeepener + 1;

      const afterInduction = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'induction');
      const beforeWork = idxOf(s => ['work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (beforeWork >= 0) return beforeWork;
      if (afterInduction >= 0) return afterInduction + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'work' || kind === 'affirm') {

      const beforeReturn = idxOf(s => ['lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (beforeReturn >= 0) return beforeReturn;
