      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'lightener') {

      const lastWork = lastIdxOf(s => ['work','affirm'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      const firstWake = idxOf(s => ['wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (firstWake >= 0) {

        return firstWake;
      }
      if (lastWork >= 0) return lastWork + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'wake') {
      const reintroIdx = idxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'reintroduction');
      if (reintroIdx >= 0) return reintroIdx;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'reintroduction') {
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'sounding') {

      const lastDeepener = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener');
      const beforeWork = idxOf(s => ['work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (beforeWork >= 0) return beforeWork;
      if (lastDeepener >= 0) return lastDeepener + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'level') {

      const deepenerIdxs = [];
      sections.forEach((s, i) => { if (phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener') deepenerIdxs.push(i); });

      for (let i = 0; i < deepenerIdxs.length - 1; i++) {
        const a = deepenerIdxs[i];
        const b = deepenerIdxs[i + 1];
        const gapHasLevel = sections.slice(a + 1, b).some(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'level');
        if (!gapHasLevel) return a + 1;
      }

      const lastDeepener = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener');
      if (lastDeepener >= 0) return lastDeepener + 1;

      const beforeWork = idxOf(s => ['work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (beforeWork >= 0) return beforeWork;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'teaching') {

      const lastSettling = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'settling');
      const lastTeaching = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'teaching');
      const beforeFraming = idxOf(s => ['goal','induction','deepener','work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastTeaching >= 0) return lastTeaching + 1;
      if (beforeFraming >= 0) return beforeFraming;
      if (lastSettling >= 0) return lastSettling + 1;
      return 0;
    }
    if (kind === 'goal') {

      const lastTeaching = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'teaching');
      const lastSettling = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'settling');
      const lastGoal = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'goal');
      const beforeInduction = idxOf(s => ['induction','deepener','work','affirm','lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastGoal >= 0) return lastGoal + 1;
      if (beforeInduction >= 0) return beforeInduction;
      if (lastTeaching >= 0) return lastTeaching + 1;
      if (lastSettling >= 0) return lastSettling + 1;
      return 0;
    }
    if (kind === 'training') {

      const lastTraining = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'training');
      const beforeReturn = idxOf(s => ['lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastTraining >= 0) return lastTraining + 1;
      if (beforeReturn >= 0) return beforeReturn;
      const lastDeepener = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener');
      if (lastDeepener >= 0) return lastDeepener + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'mission') {

      const lastMission = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'mission');
      const lastWake = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'wake');
      const reintroIdx = idxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'reintroduction');
      if (lastMission >= 0) return lastMission + 1;
      if (reintroIdx >= 0) return reintroIdx;
      if (lastWake >= 0) return lastWake + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'praise') {

      const lastPraise = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'praise');
      const lastWorkAff = lastIdxOf(s => ['work','affirm','training'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      const beforeReturn = idxOf(s => ['lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastPraise >= 0) return lastPraise + 1;
      if (beforeReturn >= 0) return beforeReturn;
      if (lastWorkAff >= 0) return lastWorkAff + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'reward') {

      const lastReward = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'reward');
      const lastPraise = lastIdxOf(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'praise');
      const lastWorkAff = lastIdxOf(s => ['work','affirm','training','praise'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      const beforeReturn = idxOf(s => ['lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (lastReward >= 0) return lastReward + 1;
      if (lastPraise >= 0) return lastPraise + 1;
      if (beforeReturn >= 0) return beforeReturn;
      if (lastWorkAff >= 0) return lastWorkAff + 1;
      return sections.length;
    }
    if (kind === 'custom') {

      const beforeReturn = idxOf(s => ['lightener','wake','reintroduction'].includes(phaseBase(s.phaseId)));
      if (beforeReturn >= 0) return beforeReturn;
      return sections.length;
    }
    return sections.length;
  }

  function getPhaseList() {
    return getSessionPhaseBlueprint();
  }

  function getPlaybackPhaseOrder() {
    if (state.generatedPhaseOrder?.length) return [...state.generatedPhaseOrder];
    if (state.parsedScript?.ordered?.length) return [...state.parsedScript.ordered];
    return getPhaseList();
  }

  const _GEN_STATUS_CLASS = {
    pending:   'is-pending',
    streaming: 'is-running',
    done:      'is-done',
    error:     'is-failed',
    warn:      'is-warn',
  };
  const _GEN_STATUS_ICON = {
    pending:   '○',
    streaming: '◐',
    done:      '●',
    error:     '⚠',
    warn:      '⚠',
  };

  function setPhaseRowStatus(idx, status) {
    if (state._preGenMode) return;
    const list = $('phaseEditorList');
    if (!list) return;
    const row = list.querySelector(`.gen-step-row[data-phase-idx="${idx}"]`);
    if (!row) return;
    row.classList.remove('is-pending', 'is-running', 'is-done', 'is-failed', 'is-warn');
    const cls = _GEN_STATUS_CLASS[status] || 'is-pending';
    row.classList.add(cls);
    const iconEl = row.querySelector('.gen-step-row-icon');
    if (iconEl) iconEl.textContent = _GEN_STATUS_ICON[status] || '○';
  }

  function renderGenProgress(phases, stateMask, eta, retryCallback) {
    if (state._preGenMode) return;

    const wrap = $('genProgress');
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'none';

    if (typeof renderPhaseEditor === 'function') {
      try { renderPhaseEditor(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[gen] editor render failed:', e); }
    }

    phases.forEach((p, i) => {
      const st = stateMask[i] || 'pending';
      setPhaseRowStatus(i, st);
    });

    const etaInline = $('genEtaInline');
    if (etaInline) {
      etaInline.textContent = eta || '';
      etaInline.style.display = eta ? 'inline' : 'none';
    }
    const etaEl = $('genEta');
    if (etaEl) {
      etaEl.textContent = eta || '';
      etaEl.style.display = eta ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    if (retryCallback) {
      const list = $('phaseEditorList');
      if (list) {

        if (list._genRetryDelegated) {
          list.removeEventListener('click', list._genRetryDelegated, true);
        }
        list._genRetryDelegated = (e) => {

          if (!_aiInProgress) return;
          const btn = e.target.closest('.phase-generate, .gen-step-row-regen');
          if (!btn) return;
          if (btn.disabled) return;
          const idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-idx') || btn.getAttribute('data-regen-idx') || '-1', 10);
          if (Number.isNaN(idx) || idx < 0) return;
          e.stopPropagation();
          e.preventDefault();
          retryCallback(idx);
        };
        list.addEventListener('click', list._genRetryDelegated, true);
      }
    }
  }

  function setStreamingPreview(phaseIdxOrLabel, text, opts = {}) {
    if (state._preGenMode) return;
    if (opts.hide) return;

    let idx = phaseIdxOrLabel;
    if (typeof phaseIdxOrLabel === 'string') {

      if (!phaseIdxOrLabel || !_genState || !Array.isArray(_genState.phases)) return;
      idx = _genState.phases.findIndex(p => getPhaseLabel(p) === phaseIdxOrLabel);
      if (idx < 0) return;
    }
    if (typeof idx !== 'number' || idx < 0) return;

    if (_genState && Array.isArray(_genState.phases) && idx < _genState.phases.length) {
      const phaseId = _genState.phases[idx];
      if (!_genState._streamingBuffers) _genState._streamingBuffers = {};
      if (opts.done) {
        delete _genState._streamingBuffers[phaseId];
      } else {
        _genState._streamingBuffers[phaseId] = text || '';
      }
    }

    const row = document.querySelector(`#phaseEditorList .gen-step-row[data-phase-idx="${idx}"]`);
    if (!row) return;
    const contentEl = row.querySelector(`[data-content-idx="${idx}"]`);
    if (!contentEl) return;

    if (!row.classList.contains('is-failed')) {
      row.classList.remove('is-pending', 'is-running', 'is-done');
      row.classList.add(opts.done ? 'is-done' : 'is-running');

      const iconEl = row.querySelector('.gen-step-row-icon');
      if (iconEl) iconEl.textContent = opts.done ? '●' : '◐';
    }

    const display = (text || '').length > 1400 ? '…' + text.slice(text.length - 1400) : (text || '');
    contentEl.textContent = display;

    contentEl.scrollTop = contentEl.scrollHeight;
  }

  let _genState = null;

  function buildPhaseInstructions(phases, targetWords, persona, method, affirmLines) {
    const deepenerPhases = phases.filter(p => phaseBase(p) === 'deepener');
    const levelPhases = phases.filter(p => phaseBase(p) === 'level');
    const lightenerPhases = phases.filter(p => phaseBase(p) === 'lightener');
    const totalDepth = deepenerPhases.length;

    const phaseInstructions = {
      settling: `Write the SETTLING phase. WORD TARGET: ~${targetWords.settling} words. THIS IS A HARD MINIMUM — common failure mode is producing only 2-4 short sentences and stopping early; do NOT do that. Aim for the full word budget by including FIVE TO EIGHT distinct present-moment observations, each its own paragraph.

Your single job is to ORIENT the user — bring their attention to what's already true, right now, in this moment. Each observation is a "pace statement" — an undeniable observable truth the user cannot disagree with. Pace-pace-pace builds trust and the agreement set the rest of the session leans on.

REQUIRED COVERAGE — touch at least FIVE of the following, one per paragraph:
  1. Position / contact: the way the body is held by the chair / floor / bed / what's underneath
  2. Breath: it's already happening, no effort, in and out
  3. Sound: the texture of the room around them — distant traffic, the hum of the device, a clock, the silence itself
  4. Temperature / air: the warmth of the body, the coolness of the air on the skin
  5. Hands: where they rest, weight, contact
  6. Eyes (if open): what they're seeing right now without changing it; OR if closed: the texture of darkness, the colors behind the eyelids
  7. Time of day / quality of light (if knowable from intention or context)
  8. The sound of the guide's voice itself — present, here, with them

WRITING RULES:
  • Each observation on its own short paragraph so each one has time to land
  • Stay external before going internal: position, sound, temperature, contact, breath FIRST; thought / emotion only later if at all
  • AVOID introductions ("hello", "welcome"), promises ("you're going to feel..."), instructions ("get comfortable", "close your eyes" — unless that's the persona's signature opener), questions ("how are you feeling?"), and abstractions ("let yourself relax")
  • End by gesturing toward what comes next without naming it — "and from here, something settles" — to hand off to induction
  • DO use one long pause marker (e.g. \\x5BPAUSE 4\\x5D) between observations to let each one register

Output ONLY the script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes other than the pause markers between observations. Do NOT abbreviate or stop short — write the FULL ${targetWords.settling}-word target.`,
      induction: `Write the INDUCTION phase (~${targetWords.induction} words) using ${method.name}. Apply YES-SET / PACE-AND-LEAD: open with TWO or THREE pace statements (observable truths the user cannot deny — body position, breath, sounds, sensations), then transition with "and" or "as" into ONE lead suggestion that rides the agreement. Pattern: "you're aware of the chair beneath you, AND of your breath moving in and out, AND as you notice that breath, something begins to soften..." Repeat this pace→pace→pace→lead pattern 2–3 times across the phase, each cycle taking the lead a little deeper. Embed depth language ("going deeper", "settling further", "drifting down", "letting yourself arrive") inside longer sentences rather than as direct commands — embedded suggestions slip past resistance. Use ellipses (...) within sentences for short held moments, and paragraph breaks for longer settling between cycles. The phase ends with the user noticeably more inward than they started. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`,
      wake: `Write the WAKE phase (~${targetWords.wake} words). Bring the user FULLY awake and alert — this is the actual return to ordinary consciousness, not a soft transition. Use a distinct UPWARD COUNT (typically 1→5 or 5→1, depending on persona) or a direct waking sequence; whichever, make the structure CLEAR. Each step in the count should mark a specific re-engagement: "five — energy returning to the limbs", "four — taking a deeper breath", "three — eyes beginning to flutter", "two — alert and present", "one — fully awake and clear." Re-alert with ENERGY in the language — sentences get brisker, vocabulary tightens, vocal tone (implied by punctuation) climbs. Eyes open. Fully awake. This phase MUST NOT be replaced or merged with reintroduction; reintroduction comes AFTER. Each count or instruction stands on its own line so each lands distinctly. Avoid "drifting", "floating", "settling" — those are descent words and undo the work. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`,
      reintroduction: `Write the REINTRODUCTION phase (~${targetWords.reintroduction} words). This phase happens AFTER wake — the user is already fully awake, eyes open, alert. Your job is to bridge them from the session back into their day. Include: (1) a warm welcome-back acknowledging what they just did ("and there you are — back, fully present"), (2) a soft suggestion to notice how they feel right now compared to when they began ("and you may notice — the way you arrived here is different from the way you're leaving"), (3) practical permission to take their time getting up — stretch, blink, look around the room, sip water if it's there, (4) a brief integration thought: what they did here is theirs to keep. If the method is a DEMONSTRATION method, the optional convincer test happens AFTER the wake count and BEFORE the final welcome-back; the ending must still fully reintroduce the user to ordinary life. End with a quiet send-off in the persona's voice — not a goodbye, more a release. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`,
    };

    const deepenerWordsEach = totalDepth > 0 ? Math.round(targetWords.deepener / totalDepth) : targetWords.deepener;
    deepenerPhases.forEach((p, i) => {
      const depth = i + 1;
      let intensity;
      if (totalDepth === 1) intensity = 'light-to-medium trance';
      else if (depth === 1) intensity = 'light trance (first layer)';
      else if (depth === totalDepth) intensity = 'deep trance (innermost layer)';
      else intensity = `medium trance (layer ${depth} of ${totalDepth})`;
      phaseInstructions[p] = `Write DEEPENER phase ${depth} of ${totalDepth} (~${deepenerWordsEach} words). Target state: ${intensity}. ${depth === 1 ? 'Move from post-induction awareness into the first layer of trance.' : `The user is already at layer ${depth - 1}; take them ONE LEVEL deeper, not all the way from waking.`}${state.craftedSuggestion && depth === totalDepth ? ' Foreshadow the crafted suggestion at this innermost layer.' : ''}${affirmLines.length && depth === totalDepth ? ' Begin weaving affirmations.' : ''} Let phrases breathe — short paragraphs, ellipses where an image needs to land. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
    });

    const levelWordsEach = levelPhases.length > 0 ? Math.round((targetWords.level || Math.round(deepenerWordsEach * 0.5)) / levelPhases.length) : (targetWords.level || 60);
    levelPhases.forEach((p, i) => {

      const heldDepth = i + 1;
      const totalLevels = levelPhases.length;
      phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a LEVEL phase (~${levelWordsEach} words). The user is currently at depth ${heldDepth} of ${totalDepth}. DO NOT take them deeper — HOLD them here. Reinforce the present state with quiet observations: breath continuing on its own, body weight settled, the depth they've already reached. Ratify the trance ("notice how easily you went there", "this state is yours now"). This is a tonic, sustaining period BEFORE the next deepener takes them further down. Long pauses between phrases — write each observation on its own short line so it has room to land. Phrases short, paced, almost still. Do not introduce new imagery or scenes. Just rest the user in what they've already found. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
    });

    const lightenerWordsEach = lightenerPhases.length > 0 ? Math.round(targetWords.lightener / lightenerPhases.length) : targetWords.lightener;
    lightenerPhases.forEach((p, i) => {
      const closesDepth = lightenerPhases.length - i;
      const fromDepth = closesDepth;
      const toDepth = closesDepth - 1;
      phaseInstructions[p] = fromDepth === 1
        ? `Write the LIGHTENER phase (~${lightenerWordsEach} words). Ease intensity down gradually from light trance toward waking awareness. Keep the same narrator voice and continuity — this phase works with the narrator rather than stopping them. Use gentle return language, body awareness, orientation, breath, movement, and upward pacing. Let phrases breathe — short paragraphs, not rushed. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`
        : `Write LIGHTENER phase for level ${fromDepth} → ${toDepth} (~${lightenerWordsEach} words). The user is currently at depth ${fromDepth}; bring them up ONE LEVEL toward depth ${toDepth}, not all the way. Subsequent lighteners will continue the ascent. Gentle upward language, breath, light. Let phrases breathe. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
    });

    const workCount = phases.filter(p => phaseBase(p) === 'work').length;
    const workWordsEach = workCount > 0 ? Math.round(targetWords.work / workCount) : targetWords.work;
    phases.forEach(p => {
      const base = phaseBase(p);
      if (base === 'affirm') {
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a brief affirmation interlude (~40-60 words). Deliver these affirmations in ${persona.name}'s voice, woven into flowing, hypnotic language:\n${affirmLines.map(l => `"${l}"`).join('\n')}\nUse the user's exact words. Place each affirmation on its own line so each one has time to settle. Poetic, rhythmic, repetitive. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'pendulation') {
        // Roadmap #28 — Felt-sense pendulation phase. Levine-style
        // somatic-experiencing oscillation between sensing activation
        // and sensing settling, scaled down for solo practice. The
        // listener does not generate imagery; they only locate
        // sensation. Bypasses cognitive resistance because the move
        // is interoceptive, not imaginative.
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a PENDULATION phase (~${targetWords.pendulation || 110} words). This is somatic-experiencing-style oscillation — NEVER ask the listener to imagine, picture, or visualize anything. Only ask them to locate sensation in the body.

Structure (in ${persona.name}'s voice):
  1. Briefly invite attention to whatever activation is present right now — tightness, restlessness, alertness, agitation. Where does it sit? What's its shape, weight, temperature? Do not interpret. Do not soothe.
  2. Pause. Then invite attention to whatever settling is present right now — softness, warmth, breath, support against the chair, the part of the body that's already calm. Where does it sit?
  3. Pause. Then ask them to move attention back to the activation, briefly — just locate it again — and then back to the settling.
  4. Two or three slow oscillations. Always end on the settling, never on the activation.

Tone: matter-of-fact, body-anatomist, not therapist. Pauses are long; sentences are short. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'sounding') {

        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a SOUNDING phase (~80-130 words). This is a brief meta-awareness moment — a "depth check" where you invite the user to NOTICE how they feel right now WITHOUT changing it. The narrator pauses the descent or work, lets the user register their own state, then continues.

Tone: gently observing, never directive. The user is the instrument; you're helping them read it.

Touch on (pick 2-3, in ${persona.name}'s voice):
  • the body — weight, warmth, the sit of the hands, the feel of the breath at this moment
  • the mind — the speed and quality of thoughts, what's surfacing
  • the awareness itself — wide or narrow, sharp or soft, near or far
  • emotional weather — what's present, without naming it as good or bad

End with a brief acknowledgment that you're now continuing — bridging back to the surrounding phase. Long pauses between observations to give the user time to actually look — write each observation on its own short line, ellipses (...) for the breath-pauses within. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'custom') {

      } else if (base === 'teaching') {

        const teachIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const teachCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'teaching').length;
        const role = teachCount === 1
          ? 'PRIMER: explain plainly what trance is, what is about to happen, and what the user can expect to notice.'
          : teachIdx === 1
            ? 'PRIMER: explain plainly what trance is, what is about to happen, and how this method works.'
            : `MID-SESSION PRIMER (${teachIdx} of ${teachCount}): introduce the next concept or imagery the user is about to work with, in plain language.`;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a TEACHING phase (~${targetWords.teaching} words). ROLE: ${role}

This is psychoeducation, not therapy. Tone: clear, friendly, demystifying. The user should leave this phase understanding what's happening and feeling safer because of it.

In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Explain in plain language. No mystical framing.
  • Normalize: this is a focused attentive state, not a magical altered consciousness.
  • Reassure agency: the user remains in control, can think, can stop at any time.
  • If relevant, name the technique by category (e.g. "breath-anchoring", "progressive relaxation").

Avoid: jargon ("alpha state", "subconscious"), mystical language, performance pressure. Let thoughts breathe — short paragraphs, not run-on sentences. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'training') {

        const trainIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const trainCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'training').length;
        const role = trainCount === 1
          ? 'core skill rehearsal — pick the single most relevant practice for the user\'s intention.'
          : trainIdx === 1
            ? `first of ${trainCount} skill blocks — establish the foundational practice.`
            : trainIdx === trainCount
              ? `final of ${trainCount} skill blocks — integrate or combine prior practices.`
              : `block ${trainIdx} of ${trainCount} — a different skill, distinct from the others.`;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a TRAINING phase (~${targetWords.training} words). ROLE: ${role}

This is skill rehearsal. Lead the user through THREE TO FIVE REPETITIONS of one specific practice — mental, sensory, or somatic. Each rep should feel slightly more skilled / smoother / more automatic than the last (ratification pattern).

Pick ONE skill grounded in the user's intention. Examples: noticing without naming, releasing on the exhale, anchoring on a chosen word, pacing breath to a visual, returning attention without judgment. Pick what fits.

Structure each rep:
  • Setup: brief instruction.
  • Execution: leave a paragraph break (and one short ellipsis line on its own — like "…") for the user to actually do it.
  • Ratification: a quiet observation that it's working ("good", "yes, like that", "even easier this time").

End with the user holding the skill briefly. Do NOT introduce a new skill at the end — close on the practice they just trained. Long pauses are essential — write each instruction on its own line, plenty of paragraph breaks. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'mission') {

        const missionIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const missionCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'mission').length;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a MISSION phase (~${targetWords.mission} words). This is the posthypnotic homework — ONE concrete, doable task tied to waking life.${missionCount > 1 ? ` (${missionIdx} of ${missionCount} — pick a distinct task from the others.)` : ''}

The mission must be:
  • SPECIFIC — name the trigger ("when you wake", "next time you cross a doorway", "tomorrow at lunch")
  • SMALL — one breath, one sentence, one notice. Not a habit overhaul.
  • TIED to the user's intention or the work just done.
  • POSITIVELY framed — what to do, not what to avoid.

Delivered in ${persona.name}'s voice as a quiet promise to themselves, not a command. Open with a phrase like "and here is your mission" or "one thing to carry with you" or whatever fits your voice. End with a phrase that lets the assignment settle ("that is enough", "small things, kept", "you'll know when").

Avoid: lists of tasks, ambitious goals, anything that requires willpower to remember. The mission should feel like something the user could not help but do once cued. Let phrases breathe — short paragraphs, ellipses where an idea needs to land. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'goal') {

        const goalIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const goalCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'goal').length;
        const role = goalCount === 1
          ? 'single anchor — establish the sensory shape of the desired outcome.'
          : goalIdx === 1
            ? `first of ${goalCount} anchors — initial future-pace, broad outcome.`
            : `anchor ${goalIdx} of ${goalCount} — a different facet of the desired outcome (zoom in on one specific moment).`;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a GOAL phase (~${targetWords.goal} words). ROLE: ${role}

This is FUTURE-PACING — sensory, not cognitive. The user should leave this phase with a body-memory of the desired outcome, not a plan or a list.

In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Open by inviting the user to see/feel/notice themselves AT the time the change has happened. Not before. Not in transit. There.
  • Pick 3-4 sensory details only the user would notice — small ones. The way they hold their shoulders. The first breath of the morning. The thing they don't do anymore. The thing they do without thinking.
  • Stay in present tense. The future is happening now.
  • Linger. Place each detail on its own line so the user's nervous system has time to learn the shape of the outcome — slow, paragraph-spaced, almost still.

Avoid: abstractions ("you will be confident"), goal-setting language ("your goal is to..."), commands. The user is OBSERVING themselves succeeded, not striving. End with one quiet phrase that lets the picture settle. Output ONLY script text.`;
      } else if (base === 'work') {
        const workIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        let role;
        if (workCount === 1) role = 'single-block: deliver and consolidate.';
        else if (workIdx === 1) role = state.craftedSuggestion ? 'INTRODUCE: deliver the crafted suggestion verbatim for the first time. Plant the seed.' : method.category === 'demonstration' ? 'INTRODUCE: begin building the demonstration effect.' : 'INTRODUCE: establish the core therapeutic theme.';
        else if (workIdx === workCount) role = state.craftedSuggestion ? 'CONSOLIDATE + FUTURE-PACE: final reinforcement at peak intensity. Project the effect forward in time.' : 'CONSOLIDATE: bring the work to its peak and anchor it for the future.';
        else if (workIdx === workCount - 1) role = state.craftedSuggestion ? 'PEAK: most intense reinforcement of the crafted suggestion. Highest suggestibility.' : 'PEAK: highest intensity — the crux of the work.';
        else {
          const midRoles = ['DEVELOP: expand with a fresh metaphor you have not yet used.', 'INTENSIFY: deliver the suggestion at higher conviction and specificity.', 'REINFORCE: a different angle on the same core effect.'];
          role = midRoles[(workIdx - 2) % midRoles.length];
        }
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write WORK phase ${workIdx} of ${workCount} (~${workWordsEach} words). ROLE: ${role}${state.craftedSuggestion ? '' : ' Therapeutic deepening tied to the intention.'} Do not repeat imagery or phrasing from earlier work blocks. Let phrases breathe — short paragraphs, ellipses for held moments. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'introduction') {

        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write the INTRODUCTION phase (~${targetWords.introduction || 45} words). This is the very first thing the user hears — first impression, before anything else. ROLE: introduce yourself by your persona name and name the work you're about to do together. Keep it WARM, BRIEF, and HUMAN. In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Open with a warm greeting that feels like a person, not a script. ("Hello." / "Welcome." / your-persona-specific greeting.)
  • Name yourself. One short sentence. ("I'm ${persona.name}." or persona-appropriate.)
  • Name what you'll do together — the user's intention, paraphrased gently in their own terms. Don't quote it back verbatim; reflect the spirit.
  • Optionally one sentence of reassurance ("You don't have to do anything right now — just listen.").
  • Do NOT begin instructions ("close your eyes", "take a breath"). Settling does that.
  • Do NOT promise outcomes ("you will feel...").
End on a soft pause that hands off to the next phase. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'permission') {

        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write the PERMISSION phase (~${targetWords.permission || 25} words). ROLE: ask the user for explicit consent to do this work. Their agreement can be out loud, a small head nod, or silent inside their own thoughts — name all three options so they know any one is enough. In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Ask once, plainly, kindly. ("Before we go further — is it alright with you that we do this?" or persona-appropriate phrasing.)
  • Name the three ways to answer: out loud, with a nod, or silently inside.
  • Make clear that any "no" — even a flicker of one — means we don't continue right now, and that's a complete answer too.
  • Wait. Use a long pause marker (e.g. \\x5BPAUSE 5\\x5D) so the script genuinely waits for the user to register their answer.
End by acknowledging the answer ("good", "thank you") and gesturing to the next phase. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes other than the wait pause.`;
      } else if (base === 'praise') {

        const praiseIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const praiseCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'praise').length;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a PRAISE phase (~${targetWords.praise || 45} words). ROLE: ${praiseCount > 1 ? `block ${praiseIdx} of ${praiseCount} — ` : ''}affirming feedback FROM THE GUIDE TO THE USER. Notice and validate something specific the user just did or is doing right now (settled into trance, allowed depth, stayed present, returned attention from a distraction). In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Be specific, not generic. Name what they actually did. ("You let yourself drop in." NOT "Good job.")
  • Land it slowly. Each affirming line on its own paragraph so it has time to register in trance.
  • Keep it warm but not sticky-sweet. Praise that feels earned lands; flattery slides off.
  • One short ratification at the end ("yes, like that") to seal it.
Avoid: comparing them to others, conditional praise ("you'll be even better when..."), or treating it as a transaction. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      } else if (base === 'reward') {

        const rewardIdx = p.includes('-') ? parseInt(p.split('-')[1]) : 1;
        const rewardCount = phases.filter(pp => phaseBase(pp) === 'reward').length;
        phaseInstructions[p] = `Write a REWARD phase (~${targetWords.reward || 60} words). ROLE: ${rewardCount > 1 ? `block ${rewardIdx} of ${rewardCount} — ` : ''}deliver a FELT-SENSE reward — a quiet body-level payoff for the work just done. NOT a tangible thing, NOT a promise of future outcomes — a small, present-moment sensation the user can keep. In ${persona.name}'s voice:
  • Frame it as the reward that arrives BECAUSE of the work, not as a separate gift.
  • Pick ONE concrete felt-sense: a softening in the chest, a small warmth, a quiet ease, a click of something settling, a release of held tension somewhere small.
  • Place it in the body. Specific anatomy, specific quality. ("A small ease, here, behind the breastbone.")
  • Tell the user to carry it forward — it's theirs now, in the body, available.
  • Linger. Long pauses. Each phrase its own line so the felt sense has time to register.
End with a brief "and you carry that with you" beat. Output ONLY script text — no stage directions, no square-bracket notes.`;
      }
    });

    return phaseInstructions;
  }

  function syncGenStateWithPhases() {
    if (!_genState) return;
    const newPhases = getPhaseList();
    const gs = _genState;

    if (newPhases.length === gs.phases.length && newPhases.every((p, i) => p === gs.phases[i])) return;

    const sectionsByPhase = {};
    (state.scriptSections || []).forEach(s => { sectionsByPhase[s.phaseId] = s; });

    const newStateMask = newPhases.map(p => {
      const oldIdx = gs.phases.indexOf(p);
      if (oldIdx !== -1) return gs.stateMask[oldIdx] || 'pending';

      const sec = sectionsByPhase[p];
      if (!sec || !sec.text) return 'pending';
      const scaffoldText = (typeof scaffoldForPhase === 'function') ? scaffoldForPhase(p) : '';
      const isScaffold = scaffoldText && sec.text.trim() === scaffoldText.trim();
      return isScaffold ? 'pending' : 'done';
    });

    const newPhaseResults = {};
    newPhases.forEach((p, i) => {
      if (gs.phaseResults[p] != null) {
        newPhaseResults[p] = gs.phaseResults[p];
      } else if (newStateMask[i] === 'done' && sectionsByPhase[p]?.text) {
        newPhaseResults[p] = sectionsByPhase[p].text;
      }
    });

    const durations = PHASE_DURATIONS[state.length] || PHASE_DURATIONS.medium;
    const wpm = 50;
    const targetWords = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(durations).map(([k, v]) => [k, Math.round(v * wpm / 60)]));
    const userAffRaw = $('userAffirmations')?.value?.trim();
    const affirmLines = userAffRaw ? userAffRaw.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()).map(l => resolveTokens(l.trim())) : [];

    gs.phases = newPhases;
    gs.stateMask = newStateMask;
    gs.phaseResults = newPhaseResults;
    gs.phaseInstructions = buildPhaseInstructions(newPhases, targetWords, gs.persona, gs.method, affirmLines);

    if (_aiInProgress) {
      renderGenProgress(gs.phases, gs.stateMask, null, _genStateRetryHandler);
    }
  }

  let _genStateRetryHandler = null;

  async function regenerateFailedChunks() {
    const btn = $('regenScriptBtn');
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('Another generation is already in progress.'); return; }

    if (!_genState) {
      if (await confirmAsync('No previous generation in memory. Generate the full script?')) {
        return generateFullScript();
      }
      return;
    }

    syncGenStateWithPhases();

    const targetIdx = [];
    const pendingCount = _genState.stateMask.filter(s => s === 'pending').length;
    const failedCount = _genState.stateMask.filter(s => s === 'error' || s === 'warn').length;
    _genState.stateMask.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (s === 'error' || s === 'warn' || s === 'pending') targetIdx.push(i);
    });

    if (targetIdx.length === 0) {
      const editedText = $('scriptText')?.value?.trim();
      const hasManualEdits = state.fullScript && editedText && editedText !== state.fullScript.trim();
      const msg = hasManualEdits
        ? 'All phases are generated. Discard your manual edits and regenerate the full script?'
        : 'All phases are generated. Regenerate the full script anyway?';
      if (await confirmAsync(msg)) return generateFullScript();
      return;
    }

    const originalLabel = btn?.textContent || 'regenerate';
    setLoading('regenScriptBtn', true);
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;

    let succeeded = 0;
    let failed = 0;
    const retry = _genStateRetryHandler;

    try {
      for (const idx of targetIdx) {

        const cur = _genState.stateMask[idx];
        if (cur !== 'error' && cur !== 'warn' && cur !== 'pending') {
          succeeded++;
          continue;
        }
        if (typeof retry !== 'function') {
          notify.error('Retry handler missing — try the regenerate-everything path instead.');
          break;
        }

        await retry(idx);

        const after = _genState.stateMask[idx];
        if (after === 'done') succeeded++; else failed++;
      }
    } finally {
      setLoading('regenScriptBtn', false, originalLabel);
      if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
    }

    const verb = pendingCount > failedCount ? 'filled in' : 'regenerated';
    if (failed === 0) {
      notify.success(`${verb.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + verb.slice(1)} ${succeeded} phase${succeeded === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
    } else if (succeeded === 0) {
      notify.warn(`Could not generate any of the ${failed} phase${failed === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Click ✨ on individual rows to retry.`);
    } else {
      notify.warn(`${verb.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + verb.slice(1)} ${succeeded}, ${failed} still failing. Click ✨ on individual rows to retry.`);
    }
  }

  async function generateFullScript() {

    if (!state._preGenMode && (state._preGenInProgress || state._preGenScheduled)) {
      cancelActivePreGen('user requested fresh generation');
      let waited = 0;
      while (_aiInProgress && waited < 4000) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200));
        waited += 200;
      }
    }
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('An AI call is already in progress.'); return; }
    const editedText = $('scriptText').value.trim();
    if (state.fullScript && editedText && editedText !== state.fullScript.trim()) {
      if (!await confirmAsync('Your manual edits to the script will be discarded. Regenerate anyway?')) return;
    }

    try {
      const blueprint = (typeof getSessionPhaseBlueprint === 'function')
        ? getSessionPhaseBlueprint() : [];
      const current   = Array.isArray(state.generatedPhaseOrder) ? state.generatedPhaseOrder : [];

      if (current.length > 0 && blueprint.length > 0) {
        const sameOrder = current.length === blueprint.length
          && current.every((p, i) => p === blueprint[i]);
        if (!sameOrder) {

          const inCur = new Set(current);
          const inBp  = new Set(blueprint);
          const added   = current.filter(p => !inBp.has(p));
          const removed = blueprint.filter(p => !inCur.has(p));
          const reorderedOnly = added.length === 0 && removed.length === 0;
          const summaryBits = [];
          if (added.length)   summaryBits.push(`${added.length} added (${added.slice(0,3).join(', ')}${added.length > 3 ? '…' : ''})`);
          if (removed.length) summaryBits.push(`${removed.length} removed (${removed.slice(0,3).join(', ')}${removed.length > 3 ? '…' : ''})`);
          if (reorderedOnly)  summaryBits.push('blocks were reordered');
          const detail = summaryBits.length ? `\n\nChanges: ${summaryBits.join('; ')}.` : '';
          const ok = await confirmAsync(
            'You\'ve modified the script timeline (reordered, added, or removed blocks). ' +
            '"Generate full script" will rebuild from your Step 1–4 settings and discard those changes.' +
            detail +
            '\n\nIf you only need to fill in failed/empty blocks, click "regenerate" instead — that preserves your timeline.'
          );
          if (!ok) return;
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {

      console.warn('[generateFullScript timeline-diff guard]', e);
    }
    _aiInProgress = true;
    history.clear();
    const persona = getPersona();
    const method = getMethod();
    const durations = PHASE_DURATIONS[state.length];

    const rough = resolveTokens($('intentionInput').value.trim());
    const wpm = 50;
    const targetWords = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(durations).map(([k,v]) => [k, Math.round(v * wpm / 60)]));
    const scriptBuildProgress = $('scriptBuildProgress');
    if (scriptBuildProgress) scriptBuildProgress.style.display = 'block';

    setLoading('generateScriptBtn', true);
    setLoading('regenScriptBtn', true);

    const phases = getPhaseList();
    const stateMask = phases.map(() => 'pending');
    const phaseTimes = [];
    const phaseResults = {};

    let craftedBlock = '';
    if (state.craftedSuggestion) {
      const cs = state.craftedSuggestion;
      const sections = [
        `\nCRAFTED SUGGESTION: "${cs.craftedSuggestion}"`,
        `TRIGGER: ${cs.trigger}`,
        `EFFECT: ${cs.coreResponse}`,
      ];
      if (Array.isArray(cs.reinforcementPhrases) && cs.reinforcementPhrases.length) {
        sections.push(`REINFORCEMENT PHRASES (rotate through these across work blocks — do NOT repeat the same one):\n${cs.reinforcementPhrases.map(p => `  · "${p}"`).join('\n')}`);
      }
      if (Array.isArray(cs.somaticAnchors) && cs.somaticAnchors.length) {
        sections.push(`SOMATIC ANCHORS (tie sensations to these specific body locations during work + deepener phases):\n${cs.somaticAnchors.map(a => `  · ${a}`).join('\n')}`);
      }
      if (Array.isArray(cs.counterIntuitive) && cs.counterIntuitive.length) {
        sections.push(`PARADOXICAL HOOKS (Ericksonian — use sparingly, no more than once per phase, only if the persona supports indirect language):\n${cs.counterIntuitive.map(p => `  · "${p}"`).join('\n')}`);
      }
      craftedBlock = sections.join('\n');
    }
    const userAffRaw = $('userAffirmations')?.value?.trim();

    const affirmLines = userAffRaw ? userAffRaw.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()).map(l => resolveTokens(l.trim())) : [];
    const affirmBlock = affirmLines.length ? `\nUSER AFFIRMATIONS:\n${affirmLines.map(l => `"${l}"`).join('\n')}` : '';
    const demoNote = method.category === 'demonstration' ? '\nDEMONSTRATION METHOD: direct suggestions, build effect, include TEST.' : '';

    const profileCtx = getProfileContext();

    const sdOn = state.smartDirectorEnabled !== false;
    let adaptiveCtx = '';
    if (sdOn) {
      try { const ap = await getAdaptive(); adaptiveCtx = getAdaptivePromptBlock(ap); } catch {}
    } else { sdLog('adaptiveCtx skipped — Smart Director off'); }

    let directorBriefCtx = '';
    if (sdOn) {
      try {
        const living = await buildLivingProfile();
        const brief = computeDirectorBrief(living, {
          persona: persona.name,
          method: method.name,
          intention: rough,
          length: state.length,
        });

        if (state.craftedSuggestion?.trigger && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger !== 'ongoing state') {
          try {
            const fires = (await idbGet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY)) || {};
            const slot = fires[state.craftedSuggestion.trigger];
            const fireCount = slot?.firedDates?.length || 0;

            const lastUpdate = slot?.lastUpdate || Date.now();
            const daysSinceCraft = Math.floor((Date.now() - lastUpdate) / 86400000);
            brief._triggerInfo = {
              trigger: state.craftedSuggestion.trigger,
              fires: fireCount,
              daysSinceCraft,
            };
          } catch {}
        }
        directorBriefCtx = formatDirectorBriefForPrompt(brief);

        state._lastDirectorBrief = brief;
      } catch (e) { console.warn('Director brief build failed:', e); }
    } else { sdLog('directorBriefCtx skipped — Smart Director off'); }

    let memoryCtx = '';
    if (sdOn) {
      try {
        const mem = await getMemory();

        const relevant = await findRelevantDigests(rough || (persona.name + ' ' + method.name), 3, {
          domain: state.intentionType,
          preMood: state._preMood,
        });

        const userIntent = ($('intentionInput')?.value || '').trim();
        const relevantIntents = userIntent.length >= 4
          ? await findRelevantIntents(userIntent, 2)
          : [];
        const relevantBlock = relevant.length
          ? '\nMOST RELEVANT PAST SESSIONS (by semantic similarity to this intention):\n' +
            relevant.map(r => `- [similarity ${((1 - r.distance) * 100).toFixed(0)}%] ${r.digest.digest}`).join('\n')
          : '';

        const dedupIntents = relevantIntents.filter(i =>
          !relevant.some(r => String(r.digest?.sessionId) === String(i.sessionId))
        );
        const intentBlock = dedupIntents.length
          ? '\nPAST SESSIONS WITH SIMILAR INTENT (what they came in saying):\n' +
            dedupIntents.map(r => `- [intent match ${((1 - r.distance) * 100).toFixed(0)}%] ${r.digest.digest}`).join('\n')
          : '';
        const baseBlock = (mem.rollingWindow || mem.longTermProfile)
          ? `\nPRACTITIONER MEMORY:${mem.longTermProfile ? '\nProfile: ' + mem.longTermProfile : ''}${mem.rollingWindow ? '\nRecent patterns: ' + mem.rollingWindow : ''}`
          : '';
        memoryCtx = baseBlock + relevantBlock + intentBlock;

        try {
          if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.aiTextPlugin) {
            const meta = root.aiTextPlugin({ getMetaObject: true });
            if (meta?.countTokens && meta?.idealMaxContextTokens) {
              const memoryTokens = meta.countTokens(memoryCtx);
              const memoryBudget = Math.floor((meta.idealMaxContextTokens - 800) * 0.25);
              if (memoryTokens > memoryBudget && memoryBudget > 0) {

                const trimmedRelevant = relevant.slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.floor(relevant.length * memoryBudget / Math.max(memoryTokens, 1))));
                const trimmedRelBlock = trimmedRelevant.length
                  ? '\nMOST RELEVANT PAST SESSIONS:\n' + trimmedRelevant.map(r => `- ${r.digest.digest}`).join('\n')
                  : '';
                memoryCtx = baseBlock + trimmedRelBlock;
                sdLog('memoryCtx token-trimmed', { fromTokens: memoryTokens, toBudget: memoryBudget, keptRelevant: trimmedRelevant.length });
              }
            }
          }
        } catch {  }
        sdLog('memoryCtx built', { relevantCount: relevant.length, hasRolling: !!mem.rollingWindow, hasLongTerm: !!mem.longTermProfile });
      } catch (e) { console.warn('Memory context build failed:', e); }
    } else { sdLog('memoryCtx skipped — Smart Director off'); }

    let metricsTrendCtx = '';
    if (sdOn) {
      try {
        const trend = await getMetricsTrendSummary({ windowDays: 7, compareDays: 14 });
        if (trend && trend.recentSessionCount >= 2) {
          const bits = [];
          bits.push(`${trend.recentSessionCount} session${trend.recentSessionCount===1?'':'s'} in last ${trend.windowDays} days`);
          if (trend.recentCompletionRate != null) {
            bits.push(`${Math.round(trend.recentCompletionRate * 100)}% completion`);
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(trend.completionDelta) && Math.abs(trend.completionDelta) >= 0.15) {
            bits.push(trend.completionDelta > 0
              ? `up ${Math.round(trend.completionDelta * 100)}pts vs prior 14d`
              : `down ${Math.round(-trend.completionDelta * 100)}pts vs prior 14d`);
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(trend.avgMoodDelta)) {
            bits.push(`avg mood Δ ${trend.avgMoodDelta >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${trend.avgMoodDelta.toFixed(1)}`);
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(trend.avgDepth)) {
            bits.push(`avg self-reported depth ${trend.avgDepth.toFixed(1)}/10`);
          }
          metricsTrendCtx = '\nRECENT TRENDS: ' + bits.join(' · ') + '. Adjust pacing or intensity if completion or mood is trending down.';
          sdLog('metricsTrendCtx built', trend);
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('Metrics trend build failed:', e); }
    } else { sdLog('metricsTrendCtx skipped — Smart Director off'); }

    const headerBlock = `You are ${persona.name}. ${getPersonaRole(persona)}\nMETHOD: ${method.name}. ${method.detail}\nPACING: ${PACING_RULES[method.pacing]}\nTHEME: "${rough || 'general trance experience'}"`;

    const reminderBlock = persona.reminderMessage
      ? `\nREMINDER for writing as ${persona.name}: "${persona.reminderMessage}"`
      : '';

    const markupBlock = `\nMARKUP: You may wrap KEY COMMAND WORDS in double brackets so the narrator drops voice on them, e.g. "and you might find yourself [[going deeper]] now". Use this 1-3 times per phase, on transition or trance-deepening commands. Do not overuse.`;

    const sceneBlock = (state.aiSceneDirectivesEnabled !== false)
      ? `\nSCENE DIRECTIVES (optional, sparing): If the language of this phase clearly evokes a different audio/visual texture than the current setting, you may emit one or both of:\n  • [BG:type]   — switch soundscape. Valid types: rain, ocean, fire, forest, stream, wind, thunder, storm, drone, bowls, heartbeat, binaural, isochronic, chimes, pink, brown, white, fan, cave, crickets, temple, spaceship, underwater, clock, train, city, owls, whales, none.\n  • [VIZ:type]  — switch visualizer. Valid types: spiral, breathing, candle, moire, tunnel, starfield, colorwash, vortex, mandala, lissajous, aurora, rain, smoke, ink, sacred-geo, waveform, fireflies, ripples, pulse, none.\nUse at most ONE of each per phase, placed at the start of the phase before the first sentence. Skip entirely if the current scene already fits — defaulting to the user's choice is correct.`
      : '';
    const freshBlock = buildFreshnessBlock();
    const sharedContext = trimToTokenBudget([
      { name: 'header',     text: headerBlock,       priority: 5 },
      { name: 'reminder',   text: reminderBlock,     priority: 4 },
      { name: 'crafted',    text: craftedBlock,      priority: 4 },
      { name: 'affirm',     text: affirmBlock,       priority: 4 },
      { name: 'demoNote',   text: demoNote,          priority: 4 },
      { name: 'director',   text: directorBriefCtx,  priority: 3 },
      { name: 'profile',    text: profileCtx,        priority: 3 },
      { name: 'metrics',    text: metricsTrendCtx,   priority: 3 },
      { name: 'markup',     text: markupBlock,       priority: 2 },
      { name: 'scene',      text: sceneBlock,        priority: 2 },
      { name: 'freshSeeds', text: freshBlock,        priority: 2 },
      { name: 'adaptive',   text: adaptiveCtx,       priority: 2 },
      { name: 'memory',     text: memoryCtx,         priority: 1 },
    ], 1200);

    const phaseInstructions = buildPhaseInstructions(phases, targetWords, persona, method, affirmLines);

    _genState = { phases, stateMask, phaseResults, phaseTimes, sharedContext, phaseInstructions, persona, method, genStartTime: Date.now(), priorSummary: '' };

    const retryPhase = async (idx) => {

      if (!_genState) return;
      if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('Please wait — another phase is still being generated.'); return; }
      const gs = _genState;
      const phaseId = gs.phases[idx];

      const originalText = gs.phaseResults[phaseId] || '';
      _aiInProgress = true;
      gs.stateMask[idx] = 'streaming';
      renderGenProgress(gs.phases, gs.stateMask, null, retryPhase);
      try {

        const newText = await generateSinglePhase(gs, idx, { priorDraft: originalText });

        let chosen = newText;
        if (originalText && originalText.trim() && originalText.trim() !== newText.trim()) {
          const pick = await showPhaseDiffModal(originalText, newText, getPhaseLabel(phaseId));
          chosen = pick === 'old' ? originalText : newText;
        }
        gs.phaseResults[phaseId] = chosen;
        gs.stateMask[idx] = 'done';
        renderGenProgress(gs.phases, gs.stateMask, null, retryPhase);
        assembleAndShowScript(gs);
        if (chosen === originalText) {
          notify.info(`Kept original "${getPhaseLabel(phaseId)}".`);
        } else {
          notify.success(`Phase "${getPhaseLabel(phaseId)}" regenerated successfully.`);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        gs.stateMask[idx] = 'error';
        renderGenProgress(gs.phases, gs.stateMask, null, retryPhase);
        notify.error(`Retry failed: ${e.message}. Click the red indicator to try again.`);
      } finally {
        _aiInProgress = false;
      }
    };

    _genStateRetryHandler = retryPhase;
    renderGenProgress(phases, stateMask, `Estimated: ~${phases.length * 60}s remaining`, retryPhase);
    const genStartTime = Date.now();
    const stopTimer = makeElapsedTimer(s => {
      const avgTime = phaseTimes.length > 0 ? phaseTimes.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0) / phaseTimes.length : 60;
      const remSec = Math.max(0, Math.round(avgTime * (phases.length - phaseTimes.length)));
      $('genEta').textContent = `${s}s elapsed · ~${remSec}s remaining`;
    });

    try {
      let priorSummary = '';

      for (let i = 0; i < phases.length; i++) {
        const phase = phases[i];
        const phaseStart = Date.now();
        stateMask[i] = 'streaming';
        renderGenProgress(phases, stateMask, null, retryPhase);

        try {
          const result = await generateSinglePhase(_genState, i);
          phaseResults[phase] = result;
          priorSummary += `\n${phase.toUpperCase()}: ${result.length > 200 ? result.substring(0, 150).replace(/\x5BPAUSE \d+\]/g, '') + '...' : result.replace(/\x5BPAUSE \d+\]/g, '')}`;
          _genState.priorSummary = priorSummary;
          stateMask[i] = 'done';
          phaseTimes.push((Date.now() - phaseStart) / 1000);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(`Phase "${phase}" failed:`, e);
          if (e.message.includes('AI') || e.message.includes('error') || e.message.includes('failed')) {
            stateMask[i] = 'error';
            notify.error(`"${phase}" failed: ${e.message}. Click the red indicator to retry.`);
          } else {
            stateMask[i] = 'warn';
            notify.warn(`"${phase}" had an issue: ${e.message}. Click the yellow indicator to retry.`);
          }

          phaseTimes.push(60);
        }
        renderGenProgress(phases, stateMask, null, retryPhase);
      }

      assembleAndShowScript(_genState);
      const totalTime = Math.round((Date.now() - genStartTime) / 1000);
      const failures = stateMask.filter(s => s === 'error' || s === 'warn').length;
      if (failures > 0) {
        notify.warn(`Script generated in ${totalTime}s with ${failures} phase(s) needing retry. Click indicators to fix.`);
      } else {
        notify.success(`Script generated in ${totalTime}s — ${phases.length} phases complete.`);
      }

    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      notify.error('Script generation failed: ' + e.message);
    } finally {
      _aiInProgress = false;
      stopTimer();
      setLoading('generateScriptBtn', false, 'generate full script');
      setLoading('regenScriptBtn', false);
      if (scriptBuildProgress) scriptBuildProgress.style.display = 'none';

      setStreamingPreview('', '', { hide: true });
    }
  }

  const PAUSE_PROFILES = {
    monotony:       { short: 4, med: 6, long: 8 },
    structured:     { short: 3, med: 5, long: 8 },
    narrative:      { short: 2, med: 4, long: 6 },
    focused:        { short: 3, med: 5, long: 6 },
    confusion:      { short: 2, med: 4, long: 6 },
    fractionation:  { short: 2, med: 3, long: 5 },
    'eye-roll':     { short: 3, med: 5, long: 7 },
    breath:         { short: 1, med: 2, long: 4 },
    'body-scan':    { short: 3, med: 5, long: 7 },
    permissive:     { short: 2, med: 4, long: 6 },
    rapid:          { short: 1, med: 2, long: 8 },
    elman:          { short: 2, med: 4, long: 5 },
  };
  const _DEFAULT_PAUSE_PROFILE = { short: 2, med: 4, long: 6 };

  function _inferPauseMarkers(text, pacingKey) {
    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return text || '';
    const profile = PAUSE_PROFILES[pacingKey] || _DEFAULT_PAUSE_PROFILE;

    const existingMarkers = [];
    let working = text.replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, (m) => {
      existingMarkers.push(m);
      return `\u0003${existingMarkers.length - 1}\u0003`;
    });

    working = working.replace(/^[\t ]*[…\.]{3,}[\t ]*$/gm, `\x5BPAUSE ${profile.long}\x5D`);
    working = working.replace(/^[\t ]*…[\t ]*$/gm, `\x5BPAUSE ${profile.long}\x5D`);

    working = working.replace(/\n{2,}/g, ` \x5BPAUSE ${profile.long}\x5D `);

    working = working.replace(/\n/g, ` \x5BPAUSE ${profile.med}\x5D `);

    working = working.replace(/\s*(?:…|\.{3,})\s*/g, ` \x5BPAUSE ${profile.med}\x5D `);

    working = working.replace(
      /([.!?])\s+(?=["'“‘\-—]?[A-Z])/g,
      (match, punct, offset, full) => {

        const before = full.slice(Math.max(0, offset - 8), offset).toLowerCase();
        if (/\b(?:mr|mrs|ms|dr|st|jr|sr|vs|etc|e\.g|i\.e)$/.test(before)) return match;

        if (/\b[a-z]$/.test(before)) return match;

        if (/\d$/.test(before)) return match;
        return `${punct} \x5BPAUSE ${profile.short}\x5D `;
      }
    );

    working = working.replace(/\u0003(\d+)\u0003/g, (_, idx) => existingMarkers[Number(idx)] || '');

    working = working.replace(
      /\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]\s*\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi,
      (_, a, b) => `\x5BPAUSE ${Math.min(12, parseInt(a, 10) + parseInt(b, 10))}\x5D`
    );

    working = working.replace(
      /\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]\s*\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi,
      (_, a, b) => `\x5BPAUSE ${Math.min(12, parseInt(a, 10) + parseInt(b, 10))}\x5D`
    );

    working = working.replace(/[\t ]{2,}/g, ' ').trim();

    return working;
  }

  async function generateSinglePhase(gs, idx, opts = {}) {
    const phase = gs.phases[idx];

    if (phaseBase(phase) === 'custom') {
      const existing = (gs.phaseResults && gs.phaseResults[phase]) || scaffoldForPhase(phase);
      setStreamingPreview(idx, existing, { done: true });
      return existing;
    }
    const summaryBlock = gs.priorSummary ? `\n\nSO FAR (summary — continue seamlessly, DO NOT repeat):\n${gs.priorSummary}` : '';
    const taskBlock = `\n\n═══ YOUR TASK ═══\n${gs.phaseInstructions[phase]}\n\nREMINDER: You are ${gs.persona.name}. Voice, vocabulary, cadence — match the role above completely. ${gs.method.pacing ? `Pacing must follow the ${gs.method.pacing} rule established earlier.` : ''} No ===PHASE=== markers. Start immediately:`;

    const diversityBlock = (opts.priorDraft && opts.priorDraft.trim())
      ? `\n\n═══ DIVERSITY (this is a RE-ROLL) ═══\nThe previous attempt began: "${opts.priorDraft.trim().slice(0, 120).replace(/\s+/g, ' ')}…"\nWrite something MEANINGFULLY DIFFERENT this time:\n  • Do NOT open with the same word or phrase.\n  • Do NOT repeat the same sentence rhythm.\n  • Choose different sensory details and metaphors.\n  • Same persona voice, same task — different execution.`
      : '';

    const _parts = [
      { name: 'sharedContext', text: gs.sharedContext, priority: 5 },
      { name: 'priorSummary',  text: summaryBlock,     priority: 1 },
      { name: 'taskBlock',     text: taskBlock,        priority: 5 },
      { name: 'diversity',     text: diversityBlock,   priority: 5 },
    ];
    const finalInstruction = trimToTokenBudget(_parts, 900);

    try { logAICall(state.extAiProvider || 'perchance', 'phase-gen', finalInstruction, _parts); } catch {}

    let accumulated = '';
    const onChunk = (data) => {
      if (data.isFromStartWith) return;
      const chunk = data.textChunk || '';
      if (!chunk) return;
      accumulated += chunk;
      setStreamingPreview(idx, accumulated);
    };

    let data;
    try {

      const streamObj = root.aiTextPlugin({
        instruction: finalInstruction,

        stopSequences: ['\n\n\n\n', '\n\n[[', '\n[['],
        hideStartWith: true,
        onChunk,
      });
      data = await streamObj;
    } catch (e) {
      setStreamingPreview(idx, accumulated, { done: true });
      throw new Error('AI call threw: ' + (e?.message || e));
    }

    if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') {
      setStreamingPreview(idx, accumulated, { done: true });
      throw new Error('AI returned an error');
    }

    let raw = (data.generatedText || accumulated || '').trim();
    let text = stripLeadingPhaseHeader(raw, phase);
    if ((!text || text.length < 15) && raw) {
      text = raw
        .replace(PHASE_MARKER_STRIP_RX, ' ')
        .replace(/^(?:[#>*-]+\s*)?(?:phase\s*[:\-]\s*)?[a-z][a-z0-9\s\-]{1,40}:?\s*/i, '')
        .trim();
    }
    setStreamingPreview(idx, text, { done: true });
    if (!text || text.length < 15) throw new Error('Phase returned too little text');

    try {
      text = _inferPauseMarkers(text, gs.method && gs.method.pacing);
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[pause-infer] failed for', phase, '— keeping raw text:', e);
    }
    return text;
  }

  function assembleAndShowScript(gs) {
    let fullScript = '';
    gs.phases.forEach(p => {
      if (!gs.phaseResults[p]) return;
      fullScript += `===${phaseIdToMarker(p)}===
${gs.phaseResults[p]}

`;
    });
    if (fullScript.trim().length > 50) {

      if (state._preGenMode) {
        state._preGenScript = fullScript.trim();
        return;
      }
      state.fullScript = fullScript.trim();
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = [...gs.phases];
      state.parsedScript = parseScript(state.fullScript);
      showScript();
      updateStepUI();
    }
  }

  function parseScript(text) {

    text = _expandRepeatBlocks(text);
    const phases = {};
    const ordered = [];
    const matches = [...text.matchAll(PHASE_MARKER_CAPTURE_RX)];
    if (!matches.length) return { ...phases, ordered: [] };
    for (let i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) {
      const marker = matches[i][1];
      const phaseId = markerToPhaseId(marker);
      const start = matches[i].index + matches[i][0].length;
      const end = i + 1 < matches.length ? matches[i + 1].index : text.length;
      const body = text.substring(start, end).trim();
      phases[phaseId] = body;
      ordered.push(phaseId);
      if (phaseId.startsWith('work')) phases.work = [phases.work, body].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
    }
    phases.ordered = ordered;
    return phases;
  }

  function getScriptMetrics(text) {

    const full = _expandRepeatBlocks(String(text || ''));
    const spokenOnly = stripAllPhaseMarkers(full)
      .replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi, ' ');
    const words = spokenOnly.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
    const pauses = (full.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi) || []).length;
    const pauseSecs = (full.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi) || []).reduce((sum, m) => sum + parseInt(m.match(/\d+/)[0], 10), 0);
    const parsed = parseScript(full);
    const phaseCount = (parsed.ordered || []).length;
    const workBlocks = (parsed.ordered || []).filter(p => p.startsWith('work')).length;
    const affirmBlocks = (parsed.ordered || []).filter(p => p.startsWith('affirm')).length;
    const estimatedMin = Math.round(words / 50 + pauseSecs / 60);
    return { words, pauses, pauseSecs, phaseCount, workBlocks, affirmBlocks, estimatedMin, ordered: parsed.ordered || [] };
  }

  function analyzeSessionScript() {
    const suggestions = [];
    const hasScript = !!state.fullScript;

    if (!hasScript) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'no_script',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'No script generated yet',
        detail: 'Configure your session above, then click "generate full script" to produce the per-phase narration. You can also paste a custom script directly into the text area.',
      });
      return suggestions;
    }

    const metrics = getScriptMetrics(state.fullScript);
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const isSleep = state.intentionType === 'sleep';

    const has = (base) => sections.some(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === base);
    const missingFinishers = [];
    if (!isSleep) {
      if (!has('lightener'))      missingFinishers.push('Lightener');
      if (!has('wake'))           missingFinishers.push('Wake');
      if (!has('reintroduction')) missingFinishers.push('Reintroduction');
    }
    if (missingFinishers.length) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'missing_finishers',
        severity: 'error',
        title: `Missing: ${missingFinishers.join(', ')}`,
        detail: 'Without these phases the session ends in trance. Add the missing phases from the buttons above. (Sleep-intention sessions skip this requirement.)',
        action: {
          label: 'Add missing phases',
          fn: () => { missingFinishers.forEach(m => addPhaseSection(m.toLowerCase())); },
        },
      });
    }

    const deepenerCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener').length;
    const lightenerCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'lightener').length;
    if (!isSleep && deepenerCount !== lightenerCount) {
      const diff = deepenerCount - lightenerCount;
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'unbalanced_deepener',
        severity: 'error',
        title: 'Unbalanced Deepener / Lightener pairs',
        detail: diff > 0
          ? `${deepenerCount} Deepener${deepenerCount>1?'s':''} but only ${lightenerCount} Lightener${lightenerCount===1?'':'s'} — you will go deeper than you return. Add ${Math.abs(diff)} Lightener${Math.abs(diff)>1?'s':''} or remove extra Deepener${diff>1?'s':''}.`
          : `${lightenerCount} Lightener${lightenerCount>1?'s':''} without matching Deepeners (${deepenerCount}). Structurally inconsistent — remove ${Math.abs(diff)} Lightener${Math.abs(diff)>1?'s':''} or add matching Deepener${Math.abs(diff)>1?'s':''}.`,
      });
    }

    if (metrics.workBlocks === 0) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'no_work_blocks',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'Session has no Work blocks',
        detail: 'Work blocks are where the therapeutic content lives. Without any, the session is essentially just an induction + wake cycle with no content between.',
      });
    } else {

      const wordsPerPhase = {};
      sections.forEach(s => {
        const base = phaseBase(s.phaseId);
        const wordCount = String(s.text || '').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi, ' ').split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
        wordsPerPhase[base] = (wordsPerPhase[base] || 0) + wordCount;
      });
      const totalWords = Object.values(wordsPerPhase).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
      if (totalWords > 50) {
        const workPct = (wordsPerPhase.work || 0) / totalWords;
        if (workPct > 0.75) {
          suggestions.push({
            id: 'work_dominates',
            severity: 'warn',
            title: 'Work section is ' + Math.round(workPct * 100) + '% of session',
            detail: 'The work section dominates the session. Consider shorter Work blocks, more Settling/Induction time, or a longer Lightener to improve the arc. Sessions that are nearly all Work can feel front-loaded.',
          });
        }
        const settlingWords = wordsPerPhase.settling || 0;
        if (metrics.estimatedMin >= 10 && totalWords > 0 && settlingWords / totalWords < 0.05) {
          suggestions.push({
            id: 'settling_too_short',
            severity: 'info',
            title: 'Settling phase feels brief',
            detail: `Settling is under 5% of the total for a ${metrics.estimatedMin}-minute session. Longer settling (8–12%) gives the user time to arrive before the induction starts.`,
          });
        }
      }
    }

    const hasAffirmToken = /\{\{affirmation\}\}/i.test(state.fullScript || '');
    const hasAffirmPhase = sections.some(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'affirm');
    const userAffirmRaw = $('userAffirmations')?.value?.trim();
    const userAffirmCount = userAffirmRaw ? userAffirmRaw.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()).length : 0;

    if ((hasAffirmToken || hasAffirmPhase) && userAffirmCount === 0) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'affirmations_missing',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'Affirmations referenced but none defined',
        detail: hasAffirmToken
          ? 'The script uses {{affirmation}} tokens but no user affirmations are defined. Tokens will resolve to a generic fallback. Add personal affirmations in the Affirmations step for a more powerful session.'
          : 'The session includes Affirmation phases but no user affirmations are defined. The affirmation interludes will generate generic content. Add personal affirmations in the Affirmations step.',
      });
    }

    const emptyPhases = sections.filter(s => !s.text || s.text.trim().length < 30);
    if (emptyPhases.length) {
      const labels = emptyPhases.map(s => getPhaseLabel(s.phaseId)).slice(0, 3).join(', ');
      const more = emptyPhases.length > 3 ? ` (+${emptyPhases.length - 3} more)` : '';
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'empty_phases',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: `${emptyPhases.length} phase${emptyPhases.length>1?'s have':' has'} little or no content`,
        detail: `${labels}${more} — ${emptyPhases.length>1?'each has':'it has'} fewer than 30 characters of script text. Regenerate ${emptyPhases.length>1?'these phases':'this phase'} or edit manually before starting.`,
      });
    }

    if (metrics.estimatedMin >= 45) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'session_very_long',
        severity: 'info',
        title: `Estimated runtime is ${metrics.estimatedMin} minutes`,
        detail: 'Sessions over 45 minutes can be hard to stay engaged with, especially for less-experienced practitioners. Consider trimming Work blocks or reducing pause durations if this feels long.',
      });
    } else if (metrics.estimatedMin < 5 && metrics.estimatedMin > 0) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'session_very_short',
        severity: 'info',
        title: `Estimated runtime is only ${metrics.estimatedMin} minute${metrics.estimatedMin===1?'':'s'}`,
        detail: 'Very short sessions leave little room for actual trance. Consider a longer session length or adding more phases.',
      });
    }

    const inductionCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'induction').length;
    if (inductionCount > 1) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'multi_induction',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'Multiple Induction phases detected',
        detail: `The session has ${inductionCount} Induction phases. Fractionation (multi-induction cycles) is not fully supported yet — the session will play but structural tooling treats later inductions as unusual. Use nested Deepeners for progressive deepening within one cycle.`,
      });
    }

    if (!suggestions.length) {
      suggestions.push({
        id: 'all_good',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'Session looks good',
        detail: `~${metrics.estimatedMin} min · ${metrics.phaseCount} phases · ${metrics.workBlocks} work block${metrics.workBlocks===1?'':'s'}. No structural issues detected — ready to start.`,
      });
    }

    return suggestions;
  }

  function renderSessionDiagnostics() {
    const panel = $('sessionDiagnosticsPanel');
    const list = $('sessionDiagnosticsList');
    if (!panel || !list) return;

    if (!$('scriptPreview')?.classList.contains('visible')) {
      panel.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    const suggestions = analyzeSessionScript();
    if (!suggestions.length) { panel.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    panel.style.display = 'block';

    const ICONS = { info: 'ℹ', warn: '⚠', error: '✕' };
    const COLORS = {
      info:  { icon: 'var(--text-dim)',    bg: 'rgba(120,180,240,0.06)', border: 'rgba(120,180,240,0.2)' },
      warn:  { icon: 'var(--neon-amber)',  bg: 'rgba(184,154,74,0.08)',   border: 'rgba(184,154,74,0.25)'  },
      error: { icon: '#ff6b6b',            bg: 'rgba(255,107,107,0.08)', border: 'rgba(255,107,107,0.3)' },
    };
    const _esc = (s) => String(s).replace(/[<>&"']/g, c => ({ '<':'&lt;', '>':'&gt;', '&':'&amp;', '"':'&quot;', "'":'&#39;' }[c]));

    list.innerHTML = suggestions.map(s => {
      const c = COLORS[s.severity] || COLORS.info;
      const actionHtml = s.action
        ? `<button class="diag-action" data-diag-id="${_esc(s.id)}" style="margin-top:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;border:0.5px solid ${c.border};background:transparent;color:${c.icon};cursor:pointer">${_esc(s.action.label)}</button>`
        : '';
      return `<div class="diag-card" style="border:0.5px solid ${c.border};background:${c.bg};padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px">
          <span style="color:${c.icon};font-size:0.85rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;font-weight:600">${ICONS[s.severity]}</span>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:3px">${_esc(s.title)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55">${_esc(s.detail)}</div>
            ${actionHtml}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('.diag-action').forEach(btn => {
      const id = btn.dataset.diagId;
      const s = suggestions.find(x => x.id === id);
      if (s?.action?.fn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          s.action.fn();
          renderSessionDiagnostics();
        });
      }
    });
  }

  function normalizePhaseSections(sections) {
    const cleaned = (sections || []).filter(s => s && s.text && s.text.trim()).map(s => ({ ...s, text: s.text.trim() }));
    let workIdx = 0;
    let affirmIdx = 0;
    return cleaned.map(section => {
      const base = String(section.phaseId || 'work').replace(/-\d+$/, '');
      if (base === 'work') {
        workIdx += 1;
        section.phaseId = `work-${workIdx}`;
      } else if (base === 'affirm') {
        affirmIdx += 1;
        section.phaseId = `affirm-${affirmIdx}`;
      } else {
        section.phaseId = base;
      }
      return section;
    });
  }

  function getScriptSectionsFromState() {

    if (_aiInProgress && _genState && Array.isArray(_genState.phases)) {
      const buf = _genState._streamingBuffers || {};
      return _genState.phases.map(phaseId => ({
        phaseId,

        text: (_genState.phaseResults && _genState.phaseResults[phaseId])
          || buf[phaseId]
          || scaffoldForPhase(phaseId)
          || '',
      }));
    }
    const ordered = state.parsedScript?.ordered?.length ? state.parsedScript.ordered : getPlaybackPhaseOrder();
    const sections = ordered.map(phaseId => ({ phaseId, text: state.parsedScript?.[phaseId] || '' }));
    const generatedSections = sections.filter(s => s.text && s.text.trim());

    if (!generatedSections.length) {

      return ordered.map(phaseId => ({
        phaseId,
        text: scaffoldForPhase(phaseId) || '',
      }));
    }
    return generatedSections;
  }

  const HISTORY_MAX = 60;
  const _historyPast   = [];
  const _historyFuture = [];
  let _historyOnChange = null;
  let _historyPushDebounce = null;
  let _historyPushDebouncePending = null;

  function _historySnapshot() {
    return JSON.stringify({
      scriptSections:      state.scriptSections || [],
      generatedPhaseOrder: state.generatedPhaseOrder || [],
      fullScript:          state.fullScript || null,
      parsedScript:        state.parsedScript || null,
    });
  }

  function _historyApply(json) {
    try {
      const snap = JSON.parse(json);
      state.scriptSections      = snap.scriptSections      || [];
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = snap.generatedPhaseOrder || [];
      state.fullScript          = snap.fullScript;
      state.parsedScript        = snap.parsedScript;

      if (state.fullScript != null) {
        const el = $('scriptText'); if (el) el.value = state.fullScript;
        showScript();
      } else {
        const el = $('scriptText'); if (el) el.value = '';
        $('scriptPreview')?.classList.remove('visible');
        renderPhaseEditor();
      }
      updateStepUI();
      syncGenStateWithPhases();
      _historyNotify();
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[history] apply snapshot failed:', e);
    }
  }

  function _historyNotify() {
    const ub = $('undoBtn'); if (ub) ub.disabled = !history.canUndo();
    const rb = $('redoBtn'); if (rb) rb.disabled = !history.canRedo();
    _historyOnChange?.();
  }

  const history = {
    onchange(fn) { _historyOnChange = fn; },
    push() {
      _historyPast.push(_historySnapshot());
      if (_historyPast.length > HISTORY_MAX) _historyPast.shift();
      _historyFuture.length = 0;
      _historyNotify();
    },

    beginChange() {
      const before = _historySnapshot();
      let committed = false;
      return () => {
        if (committed) return;
        committed = true;
        if (_historySnapshot() === before) return;
        _historyPast.push(before);
        if (_historyPast.length > HISTORY_MAX) _historyPast.shift();
        _historyFuture.length = 0;
        _historyNotify();
      };
    },

    pushDebounced(delayMs = 500) {
      if (_historyPushDebouncePending == null) {

        _historyPushDebouncePending = _historySnapshot();
      }
      if (_historyPushDebounce) clearTimeout(_historyPushDebounce);
      _historyPushDebounce = setTimeout(() => {
        _historyPushDebounce = null;
        const pending = _historyPushDebouncePending;
        _historyPushDebouncePending = null;
        if (pending == null) return;

        if (_historyPast[_historyPast.length - 1] === pending) return;
        if (_historySnapshot() === pending) return;
        _historyPast.push(pending);
        if (_historyPast.length > HISTORY_MAX) _historyPast.shift();
        _historyFuture.length = 0;
        _historyNotify();
      }, delayMs);
    },
    canUndo() { return _historyPast.length > 0; },
    canRedo() { return _historyFuture.length > 0; },
    undo() {
      if (!_historyPast.length) return;
