      _historyFuture.push(_historySnapshot());
      if (_historyFuture.length > HISTORY_MAX) _historyFuture.shift();
      _historyApply(_historyPast.pop());
    },
    redo() {
      if (!_historyFuture.length) return;
      _historyPast.push(_historySnapshot());
      _historyApply(_historyFuture.pop());
    },
    clear() {
      _historyPast.length = 0;
      _historyFuture.length = 0;
      if (_historyPushDebounce) { clearTimeout(_historyPushDebounce); _historyPushDebounce = null; }
      _historyPushDebouncePending = null;
      _historyNotify();
    },
    depth() { return { past: _historyPast.length, future: _historyFuture.length }; },
  };

  function setScriptFromSections(sections, opts = {}) {
    const cleaned = normalizePhaseSections(sections);
    state.scriptSections = cleaned.map(s => ({ ...s }));
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = cleaned.map(s => s.phaseId);

    const allScaffold = cleaned.length > 0 && cleaned.every(s => {
      const sc = (typeof scaffoldForPhase === 'function') ? scaffoldForPhase(s.phaseId) : '';
      return sc && (s.text || '').trim() === sc.trim();
    });
    if (!allScaffold) {
      state.fullScript = cleaned.map(s => `===${phaseIdToMarker(s.phaseId)}===
${s.text.trim()}`).join('\n\n').trim();
      state.parsedScript = parseScript(state.fullScript);
      if (!opts.skipRender) showScript();
    } else {

      if (!opts.skipRender && typeof renderPhaseEditor === 'function') {
        try { renderPhaseEditor(); } catch {}
      }
    }
    updateStepUI();

    syncGenStateWithPhases();
  }

  function computePairMetadata(sections) {

    const deepenerStack = [];
    const meta = sections.map(() => ({ pairGroup: null, depth: null }));
    let curDepth = 0;
    sections.forEach((s, i) => {
      const base = phaseBase(s.phaseId);
      if (base === 'deepener') {
        curDepth++;
        deepenerStack.push({ idx: i, depth: curDepth });
        meta[i] = { pairGroup: 'depth', depth: curDepth };
      } else if (base === 'lightener') {

        const pair = deepenerStack.pop();
        const depth = pair ? pair.depth : 1;
        meta[i] = { pairGroup: 'depth', depth };
        if (curDepth > 0) curDepth--;
      } else if (base === 'level') {

        meta[i] = { pairGroup: 'depth', depth: curDepth };
      } else if (base === 'induction' || base === 'wake' || base === 'reintroduction') {
        meta[i] = { pairGroup: 'trance', depth: null };
      }
    });
    return meta;
  }

  function renderPhaseEditor() {
    const panel = $('phaseEditorPanel');
    const list = $('phaseEditorList');
    if (!panel || !list) return;
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    state.scriptSections = sections;
    if (!sections.length) {
      panel.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    panel.style.display = 'block';
    const meta = computePairMetadata(sections);
    list.innerHTML = sections.map((s, i) => {
      const m = meta[i];
      const base = phaseBase(s.phaseId);
      const isCustom = base === 'custom';
      const isSounding = base === 'sounding';
      const isTeaching = base === 'teaching';
      const isTraining = base === 'training';
      const isMission  = base === 'mission';
      const isGoal     = base === 'goal';

      const scaffoldText = scaffoldForPhase(s.phaseId);
      const isScaffoldOnly = scaffoldText && (s.text || '').trim() === scaffoldText.trim();
      const initialStatus = isCustom ? 'is-done' : (isScaffoldOnly ? 'is-pending' : 'is-done');
      const statusIcon = initialStatus === 'is-pending' ? '○' : '●';
      const rowClass = 'gen-step-row phase-editor-row ' + initialStatus
        + (m.pairGroup ? ' pair-' + m.pairGroup : '')
        + (isCustom ? ' is-custom' : '')
        + (isSounding ? ' is-sounding' : '')
        + (isTeaching ? ' is-teaching' : '')
        + (isTraining ? ' is-training' : '')
        + (isMission  ? ' is-mission'  : '')
        + (isGoal     ? ' is-goal'     : '');
      const depthAttr = m.depth ? ` data-depth="${m.depth}"` : '';
      const tag = m.pairGroup === 'trance'
        ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag tag-trance" title="Induction ↔ Wake / Reintroduction">↕ trance</span>'
        : m.pairGroup === 'depth'
          ? `<span class="phase-pair-tag tag-depth" title="Deepener ↔ Lightener (level ${m.depth})">↕ depth ${m.depth}</span>`
          : isCustom
            ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(0,212,230,0.1);color:var(--neon-cyan)" title="User-authored block — bypasses AI generation">✎ custom</span>'
            : isSounding
              ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(201,168,85,0.1);color:var(--accent-warm)" title="Meta-awareness pause — depth check / witness moment">◉ sounding</span>'
              : isTeaching
                ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(120,200,140,0.1);color:#7ec88c;border-color:rgba(120,200,140,0.35)" title="Psychoeducation — explain the method in plain language">📖 teaching</span>'
                : isTraining
                  ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(201,168,85,0.12);color:var(--accent-warm);border-color:rgba(201,168,85,0.4)" title="Skill rehearsal — repeated practice in trance">⚙ training</span>'
                  : isGoal
                    ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(230,200,100,0.1);color:#e6c864;border-color:rgba(230,200,100,0.4)" title="Outcome anchor — sensory future-pacing">◎ goal</span>'
                    : isMission
                      ? '<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:rgba(255,140,80,0.1);color:#ff9758;border-color:rgba(255,140,80,0.4)" title="Posthypnotic homework — concrete waking-life task">➤ mission</span>'
                      : '';

      const phaseSpoken = (s.text || '').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi, ' ');
      const phaseWords = phaseSpoken.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
      const phasePauseSecs = (s.text.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi) || []).reduce((sum, mm) => sum + parseInt(mm.match(/\d+/)[0], 10), 0);
      const phaseDurSec = Math.round(phaseWords / 50 * 60 + phasePauseSecs);
      const durLabel = phaseDurSec >= 60
        ? `${Math.floor(phaseDurSec/60)}m ${phaseDurSec%60}s`
        : `${phaseDurSec}s`;
      const durTag = `<span class="phase-pair-tag" style="background:transparent;color:var(--text-faint);border-color:var(--glass-border);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums" title="Estimated phase duration: ~${phaseWords} words at 50 wpm + ${phasePauseSecs}s pauses">⏱ ${durLabel}</span>`;

      const previewFull = (s.text || '').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
      const preview = isScaffoldOnly
        ? ''
        : escapeHtml(previewFull.length > 280 ? previewFull.slice(0, 280) + '…' : previewFull);

      const reimagineBtn = isCustom
        ? `<button class="preview-btn phase-reimagine" data-idx="${i}" title="Rewrite this block in your guide's voice">✨ reimagine</button>`
        : '';
      const auditionBtn = `<button class="preview-btn phase-audition" data-idx="${i}" title="Hear this phase aloud — uses current voice settings">🔊</button>`;

      const genBtn = isCustom
        ? ''
        : `<button class="gen-step-row-regen phase-generate${isScaffoldOnly ? ' phase-generate-pending' : ''}" data-idx="${i}" title="${isScaffoldOnly ? 'Generate AI content for this phase' : 'Regenerate this phase'}">↻</button>`;
      return `
      <div class="${rowClass}" data-phase-idx="${i}"${depthAttr} draggable="true">
        <div class="gen-step-row-head">
          <span class="phase-drag-handle" title="Drag to reorder" aria-label="Drag to reorder">≡</span>
          <span class="gen-step-row-icon">${statusIcon}</span>
          <span class="gen-step-row-label">${escapeHtml(getPhaseLabel(s.phaseId))}${tag}${durTag}</span>
          <div class="gen-step-row-actions">
            <button class="preview-btn phase-up" data-idx="${i}" ${i === 0 ? 'disabled' : ''} title="Move up">↑</button>
            <button class="preview-btn phase-down" data-idx="${i}" ${i === sections.length - 1 ? 'disabled' : ''} title="Move down">↓</button>
            <button class="preview-btn phase-duplicate" data-idx="${i}" title="Duplicate this phase below">⎘</button>
            ${auditionBtn}
            ${reimagineBtn}
            ${genBtn}
            <button class="preview-btn phase-remove" data-idx="${i}" title="Remove this phase">×</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="gen-step-row-content" data-content-idx="${i}">${preview}</div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    const timelineWrap = $('phaseTimelineWrap');
    if (timelineWrap) {
      const phaseDurs = sections.map(s => {
        const spoken = (s.text || '').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D/gi, ' ');
        const words = spoken.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
        const pauseSecs = (s.text.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi) || []).reduce((sum, mm) => sum + parseInt(mm.match(/\d+/)[0], 10), 0);
        return Math.max(1, Math.round(words / 50 * 60 + pauseSecs));
      });
      const totalDurSec = phaseDurs.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
      const totalLabel = totalDurSec >= 60
        ? `${Math.floor(totalDurSec/60)}m ${totalDurSec % 60}s`
        : `${totalDurSec}s`;
      const blocks = sections.map((s, i) => {
        const baseKey = phaseBase(s.phaseId);
        const widthPct = (phaseDurs[i] / totalDurSec * 100).toFixed(2);
        const dur = phaseDurs[i];
        const durLbl = dur >= 60 ? `${Math.floor(dur/60)}m${dur % 60 ? ' '+(dur%60)+'s' : ''}` : `${dur}s`;
        const labelText = getPhaseLabel(s.phaseId).replace(/^[^a-z]*/i, '').toLowerCase();

        const showLabel = parseFloat(widthPct) >= 7;
        return `<div class="phase-timeline-block tl-${baseKey}" data-phase-idx="${i}" style="flex:${phaseDurs[i]} 1 0%" title="${escapeHtml(getPhaseLabel(s.phaseId))} — ${durLbl}">${showLabel ? `<span class="phase-timeline-label">${escapeHtml(labelText.split(/\s+/)[0])}</span>` : ''}</div>`;
      }).join('');
      timelineWrap.innerHTML = `
        <div class="phase-timeline">${blocks}</div>
        <div class="phase-timeline-meta">
          <span>${sections.length} phase${sections.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}</span>
          <span>~ ${totalLabel} total</span>
        </div>`;

      timelineWrap.querySelectorAll('.phase-timeline-block').forEach(block => {
        block.addEventListener('click', () => {
          const idx = parseInt(block.dataset.phaseIdx, 10);
          const row = list.querySelector(`.phase-editor-row[data-phase-idx="${idx}"]`);
          if (!row) return;
          row.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
          row.classList.remove('row-flash');

          void row.offsetWidth;
          row.classList.add('row-flash');
        });
      });
    }
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-up').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => movePhaseSection(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10), -1)));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-down').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => movePhaseSection(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10), 1)));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-duplicate').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => duplicatePhaseSection(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10))));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-remove').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => removePhaseSection(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10))));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-reimagine').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => reimagineCustomPhase(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10))));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-audition').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => auditionPhase(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10), btn)));
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-generate').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => generatePhaseInline(parseInt(btn.dataset.idx, 10))));

    let dragSrcIdx = -1;
    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-editor-row').forEach(row => {

      row.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
        if (!e.target.closest('.phase-drag-handle')) {
          row.draggable = false;

          requestAnimationFrame(() => { row.draggable = true; });
        }
      });
      row.addEventListener('dragstart', e => {
        dragSrcIdx = parseInt(row.dataset.phaseIdx, 10);
        row.classList.add('dragging');
        if (e.dataTransfer) {
          e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';

          try { e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', String(dragSrcIdx)); } catch {}
        }
      });
      row.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
        row.classList.remove('dragging');
        list.querySelectorAll('.drop-above, .drop-below').forEach(r => {
          r.classList.remove('drop-above', 'drop-below');
        });
        dragSrcIdx = -1;
      });
      row.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
        if (dragSrcIdx < 0) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        if (e.dataTransfer) e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
        const rect = row.getBoundingClientRect();
        const above = (e.clientY - rect.top) < rect.height / 2;

        list.querySelectorAll('.drop-above, .drop-below').forEach(r => {
          r.classList.remove('drop-above', 'drop-below');
        });

        if (parseInt(row.dataset.phaseIdx, 10) !== dragSrcIdx) {
          row.classList.toggle('drop-above', above);
          row.classList.toggle('drop-below', !above);
        }
      });
      row.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
        row.classList.remove('drop-above', 'drop-below');
      });
      row.addEventListener('drop', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const dstIdx = parseInt(row.dataset.phaseIdx, 10);
        if (dragSrcIdx < 0 || dstIdx < 0 || dragSrcIdx === dstIdx) return;
        const rect = row.getBoundingClientRect();
        const above = (e.clientY - rect.top) < rect.height / 2;

        let finalIdx = above ? dstIdx : dstIdx + 1;
        if (dragSrcIdx < dstIdx) finalIdx -= 1;
        movePhaseSectionTo(dragSrcIdx, finalIdx);
      });
    });

    if (typeof _refreshReimagineModeUI === 'function') _refreshReimagineModeUI();

    list.querySelectorAll('.phase-editor-row').forEach((row, i) => {
      const m = meta[i];
      if (!m.pairGroup) return;
      row.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
        list.querySelectorAll('.phase-editor-row').forEach((other, j) => {
          if (j === i) return;
          const om = meta[j];
          if (m.pairGroup === 'trance' && om.pairGroup === 'trance') other.classList.add('highlight-pair');
          else if (m.pairGroup === 'depth' && om.pairGroup === 'depth' && om.depth === m.depth) other.classList.add('highlight-pair');
        });
      });
      row.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        list.querySelectorAll('.phase-editor-row').forEach(r => r.classList.remove('highlight-pair'));
      });
    });

    renderSessionDiagnostics();
  }

  function movePhaseSection(idx, delta) {
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const j = idx + delta;
    if (j < 0 || j >= sections.length) return;
    const commit = history.beginChange();
    [sections[idx], sections[j]] = [sections[j], sections[idx]];
    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
  }

  function duplicatePhaseSection(idx) {
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= sections.length) return;
    const src = sections[idx];
    if (!src) return;

    let copy;
    try { copy = structuredClone(src); }
    catch { copy = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(src)); }
    const commit = history.beginChange();
    sections.splice(idx + 1, 0, copy);
    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
    notify.info?.('Phase duplicated.');
  }

  function movePhaseSectionTo(srcIdx, dstIdx) {
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    if (srcIdx < 0 || srcIdx >= sections.length) return;
    if (dstIdx < 0) dstIdx = 0;
    if (dstIdx > sections.length - 1) dstIdx = sections.length - 1;
    if (srcIdx === dstIdx) return;
    const commit = history.beginChange();
    const [moved] = sections.splice(srcIdx, 1);
    sections.splice(dstIdx, 0, moved);
    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
  }

  let _auditionActiveBtn = null;
  function _resetAuditionBtn() {
    if (_auditionActiveBtn) {
      _auditionActiveBtn.textContent = '🔊 audition';
      _auditionActiveBtn.classList.remove('phase-audition-active');
      _auditionActiveBtn = null;
    }
  }
  async function auditionPhase(idx, btn) {
    if (document.body.classList.contains('in-session')) {
      notify.info('Phase audition is unavailable during a live session.');
      return;
    }

    if (_auditionActiveBtn === btn) {
      try { speechSynthesis.cancel(); } catch {}
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS?.cancel) try { _localTTS.cancel(); } catch {}
      _resetAuditionBtn();
      return;
    }

    try { speechSynthesis.cancel(); } catch {}
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS?.cancel) try { _localTTS.cancel(); } catch {}
    _resetAuditionBtn();

    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= sections.length) return;
    const s = sections[idx];

    let text = stripLeadingPhaseHeader(s.text || '', s.phaseId);
    text = text.replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    if (!text) { notify.info('Nothing to audition — this phase is empty.'); return; }

    _auditionActiveBtn = btn;
    btn.textContent = '⏸ stop';
    btn.classList.add('phase-audition-active');

    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS?.ready) {
      try {
        await _localTTS.speak(text);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[audition] local TTS failed:', e);
      }
      _resetAuditionBtn();
      return;
    }
    if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) {
      notify.info('Text-to-speech is not available in this browser.');
      _resetAuditionBtn();
      return;
    }
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
    const voices = speechSynthesis.getVoices();
    const voiceName = $('voiceSelect')?.value;
    if (voiceName) {
      const v = voices.find(vv => vv.name === voiceName);
      if (v) u.voice = v;
    }
    u.rate   = state.speechRate || 1.0;
    u.pitch  = state.voicePitch || 0.85;
    u.volume = state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0;
    u.onend = u.onerror = () => _resetAuditionBtn();
    speechSynthesis.speak(u);
  }

  async function removePhaseSection(idx) {
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= sections.length) return;
    const target = sections[idx];
    const base = phaseBase(target.phaseId);

    const partnerIndexes = [];

    if (base === 'induction') {

      sections.forEach((s, i) => {
        if (i === idx) return;
        const b = phaseBase(s.phaseId);
        if (b === 'wake' || b === 'reintroduction') partnerIndexes.push(i);
      });
    } else if (base === 'deepener') {

      const meta = computePairMetadata(sections);
      const targetDepth = meta[idx]?.depth;
      if (targetDepth != null) {

        for (let k = idx + 1; k < sections.length; k++) {
          if (meta[k].pairGroup === 'depth' && phaseBase(sections[k].phaseId) === 'lightener' && meta[k].depth === targetDepth) {
            partnerIndexes.push(k);
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    } else if (base === 'lightener') {

      const meta = computePairMetadata(sections);
      const targetDepth = meta[idx]?.depth;
      if (targetDepth != null) {

        for (let k = idx - 1; k >= 0; k--) {
          if (meta[k].pairGroup === 'depth' && phaseBase(sections[k].phaseId) === 'deepener' && meta[k].depth === targetDepth) {
            partnerIndexes.push(k);
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    } else if (base === 'wake') {

      const reintroIdx = sections.findIndex(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'reintroduction');
      if (reintroIdx >= 0 && reintroIdx !== idx) {
        const also = await confirmAsync('Also remove Reintroduction? Reintroduction without Wake leaves the user mid-emergence.', { okText: 'remove both', cancelText: 'only wake' });
        if (also) partnerIndexes.push(reintroIdx);
      }
    }

    const toRemove = [idx, ...partnerIndexes];
    if (toRemove.length > 1) {
      const names = toRemove.map(i => getPhaseLabel(sections[i].phaseId)).join(', ');
      const ok = await confirmAsync(`Remove ${toRemove.length} paired phases: ${names}?\n\nPhases in a pair should be kept together for safe session structure.`, { okText: 'remove all', cancelText: 'cancel' });
      if (!ok) return;
    }

    const commit = history.beginChange();

    toRemove.sort((a, b) => b - a).forEach(i => sections.splice(i, 1));
    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
    if (partnerIndexes.length > 0) notify.info(`Removed ${toRemove.length} paired phases.`);
  }

  function scaffoldForPhase(phaseId, depth = 1) {
    if (phaseId === 'introduction') {

      return 'Welcome. I\'m here with you. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Today we\'ll work together on what you came here for. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseId === 'permission') {

      return 'Before we begin — do you give yourself permission to do this work? Out loud, with a nod, or just inside. Whatever feels right. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseId === 'settling') return 'Find a comfortable position. Let the day settle. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseId === 'induction') return 'Begin the induction here. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseId === 'deepener' || phaseBase(phaseId) === 'deepener') {
      if (depth <= 1) return 'Deepen the state. Each breath takes you further. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
      if (depth === 2) return 'Now deeper still — another level down. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
      if (depth === 3) return 'Deeper, and deeper yet. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
      return `Descend another level — level ${depth}. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D`;
    }
    if (phaseId === 'lightener' || phaseBase(phaseId) === 'lightener') {
      if (depth <= 1) return 'Begin easing intensity down. Notice the room. Notice the body. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
      return `Come back up one level — from depth ${depth} toward ${depth - 1}. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D`;
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'level') {

      return 'Resting here now, at this depth. \x5BPAUSE 6\x5D Nothing to do. \x5BPAUSE 6\x5D Just continuing — breath finding its own rhythm, body settling deeper into stillness. \x5BPAUSE 6\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'work') return 'Continue the work here. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'affirm') return 'Return to the user\'s affirmations here. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'sounding') {

      return 'Take a sounding now. Notice — without changing anything — how you feel in this moment. The weight of the body. The quality of the breath. The shape of your awareness right now. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'custom') {

      return '(Your custom text here. Edit this directly, or use Reimagine to have your guide rewrite it.) \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseId === 'wake') return 'In a moment, coming all the way back now. Five, returning. Four, breathing deeper. Three, energy returning. Two, eyes beginning to open. One, fully awake and alert. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseId === 'reintroduction') return 'Welcome back. When you feel ready, slowly get up. Stretch. Shake it off. Go about your day. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'teaching') {

      return 'Before we begin, a brief note. What you are about to experience is a focused, attentive state — natural to your nervous system, not unusual. You will hear my voice, you will be able to think and respond, and you will remain in control. The depth will come from your willingness to follow along, not from anything I do. \x5BPAUSE 4\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'training') {

      return 'Now we will practice. Three times — each one a little easier than the last. First time: notice. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D Second time: notice again, with less effort. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D Third time: it happens almost on its own. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'mission') {

      return 'And here is your mission. Tomorrow, when you first notice the urge to do the old thing — pause for one breath. Just one. That single breath is the whole task. \x5BPAUSE 4\x5D That is enough. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'goal') {

      return 'See yourself there. The day this works. The way it looks, the way it feels in your body, the small differences only you would notice. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D Stay there a moment. Let your nervous system learn the shape of it. \x5BPAUSE 5\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'praise') {

      return 'You\'re doing this beautifully. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Just by being here, just by allowing this — that takes something. And you\'re doing it. \x5BPAUSE 4\x5D';
    }
    if (phaseBase(phaseId) === 'reward') {

      return 'And in return for the work you just did, something settles in. A small lift. A quiet ease. \x5BPAUSE 4\x5D Carry that with you. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
    }
    return 'New phase text. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D';
  }

  function addPhaseSection(phaseId) {
    const commit = history.beginChange();
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const base = phaseBase(phaseId);
    const added = [];

    const buildSection = (kind, opts = {}) => {
      const existingCount = countPhaseBase(sections.concat(added), kind);
      let id = kind;

      if (['work', 'affirm', 'deepener', 'lightener', 'sounding', 'custom', 'teaching', 'training', 'mission', 'goal', 'praise', 'reward', 'introduction', 'permission'].includes(kind)) {
        const nextN = existingCount + 1;
        id = nextN > 1 ? `${kind}-${nextN}` : kind;

      }
      return { phaseId: id, text: scaffoldForPhase(id, opts.depth || existingCount + 1) };
    };

    const insertSection = (section) => {
      const insertIdx = findPhaseInsertionIdx(sections, phaseBase(section.phaseId));
      sections.splice(insertIdx, 0, section);
      added.push(section);
    };

    if (base === 'induction') {

      if (countPhaseBase(sections, 'induction') > 0) {
        notify.warn('This session already has an Induction. Fractionation (multi-induction cycles) is not yet supported — add a Deepener for deeper trance within the current cycle, or remove the existing Induction first.');
        return;
      }
      insertSection(buildSection('induction'));
      if (state.intentionType !== 'sleep') {
        const hasWake = countPhaseBase(sections, 'wake') > 0;
        const hasReintro = countPhaseBase(sections, 'reintroduction') > 0;
        if (!hasWake) insertSection(buildSection('wake'));
        if (!hasReintro) insertSection(buildSection('reintroduction'));
      }
    } else if (base === 'deepener') {

      const depthBefore = countPhaseBase(sections, 'deepener');
      const depth = depthBefore + 1;
      if (depth >= 2) {

        const levelDepth = depth - 1;
        const levelId = depth > 2 ? `level-${levelDepth}` : 'level';
        insertSection({ phaseId: levelId, text: scaffoldForPhase('level', levelDepth) });
      }
      insertSection({ phaseId: depth > 1 ? `deepener-${depth}` : 'deepener', text: scaffoldForPhase('deepener', depth) });
      insertSection({ phaseId: depth > 1 ? `lightener-${depth}` : 'lightener', text: scaffoldForPhase('lightener', depth) });
    } else if (base === 'settling' || base === 'wake' || base === 'reintroduction') {

      if (countPhaseBase(sections, base) === 0) insertSection(buildSection(base));
      else notify.info(`${getPhaseLabel(base)} already exists — skipping.`);
    } else if (base === 'lightener') {

      insertSection(buildSection('lightener'));
    } else if (base === 'work' || base === 'affirm' || base === 'teaching' || base === 'training' || base === 'mission' || base === 'goal') {

      insertSection(buildSection(base));
    } else {
      insertSection({ phaseId: base, text: scaffoldForPhase(base) });
    }

    ['work', 'affirm', 'deepener', 'level', 'lightener', 'sounding', 'custom', 'teaching', 'training', 'mission', 'goal'].forEach(kind => {
      const indexes = sections.map((s, i) => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === kind ? i : -1).filter(i => i >= 0);
      if (indexes.length >= 2) {
        indexes.forEach((sectionIdx, n) => {
          sections[sectionIdx] = { ...sections[sectionIdx], phaseId: `${kind}-${n + 1}` };
        });
      }
    });

    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
    if (added.length > 1) {
      const labels = added.map(s => getPhaseLabel(s.phaseId)).join(' + ');
      notify.info(`Added paired phases: ${labels}`);
    }
  }

  function _refreshReimagineModeUI() {
    const mode = state.reimagineMode || (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false ? 'guide' : 'smart');
    state.reimagineMode = mode;
    document.querySelectorAll('.reimagine-mode-btn').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.mode === mode);
    });
    const hint = $('reimagineModeHint');
    if (hint) hint.textContent = mode === 'smart'
      ? 'Uses your profile + memory to personalize the rewrite.'
      : 'Persona voice only — no profile data injected.';

    const row = $('reimagineModeRow');
    if (row) {
      const hasCustom = (state.scriptSections || []).some(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'custom');
      row.style.display = hasCustom ? '' : 'none';
    }
  }

  async function reimagineCustomPhase(idx) {
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('An AI call is already in progress — try again in a moment.'); return; }
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const section = sections[idx];
    if (!section || phaseBase(section.phaseId) !== 'custom') return;
    const userText = (section.text || '').trim();
    if (!userText || userText.length < 8) {
      notify.info('Write something in the block first — Reimagine needs a draft to work from.');
      return;
    }
    const mode = state.reimagineMode || (state.smartDirectorEnabled === false ? 'guide' : 'smart');
    const persona = getPersona();
    const method = getMethod();
    const personaRole = getPersonaRole(persona);

    const voiceBlock = `You are ${persona.name}.\n${personaRole}\n\nMETHOD CONTEXT: ${method.name} — ${method.detail}`;
    const profileBlock = mode === 'smart' ? getProfileContext() : '';
    const taskBlock = `\n\n═══ YOUR TASK ═══
The user wrote the following text and wants you to REIMAGINE it in your voice.

Their draft:
"""
${userText}
"""

Rewrite it as ${persona.name} — preserve their INTENT and meaning, but use YOUR vocabulary, cadence, and signature phrasing. Keep similar overall length (within ±30%). Use natural pacing — paragraph breaks for longer pauses, ellipses (…) for held moments. Output ONLY the rewritten text — no preamble, no commentary, no stage directions, no square-bracket notes, no markers like ===CUSTOM===.

Start immediately:`;

    const instruction = trimToTokenBudget([
      { name: 'voice',   text: voiceBlock,   priority: 5 },
      { name: 'profile', text: profileBlock, priority: 3 },
      { name: 'task',    text: taskBlock,    priority: 5 },
    ], 700);

    const btn = document.querySelector(`.phase-reimagine[data-idx="${idx}"]`);
    const origLabel = btn ? btn.textContent : '';
    if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ rewriting…'; }
    _aiInProgress = true;
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(instruction, { stopSequences: ['\n\n[[', '\n\n---', '\n===', '\n\n\n'] });
      if (!result || !result.generatedText) throw new Error(result?._note || 'no text returned');

      let newText = result.generatedText
        .replace(/^=+\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*=+\s*/i, '')
        .replace(/^\s*["'""'']\s*/, '')
        .replace(/\s*["'""'']\s*$/, '')
        .trim();
      if (!newText || newText.length < 8) throw new Error('AI returned too little text');

      try {
        newText = _inferPauseMarkers(newText, method && method.pacing);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[pause-infer] failed for reimagine — keeping raw text:', e);
      }

      let chosen = newText;
      if (typeof showPhaseDiffModal === 'function') {
        const pick = await showPhaseDiffModal(userText, newText, getPhaseLabel(section.phaseId));
        chosen = pick === 'old' ? userText : newText;
      }
      if (chosen !== userText) {
        const commit = history.beginChange();
        const fresh = getScriptSectionsFromState();

        if (fresh[idx] && phaseBase(fresh[idx].phaseId) === 'custom') {
          fresh[idx] = { ...fresh[idx], text: chosen };
          setScriptFromSections(fresh);
          commit();
          notify.success(`${getPhaseLabel(section.phaseId)} reimagined in ${persona.name}'s voice.`);
        } else {

          notify.info('Editor changed during rewrite. Result discarded.');
        }
      } else {
        notify.info('Kept your original.');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[reimagine] failed:', e);
      notify.error(`Reimagine failed: ${e.message || e}`);
    } finally {
      _aiInProgress = false;
      if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = origLabel || '✨ reimagine'; }
    }
  }

  async function generatePhaseInline(idx) {
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('An AI call is already in progress — try again in a moment.'); return; }
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const section = sections[idx];
    if (!section) return;
    if (phaseBase(section.phaseId) === 'custom') {

      return reimagineCustomPhase(idx);
    }

    if (_genState && typeof _genStateRetryHandler === 'function') {
      syncGenStateWithPhases();

      const targetPhase = section.phaseId;
      const gsIdx = _genState.phases.indexOf(targetPhase);
      if (gsIdx === -1) {
        notify.warn('Phase index out of sync — try regenerating the full script.');
        return;
      }

      const btn = document.querySelector(`.phase-generate[data-idx="${idx}"]`);
      const origLabel = btn?.textContent;
      if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ generating…'; }
      try {
        await _genStateRetryHandler(gsIdx);
      } finally {
        if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = origLabel || '✨ generate'; }
      }
      return;
    }

    notify.info('First-time generation — running the full pass so this phase has proper context.');
    return generateFullScript();
  }

  function resetPhaseOrderToDefault() {
    if (!state.fullScript) return;
    const commit = history.beginChange();
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = getPhaseList();
    state.parsedScript = parseScript(state.fullScript);
    const sections = [];
    const used = new Set();
    for (const phaseId of state.generatedPhaseOrder) {
      if (state.parsedScript[phaseId]) {
        sections.push({ phaseId, text: state.parsedScript[phaseId] });
        used.add(phaseId);
      }
    }
    for (const phaseId of state.parsedScript.ordered || []) {
      if (!used.has(phaseId)) sections.push({ phaseId, text: state.parsedScript[phaseId] });
    }
    setScriptFromSections(sections);
    commit();
  }

  function showScript() {
    _scriptEditedSinceGen = false;
    if (!state.fullScript) { $('scriptStats').innerHTML = 'No script loaded.'; $('scriptPreview').classList.add('visible'); renderPhaseEditor(); return; }
    $('scriptText').value = state.fullScript;
    const metrics = getScriptMetrics(state.fullScript);
    $('scriptStats').innerHTML = `<strong>${metrics.words}</strong> words · <strong>${metrics.pauses}</strong> pauses (${metrics.pauseSecs}s) · <strong>${metrics.phaseCount}</strong> phases · <strong>${metrics.workBlocks}</strong> work block${metrics.workBlocks === 1 ? '' : 's'} · estimated: <strong>${metrics.estimatedMin} min</strong><br>Phase header lines are internal structure markers. Spoken content is preserved below them.`;
    $('scriptPreview').classList.add('visible');
    renderPhaseEditor();
    renderDirectorWorkCard();
  }

  function _analyzeSessionQuality() {
    const out = [];
    const method = state.method || null;
    const intent = state.intentionType || null;
    const intentText = ($('intentionInput')?.value || '').trim();
    const length = state.length || 'medium';

    if (!method) {
      out.push({
        id: 'no_method',
        severity: 'error',
        title: 'No method selected',
        detail: 'Pick a method on Step 2. The script generator needs one to shape the induction phase.',
      });
    }
    if (!intent && !intentText) {
      out.push({
        id: 'no_intent',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'No intention set',
        detail: 'Step 3 has both a category and a free-text intention. Either alone is fine — together gives the script the most direction. Without either, the session falls back to a generic deepening.',
      });
    }

    const sleepIntents = new Set(['sleep']);
    const energyIntents = new Set(['energy', 'performance']);
    const rapidMethods = new Set(['handshake-interrupt', 'arm-drop', 'magnetic-gaze', 'shock-induction', 'dave-elman']);
    const advancedDeepMethods = new Set(['somnambulism', 'hallucination-pos', 'hallucination-neg', 'regression', 'time-distortion']);
    if (intent && method) {
      if (sleepIntents.has(intent) && rapidMethods.has(method)) {
        out.push({
          id: 'mismatch_rapid_sleep',
          severity: 'warn',
          title: 'Rapid induction with sleep intent',
          detail: `${method} is a fast/abrupt method. For sleep, slow inductions like progressive relaxation, 4-7-8 breath, or staircase descent track better with the body's wind-down rhythm.`,
        });
      }
      if (energyIntents.has(intent) && method === 'highway') {
        out.push({
          id: 'mismatch_monotony_energy',
          severity: 'warn',
          title: 'Monotony method with energy intent',
          detail: 'Highway induction works through sensory monotony — opposite of activation. For energy/performance intents, try eye-roll, breath-478 (used as activation), or Ericksonian.',
        });
      }
      if (length === 'micro' && advancedDeepMethods.has(method)) {
        out.push({
          id: 'mismatch_advanced_micro',
          severity: 'warn',
          title: 'Advanced phenomenon in a 2-minute session',
          detail: `${method} typically requires deep trance, which takes longer than 2 minutes to establish for most users. Consider a longer session or pair with a deepener.`,
        });
      }
    }

    const webcamOn = !!$('webcamOptInThisSession')?.checked;
    const sensorOn = !!$('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession')?.checked;
    const micOn    = !!$('micOptInThisSession')?.checked;
    const pacingEnabled = !!state.pacingSettings?.enabled;
    if (pacingEnabled && !webcamOn && !sensorOn) {
      out.push({
        id: 'pacing_no_signal',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'Dynamic pacing has no engagement source',
        detail: 'Dynamic pacing modulates speed from the engagement score. With neither webcam attention nor sensor bridge active, engagement stays at a default 0.5 and pacing won\'t track real signals — it\'ll just hold a midpoint speed.',
        action: { label: 'Open Step 5 controls', fn: () => {
          const stepBtn = document.querySelector('[data-step="5"]'); if (stepBtn) stepBtn.click();
        }},
      });
    }
    const rampMode = state.rampSettings?.mode;
    if (state.rampSettings?.enabled && (rampMode === 'engagement' || rampMode === 'adaptive') && !webcamOn && !sensorOn) {
      out.push({
        id: 'ramp_no_signal',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'Engagement-driven ramp has no signal source',
        detail: `Intensity ramp mode is "${rampMode}" but no engagement source is enabled. The ramp will use whatever default engagement value the engine reports (typically 0.5), which makes the curve degenerate. Switch to mode "time" or enable webcam / sensor bridge.`,
      });
    }

    const hapticOn = !!$('hapticOptInThisSession')?.checked;
    if (hapticOn && !hapticBridge.isReady?.()) {
      out.push({
        id: 'haptic_no_device',
        severity: 'warn',
        title: 'Haptic enabled but no device connected',
        detail: 'The haptic toggle is on but Intiface either isn\'t running or hasn\'t reported a device yet. Sentinels and patterns will silently no-op. Start Intiface Central, click "reconnect", or turn the toggle off if you don\'t want haptics.',
      });
    }
    const hasFunscript = !!funscriptEngine?.getTrack?.();
    if (hapticOn && !hasFunscript) {
      out.push({
        id: 'haptic_no_track',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'Haptic enabled but no track loaded',
        detail: 'Without a funscript, haptic output relies entirely on AI [HAPTIC:…] sentinels embedded in the script. To get continuous motion, load a pattern (✨), generate one with "🎯 fit to session", or load a .funscript file.',
      });
    }

    const voiceSel = $('voiceSelect');
    if (voiceSel && voiceSel.value && voiceSel.value !== 'none' && voiceSel.value !== 'browser-default') {
      try {
        const voices = window.speechSynthesis?.getVoices?.() || [];
        if (voices.length && !voices.some(v => v.name === voiceSel.value || v.voiceURI === voiceSel.value)) {
          out.push({
            id: 'voice_unavailable',
            severity: 'warn',
            title: 'Selected voice no longer available',
            detail: `The voice "${voiceSel.value}" isn\'t in this browser\'s current voice list. The session will fall back to the system default. Pick a voice from the list to fix this.`,
          });
        }
      } catch {}
    }

    if (intent === 'sleep') {
      const rate = parseFloat($('rateRange')?.value);
      if (Number.isFinite(rate) && rate > 1.05) {
        out.push({
          id: 'sleep_brisk_rate',
          severity: 'warn',
          title: 'Sleep intent with brisk speech rate',
          detail: `Speech rate is ${rate.toFixed(2)}× — likely too brisk for sleep induction. Sleep sessions track better at 0.85–1.0×. The slower rate gives the parasympathetic system room to engage.`,
        });
      }
    }
    if ((intent === 'energy' || intent === 'performance')) {
      const rate = parseFloat($('rateRange')?.value);
      if (Number.isFinite(rate) && rate < 0.9) {
        out.push({
          id: 'energy_slow_rate',
          severity: 'warn',
          title: 'Energy intent with slow speech rate',
          detail: `Speech rate is ${rate.toFixed(2)}× — possibly too slow for activation. Energy / performance sessions benefit from rates around 1.05–1.2× to match the upward arc.`,
        });
      }
    }

    const userAff = ($('userAffirmations')?.value || '').trim();
    const blueprint = (typeof getSessionPhaseBlueprint === 'function') ? getSessionPhaseBlueprint() : [];
    const hasAffirmPhase = blueprint.some(p => /^affirm/.test(p));
    if (hasAffirmPhase && !userAff) {
      out.push({
        id: 'affirm_phase_no_text',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'Affirm phase scheduled but no affirmations entered',
        detail: 'Step 4 lets you provide affirmation lines that get woven into affirm phases. Without any, the AI will draft generic ones — which works but is more impersonal than your own wording.',
      });
    }

    if ((length === 'extended' || length === 'deep' || length === 'marathon')) {
      const safetyMaxIntensity = state.safetySettings?.maxIntensity;
      if (Number.isFinite(safetyMaxIntensity) && safetyMaxIntensity >= 1.5) {
        out.push({
          id: 'long_no_safety_floor',
          severity: 'info',
          title: 'Long session with high intensity ceiling',
          detail: `${length} sessions can drift in intensity over time. Your maxIntensity is ${safetyMaxIntensity}× — consider lowering to 1.2× or 1.3× for long sessions to keep the experience manageable.`,
        });
      }
    }

    const personalizationOn = !!$('shareProfileWithAi')?.checked;
    const hasProfileBio = ($('pfBio')?.value || '').trim().length > 10;
    if (personalizationOn && !hasProfileBio) {
      out.push({
        id: 'personalize_no_bio',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'AI personalization on but profile is sparse',
        detail: 'You\'ve opted in to share profile details with the AI, but your profile bio is empty. Adding a few sentences (current life context, personal anchors, what\'s been working) gives the AI more material to personalize with.',
      });
    }

    if (!out.length) {
      out.push({
        id: 'all_good',
        severity: 'info',
        title: 'No issues detected',
        detail: 'Session configuration looks clean. Generate the script and you\'re good to go.',
      });
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _renderSessionSuggestions() {
    const list = $('sessionSuggestionsList');
    if (!list) return;
    const items = _analyzeSessionQuality();
    const ICONS  = { info: 'ℹ', warn: '⚠', error: '✕' };
    const COLORS = {
      info:  { icon: '#5fa0dc', bg: 'rgba(95,160,220,0.06)',  border: 'rgba(95,160,220,0.18)' },
      warn:  { icon: '#f0a04a', bg: 'rgba(240,160,74,0.06)',  border: 'rgba(240,160,74,0.22)' },
      error: { icon: '#e05050', bg: 'rgba(224,80,80,0.06)',   border: 'rgba(224,80,80,0.22)'  },
    };
    list.innerHTML = items.map((s, idx) => {
      const c = COLORS[s.severity] || COLORS.info;
      const safeTitle  = escapeHtml(s.title);
      const safeDetail = escapeHtml(s.detail);
      const actionHtml = s.action
        ? `<button class="suggestion-action btn secondary" data-suggest-idx="${idx}" style="margin-top:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.62rem;color:${c.icon};border-color:${c.border}">${escapeHtml(s.action.label)}</button>`
        : '';
      return `<div style="border:0.5px solid ${c.border};background:${c.bg};border-radius:4px;padding:7px 9px;margin-bottom:5px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px">
          <span style="color:${c.icon};font-size:0.85rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px">${ICONS[s.severity]}</span>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div style="font-size:0.74rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px">${safeTitle}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5">${safeDetail}</div>
            ${actionHtml}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('.suggestion-action').forEach(btn => {
      const idx = Number(btn.dataset.suggestIdx);
      const s = items[idx];
      if (s?.action?.fn) btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        try { s.action.fn(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[suggestion action]', e); }
        _renderSessionSuggestions();
      });
    });

    const badge = $('sessionSuggestionsCount');
    if (badge) {
      const errs  = items.filter(s => s.severity === 'error').length;
      const warns = items.filter(s => s.severity === 'warn').length;
      const infos = items.filter(s => s.severity === 'info').length;
      if (errs)        badge.textContent = `— ${errs} error${errs === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
      else if (warns)  badge.textContent = `— ${warns} warning${warns === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
      else if (infos === 1 && items[0].id === 'all_good') badge.textContent = '— ready';
      else             badge.textContent = `— ${infos} note${infos === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;

      const det = $('sessionSuggestionsDetails');
      if (det && (errs || warns) && !det.dataset.userToggled) det.open = true;
    }
  }

  function renderDirectorWorkCard() {
    const card = $('directorWorkCard');
    if (!card) return;
    const sdOn = state.smartDirectorEnabled !== false;
    if (!sdOn) {
      card.style.display = 'none';
      card.innerHTML = '';
      return;
    }
    const lines = [];
    const rec = state._lastAdaptiveRec;
    const brief = state._lastDirectorBrief;
    const tagsCount = state._sessionTags?.size || 0;

    if (!rec && !brief && tagsCount === 0) {
      card.style.display = 'none';
      card.innerHTML = '';
      return;
    }
    const confLabel = (c) => {
      if (c == null) return '';
      if (c >= 0.6) return ' <span style="color:var(--accent-green);font-size:0.62rem">strong</span>';
      if (c >= 0.3) return ' <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem">moderate</span>';
      if (c >= 0.15) return ' <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem">tentative</span>';
      return '';
    };
    if (rec) {
      const persona = state.personas.find(p => p.id === rec.persona)?.name;
      const method  = METHODS.find(m => m.id === rec.method)?.name;
      const adaptive = [];
      if (persona)         adaptive.push(`guide <strong>${escapeHtml(persona)}</strong>${confLabel(rec._confidence?.persona)}`);
      if (method)          adaptive.push(`method <strong>${escapeHtml(method)}</strong>${confLabel(rec._confidence?.method)}`);
      if (rec.length)      adaptive.push(`length <strong>${escapeHtml(rec.length)}</strong>${confLabel(rec._confidence?.length)}`);
      if (rec.soundscape && rec.soundscape !== 'none') adaptive.push(`soundscape <strong>${escapeHtml(rec.soundscape)}</strong>${confLabel(rec._confidence?.soundscape)}`);
      if (adaptive.length) lines.push('<div>Adaptive picks: ' + adaptive.join(' · ') + '</div>');
    }
    if (brief?.recoveryMode) {
      lines.push('<div style="color:var(--neon-amber)">Recovery mode active — lighter session shape.</div>');
    }
    const bias = state.directorBias || 0;
    if (bias !== 0) {
      const dir = bias > 0 ? 'forward' : 'cautious';
      lines.push(`<div>Calibration: ${bias > 0 ? '+' : ''}${bias} (${dir} tone)</div>`);
    }
    if (tagsCount > 0) {
      const tagList = [...state._sessionTags].slice(0, 5).join(', ');
      lines.push(`<div style="color:var(--text-faint)">Session tagged: ${escapeHtml(tagList)}</div>`);
    }
    if (!lines.length) {
      card.style.display = 'none';
      card.innerHTML = '';
      return;
    }
    card.style.display = '';
    card.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:6px">why this session is shaped this way</div>${lines.join('')}`;
  }
  function hideScript() {
    state.fullScript = null;
    state.parsedScript = null;
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = [];
    state.scriptSections = [];
    $('scriptPreview').classList.remove('visible');
    renderPhaseEditor();
    updateStepUI();
    history.clear();

    try { sessionBus.notifyChange('hideScript'); } catch {}
  }

  const sessionBus = (() => {
    const subs = [];
    let lastSignature = '';
    function signature() {
      try {
        const phaseOrder = (state.scriptSections || []).map(s => s.phaseId || '?').join('|')
          || (state.generatedPhaseOrder || []).join('|')
          || (state.parsedScript?.ordered || []).join('|');
        const scriptHash = state.fullScript
          ? `${state.fullScript.length}:${state.fullScript.charCodeAt(0) || 0}:${state.fullScript.charCodeAt(state.fullScript.length - 1) || 0}`
          : 'none';
        return [
          state.length || '?',
          state.selectedPersonaId || '?',
          state.selectedMethodId || '?',
          state.intentionType || '?',
          phaseOrder,
          scriptHash,
          (state._phaseExtras || []).join(','),
        ].join('::');
      } catch { return String(Date.now()); }
    }
    return {
      signature,
      on(handler) {
        if (typeof handler === 'function') subs.push(handler);
        return () => {
          const i = subs.indexOf(handler);
          if (i >= 0) subs.splice(i, 1);
        };
      },
      notifyChange(reason) {
        const sig = signature();
        if (sig === lastSignature) return;
        const prev = lastSignature;
        lastSignature = sig;
        for (const h of subs) {
          try { h({ reason: reason || 'unknown', signature: sig, prevSignature: prev }); }
          catch (e) { console.warn('[sessionBus] subscriber error:', e); }
        }
      },

      get current() { return lastSignature; },
    };
  })();

  sessionBus.on(({ reason, signature, prevSignature }) => {

    const prevPhaseOrder = prevSignature.split('::')[4] || '';
    const newPhaseOrder = signature.split('::')[4] || '';
    if (prevPhaseOrder !== newPhaseOrder) {

      try { if (typeof renderPhaseEditor === 'function') renderPhaseEditor(); } catch {}
    }

    const prevScript = prevSignature.split('::')[5] || '';
    const newScript = signature.split('::')[5] || '';
    if (prevScript !== newScript || prevPhaseOrder !== newPhaseOrder) {
      try { if (typeof renderTimeline === 'function') renderTimeline(); } catch {}
    }
  });

  let _scriptEditedSinceGen = false;

  const DIRECTIVE_RX = /\b(focus|notice|feel|imagine|relax|breathe|let|allow|sense|listen|watch|follow|deepen|drift|sink|melt|soften|release|surrender|drop|sleep|close|open|rest|calm|trust|safe|deeper|down|slowly|gently|carefully|now|picture|visualize|float)\b/i;
  const ELLIPSIS_RX = /\.{2,}|…/;

  function _autoTempoDefaults() {
    return {
      stripChars: '',
      stripOrphanPunctuation: true,
      ellipsisMode: 'keep',
      collapseSpaces: true,
    };
  }

  function _autoTempoOpts() {
    return { ..._autoTempoDefaults(), ...(state.autoTempoOptions || {}) };
  }

  function _stripScriptChars(text, chars, collapseSpaces) {
    if (!chars || !text) return text;

    const cleanChars = chars.replace(/\s+/g, '');
    if (!cleanChars) return text;

    const PRESERVE_RX = /(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]|\x7B\x7B[^}]+\x7D\x7D)/gi;
    const pieces = text.split(PRESERVE_RX);
    const stripSet = new Set(cleanChars);
    let result = pieces.map(p => {
      if (PRESERVE_RX.test(p)) { PRESERVE_RX.lastIndex = 0; return p; }

      return Array.from(p).filter(c => !stripSet.has(c)).join('');
    }).join('');

    if (collapseSpaces !== false) {

      result = result.replace(/[ \t]{2,}/g, ' ');

      result = result.replace(/ +([.,;:!?])/g, '$1');
    }
    return result;
  }

  const ELLIPSIS_VARIANTS_RX = /(?:\u2026|\u2025|\.{3,}|\u30FB{2,}|\u00B7{2,}|\u2027{2,}|\uFF0E{3,})/g;

  function _normalizeEllipsis(text, mode) {
    if (!text || !mode || mode === 'keep') return text;
    if (mode === 'period') return text.replace(ELLIPSIS_VARIANTS_RX, '.');
    if (mode === 'remove') return text.replace(ELLIPSIS_VARIANTS_RX, '');
    return text;
  }

  function _stripOrphanPunctuation(text) {
    if (!text) return text;
    let prev;
    let cur = text;

    do {
      prev = cur;
      cur = cur
        .replace(/\s([.,;:!?])(?=\s|$)/g, '')
        .replace(/\s(?:\u2026|\u2025|\.{2,})(?=\s|$)/g, '');
    } while (cur !== prev);

    return cur.replace(/  +/g, ' ');
  }

  function fixScriptTimings(scriptText) {
    const phaseRx = PHASE_MARKER_SPLIT_RX;
    const opts = _autoTempoOpts();

    function pauseFor(sentence) {
      const words = sentence.split(/\s+/).length;
      const isDirective = DIRECTIVE_RX.test(sentence);
      const hasEllipsis = ELLIPSIS_RX.test(sentence);
      const isQuestion = sentence.endsWith('?');

      if (isDirective && words <= 8) return 5;
      if (isDirective) return Math.min(6, 4 + Math.floor(words / 10));

      if (hasEllipsis) return Math.min(5, 3 + Math.floor(words / 10));
      if (isQuestion) return Math.min(5, 3 + Math.floor(words / 8));

      return Math.min(5, 2 + Math.floor(words / 5));
    }

    function processSegment(text) {

      const clean = text
        .replace(/^#+\s+.*$/gm, '')
        .replace(/\[[^\]]+\]/g, m =>
          /^\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]$/i.test(m) ? m : ''
        ).replace(/  +/g, ' ').trim();
      if (!clean) return '';

      let sentences = clean.split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).filter(s => s.trim().length > 0);

      const broken = [];
      for (const sent of sentences) {
        if (sent.split(/\s+/).length > 30) {
          const clauses = sent.split(/(?<=[;—–])\s+|(?<=,)\s+(?=\w)/);
          let buf = '';
          for (const cl of clauses) {
            const combined = buf ? buf + ' ' + cl : cl;

            if (combined.split(/\s+/).length > 22 && buf && buf.split(/\s+/).length >= 4) {
              broken.push(buf.trim()); buf = cl;
            } else buf = combined;
          }
          if (buf.trim()) broken.push(buf.trim());
        } else broken.push(sent);
      }
      sentences = broken;
      if (!sentences.length) return clean;

      const out = [sentences[0]];
      for (let i = 1; i < sentences.length; i++) {
        out.push(`\x5BPAUSE ${pauseFor(sentences[i - 1])}\x5D`);
        out.push(sentences[i]);
      }
      return out.join(' ');
    }

    let preNormalized = scriptText;
    if (opts.ellipsisMode && opts.ellipsisMode !== 'keep') {

      const PRESERVE_RX = /(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]|\x7B\x7B[^}]+\x7D\x7D)/gi;
      preNormalized = scriptText.split(PRESERVE_RX).map(p => {
        if (PRESERVE_RX.test(p)) { PRESERVE_RX.lastIndex = 0; return p; }
        return _normalizeEllipsis(p, opts.ellipsisMode);
      }).join('');
    }

    const phaseParts = preNormalized.split(phaseRx);
    const isMarker = /===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===/i;
    const processed = phaseParts.map(part => {
      if (isMarker.test(part)) return part;

      const chunks = part.split(/(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])/gi);
      return chunks.map(chunk =>
        /\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/i.test(chunk) ? chunk : processSegment(chunk)
      ).join(' ');
    });

    let fixed = processed.join('\n').replace(/  +/g, ' ');

    const pauses = (fixed.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi) || []).map(p => parseInt(p.match(/\d+/)[0], 10));
    const unique = new Set(pauses);
    if (pauses.length > 4 && unique.size === 1) {
      fixed = fixed.replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, () => {
        const jitter = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4) - 1;
        return `\x5BPAUSE ${Math.max(2, 3 + jitter)}\x5D`;
      });
    }

    fixed = fixed.replace(/\x5Bpause\s+(\d+)\x5D/gi, (m, n) => `\x5BPAUSE ${n}\x5D`);

    if (opts.stripChars) fixed = _stripScriptChars(fixed, opts.stripChars, opts.collapseSpaces !== false);

    if (opts.stripOrphanPunctuation !== false) {

      const PRESERVE_RX = /(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])/gi;
      fixed = fixed.split(PRESERVE_RX).map(p => {
        return /^\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]$/i.test(p) ? p : _stripOrphanPunctuation(p);
      }).join('');

      fixed = fixed.replace(/  +/g, ' ');
    }

    fixed = fixed.replace(/(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])\s*[.,;:!?]+(?=\s*\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])/g, '$1');
    fixed = fixed.replace(/(\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])\s*[.,;:!?]+(?=\s+\S)/g, '$1');
    fixed = fixed.replace(/(?<=\S)\s+[.,;:!?]+\s*(?=\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\])/g, ' ');

    let collapsed;
    do {
      collapsed = false;
      fixed = fixed.replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]\s*\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/g, (_, a, b) => {
        collapsed = true;
        return `\x5BPAUSE ${Math.min(12, parseInt(a, 10) + parseInt(b, 10))}\x5D`;
      });
    } while (collapsed);

    if (opts.collapseSpaces !== false) fixed = fixed.replace(/[ \t]{2,}/g, ' ');

    return fixed;
  }

  if (!state._historyFilter) {
    state._historyFilter = { mode: null, persona: null, method: null, moodBand: null, tag: null };
  }

  if (!state._historyCompareMode) state._historyCompareMode = false;
  if (!state._historyCompareSel)  state._historyCompareSel  = [];

  function _applyHistoryFilter(history) {
    const f = state._historyFilter || {};
    if (!f.mode && !f.persona && !f.method && !f.moodBand && !f.tag) return history;
    return history.filter(s => {
      if (f.mode) {
        const m = s.mode || 'regular';
        if (m !== f.mode) return false;
      }
      if (f.persona && (s.guide || s.personaId) !== f.persona) return false;
      if (f.method  && (s.method || s.methodId) !== f.method)   return false;
      if (f.moodBand) {
        const delta = (Number(s.postMood) || 0) - (Number(s.preMood) || 0);
        const band = delta >= 2 ? 'strong'
                   : delta >= 1 ? 'improved'
                   : delta <= -1 ? 'declined'
                   : 'neutral';
        if (band !== f.moodBand) return false;
      }
      if (f.tag) {
        const tags = Array.isArray(s.sessionTags) ? s.sessionTags : [];
        if (!tags.includes(f.tag)) return false;
      }
      return true;
    });
  }

  function _renderHistoryFilterBar(host, history) {
    if (!host || !history || history.length === 0) return;

    const modes = new Set(), personas = new Set(), methods = new Set(), tags = {};
    for (const s of history) {
      modes.add(s.mode || 'regular');
      if (s.guide || s.personaId) personas.add(s.guide || s.personaId);
      if (s.method || s.methodId) methods.add(s.method || s.methodId);
      const ts = Array.isArray(s.sessionTags) ? s.sessionTags : [];
      for (const t of ts) tags[t] = (tags[t] || 0) + 1;
    }
    const f = state._historyFilter;

    const topTags = Object.entries(tags).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]).slice(0, 6).map(([t]) => t);

    const chipGroup = (label, key, values, formatter = v => v) => {
      if (values.size === 0 && !Array.isArray(values)) return '';
      const list = Array.isArray(values) ? values : [...values];
      if (!list.length) return '';
      const chips = list.map(v =>
        `<button type="button" class="history-filter-chip ${f[key] === v ? 'active' : ''}" data-fkey="${escapeHtml(key)}" data-fval="${escapeHtml(String(v))}">${escapeHtml(formatter(v))}</button>`
      ).join('');
      return `<div class="history-filter-group"><span class="history-filter-label">${escapeHtml(label)}</span>${chips}</div>`;
    };
    const moodFmt = b => b === 'declined' ? '↓ declined' : b === 'neutral' ? '~ neutral' : b === 'improved' ? '↑ improved' : '✦ strong';
    const modeFmt = m => m === 'regular' ? 'wizard' : m;
    const hasAny = f.mode || f.persona || f.method || f.moodBand || f.tag;
    host.innerHTML = `
      ${chipGroup('mode',    'mode',    modes,   modeFmt)}
      ${chipGroup('persona', 'persona', personas)}
      ${chipGroup('method',  'method',  methods)}
      ${chipGroup('mood',    'moodBand', ['declined','neutral','improved','strong'], moodFmt)}
      ${topTags.length ? chipGroup('tags', 'tag', topTags) : ''}
      ${hasAny ? `<button type="button" class="history-filter-chip clear-all" data-clear="1">✕ clear filters</button>` : ''}
    `;

    host.onclick = (e) => {
      const chip = e.target.closest?.('.history-filter-chip');
      if (!chip) return;
      if (chip.dataset.clear) {
        state._historyFilter = { mode: null, persona: null, method: null, moodBand: null, tag: null };
      } else {
        const k = chip.dataset.fkey;
        const v = chip.dataset.fval;
        state._historyFilter[k] = (state._historyFilter[k] === v) ? null : v;
      }
      renderSessionHistory();
    };
  }

  function _renderHistoryCompareAction(host) {
    if (!host) return;
    if (!state._historyCompareMode) { host.innerHTML = ''; return; }
    const sel = state._historyCompareSel.length;
    host.innerHTML = `
      <span>Compare mode — pick two sessions (${sel}/2 selected).</span>
      <button class="btn" id="historyCompareGoBtn" ${sel === 2 ? '' : 'disabled'}>compare →</button>
      <button class="btn secondary" id="historyCompareExitBtn">exit</button>
    `;
    host.querySelector('#historyCompareGoBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const all = state._historyCacheForCompare || [];
      const [a, b] = state._historyCompareSel.map(id => all.find(s => String(s.date) === String(id)));
      if (a && b) _openCompareModal(a, b);
    });
    host.querySelector('#historyCompareExitBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      state._historyCompareMode = false;
      state._historyCompareSel = [];
      document.body.classList.remove('history-compare-mode');
      renderSessionHistory();
    });
  }

  async function renderSessionHistory() {
    const panel = $('sessionStatsPanel');
    const list = $('sessionHistoryList');
    if (!panel || !list) return;

    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (history.length === 0) {
      panel.innerHTML = '';
      list.innerHTML = '<div class="library-empty">no sessions yet — complete a session to see stats</div>';
      return;
    }

    state._historyCacheForCompare = history;

    panel.innerHTML = '';

    let toolbar = list.previousElementSibling;
    if (!toolbar || !toolbar.classList?.contains('history-toolbar')) {
      toolbar = document.createElement('div');
      toolbar.className = 'history-toolbar';
      toolbar.innerHTML = `
        <div class="history-compare-action" style="display:none"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:6px">
          <div></div>
          <button type="button" class="history-filter-chip" id="historyCompareToggleBtn" style="border-style:dashed">⇄ compare two</button>
        </div>
        <div class="history-filter-bar"></div>
      `;
      list.parentNode.insertBefore(toolbar, list);
    }
    const compareActionEl = toolbar.querySelector('.history-compare-action');
    compareActionEl.style.display = state._historyCompareMode ? '' : 'none';
    if (state._historyCompareMode) _renderHistoryCompareAction(compareActionEl);
    _renderHistoryFilterBar(toolbar.querySelector('.history-filter-bar'), history);

    const compareBtn = toolbar.querySelector('#historyCompareToggleBtn');
    if (compareBtn && !compareBtn._wired) {
      compareBtn._wired = true;
      compareBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        state._historyCompareMode = !state._historyCompareMode;
        state._historyCompareSel = [];
        document.body.classList.toggle('history-compare-mode', state._historyCompareMode);
        renderSessionHistory();
      });
    }

    const filtered = _applyHistoryFilter(history);
    list.innerHTML = '';
    if (filtered.length === 0) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div class="library-empty">no sessions match the current filters — clear them above</div>';
      return;
    }
    filtered.slice(0, 20).forEach((s, idx) => {

      const realIdx = history.findIndex(h => h.date === s.date);
      const d = new Date(s.date);
      const dateStr = d.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
      const timeStr = d.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
      const mins = Math.round((s.durationSec || 0) / 60);
      const hasScript = !!(s.script && s.script.length > 20);
      const status = s.completed ? `${mins}m` : `${mins}m · inc`;
      const metrics = s.metrics || getScriptMetrics(s.script || '');
      const phaseCount = Array.isArray(s.phaseOrder) ? s.phaseOrder.length : metrics.phaseCount;
      const workBlocks = s.workBlockCount || metrics.workBlocks || 0;
      const profileName = s.profileSnapshot?.name || s.profileName || '';
      const affirmMode = s.affirmationMode || '';

      const modeBadge = s.mode
        ? `<span class="history-mode-badge mode-${escapeHtml(s.mode)}">${escapeHtml(s.sosKind || s.mode)}</span>`
        : '';

      let preview = '';
      if (hasScript) {
        const cleaned = s.script.replace(PHASE_MARKER_STRIP_RX, '').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, '').trim();
        preview = cleaned.substring(0, 150).replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
        if (cleaned.length > 150) preview += '…';
      }

      const tags = Array.isArray(s.sessionTags) ? s.sessionTags : [];
      const tagsHtml = `
        <div class="history-tags">
          ${tags.map(t => `<span class="history-tag" data-tag="${escapeHtml(t)}">${escapeHtml(t)}<span class="history-tag-remove" data-removetag="${escapeHtml(t)}" data-realidx="${realIdx}" title="remove tag">✕</span></span>`).join('')}
          <span class="history-tag tag-add" data-addtag="1" data-realidx="${realIdx}">+ tag</span>
        </div>
      `;

      const compareChecked = state._historyCompareSel.includes(String(s.date));
      const compareCheckbox = `<input type="checkbox" class="h-compare-check" data-sid="${escapeHtml(String(s.date))}" ${compareChecked ? 'checked' : ''}>`;

      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'history-item';
      item.innerHTML = `
        ${compareCheckbox}
        <div class="h-title">${modeBadge}${dateStr} ${timeStr} · ${status}</div>
        <div class="h-meta">${escapeHtml(s.guide || '—')} · ${escapeHtml(s.method || '—')} · ${phaseCount} phases · ${workBlocks} work block${workBlocks === 1 ? '' : 's'}${affirmMode ? ' · ' + escapeHtml(affirmMode) : ''}${profileName ? ' · ' + escapeHtml(profileName) : ''}${s.intentionText ? ' · ' + escapeHtml(s.intentionText.substring(0, 30)) : ''}</div>
        ${preview ? `<div class="h-preview">${escapeHtml(preview)}</div>` : '<div class="h-no-script">no script stored</div>'}
        ${tagsHtml}
        <div class="h-actions">
          <button class="h-btn h-play"   data-idx="${realIdx}" title="Replay session" ${hasScript ? '' : 'disabled'}>▶</button>
          <button class="h-btn h-edit"   data-idx="${realIdx}" title="Edit script"    ${hasScript ? '' : 'disabled'}>✎</button>
          <button class="h-btn h-delete" data-idx="${realIdx}" title="Delete">✕</button>
        </div>`;
      list.appendChild(item);
    });

    list.querySelectorAll('.h-play').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async e => {
        const idx = parseInt(e.target.closest('.h-btn').dataset.idx, 10);
        const entry = history[idx];
        if (!entry?.script) { notify.warn('No script stored for this session.'); return; }
        replayFromHistory(entry);
      });
    });

    list.querySelectorAll('.h-edit').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async e => {
        const idx = parseInt(e.target.closest('.h-btn').dataset.idx, 10);
        const entry = history[idx];
        if (!entry?.script) { notify.warn('No script stored for this session.'); return; }
        editFromHistory(entry);
      });
    });

    list.querySelectorAll('.h-delete').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', async e => {
        const idx = parseInt(e.target.closest('.h-btn').dataset.idx, 10);
        if (!await confirmAsync('Are you sure you want to delete this session?\n\nThis can\'t be undone.')) return;
        const h = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        h.splice(idx, 1);
        await _writeHistoryCompact(h);
        await rebuildAnalytics(h);
        renderSessionHistory();
        renderSidebarStats();
        renderHeatmap();
        renderSparkline();
        renderHipSparkline();
        notify.info('Session deleted.');
      });
    });

    list.querySelectorAll('[data-addtag]').forEach(el => {
      el.addEventListener('click', async e => {
        const realIdx = parseInt(e.target.dataset.realidx, 10);
        const tag = (window.prompt('Add a tag (max 20 chars, comma-separated for multiple):') || '').trim();
        if (!tag) return;
        const tags = tag.split(',').map(t => t.trim().toLowerCase().slice(0, 20)).filter(Boolean);
        if (!tags.length) return;
        const h = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (!h[realIdx]) return;
        const existing = Array.isArray(h[realIdx].sessionTags) ? h[realIdx].sessionTags : [];
        const merged = [...new Set([...existing, ...tags])].sort();
        h[realIdx].sessionTags = merged;
        await _writeHistoryCompact(h);
        renderSessionHistory();
      });
    });
    list.querySelectorAll('[data-removetag]').forEach(el => {
      el.addEventListener('click', async e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const realIdx = parseInt(e.target.dataset.realidx, 10);
        const tag = e.target.dataset.removetag;
        const h = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (!h[realIdx]) return;
        const existing = Array.isArray(h[realIdx].sessionTags) ? h[realIdx].sessionTags : [];
        h[realIdx].sessionTags = existing.filter(t => t !== tag);
        await _writeHistoryCompact(h);
        renderSessionHistory();
      });
    });

    list.querySelectorAll('.h-compare-check').forEach(cb => {
      cb.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const sid = String(cb.dataset.sid);
        const sel = state._historyCompareSel;
        const i = sel.indexOf(sid);
        if (i >= 0) sel.splice(i, 1);
        else if (sel.length < 2) sel.push(sid);
        else { cb.checked = false; notify.info('Pick at most two sessions.'); return; }

        const actionEl = document.querySelector('.history-compare-action');
        if (actionEl) _renderHistoryCompareAction(actionEl);
      });
    });
  }

  function _openCompareModal(a, b) {
    if (!a || !b) return;
    const fmt = (v) => v == null || v === '' ? '—' : String(v);
    const fmtMood = (s) => (s.preMood != null && s.postMood != null)
      ? `${s.preMood} → ${s.postMood} (Δ ${(s.postMood - s.preMood >= 0 ? '+' : '')}${s.postMood - s.preMood})`
      : '—';
    const rows = [
      { key: 'date',       a: new Date(a.date).toLocaleString(), b: new Date(b.date).toLocaleString() },
      { key: 'mode',       a: fmt(a.mode || 'regular'),          b: fmt(b.mode || 'regular') },
      { key: 'persona',    a: fmt(a.guide || a.personaId),       b: fmt(b.guide || b.personaId) },
      { key: 'method',     a: fmt(a.method || a.methodId),       b: fmt(b.method || b.methodId) },
      { key: 'length',     a: fmt(a.length),                     b: fmt(b.length) },
      { key: 'soundscape', a: fmt(a.soundscape),                 b: fmt(b.soundscape) },
      { key: 'duration',   a: a.durationSec ? `${Math.round(a.durationSec/60)}m` : '—',
                           b: b.durationSec ? `${Math.round(b.durationSec/60)}m` : '—' },
      { key: 'mood',       a: fmtMood(a),                        b: fmtMood(b) },
      { key: 'depth',      a: fmt(a.depth),                      b: fmt(b.depth) },
      { key: 'completed',  a: a.completed ? '✓' : '✗',           b: b.completed ? '✓' : '✗' },
      { key: 'intention',  a: fmt(a.intentionText || a.intention), b: fmt(b.intentionText || b.intention) },
      { key: 'tags',       a: (a.sessionTags || []).join(', ') || '—',
                           b: (b.sessionTags || []).join(', ') || '—' },
    ];
    const rowsHtml = rows.map(r => {
      const diff = r.a !== r.b;
      return `<div class="compare-row${diff ? ' compare-diff' : ''}">
        <span class="compare-key">${escapeHtml(r.key)}</span>
        <span class="compare-val">${escapeHtml(r.a)}</span>
        <span class="compare-val">${escapeHtml(r.b)}</span>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:680px;max-height:88vh">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Session Comparison</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="compareCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div class="compare-grid">
          <div class="compare-cell">
            <div class="compare-cell-label">Session A</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text)">${escapeHtml(new Date(a.date).toLocaleString())}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="compare-cell">
            <div class="compare-cell-label">Session B</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text)">${escapeHtml(new Date(b.date).toLocaleString())}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:14px">${rowsHtml}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:14px;text-align:center">Differences highlighted in amber.</div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    const close = () => wrap.remove();
    wrap.querySelector('#compareCloseBtn').addEventListener('click', close);
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === wrap) close(); });
  }

  function _restoreFromEntry(entry) {
    entry = normalizeHistoryEntry(entry);
    if (entry.personaId) state.selectedPersonaId = entry.personaId;
    if (entry.methodId) state.selectedMethodId = entry.methodId;
    if (entry.intention) { state.intentionType = entry.intention; const el = $('intentionType'); if (el) el.value = entry.intention; }
    if (entry.length) { state.length = entry.length; const el = $('lengthSelect'); if (el) el.value = entry.length; }
    if (entry.soundscape) { state.soundscape = entry.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = entry.soundscape !== 'none'; const el = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (el) el.value = entry.soundscape; }
    if (entry.speechRate != null) { state.speechRate = entry.speechRate; const el = $('speechRate'); if (el) el.value = Math.round(entry.speechRate * 100); }
    if (entry.voicePitch != null) state.voicePitch = entry.voicePitch;
    if (entry.voiceVolume != null) state.voiceVolume = entry.voiceVolume;
    if (entry.droneVolume != null) state.droneVolume = entry.droneVolume;
    if (entry.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = entry.vizOverride; const el = $('vizSelect'); if (el) el.value = entry.vizOverride; }
    if (entry.vizSettings) state.vizSettings = { ...state.vizSettings, ...entry.vizSettings };
    if (entry.duckingEnabled != null) { state.duckingEnabled = entry.duckingEnabled; const el = $('duckingToggle'); if (el) el.checked = entry.duckingEnabled; }
    if (entry.intentionText) { const el = $('intentionInput'); if (el) el.value = entry.intentionText; }
    if (entry.userAffirmations != null) { const el = $('userAffirmations'); if (el) el.value = entry.userAffirmations; }
    if (entry.affirmationMode) { state.affirmationMode = entry.affirmationMode; const el = $('affirmationMode'); if (el) el.value = entry.affirmationMode; }
    if (entry.voiceName) state._savedVoiceName = entry.voiceName;
    applySavedVoiceSelection(); updateVoiceInfo();
    if (entry.profileSnapshot) applyProfileToForm(entry.profileSnapshot);
    state.fullScript = entry.script || '';
    state.parsedScript = entry.script ? parseScript(entry.script) : { ordered: [] };
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = entry.phaseOrder || state.parsedScript?.ordered || [];
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: true, 6: false };
    renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
    updateIntentionHint(); showScript();
    return entry;
  }

  function replayFromHistory(entry) {
    entry = _restoreFromEntry(entry);
    state.currentStep = 6; updateStepUI(); switchScreen('setup-wizard'); goToStep(6);
    $('sidebar')?.classList.remove('open'); $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');
    notify.success(`Session from ${new Date(entry.date).toLocaleDateString()} loaded — ready to replay.`);
  }

  function editFromHistory(entry) {
    entry = _restoreFromEntry(entry);
    showEl('generateScriptBtn', true);
    state.currentStep = 6; updateStepUI(); switchScreen('setup-wizard'); goToStep(6);
    $('sidebar')?.classList.remove('open'); $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');
    setTimeout(() => $('scriptText')?.focus(), 300);
    notify.info(`Script loaded for editing. Modify and press Begin when ready.`);
  }

  function computePickerStats(history) {
    const persona = {};
    const method = {};
    const bumpInto = (map, id, rec) => {
      if (!id) return;
      const slot = map[id] || (map[id] = { total: 0, completed: 0, deltaSum: 0, deltaN: 0 });
      slot.total++;
      if (rec.completed) slot.completed++;
      if (rec.preMood != null && rec.postMood != null) {
        slot.deltaSum += (rec.postMood - rec.preMood);
        slot.deltaN++;
      }
    };
    for (const rec of (history || [])) {
      bumpInto(persona, rec.personaId, rec);
      bumpInto(method, rec.methodId, rec);
    }
    return { persona, method };
  }

  function derivePatternCallouts(history) {
    const out = [];
    const h = history || [];
    if (h.length < 3) return out;

    const recent5 = h.slice(0, 5);
