    const recentEmergencies = recent5.filter(r => !r.completed).length;
    if (recentEmergencies >= 3) {
      out.push({ rank: 10, msg: `${recentEmergencies} of your last ${recent5.length} sessions ended early — try a shorter or gentler session next.` });
    }

    const sleepRecent = h.filter(r => r.intention === 'sleep').slice(0, 5);
    if (sleepRecent.length >= 3) {
      const earlySleep = sleepRecent.filter(r => !r.completed).length;
      if (earlySleep >= 2) {
        out.push({ rank: 9, msg: `${earlySleep} of your last ${sleepRecent.length} sleep sessions ended early — a softer guide or shorter length might help.` });
      }
    }

    const withMood = h.filter(r => r.preMood != null && r.postMood != null).slice(0, 3);
    if (withMood.length === 3 && withMood.every(r => (r.postMood - r.preMood) < 0)) {
      out.push({ rank: 8, msg: 'Your last 3 sessions trended mood-negative. Consider a shorter, lighter session or a different guide.' });
    }

    if (h.length >= 5 && h.slice(0, 5).every(r => r.methodId === h[0].methodId)) {
      out.push({ rank: 4, msg: `Last 5 sessions all used the same method — try something different to broaden your response patterns.` });
    }

    if (h[0]) {
      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - h[0].date) / 86400000);
      if (daysSince >= 60) {
        out.push({ rank: 5, msg: `It's been a while since your last session — a short, gentle one might re-orient your settings before going deeper.` });
      }
    }

    const lastDeltas = withMood.map(r => r.postMood - r.preMood);
    if (lastDeltas.length === 3 && lastDeltas.every(d => d >= 2)) {
      out.push({ rank: 6, msg: `Last 3 sessions all produced strong mood improvement (+2 or more). Whatever you're doing — keep going.` });
    }
    out.sort((a, b) => b.rank - a.rank);
    return out.slice(0, 2).map(x => x.msg);
  }

  async function renderSidebarStats() {
    const statsEl = $('sidebarStats');
    const streakEl = $('sidebarStreak');
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    const analytics = await getAnalytics();

    state._pickerStats = computePickerStats(history);
    if ($('personaGrid')?.children.length && typeof renderPersonaGrid === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
    if ($('methodGrid')?.children.length && typeof renderMethodGrid === 'function') renderMethodGrid();

    const totalSessions = Math.max(analytics.comp.total, history.length);
    const totalMinutes = analytics.dur.n > 0
      ? Math.round(analytics.dur.sum / 60)
      : Math.round(history.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.durationSec || 0), 0) / 60);
    const completionPct = analytics.comp.total > 0
      ? Math.round(analytics.comp.finished / analytics.comp.total * 100)
      : (history.length > 0 ? Math.round(history.filter(s => s.completed).length / history.length * 100) : 0);

    if (totalSessions === 0) {
      if (statsEl) statsEl.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-faint)">No sessions yet</div>';
      if (streakEl) streakEl.textContent = 'New practitioner';
      return;
    }

    const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
    const dayMs = 86400000;
    const sessionDays = [...new Set(history.map(s => { const d = new Date(s.date); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); return d.getTime(); }))].sort((a,b) => b - a);
    let streak = 0, freezesUsed = 0, checkDay = today.getTime();
    for (const day of sessionDays) {
      const gap = (checkDay - day) / dayMs;
      if (gap <= 1) { streak++; checkDay = day; }
      else if (gap === 2 && freezesUsed < 2) { streak++; freezesUsed++; checkDay = day; }
      else break;
    }

    state._streakGraceUsedThisRender = (streak > 0 && freezesUsed > 0)
      ? { freezesUsed, streak }
      : null;
    if (streakEl) streakEl.textContent = streak > 0 ? `${streak}-day streak` : `${totalSessions} sessions`;

    if (statsEl) {

      const callouts = derivePatternCallouts(history);
      const calloutHtml = callouts.length
        ? `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-cyan);font-size:0.66rem;line-height:1.45;color:var(--text-dim)">${callouts.map(c => `<div style="margin:2px 0">${escapeHtml(c)}</div>`).join('')}</div>`
        : '';

      const grace = state._streakGraceUsedThisRender;
      const graceHtml = grace
        ? `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:rgba(92,184,122,0.06);border-left:2px solid var(--accent-green,#5cb87a);font-size:0.66rem;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text-dim)">
            <span style="color:var(--accent-green,#5cb87a)">✦ streak preserved</span> — you used ${grace.freezesUsed === 1 ? 'a grace day' : `${grace.freezesUsed} grace days`}. Resilience is part of practice; missing a day is not a failure.
          </div>`
        : '';

      const wd = state._weeklyDigest;
      const digestHtml = wd
        ? `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-amber);font-size:0.62rem;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text-dim)">
            <div style="text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.56rem;margin-bottom:3px">past 7 days</div>
            <div>${wd.sessionCount} session${wd.sessionCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} · ${wd.completionPct}% completed${wd.avgMoodDelta != null ? ` · mood ${wd.avgMoodDelta >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${wd.avgMoodDelta.toFixed(1)}` : ''}</div>
            ${wd.topPersona ? `<div style="color:var(--text-faint)">top guide: ${escapeHtml(wd.topPersona)}${wd.topMethod ? ` · top method: ${escapeHtml(wd.topMethod)}` : ''}</div>` : ''}
          </div>`
        : '';
      let html = graceHtml + calloutHtml + digestHtml + `
        <div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Sessions</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val">${totalSessions}</span></div>
        <div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Minutes</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val">${totalMinutes}</span></div>
        <div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Streak</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val">${streak} days</span></div>
        <div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Completion</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val">${completionPct}%</span></div>`;

      if (analytics.comp.total >= 2) {
        try {
          const ins = deriveInsights(analytics);
          const hourLabel = ins.peakHour < 12 ? `${ins.peakHour || 12}am` : `${ins.peakHour === 12 ? 12 : ins.peakHour - 12}pm`;
          html += `<div style="margin-top:6px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding-top:6px">`;
          if (ins.avgImprovement && parseFloat(ins.avgImprovement) > 0) {
            html += `<div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Avg improvement</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val" style="color:var(--accent-green)">+${ins.avgImprovement}</span></div>`;
          }
          html += `<div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Peak time</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val">${hourLabel}</span></div>`;
          if (ins.favPersona) html += `<div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Fav guide</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val" style="font-size:0.7rem">${ins.favPersona}</span></div>`;
          if (ins.favSoundscape && ins.favSoundscape !== 'none') html += `<div class="sidebar-stat-row"><span>Fav sound</span><span class="sidebar-stat-val" style="font-size:0.7rem">${ins.favSoundscape}</span></div>`;
          html += `</div>`;
        } catch {}
      }

      statsEl.innerHTML = html;
    }
  }

  const CHART_COLORS = {
    cyan: '#5aabbf', amber: '#c9a855', magenta: '#c75a82', purple: '#9a6dd7',
    green: '#5cb87a', blue: '#4fa8c7', orange: '#c9a855', teal: '#4a9a8e',
    bars: ['#4fa8c7','#5aabbf','#4a9a8e','#5cb87a','#c9a855','#b89a4a','#c75a82','#9a6dd7','#7c5fd7','#c8c4be'],
    gridLine: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', label: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', title: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)',
  };

  function drawBarChart(canvasId, labels, values, color) {
    const canvas = $(canvasId); if (!canvas) return;
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const W = canvas.offsetWidth || 360, H = canvas.offsetHeight || 200;
    canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
    if (!values.length || values.every(v => v === 0)) { ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = '12px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText('No data yet', W/2, H/2); return; }
    const pad = { top: 10, right: 10, bottom: 40, left: 32 };
    const chartW = W - pad.left - pad.right, chartH = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;
    const maxVal = Math.max(...values, 1);
    const barW = Math.min(40, (chartW / labels.length) * 0.65);
    const gap = chartW / labels.length;

    ctx.strokeStyle = CHART_COLORS.gridLine; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) { const y = pad.top + chartH * (1 - i/4); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y); ctx.lineTo(W - pad.right, y); ctx.stroke(); }

    labels.forEach((label, i) => {
      const barH = (values[i] / maxVal) * chartH;
      const x = pad.left + gap * i + (gap - barW) / 2;
      const y = pad.top + chartH - barH;
      const c = Array.isArray(color) ? color[i % color.length] : color;
      ctx.fillStyle = c; ctx.beginPath();
      const r = Math.min(3, barW/2);
      ctx.moveTo(x, y + r); ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + r, y, r); ctx.arcTo(x + barW, y, x + barW, y + r, r);
      ctx.lineTo(x + barW, pad.top + chartH); ctx.lineTo(x, pad.top + chartH); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();

      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.title; ctx.font = 'bold 10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText(values[i], x + barW/2, y - 4);

      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = '9px sans-serif';
      ctx.save(); ctx.translate(x + barW/2, pad.top + chartH + 6);
      if (labels.length > 6) { ctx.rotate(-0.5); ctx.textAlign = 'right'; } else { ctx.textAlign = 'center'; }
      ctx.fillText(label.length > 12 ? label.slice(0,11) + '…' : label, 0, 8); ctx.restore();
    });
  }

  function drawLineChart(canvasId, labels, values, color) {
    const canvas = $(canvasId); if (!canvas) return;
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const W = canvas.offsetWidth || 740, H = canvas.offsetHeight || 220;
    canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
    if (!values.length) return;
    const pad = { top: 14, right: 14, bottom: 36, left: 32 };
    const chartW = W - pad.left - pad.right, chartH = H - pad.top - pad.bottom;
    const maxVal = Math.max(...values, 1);
    const xStep = chartW / (labels.length - 1 || 1);

    ctx.strokeStyle = CHART_COLORS.gridLine; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) { const y = pad.top + chartH * (1 - i/4); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y); ctx.lineTo(W - pad.right, y); ctx.stroke(); }

    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pad.left, pad.top + chartH);
    values.forEach((v, i) => { ctx.lineTo(pad.left + i * xStep, pad.top + chartH - (v / maxVal) * chartH); });
    ctx.lineTo(pad.left + (values.length-1) * xStep, pad.top + chartH); ctx.closePath();

    let fillColor;
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
      const hex = color.slice(1);
      const full = hex.length === 3 ? hex.split('').map(c => c + c).join('') : hex;
      const r = parseInt(full.slice(0, 2), 16), g = parseInt(full.slice(2, 4), 16), b = parseInt(full.slice(4, 6), 16);
      fillColor = `rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.12)`;
    } else {
      fillColor = color.replace(')', ',0.12)').replace('rgb', 'rgba');
    }
    ctx.fillStyle = fillColor; ctx.fill();

    ctx.beginPath();
    values.forEach((v, i) => { const x = pad.left + i * xStep, y = pad.top + chartH - (v / maxVal) * chartH; i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y); });
    ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

    values.forEach((v, i) => { const x = pad.left + i * xStep, y = pad.top + chartH - (v / maxVal) * chartH; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill(); });

    const peakIdx = values.indexOf(Math.max(...values));
    if (values[peakIdx] > 0) {
      const px = pad.left + peakIdx * xStep, py = pad.top + chartH - (values[peakIdx] / maxVal) * chartH;
      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.amber; ctx.font = 'bold 10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText(`Peak: ${labels[peakIdx]} (${values[peakIdx]})`, Math.min(Math.max(px, 60), W - 60), py - 10);
    }

    ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = '9px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    labels.forEach((l, i) => { if (labels.length <= 10 || i % 2 === 0) ctx.fillText(l, pad.left + i * xStep, H - pad.bottom + 16); });
  }

  function drawDonutChart(canvasId, segments) {
    const canvas = $(canvasId); if (!canvas) return;
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const W = canvas.offsetWidth || 360, H = canvas.offsetHeight || 220;
    canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
    const total = segments.reduce((s, seg) => s + seg.value, 0);
    if (total === 0) { ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = '12px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText('No data yet', W/2, H/2); return; }
    const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2 - 6, outerR = Math.min(W, H) / 2 - 30, innerR = outerR * 0.55;
    let angle = -Math.PI / 2;
    segments.forEach(seg => {
      const sweep = (seg.value / total) * Math.PI * 2;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, outerR, angle, angle + sweep); ctx.arc(cx, cy, innerR, angle + sweep, angle, true); ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle = seg.color; ctx.fill();

      const mid = angle + sweep / 2;
      const lx = cx + Math.cos(mid) * (outerR + 16), ly = cy + Math.sin(mid) * (outerR + 16);
      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.title; ctx.font = '10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = Math.cos(mid) > 0 ? 'left' : 'right';
      ctx.fillText(`${seg.label} ${Math.round(seg.value / total * 100)}%`, lx, ly);
      angle += sweep;
    });
  }

  function drawHorizBars(canvasId, labels, values, maxVal, colors) {
    const canvas = $(canvasId); if (!canvas) return;
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const W = canvas.offsetWidth || 360, H = canvas.offsetHeight || 200;
    canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
    const pad = { left: 80, right: 40, top: 10, bottom: 10 };
    const rowH = (H - pad.top - pad.bottom) / labels.length;
    const barMaxW = W - pad.left - pad.right;
    labels.forEach((label, i) => {
      const y = pad.top + i * rowH;
      const barW = (values[i] / (maxVal || 1)) * barMaxW;
      ctx.fillStyle = colors[i % colors.length]; ctx.beginPath();
      const r = 3; ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y + 4); ctx.lineTo(pad.left + barW - r, y + 4); ctx.arcTo(pad.left + barW, y + 4, pad.left + barW, y + rowH - 8, r); ctx.arcTo(pad.left + barW, y + rowH - 8, pad.left + barW - r, y + rowH - 8, r); ctx.lineTo(pad.left, y + rowH - 8); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = '10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'right';
      ctx.fillText(label, pad.left - 6, y + rowH/2 + 3);
      ctx.fillStyle = CHART_COLORS.title; ctx.font = 'bold 10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'left';
      ctx.fillText(values[i].toFixed(2), pad.left + barW + 6, y + rowH/2 + 3);
    });
  }

  function drawFeatureGrid(canvasId, featData) {
    const canvas = $(canvasId); if (!canvas) return;
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const W = canvas.offsetWidth || 360, H = canvas.offsetHeight || 200;
    canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);

    const isMap = featData && typeof featData === 'object' && !Array.isArray(featData);
    const features = [
      { name: 'Affirmations',     key: 'AFFIRMATIONS',   bit: 1 },
      { name: 'Programs',         key: 'PROGRAMS',       bit: 2 },
      { name: 'Custom Persona',   key: 'CUSTOM_PERSONA', bit: 4 },
      { name: 'Skip-to-Script',   key: 'SKIP_SCRIPT',    bit: 8 },
      { name: 'Timing Fix',       key: 'TIMING_FIX',     bit: 16 },
      { name: 'Share',            key: 'SHARE',          bit: 32 },
      { name: 'Backup',           key: 'BACKUP',         bit: 64 },
      { name: 'Double Induction', key: 'DOUBLE_INDUCT',  bit: 128 },
      { name: 'Pre-Gen',          key: 'PRE_GEN',        bit: 256 },
      { name: 'Cloud Upload',     key: 'CLOUD_UPLOAD',   bit: 512 },
      { name: 'Comments',         key: 'COMMENTS',       bit: 1024 },
    ];
    const rowH = (H - 10) / features.length;
    features.forEach((f, i) => {
      const y = 8 + i * rowH;
      const used = isMap ? !!featData[f.key] : !!(featData & f.bit);
      ctx.fillStyle = used ? CHART_COLORS.cyan : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
      const rx = 20, ry = y, rw = W - 40, rh = rowH - 4, rr = 4;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(rx + rr, ry); ctx.lineTo(rx + rw - rr, ry); ctx.arcTo(rx + rw, ry, rx + rw, ry + rr, rr); ctx.lineTo(rx + rw, ry + rh - rr); ctx.arcTo(rx + rw, ry + rh, rx + rw - rr, ry + rh, rr); ctx.lineTo(rx + rr, ry + rh); ctx.arcTo(rx, ry + rh, rx, ry + rh - rr, rr); ctx.lineTo(rx, ry + rr); ctx.arcTo(rx, ry, rx + rr, ry, rr); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
      ctx.fillStyle = used ? '#111' : CHART_COLORS.label; ctx.font = `${used ? 'bold ' : ''}11px sans-serif`; ctx.textAlign = 'left';

      let label = f.name;
      if (isMap && featData[f.key] > 0) {
        const days = Math.floor((Date.now() - featData[f.key]) / 86400000);
        if (days >= 1) label += ` · ${days}d ago`;
      }
      ctx.fillText(`${used ? '✓' : '○'}  ${label}`, 30, y + rowH/2 + 1);
    });
  }

  let _statsAnalytics = null;
  function renderChart(tile) {
    const chart = tile.dataset.chart;
    const a = _statsAnalytics; if (!a) return;
    const sorted = (map) => Object.entries(map || {}).sort((x,y) => y[1] - x[1]);
    const topItems = (map, n) => { const s = sorted(map); return { labels: s.slice(0,n).map(e => e[0]), values: s.slice(0,n).map(e => e[1]) }; };
    switch(chart) {
      case 'persona': { const d = topItems(a.p, 8); drawBarChart('chartPersona', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'method': { const d = topItems(a.m, 8); drawBarChart('chartMethod', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'intention': { const d = topItems(a.i, 8); drawBarChart('chartIntention', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'length': { const d = topItems(a.ln, 8); drawBarChart('chartLength', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'soundscape': { const d = topItems(a.s, 8); drawBarChart('chartSoundscape', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'visuals': { const d = topItems(a.z, 8); drawBarChart('chartVisuals', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'voices': { const d = topItems(a.vc, 8); drawBarChart('chartVoices', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'affirmMode': { const d = topItems(a.am, 6); drawBarChart('chartAffirmMode', d.labels, d.values, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'hourly': { drawLineChart('chartHourly', Array.from({length:24}, (_,i) => i.toString()), a.hr, CHART_COLORS.cyan); break; }
      case 'weekday': { drawBarChart('chartWeekday', ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'], a.dw, CHART_COLORS.bars); break; }
      case 'mood': {
        if (a.mood.n > 0) {
          const postN = a.mood.postN || 0;
          const avgPre = a.mood.preSum / a.mood.n;
          const avgPost = postN > 0 && a.mood.postSum > 0 ? a.mood.postSum / postN : null;
          const mL = avgPost ? ['Pre','Post'] : ['Pre'], mV = avgPost ? [+avgPre.toFixed(1), +avgPost.toFixed(1)] : [+avgPre.toFixed(1)];
          drawBarChart('chartMood', mL, mV, [CHART_COLORS.blue, CHART_COLORS.green]);
        } else drawBarChart('chartMood', [], [], CHART_COLORS.cyan);
        break;
      }
      case 'completion': {
        const other = a.comp.total - a.comp.finished - a.comp.emergency;
        drawDonutChart('chartCompletion', [
          { label: 'Finished', value: a.comp.finished, color: CHART_COLORS.cyan },
          { label: 'Emergency', value: a.comp.emergency, color: CHART_COLORS.amber },
          { label: 'Incomplete', value: Math.max(0, other), color: CHART_COLORS.green },
        ]); break;
      }
      case 'settings': {
        const cfgN = a.cfg.rate?.length || 0;
        if (cfgN > 0) {
          const avgPhase = a.shape?.n ? (a.shape.phaseSum / a.shape.n) : 0;
          const avgWork = a.shape?.n ? (a.shape.workSum / a.shape.n) : 0;
          const cL = ['Rate','Pitch','Narr Vol','Drone','Phases','Work'];

          const cV = [_cfgMean(a.cfg.rate), _cfgMean(a.cfg.pitch), _cfgMean(a.cfg.vol), _cfgMean(a.cfg.drone), avgPhase / 10, avgWork / 5];
          drawHorizBars('chartSettings', cL, cV, 1.2, [CHART_COLORS.cyan, CHART_COLORS.blue, CHART_COLORS.amber, CHART_COLORS.green, CHART_COLORS.purple || CHART_COLORS.cyan, CHART_COLORS.blue]);
        } else drawBarChart('chartSettings', [], [], CHART_COLORS.cyan);
        break;
      }
      case 'features': drawFeatureGrid('chartFeatures', a.feat); break;
    }
  }

  function renderAllCharts() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.stats-tile').forEach(tile => renderChart(tile));
  }

  async function openStatsModal() {
    const a = await getAnalytics();
    _statsAnalytics = a;
    const modal = $('statsModal');
    if (a.comp.total < 1) {
      $('statsKpiGrid').innerHTML = '';
      $('statsGrid').style.display = 'none';
      $('statsEmptyMsg').style.display = '';
      modal.style.display = 'flex'; return;
    }
    $('statsEmptyMsg').style.display = 'none';
    $('statsGrid').style.display = '';
    const ins = deriveInsights(a);
    const durMin = Math.floor(ins.avgDurationSec / 60), durSec = ins.avgDurationSec % 60;
    const hrLbl = ins.peakHour < 12 ? `${ins.peakHour || 12}am` : `${ins.peakHour === 12 ? 12 : ins.peakHour - 12}pm`;
    $('statsKpiGrid').innerHTML = [
      { val: ins.totalSessions, label: 'sessions' },
      { val: `${ins.completionRate}%`, label: 'completed' },
      { val: ins.avgImprovement && parseFloat(ins.avgImprovement) > 0 ? `+${ins.avgImprovement}` : (ins.avgImprovement || '—'), label: 'mood gain' },
      { val: `${durMin}m${durSec ? durSec + 's' : ''}`, label: 'avg duration' },
      { val: hrLbl, label: 'peak hour' },
      { val: ins.peakDayName.slice(0,3), label: 'peak day' },
    ].map(k => `<div class="stats-kpi"><div class="stats-kpi-val">${k.val}</div><div class="stats-kpi-label">${k.label}</div></div>`).join('');

    modal.style.display = 'flex';

    requestAnimationFrame(() => renderAllCharts());
  }

  function closeStatsModal() { $('statsModal').style.display = 'none'; _statsAnalytics = null; }

  function toggleStatsTile(tile) {
    const wasExpanded = tile.classList.contains('expanded');

    document.querySelectorAll('.stats-tile.expanded').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('expanded'));
    if (!wasExpanded) tile.classList.add('expanded');

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (wasExpanded) renderChart(tile);
      else document.querySelectorAll('.stats-tile').forEach(t => renderChart(t));
    }, 280);
  }

  function exportScript() {
    const script = $('scriptText')?.value?.trim();
    if (!script) { notify.warn('No script to export.'); return; }
    const persona = getPersona(), method = getMethod();
    const header = `# Hypnosis Script\n# Guide: ${persona.name} | Method: ${method.name} | Length: ${state.length}\n# Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString()}\n\n`;
    const blob = new Blob([header + script], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `hypnosis-${method.id}-${state.length}-${Date.now()}.txt`;
    a.click();

    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
    notify.success('Script downloaded.');
  }

  async function loadUploadedSharePayload(fileId) {
    if (!fileId) return false;
    try {

      const url = `https://user.uploads.dev/file/${encodeURIComponent(fileId)}`;
      let resp;
      try { resp = await fetch(url); } catch (e) {

        if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.superFetch) resp = await root.superFetch(url);
        else throw e;
      }
      if (!resp || !resp.ok) throw new Error('Could not fetch shared payload');
      const blob = await resp.blob();
      let json;
      try {
        const stream = blob.stream().pipeThrough(new DecompressionStream('gzip'));
        json = await new Response(stream).text();
      } catch { json = await blob.text(); }
      const payload = JSON.parse(json);
      if (!payload || !payload.kind) throw new Error('Malformed share payload');

      if (payload.kind === 'custom-persona') {

        const confirmed = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared a custom persona with you:\n\n"${payload.persona.name}"\n\n${payload.persona.tagline || ''}\n\nThis is user-generated content — review the voice instruction before using. Shared personas may describe sensitive themes. If you are under 18, click cancel.`,
          { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!confirmed) return true;
        const existing = loadCustomPersonas();

        const dup = existing.find(p => p.id === payload.persona.id);
        if (dup) {
          const replace = await confirmAsync(`A persona with ID "${payload.persona.id}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'keep existing' });
          if (!replace) return true;
          saveCustomPersonas(existing.filter(p => p.id !== payload.persona.id).concat([payload.persona]));
        } else {
          saveCustomPersonas([...existing, payload.persona]);
        }
        refreshPersonas(); renderPersonaGrid();
        state.selectedPersonaId = payload.persona.id;
        renderPersonaDetail(); updateStepUI();
        notify.success(`Added persona: ${payload.persona.name}`);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'session-config') {
        const c = payload.config || {};

        if (payload.customPersona) {
          const existing = loadCustomPersonas();
          if (!existing.find(p => p.id === payload.customPersona.id)) {
            saveCustomPersonas([...existing, payload.customPersona]);
            refreshPersonas();
          }
        }
        if (c.selectedPersonaId && state.personas.find(p => p.id === c.selectedPersonaId)) state.selectedPersonaId = c.selectedPersonaId;
        if (c.selectedMethodId && METHODS.find(m => m.id === c.selectedMethodId)) state.selectedMethodId = c.selectedMethodId;
        if (c.intentionType && INTENTION_TYPES[c.intentionType]) { state.intentionType = c.intentionType; const el = $('intentionType'); if (el) el.value = c.intentionType; }
        if (c.length && PHASE_DURATIONS[c.length]) { state.length = c.length; const el = $('lengthSelect'); if (el) el.value = c.length; }
        if (c.soundscape) { state.soundscape = c.soundscape; const el = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (el) el.value = c.soundscape; }
        if (c.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = c.vizOverride; const el = $('vizSelect'); if (el) el.value = c.vizOverride; }
        if (typeof c.speechRate === 'number') state.speechRate = c.speechRate;
        if (typeof c.voicePitch === 'number') state.voicePitch = c.voicePitch;
        if (typeof c.voiceVolume === 'number') state.voiceVolume = c.voiceVolume;
        if (typeof c.tempoMultiplier === 'number') state.tempoMultiplier = c.tempoMultiplier;
        if (typeof c.droneEnabled === 'boolean') state.droneEnabled = c.droneEnabled;
        if (typeof c.droneVolume === 'number') state.droneVolume = c.droneVolume;
        if (c.affirmationMode) { state.affirmationMode = c.affirmationMode; const el = $('affirmationMode'); if (el) el.value = c.affirmationMode; }
        if (c.intentionInput) { const el = $('intentionInput'); if (el) el.value = c.intentionInput.slice(0, 500); }
        if (c.userAffirmations) { const el = $('userAffirmations'); if (el) el.value = c.userAffirmations.slice(0, 500); }

        if (Array.isArray(c.phaseExtras)) state._phaseExtras = c.phaseExtras.slice();
        if (typeof c.bgPrompt === 'string') {
          state.bgPrompt = c.bgPrompt;
          const el = $('bgPromptInput'); if (el) el.value = c.bgPrompt;
        }
        if (typeof c.bgNegativePrompt === 'string') {
          state.bgNegativePrompt = c.bgNegativePrompt;
          const el = $('bgNegativePromptInput'); if (el) el.value = c.bgNegativePrompt;
        }
        if (typeof c.bgOrientation === 'string') {
          state.bgOrientation = c.bgOrientation;
          const el = $('bgOrientationSelect'); if (el) el.value = c.bgOrientation;
        }
        if (Array.isArray(c.bgActiveStylePresetIds)) {
          state.bgActiveStylePresetIds = c.bgActiveStylePresetIds.slice();

          if (typeof renderBgStylePresets === 'function') {
            try { renderBgStylePresets(); } catch {}
          }
        }
        if (c.craftedSuggestion) state.craftedSuggestion = c.craftedSuggestion;
        if (c.script) {
          const scriptEl = $('scriptText'); if (scriptEl) scriptEl.value = c.script;
          state.fullScript = c.script;
          state.parsedScript = parseScript(c.script);
          showScript();
        }
        renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
        if (typeof updateIntentionHint === 'function') updateIntentionHint();
        if (state.craftedSuggestion) { try { showCrafted(); } catch {} }
        state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: true, 6: !!c.script };
        goToStep(c.script ? 6 : 5);
        const persona = getPersona(), method = getMethod();
        notify.info(`Shared config loaded: ${persona.name} · ${method.name} · ${c.length || 'medium'}.`, 8000);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern' || payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} pattern(s)`
          : `pattern: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared haptic pattern${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview before using — pattern data is user-generated content. Add to your library?`,
          { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importPatternEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'saved-script' || payload.kind === 'saved-script-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'saved-script-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} script(s)`
          : `script: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared session script${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nThis is user-generated content — review before running. Add to your library?`,
          { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importSavedScriptEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'custom-persona-bundle') {
        await _importPersonaEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'config-preset' || payload.kind === 'config-preset-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'config-preset-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} preset(s)`
          : `preset: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared configuration preset${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nPresets capture session settings (length, voice, soundscape, visualizer). Add to your library?`,
          { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importConfigPresetEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'session-variables') {
        const count = Object.keys(payload.data || {}).length;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared ${count} session variable${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} with you. Add to your variables?`,
          { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importVariablesEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'custom-intention' || payload.kind === 'custom-intention-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'custom-intention-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} intention(s)`
          : `intention: ${payload.data?.label || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared custom intention${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nThe Guidance field will be injected into AI prompts. Review before adding.`,
          { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importCustomIntentionEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'custom-method' || payload.kind === 'custom-method-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'custom-method-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} method(s)`
          : `method: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared custom induction method${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview the detail field — it informs the AI when generating sessions with this method selected.`,
          { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importCustomMethodEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      if (payload.kind === 'haptic-macro' || payload.kind === 'haptic-macro-bundle') {
        const summary = payload.kind === 'haptic-macro-bundle'
          ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} macro(s)`
          : `macro: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          `Someone shared haptic macro${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nMacros are short reusable haptic clips. Add to your library?`,
          { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
        );
        if (!ok) return true;
        await _importHapticMacroEnvelope(payload);
        return true;
      }

      notify.warn('Unknown payload kind: ' + payload.kind);
      return false;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Share payload load failed:', e);
      notify.error('Could not load shared link: ' + (e.message || e));
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function loadSharedConfig() {

    try {
      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const dataId = urlParams.get('data');
      if (dataId) {
        const handled = await loadUploadedSharePayload(dataId);
        if (handled) {

          history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname);
          return;
        }
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('data= param handling failed:', e); }

    const hash = window.location.hash;
    if (hash.startsWith('#persona=')) {
      try {
        const b64 = hash.slice('#persona='.length);
        const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
        if (payload && payload.kind === 'custom-persona' && payload.persona) {

          const confirmed = await confirmAsync(
            `Someone shared a custom persona with you:\n\n"${payload.persona.name}"\n\n${payload.persona.tagline || ''}\n\nThis is user-generated content — review the voice instruction before using. Shared personas may describe sensitive themes. If you are under 18, click cancel.`,
            { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
          );
          if (confirmed) {
            const existing = loadCustomPersonas();
            const dup = existing.find(p => p.id === payload.persona.id);
            if (dup) {
              const replace = await confirmAsync(`A persona with ID "${payload.persona.id}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'keep existing' });
              if (replace) {
                saveCustomPersonas(existing.filter(p => p.id !== payload.persona.id).concat([payload.persona]));
                state.personas = [...BUILTIN_PERSONAS, ...loadCustomPersonas()];
                renderPersonaGrid?.(); renderPersonaDetail?.();
                notify.success(`Replaced persona "${payload.persona.name}".`);
              }
            } else {
              saveCustomPersonas([...existing, payload.persona]);
              state.personas = [...BUILTIN_PERSONAS, ...loadCustomPersonas()];
              renderPersonaGrid?.(); renderPersonaDetail?.();
              notify.success(`Added persona "${payload.persona.name}" to your library.`);
            }
            await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
          }

          history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
          return;
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('persona= hash handling failed:', e); }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#funscript-pattern=', '#funscript-pattern-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern' || payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'funscript-pattern-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} pattern(s)`
              : `pattern: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared haptic pattern${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview before using. Add to your library?`,
              { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importPatternEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#saved-script=', '#saved-script-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'saved-script' || payload.kind === 'saved-script-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'saved-script-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} script(s)`
              : `script: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared session script${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview before running. Add to your library?`,
              { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importSavedScriptEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    if (hash.startsWith('#custom-persona-bundle=')) {
      try {
        const b64 = hash.slice('#custom-persona-bundle='.length);
        const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
        if (payload && payload.kind === 'custom-persona-bundle') {
          await _importPersonaEnvelope(payload);
          await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
          history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
          return;
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('#custom-persona-bundle hash handling failed:', e); }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#config-preset=', '#config-preset-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'config-preset' || payload.kind === 'config-preset-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'config-preset-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} preset(s)`
              : `preset: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared configuration preset${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nAdd to your library?`,
              { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importConfigPresetEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    if (hash.startsWith('#session-variables=')) {
      try {
        const b64 = hash.slice('#session-variables='.length);
        const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
        if (payload && payload.kind === 'session-variables') {
          const count = Object.keys(payload.data || {}).length;
          const ok = await confirmAsync(
            `Someone shared ${count} session variable${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} with you. Add to your variables?`,
            { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
          );
          if (ok) {
            await _importVariablesEnvelope(payload);
            await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
          }
          history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
          return;
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('#session-variables hash handling failed:', e); }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#custom-intention=', '#custom-intention-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'custom-intention' || payload.kind === 'custom-intention-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'custom-intention-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} intention(s)`
              : `intention: ${payload.data?.label || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared custom intention${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview the Guidance field before adding — it gets injected into AI prompts.`,
              { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importCustomIntentionEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#custom-method=', '#custom-method-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'custom-method' || payload.kind === 'custom-method-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'custom-method-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} method(s)`
              : `method: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared custom induction method${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nReview the detail field — it informs the AI.`,
              { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importCustomMethodEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    for (const prefix of ['#haptic-macro=', '#haptic-macro-bundle=']) {
      if (hash.startsWith(prefix)) {
        try {
          const b64 = hash.slice(prefix.length);
          const payload = await _decodeHashShareFragment(b64);
          if (payload && (payload.kind === 'haptic-macro' || payload.kind === 'haptic-macro-bundle')) {
            const summary = payload.kind === 'haptic-macro-bundle'
              ? `${(payload.data?.length || 0)} macro(s)`
              : `macro: ${payload.data?.name || '(unnamed)'}`;
            const ok = await confirmAsync(
              `Someone shared haptic macro${payload.kind.endsWith('bundle') ? 's' : ''} with you:\n\n${summary}\n\nAdd to your library?`,
              { okText: 'add', cancelText: 'cancel' }
            );
            if (ok) {
              await _importHapticMacroEnvelope(payload);
              await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
            }
            history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
            return;
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn(prefix + ' hash handling failed:', e); }
      }
    }

    if (!hash.startsWith('#cfg=')) return;
    const paramStr = hash.slice(5);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(paramStr);
      const personaId = params.get('p');
      const methodId = params.get('m');
      const intentType = params.get('i');
      const length = params.get('l');
      const soundscape = params.get('s');
      const rate = params.get('r');
      const viz = params.get('v');
      const intentText = params.get('t');
      const aff = params.get('a');
      const affirmMode = params.get('am') || params.get('affirm');
      const voiceName = params.get('vn') || params.get('voice') || params.get('narrator');

      if (personaId && state.personas.find(p => p.id === personaId)) state.selectedPersonaId = personaId;
      if (methodId && METHODS.find(m => m.id === methodId)) state.selectedMethodId = methodId;
      if (intentType && INTENTION_TYPES[intentType]) { state.intentionType = intentType; $('intentionType').value = intentType; }
      if (length && PHASE_DURATIONS[length]) { state.length = length; $('lengthSelect').value = length; }
      if (soundscape) { state.soundscape = soundscape; state.droneEnabled = soundscape !== 'none'; const el = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (el) el.value = soundscape; }
      if (rate) state.speechRate = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(1, parseInt(rate, 10) / 100));
      if (viz) { state.vizOverride = viz; const el = $('vizSelect'); if (el) el.value = viz; }
      if (intentText) { const el = $('intentionInput'); if (el) el.value = decodeURIComponent(intentText).slice(0, 500); }
      if (aff) { const el = $('userAffirmations'); if (el) el.value = decodeURIComponent(aff).slice(0, 500); }
      if (affirmMode) { state.affirmationMode = affirmMode; const el = $('affirmationMode'); if (el) el.value = affirmMode; }
      if (voiceName) { state._savedVoiceName = decodeURIComponent(voiceName).slice(0, 200); applySavedVoiceSelection(); updateVoiceInfo(); }

      renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
      updateIntentionHint(); updateStepUI();

      const persona = getPersona();
      const method = getMethod();
      notify.info(`Shared config loaded: ${persona.name} · ${method.name} · ${length || 'medium'}. Review settings and generate when ready.`, 8000);

      state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: false, 6: false };
      goToStep(5);

      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    } catch(e) {

      try {
        const bytes = Uint8Array.from(atob(paramStr), c => c.charCodeAt(0));
        const stream = new Blob([bytes]).stream().pipeThrough(new DecompressionStream('gzip'));
        const json = await new Response(stream).text();
        const cfg = JSON.parse(json);
        if (cfg.p) state.selectedPersonaId = cfg.p;
        if (cfg.m) state.selectedMethodId = cfg.m;
        if (cfg.i) { state.intentionType = cfg.i; $('intentionType').value = cfg.i; }
        if (cfg.l) { state.length = cfg.l; $('lengthSelect').value = cfg.l; }
        renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail(); updateStepUI();
        state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: false, 6: false };
        goToStep(5);
        notify.info('Shared config loaded (legacy format). Review and generate.');
        history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
      } catch(e2) { console.error('Failed to parse shared config:', e2); }
    }
  }

  function _corruptItemReplacer() {
    const seen = new WeakSet();
    let _corruptCount = 0;
    const replacer = function(key, value) {

      if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
        if (seen.has(value)) { _corruptCount++; return null; }
        seen.add(value);
      }
      if (typeof value === 'number' && !Number.isFinite(value)) { _corruptCount++; return null; }
      if (typeof value === 'undefined')                          { _corruptCount++; return null; }
      if (typeof value === 'function' || typeof value === 'symbol') { _corruptCount++; return null; }
      if (typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 100_000)   { _corruptCount++; return value.slice(0, 100_000) + '…[truncated]'; }
      return value;
    };
    replacer._getCount = () => _corruptCount;
    return replacer;
  }

  async function exportBackup() {
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.BACKUP);

    const safe = async (label, fn, fallback) => {
      try { return await fn(); }
      catch (e) { console.warn(`[backup] ${label} read failed:`, e); return fallback; }
    };
    const backup = {
      version: 7,
      exportedAt: Date.now(),
      personas:  await safe('personas',  () => loadCustomPersonas(), []),
      history:   await safe('history',   async () => (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [], []),
      program:   await safe('program',   async () => (await idbGet('stillness_program_v1')) || null, null),
      profile:   await safe('profile',   () => getProfile(), {}),
      settings:  await safe('settings',  () => _buildSettingsObj(), {}),
      analytics: await safe('analytics', async () => (await idbGet(ANALYTICS_KEY)) || null, null),
      adaptive:  await safe('adaptive',  async () => (await idbGet(ADAPTIVE_KEY)) || null, null),

      unlocks:   await safe('unlocks',   async () => (await idbGet('stillness_unlocks_v1')) || {}, {}),

      memory:    await safe('memory',    async () => (await idbGet('stillness_memory_v1')) || null, null),

      configPresets: await safe('configPresets', async () => (await idbGet('stillness_config_presets_v1')) || [], []),

      savedScripts: await safe('savedScripts', async () => (await idbGet('stillness_saved_scripts_v1')) || [], []),

      triggerFires: await safe('triggerFires', async () => (await idbGet('stillness_trigger_fires_v1')) || [], []),

      customTags: await safe('customTags', async () => (await idbGet('stillness_custom_tags_v1')) || [], []),

      abResults: await safe('abResults', async () => (await idbGet('stillness_ab_results_v1')) || [], []),

      directorAudit: await safe('directorAudit', async () => (await idbGet('hne_director_audit_v1')) || [], []),

      sharedLinks: await safe('sharedLinks', async () => (await idbGet('hne_shared_links_v1')) || [], []),

      funscriptPatterns: await safe('funscriptPatterns', () => loadUserPatterns(), []),

      sessionVariableDefs: await safe('sessionVariableDefs', () => loadVariableDefs(), {}),

      customIntentions: await safe('customIntentions', () => loadCustomIntentions(), []),

      customMethods: await safe('customMethods', () => loadCustomMethods(), []),

      rampSettings: await safe('rampSettings', () => loadRampSettings(), null),

      pacingSettings: await safe('pacingSettings', () => loadPacingSettings(), null),

      hapticMacros: await safe('hapticMacros', () => loadUserMacros(), []),

      fixationPos: await safe('fixationPos', () => {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY);
          return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
        } catch { return null; }
      }, null),

    };
    const replacer = _corruptItemReplacer();
    let json;
    try {
      json = JSON.stringify(backup, replacer);
    } catch (e) {

      console.warn('[backup] full stringify failed even with replacer; falling back to per-slice:', e);
      const partial = { version: backup.version, exportedAt: backup.exportedAt, _partial: true };
      for (const k of Object.keys(backup)) {
        try { JSON.stringify(backup[k], replacer); partial[k] = backup[k]; }
        catch (e2) { console.warn(`[backup] dropped slice "${k}":`, e2); }
      }
      json = JSON.stringify(partial, replacer);
    }
    const corruptCount = replacer._getCount();
    if (corruptCount > 0) {
      console.warn(`[backup] ${corruptCount} corrupt fields replaced during export`);
    }
    let blob;
    try {
      const stream = new Blob([json]).stream().pipeThrough(new CompressionStream('gzip'));
      blob = await new Response(stream).blob();
    } catch(e) { blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' }); }
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `stillness-backup-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.gz`;
    a.click();

    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
    if (corruptCount > 0) {
      notify.warn(`Backup exported (.gz). ${corruptCount} corrupt field${corruptCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} skipped — see console.`);
    } else {
      notify.success('Backup exported (.gz).');
    }
  }

  const _CRC32_TABLE = (() => {
    const t = new Uint32Array(256);
    for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
      let c = i;
      for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) c = (c & 1) ? (0xEDB88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
      t[i] = c >>> 0;
    }
    return t;
  })();
  function _crc32(bytes) {
    let crc = 0xFFFFFFFF;
    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
      crc = _CRC32_TABLE[(crc ^ bytes[i]) & 0xFF] ^ (crc >>> 8);
    }
    return (crc ^ 0xFFFFFFFF) >>> 0;
  }

  function _buildStoreOnlyZip(entries) {
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    const localParts  = [];
    const centralParts = [];
    let offset = 0;
    for (const ent of entries) {
      const nameBytes = enc.encode(ent.name);
      const data = ent.data;
      const crc = _crc32(data);
      const size = data.length;

      const local = new Uint8Array(30 + nameBytes.length);
      const lv = new DataView(local.buffer);
      lv.setUint32(0, 0x04034b50, true);
      lv.setUint16(4, 20, true);
      lv.setUint16(6, 0, true);
      lv.setUint16(8, 0, true);
      lv.setUint16(10, 0, true);
      lv.setUint16(12, 0, true);
      lv.setUint32(14, crc, true);
      lv.setUint32(18, size, true);
      lv.setUint32(22, size, true);
      lv.setUint16(26, nameBytes.length, true);
      lv.setUint16(28, 0, true);
      local.set(nameBytes, 30);
      localParts.push(local, data);

      const central = new Uint8Array(46 + nameBytes.length);
      const cv = new DataView(central.buffer);
      cv.setUint32(0, 0x02014b50, true);
      cv.setUint16(4, 20, true);
      cv.setUint16(6, 20, true);
      cv.setUint16(8, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(10, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(12, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(14, 0, true);
      cv.setUint32(16, crc, true);
      cv.setUint32(20, size, true);
      cv.setUint32(24, size, true);
      cv.setUint16(28, nameBytes.length, true);
      cv.setUint16(30, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(32, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(34, 0, true);
      cv.setUint16(36, 0, true);
      cv.setUint32(38, 0, true);
      cv.setUint32(42, offset, true);
      central.set(nameBytes, 46);
      centralParts.push(central);
      offset += local.length + data.length;
    }
    const centralStart = offset;
    let centralLen = 0;
    for (const c of centralParts) centralLen += c.length;

    const eocd = new Uint8Array(22);
    const ev = new DataView(eocd.buffer);
    ev.setUint32(0, 0x06054b50, true);
    ev.setUint16(4, 0, true);
    ev.setUint16(6, 0, true);
    ev.setUint16(8, entries.length, true);
    ev.setUint16(10, entries.length, true);
    ev.setUint32(12, centralLen, true);
    ev.setUint32(16, centralStart, true);
    ev.setUint16(20, 0, true);
    return new Blob([...localParts, ...centralParts, eocd], { type: 'application/zip' });
  }

  function _zipSafeFilename(s, fallback) {
    let out = String(s ?? '').replace(/[\/\\:*?"<>|\x00-\x1f]/g, '_').trim();
    if (!out) out = fallback || 'session';
    return out.slice(0, 60);
  }

  async function exportHistoryZip() {
    markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.BACKUP);
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (!Array.isArray(history) || history.length === 0) {
      notify.warn('No session history yet — nothing to export.');
      return;
    }
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    const entries = [];

    const exportDate = new Date().toISOString();
    const readme =
      `# HNE — Session History Export\n\n` +
      `Exported: ${exportDate}\n` +
      `Total sessions: ${history.length}\n\n` +
      `Each session has two files in the \`sessions/\` folder:\n\n` +
      `- \`<id>__<persona>__<method>.txt\` — the full session script as plain text\n` +
      `- \`<id>__<persona>__<method>.json\` — the complete session record (mood,\n` +
      `  depth, ratings, settings, intention, tags, etc.)\n\n` +
      `This export is human-browsable. To do a full backup-and-restore round-trip\n` +
      `(profile, settings, custom personas, saved scripts, etc.) use the \`.gz\`\n` +
      `export instead — that's the canonical format for HNE import.\n\n` +
      `All data stays on your device — HNE never transmitted it anywhere.\n`;
    entries.push({ name: 'README.md', data: enc.encode(readme) });

    for (let i = 0; i < history.length; i++) {
      const rec = history[i];
      if (!rec || typeof rec !== 'object') continue;
      const idPart = _zipSafeFilename(rec.id || ('session-' + (i + 1)), 'session');
      const personaPart = _zipSafeFilename(rec.guide || rec.persona || 'unknown', 'persona');
      const methodPart  = _zipSafeFilename(rec.method || 'method', 'method');
      const stem = `${idPart}__${personaPart}__${methodPart}`;

      const script = String(rec.script || rec.fullScript || '').trim();
      if (script) {
        entries.push({ name: `sessions/${stem}.txt`, data: enc.encode(script) });
      }

      const sidecar = { ...rec };
      delete sidecar.bgImage;
      delete sidecar._fullScript;
      try {
        entries.push({
          name: `sessions/${stem}.json`,
          data: enc.encode(JSON.stringify(sidecar, null, 2))
        });
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[history zip] skipping non-serializable session', rec.id, e);
      }
    }
    const blob = _buildStoreOnlyZip(entries);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `hne-history-${exportDate.slice(0, 10)}.zip`;
    a.click();
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
    notify.success(`History exported (${history.length} session${history.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}).`);
  }

  function _csvCell(v) {
    if (v == null) return '';
    let s = (typeof v === 'object') ? JSON.stringify(v) : String(v);
    if (/[",\n\r]/.test(s)) s = '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"';
    return s;
  }

  async function exportHistoryCsv() {
    markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.BACKUP);
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (!Array.isArray(history) || history.length === 0) {
      notify.warn('No session history yet — nothing to export.');
      return;
    }

    const cols = [
      { key: 'id',           label: 'id' },
      { key: 'date',         label: 'date_iso',
        get: r => r.date ? new Date(r.date).toISOString() : '' },
      { key: 'guide',        label: 'persona' },
      { key: 'method',       label: 'method' },
      { key: 'intention',    label: 'intention' },
      { key: 'intentionType',label: 'intentionType' },
      { key: 'length',       label: 'length' },
      { key: 'soundscape',   label: 'soundscape' },
      { key: 'durationSec',  label: 'duration_sec' },
      { key: 'preMood',      label: 'pre_mood' },
      { key: 'postMood',     label: 'post_mood' },
      { key: 'preDepth',     label: 'pre_depth' },
      { key: 'postDepth',    label: 'post_depth' },
      { key: 'rating',       label: 'rating' },
      { key: 'completed',    label: 'completed' },
      { key: 'tags',         label: 'tags',
        get: r => Array.isArray(r.tags) ? r.tags.join('|') : (r.tags || '') },
      { key: 'susceptibilityAtSessionStart', label: 'hip_score_at_start' },
      { key: 'workflowVersion', label: 'workflow_version' },
    ];
    const lines = [];
    lines.push(cols.map(c => _csvCell(c.label)).join(','));
    for (const rec of history) {
      lines.push(cols.map(c => _csvCell(c.get ? c.get(rec) : rec[c.key])).join(','));
    }

    const csv = '\uFEFF' + lines.join('\r\n') + '\r\n';
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = `hne-history-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.csv`;
    a.click();
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
    notify.success(`CSV exported (${history.length} session${history.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}).`);
  }

  async function importBackup(file) {
    try {
      let text;
      try {
        const stream = file.stream().pipeThrough(new DecompressionStream('gzip'));
        text = await new Response(stream).text();
      } catch(e) {
        text = await file.text();
      }
      const backup = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!backup.version) { notify.error('Invalid backup file.'); return; }
      const ep = loadCustomPersonas(), eIds = new Set(ep.map(p => p.id));
      const np = (backup.personas||[]).filter(p => !eIds.has(p.id));
      if (np.length) { saveCustomPersonas([...ep,...np]); refreshPersonas(); renderPersonaGrid(); }
      const existingHistoryRaw = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      const existingHistory = existingHistoryRaw.map(normalizeHistoryEntry);
      const ehIds = new Set(existingHistory.map(h => h.id));
      const incomingHistory = (backup.history || []).map(normalizeHistoryEntry);
      const nh = incomingHistory.filter(h => !ehIds.has(h.id));
      if (nh.length || existingHistoryRaw.length !== existingHistory.length) {
        const mergedHistory = [...nh, ...existingHistory].map(normalizeHistoryEntry).sort((a,b)=>(b.date||0)-(a.date||0));
        mergedHistory.length = Math.min(mergedHistory.length, 50);

        await _writeHistoryCompact(mergedHistory);
        renderSessionHistory();
      }
      if (backup.program && !(await idbGet('stillness_program_v1'))) { await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', backup.program); renderPrograms(); }
      if (backup.analytics) {
        const mergedAnalytics = mergeAnalyticsData(await getAnalytics(), backup.analytics);
        await idbSet(ANALYTICS_KEY, mergedAnalytics);
      }
      if (backup.adaptive && !(await idbGet(ADAPTIVE_KEY))) { await idbSet(ADAPTIVE_KEY, backup.adaptive); }

      if (backup.unlocks && typeof backup.unlocks === 'object') {
        const current = (await idbGet('stillness_unlocks_v1')) || {};
        const merged = { ...current };
        for (const [pid, rec] of Object.entries(backup.unlocks)) {
          if (!rec || typeof rec !== 'object') continue;
          if (!merged[pid] || (Number(rec.unlockedAt) || 0) > (Number(merged[pid].unlockedAt) || 0)) {
            merged[pid] = { unlockedAt: Number(rec.unlockedAt) || Date.now() };
          }
        }
        await idbSet('stillness_unlocks_v1', merged);
        state._unlocks = merged;
        try { renderPersonaGrid(); } catch {}
      }
      if (backup.settings) {
        const merged = normalizeSettings({ ..._buildSettingsObj(), ...normalizeSettings(backup.settings) });
        if (_kv) { try { await _kv.settings.set(SETTINGS_KEY, merged); } catch {} }
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(merged));
          localStorage.removeItem('stillness_settings_v4');
          localStorage.removeItem('stillness_settings_v3');
          localStorage.removeItem('stillness_settings_v2');
        } catch {}
        await loadUserSettings();
      }
      if (backup.profile) {
        const hasExistingProfile = !!($('pfName')?.value?.trim() || $('pfAbout')?.value?.trim() || $('pfGoals')?.value?.trim());
        if (!hasExistingProfile) applyProfileToForm(backup.profile, { save: true });
      }

      let importedScripts = 0, importedPresets = 0, importedTags = 0,
          importedTriggers = 0, importedAB = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.savedScripts) && backup.savedScripts.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_saved_scripts_v1')) || [];
        const ids = new Set(existing.map(s => s.id));
        const fresh = backup.savedScripts.filter(s => s && s.id && !ids.has(s.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          await idbSet('stillness_saved_scripts_v1', [...fresh, ...existing]);
          importedScripts = fresh.length;
          if (typeof renderSavedScripts === 'function') renderSavedScripts();
        }
      }
      if (Array.isArray(backup.configPresets) && backup.configPresets.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_config_presets_v1')) || [];
        const ids = new Set(existing.map(p => p.id));
        const fresh = backup.configPresets.filter(p => p && p.id && !ids.has(p.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          await idbSet('stillness_config_presets_v1', [...fresh, ...existing]);
          importedPresets = fresh.length;
          if (typeof renderPresetDropdown === 'function') renderPresetDropdown();
        }
      }
      if (Array.isArray(backup.customTags) && backup.customTags.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_custom_tags_v1')) || [];

        const seen = new Set(existing.map(t => `${t.id || ''}::${t.label || ''}`));
        const fresh = backup.customTags.filter(t => t && !seen.has(`${t.id || ''}::${t.label || ''}`));
        if (fresh.length) {
          await idbSet('stillness_custom_tags_v1', [...existing, ...fresh]);
          importedTags = fresh.length;
          if (typeof renderCustomTagChips === 'function') renderCustomTagChips();
        }
      }
      if (Array.isArray(backup.triggerFires) && backup.triggerFires.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_trigger_fires_v1')) || [];

        const seen = new Set(existing.map(f => `${f.ts || 0}::${f.sessionId || ''}`));
        const fresh = backup.triggerFires.filter(f => f && !seen.has(`${f.ts || 0}::${f.sessionId || ''}`));
        if (fresh.length) {
          await idbSet('stillness_trigger_fires_v1', [...existing, ...fresh]);
          importedTriggers = fresh.length;
        }
      }
      if (Array.isArray(backup.abResults) && backup.abResults.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_ab_results_v1')) || [];
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(r => `${r.ts || 0}::${r.sessionId || ''}`));
        const fresh = backup.abResults.filter(r => r && !seen.has(`${r.ts || 0}::${r.sessionId || ''}`));
        if (fresh.length) {
          await idbSet('stillness_ab_results_v1', [...existing, ...fresh]);
          importedAB = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      let importedAudit = 0, importedSharedLinks = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.directorAudit) && backup.directorAudit.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('hne_director_audit_v1')) || [];
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(e => `${e.kind || 'x'}::${e.ts || 0}`));
        const fresh = backup.directorAudit.filter(e => e && !seen.has(`${e.kind || 'x'}::${e.ts || 0}`));
        if (fresh.length) {

          const merged = [...fresh, ...existing].sort((a, b) => (b.ts || 0) - (a.ts || 0)).slice(0, 200);
          await idbSet('hne_director_audit_v1', merged);
          importedAudit = fresh.length;
        }
      }
      if (Array.isArray(backup.sharedLinks) && backup.sharedLinks.length) {
        const existing = (await idbGet('hne_shared_links_v1')) || [];
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(e => e.id));
        const fresh = backup.sharedLinks.filter(e => e && e.id && !seen.has(e.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          const merged = [...fresh, ...existing].sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt || 0) - (a.createdAt || 0)).slice(0, 100);
          await idbSet('hne_shared_links_v1', merged);
          importedSharedLinks = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      let importedPatterns = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.funscriptPatterns) && backup.funscriptPatterns.length) {
        const existing = loadUserPatterns();
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(p => p.id));
        const fresh = backup.funscriptPatterns
          .filter(p => p && p.id && Array.isArray(p.actions) && !seen.has(p.id))
          .map(p => _normalizeUserPattern(p, seen));
        if (fresh.length) {
          saveUserPatterns([...existing, ...fresh]);
          importedPatterns = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      let importedVariables = 0;
      if (backup.sessionVariableDefs && typeof backup.sessionVariableDefs === 'object' && !Array.isArray(backup.sessionVariableDefs)) {
        const existing = loadVariableDefs();
        let changed = false;
        for (const [name, def] of Object.entries(backup.sessionVariableDefs)) {
          if (!/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]{0,31}$/.test(name)) continue;
          if (!existing[name]) { existing[name] = def; importedVariables++; changed = true; }
        }
        if (changed) {
          saveVariableDefs(existing);
          try { _renderVariablesPanel?.(); } catch {}
        }
      }

      let importedIntentions = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.customIntentions) && backup.customIntentions.length) {
        const existing = loadCustomIntentions();
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(i => i.id));
        const fresh = backup.customIntentions
          .filter(i => i && i.id && i.label && !seen.has(i.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          saveCustomIntentions([...existing, ...fresh]);
          try { _refreshCustomIntentions?.(); } catch {}
          importedIntentions = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      let importedMethods = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.customMethods) && backup.customMethods.length) {
        const existing = loadCustomMethods();
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(m => m.id));
        const fresh = backup.customMethods
          .filter(m => m && m.id && m.name && !seen.has(m.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          saveCustomMethods([...existing, ...fresh]);
          try { _refreshCustomMethods?.(); } catch {}
          importedMethods = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      if (backup.rampSettings && typeof backup.rampSettings === 'object') {
        const current = loadRampSettings();

        const isDefault = !current.enabled && current.startVal === 0.5 && current.endVal === 1.5;
        if (isDefault) {
          saveRampSettings({ ...RAMP_DEFAULTS, ...backup.rampSettings });
          state.rampSettings = loadRampSettings();
        }
      }

      if (backup.pacingSettings && typeof backup.pacingSettings === 'object') {
        const current = loadPacingSettings();
        const isDefault = !current.enabled && current.minSpeed === 0.5 && current.maxSpeed === 2.0;
        if (isDefault) {
          savePacingSettings(_normalizePacingSettings({ ...PACING_DEFAULTS, ...backup.pacingSettings }));
          state.pacingSettings = loadPacingSettings();
        }
      }

      let importedMacros = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(backup.hapticMacros) && backup.hapticMacros.length) {
        const existing = loadUserMacros();
        const seen = new Set(existing.map(m => m.id));
        const fresh = backup.hapticMacros
          .filter(m => m && m.id && m.name && Array.isArray(m.actions) && !seen.has(m.id));
        if (fresh.length) {
          saveUserMacros([...existing, ...fresh]);
          importedMacros = fresh.length;
        }
      }

      if (backup.fixationPos && typeof backup.fixationPos === 'object') {
        try {
          if (!localStorage.getItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY)) {
            localStorage.setItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY, JSON.stringify(backup.fixationPos));
            if (typeof _restoreFixationPos === 'function') _restoreFixationPos();
          }
        } catch {}
      }
      if (backup.memory && !(await idbGet('stillness_memory_v1'))) {

        await idbSet('stillness_memory_v1', backup.memory);
      }
      await rebuildAnalytics((await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []);
      renderSidebarStats();
      renderHeatmap();
      renderSparkline();
      renderHipSparkline();

      const counts = [];
      if (np.length)             counts.push(`${np.length} persona${np.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (nh.length)             counts.push(`${nh.length} session${nh.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedScripts)       counts.push(`${importedScripts} script${importedScripts === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedPresets)       counts.push(`${importedPresets} preset${importedPresets === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedTags)          counts.push(`${importedTags} tag${importedTags === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedTriggers)      counts.push(`${importedTriggers} trigger fire${importedTriggers === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedAB)            counts.push(`${importedAB} A/B result${importedAB === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedAudit)         counts.push(`${importedAudit} audit entr${importedAudit === 1 ? 'y' : 'ies'}`);
      if (importedSharedLinks)   counts.push(`${importedSharedLinks} shared link${importedSharedLinks === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedPatterns)      counts.push(`${importedPatterns} pattern${importedPatterns === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedVariables)     counts.push(`${importedVariables} variable${importedVariables === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedIntentions)    counts.push(`${importedIntentions} intention${importedIntentions === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedMethods)       counts.push(`${importedMethods} method${importedMethods === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      if (importedMacros)        counts.push(`${importedMacros} macro${importedMacros === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
      notify.success(counts.length ? `Imported: ${counts.join(', ')}.` : 'Backup imported (nothing new to add).');
    } catch(e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); }
  }

  function populateTranscript() {
    const panel = $('transcriptPanel');
    if (!panel || !state.parsedScript) return;
    const phases = getPlaybackPhaseOrder();
    let html = '';
    for (const phase of phases) {
      const text = state.parsedScript[phase];
      if (!text || text.trim().length < 10) continue;
      const clean = stripLeadingPhaseHeader(text, phase).replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, ' ⋯ ').trim();

      html += `<div class="t-phase" data-phase="${escapeHtml(phase)}">${escapeHtml(getPhaseLabel(phase))}</div>`;
      html += `<div class="t-body" data-phase="${escapeHtml(phase)}">${escapeHtml(clean)}</div>`;
    }
    panel.innerHTML = html;
  }

  function refreshTranscriptActive() {
    const panel = $('transcriptPanel');
    if (!panel) return;
    const cur = state._currentPhase;
    panel.querySelectorAll('.t-phase, .t-body').forEach(el => {
      el.classList.toggle('t-active', el.dataset.phase === cur);
    });
  }

  function toggleTranscript() {
    const panel = $('transcriptPanel');
    if (!panel) return;
    panel.classList.toggle('visible');
    const btn = $('transcriptToggle');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = panel.classList.contains('visible') ? '✕ close' : '📜 script';

    if (panel.classList.contains('visible')) {
      refreshTranscriptActive();
      const active = panel.querySelector('.t-phase.t-active');
      if (active) active.scrollIntoView({ block: 'start', behavior: 'auto' });
    }
  }

  function validateSessionSafety() {
    const isSleep = state.intentionType === 'sleep';
    const sections = getScriptSectionsFromState();
    const has = (base) => sections.some(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === base);
    const missing = [];
    if (!isSleep) {
      if (!has('lightener'))       missing.push('Lightener');
      if (!has('wake'))            missing.push('Wake');
      if (!has('reintroduction'))  missing.push('Reintroduction');
    }
    const deepenerCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'deepener').length;
    const lightenerCount = sections.filter(s => phaseBase(s.phaseId) === 'lightener').length;
    let unbalanced = null;
    if (!isSleep && deepenerCount !== lightenerCount) {
      unbalanced = { deepenerCount, lightenerCount, diff: deepenerCount - lightenerCount };
    }
    const ok = missing.length === 0 && !unbalanced;
    return { ok, missing, unbalanced, isSleep };
  }

  function showUnsafeSessionModal(safety) {
    return new Promise(resolve => {
      const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
      backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
      const issues = [];
      if (safety.missing.length) {
        issues.push(`<li>Missing: <strong>${safety.missing.join(', ')}</strong> — without these, the session ends in trance.</li>`);
      }
      if (safety.unbalanced) {
        const u = safety.unbalanced;
        if (u.diff > 0) issues.push(`<li>${u.deepenerCount} Deepener${u.deepenerCount>1?'s':''} but only ${u.lightenerCount} Lightener${u.lightenerCount===1?'':'s'} — you will go deeper than you return.</li>`);
        else            issues.push(`<li>${u.lightenerCount} Lightener${u.lightenerCount>1?'s':''} without matching Deepeners (${u.deepenerCount}) — structurally inconsistent.</li>`);
      }
      backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal unsafe-modal">
        <div class="unsafe-header">⚠ Incomplete session structure</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.88rem; line-height:1.55; color:var(--text-dim)">
          This session is missing finishing phases required for safe emergence from trance.
        </div>
        <ul class="unsafe-list">${issues.join('')}</ul>
        <div class="unsafe-note">
          <strong>Why this matters.</strong> A proper hypnosis session brings you fully back to normal
          waking awareness. Skipping the Lightener, Wake, or Reintroduction phases may leave you feeling
          groggy, partially dissociated, or — in rare cases — still in a light trance state.
          Only proceed if this is deliberate (e.g. you're running a custom sleep-induction session and intend to drift off).
        </div>
        <div class="modal-actions">
          <button class="btn" id="_unsafeBack">← Go Back</button>
          <button class="btn btn-unsafe" id="_unsafeProceed">Proceed Anyway (Unsafe)</button>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
      const cleanup = (val) => { backdrop.remove(); resolve(val); };
      backdrop.querySelector('#_unsafeBack').addEventListener('click', () => cleanup(false));
