      backdrop.querySelector('#_unsafeProceed').addEventListener('click', () => cleanup(true));
      backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) cleanup(false); });
    });
  }

  async function startSession() {
    // Roadmap #15+19 — fire the prep tray. Resolves immediately if both
    // priming + absorption are off, or if priming is auto-mode and
    // weekly cap is hit. Awaiting this blocks session launch on the
    // user's tray interaction, which is the entire point of the
    // priming intervention.
    try { await runPrepTray({ context: 'session' }); } catch (e) { console.warn('[prep tray]', e); }

    if (state._preGenInProgress || state._preGenScheduled) {
      cancelActivePreGen('user starting active session');

      let waited = 0;
      while (_aiInProgress && waited < 4000) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200));
        waited += 200;
      }
    }

    if (_aiInProgress) {
      notify.info('Script is still being generated — try again in a moment.');
      return;
    }

    if (state._cooldownUntil && Date.now() < state._cooldownUntil) {
      if (state._debug?.skipCooldown) {
        sdLog('cooldown bypassed — debug mode on');
      } else {
        const remaining = getEmergencyCooldownRemaining();
        notify.warn(`Please wait ${remaining}s before starting another session.`);
        return;
      }
    }

    let scriptText = $('scriptText').value.trim();
    if (!scriptText) { notify.warn('Generate or paste a script first.'); return; }

    const safety = validateSessionSafety();
    if (!safety.ok) {
      if (state._debug?.skipSafetyGate) {
        sdLog('safety gate bypassed — debug mode on', safety);
        state._startedUnsafe = true;
      } else {
        const proceed = await showUnsafeSessionModal(safety);
        if (!proceed) return;

        state._startedUnsafe = true;
      }
    } else {
      state._startedUnsafe = false;
    }

    const lengthWarn = checkSessionLengthSafety();
    if (lengthWarn?.warn) {
      notify.warn(lengthWarn.message);
    }

    if (_scriptEditedSinceGen) {
      const fix = await confirmAsync('You\'ve edited the script. Would you like to recalculate pause timings to match your changes?\n\nYes = auto-fix pause markers based on sentence length\nNo = keep current timings as-is', { okText: 'recalculate', cancelText: 'keep as-is' });
      if (fix) {
        const fixed = fixScriptTimings(scriptText);
        $('scriptText').value = fixed;
        state.fullScript = fixed;
        state.parsedScript = parseScript(fixed);
        showScript();
        notify.success('Pause timings recalculated.');
        scriptText = fixed;
      }
      _scriptEditedSinceGen = false;
    }

    const voiceList = (typeof speechSynthesis !== 'undefined') ? speechSynthesis.getVoices() : [];
    if (voiceList.length === 0) {
      if (!await confirmAsync('No text-to-speech voices are available in this browser. The session will run silently (visuals only). Continue anyway?', { okText: 'continue', cancelText: 'go back' })) return;
    }

    if (typeof _stopAllPreviews === 'function') _stopAllPreviews();

    try {
      const susc = Number($('pfSusceptibility')?.value);
      if (Number.isFinite(susc) && susc <= 3) {
        const k = 'hne.lowHipReframeShownCount';
        const shown = Number(localStorage.getItem(k) || '0');
        if (shown < 8) {
          notify.info(
            'A reminder: the benefits of this practice — slower breath, lower heart rate, calmer attention — are physiological. You don\'t need to "go under" or feel anything specific for it to work.',
            7000
          );
          localStorage.setItem(k, String(shown + 1));
        }
      }
    } catch {}

    state.fullScript = scriptText;
    state.parsedScript = parseScript(scriptText);
    state.voice = getSelectedVoice();
    state.abortFlag = false;
    state._finishing = false;
    state._sessionStartTime = Date.now();
    state._pausedTotalMs = 0;
    state._pauseStartedAt = null;
    state._hiddenTotalMs = 0;
    state._hiddenStartedAt = null;

    state._inactiveTotalMs = 0;
    state._inactiveStartedAt = null;
    state._currentPhase = 'settling';

    resetAffirmRotation();

    state.sessionVariables = {};

    try { _applyVariableInitials?.(); } catch {}
    try { _seedSessionVariables?.(); } catch {}

    try { funscriptEngine.start(); } catch {}

    try { _startHeatmapPlayhead(); } catch {}

    const _estMetrics = getScriptMetrics(state.fullScript || '');
    state._estimatedTotalSec = Math.max(0, (_estMetrics.estimatedMin || 0) * 60);

    state._baseSpeechRate = state.speechRate;
    resetPlaybackDynamics();

    startAudioReactiveLoop();

    if ($('webcamOptInThisSession')?.checked) {
      startWebcam().catch(e => console.warn('[webcam] start in startSession failed:', e));
    }

    if ($('micOptInThisSession')?.checked) {
      state._mic.enabled = true;
      state.adaptiveBreathPacing = true;
      startMic().catch(e => console.warn('[mic] start in startSession failed:', e));
    }

    // Round 29 — re-arm the HR baseline at session start so the relaxation
    // signal anchors on the user's "settled at the start of the session"
    // state, not whatever they were doing while configuring the wizard.
    // Safe to call unconditionally — the bridge no-ops if no HR data is
    // currently flowing.
    if ($('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession')?.checked) {
      try { sensorBridge.resetBaseline(); }
      catch (e) { console.warn('[sensor-bridge] resetBaseline in startSession failed:', e); }
    }

    if (DIFF_BOUNCE_THRESHOLDS.commitOnSessionStart) {
      Object.values(diffBouncers).forEach(b => { try { b.hardCommit('sessionStart'); } catch(e) { console.warn('[DB] hardCommit failed for', b.source, e); } });
    }
    const method = getMethod();

    state._doubleInduction = method.id === 'double-induction';
    state._secondVoice = null;
    if (state._doubleInduction) {
      markFeatureUsed(FEAT.DOUBLE_INDUCT);
      const voices = speechSynthesis.getVoices().filter(v => v.lang.startsWith('en') && v.name !== state.voice?.name);

      const primaryName = (state.voice?.name || '').toLowerCase();
      const isMale = /male|daniel|james|david|mark|george/i.test(primaryName) && !/female/i.test(primaryName);
      const opposite = voices.find(v => isMale ? /female|samantha|karen|moira|zira/i.test(v.name) : /male|daniel|james|david|mark/i.test(v.name) && !/female/i.test(v.name));
      state._secondVoice = opposite || voices[0] || null;
      if (state._secondVoice) {
        notify.info(`Double induction: ${state.voice?.name || 'primary'} + ${state._secondVoice.name}`);
      }
    }

    switchScreen('session-screen');
    document.body.classList.add('in-session');
    showSessionControls();

    try { _setSessionFavicon(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[favicon set]', e); }

    warnMissingCapabilities();
    $('personaIndicator').textContent = '· ' + getPersona().name.toLowerCase() + ' ·';
    $('methodIndicator').textContent = '· ' + method.name.toLowerCase() + ' ·';

    $('sessionProgressFill').style.width = '0%';
    updatePhaseDots(-1);

    const h = state.hud;
    const $s = (id, vis) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.style.display = vis ? '' : 'none'; };
    $s('fixationDot', h.fixationDot);
    $s('textDisplay', h.textDisplay);
    $s('phaseDots', h.phaseDots);
    $s('phaseIndicator', h.phaseLabel);
    document.querySelector('.session-progress-wrap')?.style.setProperty('display', h.progressBar ? '' : 'none');
    $s('sessionTime', h.sessionTime);
    $s('personaIndicator', h.labels);
    $s('methodIndicator', h.labels);
    $s('audioIndicator', h.labels);

    const vizChoice = state.vizOverride === 'auto' ? method.visual : state.vizOverride;
    if (vizChoice === 'none') {

      const stage = $('stage');
      Array.from(stage.children).forEach(c => {
        if (!c.classList.contains('fixation-dot') && !c.classList.contains('audio-indicator')
          && !c.classList.contains('persona-indicator') && !c.classList.contains('method-indicator')
          && !c.classList.contains('session-progress-wrap') && !c.classList.contains('transcript-panel')
          && !c.classList.contains('personal-symbol-overlay')) c.remove();
      });
    } else {
      setupVisual(vizChoice);
    }
    populateTranscript();
    $('transcriptPanel')?.classList.remove('visible');
    const tBtn = $('transcriptToggle');
    if (tBtn) tBtn.textContent = '📜 script';

    if (state.soundscape && state.soundscape !== 'none') {
      try {
        await drone.start(state.droneVolume, state.soundscape);
        $('audioIndicator').textContent = '· ' + state.soundscape + ' ·';
      } catch(e) {
        notify.info('Audio unavailable — tap the screen to enable audio, then try again.');
      }
    }

    vibrateSessionMarker();

    setSleepOverlay(state.intentionType === 'sleep');

    bgEngine.source = state.bgSource || 'none';
    bgEngine.prompt = state.bgPrompt || '';
    if (bgEngine.source === 'ai') {
      bgEngine.pregenerate(5);
    } else if (bgEngine.source === 'local-image' && state._bgFile) {
      bgEngine.setLocalFile(state._bgFile);
    } else if (bgEngine.source === 'local-video' && state._bgFile) {
      bgEngine.setLocalFile(state._bgFile);
    } else if (bgEngine.source === 'local-folder') {

      if (!bgEngine.folder?.files?.length) {
        notify.warn('No folder selected — pick one in Step 5 or change source.');
      } else {
        bgEngine.startFolderSlideshow();
      }
    } else if (bgEngine.source === 'youtube' && state.bgYoutubeUrl) {
      bgEngine.setYouTube(state.bgYoutubeUrl);
    } else if (bgEngine.source === 'url' && state.bgStaticUrl) {
      bgEngine.setStaticImage(state.bgStaticUrl);
    }
    if (bgEngine.source !== 'none') bgEngine.activate();

    setMediaSession(true);

    const postSlider = $('postStateSlider'); if (postSlider) { postSlider.value = 5; }
    const postVal = $('postStateVal'); if (postVal) postVal.textContent = '5';
    const alertSlider = $('alertnessSlider'); if (alertSlider) { alertSlider.value = 7; }
    const alertVal = $('alertnessVal'); if (alertVal) alertVal.textContent = '7';
    const depthSl = $('depthSlider'); if (depthSl) { depthSl.value = 5; }
    const depthV = $('depthVal'); if (depthV) depthV.textContent = '5';
    const journal = $('journalText'); if (journal) journal.value = '';

    const pcText = $('postCheckinText'); if (pcText) pcText.value = '';
    const pcWrap = $('postCheckinTextWrap'); if (pcWrap) pcWrap.style.display = '';
    const pcSliders = $('postCheckinSliders'); if (pcSliders) pcSliders.style.display = 'none';
    const pcTog  = $('postCheckinTextToggle'); if (pcTog) pcTog.textContent = 'use sliders instead';
    const pcHint = $('postCheckinTextHint');
    if (pcHint) {
      pcHint.textContent = 'we\'ll read mood, alertness, and depth from what you write';
      pcHint.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
    }
    const pcEcho = $('postCheckinFeedbackEcho');
    if (pcEcho) { pcEcho.classList.remove('visible'); pcEcho.innerHTML = ''; }

    try {
      if (navigator.wakeLock) {
        state._wakeLock = await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');
        state._wakeLock.addEventListener('release', () => { state._wakeLock = null; });
      }
    } catch(e) {  }

    const needsWarning = method.category === 'advanced' || ['drill-instructor','dominatrix','interrogator','commander','headmistress','surgeon'].includes(getPersona().id);
    if (needsWarning) {
      const warningShown = await confirmAsync(
        'This session uses advanced techniques that may produce intense experiences including dissociation, hallucination, or strong emotional responses.\n\nEnsure you are in a safe, comfortable environment. Do not drive or operate machinery after.\n\nThe "end & re-alert" button is always available.',
        { okText: 'proceed', cancelText: 'go back' }
      );
      if (!warningShown) {
        switchScreen('setup-wizard');
        document.body.classList.remove('in-session'); document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden'); clearTimeout(_controlsTimer);
        await drone.stop(); stopVisuals();
        bgEngine.clear();
        setSleepOverlay(false);

        setMediaSession(false);

        stopWebcam();
        const _wcCb = $('webcamOptInThisSession'); if (_wcCb) _wcCb.checked = false;

        stopMic();
        const _mcCb = $('micOptInThisSession'); if (_mcCb) _mcCb.checked = false;
        state._mic.enabled = false;
        state.adaptiveBreathPacing = false;

        stopAudioReactiveLoop();

        state._sessionStartTime = null;
        state._pausedTotalMs = 0;
        state._pauseStartedAt = null;
        state._hiddenTotalMs = 0;
        state._hiddenStartedAt = null;
        state._inactiveTotalMs = 0;
        state._inactiveStartedAt = null;
        try { state._wakeLock?.release(); } catch(e) {}
        return;
      }
    }

    state._timeInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if (state.paused) return;
      const now = Date.now();
      let inactiveMs = (state._inactiveTotalMs || 0);
      if (state._inactiveStartedAt) inactiveMs += (now - state._inactiveStartedAt);
      const elapsed = Math.round((now - state._sessionStartTime - inactiveMs) / 1000);
      const mins = Math.floor(elapsed / 60);
      const secs = elapsed % 60;
      const timeEl = $('sessionTime');
      if (timeEl) timeEl.textContent = `${mins}:${String(secs).padStart(2,'0')} elapsed`;

      try { if (typeof _renderHudEnrichment === 'function') _renderHudEnrichment(); } catch {}
    }, 1000);

    const phases = getPlaybackPhaseOrder().filter(phase => {
      const t = state.parsedScript?.[phase];
      return t && t.trim().length >= 10;
    });
    renderSessionPhaseDots(phases);
    const phaseLabels = Object.fromEntries(phases.map(phase => [phase, getPhaseLabel(phase).toLowerCase()]));

    const durations = PHASE_DURATIONS[state.length] || PHASE_DURATIONS.medium;
    const expectedSec = phases.reduce((sum, phase) => {
      const base = phase.replace(/-\d+$/, '');
      if (base === 'affirm') return sum + 45;
      return sum + (durations[base] || 60);
    }, 0);
    const safetyCheck = () => {
      if (state._finishing || !state._sessionStartTime) return;

      if (state.paused) { state._safetyTimeout = setTimeout(safetyCheck, 60000); return; }
      notify.warn('Session exceeded maximum expected duration — finishing with rescue.');

      emergencyEnd();
    };
    state._safetyTimeout = setTimeout(safetyCheck, (expectedSec * 2 + 300) * 1000);

    for (let pi = 0; pi < phases.length; pi++) {
      const phase = phases[pi];
      if (state.abortFlag) break;
      const phaseText = state.parsedScript[phase];

      state._currentPhase = phase;

      try {
        if (typeof phaseBase === 'function' && phaseBase(phase) === 'work'
            && typeof _fireSessionAnchor === 'function') {
          _fireSessionAnchor();
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[anchor fire]', e); }

      try { _updatePersonalSymbolOverlay(phase); } catch (e) { console.warn('[symbol overlay]', e); }

      try { _updatePhaseColorTemp(phase); } catch (e) { console.warn('[phase-temp]', e); }

      const PHASE_RATE_MULT = {
        settling:       1.00,
        induction:      0.92,
        deepener:       0.85,
        level:          0.85,
        work:           0.95,
        affirm:         0.93,
        lightener:      1.00,
        wake:           1.05,
        reintroduction: 1.00,
      };
      const baseKey = phase.replace(/-\d+$/, '');
      state._phaseRateMult = PHASE_RATE_MULT[baseKey] ?? 1.0;
      $('phaseIndicator').textContent = phaseLabels[phase];
      updatePhaseDots(pi);

      refreshTranscriptActive();
      if (state.droneEnabled && drone.running) drone.setPhaseFreq(phase);

      const cleanText = stripLeadingPhaseHeader(phaseText, phase).trim();
      try { await speakScript(cleanText); }
      catch(e) { console.error(`Phase "${phase}" speak error:`, e); }

      const pct = Math.round(((pi + 1) / Math.max(phases.length, 1)) * 100);
      $('sessionProgressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
    }

    $('sessionProgressFill').style.width = '100%';
    updatePhaseDots(phases.length, phases.length);

    if (!state.abortFlag && !state._finishing) {
      state._finishing = true;
      finishSession(false);
    }
  }

  async function interruptibleSleep(totalMs, bypassAbort = false) {
    const CHUNK = 200;
    let elapsed = 0;
    while (elapsed < totalMs) {
      if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) return;
      while (state.paused && !state.abortFlag) { await sleep(CHUNK); }
      const remaining = totalMs - elapsed;
      await sleep(Math.min(CHUNK, remaining));
      elapsed += CHUNK;
    }
  }

  function _parseEmbeddedSegments(text) {
    const segments = [];
    let i = 0;
    while (i < text.length) {
      const openIdx = text.indexOf('\u0001', i);
      if (openIdx < 0) {
        segments.push({ text: text.slice(i), embedded: false });
        break;
      }
      if (openIdx > i) segments.push({ text: text.slice(i, openIdx), embedded: false });
      const closeIdx = text.indexOf('\u0002', openIdx + 1);
      if (closeIdx < 0) {

        segments.push({ text: text.slice(openIdx + 1), embedded: false });
        break;
      }
      segments.push({ text: text.slice(openIdx + 1, closeIdx), embedded: true });
      i = closeIdx + 1;
    }
    return segments.filter(s => s.text);
  }

  const _VALID_BG_SENTINELS = new Set([
    'none',

    'rain', 'ocean', 'fire', 'forest', 'stream', 'wind', 'thunder', 'storm', 'owls', 'whales',

    'drone', 'bowls', 'heartbeat', 'binaural', 'isochronic', 'chimes',

    'pink', 'brown', 'white', 'fan',

    'cave', 'crickets', 'temple', 'spaceship', 'underwater', 'clock', 'train', 'city',
  ]);

  const _VALID_VIZ_SENTINELS = new Set([
    'auto',

    'spiral', 'breathing', 'candle', 'moire', 'highway',

    'tunnel', 'starfield', 'colorwash', 'canvas-pulse',

    'vortex', 'mandala', 'lissajous', 'pendulum-viz',

    'flowfield', 'plasma', 'kaleidoscope-flow', 'kaleidoscope-plasma',

    'aurora', 'rain', 'smoke', 'ink', 'sacred-geo', 'waveform',

    'fireflies', 'ripples',

    'pocket-watch', 'spinning-coin', 'hand-pendulum',

    'pulse', 'none',

    'gamma-flicker',
  ]);

  function _extractSceneSentinels(text) {
    const dispatches = [];
    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return { stripped: text || '', dispatches };
    let stripped = text.replace(/\[(BG|VIZ):\s*([\w\-]+)\s*\]/gi, (_, kind, value) => {
      const k = kind.toUpperCase();
      const v = String(value || '').toLowerCase().trim();
      if (k === 'BG' && _VALID_BG_SENTINELS.has(v)) {
        dispatches.push({ kind: 'bg', value: v });
      } else if (k === 'VIZ' && _VALID_VIZ_SENTINELS.has(v)) {
        dispatches.push({ kind: 'viz', value: v });
      }
      return '';
    });

    stripped = stripped.replace(
      /\[HAPTIC:\s*(pulse|level|stop|macro|intensity|speed|random|ramp)(?:=\s*([\w\s.,\-]+))?\s*\]/gi,
      (_, op, args) => {
        const lop = op.toLowerCase();
        if (lop === 'macro') {

          const id = (args || '').split(',')[0].trim().toLowerCase();
          if (id) dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-macro', id });
          return '';
        }

        if (lop === 'intensity' || lop === 'speed' || lop === 'random') {
          const v = parseFloat((args || '').split(',')[0]);
          if (Number.isFinite(v)) dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-' + lop, value: v });
          return '';
        }
        if (lop === 'ramp') {
          const tok = (args || '').toLowerCase().trim();
          dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-ramp', mode: tok === 'off' ? 'off' : 'on' });
          return '';
        }
        const a = (args || '').split(',').map(s => parseFloat(s.trim())).filter(n => Number.isFinite(n));
        if (lop === 'pulse') {
          dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-pulse', intensity: a[0] ?? 0.5, durationMs: a[1] ?? 200 });
        } else if (lop === 'level') {
          dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-level', intensity: a[0] ?? 0 });
        } else if (lop === 'stop') {
          dispatches.push({ kind: 'haptic-level', intensity: 0 });
        }
        return '';
      }
    );
    return { stripped, dispatches };
  }

  function _dispatchSceneSentinels(dispatches) {
    if (!Array.isArray(dispatches) || !dispatches.length) return;
    let delay = 0;
    for (const d of dispatches) {
      const ms = delay;
      setTimeout(() => {
        try {
          if (d.kind === 'bg') {
            if (typeof _switchSoundscapeLive === 'function') _switchSoundscapeLive(d.value);
          } else if (d.kind === 'viz') {
            if (typeof _switchVisualLive === 'function') _switchVisualLive(d.value);
          } else if (d.kind === 'haptic-pulse') {

            try { hapticBridge.pulse(d.intensity, d.durationMs); } catch {}
          } else if (d.kind === 'haptic-level') {
            try { hapticBridge.setLevel(d.intensity); } catch {}
          } else if (d.kind === 'haptic-macro') {

            try {
              const macro = _findHapticMacro(d.id);
              if (macro) funscriptEngine.injectMacro(macro);
            } catch {}
          } else if (d.kind === 'haptic-intensity' || d.kind === 'haptic-speed' || d.kind === 'haptic-random') {

            try {
              const map = { 'haptic-intensity': 'setIntensity', 'haptic-speed': 'setSpeed', 'haptic-random': 'setRandomness' };
              executeRuleAction({ name: 'scene', action: { type: map[d.kind], param: d.value } });
            } catch {}
          } else if (d.kind === 'haptic-ramp') {
            try { executeRuleAction({ name: 'scene', action: { type: 'setRamp', param: { enabled: d.mode === 'on' } } }); } catch {}
          }
        } catch (e) { console.warn('[scene sentinel dispatch]', d, e); }
      }, ms);

      delay += (d.kind === 'haptic-pulse' || d.kind === 'haptic-level' || d.kind === 'haptic-macro'
                 || d.kind === 'haptic-intensity' || d.kind === 'haptic-speed'
                 || d.kind === 'haptic-random' || d.kind === 'haptic-ramp') ? 50 : 800;
    }
  }

  async function _switchSoundscapeLive(type) {
    if (typeof type !== 'string') return;
    type = type.toLowerCase().trim();
    if (!_VALID_BG_SENTINELS.has(type)) return;
    if (state.soundscape === type) return;
    state.soundscape = type;
    state.droneEnabled = type !== 'none';
    state._soundscapeOverridden = true;

    const liveSel = $('liveSoundscapeSelect'); if (liveSel) liveSel.value = type;
    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = type;
    try { saveUserSettings?.(); } catch {}

    if (type === 'none') {
      try { await drone.stop(); } catch {}
      const ai = $('audioIndicator');
      if (ai) ai.textContent = '';
      return;
    }
    try {
      if (drone.running && typeof drone.crossfadeTo === 'function') {
        await drone.crossfadeTo(type, 1.8, state.droneVolume);
      } else {
        try { await drone.stop(); } catch {}
        await drone.start(state.droneVolume, type);
      }
      if (state._currentPhase) {
        try { drone.setPhaseFreq(state._currentPhase); } catch {}
      }
      const ai = $('audioIndicator');
      if (ai) ai.textContent = '· ' + type + ' ·';
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[scene sentinel] drone crossfade failed:', e); }
  }

  function _switchVisualLive(type) {
    if (typeof type !== 'string') return;
    type = type.toLowerCase().trim();
    if (!_VALID_VIZ_SENTINELS.has(type)) return;
    if (state.vizOverride === type) return;
    state.vizOverride = type;
    const sel = $('vizSelect'); if (sel) sel.value = type;
    const liveSel = $('liveVizSelect'); if (liveSel) liveSel.value = type;
    try { saveUserSettings?.(); } catch {}
    try {
      if (typeof setupVisual === 'function') setupVisual(type);
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[scene sentinel] visual switch failed:', e); }
  }

  function _renderHudEnrichment() {
    const root = $('hudEnrichment');
    if (!root) return;

    const pillsEl = $('hudSlotPills');
    if (pillsEl) {
      const slots = (typeof loadMacroSlots === 'function') ? loadMacroSlots() : {};
      const anyBound = Object.keys(slots).some(k => slots[k]);
      if (!anyBound) {

        pillsEl.innerHTML = '';
      } else {
        const html = [];
        for (let s = 1; s <= 5; s++) {
          const macroId = slots[s];
          if (!macroId) {
            html.push(`<span class="hud-slot-pill unbound" title="slot ${s} unbound"><span class="key">${s}</span><span>—</span></span>`);
            continue;
          }
          const macro = (typeof _findHapticMacro === 'function') ? _findHapticMacro(macroId) : null;
          if (!macro) {

            html.push(`<span class="hud-slot-pill unbound" title="slot ${s} bound to deleted macro"><span class="key">${s}</span><span>—</span></span>`);
            continue;
          }
          const safeName = macro.name.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
          html.push(`<span class="hud-slot-pill bound" data-slot="${s}" data-macro="${macroId}" title="press ${s} or click to fire — ${safeName}"><span class="key">${s}</span><span>${safeName}</span></span>`);
        }
        pillsEl.innerHTML = html.join('');

        pillsEl.querySelectorAll('.hud-slot-pill.bound').forEach(pill => {
          pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const id = pill.dataset.macro;
            const m = (typeof _findHapticMacro === 'function') ? _findHapticMacro(id) : null;
            if (m) {
              try { funscriptEngine.injectMacro(m); }
              catch (e) { console.warn('[HUD slot click]', e); }
            }
          });
        });
      }
    }

    const barsEl = $('hudMetricBars');
    if (barsEl) {
      const webcamOn = !!(state._webcam && state._webcam.active);

      const sessionRunning = !!state._sessionStartTime && !state.abortFlag;
      // Round 29 — HUD also surfaces live BPM whenever the sensor bridge
      // is producing data, even outside a session (e.g. while the user is
      // calibrating before tapping Begin). The bridge is treated as a
      // first-class display source alongside webcam.
      const hrBpm = (typeof sensorBridge !== 'undefined' && sensorBridge.getCurrentBpm)
        ? sensorBridge.getCurrentBpm()
        : null;
      const hrAvailable = Number.isFinite(hrBpm);
      if (!webcamOn && !sessionRunning && !hrAvailable) {
        barsEl.innerHTML = '';
      } else {
        const eng = (typeof getEngineMetric === 'function') ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, getEngineMetric('engagement') || 0)) : 0;
        const att = (typeof getEngineMetric === 'function') ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, getEngineMetric('attention') || 0)) : 0;
        const rows = [
          `<div class="hud-metric-row"><span>engagement</span><span class="hud-metric-bar-track"><span class="hud-metric-bar-fill" style="width:${(eng*100).toFixed(0)}%"></span></span><span class="hud-metric-bar-value">${(eng*100).toFixed(0)}</span></div>`,
        ];

        if (webcamOn) {
          rows.push(`<div class="hud-metric-row"><span>attention</span><span class="hud-metric-bar-track"><span class="hud-metric-bar-fill attention" style="width:${(att*100).toFixed(0)}%"></span></span><span class="hud-metric-bar-value">${(att*100).toFixed(0)}</span></div>`);
        }

        // Round 29 — HR row. Two pieces of info squeezed into the same
        // row shape: the heart icon + raw BPM as the label, and the
        // relaxation score (0-1) as the bar fill. Saves vertical space
        // vs splitting them across two rows. The fill uses --neon-magenta
        // so it's visually distinct from engagement (cyan) and attention
        // (amber). Only renders once we have a usable BPM reading.
        if (hrAvailable) {
          const relax = (typeof getEngineMetric === 'function') ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, getEngineMetric('relaxation') || 0)) : 0;
          const baseline = (typeof sensorBridge !== 'undefined' && sensorBridge.getBaseline) ? sensorBridge.getBaseline() : null;
          const baselineHint = Number.isFinite(baseline) ? ` (base ${Math.round(baseline)})` : '';
          rows.push(
            `<div class="hud-metric-row" title="Live heart rate · relaxation = drop from baseline${baselineHint}"><span>♥ ${Math.round(hrBpm)} bpm</span><span class="hud-metric-bar-track"><span class="hud-metric-bar-fill" style="width:${(relax*100).toFixed(0)}%;background:var(--neon-magenta,#e85a8e)"></span></span><span class="hud-metric-bar-value">${(relax*100).toFixed(0)}</span></div>`
          );
        }

        barsEl.innerHTML = rows.join('');
      }
    }

    const chipEl = $('hudPhaseChip');
    if (chipEl) {
      const phaseId = state._currentPhase;
      const phaseSec = (typeof getEngineMetric === 'function') ? Math.round(getEngineMetric('phaseSec') || 0) : 0;
      if (!phaseId) {
        chipEl.textContent = '';
      } else {
        const label = (typeof getPhaseLabel === 'function') ? getPhaseLabel(phaseId) : phaseId;
        const m = Math.floor(phaseSec / 60);
        const s = phaseSec % 60;
        chipEl.textContent = `${label.toLowerCase()} · ${m}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;
      }
    }
  }

  const REPEAT_MAX_COUNT  = 50;
  const REPEAT_MAX_PASSES = 8;
  const REPEAT_MAX_BYTES  = 1024 * 1024;

  const REPEAT_BLOCK_RX =
    /\[\s*REPEAT\s+(\d+)\s*\]((?:(?!\[\s*REPEAT\s+\d+\s*\])[\s\S])*?)\[\s*\/\s*REPEAT\s*\]/i;

  function _expandRepeatBlocks(text) {
    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return text || '';
    if (text.indexOf('[REPEAT') < 0 && text.indexOf('[repeat') < 0) return text;
    let out = text;
    for (let pass = 0; pass < REPEAT_MAX_PASSES; pass++) {

      let progressed = false;
      out = out.replace(REPEAT_BLOCK_RX, (whole, nStr, body) => {
        let n = parseInt(nStr, 10);
        if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) {
          progressed = true;
          return '';
        }
        if (n > REPEAT_MAX_COUNT) {
          console.warn(`[REPEAT] count ${n} clamped to ${REPEAT_MAX_COUNT}.`);
          n = REPEAT_MAX_COUNT;
        }
        progressed = true;
        const trimmed = body.trim();

        return Array(n).fill(trimmed).join('\n');
      });
      if (!progressed) break;
      if (out.length > REPEAT_MAX_BYTES) {
        console.warn('[REPEAT] expansion exceeded 1 MB cap — aborting further passes.');
        break;
      }
    }

    if (/\[\s*REPEAT\b/i.test(out) && !REPEAT_BLOCK_RX.test(out)) {
      console.warn('[REPEAT] unmatched [REPEAT n] without closing [/REPEAT] — left in place.');
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _normalizeSsmlMarkup(text) {
    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return text || '';

    if (text.indexOf('<') < 0 && text.indexOf('[[slnc') < 0) return text;
    let out = text;

    out = out.replace(
      /<\s*break\b[^>]*\btime\s*=\s*["']?(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*(ms|s)?["']?[^>]*\/?\s*>/gi,
      (_, num, unit) => {
        const n = parseFloat(num);
        if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return '';
        const secs = (unit && unit.toLowerCase() === 's') ? n : n / 1000;
        return ` \x5BPAUSE ${Math.max(1, Math.ceil(secs))}\x5D `;
      }
    );

    out = out.replace(/<\s*break\b[^>]*\/?\s*>/gi, ' \x5BPAUSE 1\x5D ');

    out = out.replace(
      /<\s*emphasis\b[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\s*\/\s*emphasis\s*>/gi,
      (_, inner) => `[[${inner.trim()}]]`
    );

    out = out.replace(/\[\[\s*slnc\s+(\d+)\s*\]\]/gi, (_, ms) => {
      const secs = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(parseInt(ms, 10) / 1000));
      return ` \x5BPAUSE ${secs}\x5D `;
    });
    return out;
  }

  async function speakScript(text, bypassAbort = false) {

    let canonical = resolveTokens(text);

    canonical = _expandRepeatBlocks(canonical);

    canonical = _normalizeSsmlMarkup(canonical);

    canonical = canonical.replace(PHASE_MARKER_STRIP_RX, '');

    canonical = canonical.replace(/\[\s*pause\b[^\]]*\]/gi, (m) => {

      if (/^\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D$/i.test(m)) return m;

      console.warn('[speakScript] dropping malformed pause marker:', JSON.stringify(m));
      return '';
    });

    canonical = canonical.replace(/\[\[([^\[\]]+?)\]\]/g, '\u0001$1\u0002');

    try {
      const ext = _extractSceneSentinels(canonical);
      canonical = ext.stripped;
      if (state.aiSceneDirectivesEnabled !== false && ext.dispatches.length) {

        _dispatchSceneSentinels(ext.dispatches);
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[scene sentinels] extraction failed:', e); }
    canonical = canonical.replace(/\[[^\]]+\]/g, m =>
      /^\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\x5D$/i.test(m) ? m : ''
    );

    canonical = canonical.replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ').replace(/  +/g, ' ').trim();

    const parts = canonical.split(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/i);
    const display = $('textDisplay');
    const shouldDuck = drone.running && state.duckingEnabled;
    let isDucked = false;

    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
      if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;
      while (state.paused && !state.abortFlag) await sleep(200);
      if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;

      if (i % 2 === 0) {

        const segment = parts[i].trim();
        if (!segment) continue;

        if (!segment.replace(/[\u0001\u0002\s.,;:!?…—–\-]/g, '').length) continue;
        const sentences = segment.split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).filter(s => s.trim());

        if (shouldDuck && !isDucked) { drone.duck(); isDucked = true; }

        const premiumActive = (typeof _isPremiumTtsActive === 'function') && _isPremiumTtsActive();
        if (premiumActive && sentences.length) {

          const firstChunk = (sentences[0].includes('\u0001') && sentences[0].includes('\u0002'))
            ? (_parseEmbeddedSegments(sentences[0]).find(s => s.text?.trim())?.text || sentences[0])
            : sentences[0];
          _premiumTtsPrefetch(firstChunk);
        }

        for (let _si = 0; _si < sentences.length; _si++) {
          const sentence = sentences[_si];
          if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;
          while (state.paused && !state.abortFlag) await sleep(200);
          if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;

          if (!sentence.replace(/[\u0001\u0002\s.,;:!?…—–\-]/g, '').length) continue;

          if (premiumActive && _si + 1 < sentences.length) {
            const next = sentences[_si + 1];
            const nextChunk = (next.includes('\u0001') && next.includes('\u0002'))
              ? (_parseEmbeddedSegments(next).find(s => s.text?.trim())?.text || next)
              : next;
            _premiumTtsPrefetch(nextChunk);
          }

          if (display) {
            display.style.opacity = 0;
            await interruptibleSleep(200, bypassAbort);
            if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;

            display.textContent = sentence.replace(/[\u0001\u0002]/g, '');
            display.style.opacity = 0.5;
          }

          if (sentence.includes('\u0001') && sentence.includes('\u0002')) {
            const segments = _parseEmbeddedSegments(sentence);
            for (const seg of segments) {
              if (!bypassAbort && state.abortFlag) break;
              if (!seg.text.trim()) continue;
              await speak(seg.text, seg.embedded ? { volMult: 0.7, pitchMult: 0.92 } : {});
            }
          } else {
            await speak(sentence);
          }

          await interruptibleSleep(120, bypassAbort);
        }

      } else {

        const seconds = parseInt(parts[i], 10) || 4;
        const tempo = state.tempoMultiplier || 1.0;
        const rateScale = 1 / Math.sqrt(Math.max(state.speechRate || 0.65, 0.4));
        const scaled = Math.max(1, Math.round(seconds * tempo * rateScale));

        if (shouldDuck && isDucked && seconds >= 5) {
          drone.unduck(); isDucked = false;
        }

        const useAdaptive = state.adaptiveBreathPacing
                         && state._mic?.status === 'active'
                         && state._mic.consecutiveSilent < MIC_FALLBACK_AFTER_SILENT
                         && seconds >= 3 && seconds <= 10;
        if (useAdaptive) {
          await waitForExhale(scaled * 1000, Math.round(scaled * 1500));
        } else {
          await interruptibleSleep(scaled * 1000, bypassAbort);
        }
      }
    }

    if (shouldDuck && isDucked) { drone.unduck(); isDucked = false; }
  }

  const _localTTS = {
    enabled: false,
    ready: false,
    loading: false,
    pipeline: null,
    synthesizer: null,
    speakerEmbeddings: null,
    speakerName: 'clb',
    audioCtx: null,
    currentSource: null,
    paused: false,
    pausedAt: 0,
    pausedBuffer: null,
    abortFlag: false,
    _genId: 0,

    CDN_TRANSFORMERS: 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@xenova/transformers@2.17.2',

    SPEAKER_BASE: 'https://huggingface.co/spaces/Matthijs/speecht5-tts-demo/resolve/main/spkemb/',
    SPEAKER_FILES: {
      clb: 'cmu_us_clb_arctic-wav-arctic_a0144.npy',
      slt: 'cmu_us_slt_arctic-wav-arctic_a0508.npy',
      bdl: 'cmu_us_bdl_arctic-wav-arctic_a0009.npy',
      rms: 'cmu_us_rms_arctic-wav-arctic_b0353.npy',
      ksp: 'cmu_us_ksp_arctic-wav-arctic_b0087.npy',
    },

    _parseNpy(buffer) {
      const view = new DataView(buffer);
      const magic = String.fromCharCode(...new Uint8Array(buffer, 0, 6));
      if (magic !== '\x93NUMPY') throw new Error('not a .npy file');
      const major = view.getUint8(6);
      let headerLen, dataOffset;
      if (major === 1) {
        headerLen = view.getUint16(8, true);
        dataOffset = 10 + headerLen;
      } else {
        headerLen = view.getUint32(8, true);
        dataOffset = 12 + headerLen;
      }
      const headerBytes = new Uint8Array(buffer, major === 1 ? 10 : 12, headerLen);
      const headerStr = String.fromCharCode(...headerBytes);

      if (!/'descr'\s*:\s*'<f4'/.test(headerStr)) {
        throw new Error('unsupported .npy dtype (expected <f4)');
      }
      return new Float32Array(buffer, dataOffset);
    },

    async init(speakerName = 'clb') {
      if (this.ready && this.speakerName === speakerName) return true;
      if (this.loading) return new Promise(r => {
        const tick = () => this.loading ? setTimeout(tick, 200) : r(this.ready);
        tick();
      });
      this.loading = true;
      this.speakerName = speakerName;
      const setStatus = (msg) => {
        const el = document.getElementById('localVoiceProgressText');
        if (el) el.textContent = msg;
      };
      const setBar = (pct) => {
        const fill = document.getElementById('localVoiceProgressFill');
        const wrap = document.getElementById('localVoiceProgress');
        if (wrap) wrap.style.display = '';
        if (fill) fill.style.width = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, pct)) + '%';
      };
      try {
        if (!this.pipeline) {
          setStatus('Loading the TTS engine…');
          setBar(5);

          const mod = await import( this.CDN_TRANSFORMERS);
          this.pipeline = mod.pipeline;

          if (mod.env) {
            mod.env.allowLocalModels = false;
            mod.env.useBrowserCache = true;
          }
          setBar(15);
        }
        if (!this.synthesizer) {
          setStatus('Downloading voice model (~80 MB, one-time)…');
          this.synthesizer = await this.pipeline('text-to-speech', 'Xenova/speecht5_tts', {
            quantized: false,
            progress_callback: (p) => {
              if (p.status === 'progress' && p.progress != null) {
                setBar(15 + p.progress * 0.7);
                setStatus(`Downloading voice model… ${Math.round(p.progress)}%`);
              }
            },
          });
          setBar(85);
        }

        setStatus('Loading speaker voice…');
        const url = this.SPEAKER_BASE + this.SPEAKER_FILES[speakerName];
        let buf;
        try {
          const res = await fetch(url);
          if (!res.ok) throw new Error('speaker fetch ' + res.status);
          buf = await res.arrayBuffer();
        } catch (fetchErr) {

          if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && typeof root.superFetch === 'function') {
            console.warn('[localTTS] direct fetch failed, trying superFetch:', fetchErr.message);
            const res2 = await root.superFetch(url);
            if (!res2 || !res2.ok) throw new Error('speaker fetch via superFetch ' + (res2?.status || 'failed'));
            buf = await res2.arrayBuffer();
          } else {
            throw fetchErr;
          }
        }
        this.speakerEmbeddings = this._parseNpy(buf);

        if (this.speakerEmbeddings.length !== 512) {
          throw new Error(`speaker vector length ${this.speakerEmbeddings.length}, expected 512`);
        }
        setBar(100);
        setStatus('Ready. The first sentence may take 1-3 seconds; later ones are faster.');
        this.ready = true;
        return true;
      } catch (e) {
        setStatus('Failed to load: ' + (e?.message || e) + '. Will fall back to system voice.');
        console.warn('[localTTS] init failed:', e);
        this.ready = false;
        return false;
      } finally {
        this.loading = false;
      }
    },

    async speak(text) {
      if (!this.ready || !text || !text.trim()) return;
      this.abortFlag = false;
      const myGen = ++this._genId;
      try {

        const SYNTH_TIMEOUT_MS = 30000;
        const out = await Promise.race([
          this.synthesizer(text, { speaker_embeddings: this.speakerEmbeddings }),
          new Promise((_, rej) => setTimeout(() => rej(new Error('localTTS synth timeout')), SYNTH_TIMEOUT_MS)),
        ]);
        if (this.abortFlag || myGen !== this._genId) return;
        const audioData = out.audio;
        const sr = out.sampling_rate || 16000;
        await this._playBuffer(audioData, sr, myGen);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[localTTS] synth failed for chunk:', e);

        throw e;
      }
    },
    async _playBuffer(audioData, sampleRate, myGen, opts = {}) {

      if (this._sharedCtx && (!drone || !drone.ctx || drone.ctx !== this.audioCtx)) {
        this.audioCtx = null;
        this._sharedCtx = false;
      }
      if (drone && drone.ctx && drone.ctx.state !== 'closed') {
        if (!this._sharedCtx && this.audioCtx) {

          try { await this.audioCtx.close(); } catch {}
        }
        this.audioCtx = drone.ctx;
        this._sharedCtx = true;
      } else if (!this.audioCtx || this.audioCtx.state === 'closed') {
        this.audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        this._sharedCtx = false;
      }

      if (myGen != null && myGen !== this._genId) return;

      const dur = audioData.length / sampleRate;
      const wordCount = Math.max(1, Math.round(dur / 0.4));
      const pulseInterval = (dur / wordCount) * 1000;
      let pulsesFired = 0;
      const pulseTimer = setInterval(() => {
        if (this.abortFlag || (myGen != null && myGen !== this._genId) || pulsesFired >= wordCount) { clearInterval(pulseTimer); return; }

        if (this.paused || (this.audioCtx && this.audioCtx.state === 'suspended')) return;
        if (state.audioReactive) state.audioReactive._voicePulseSpawnedAt = performance.now();
        pulsesFired++;
      }, pulseInterval);
      const buffer = this.audioCtx.createBuffer(1, audioData.length, sampleRate);
      buffer.copyToChannel(audioData, 0);

      const buildSource = (panValue) => {
        const source = this.audioCtx.createBufferSource();
        source.buffer = buffer;
        const gainNode = this.audioCtx.createGain();
        gainNode.gain.value = state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0;

        let lastNode = gainNode;
        if (Number.isFinite(panValue) && panValue !== 0 && this.audioCtx.createStereoPanner) {
          const panner = this.audioCtx.createStereoPanner();
          panner.pan.value = Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, panValue));
          gainNode.connect(panner);
          lastNode = panner;
        }

        if (this._sharedCtx && drone && drone.master) {
          source.connect(gainNode);
          lastNode.connect(drone.master);
        } else {
          source.connect(gainNode);
          lastNode.connect(this.audioCtx.destination);
        }
        source.playbackRate.value = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2, state.speechRate || 1));
        return { source, gainNode };
      };

      if (state._doubleInduction && opts.allowStereoPan !== false) {
        const left  = buildSource(-0.4);
        const right = buildSource(+0.4);

        right.source.playbackRate.value = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2, (state.speechRate || 1) * 0.985));
        this.currentGainNode = left.gainNode;
        this.currentSource = left.source;
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          let pendingEnds = 2;
          const finalize = () => {
            if (--pendingEnds > 0) return;
            clearInterval(pulseTimer);
            if (this.currentSource === left.source) this.currentSource = null;
            if (this.currentGainNode === left.gainNode) this.currentGainNode = null;
            resolve();
          };
          left.source.onended  = finalize;
          right.source.onended = finalize;
          left.source.start(0);
          right.source.start(0);
        });
      }

      const { source, gainNode } = buildSource(opts.pan);
      this.currentGainNode = gainNode;
      this.currentSource = source;
      return new Promise((resolve) => {
        source.onended = () => {
          clearInterval(pulseTimer);
          if (this.currentSource === source) this.currentSource = null;
          if (this.currentGainNode === gainNode) this.currentGainNode = null;
          resolve();
        };
        source.start(0);
      });
    },
    pause() {
      if (this.audioCtx && this.audioCtx.state === 'running') {
        try { this.audioCtx.suspend(); this.paused = true; } catch {}
      }
    },
    resume() {
      if (this.audioCtx && this.paused) {
        try { this.audioCtx.resume(); this.paused = false; } catch {}
      }
    },
    cancel() {
      this.abortFlag = true;

      this._genId++;
      if (this.currentSource) {
        try { this.currentSource.stop(0); } catch {}
        this.currentSource = null;
      }

      this.paused = false;
    },
  };

  const _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO = { current: null, currentUrl: null };

  const OPENAI_TTS_VOICES = [
    { value: 'alloy',   label: 'Alloy (neutral)' },
    { value: 'echo',    label: 'Echo (male, warm)' },
    { value: 'fable',   label: 'Fable (British, expressive)' },
    { value: 'onyx',    label: 'Onyx (male, deep)' },
    { value: 'nova',    label: 'Nova (female, soft)' },
    { value: 'shimmer', label: 'Shimmer (female, gentle)' },
  ];
  const OPENAI_TTS_MODELS = [
    { value: 'tts-1',    label: 'tts-1 (faster, cheaper)' },
    { value: 'tts-1-hd', label: 'tts-1-hd (higher fidelity)' },
  ];
  const ELEVENLABS_MODELS = [
    { value: 'eleven_turbo_v2_5',      label: 'Turbo v2.5 (fast, low latency)' },
    { value: 'eleven_multilingual_v2', label: 'Multilingual v2 (higher quality)' },
    { value: 'eleven_monolingual_v1',  label: 'Monolingual v1 (legacy)' },
  ];

  function _isPremiumTtsActive() {
    return (state.extTtsProvider === 'elevenlabs' || state.extTtsProvider === 'openai')
        && !!state._extTtsKey;
  }

  function _ttsPlaybackRateScale(s) {
    const r = Number.isFinite(s) ? s : 0.85;
    return Math.max(0.70, Math.min(1.45, r));
  }

  function _stopPremiumTtsAudio() {
    const a = _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.current;
    if (a) {
      try { a.pause(); a.src = ''; } catch {}
    }
    if (_PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.currentUrl) {
      try { URL.revokeObjectURL(_PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.currentUrl); } catch {}
      _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.currentUrl = null;
    }
    _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.current = null;
  }

  const _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH = new Map();
  const _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH_CAP = 12;

  function _premiumTtsCacheKey(text) {
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    const voice    = state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider?.[provider] || '';
    const model    = state.extTtsModelByProvider?.[provider]   || '';
    return `${provider}|${voice}|${model}|${String(text || '').trim()}`;
  }

  function _premiumTtsBuildRequest(text) {
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    const key      = state._extTtsKey;
    if (!key) return null;
    const trimmed = String(text || '').trim();
    if (!trimmed) return null;
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs') {
      const voiceId = state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider?.elevenlabs || '';
      if (!voiceId) return null;
      const model = state.extTtsModelByProvider?.elevenlabs || 'eleven_turbo_v2_5';
      return {
        url: `https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/${encodeURIComponent(voiceId)}?output_format=mp3_44100_128`,
        body: JSON.stringify({
          text: trimmed,
          model_id: model,
          voice_settings: { stability: 0.5, similarity_boost: 0.75, use_speaker_boost: true },
        }),
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'xi-api-key': key, 'Accept': 'audio/mpeg' },
        provider, trimmed,
      };
    }
    if (provider === 'openai') {
      const voice = state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider?.openai || 'nova';
      const model = state.extTtsModelByProvider?.openai   || 'tts-1';
      return {
        url: 'https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/speech',
        body: JSON.stringify({ model, input: trimmed, voice, response_format: 'mp3' }),
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${key}` },
        provider, trimmed,
      };
    }
    return null;
  }

  function _premiumTtsFetch(text) {
    const key = _premiumTtsCacheKey(text);
    const cached = _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.get(key);
    if (cached) return cached.promise;
    const req = _premiumTtsBuildRequest(text);
    if (!req) {
      const p = Promise.resolve({ error: new Error('not configured') });
      _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.set(key, { promise: p });
      return p;
    }
    state._ttsApiCallsThisSession = (state._ttsApiCallsThisSession || 0) + 1;
    try { logAICall(req.provider, 'premium-tts', `[${req.trimmed.length} chars]`); } catch {}
    _refreshTtsCallCount();
    const promise = (async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(req.url, { method: 'POST', headers: req.headers, body: req.body });
        if (!res.ok) {
          let detail = '';
          try { detail = await res.text(); } catch {}
          return { error: new Error(`${req.provider} HTTP ${res.status}: ${detail.slice(0, 200)}`) };
        }
        const blob = await res.blob();
        return { blob };
      } catch (e) {
        return { error: e };
      }
    })();

    if (_PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.size >= _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH_CAP) {
      const firstKey = _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.keys().next().value;
      if (firstKey) _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.delete(firstKey);
    }
    _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.set(key, { promise });
    return promise;
  }

  function _premiumTtsPrefetch(text) {
    if (!_isPremiumTtsActive()) return;
    if (state.abortFlag) return;
    try { _premiumTtsFetch(text).catch(() => {}); } catch {}
  }

  function _clearPremiumTtsPrefetch() {
    _PREMIUM_TTS_PREFETCH.clear();
  }

  async function _speakViaPremiumTts(text, opts = {}) {
    const trimmed = String(text || '').trim();
    if (!trimmed) return;

    const result = await _premiumTtsFetch(trimmed);
    if (result?.error) throw result.error;
    if (!result?.blob) throw new Error('premium tts: empty response');
    const blob = result.blob;
    _stopPremiumTtsAudio();
    const audioUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const audio = new Audio(audioUrl);
    _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.current    = audio;
    _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.currentUrl = audioUrl;
    const volMult = Number.isFinite(opts.volMult) ? opts.volMult : 1.0;
    audio.volume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0) * volMult));
    audio.playbackRate = _ttsPlaybackRateScale(state.speechRate);
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      let watcher = null;
      const cleanup = () => {
        if (watcher) { clearInterval(watcher); watcher = null; }
        if (_PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.current === audio) {
          try { URL.revokeObjectURL(audioUrl); } catch {}
          _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.current    = null;
          _PREMIUM_TTS_AUDIO.currentUrl = null;
        }
      };
      audio.onended = () => { cleanup(); resolve(); };
      audio.onerror = (e) => { cleanup(); reject(e); };

      watcher = setInterval(() => {
        if (state.abortFlag) { try { audio.pause(); } catch {} cleanup(); resolve(); return; }
        if (state.paused && !audio.paused) try { audio.pause(); } catch {}
        else if (!state.paused && audio.paused && !audio.ended) audio.play().catch(() => {});
      }, 250);
      audio.play().catch(reject);
    });
  }

  async function _refreshElevenLabsVoiceList(force = false) {
    const voiceSel = $('extTtsVoice');
    if (!voiceSel) return;
    const key = state._extTtsKey;
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (provider !== 'elevenlabs' || !key) return;
    if (!force && Array.isArray(state._elevenLabsVoices) && state._elevenLabsVoices.length) {
      _populateElevenLabsVoiceSelect(state._elevenLabsVoices);
      return;
    }
    voiceSel.innerHTML = `<option value="">loading voices…</option>`;
    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/voices', {
        headers: { 'xi-api-key': key },
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      const data = await res.json();
      const voices = (data?.voices || []).map(v => ({
        value: v.voice_id,
        label: `${v.name}${v.labels?.gender ? ' · ' + v.labels.gender : ''}${v.labels?.accent ? ' · ' + v.labels.accent : ''}`,
      }));
      state._elevenLabsVoices = voices;
      _populateElevenLabsVoiceSelect(voices);
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[elevenlabs voices] fetch failed:', e);
      voiceSel.innerHTML = `<option value="">(could not load — check API key)</option>`;
      state._elevenLabsVoices = null;
    }
  }
  function _populateElevenLabsVoiceSelect(voices) {
    const voiceSel = $('extTtsVoice');
    if (!voiceSel) return;
    const saved = state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider?.elevenlabs || '';
    voiceSel.innerHTML = voices.map(v =>
      `<option value="${escapeHtml(v.value)}"${v.value === saved ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(v.label)}</option>`
    ).join('') || '<option value="">(no voices available)</option>';
    if (!saved && voices[0]) {
      voiceSel.value = voices[0].value;
      if (!state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider) state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider = {};
      state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider.elevenlabs = voices[0].value;
      try { saveUserSettings(); } catch {}
    }
  }

  function _populateOpenAiTtsVoiceSelect() {
    const voiceSel = $('extTtsVoice');
    if (!voiceSel) return;
    const saved = state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider?.openai || 'nova';
    voiceSel.innerHTML = OPENAI_TTS_VOICES.map(v =>
      `<option value="${escapeHtml(v.value)}"${v.value === saved ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(v.label)}</option>`
    ).join('');
  }

  function _populateTtsModelSelect() {
    const modelSel = $('extTtsModel');
    const modelRow = $('extTtsModelRow');
    if (!modelSel || !modelRow) return;
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (provider === 'openai' || provider === 'elevenlabs') {
      modelRow.style.display = 'flex';
      const list  = provider === 'openai' ? OPENAI_TTS_MODELS : ELEVENLABS_MODELS;
      const saved = state.extTtsModelByProvider?.[provider] || list[0].value;
      modelSel.innerHTML = list.map(m =>
        `<option value="${escapeHtml(m.value)}"${m.value === saved ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(m.label)}</option>`
      ).join('');
    } else {
      modelRow.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }

  function _refreshTtsCallCount() {
    const el = $('extTtsCallCount');
    if (el) el.textContent = `${state._ttsApiCallsThisSession || 0} narration call${(state._ttsApiCallsThisSession || 0) === 1 ? '' : 's'} this session`;
  }

  function _refreshTtsProviderUi() {
    const row = $('extTtsKeyRow');
    if (!row) return;
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (provider === 'web-speech') {
      row.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    row.style.display = '';
    const keyInput = $('extTtsKey');
    const cachedKey = state._extTtsKeysByProvider?.[provider] || '';
    if (keyInput) {
      keyInput.value = cachedKey;
      state._extTtsKey = cachedKey || null;
    }
    _populateTtsModelSelect();
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs') {
      const voiceSel = $('extTtsVoice');
      if (state._extTtsKey) _refreshElevenLabsVoiceList(false).catch(() => {});
      else if (voiceSel) voiceSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">(enter API key first)</option>';
    } else if (provider === 'openai') {
      _populateOpenAiTtsVoiceSelect();
    }
  }

  $('extTtsProvider')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    state.extTtsProvider = e.target.value;
    _refreshTtsProviderUi();
    try { saveUserSettings(); } catch {}
  });
  $('extTtsKey')?.addEventListener('input', async e => {
    const newVal = e.target.value || null;
    state._extTtsKey = newVal;
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs' || provider === 'openai') {
      if (!state._extTtsKeysByProvider) state._extTtsKeysByProvider = { elevenlabs: null, openai: null };
      state._extTtsKeysByProvider[provider] = newVal;
    }
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs' && newVal) {
      _refreshElevenLabsVoiceList(true).catch(() => {});
    }
  });
  $('extTtsVoice')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (!state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider) state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider = { elevenlabs: '', openai: 'nova' };
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs' || provider === 'openai') {
      state.extTtsVoiceIdByProvider[provider] = e.target.value;
      try { saveUserSettings(); } catch {}
    }
  });
  $('extTtsModel')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const provider = state.extTtsProvider;
    if (!state.extTtsModelByProvider) state.extTtsModelByProvider = { elevenlabs: 'eleven_turbo_v2_5', openai: 'tts-1' };
    if (provider === 'elevenlabs' || provider === 'openai') {
      state.extTtsModelByProvider[provider] = e.target.value;
      try { saveUserSettings(); } catch {}
    }
  });
  $('extTtsClearBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state._extTtsKey = null;
    if (state._extTtsKeysByProvider) state._extTtsKeysByProvider[state.extTtsProvider] = null;
    const inp = $('extTtsKey'); if (inp) inp.value = '';
    notify.info('TTS API key cleared.');
  });
  $('extTtsRefreshVoicesBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (state.extTtsProvider === 'elevenlabs') {
      _refreshElevenLabsVoiceList(true).catch(() => notify.warn('Could not load voices.'));
    } else if (state.extTtsProvider === 'openai') {
      _populateOpenAiTtsVoiceSelect();
    }
  });
  $('extTtsTestBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!_isPremiumTtsActive()) { notify.warn('Set provider + API key first.'); return; }
    try {
      await _speakViaPremiumTts(
        'This is a quick test of the selected narrator. Settle in, breathe slowly, and notice how the voice feels in your body.',
        {}
      );
      notify.success('Voice test complete.');
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[tts test] failed:', e);
      notify.error('Voice test failed — check API key, voice selection, and console.');
    }
  });

  function speak(text, opts = {}) {
    return new Promise(resolve => {

      if (_isPremiumTtsActive()) {
        _speakViaPremiumTts(text, opts)
          .then(resolve)
          .catch((e) => {
            console.warn('[speak] premium TTS failed, falling back:', e?.message || e);

            if (!state._premiumTtsFallbackToasted) {
              state._premiumTtsFallbackToasted = true;
              try { notify.warn('Premium TTS failed — falling back to Web Speech for the rest of this session.'); } catch {}
            }

            if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) {
              _localTTS.speak(text)
                .then(resolve)
                .catch(() => _speakSystemPath(text, resolve, opts));
            } else {
              _speakSystemPath(text, resolve, opts);
            }
          });
        return;
      }

      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) {
        _localTTS.speak(text)
          .then(resolve)
          .catch((e) => {
            console.warn('[speak] local TTS failed, falling back to system:', e?.message || e);
            _speakSystemPath(text, resolve, opts);
          });
        return;
      }
      _speakSystemPath(text, resolve, opts);
    });
  }
  function _speakSystemPath(text, resolve, opts = {}) {
    if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) { setTimeout(resolve, text.length * 80); return; }

    if (speechSynthesis.speaking || speechSynthesis.pending) speechSynthesis.cancel();
    setTimeout(() => _doSpeak(text, resolve, opts), speechSynthesis.speaking ? 80 : 20);
  }
  function _doSpeak(text, resolve, opts = {}) {
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
    u.voice = state.voice || getSelectedVoice();

    const volMult   = Number.isFinite(opts.volMult)   ? opts.volMult   : 1.0;
    const pitchMult = Number.isFinite(opts.pitchMult) ? opts.pitchMult : 1.0;
    u.rate = state.speechRate;
    u.pitch = (state.voicePitch || 0.85) * pitchMult;
    u.volume = (state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0) * volMult;
    let settled = false;
    let lastBoundaryAt = Date.now();
    let boundaryEverFired = false;

    let pendingEnds = (state._doubleInduction && state._secondVoice) ? 2 : 1;
    const done = () => {
      if (settled) return;
      if (--pendingEnds > 0) return;
      settled = true;
      clearInterval(silenceWatch);
      resolve();
    };
    u.onend = done;
    u.onerror = done;

    const display = $('textDisplay');
    u.onboundary = (e) => {
      lastBoundaryAt = Date.now();
      boundaryEverFired = true;

      if (e.name === 'word') {
        state.audioReactive._voicePulseSpawnedAt = performance.now();
      }
      if (e.name === 'word' && display) {
        const before = text.slice(0, e.charIndex);
        const word = text.slice(e.charIndex, e.charIndex + e.charLength);
        const after = text.slice(e.charIndex + e.charLength);
        display.innerHTML = `<span style="opacity:0.35">${escapeHtml(before)}</span><span style="opacity:1;color:var(--text)">${escapeHtml(word)}</span><span style="opacity:0.35">${escapeHtml(after)}</span>`;
      }
    };

    speechSynthesis.speak(u);

    const pseudoStart = setTimeout(() => {
      if (boundaryEverFired || settled) return;
      const baseTime = performance.now();
      const estDurMs = Math.max(500, text.length * 60);
      const pulseInterval = 286;
      const pulseTick = () => {
        if (boundaryEverFired || settled) return;
        const elapsed = performance.now() - baseTime;
        if (elapsed >= estDurMs) return;
        state.audioReactive._voicePulseSpawnedAt = performance.now();
        setTimeout(pulseTick, pulseInterval);
      };
      pulseTick();
    }, 500);
    const _origDone = done;
    const _doneWithCleanup = () => { clearTimeout(pseudoStart); _origDone(); };
    u.onend = _doneWithCleanup;
    u.onerror = _doneWithCleanup;

    if (state._doubleInduction && state._secondVoice) {
      const u2 = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      u2.voice = state._secondVoice;
      u2.rate = state.speechRate * 0.92; u2.pitch = 0.75; u2.volume = 0.7;
      u2.onend = _doneWithCleanup;
      u2.onerror = _doneWithCleanup;
      speechSynthesis.speak(u2);
    }

    const speakStartedAt = Date.now();
    let pausedAccumMs = 0;
    let pauseEnteredAt = null;
    const flushPause = () => {
      if (state.paused) {
        if (pauseEnteredAt == null) pauseEnteredAt = Date.now();
        return true;
      }
      if (pauseEnteredAt != null) {
        pausedAccumMs += Date.now() - pauseEnteredAt;
        pauseEnteredAt = null;

        lastBoundaryAt = Date.now();
      }
      return false;
    };
    const silenceWatch = setInterval(() => {
      if (settled) { clearInterval(silenceWatch); return; }

      if (flushPause()) return;
      const silentFor = Date.now() - lastBoundaryAt;
      if (boundaryEverFired && speechSynthesis.speaking && silentFor > 8000) {

        speechSynthesis.cancel();
        done();
      }

      if (Date.now() - speakStartedAt - pausedAccumMs > 1000 && !speechSynthesis.speaking && !speechSynthesis.pending) {

        done();
      }
    }, 2000);

    const rateMultiplier = 1 / Math.max(state.speechRate || 0.65, 0.4);
    const hardCeiling = Math.max(15000, text.length * 180 * rateMultiplier);
    const ceilingCheck = () => {
      if (settled) return;
      if (flushPause()) { setTimeout(ceilingCheck, 5000); return; }
      const effectiveElapsed = Date.now() - speakStartedAt - pausedAccumMs;
      if (effectiveElapsed < hardCeiling) {
        setTimeout(ceilingCheck, Math.max(2000, hardCeiling - effectiveElapsed));
        return;
      }
      speechSynthesis.cancel(); done();
    };
    setTimeout(ceilingCheck, hardCeiling);
  }
  const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms));

  let _recorder = null, _recordedChunks = [];

  function startRecording() {
    if (!drone.ctx || !drone.master) { notify.warn('Start a session with a soundscape first.'); return; }
    try {
      const dest = drone.ctx.createMediaStreamDestination();
      drone.master.connect(dest);
      _recorder = new MediaRecorder(dest.stream, { mimeType: 'audio/webm;codecs=opus' });
      _recordedChunks = [];
      _recorder.ondataavailable = e => { if (e.data.size > 0) _recordedChunks.push(e.data); };
      _recorder.onstop = () => {
        if (_recordedChunks.length === 0) return;
        const blob = new Blob(_recordedChunks, { type: 'audio/webm' });
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        a.download = `stillness-session-${Date.now()}.webm`;
        a.click();

        setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 5000);
        notify.success('Session audio downloaded.');
        _recordedChunks = [];
      };
      _recorder.start();
      notify.info('Recording ambience...');
      const btn = $('recordBtn');
      if (btn) { btn.textContent = '⏹ stop recording'; btn.classList.add('recording'); }
    } catch(e) { notify.error('Recording not supported in this browser.'); }
  }

  function stopRecording() {
    if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'recording') {
      _recorder.stop(); _recorder = null;
      const btn = $('recordBtn');
      if (btn) { btn.textContent = '⏺ record audio'; btn.classList.remove('recording'); }
    }
  }

  function toggleRecording() {
    if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'recording') stopRecording();
    else startRecording();
  }

  async function finishSession(wasEmergency = false) {

    if (!wasEmergency && _anchorFiredThisSession) {
      try {
        const n = Number(localStorage.getItem(ANCHOR_FIRE_LOG_KEY) || '0') + 1;
        localStorage.setItem(ANCHOR_FIRE_LOG_KEY, String(n));
        _refreshAnchorTapDisplay();
      } catch {}
    }
    _anchorFiredThisSession = false;

    try { if (typeof stopAudioLayers     === 'function') stopAudioLayers();     } catch {}
    try { if (typeof stopDepthIndicator  === 'function') stopDepthIndicator();  } catch {}
    try {
      if (typeof state._asmrPrevSpeechRate !== 'undefined' && state._asmrPrevSpeechRate != null) {
        state.speechRate = state._asmrPrevSpeechRate;
        state._asmrPrevSpeechRate = null;
        state._asmrPitch = null;
        state._asmrVolume = null;
      }
    } catch {}

    clearInterval(state._timeInterval);
    clearTimeout(state._safetyTimeout);
    state.paused = false;
    stopAudioReactiveLoop();
    resetStateEngine();
    clearRuntimeRuleState();
    clearTriggerWindowState();

    stopWebcam();
    const _wcCb = $('webcamOptInThisSession'); if (_wcCb) _wcCb.checked = false;

    stopMic();
    const _mcCb = $('micOptInThisSession'); if (_mcCb) _mcCb.checked = false;
    state._mic.enabled = false;
    state.adaptiveBreathPacing = false;

    try { funscriptEngine.stop(); } catch {}

    try { _stopHeatmapPlayhead(); } catch {}

    try {
      state.liveControl = { ...LIVE_CONTROL_DEFAULTS };
      delete state._rampActiveIntensity;

      const li = $('liveCtrlIntensity'); if (li) { li.value = 1; const v = $('liveCtrlIntensityV'); if (v) v.textContent = '1.00×'; }
      const ls = $('liveCtrlSpeed');     if (ls) { ls.value = 1; const v = $('liveCtrlSpeedV');     if (v) v.textContent = '1.00×'; }
      const lr = $('liveCtrlRandom');    if (lr) { lr.value = 0; const v = $('liveCtrlRandomV');    if (v) v.textContent = '0%'; }

      _resetDynamicPacing();
    } catch {}
    try { hapticBridge.stop(); } catch {}
    try { await hapticBridge.disconnect(); } catch {}
    const _hpCb = $('hapticOptInThisSession'); if (_hpCb) _hpCb.checked = false;
    try { hapticBridge.setEnabled(false); } catch {}

    const _fsRow = $('funscriptRow'); if (_fsRow) _fsRow.style.display = 'none';

    try { sensorBridge.disconnect(); } catch {}
    const _sbCb = $('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession'); if (_sbCb) _sbCb.checked = false;
    try { sensorBridge.setEnabled(false); } catch {}

    resetPlaybackDynamics();
    state._baseSpeechRate = null;
    closeLivePanel();
    stopRecording();
    await drone.stop(); stopVisuals(); speechSynthesis.cancel();
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel();

    try {
      const _stage = $('stage');
      const _ov = _stage?.querySelector('.personal-symbol-overlay');
      if (_ov) _ov.remove();
      if (_personalSymbolBlobUrl) {
        try { URL.revokeObjectURL(_personalSymbolBlobUrl); } catch {}
        _personalSymbolBlobUrl = null;
      }
    } catch {}

    try {
      document.body.classList.remove('phase-temp-cool', 'phase-temp-warm', 'phase-temp-deep');
    } catch {}

    try { _stopPremiumTtsAudio(); } catch {}
    state._premiumTtsFallbackToasted = false;

    try { _clearPremiumTtsPrefetch(); } catch {}

    try { _resetSessionFavicon(); } catch {}

    setMediaSession(false);
    document.body.classList.remove('in-session'); document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden'); clearTimeout(_controlsTimer);
    switchScreen('post-screen');

    clearTimeout(state._intrusionTestTimer);
    if (!wasEmergency
        && state.craftedSuggestion?.trigger
        && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger !== 'ongoing state') {
      const triggerText = state.craftedSuggestion.trigger;
      state._intrusionTestTimer = setTimeout(() => {

        const stillOnPostScreen = document.getElementById('post-screen')?.classList.contains('active');
        if (!stillOnPostScreen) return;
        notify.info(`If you'd like to test "${triggerText}" — now's a natural moment. The trigger card has a "fired today" button if it works.`, 9000);
      }, 30000);
    }

    try { state._wakeLock?.release(); } catch(e) {}

    const _now = Date.now();
    let inactiveMs = (state._inactiveTotalMs || 0);
    if (state._inactiveStartedAt) inactiveMs += (_now - state._inactiveStartedAt);
    const elapsed = state._sessionStartTime ? Math.max(0, Math.round((_now - state._sessionStartTime - inactiveMs) / 1000)) : 0;
    const currentProfile = getProfile();
    const scriptMetrics = getScriptMetrics(state.fullScript || '');

    const _stableJSON = (obj) => {
      const keys = Object.keys(obj || {}).filter(k => !k.startsWith('_')).sort();
      return JSON.stringify(keys.map(k => [k, obj[k]]));
    };
    const profileHash = _hashSeed(_stableJSON(currentProfile));

    let _prevHistory;
    try { _prevHistory = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []; }
    catch { _prevHistory = []; }
    const _prevHash = _prevHistory[0]?.profileHash;

    const sessionRecord = {
      id: 'sess_' + Date.now(),
      date: Date.now(),
      guide: getPersona().name,
      method: getMethod().name,
      intention: state.intentionType,
      length: state.length,
      soundscape: state.soundscape,
      durationSec: elapsed,
      completed: !wasEmergency,
      preMood: state._preMood ?? null,
      preTension: state._preTension ?? null,
      preEnergy: state._preEnergy ?? null,

      script: state.fullScript || '',
      personaId: state.selectedPersonaId,
      methodId: state.selectedMethodId,
      intentionText: $('intentionInput')?.value || '',
      voiceName: $('voiceSelect')?.value || '',
      userAffirmations: $('userAffirmations')?.value || '',
      affirmationMode: $('affirmationMode')?.value || 'woven',
      speechRate: state.speechRate,
      voicePitch: state.voicePitch,
      voiceVolume: state.voiceVolume,
      droneVolume: state.droneVolume,
      vizOverride: state.vizOverride,
      vizSettings: { ...state.vizSettings },
      duckingEnabled: state.duckingEnabled,
      phaseOrder: getPlaybackPhaseOrder(),
      profileName: currentProfile.name || 'Practitioner',

      profileHash,
      ...(profileHash !== _prevHash ? { profileSnapshot: currentProfile } : {}),
      workBlockCount: scriptMetrics.workBlocks,
      metrics: scriptMetrics,

      sessionTags: state._sessionTags ? [...state._sessionTags].sort() : [],

      startedUnsafe: state._startedUnsafe === true,

      ...(state._sosKind ? { sosKind: state._sosKind, mode: 'sos' } : {}),

      ...(state._sessionMode && !state._sosKind ? { mode: state._sessionMode } : {}),

      susceptibilityAtSessionStart: ($('pfSusceptibility')?.value || ''),
      workflowVersion: 12,
      stepsTotal: 6,
    };

    const compactRecord = _compactHistoryRecord(sessionRecord);

    const history = _prevHistory;
    history.unshift(compactRecord);
    if (history.length > 50) history.length = 50;

    await _writeHistoryCompact(history);
    await recordAnalytics(sessionRecord, wasEmergency);

    recordSessionInMetricsHistory(sessionRecord, wasEmergency ? 'emergency' : 'completed').catch(e => console.warn('[metrics] record failed:', e));
    updateAdaptiveProfile(sessionRecord, wasEmergency);
    updateSessionMemory(state.fullScript, sessionRecord);
    renderHeatmap();
    renderSparkline();
    renderHipSparkline();
    renderSidebarStats();

    if (typeof renderSessionHistory === 'function') renderSessionHistory();
    if (typeof renderTimeline === 'function') renderTimeline();

    if (!wasEmergency) {
      try { checkPersonaUnlocks().catch(() => {}); } catch {}
    }

    applyMethodGating().catch(() => {});

    vibrateSessionMarker();

    setSleepOverlay(false);

    bgEngine.clear();

    const _programSnapshot = (!wasEmergency && state._activeProgram?.prog && state._activeProgram?.ps)
      ? {
          name: state._activeProgram.prog.name,
          icon: state._activeProgram.prog.icon || '📅',
          dayJustCompleted: (state._activeProgram.ps.currentDay || 0) + 1,
          totalDays:        state._activeProgram.prog.days,
          isFinalDay:       (state._activeProgram.ps.currentDay || 0) + 1 >= state._activeProgram.prog.days,
        }
      : null;

    if (!wasEmergency) advanceProgramDay();

    applyMethodGating();

    const mins = Math.floor(elapsed / 60), secs = elapsed % 60;
    const persona = getPersona(), method = getMethod();

    const profile = getProfile();
    const firstName = (profile.useFirstName && profile.name) ? profile.name : '';
    const sessionCount = await getSessionCount();
    const ordinalSuffix = (n) => {
      const v = n % 100;
      if (v >= 11 && v <= 13) return 'th';
      return ['th','st','nd','rd','th','th','th','th','th','th'][n % 10];
    };
    const summaryEl = $('postSummary');
    const sessionMarker = !wasEmergency && sessionCount > 0
      ? `<div class="post-row" style="opacity:0.85"><span class="post-label">milestone</span><span class="post-value">${sessionCount}${ordinalSuffix(sessionCount)} completed session</span></div>`
      : '';
    summaryEl.innerHTML = `
      <div class="post-card-title">session summary</div>
      <div class="post-row"><span class="post-label">guide</span><span class="post-value">${escapeHtml(persona.name)}</span></div>
      <div class="post-row"><span class="post-label">method</span><span class="post-value">${escapeHtml(method.name)}</span></div>
      <div class="post-row"><span class="post-label">duration</span><span class="post-value">${mins}:${String(secs).padStart(2,'0')}</span></div>
      <div class="post-row"><span class="post-label">completion</span><span class="post-value">${wasEmergency ? 'ended early' : 'completed'}</span></div>
      ${sessionMarker}
    `;

    const abBox = $('postAbRatingBox');
    if (abBox) {
      if (!wasEmergency && state._abActivePreset) {

        document.querySelectorAll('#postAbRatingButtons button').forEach(b => {
          b.disabled = false; b.style.outline = '';
        });
        const reveal = $('postAbReveal');
        if (reveal) reveal.textContent = '';
        abBox.style.display = '';
      } else {
        abBox.style.display = 'none';
      }
    }

    const triggerBox = $('postTriggerBox');
    if (state.craftedSuggestion && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger !== 'ongoing state') {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';

      let fireCount = 0;
      try {
        const fires = (await idbGet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY)) || {};
        fireCount = (fires[state.craftedSuggestion.trigger]?.firedDates?.length) || 0;
      } catch {}

      const recall = state._pendingRecallProbe;
      const showRecall = recall && recall.trigger === state.craftedSuggestion.trigger;
      const recallHtml = showRecall
        ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)"><span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em">recall check</span> · From your session ${recall.daysAgo} day${recall.daysAgo === 1 ? '' : 's'} ago — has it fired since then? If yes, tap above.</div>`
        : '';
      if (showRecall) state._pendingRecallProbe = null;
      triggerBox.innerHTML = `
        <div class="post-trigger-title">your trigger</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text">${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.trigger)}</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-sub">→ ${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse || '')}</div>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="triggerFiredBtn" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:0.74rem;padding:6px 12px" data-trigger="${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.trigger)}">${fireCount > 0 ? `✓ fired today (${fireCount} total)` : '✓ trigger fired today'}</button>
        <div class="sublabel" style="font-size:0.62rem;margin-top:4px;color:var(--text-faint)">Tap when you notice the trigger working in real life — feedback shapes future sessions.</div>${recallHtml}`;
    } else if (state.craftedSuggestion && state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse) {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';
      triggerBox.innerHTML = `
        <div class="post-trigger-title">suggestion installed</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text">${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse)}</div>`;
    } else {
      triggerBox.style.display = 'none';
      triggerBox.innerHTML = '';
    }

    if (method.category === 'demonstration' && !wasEmergency) {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';
      triggerBox.innerHTML += `<div style="margin-top:8px; padding-top:8px; border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border)">
        <div class="post-trigger-title" style="color:var(--accent-purple)">test now</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text" style="font-size:0.82rem">Try the ${escapeHtml(method.name)} effect now.</div>
      </div>`;
    }

    const reflectionBox = $('postReflectionBox');
    if (reflectionBox) {
