    }

    const renderHeader = (label, color) => {
      const h = document.createElement('div');
      h.style.cssText = 'grid-column:1/-1;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:' + color + ';padding:14px 4px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin-bottom:4px';
      h.textContent = label;
      grid.appendChild(h);
    };
    const renderCard = (pack) => {
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'preset-card';
      card.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      const gatedTag = pack.adultGated ? '<span style="float:right;font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--neon-magenta);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.04em">🔞 21+</span>' : '';
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="preset-icon" style="font-size:1.6rem">${pack.icon}</div>
        <div class="preset-name">${escapeHtml(pack.name)}${gatedTag}</div>
        <div class="preset-desc" style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.4;min-height:32px">${escapeHtml(pack.description)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:4px;font-style:italic">${escapeHtml(pack.category)}</div>
      `;
      card.addEventListener('click', () => applyContentPack(pack.id));
      grid.appendChild(card);
    };

    if (general.length) {

      if (adult.length) renderHeader('General · all ages', 'var(--text-faint)');
      for (const pack of general) renderCard(pack);
    }
    if (adult.length) {
      renderHeader('🔞 Mature · 21+', 'var(--neon-magenta, #d896d8)');
      for (const pack of adult) renderCard(pack);
    }
  }

  const PROGRAMS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.PROGRAMS) || [];

  async function getActiveProgramState() {
    return (await idbGet('stillness_program_v1')) || null;
  }
  async function saveActiveProgramState(ps) {
    await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', ps);
  }

  async function renderPrograms() {
    const grid = $('programGrid');
    const activePanel = $('programActivePanel');
    if (!grid) return;

    const active = await getActiveProgramState();

    if (active && activePanel) {
      const prog = PROGRAMS.find(p => p.id === active.programId);
      if (prog) {
        const pct = Math.round((active.currentDay / prog.days) * 100);
        const todayFocus = prog.arc ? prog.arc[Math.min(active.currentDay, prog.arc.length - 1)] : `Day ${active.currentDay + 1}`;
        activePanel.innerHTML = `
          <div class="detail-panel" style="margin-bottom:12px">
            <div class="detail-title">${prog.icon} ${escapeHtml(prog.name)} — Day ${active.currentDay + 1} of ${prog.days}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin:6px 0">Today's focus: <strong>${escapeHtml(todayFocus)}</strong></div>
            <div class="session-progress-wrap" style="position:relative;height:4px;margin:8px 0"><div class="session-progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px">
              <button class="btn secondary" id="programContinueBtn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.82rem">continue program →</button>
              <button class="btn secondary" id="programQuitBtn" style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#8a5a58">quit program</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        $('programContinueBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => startProgramDay(prog, active));
        $('programQuitBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
          if (await confirmAsync(`Quit "${prog.name}"? Your progress (Day ${active.currentDay + 1}) will be lost.`)) {
            await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', null);
            renderPrograms();
          }
        });
      }
    } else if (activePanel) {
      activePanel.innerHTML = '';
    }

    grid.innerHTML = '';

    const adultEligible = (typeof _userIsAdultEligible === 'function') ? _userIsAdultEligible() : false;
    const generalPrograms = PROGRAMS.filter(p => !p.adultGated);
    const adultPrograms   = adultEligible ? PROGRAMS.filter(p => p.adultGated) : [];

    const renderProgramCard = (prog) => {
      const isActive = active?.programId === prog.id;
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = `preset-card is-program intent-${prog.intention || 'trance'}` + (isActive ? ' selected' : '');
      const adultBadge = prog.adultGated
        ? `<div style="position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.04em;color:var(--neon-magenta, #d896d8);background:rgba(216,150,216,0.08);padding:1px 5px;border:1px solid rgba(216,150,216,0.3);font-weight:600">🔞 21+</div>`
        : '';
      card.style.position = 'relative';
      card.innerHTML = `${adultBadge}<div class="preset-icon">${prog.icon}</div><div class="preset-name">${escapeHtml(prog.name)}</div><div class="preset-desc">${prog.days} days · ${escapeHtml(prog.desc)}</div><div class="preset-intent-label">${escapeHtml(prog.intention || 'trance')}</div>`;
      card.addEventListener('click', async () => {

        if (prog.adultGated && !_userIsAdultEligible()) {
          notify.warn?.(`Program "${prog.name}" requires age 21+ and the mature-content opt-in.`);
          return;
        }
        if (isActive) { startProgramDay(prog, active); return; }
        if (active) { if (!await confirmAsync('Starting a new program will replace your current one. Continue?')) return; }
        const newState = { programId: prog.id, currentDay: 0, startedAt: Date.now(), anchors: [], completedDays: [] };
        await saveActiveProgramState(newState);
        renderPrograms();
        notify.success(`Started "${prog.name}" — Day 1 of ${prog.days}.`);
      });
      grid.appendChild(card);
    };
    const renderProgramHeader = (label, color) => {
      const h = document.createElement('div');
      h.style.cssText = 'grid-column:1/-1;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:' + color + ';padding:14px 4px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin-bottom:4px';
      h.textContent = label;
      grid.appendChild(h);
    };

    if (generalPrograms.length) {

      if (adultPrograms.length) renderProgramHeader('General · all ages', 'var(--text-faint)');
      generalPrograms.forEach(renderProgramCard);
    }
    if (adultPrograms.length) {
      renderProgramHeader('🔞 Mature · 21+', 'var(--neon-magenta, #d896d8)');
      adultPrograms.forEach(renderProgramCard);
    }
  }

  function startProgramDay(prog, ps) {
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.PROGRAMS);

    state.selectedPersonaId = prog.persona; state.selectedMethodId = prog.method;
    state.intentionType = prog.intention; state.length = prog.length;
    state.soundscape = prog.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = prog.soundscape !== 'none';
    if (prog.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = prog.vizOverride; const ve = $('vizSelect'); if (ve) ve.value = prog.vizOverride; }

    const dayNum = ps.currentDay + 1;
    const overrides = prog.dayOverrides?.[dayNum];
    if (overrides) {
      if (overrides.soundscape) { state.soundscape = overrides.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = overrides.soundscape !== 'none'; }
      if (overrides.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = overrides.vizOverride; const ve = $('vizSelect'); if (ve) ve.value = overrides.vizOverride; }
      if (overrides.method) state.selectedMethodId = overrides.method;
      if (overrides.persona) state.selectedPersonaId = overrides.persona;
    }

    if (Array.isArray(overrides?.phaseExtras)) {
      state._phaseExtras = [...overrides.phaseExtras];
    } else if (Array.isArray(prog.phaseExtras)) {
      state._phaseExtras = [...prog.phaseExtras];
    } else {
      state._phaseExtras = [];
    }
    $('intentionType').value = prog.intention;
    $('lengthSelect').value = prog.length;
    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = state.soundscape;

    const dayFocus = prog.arc ? prog.arc[Math.min(ps.currentDay, (prog.arc?.length || 1) - 1)] : `Day ${dayNum} of structured ${prog.name} program`;
    const anchors = Array.isArray(ps.anchors) ? ps.anchors : [];
    const anchorContext = anchors.length ? `Prior anchors: ${anchors.join(', ')}. ` : '';
    $('intentionInput').value = `${anchorContext}Day ${dayNum} of ${prog.days}: ${dayFocus}`;

    state._activeProgram = { prog, ps };
    renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
    updateIntentionHint(); updateStepUI();
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: false, 5: false, 6: false };
    goToStep(4);
    notify.success(`Day ${dayNum}: ${dayFocus}`);

    (async () => {
      try {
        const entry = await getCachedPreGen(prog.id, ps.currentDay);
        if (!entry) return;

        const cur = $('scriptText');
        if (cur && cur.value && cur.value.trim().length > 50 && cur.value !== state.fullScript) return;
        state.fullScript = entry.script;
        state.parsedScript = parseScript(entry.script);
        state.generatedPhaseOrder = (state.parsedScript.ordered || []).slice();
        if (cur) cur.value = entry.script;
        showScript();
        updateStepUI();

        _showPreGenBadge(prog.id, ps.currentDay, entry.generatedAt);
        markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.PRE_GEN);
        console.log(`[pre-gen] ✓ loaded cached script for ${prog.id} day ${ps.currentDay}`);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[pre-gen] cache load failed:', e);
      }
    })();
  }

  function _showPreGenBadge(programId, dayIndex, generatedAt) {
    const scriptText = $('scriptText');
    if (!scriptText) return;

    const prior = document.getElementById('preGenBadge'); if (prior) prior.remove();
    const ageMs = Date.now() - generatedAt;
    const ageHr = Math.floor(ageMs / 3600000);
    const ageStr = ageHr < 1 ? 'just now' : ageHr < 2 ? '1 hour ago' : `${ageHr} hours ago`;
    const badge = document.createElement('div');
    badge.id = 'preGenBadge';
    badge.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(0,212,230,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,230,0.3);padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px';
    badge.innerHTML = `
      <span style="color:var(--neon-cyan);flex-shrink:0">✨</span>
      <span style="flex:1">Pre-generated for you ${ageStr} — ready to play, or <button type="button" id="preGenRegenLink" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--neon-cyan);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;padding:0;font:inherit">generate fresh</button>.</span>
      <button type="button" id="preGenDismiss" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-faint);cursor:pointer;padding:0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1" title="dismiss">×</button>
    `;
    scriptText.parentNode.insertBefore(badge, scriptText);
    document.getElementById('preGenRegenLink')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      await clearPreGenCache(programId, dayIndex);
      badge.remove();

      $('generateScriptBtn')?.click();
    });
    document.getElementById('preGenDismiss')?.addEventListener('click', () => badge.remove());
  }

  async function advanceProgramDay() {
    if (!state._activeProgram) return;
    const { prog, ps } = state._activeProgram;
    ps.currentDay = Math.min(ps.currentDay + 1, prog.days);
    if (!Array.isArray(ps.completedDays)) ps.completedDays = [];
    ps.completedDays.push(Date.now());
    await saveActiveProgramState(ps);
    if (ps.currentDay >= prog.days) {
      notify.success(`🎉 Congratulations! You completed "${prog.name}".`);
      await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', null);
      state._activeProgram = null;
      return;
    }
    state._activeProgram = null;

    if (state.preGenEnabled !== false) {

      try {
        const existing = await getCachedPreGen(prog.id, ps.currentDay);
        if (!existing) {
          state._preGenOffer = { progId: prog.id, dayIndex: ps.currentDay, prog: { ...prog }, ps: { ...ps }, offeredAt: Date.now() };
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[pre-gen] offer setup failed:', e); }
    }
  }

  const PROGRAM_PREGEN_KEY = 'stillness_program_pregen_v1';
  const PREGEN_MAX_AGE_MS  = 26 * 3600 * 1000;
  const PREGEN_DELAY_MS    = 10_000;

  function _pregenCacheKey(programId, dayIndex) {
    return `${programId}:${dayIndex}`;
  }

  async function _pregenLoadCache() {
    try { return (await idbGet(PROGRAM_PREGEN_KEY)) || {}; } catch { return {}; }
  }

  async function _pregenSaveCache(cache) {

    const keys = Object.keys(cache);
    if (keys.length > 3) {
      const sorted = keys
        .map(k => ({ k, ts: cache[k]?.generatedAt || 0 }))
        .sort((a, b) => b.ts - a.ts);
      const keep = new Set(sorted.slice(0, 3).map(x => x.k));
      Object.keys(cache).forEach(k => { if (!keep.has(k)) delete cache[k]; });
    }
    try { await idbSet(PROGRAM_PREGEN_KEY, cache); } catch (e) { console.warn('[pre-gen] cache save failed:', e); }
  }

  async function getCachedPreGen(programId, dayIndex) {
    const cache = await _pregenLoadCache();
    const entry = cache[_pregenCacheKey(programId, dayIndex)];
    if (!entry) return null;
    if (Date.now() - (entry.generatedAt || 0) > PREGEN_MAX_AGE_MS) return null;
    if (!entry.script || entry.script.length < 100) return null;
    return entry;
  }

  async function clearPreGenCache(programId, dayIndex) {
    const cache = await _pregenLoadCache();
    const k = _pregenCacheKey(programId, dayIndex);
    if (cache[k]) {
      delete cache[k];
      await _pregenSaveCache(cache);
    }
  }

  async function schedulePreGenForProgramDay(prog, ps) {

    if (state._preGenInProgress || state._preGenScheduled) {
      state._preGenCanceled = true;

      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200));
    }
    state._preGenCanceled = false;
    state._preGenScheduled = true;

    const existing = await getCachedPreGen(prog.id, ps.currentDay);
    if (existing) {
      state._preGenScheduled = false;
      console.log(`[pre-gen] cache hit for ${prog.id} day ${ps.currentDay}; skipping`);
      return;
    }

    try {
      const slowNet = ['slow-2g', '2g'].includes(navigator.connection?.effectiveType);
      if (slowNet) {
        state._preGenScheduled = false;
        console.log('[pre-gen] skipped: slow network');
        return;
      }
    } catch {  }
    try {

      if (typeof navigator.getBattery === 'function') {
        const battery = await navigator.getBattery();
        if (battery && typeof battery.level === 'number' && battery.level < 0.2 && !battery.charging) {
          state._preGenScheduled = false;
          console.log(`[pre-gen] skipped: low battery (${Math.round(battery.level * 100)}%, not charging)`);
          return;
        }
      }
    } catch {  }

    setTimeout(() => {
      state._preGenScheduled = false;

      if (state._preGenCanceled) return;
      if (state._sessionStartTime) return;
      if (_aiInProgress) {

        scheduleRetry(prog, ps, 1);
        return;
      }
      runPreGenForProgramDay(prog, ps).catch(e => console.warn('[pre-gen] run failed:', e));
    }, PREGEN_DELAY_MS);
  }

  function scheduleRetry(prog, ps, attempt) {
    if (attempt > 3) {
      console.log('[pre-gen] gave up after 3 retries');
      return;
    }
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (state._preGenCanceled) return;
      if (state._sessionStartTime) return;
      if (_aiInProgress) { scheduleRetry(prog, ps, attempt + 1); return; }
      runPreGenForProgramDay(prog, ps).catch(e => console.warn('[pre-gen] retry failed:', e));
    }, 30_000);
  }

  async function runPreGenForProgramDay(prog, ps) {
    if (state._preGenInProgress) return;
    state._preGenInProgress = true;

    const snapshot = {
      selectedPersonaId: state.selectedPersonaId,
      selectedMethodId:  state.selectedMethodId,
      intentionType:     state.intentionType,
      length:            state.length,
      soundscape:        state.soundscape,
      droneEnabled:      state.droneEnabled,
      vizOverride:       state.vizOverride,
      fullScript:        state.fullScript,
      _activeProgram:    state._activeProgram,
      intentionInputVal: $('intentionInput')?.value || '',
      lengthSelectVal:   $('lengthSelect')?.value || '',
      ssSelectVal:       $('soundscapeSelect')?.value || '',
      vizSelectVal:      $('vizSelect')?.value || '',
    };

    try {

      state.selectedPersonaId = prog.persona;
      state.selectedMethodId  = prog.method;
      state.intentionType     = prog.intention;
      state.length            = prog.length;
      state.soundscape        = prog.soundscape;
      state.droneEnabled      = prog.soundscape !== 'none';
      if (prog.vizOverride) state.vizOverride = prog.vizOverride;
      const dayNum = ps.currentDay + 1;
      const overrides = prog.dayOverrides?.[dayNum];
      if (overrides) {
        if (overrides.soundscape) { state.soundscape = overrides.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = overrides.soundscape !== 'none'; }
        if (overrides.vizOverride) state.vizOverride = overrides.vizOverride;
        if (overrides.method) state.selectedMethodId = overrides.method;
        if (overrides.persona) state.selectedPersonaId = overrides.persona;
      }

      const intInp = $('intentionInput');
      const dayFocus = prog.arc ? prog.arc[Math.min(ps.currentDay, (prog.arc?.length || 1) - 1)] : `Day ${dayNum} of structured ${prog.name} program`;
      const anchors = Array.isArray(ps.anchors) ? ps.anchors : [];
      const anchorContext = anchors.length ? `Prior anchors: ${anchors.join(', ')}. ` : '';
      const intentionText = `${anchorContext}Day ${dayNum} of ${prog.days}: ${dayFocus}`;
      if (intInp) intInp.value = intentionText;
      const lenEl = $('lengthSelect'); if (lenEl) lenEl.value = state.length;
      const ssEl = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssEl) ssEl.value = state.soundscape;
      const intTypeEl = $('intentionType'); if (intTypeEl) intTypeEl.value = state.intentionType;

      state._preGenMode = true;
      state._preGenScript = '';

      console.log(`[pre-gen] starting for ${prog.id} day ${ps.currentDay}…`);
      await generateFullScript();

      const generated = state._preGenScript || '';
      if (generated && generated.trim().length > 100 && !state._preGenCanceled) {
        const cache = await _pregenLoadCache();
        cache[_pregenCacheKey(prog.id, ps.currentDay)] = {
          script: generated,
          generatedAt: Date.now(),
          programId: prog.id,
          dayIndex: ps.currentDay,
          dayFocus,
        };
        await _pregenSaveCache(cache);
        console.log(`[pre-gen] ✓ cached script for ${prog.id} day ${ps.currentDay} (${generated.length} chars)`);

        state._preGenJustCompleted = { ok: true, programName: prog.name, dayIndex: ps.currentDay, totalDays: prog.days };
      } else if (state._preGenCanceled) {
        console.log('[pre-gen] cancelled mid-flight');
      } else {
        console.warn('[pre-gen] no usable output');
        state._preGenJustCompleted = { ok: false, programName: prog.name };
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[pre-gen] generation threw:', e);
      state._preGenJustCompleted = { ok: false, programName: prog.name, error: e?.message };
    } finally {
      state._preGenMode = false;
      state._preGenScript = '';

      Object.assign(state, snapshot);
      delete state.intentionInputVal;
      delete state.lengthSelectVal;
      delete state.ssSelectVal;
      delete state.vizSelectVal;
      const intInp = $('intentionInput'); if (intInp) intInp.value = snapshot.intentionInputVal;
      const lenEl = $('lengthSelect'); if (lenEl) lenEl.value = snapshot.lengthSelectVal;
      const ssEl = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssEl) ssEl.value = snapshot.ssSelectVal;
      const vizEl = $('vizSelect'); if (vizEl) vizEl.value = snapshot.vizSelectVal;
      state._preGenInProgress = false;

      const result = state._preGenJustCompleted;
      delete state._preGenJustCompleted;
      if (result && !state._preGenCanceled) {
        if (result.ok) {
          notify.success(`✨ Tomorrow's session is ready — ${result.programName}, Day ${result.dayIndex + 1} of ${result.totalDays}.`, 7000);
        } else {
          notify.warn(`Couldn't pre-generate tomorrow's ${result.programName} session. You can generate when you start the day.`, 7000);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  function cancelActivePreGen(reason) {
    if (state._preGenInProgress || state._preGenScheduled) {
      state._preGenCanceled = true;
      console.log(`[pre-gen] cancel requested: ${reason || 'unspecified'}`);
    }
  }

  function setMediaSession(playing) {
    if (!('mediaSession' in navigator)) return;
    if (playing === false) {

      try {
        navigator.mediaSession.metadata = null;
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('stop', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = 'none';
      } catch {}
      return;
    }
    const persona = getPersona(), method = getMethod();
    navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({
      title: method.name + ' — ' + (state.length),
      artist: persona.name,
      album: 'Stillness Generator',
    });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', () => { if (state.paused) togglePause(); });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', () => { if (!state.paused) togglePause(); });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('stop', () => emergencyEnd());

    try { navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = state.paused ? 'paused' : 'playing'; } catch {}
  }

  async function renderHeatmap() {
    const wrap = $('heatmapWrap');
    if (!wrap) return;
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (history.length === 0) { wrap.innerHTML = ''; return; }

    const dayCounts = {};
    history.forEach(s => {
      const d = new Date(s.date); d.setHours(0,0,0,0);
      const key = d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
      dayCounts[key] = (dayCounts[key] || 0) + 1;
    });

    const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
    const dayMs = 86400000;

    const startDay = new Date(today.getTime() - 15 * 7 * dayMs);
    startDay.setDate(startDay.getDate() - ((startDay.getDay() + 6) % 7));

    let html = '<div class="heatmap">';
    let d = new Date(startDay);
    while (d <= today) {
      html += '<div class="heatmap-col">';
      for (let row = 0; row < 7 && d <= today; row++) {
        const key = d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
        const count = dayCounts[key] || 0;
        const level = count === 0 ? 0 : count === 1 ? 1 : count === 2 ? 2 : count <= 4 ? 3 : 4;
        const title = `${key}: ${count} session${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        html += `<div class="heatmap-cell" data-count="${level}" title="${title}"></div>`;
        d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
      }
      html += '</div>';
    }
    html += '</div>';
    wrap.innerHTML = html;
  }

  const TOUR_KEY = 'stillness_tour_v2';
  const TOUR_STEPS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.TOUR_STEPS) || [];

  function shouldShowTour() { try { return !localStorage.getItem(TOUR_KEY); } catch { return false; } }
  function markTourSeen() { try { localStorage.setItem(TOUR_KEY, '1'); } catch {} }

  function startTour() {
    let step = 0;
    const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.className = 'tour-overlay';
    const card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'tour-card';
    document.body.appendChild(overlay); document.body.appendChild(card);

    function render() {
      const s = TOUR_STEPS[step];
      const isLast = step === TOUR_STEPS.length - 1;
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div style="font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:8px">${s.icon}</div>
        <h3>${s.title}</h3>
        <p>${s.body}</p>
        <div class="tour-dots">${TOUR_STEPS.map((_,i) => `<div class="tour-dot${i===step?' active':''}"></div>`).join('')}</div>
        <div class="tour-actions">
          <button class="tour-skip" id="tourSkip">${isLast ? '' : 'skip tour'}</button>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
            ${step > 0 ? '<button class="tour-next" id="tourBack" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-dim)">← back</button>' : ''}
            <button class="tour-next" id="tourNext">${isLast ? 'done ✓' : 'next →'}</button>
          </div>
        </div>`;
      $('tourSkip')?.addEventListener('click', dismiss);
      $('tourBack')?.addEventListener('click', () => { step--; render(); });
      $('tourNext')?.addEventListener('click', () => { if (isLast) dismiss(); else { step++; render(); } });
    }

    function dismiss() {
      markTourSeen(); overlay.remove(); card.remove();
      document.removeEventListener('keydown', kh);
    }
    const kh = e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') dismiss(); if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' && step < TOUR_STEPS.length-1) { step++; render(); } if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' && step > 0) { step--; render(); } };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', kh);
    render();
  }

  function _hashStringToSeed(str) {
    const s = String(str || '');
    const out = [];
    let basis = 2166136261 >>> 0;
    for (let round = 0; round < 6; round++) {
      let h = basis;
      for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
        h ^= s.charCodeAt(i);
        h = Math.imul(h, 16777619);
      }

      h ^= round * 2654435761;
      h = Math.imul(h ^ (h >>> 13), 16777619);
      out.push(h >>> 0);
      basis = h >>> 0;
    }
    return out;
  }

  const _AVATAR_PALETTES = [
    ['#1a2530', '#00d4e6', '#5fa8d3', '#c9a855', '#3d5a6d'],
    ['#241a2e', '#b88aff', '#5fa8d3', '#ffd166', '#7a4ec9'],
    ['#2c1810', '#d4a574', '#8b5a3c', '#c9a855', '#5a3a26'],
    ['#0f2920', '#5cb87a', '#88d8b0', '#c9a855', '#2d5d44'],
    ['#2a1a1a', '#e07d5b', '#d4a574', '#ffd166', '#a04f3a'],
    ['#1a1a2e', '#ff6b9d', '#5fa8d3', '#b88aff', '#fb8500'],
    ['#0d1f2d', '#00d4e6', '#88d8b0', '#5fa8d3', '#264653'],
    ['#1f0f1f', '#ffd166', '#d4a574', '#e07d5b', '#9d4e3a'],
    ['#101820', '#a8dadc', '#457b9d', '#e63946', '#1d3557'],
    ['#2d2d2d', '#f5deb3', '#d4a574', '#8b7355', '#5d4e37'],
    ['#1a2e1a', '#88d8b0', '#a8dadc', '#5cb87a', '#2d5d44'],
    ['#0a1929', '#fb8500', '#ffd166', '#5fa8d3', '#023e8a'],
  ];

  function _pick(arr, h) { return arr[h % arr.length]; }

  function _frand(h) { return (h % 100000) / 100000; }

  function _avatarMosaic(hash, palette, size) {
    const cell = size / 5;
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    let cells = '';

    let bits = (BigInt(hash[2]) << 32n) | BigInt(hash[3]);
    for (let y = 0; y < 5; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < 3; x++) {
        const filled = (bits & 1n) === 1n;
        bits >>= 1n;
        const colorIdx = Number(bits & 3n);
        bits >>= 2n;
        if (filled) {
          const c = fg[colorIdx % fg.length];

          cells += `<rect x="${x * cell}" y="${y * cell}" width="${cell}" height="${cell}" fill="${c}"/>`;

          if (x < 2) {
            cells += `<rect x="${(4 - x) * cell}" y="${y * cell}" width="${cell}" height="${cell}" fill="${c}"/>`;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    return cells;
  }

  function _avatarRings(hash, palette, size) {
    const cx = size / 2, cy = size / 2;
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    const ringCount = 4 + (hash[2] % 4);
    let out = '';
    for (let i = 0; i < ringCount; i++) {
      const r = ((i + 1) / (ringCount + 1)) * (size / 2) * 0.95;
      const sw = 2 + ((hash[3] >> i) & 0x7);
      const c = fg[(hash[4] + i) % fg.length];
      out += `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="${sw}" opacity="${0.55 + (i * 0.08) % 0.4}"/>`;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _avatarBeams(hash, palette, size) {
    const cx = size / 2, cy = size / 2;
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    const beamCount = 8 + (hash[2] % 9);
    const r = size * 0.48;
    let out = '';
    for (let i = 0; i < beamCount; i++) {
      const angle = (i / beamCount) * Math.PI * 2 + _frand(hash[3]) * 0.5;
      const x = cx + Math.cos(angle) * r;
      const y = cy + Math.sin(angle) * r;
      const c = fg[(hash[4] + i) % fg.length];
      const sw = 1 + ((hash[5] >> (i % 16)) & 3);
      out += `<line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${x.toFixed(2)}" y2="${y.toFixed(2)}" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>`;
    }

    out += `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${size * 0.08}" fill="${fg[0]}"/>`;
    return out;
  }

  function _avatarHexes(hash, palette, size) {
    const cx = size / 2, cy = size / 2;
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    let out = '';
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const r = size * (0.42 - i * 0.1);
      const rot = (hash[2 + i] % 60) * (Math.PI / 180);
      const pts = [];
      for (let k = 0; k < 6; k++) {
        const a = rot + (k / 6) * Math.PI * 2;
        pts.push(`${(cx + Math.cos(a) * r).toFixed(2)},${(cy + Math.sin(a) * r).toFixed(2)}`);
      }
      const c = fg[(hash[5] + i) % fg.length];
      out += `<polygon points="${pts.join(' ')}" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="${2 + i}" opacity="${0.85 - i * 0.15}"/>`;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _avatarWaves(hash, palette, size) {
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    const bands = 3 + (hash[2] % 3);
    let out = '';
    for (let b = 0; b < bands; b++) {
      const yOffset = (b / bands) * size + size * 0.1;
      const amp = size * 0.06 * (1 + (hash[3] >> b & 3));
      const phase = _frand(hash[4 + b % 2]) * Math.PI * 2;
      const freq = 1 + (hash[5] % 3);
      let path = `M 0 ${yOffset.toFixed(2)} `;
      const steps = 24;
      for (let s = 1; s <= steps; s++) {
        const x = (s / steps) * size;
        const y = yOffset + Math.sin(phase + (s / steps) * freq * Math.PI * 2) * amp;
        path += `L ${x.toFixed(2)} ${y.toFixed(2)} `;
      }
      const c = fg[(hash[5] + b) % fg.length];
      out += `<path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="${2 + b}" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="${0.7 + b * 0.08}"/>`;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _avatarBlob(hash, palette, size) {
    const cx = size / 2, cy = size / 2;
    const fg = palette.slice(1);
    let out = '';
    const dotCount = 16 + (hash[2] % 12);

    let r = hash[3] >>> 0;
    const next = () => { r = Math.imul(r, 1664525) + 1013904223 >>> 0; return r / 4294967296; };
    for (let i = 0; i < dotCount; i++) {
      const angle = next() * Math.PI * 2;
      const dist = next() * size * 0.42;
      const x = cx + Math.cos(angle) * dist;
      const y = cy + Math.sin(angle) * dist;
      const dotR = 1.5 + next() * 4;
      const c = fg[Math.floor(next() * fg.length)];
      out += `<circle cx="${x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${y.toFixed(1)}" r="${dotR.toFixed(1)}" fill="${c}" opacity="${(0.6 + next() * 0.4).toFixed(2)}"/>`;
    }
    return out;
  }

  const _AVATAR_GENERATORS = [
    _avatarMosaic, _avatarRings, _avatarBeams,
    _avatarHexes,  _avatarWaves, _avatarBlob,
  ];

  function generateAvatarSvg(seed, size = 64) {
    const hash = _hashStringToSeed(seed || '?');
    const palette = _pick(_AVATAR_PALETTES, hash[0]);
    const generator = _pick(_AVATAR_GENERATORS, hash[1]);
    const inner = generator(hash, palette, size);
    return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 ${size} ${size}" width="${size}" height="${size}" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" role="img" aria-label="user avatar"><rect width="${size}" height="${size}" fill="${palette[0]}"/>${inner}</svg>`;
  }

  function generateAvatarDataUri(seed, size = 64) {
    const svg = generateAvatarSvg(seed, size);

    try {
      return 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,' + btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(svg)));
    } catch {
      return 'data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg);
    }
  }

  const PERDB_API_KEY = 'pk_live_9h76b8v8jpl';
  const PERDB_ENDPOINT = 'https://perdb.koyeb.app/api';
  const CLOUD_USER_KEY = 'stillness_cloud_user_v1';
  const PRESENCE_HEARTBEAT_MS = 30000;
  const PRESENCE_WINDOW_MS = 90000;
  const PRESENCE_POLL_MS = 60000;

  const cloudDB = (() => {
    const cache = new Map();
    const TTL = 60_000;
    function _headers(extra) {
      const h = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': PERDB_API_KEY };
      if (extra) Object.assign(h, extra);
      return h;
    }
    async function add(collection, data) {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${PERDB_ENDPOINT}?collection=${encodeURIComponent(collection)}`, {
          method: 'POST', headers: _headers(), body: JSON.stringify(data),
        });
        const j = await res.json();
        if (j && j._id && !j.id) j.id = j._id;
        if (j && j.data && j.data._id && !j.data.id) j.data.id = j.data._id;
        return j;
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[cloudDB.add]', e.message); return null; }
    }
    async function get(collection, limit = 50, useCache = true) {
      const key = `${collection}:${limit}`;
      if (useCache) {
        const c = cache.get(key);
        if (c && (Date.now() - c.t) < TTL) return c.data;
      }
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${PERDB_ENDPOINT}?collection=${encodeURIComponent(collection)}&limit=${limit}`, {
          method: 'GET', headers: _headers(),
        });
        let j = await res.json();
        if (j && j.error) return [];
        if (Array.isArray(j)) j = j.map(item => ({ ...item, id: item.id || item._id }));
        else if (j && Array.isArray(j.data)) j = j.data.map(item => ({ ...item, id: item.id || item._id }));
        else j = [];
        cache.set(key, { data: j, t: Date.now() });
        return j;
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[cloudDB.get]', e.message); return []; }
    }
    async function update(collection, id, data) {
      if (!id) return null;
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${PERDB_ENDPOINT}?collection=${encodeURIComponent(collection)}&id=${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, {
          method: 'PUT', headers: _headers(), body: JSON.stringify(data),
        });
        return await res.json();
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[cloudDB.update]', e.message); return null; }
    }
    async function del(collection, id) {
      if (!id) return null;
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${PERDB_ENDPOINT}?collection=${encodeURIComponent(collection)}&id=${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, {
          method: 'DELETE', headers: _headers(),
        });
        return await res.json();
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[cloudDB.delete]', e.message); return null; }
    }
    function clearCache(collection) {
      if (!collection) { cache.clear(); return; }
      for (const k of cache.keys()) if (k.startsWith(collection + ':')) cache.delete(k);
    }
    return { add, get, update, delete: del, clearCache };
  })();

  async function _hashPassword(password, saltHex) {
    if (!password || typeof password !== 'string') throw new Error('password required');
    if (!crypto?.subtle) throw new Error('SubtleCrypto not available');
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    const salt = saltHex
      ? Uint8Array.from(saltHex.match(/.{2}/g).map(b => parseInt(b, 16)))
      : crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(16));
    const keyMaterial = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
      'raw', enc.encode(password), { name: 'PBKDF2' }, false, ['deriveBits']
    );
    const bits = await crypto.subtle.deriveBits(
      { name: 'PBKDF2', salt, iterations: 100_000, hash: 'SHA-256' },
      keyMaterial, 256
    );
    const hashHex = Array.from(new Uint8Array(bits)).map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
    const saltOutHex = Array.from(salt).map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
    return { hash: hashHex, salt: saltOutHex };
  }

  state.cloudUser = null;
  state._presenceTimer = null;
  state._presencePollTimer = null;
  state._presenceCount = 0;

  function _loadCloudUser() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(CLOUD_USER_KEY);
      if (!raw) return null;
      const u = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!u || !u.id || !u.username) return null;
      return u;
    } catch { return null; }
  }
  function _setCloudUser(user) {
    state.cloudUser = user;
    try { localStorage.setItem(CLOUD_USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(user)); } catch {}
    renderCloudUserSlug();
    _startPresenceBeacon();

    if (typeof renderSavedScripts === 'function') renderSavedScripts();

    _refreshCommunityNavVisibility();
  }
  function _clearCloudUser() {
    state.cloudUser = null;
    try { localStorage.removeItem(CLOUD_USER_KEY); } catch {}
    renderCloudUserSlug();
    _stopPresenceBeacon();
    if (typeof renderSavedScripts === 'function') renderSavedScripts();
    _refreshCommunityNavVisibility();
  }

  function _refreshCommunityNavVisibility() {
    const signedIn = !!state.cloudUser;
    const nav = $('communityNav');
    if (nav) nav.style.display = signedIn ? '' : 'none';

    document.body.classList.toggle('cloud-signed-in', signedIn);
    document.body.classList.toggle('cloud-signed-out', !signedIn);
  }

  const ONBOARDING_QUIZ_DONE_KEY = 'hne_onboarding_quiz_done_v1';
  const ONBOARDING_QUIZ_HINT_KEY = 'hne_onboarding_quiz_hint_v1';

  const ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS) || [];

  const _ONBOARDING_SPACE_IMPLIES = {
    'bedroom':           { posture: 'lying-supine',   coPresence: 'alone' },
    'quiet-room':        { posture: 'seated-reclined', coPresence: 'alone' },
    'shared-space':      { posture: 'seated-upright', coPresence: 'shared' },
    'public-headphones': { posture: 'seated-upright', coPresence: 'public' },
    'outdoors':          { posture: 'walking',        coPresence: 'public' },
  };

  function _shouldShowOnboardingQuiz() {
    try {
      if (localStorage.getItem(ONBOARDING_QUIZ_DONE_KEY) === '1') return false;

      const name = $('pfName')?.value?.trim();
      const exp  = $('pfExperience')?.value;
      if (name || (exp && exp !== 'beginner')) return false;
    } catch {}
    return true;
  }

  function _refreshOnboardingQuizVisibility() {
    const btn = $('onboardingQuizBtn');
    if (!btn) return;
    const show = _shouldShowOnboardingQuiz();
    btn.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
    document.body.classList.toggle('onboarding-quiz-done', !show);
  }

  let _onboardingModalEl = null;
  function _ensureOnboardingModal() {
    if (_onboardingModalEl) return _onboardingModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'onboardingQuizModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:560px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Personalize HNE</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="oqCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div class="oq-intro">
          A quick read on what you're here for. Nothing is sent anywhere — it's just used locally to shape the AI scripts and the Director's recommendations. You can change any answer later in your profile.
        </div>
        <div id="oqQuestions"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:24px">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="oqSkipBtn" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:10px 18px">skip for now</button>
          <button class="btn primary" id="oqSaveBtn" disabled>save &amp; continue</button>
        </div>
        <div class="oq-progress" id="oqProgress">0 of ${ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length} answered</div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _onboardingModalEl = wrap;

    const host = wrap.querySelector('#oqQuestions');
    const answers = {};
    ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS.forEach((q, qi) => {
      const block = document.createElement('div');
      block.className = 'oq-question';
      block.dataset.qid = q.id;
      const opts = q.options.map(o =>
        `<button type="button" class="oq-option" data-qid="${q.id}" data-value="${escapeHtml(String(o.value))}">${escapeHtml(o.label)}</button>`
      ).join('');
      block.innerHTML = `
        <div class="oq-question-text">${qi + 1}. ${escapeHtml(q.question)}</div>
        <div class="oq-options">${opts}</div>
      `;
      host.appendChild(block);
    });

    host.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
      const opt = ev.target.closest('.oq-option');
      if (!opt) return;
      const qid = opt.dataset.qid;
      const val = opt.dataset.value;

      host.querySelectorAll(`.oq-option[data-qid="${qid}"]`).forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
      opt.classList.add('selected');
      answers[qid] = val;
      const answered = Object.keys(answers).length;
      const total    = ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS.length;
      $('oqProgress').textContent = `${answered} of ${total} answered`;
      $('oqSaveBtn').disabled = answered < total;
    });

    $('oqCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === wrap) wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    $('oqSkipBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    $('oqSaveBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      applyOnboardingAnswers(answers);
      try { localStorage.setItem(ONBOARDING_QUIZ_DONE_KEY, '1'); } catch {}
      _refreshOnboardingQuizVisibility();
      wrap.classList.remove('visible');

      try {
        const summary = `Onboarding quiz completed — ${Object.keys(answers || {}).length} answers applied`;
        commitChangeLogEntry(
          'onboardingQuiz',
          'structural',
          { added: [summary], removed: [] },
          { trigger: 'onboarding-quiz' }
        );
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[onboarding change log]', e); }
      if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') notify.success('Profile personalized — settings applied.');
    });

    return wrap;
  }

  function applyOnboardingAnswers(answers) {

    const setSelect = (id, value) => {
      const el = $(id);
      if (!el || value == null) return;

      const opt = [...el.options].find(o => o.value === String(value));
      if (opt) {
        el.value = String(value);
        el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
      }
    };
    for (const q of ONBOARDING_QUIZ_QUESTIONS) {
      const v = answers[q.id];
      if (v == null) continue;
      if (q.target === '_intent') {

        try { localStorage.setItem(ONBOARDING_QUIZ_HINT_KEY, String(v)); } catch {}
      } else {
        setSelect(q.target, v);
      }
    }

    const space = answers.q_space;
    if (space && _ONBOARDING_SPACE_IMPLIES[space]) {
      const imp = _ONBOARDING_SPACE_IMPLIES[space];
      setSelect('pfPosture',    imp.posture);
      setSelect('pfCoPresence', imp.coPresence);
    }

    if (typeof saveProfile === 'function') saveProfile();
  }

  function openOnboardingQuiz() {
    const modal = _ensureOnboardingModal();
    modal.classList.add('visible');
  }

  function _buildSmartAssistPrompt(userCommand) {

    const personaList = (typeof BUILTIN_PERSONAS !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(BUILTIN_PERSONAS))
      ? BUILTIN_PERSONAS.map(p => `${p.id}:${p.tagline?.slice(0,40) || p.name}`).join(' | ')
      : '(unavailable)';
    const methodList = (typeof METHODS !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(METHODS))
      ? METHODS.map(m => `${m.id}:${m.tagline?.slice(0,40) || m.name}`).join(' | ')
      : '(unavailable)';
    const intentions = 'emotional | trigger | behavior | release | perception | anchor | trance | performance | focus | creativity | pain | sleep | energy | convincer | novelty | time | amnesia | identity | surrender | conditioning';
    const lengths    = 'micro (1-2 min) | quick (3-5 min) | short (8-12 min) | medium (15-25 min) | long (30-45 min) | extended (50-70 min) | marathon (75-120 min)';
    const sounds     = 'none | rain | ocean | underwater | forest | cave | fire | bowls | drone | brown | white | heartbeat | train | city | temple';
    const presetIds  = (typeof PRESETS !== 'undefined' && Array.isArray(PRESETS))
      ? PRESETS.map(p => p.id).join(', ')
      : '(unavailable)';

    return [
      'You are SmartAssist, the session configurator inside the Hypnosis Narration Engine app.',
      'The user will describe what kind of hypnosis or meditation session they want, in their own words.',
      'Your job is to translate that into a structured JSON config that fills the wizard fields.',
      '',
      'Available options:',
      '- persona (id:tagline): ' + personaList,
      '- method  (id:tagline): ' + methodList,
      '- intention: ' + intentions,
      '- length:    ' + lengths,
      '- soundscape: ' + sounds,
      '- preset (optional shortcut, mutually exclusive with the others if used): ' + presetIds,
      '',
      'Rules:',
      '1. Output ONLY a valid JSON object. No prose, no markdown, no code fences.',
      '2. Include ONLY fields the user clearly indicated. Omit fields you have to guess at — leaving a field absent means "use the user\'s current setting".',
      '3. If the user\'s description maps cleanly onto one of the named presets, you may set "preset" to that id. The preset will pre-fill persona/method/length/soundscape automatically; do not also set those fields when you set preset.',
      '4. "intentionText" should be a single concise sentence (≤120 chars) restating the user\'s goal in their own voice. Always include it when an intention is set.',
      '5. Use the IDs exactly as listed — case-sensitive, no synonyms.',
      '6. Be smart about hints: "before sleep" → intention sleep; "racing mind" → release/anxiety direction; "20 minutes" → length medium; "ericksonian" → persona/method matching that style.',
      '',
      'Optional fields in your JSON output:',
      '  preset: <preset-id>',
      '  persona: <persona-id>',
      '  method: <method-id>',
      '  intention: <intention-id>',
      '  intentionText: <≤120 char restatement of the goal>',
      '  length: <length-id>',
      '  soundscape: <soundscape-id>',
      '',
      'Example output:',
      '{"persona":"therapist","method":"progressive","intention":"sleep","intentionText":"drift off after a stressful work day","length":"long","soundscape":"ocean"}',
      '',
      'User command: ' + JSON.stringify(String(userCommand || '').slice(0, 400)),
      '',
      'Respond with ONLY the JSON object, starting with {.',
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function _applySmartAssistConfig(cfg) {
    const changes = [];
    if (!cfg || typeof cfg !== 'object') return changes;

    if (cfg.preset && typeof PRESETS !== 'undefined') {
      const preset = PRESETS.find(p => p.id === cfg.preset);
      if (preset) {
        try {

          document.querySelector(`#presetGrid .preset-card[data-preset-id="${preset.id}"]`)?.click();
          changes.push(`Applied preset: <strong>${escapeHtml(preset.name)}</strong>`);

        } catch (e) { console.warn('[smartassist preset]', e); }
      }
    }

    if (cfg.persona && typeof BUILTIN_PERSONAS !== 'undefined' && BUILTIN_PERSONAS.find(p => p.id === cfg.persona)) {
      state.selectedPersonaId = cfg.persona;
      try { renderPersonaGrid?.(); renderPersonaDetail?.(); } catch {}
      changes.push(`Persona: <strong>${escapeHtml(cfg.persona)}</strong>`);
    }
    if (cfg.method && typeof METHODS !== 'undefined' && METHODS.find(m => m.id === cfg.method)) {
      state.selectedMethodId = cfg.method;
      try { renderMethodGrid?.(); renderMethodDetail?.(); } catch {}
      changes.push(`Method: <strong>${escapeHtml(cfg.method)}</strong>`);
    }
    if (cfg.intention && $('intentionType')) {
      const opt = [...$('intentionType').options].find(o => o.value === cfg.intention);
      if (opt) {
        $('intentionType').value = cfg.intention;
        $('intentionType').dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        changes.push(`Intention type: <strong>${escapeHtml(cfg.intention)}</strong>`);
      }
    }
    if (cfg.intentionText && $('intentionInput')) {
      $('intentionInput').value = String(cfg.intentionText).slice(0, 240);
      $('intentionInput').dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      changes.push(`Intention: <em>"${escapeHtml(String(cfg.intentionText).slice(0, 80))}${cfg.intentionText.length > 80 ? '…' : ''}"</em>`);
    }
    if (cfg.length && $('lengthSelect')) {
      const opt = [...$('lengthSelect').options].find(o => o.value === cfg.length);
      if (opt) {
        state.length = cfg.length;
        $('lengthSelect').value = cfg.length;
        $('lengthSelect').dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        changes.push(`Length: <strong>${escapeHtml(cfg.length)}</strong>`);
      }
    }
    if (cfg.soundscape && $('soundscapeSelect')) {
      const opt = [...$('soundscapeSelect').options].find(o => o.value === cfg.soundscape);
      if (opt) {
        state.soundscape = cfg.soundscape;
        state.droneEnabled = cfg.soundscape !== 'none';
        $('soundscapeSelect').value = cfg.soundscape;
        $('soundscapeSelect').dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        changes.push(`Soundscape: <strong>${escapeHtml(cfg.soundscape)}</strong>`);
      }
    }
    return changes;
  }

  async function _runSmartAssist() {
    const input  = $('smartAssistInput');
    const status = $('smartAssistStatus');
    const result = $('smartAssistResult');
    const btn    = $('smartAssistRunBtn');
    if (!input || !btn) return;
    const userCommand = (input.value || '').trim();
    if (!userCommand) {
      if (status) status.textContent = 'Type a description first.';
      return;
    }
    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || !root.aiTextPlugin) {
      if (status) status.textContent = 'AI provider not available.';
      return;
    }
    btn.disabled = true;
    if (status) status.textContent = '✨ thinking…';
    if (result) result.style.display = 'none';

    const instruction = _buildSmartAssistPrompt(userCommand);
    try { logAICall('perchance', 'smart-assist', instruction); } catch {}

    try {
      const data = await root.aiTextPlugin({
        instruction,
        startWith: '{',

        stopSequences: ['\n\n\n', '\n\n}\n', '```', '\n\n[[', '\n[['],
        hideStartWith: true,
      });
      if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') throw new Error('AI returned an error.');
      let text = (data.generatedText || '').trim();
      if (!text) throw new Error('AI returned empty output.');

      if (!text.startsWith('{')) text = '{' + text;
      const lb = text.lastIndexOf('}');
      if (lb > -1) text = text.substring(0, lb + 1);
      const cfg = JSON.parse(text);
      const changes = _applySmartAssistConfig(cfg);
      if (status) status.textContent = '';
      if (result) {
        if (!changes.length) {
          result.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--text-faint)">No fields were updated. Try being more specific (mention length, mood, or style).</span>';
        } else {
          result.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:4px">Applied:</div>' +
                             changes.map(c => `<div>· ${c}</div>`).join('');
        }
        result.style.display = '';
      }
      try { notify.success('Session configured — review and tap "begin" when ready.'); } catch {}
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[smartassist] failed:', e);
      if (status) status.textContent = '';
      if (result) {
        result.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#d46a6a">Couldn\'t configure that. Try rephrasing — e.g. <em>"20-minute sleep session, ericksonian voice"</em>.</span>';
        result.style.display = '';
      }
      try { notify.warn('SmartAssist failed: ' + (e?.message || 'unknown error')); } catch {}
    } finally {
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  }

  $('smartAssistRunBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { _runSmartAssist(); });
  $('smartAssistInput')?.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key !== 'Enter') return;
    if (e.shiftKey) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    _runSmartAssist();
  });

  $('onboardingQuizBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openOnboardingQuiz);

  const HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS) || [];

  function _hipBand(score) {
    if (score == null || score === '') return null;
    const n = Number(score);
    if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return null;
    if (n <= 3) return {
      key: 'low', label: 'low', color: 'var(--text-faint)',
      track: 'focus & settle',
      desc: 'You\'ll get the most from this app as an attention-training and relaxation tool — the physiological benefits (slower breath, lower heart rate, calmer attention) are real regardless of "trance depth." Methods will lean toward structured attention exercises (Betty Erickson 3-2-1, breath-478, body-awareness, hand-heaviness) and away from rapid inductions that depend on quick imaginative compliance.',
    };
    if (n <= 6) return {
      key: 'medium', label: 'medium', color: 'var(--neon-amber)',
      track: 'standard',
      desc: 'Most methods will work for you. The Director can experiment freely.',
    };
    return {
      key: 'high', label: 'high', color: 'var(--neon-cyan)',
      track: 'standard',
      desc: 'Strong responsiveness — direct and rapid inductions (eye-roll, Dave Elman) are good fits.',
    };
  }

  function _refreshSusceptibilityDisplay() {
    const wrap = $('pfSusceptibilityDisplay');
    const scoreEl = $('pfSusceptibilityScore');
    const bandEl  = $('pfSusceptibilityBand');
    const btn = $('hipBriefBtn');
    if (!wrap || !scoreEl || !bandEl || !btn) return;
    const raw = $('pfSusceptibility')?.value;
    const band = _hipBand(raw);
    if (!band) {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = 'take the brief';
      _refreshDepthSliderLabel();
      return;
    }
    wrap.style.display = '';
    scoreEl.textContent = `${raw}/10`;
    scoreEl.style.color = band.color;
    bandEl.textContent  = `(${band.label} susceptibility · ${band.track} track)`;
    btn.textContent = 'retake the brief';
    _refreshDepthSliderLabel();
  }

  function _refreshDepthSliderLabel() {
    const labelEl = $('depthSliderLabel');
    const lowEnd  = $('depthSliderEndLow');
    const highEnd = $('depthSliderEndHigh');
    if (!labelEl || !lowEnd || !highEnd) return;
    const raw = $('pfSusceptibility')?.value;
    const sn  = Number(raw);
    const isLow = Number.isFinite(sn) && sn <= 3;
    if (isLow) {
      labelEl.textContent = 'how settled did you feel?';
      lowEnd.textContent  = 'tense';
      highEnd.textContent = 'fully settled 🌊';
    } else {
      labelEl.textContent = 'how deep did it feel?';
      lowEnd.textContent  = 'surface';
      highEnd.textContent = 'very deep 🌊';
    }
  }

  async function _renderHipTrajectory(host) {
    if (!host) return;
    host.style.display = 'none';
    host.innerHTML = '';
    let history = [];
    try { history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || []; } catch { return; }
    if (!history.length) return;

    const sorted = [...history].sort((a, b) => (a.date || 0) - (b.date || 0));
    const points = [];
    for (const r of sorted) {
      const raw = r.susceptibilityAtSessionStart;
      if (raw === '' || raw == null) continue;
      const n = Number(raw);
      if (!Number.isFinite(n)) continue;
      if (points.length && points[points.length - 1].score === n) {
        points[points.length - 1].lastDate = r.date;
        continue;
      }
      points.push({ date: r.date, lastDate: r.date, score: n });
    }
    if (points.length < 2) {

      const current = $('pfSusceptibility')?.value;
      if (!current && points.length === 0) return;
      const onlyScore = points.length ? points[0].score : Number(current);
      if (!Number.isFinite(onlyScore)) return;
      const band = _hipBand(onlyScore);
      host.style.display = '';
      host.innerHTML = `
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:6px">your trajectory</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim);padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg-deep);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-amber)">
          Current score: <strong style="color:${band?.color || 'var(--neon-amber)'}">${onlyScore}/10</strong> · ${band ? escapeHtml(band.label) : '—'}.
          Take the brief again after a few weeks of practice — the score is known to shift with use.
        </div>
      `;
      return;
    }

    const w = 280, h = 56, pad = 6;
    const xStep = points.length > 1 ? (w - pad * 2) / (points.length - 1) : 0;
    const yFor = (score) => h - pad - ((score / 10) * (h - pad * 2));
    const path = points.map((p, i) => `${i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L'} ${pad + i * xStep} ${yFor(p.score)}`).join(' ');
    const dots = points.map((p, i) =>
      `<circle cx="${pad + i * xStep}" cy="${yFor(p.score)}" r="3" fill="${_hipBand(p.score)?.color || 'var(--neon-amber)'}"/>`
    ).join('');
    const first = points[0], last = points[points.length - 1];
    const delta = last.score - first.score;
    const deltaTxt = delta > 0 ? `+${delta}` : String(delta);
    const deltaColor = delta > 0 ? 'var(--accent-green,#5cb87a)'
                     : delta < 0 ? '#d46a6a'
                     : 'var(--text-faint)';
    const formatDate = (ts) => new Date(ts).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
    host.style.display = '';
    host.innerHTML = `
      <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:6px">your trajectory · ${points.length} score${points.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} over time</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg-deep);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-cyan)">
        <svg width="${w}" height="${h}" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" style="flex:0 0 auto">
          <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="var(--neon-cyan)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
          ${dots}
        </svg>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5">
          <div>${formatDate(first.date)}: <strong>${first.score}/10</strong></div>
          <div>${formatDate(last.lastDate)}: <strong style="color:${_hipBand(last.score)?.color || 'inherit'}">${last.score}/10</strong></div>
          <div style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint)">change: <strong style="color:${deltaColor}">${escapeHtml(deltaTxt)}</strong> over ${points.length - 1} re-test${points.length === 2 ? '' : 's'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  let _hipModalEl = null;
  function _ensureHipModal() {
    if (_hipModalEl) return _hipModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'hipBriefModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:600px">
        <div id="hipIntro">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Hypnotic Susceptibility Brief</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="hipCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
          </div>
          <div class="oq-intro">
            About 3 minutes. Four short self-administered tests inspired by the Stanford HIP. The result is a 0–10 score that helps the Director match induction styles to your responsiveness — low scores get permissive techniques, high scores can use rapid/direct methods.
            <br><br>
            <strong>Important:</strong> there are no good or bad scores here. Susceptibility varies across the population and changes over time. Even very low scores benefit from practice.
            <br><br>
            <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.7rem">Find a quiet spot. Read each prompt carefully. Take your time. You'll need to close your eyes for some tests.</span>
          </div>
          <div id="hipTrajectory" style="margin-top:14px;display:none"></div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="hipSkipBtn" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:10px 18px">close</button>
            <button class="btn primary" id="hipBeginBtn">begin</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="hipQuestion" style="display:none">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.0rem" id="hipQuestionTitle">—</h2>
            <span class="oq-progress" id="hipQuestionProgress" style="margin-top:0">—</span>
          </div>
          <div id="hipQuestionInstructions" style="font-size:0.84rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.55;padding:12px 14px;background:rgba(0,212,230,0.04);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-cyan);margin-bottom:14px"></div>
          <div id="hipQuestionOptions" class="oq-options" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:6px"></div>
          <div id="hipQuestionHint" style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:10px;line-height:1.5;font-style:italic"></div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="hipBackBtn" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:10px 18px">← back</button>
            <button class="btn primary" id="hipNextBtn" disabled>next →</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="hipResult" style="display:none">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Your Score</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="hipResultCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align:center;padding:24px 12px">
            <div style="font-size:3.6rem;color:var(--neon-cyan);font-weight:300" id="hipScoreDisplay">—</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.66rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:4px">out of 10</div>
            <div style="font-size:1.0rem;color:var(--text);margin-top:14px;font-weight:500" id="hipBandLabel">—</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55;margin:14px auto 0;max-width:440px" id="hipBandDesc">—</div>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-actions">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="hipRetakeBtn" style="flex:0 0 auto;padding:10px 18px">retake</button>
            <button class="btn primary" id="hipSaveBtn">save &amp; close</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _hipModalEl = wrap;
    return wrap;
  }

  function openHipBrief() {
    const modal = _ensureHipModal();

    modal.querySelector('#hipIntro').style.display = '';
    modal.querySelector('#hipQuestion').style.display = 'none';
    modal.querySelector('#hipResult').style.display = 'none';

    _renderHipTrajectory(modal.querySelector('#hipTrajectory')).catch(() => {});
    modal.classList.add('visible');

    const answers = {};
    let questionIndex = 0;
    const total = HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS.length;

    const showQuestion = (i) => {
      questionIndex = i;
      const q = HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS[i];
      modal.querySelector('#hipIntro').style.display = 'none';
      modal.querySelector('#hipResult').style.display = 'none';
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestion').style.display = '';
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionTitle').textContent = q.title;
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionProgress').textContent = `${i + 1} of ${total}`;
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionInstructions').textContent = q.instructions;
      const optsHost = modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionOptions');
      optsHost.innerHTML = q.options.map(o =>
        `<button type="button" class="oq-option" data-value="${o.value}" style="text-align:left;padding:10px 14px">${escapeHtml(o.label)}</button>`
      ).join('');
      const selected = answers[q.id];
      if (selected != null) {
        const sel = optsHost.querySelector(`.oq-option[data-value="${selected}"]`);
        if (sel) sel.classList.add('selected');
      }
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionHint').textContent = q.hint || '';
      modal.querySelector('#hipNextBtn').disabled = (selected == null);
      modal.querySelector('#hipNextBtn').textContent = (i === total - 1) ? 'finish →' : 'next →';
      modal.querySelector('#hipBackBtn').disabled = (i === 0);
    };

    const computeScore = () => {
      let raw = 0;
      for (const q of HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS) {
        raw += Number(answers[q.id]) || 0;
      }

      return Math.max(0, Math.min(10, raw));
    };

    const showResult = () => {
      const score = computeScore();
      const band  = _hipBand(score);
      modal.querySelector('#hipQuestion').style.display = 'none';
      modal.querySelector('#hipResult').style.display = '';
      modal.querySelector('#hipScoreDisplay').textContent = score;
      modal.querySelector('#hipScoreDisplay').style.color = band?.color || 'var(--neon-cyan)';
      modal.querySelector('#hipBandLabel').textContent = band ? `${band.label} susceptibility` : '—';
      modal.querySelector('#hipBandDesc').textContent  = band?.desc || '';

      modal.querySelector('#hipResult').dataset.score = score;
    };

    const intro = modal.querySelector('#hipIntro');
    const result = modal.querySelector('#hipResult');
    const close = () => modal.classList.remove('visible');
    intro.querySelector('#hipBeginBtn').onclick = () => showQuestion(0);
    intro.querySelector('#hipSkipBtn').onclick  = close;
    modal.querySelector('#hipCloseBtn').onclick = close;
    result.querySelector('#hipResultCloseBtn').onclick = close;
    modal.querySelector('#hipQuestionOptions').onclick = (ev) => {
      const opt = ev.target.closest?.('.oq-option');
      if (!opt) return;
      const q = HIP_BRIEF_QUESTIONS[questionIndex];
      modal.querySelectorAll('#hipQuestionOptions .oq-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
      opt.classList.add('selected');
      answers[q.id] = Number(opt.dataset.value);
      modal.querySelector('#hipNextBtn').disabled = false;
    };
    modal.querySelector('#hipBackBtn').onclick = () => {
      if (questionIndex > 0) showQuestion(questionIndex - 1);
    };
    modal.querySelector('#hipNextBtn').onclick = () => {
      if (questionIndex < total - 1) showQuestion(questionIndex + 1);
      else showResult();
    };
    result.querySelector('#hipRetakeBtn').onclick = () => {

      for (const k in answers) delete answers[k];
      showQuestion(0);
    };
    result.querySelector('#hipSaveBtn').onclick = () => {
      const score = result.dataset.score;
      const inp = $('pfSusceptibility');
      const prevRaw = inp?._lastSavedScore;
      if (inp) {
        inp.value = String(score);
        inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        inp._lastSavedScore = String(score);
      }
      _refreshSusceptibilityDisplay();
      if (typeof saveProfile === 'function') saveProfile();

      try {
        const history = (state._historyCacheForNudge || []);

        localStorage.removeItem('hne.hipRetestNudgeBaseline');
      } catch {}

      try {
        const band = _hipBand(score);
        const summary = prevRaw && prevRaw !== String(score)
          ? `HIP brief: ${prevRaw} → ${score}/10 (${band?.label || 'unknown'})`
          : `HIP brief: ${score}/10 (${band?.label || 'unknown'})`;
        commitChangeLogEntry(
          'pfSusceptibility',
          'structural',
          { added: [summary], removed: [] },
          { trigger: 'hip-brief' }
        );
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[hip change log]', e); }
      close();
      if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
        const band = _hipBand(score);
        notify.success(band ? `Susceptibility recorded: ${score}/10 — ${band.label}.` : 'Saved.');
      }
    };
  }

  $('hipBriefBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openHipBrief);

  _refreshSusceptibilityDisplay();

  _refreshDepthSliderLabel();

  const CSTP_DONE_KEY  = 'hne.cstpDoneAtV1';
  const CSTP_RUNS_KEY  = 'hne.cstpRunsV1';

  const CSTP_MODULES = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.CSTP_MODULES) || [];

  let _cstpModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCstpModal() {
    if (_cstpModalEl) return _cstpModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'cstpModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:640px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Skill-training onboarding</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="cstpCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div id="cstpProgressDots" class="cstp-dots" style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px"></div>
        <div id="cstpScreen" class="cstp-screen" style="font-size:0.82rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px;display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:space-between">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="cstpBackBtn" style="padding:8px 16px;font-size:0.74rem">back</button>
          <button class="btn primary" id="cstpNextBtn" style="padding:8px 18px;font-size:0.74rem">next</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _cstpModalEl = wrap;

    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === wrap) wrap.classList.remove('visible'); });
    wrap.querySelector('#cstpCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));

    wrap.querySelector('#cstpNextBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_cstpScreenIdx === CSTP_MODULES.length - 1) {
        _cstpFinish();
      } else {
        _cstpScreenIdx++;
        _renderCstpScreen();
      }
    });
    wrap.querySelector('#cstpBackBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_cstpScreenIdx > 0) { _cstpScreenIdx--; _renderCstpScreen(); }
    });

    return wrap;
  }

  let _cstpScreenIdx = 0;
  const _cstpMythAck   = new Set();
  const _cstpRatings   = {};

  function _renderCstpScreen() {
    const screen = document.getElementById('cstpScreen');
    const dots   = document.getElementById('cstpProgressDots');
    const back   = document.getElementById('cstpBackBtn');
    const next   = document.getElementById('cstpNextBtn');
    if (!screen) return;

    dots.innerHTML = CSTP_MODULES.map((_, i) =>
      `<span style="flex:1;height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:${i <= _cstpScreenIdx ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'var(--glass-border)'};transition:background 0.2s"></span>`
    ).join('');

    const m = CSTP_MODULES[_cstpScreenIdx];
    screen.innerHTML = `<h3 style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text);margin:0 0 12px">${escapeHtml(m.title)}</h3>${m.body}`;

    if (m.id === 'expectancy') {
      const host = document.getElementById('cstpMyths');
      if (host) {
        host.innerHTML = m.myths.map(my =>
          `<div class="cstp-myth-row" data-mid="${my.id}" style="margin:8px 0;padding:10px;background:var(--bg-soft);border-left:2px solid ${_cstpMythAck.has(my.id) ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'var(--glass-border)'};cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.2s">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px"><strong>Myth:</strong> ${escapeHtml(my.myth)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5">${escapeHtml(my.reframe)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:${_cstpMythAck.has(my.id) ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'var(--text-faint)'};margin-top:6px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em">${_cstpMythAck.has(my.id) ? '✓ acknowledged' : 'tap to acknowledge'}</div>
          </div>`
        ).join('');

        host.addEventListener('click', e => {
          const row = e.target.closest('.cstp-myth-row');
          if (!row) return;
          const mid = row.dataset.mid;
          if (_cstpMythAck.has(mid)) _cstpMythAck.delete(mid); else _cstpMythAck.add(mid);
          _renderCstpScreen();
        });
      }
    }

    if (m.id === 'practice') {
      const host = document.getElementById('cstpPractice');
      if (host) {
        host.innerHTML = m.items.map(it =>
          `<div class="cstp-practice-row" data-pid="${it.id}" style="margin:14px 0;padding:12px;background:var(--bg-soft);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-amber)">
            <div style="font-size:0.84rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:600">${escapeHtml(it.title)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:8px">${escapeHtml(it.instructions)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:6px">how did it land?</div>
            <div class="cstp-rating-row" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">
              ${it.ratings.map((r, ri) =>
                `<button type="button" class="cstp-rating-btn" data-pid="${it.id}" data-rval="${ri}"
                  style="padding:7px 10px;font-size:0.72rem;text-align:left;background:${_cstpRatings[it.id] === ri ? 'rgba(0,212,230,0.15)' : 'var(--glass)'};border:1px solid ${_cstpRatings[it.id] === ri ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'var(--glass-border)'};color:var(--text-dim);cursor:pointer">${ri} — ${escapeHtml(r)}</button>`
              ).join('')}
            </div>
          </div>`
        ).join('');
        host.querySelectorAll('.cstp-rating-btn').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            _cstpRatings[btn.dataset.pid] = Number(btn.dataset.rval);
            _renderCstpScreen();
          });
        });
      }
    }

    back.style.visibility = _cstpScreenIdx === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible';
    if (_cstpScreenIdx === CSTP_MODULES.length - 1) {
      const allRated = CSTP_MODULES[3].items.every(it => _cstpRatings[it.id] != null);
      next.textContent = 'finish';
      next.disabled = !allRated;
      next.style.opacity = allRated ? '1' : '0.5';
    } else {
      next.textContent = 'next';
      next.disabled = false;
      next.style.opacity = '1';
    }
  }

  function _cstpFinish() {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(CSTP_DONE_KEY, new Date().toISOString());
      const runs = Number(localStorage.getItem(CSTP_RUNS_KEY) || '0') + 1;
      localStorage.setItem(CSTP_RUNS_KEY, String(runs));
    } catch {}
    _cstpRefreshStatus();

    const r = CSTP_MODULES[3].items.map(it => _cstpRatings[it.id] || 0);
    const avg = r.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / r.length;
    const hipScore = Number($('pfSusceptibility')?.value);
    const isLowHip = Number.isFinite(hipScore) && hipScore <= 3;

    _cstpModalEl?.classList.remove('visible');

    const msg = isLowHip
      ? `Training complete. Practice average: ${avg.toFixed(1)}/3. About half of low-scoring users move up a band after this kind of training — would you like to retake the HIP brief?`
      : `Training complete. Practice average: ${avg.toFixed(1)}/3.`;

    if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
      if (isLowHip) {
        notify.info(msg, {
          actions: [
            { label: 'retake HIP brief', run: () => { try { openHipBrief?.(); } catch {} } },
          ],
        });
      } else {
        notify.success(msg);
      }
    }

    try {
      commitChangeLogEntry(
        'cstpOnboarding',
        'structural',
        { added: [`CSTP training completed — practice avg ${avg.toFixed(1)}/3`], removed: [] },
        { trigger: 'cstp-finish' }
      );
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[cstp change log]', e); }
  }

  function _cstpRefreshStatus() {
    const wrap   = $('pfCstpStatus');
    const dateEl = $('pfCstpDate');
    const btn    = $('cstpStartBtn');
    if (!wrap || !dateEl || !btn) return;
    const lastIso = localStorage.getItem(CSTP_DONE_KEY);
    if (!lastIso) {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = 'begin the training';
      return;
    }
    const d = new Date(lastIso);
    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) { wrap.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    wrap.style.display = '';
    dateEl.textContent = d.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
    btn.textContent = 'redo the training';
  }

  function openCstp() {
    const modal = _ensureCstpModal();
    _cstpScreenIdx = 0;
    _cstpMythAck.clear();
    for (const k in _cstpRatings) delete _cstpRatings[k];
    _renderCstpScreen();
    modal.classList.add('visible');
  }

  $('cstpStartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openCstp);

  _cstpRefreshStatus();

  const RF_CANDIDATES = [4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 6.5];
  const RF_TEST_DURATION_S = 60;

  let _rfModalEl = null;
  let _rfRaf = null;
  let _rfStartTime = 0;
  let _rfStepIdx = 0;
  const _rfScores = {};

  function _ensureRfModal() {
    if (_rfModalEl) return _rfModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'rfFinderModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:560px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Resonance-frequency finder</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="rfCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div id="rfIntro" style="font-size:0.82rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)">
          <p>You'll try 5 different breathing rates for one minute each. After each, rate how it felt on a 4-point scale. The fastest one will feel a little rushed; the slowest may feel too slow; somewhere in the middle is your personal resonance frequency.</p>
          <p>Sit comfortably, breathe through your nose if possible, extend the exhale slightly. Don't force depth — natural fullness is fine.</p>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn primary" id="rfStartBtn" style="padding:9px 20px;font-size:0.78rem">start the sweep</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="rfTest" style="display:none;text-align:center">
          <div id="rfStepLabel" style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:6px">step 1 of 5</div>
          <div id="rfBpmLabel" style="font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--neon-cyan);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px">5.5 bpm</div>
          <canvas id="rfCanvas" width="220" height="220" style="display:block;margin:0 auto"></canvas>
          <div id="rfTimerLabel" style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-top:10px">60s remaining</div>
          <div id="rfRateRow" style="display:none;margin-top:14px">
            <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:8px">how did this rate feel?</div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-width:340px;margin:0 auto">
              <button type="button" class="rf-rate-btn" data-rate="0" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:0.72rem">0 — uncomfortably fast</button>
              <button type="button" class="rf-rate-btn" data-rate="1" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:0.72rem">1 — slightly fast</button>
              <button type="button" class="rf-rate-btn" data-rate="2" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:0.72rem">2 — comfortable, mostly</button>
              <button type="button" class="rf-rate-btn" data-rate="3" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:0.72rem">3 — easy and natural</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="rfResult" style="display:none">
