          <h3 style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text);margin:0 0 12px">Your resonance frequency</h3>
          <div id="rfResultBpm" style="font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--neon-cyan);font-weight:600;text-align:center;margin:14px 0"></div>
          <div id="rfResultDetail" style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:14px"></div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="rfRetakeBtn" style="padding:8px 16px;font-size:0.74rem">retake</button>
            <button class="btn primary" id="rfSaveBtn" style="padding:8px 18px;font-size:0.74rem">save to profile</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _rfModalEl = wrap;

    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === wrap) _rfClose(); });
    wrap.querySelector('#rfCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', _rfClose);
    wrap.querySelector('#rfStartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', _rfStartSweep);
    wrap.querySelector('#rfRetakeBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      _rfStepIdx = 0;
      for (const k in _rfScores) delete _rfScores[k];
      wrap.querySelector('#rfResult').style.display = 'none';
      wrap.querySelector('#rfIntro').style.display = '';
    });
    wrap.querySelector('#rfSaveBtn')?.addEventListener('click', _rfSave);
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.rf-rate-btn').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        _rfScores[RF_CANDIDATES[_rfStepIdx]] = Number(btn.dataset.rate);
        _rfStepIdx++;
        if (_rfStepIdx >= RF_CANDIDATES.length) _rfFinishSweep();
        else _rfRunStep();
      });
    });
    return wrap;
  }

  function _rfClose() {
    if (_rfRaf) { cancelAnimationFrame(_rfRaf); _rfRaf = null; }
    _rfModalEl?.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  function _rfStartSweep() {
    _rfStepIdx = 0;
    for (const k in _rfScores) delete _rfScores[k];
    $('rfIntro').style.display = 'none';
    $('rfResult').style.display = 'none';
    $('rfTest').style.display = '';
    _rfRunStep();
  }

  function _rfRunStep() {
    const bpm = RF_CANDIDATES[_rfStepIdx];
    $('rfStepLabel').textContent = `step ${_rfStepIdx + 1} of ${RF_CANDIDATES.length}`;
    $('rfBpmLabel').textContent  = `${bpm.toFixed(1)} bpm`;
    $('rfRateRow').style.display = 'none';
    $('rfTimerLabel').style.visibility = 'visible';
    _rfStartTime = performance.now();

    const canvas = $('rfCanvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const cycle = 60 / bpm;
    const inhaleSec = cycle * 0.4;

    const tick = () => {
      const elapsed = (performance.now() - _rfStartTime) / 1000;
      const remaining = Math.max(0, RF_TEST_DURATION_S - elapsed);
      $('rfTimerLabel').textContent = `${Math.ceil(remaining)}s remaining`;

      const phase = elapsed % cycle;
      const frac = phase < inhaleSec
        ? phase / inhaleSec
        : 1 - (phase - inhaleSec) / (cycle - inhaleSec);
      const eased = frac * frac * (3 - 2 * frac);

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(8,12,18)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 220, 220);
      const r = 30 + 70 * eased;
      const hue = 175 + eased * 50;
      const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(110, 110, r * 0.3, 110, 110, r);
      g.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${hue},55%,55%,0.40)`);
      g.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${hue},45%,40%,0.08)`);
      ctx.fillStyle = g;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(110, 110, r, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue},50%,65%,0.55)`; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

      ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${hue},40%,70%,0.7)`;
      ctx.font = '14px -apple-system, sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText(phase < inhaleSec ? 'in' : 'out', 110, 116);

      if (remaining > 0) {
        _rfRaf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      } else {
        _rfRaf = null;
        $('rfTimerLabel').style.visibility = 'hidden';
        $('rfRateRow').style.display = '';
      }
    };
    if (_rfRaf) cancelAnimationFrame(_rfRaf);
    _rfRaf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }

  function _rfFinishSweep() {
    if (_rfRaf) { cancelAnimationFrame(_rfRaf); _rfRaf = null; }
    $('rfTest').style.display = 'none';
    $('rfResult').style.display = '';

    let best = null, bestScore = -1;
    for (const bpm of RF_CANDIDATES) {
      const s = _rfScores[bpm] ?? 0;
      if (s > bestScore || (s === bestScore && bpm < (best ?? 999))) {
        best = bpm; bestScore = s;
      }
    }
    $('rfResultBpm').textContent = `${best.toFixed(1)} bpm`;
    const ratings = RF_CANDIDATES.map(b => `${b.toFixed(1)}: ${_rfScores[b] ?? 0}/3`).join(' · ');
    $('rfResultDetail').innerHTML = `Based on your ratings (${escapeHtml(ratings)}), <strong>${best.toFixed(1)} bpm</strong> is the slowest rate that scored highest for you. This becomes your default for the resonance-breath visualizer.<br><br>You can re-run this any time — RF can drift seasonally and with practice.`;
    _rfModalEl.dataset.chosenBpm = String(best);
  }

  function _rfSave() {
    const chosen = parseFloat(_rfModalEl?.dataset.chosenBpm);
    if (!Number.isFinite(chosen)) return;
    const inp = $('pfRfBreath');
    if (inp) {
      inp.value = String(chosen);
      inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }
    _refreshRfBreathDisplay();
    if (typeof saveProfile === 'function') saveProfile();

    try {
      commitChangeLogEntry(
        'pfRfBreath',
        'structural',
        { added: [`Resonance frequency: ${chosen.toFixed(1)} bpm`], removed: [] },
        { trigger: 'rf-finder' }
      );
    } catch {}

    _rfClose();
    if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') notify.success(`Resonance frequency saved: ${chosen.toFixed(1)} bpm.`);
  }

  function _refreshRfBreathDisplay() {
    const wrap = $('pfRfBreathDisplay');
    const rateEl = $('pfRfBreathRate');
    if (!wrap || !rateEl) return;
    const raw = parseFloat($('pfRfBreath')?.value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(raw)) {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    wrap.style.display = '';
    rateEl.textContent = raw.toFixed(1);
  }

  $('rfFinderBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const modal = _ensureRfModal();
    modal.querySelector('#rfIntro').style.display = '';
    modal.querySelector('#rfTest').style.display = 'none';
    modal.querySelector('#rfResult').style.display = 'none';
    modal.classList.add('visible');
  });
  _refreshRfBreathDisplay();

  const TRACK_LABEL_DICTS = {
    'hypnosis': {
      noun: 'hypnosis',          NounCap: 'Hypnosis',
      session: 'session',        SessionCap: 'Session',
      verbing: 'going under',    VerbingCap: 'Going under',
      stateAdj: 'hypnotic',      StateAdjCap: 'Hypnotic',
    },
    'focus-settle': {
      noun: 'focus practice',    NounCap: 'Focus practice',
      session: 'session',        SessionCap: 'Session',
      verbing: 'settling in',    VerbingCap: 'Settling in',
      stateAdj: 'settled',       StateAdjCap: 'Settled',
    },
    'phenomenological': {
      noun: 'phenomenological-control practice', NounCap: 'Phenomenological-control practice',
      session: 'practice',       SessionCap: 'Practice',
      verbing: 'engaging',       VerbingCap: 'Engaging',
      stateAdj: 'absorbed',      StateAdjCap: 'Absorbed',
    },
    'attention-training': {
      noun: 'attention training',  NounCap: 'Attention training',
      session: 'session',          SessionCap: 'Session',
      verbing: 'narrowing',        VerbingCap: 'Narrowing',
      stateAdj: 'focused',         StateAdjCap: 'Focused',
    },
  };

  function _activeTrackDict() {
    const choice = $('pfTrackLabel')?.value || 'auto';
    if (choice !== 'auto') return TRACK_LABEL_DICTS[choice] || TRACK_LABEL_DICTS.hypnosis;
    const hip = Number($('pfSusceptibility')?.value);
    if (Number.isFinite(hip) && hip <= 3) return TRACK_LABEL_DICTS['focus-settle'];
    return TRACK_LABEL_DICTS.hypnosis;
  }

  function applyTrackLabels() {
    const dict = _activeTrackDict();
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-track-label]').forEach(el => {
      const key = el.dataset.trackLabel;
      if (!key) return;

      if (el.dataset.trackLabelOrig === undefined) {
        el.dataset.trackLabelOrig = el.textContent;
      }
      const replacement = dict[key];

      el.textContent = (replacement != null) ? replacement : el.dataset.trackLabelOrig;
    });

    document.body.dataset.trackLabel = $('pfTrackLabel')?.value || 'auto';
  }

  $('pfTrackLabel')?.addEventListener('change', applyTrackLabels);

  $('pfSusceptibility')?.addEventListener('change', applyTrackLabels);

  function _maybeAutoSuggestTrackLabel() {
    try {
      const k = 'hne.trackLabelAutoSuggestedV1';
      if (localStorage.getItem(k)) return;
      const hip = Number($('pfSusceptibility')?.value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(hip) || hip > 3) return;
      const sel = $('pfTrackLabel');
      if (!sel || sel.value !== 'auto') return;

      localStorage.setItem(k, '1');
      if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
        notify.info('Your track is now labeled "Focus & Settle" — same engine, just framed for your HIP band. Change in Profile → 🏷 Track label.');
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  setTimeout(_maybeAutoSuggestTrackLabel, 1500);

  setTimeout(applyTrackLabels, 1600);

  const ANCHOR_TAP_KEY      = 'hne.anchorTapsV1';
  const ANCHOR_FIRE_LOG_KEY = 'hne.anchorFireLogV1';

  let _anchorAudioCtx = null;
  function _getAnchorCtx() {
    if (!_anchorAudioCtx) {
      _anchorAudioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    }
    return _anchorAudioCtx;
  }

  function playAnchorSound(kind) {
    if (!kind || kind === 'off') return 0;
    const c = _getAnchorCtx();
    const t = c.currentTime;
    const master = c.createGain(); master.gain.value = 0.35; master.connect(c.destination);

    const bell = (freq, decay) => {

      const harmonics = [
        { mult: 1,    amp: 0.6,  dec: decay        },
        { mult: 2.02, amp: 0.3,  dec: decay * 0.7  },
        { mult: 3.07, amp: 0.15, dec: decay * 0.55 },
      ];
      harmonics.forEach(h => {
        const o = c.createOscillator(); o.type = 'sine'; o.frequency.value = freq * h.mult;
        const g = c.createGain();
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, t);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(h.amp, t + 0.01);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, t + h.dec);
        o.connect(g).connect(master);
        o.start(t); o.stop(t + h.dec + 0.05);
      });
      return decay;
    };

    switch (kind) {
      case 'bell-c5':  return bell(523.25, 3.0);
      case 'bowl-low': return bell(220, 6.0);
      case 'om-tone': {

        const o1 = c.createOscillator(); o1.type = 'sine'; o1.frequency.value = 132;
        const o2 = c.createOscillator(); o2.type = 'sine'; o2.frequency.value = 264;
        const g = c.createGain(); g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, t);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.35, t + 0.4);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.35, t + 4.5);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, t + 5.5);
        o1.connect(g); o2.connect(g); g.connect(master);
        o1.start(t); o2.start(t); o1.stop(t + 5.6); o2.stop(t + 5.6);
        return 5.5;
      }
      case 'rim-tap': {

        const buf = c.createBuffer(1, c.sampleRate * 0.3, c.sampleRate);
        const d = buf.getChannelData(0);
        for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i++) d[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * (1 - i / d.length);
        const s = c.createBufferSource(); s.buffer = buf;
        const f = c.createBiquadFilter(); f.type = 'bandpass'; f.frequency.value = 2400; f.Q.value = 8;
        const g = c.createGain(); g.gain.value = 0.6;
        s.connect(f).connect(g).connect(master);
        s.start(t);
        return 0.3;
      }
      case 'tine': {

        const o = c.createOscillator(); o.type = 'triangle'; o.frequency.value = 1318.51;
        const g = c.createGain();
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, t);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.5, t + 0.005);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, t + 1.6);
        o.connect(g).connect(master);
        o.start(t); o.stop(t + 1.7);
        return 1.6;
      }
      default: return 0;
    }
  }

  function _bumpAnchorTapCount() {
    const n = Number(localStorage.getItem(ANCHOR_TAP_KEY) || '0') + 1;
    try { localStorage.setItem(ANCHOR_TAP_KEY, String(n)); } catch {}
    _refreshAnchorTapDisplay();
    return n;
  }
  function _refreshAnchorTapDisplay() {
    const el = $('anchorTapCount');
    if (!el) return;
    const taps = Number(localStorage.getItem(ANCHOR_TAP_KEY) || '0');
    const fires = Number(localStorage.getItem(ANCHOR_FIRE_LOG_KEY) || '0');
    if (!taps && !fires) { el.textContent = ''; return; }
    el.textContent = `paired in sessions: ${fires} · daytime taps: ${taps}`;
  }

  $('anchorPreviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const kind = $('pfAnchorSound')?.value;
    playAnchorSound(kind);
  });

  $('anchorTapBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const kind = $('pfAnchorSound')?.value;
    if (!kind || kind === 'off') {
      if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') notify.warn('Pick an anchor sound first.');
      return;
    }
    playAnchorSound(kind);
    _bumpAnchorTapCount();

    _showAnchorOverlay();
  });

  function _showAnchorOverlay() {
    let ov = document.getElementById('anchorDayOverlay');
    if (ov) { ov.classList.add('visible'); setTimeout(() => ov.classList.remove('visible'), 8000); return; }
    ov = document.createElement('div');
    ov.id = 'anchorDayOverlay';
    ov.className = 'visible';
    ov.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;color:var(--text);transition:opacity 0.5s;';
    ov.innerHTML = `
      <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.12em;margin-bottom:14px">anchor fired · 8 seconds</div>
      <div style="font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-dim);font-weight:300;text-align:center;max-width:480px;line-height:1.5;padding:0 20px">notice your breath... let your shoulders drop... the same place you go when this sound plays in a session.</div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(ov);
    setTimeout(() => { ov.classList.remove('visible'); ov.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(() => ov.remove(), 600); }, 8000);
  }

  let _anchorFiredThisSession = false;
  function _fireSessionAnchor() {
    if (_anchorFiredThisSession) return;
    const kind = $('pfAnchorSound')?.value;
    if (!kind || kind === 'off') return;
    playAnchorSound(kind);
    _anchorFiredThisSession = true;

  }

  $('pfAnchorSound')?.addEventListener('change', () => {
    if (typeof saveProfile === 'function') saveProfile();
  });
  _refreshAnchorTapDisplay();

  const HYPNAGOGIC_PROMPTS = [
    'notice what just appeared. let it pass.',
    'what color is the inside of your eyelids right now?',
    'something is forming. you don\'t need to know what.',
    'is there a sound you\'re hearing that isn\'t in the room?',
    'let the next image come without naming it.',
    'the body is heavier than a moment ago. let it stay that way.',
    'a thought is finishing. another is beginning. neither needs you.',
    'where in your face has tension been hiding?',
    'if there is a question, hold it like an open hand.',
    'gone. let it go. the next one is already arriving.',
  ];

  let _hypnagogicModalEl = null;
  function _ensureHypnagogicModal() {
    if (_hypnagogicModalEl) return _hypnagogicModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'hypnagogicModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">🌒 Hypnagogic Drift</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="hypnagogicCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)">
          <p>The borderland between waking and sleep — not a trance technique, just the physiological state itself. Best done lying down, with headphones, in a dim room. No induction. The audio holds you near sleep onset; sparse voice prompts catch images as they emerge.</p>
          <p style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-faint)"><strong>Note:</strong> Many users fall fully asleep in this mode — that's fine. If you want to capture the state, set the alarm to 25 min and keep something nearby to write or speak into when it ends.</p>

          <div style="margin-top:14px">
            <label class="pf-label">Duration</label>
            <select id="hypnagogicDuration" style="width:100%;padding:6px;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px">
              <option value="900">15 minutes — a short Edison-style nap</option>
              <option value="1500" selected>25 minutes — full hypnagogic window</option>
              <option value="2700">45 minutes — extended; may continue into light sleep</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px">
            <label class="pf-label">Alarm at end?</label>
            <select id="hypnagogicAlarm" style="width:100%;padding:6px;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px">
              <option value="bell" selected>Soft bell (wakes you gently)</option>
              <option value="om">Long om-tone (slower wake)</option>
              <option value="off">No alarm (drift into sleep)</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px">
            <label class="pf-label">Dream-incubation question (optional)</label>
            <textarea id="hypnagogicQuestion" rows="2" maxlength="240" style="width:100%;padding:6px;font-size:0.74rem;margin-top:4px;background:var(--bg-soft);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--glass-border)" placeholder="A question you'd like your mind to chew on. e.g. 'what's the simplest version of this project?' — replayed once mid-session"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px;display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end">
          <button class="btn primary" id="hypnagogicLaunchBtn" style="padding:9px 22px;font-size:0.78rem">begin drifting</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _hypnagogicModalEl = wrap;

    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === wrap) wrap.classList.remove('visible'); });
    wrap.querySelector('#hypnagogicCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.querySelector('#hypnagogicLaunchBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      wrap.classList.remove('visible');
      _launchHypnagogic();
    });
    return wrap;
  }

  let _hypnagogicAbort = null;
  function _launchHypnagogic() {
    const duration = Number(document.getElementById('hypnagogicDuration')?.value) || 1500;
    const alarm    = document.getElementById('hypnagogicAlarm')?.value || 'bell';
    const question = document.getElementById('hypnagogicQuestion')?.value?.trim() || '';
    const startedAt = performance.now();

    const prompts = [...HYPNAGOGIC_PROMPTS];
    for (let i = prompts.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [prompts[i], prompts[j]] = [prompts[j], prompts[i]];
    }

    const overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'hypnagogicOverlay';
    overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:#000;z-index:9998;cursor:pointer';
    const cnv = document.createElement('canvas');
    cnv.style.cssText = 'width:100%;height:100%;display:block';
    cnv.width = window.innerWidth; cnv.height = window.innerHeight;
    overlay.appendChild(cnv);
    const exitHint = document.createElement('div');
    exitHint.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:16px;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-size:0.66rem;color:rgba(255,200,180,0.5);pointer-events:none';
    exitHint.textContent = 'tap anywhere to exit';
    overlay.appendChild(exitHint);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);

    const ctx = cnv.getContext('2d');
    let raf = null;
    const tick = () => {
      const elapsed = (performance.now() - startedAt) / 1000;
      renderGanzfeld(ctx, cnv.width, cnv.height, elapsed, '#a04020');
      raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);

    let bed = null;
    try {
      if (typeof SoundscapeEngine === 'function') {
        bed = new SoundscapeEngine();
        bed.start(0.20, 'pink');
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[hypnagogic bed]', e); }

    const speak = (text) => {
      if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) return;
      const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      u.rate = 0.78; u.pitch = 0.85; u.volume = 0.45;
      speechSynthesis.speak(u);
    };

    let promptIdx = 0;
    const promptInterval = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = (performance.now() - startedAt) / 1000;
      if (elapsed > duration - 30) return;
      const text = prompts[promptIdx % prompts.length];
      speak(text);
      promptIdx++;
    }, 4 * 60 * 1000 + Math.random() * 60 * 1000);

    let questionFired = false;
    const questionTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = (performance.now() - startedAt) / 1000;
      if (!questionFired && question && elapsed >= duration * 0.5) {
        speak('the question, again. ' + question);
        questionFired = true;
      }
    }, 30000);

    let durationTimer = null;
    let alarmTimer    = null;
    const cleanup = () => {
      if (raf) cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
      raf = null;
      if (durationTimer) { clearTimeout(durationTimer); durationTimer = null; }
      if (alarmTimer)    { clearTimeout(alarmTimer);    alarmTimer    = null; }
      clearInterval(promptInterval);
      clearInterval(questionTimer);
      try { if (bed) bed.stop(); } catch {}
      try { speechSynthesis.cancel(); } catch {}
      if (overlay.parentNode) overlay.remove();
      _hypnagogicAbort = null;
      document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);

      try {
        if (typeof idbGet === 'function' && typeof idbSet === 'function') {
          const finishedAt = Date.now();
          idbGet('stillness_history_v1').then(h => {
            const rec = {
              date: finishedAt,
              persona: 'inner-voice', method: 'hypnagogic-drift',
              intention: 'drift', length: 'extended',
              soundscape: 'pink', visualizer: 'ganzfeld',
              completed: true, durationS: Math.floor((performance.now() - startedAt) / 1000),
              _sessionMode: 'hypnagogic',
              dreamQuestion: question || null,
            };
            const arr = Array.isArray(h) ? h : [];
            arr.push(rec);
            idbSet('stillness_history_v1', arr);
          });
        }
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[hypnagogic record]', e); }
    };

    function onKey(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') cleanup();
    }
    overlay.addEventListener('click', cleanup, { once: true });
    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);

    durationTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      durationTimer = null;
      if (alarm !== 'off') {
        const sound = alarm === 'om' ? 'om-tone' : 'bell-c5';
        try { playAnchorSound(sound); } catch {}
      }

      alarmTimer = setTimeout(() => { alarmTimer = null; cleanup(); }, 6500);
    }, duration * 1000);

    _hypnagogicAbort = cleanup;
  }

  $('hypnagogicCard')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    _ensureHypnagogicModal().classList.add('visible');
  });

  const SOS_SESSIONS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.SOS_SESSIONS) || [];


    // ====================================================================
    // PRE-SESSION PREP TRAY (Roadmap #15 + #19)
    // ====================================================================
    // Two combined features:
    //   • #19 priming microquestionnaire — 3 single-tap 1–5 ratings
    //     ("openness", "imagination", "willingness to let something happen")
    //     that prime expectancy via the act of answering.
    //   • #15 absorption gym — rotating 60-second imagery exercises
    //     (visual / aesthetic / synesthesia) with self-rated vividness.
    //     Scores tracked over time, surfaced as a sparkline.
    //
    // The tray fires on session launch (right before the script plays).
    // Skip mechanics: priming Qs cap at 3×/week if pfPrepPriming=auto;
    // absorption warm-up is opt-in per launch unless pfPrepAbsorption=always.
    // Hard-skipped entirely if the user toggles both off.
    // ====================================================================
  
    const ABSORPTION_LOG_KEY = 'hne.absorptionLogV1';   // [{ts, kind, score 0-3}]
    const PRIMING_LOG_KEY    = 'hne.primingLogV1';      // [{ts, openness, imagination, willingness}]
  
    const ABSORPTION_EXERCISES = [
      {
        id: 'apple', kind: 'visual',
        title: 'The apple',
        prompt: 'Close your eyes. Imagine a single red apple, sitting on a plain wooden table. For 30 seconds, build it as fully as you can — the exact red, the small bruise on one shoulder, the matte stem, the way light catches the curve nearest you, the cool weight of it if you picked it up. Then open your eyes.',
        rateLabel: 'How vivid was the apple?',
        ratings: ['Just an idea — no image', 'Faint, fragmentary', 'Solid image, somewhat detailed', 'Fully present — I could almost reach for it'],
      },
      {
        id: 'home-room', kind: 'visual',
        title: 'A familiar room',
        prompt: 'Eyes closed. Pick a room in your home — kitchen, bedroom, wherever. Slowly mentally walk its perimeter, noticing the order of things on the walls, the surface materials, the light source. About 45 seconds. Then open your eyes.',
        rateLabel: 'How completely could you walk it?',
        ratings: ['Vague impression of the room', 'Partial — some walls, some objects', 'Most of it, in correct order', 'Completely — I noticed details I\'d forgotten'],
      },
      {
        id: 'sound-color', kind: 'synesthesia',
        title: 'What color is this sound?',
        prompt: 'Sit still for 30 seconds and listen to the loudest ambient sound near you — fan, traffic, fridge hum, breath. Without thinking, assign it a color, a temperature, and a texture. There are no wrong answers; the exercise is making the assignment.',
        rateLabel: 'How quickly did the assignments come?',
        ratings: ['Couldn\'t — they felt arbitrary', 'Slow but possible', 'Came naturally', 'Immediate, multiple options for each'],
      },
      {
        id: 'tea', kind: 'aesthetic',
        title: 'A held cup',
        prompt: 'Imagine holding a hot cup of tea (or coffee). For 60 seconds, build only the somatic side: warmth in the palms, the ceramic\'s curve, steam against the lip and chin, the first slow sip\'s heat-spread down the throat and into the chest.',
        rateLabel: 'How present was the body?',
        ratings: ['Abstract — just thinking about it', 'A faint warmth somewhere', 'Clear sensation in hands or throat', 'Strong full-body response'],
      },
      {
        id: 'rain', kind: 'aesthetic',
        title: 'Listening through rain',
        prompt: 'Close your eyes. Imagine standing under a porch awning during steady rain. Hold only the audio: the rain on the roof above, the heavier drops from the corners, the more distant patter on the path, the brief silence as a car goes by. 45 seconds.',
        rateLabel: 'How layered was the sound?',
        ratings: ['One flat impression', 'Two layers, mostly flat', 'Three or four distinct layers', 'Dense — I could turn my attention from one to another'],
      },
      {
        id: 'mood-shape', kind: 'synesthesia',
        title: 'Today\'s shape',
        prompt: 'Without thinking, answer: if your overall mood today were a shape, what shape? A color? A speed of motion? A weight? About 30 seconds. The point is the speed of the answers, not the precision.',
        rateLabel: 'How easily did the answers come?',
        ratings: ['I had to manufacture them', 'Some came, some forced', 'They came quickly', 'They were already there before I asked'],
      },
    ];
  
    /** Fire the prep tray before a session launches. Returns a Promise that
     *  resolves when the user dismisses the tray (or instantly if both
     *  features are off). The session launch should `await` this. */
    async function runPrepTray({ context = 'session' } = {}) {
      const primingMode    = $('pfPrepPriming')?.value    || 'auto';
      const absorptionMode = $('pfPrepAbsorption')?.value || 'auto';
  
      const showPriming = (() => {
        if (primingMode === 'off') return false;
        if (primingMode === 'always') return true;
        // Auto: cap at 3×/week
        const log = _readPrimingLog();
        const weekAgo = Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
        const recent = log.filter(e => e.ts > weekAgo).length;
        return recent < 3;
      })();
      const showAbsorption = absorptionMode === 'always';
      // (auto mode = opt-in per launch via the "warm up?" button — handled below)
  
      if (!showPriming && !showAbsorption && absorptionMode !== 'auto') {
        return;
      }
  
      return new Promise(resolve => {
        const tray = _ensurePrepTray();
        _renderPrepTray({
          showPriming,
          showAbsorption,
          offerWarmup: absorptionMode === 'auto',
          onDone: () => { tray.classList.remove('visible'); resolve(); },
        });
        tray.classList.add('visible');
      });
    }
  
    let _prepTrayEl = null;
    function _ensurePrepTray() {
      if (_prepTrayEl) return _prepTrayEl;
      const wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
      wrap.id = 'prepTrayModal';
      wrap.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:540px"><div id="prepTrayBody"></div></div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(wrap);
      _prepTrayEl = wrap;
      wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
        // Don't allow click-outside to dismiss — the user has to engage
        // (or tap "skip"). Otherwise the priming intervention gets
        // accidentally bypassed and we lose its effect.
        if (e.target === wrap) e.stopPropagation();
      });
      return wrap;
    }
  
    function _renderPrepTray({ showPriming, showAbsorption, offerWarmup, onDone }) {
      const body = $('prepTrayBody');
      if (!body) return;
  
      const primingState = { openness: null, imagination: null, willingness: null };
      let absorptionPicked = null;
  
      const finish = () => {
        // Persist priming if completed
        if (showPriming && primingState.openness != null) {
          _appendPrimingLog(primingState);
        }
        onDone?.();
      };
  
      const render = () => {
        const primingComplete = !showPriming || (
          primingState.openness    != null &&
          primingState.imagination != null &&
          primingState.willingness != null
        );
        body.innerHTML = `
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:14px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:0.95rem">Quick prep</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="prepTraySkipBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">skip all</button>
          </div>
  
          ${showPriming ? `
            <div class="prep-section" style="margin-bottom:18px">
              <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:10px">Three quick ratings — the answering itself is part of the practice. (1 low, 5 high)</div>
              ${[
                { key: 'openness',    label: 'Openness today' },
                { key: 'imagination', label: 'Imagination today' },
                { key: 'willingness', label: 'Willingness to let something happen' },
              ].map(q => `
                <div style="margin-bottom:10px">
                  <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px">${q.label}</div>
                  <div style="display:flex;gap:4px">
                    ${[1,2,3,4,5].map(v => `
                      <button type="button" class="prep-rate-btn" data-q="${q.key}" data-v="${v}"
                        style="flex:1;padding:8px 0;font-size:0.78rem;background:${primingState[q.key] === v ? 'rgba(0,212,230,0.18)' : 'var(--glass)'};border:1px solid ${primingState[q.key] === v ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'var(--glass-border)'};color:var(--text);cursor:pointer">${v}</button>
                    `).join('')}
                  </div>
                </div>
              `).join('')}
            </div>
          ` : ''}
  
          ${showAbsorption ? `
            <div class="prep-section" style="margin-bottom:14px">
              <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px">${escapeHtml(absorptionPicked?.title || 'Warm-up')}</div>
              <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:10px">${escapeHtml(absorptionPicked?.prompt || '')}</div>
              <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:6px">${escapeHtml(absorptionPicked?.rateLabel || '')}</div>
              <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">
                ${(absorptionPicked?.ratings || []).map((r, ri) => `
                  <button type="button" class="prep-abs-btn" data-v="${ri}"
                    style="padding:7px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;text-align:left;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text-dim);cursor:pointer">${ri} — ${escapeHtml(r)}</button>
                `).join('')}
              </div>
            </div>
          ` : offerWarmup ? `
            <div class="prep-section" style="margin-bottom:14px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg-deep);border-left:2px solid var(--neon-cyan)">
              <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:8px">Want a 60-second imagery warm-up before the session? Builds absorption over time.</div>
              <button class="btn secondary" id="prepWarmupYes" style="padding:6px 14px;font-size:0.72rem">yes, run one</button>
            </div>
          ` : ''}
  
          <div class="modal-actions" style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:6px">
            <button class="btn primary" id="prepTrayContinue" style="padding:9px 22px;font-size:0.78rem"${primingComplete ? '' : ' disabled style="opacity:0.5"'}>
              ${primingComplete ? 'continue' : 'answer to continue'}
            </button>
          </div>
        `;
  
        body.querySelectorAll('.prep-rate-btn').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            primingState[btn.dataset.q] = Number(btn.dataset.v);
            render();
          });
        });
        body.querySelectorAll('.prep-abs-btn').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (absorptionPicked) {
              _appendAbsorptionLog({ kind: absorptionPicked.kind, score: Number(btn.dataset.v), id: absorptionPicked.id });
              _refreshAbsorptionGymStats();
            }
            finish();
          });
        });
        $('prepWarmupYes')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          absorptionPicked = _pickRotatingAbsorption();
          showAbsorption = true;
          offerWarmup = false;
          render();
        });
        $('prepTraySkipBtn')?.addEventListener('click', finish);
        $('prepTrayContinue')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (showAbsorption && absorptionPicked) {
            // User hit "continue" without rating — that's also fine; treat
            // as "did the exercise but didn't rate." Skip logging.
          }
          finish();
        });
      };
  
      if (showAbsorption && !absorptionPicked) {
        absorptionPicked = _pickRotatingAbsorption();
      }
      render();
    }
  
    /** Pick an exercise the user hasn't seen recently. */
    function _pickRotatingAbsorption() {
      const log = _readAbsorptionLog();
      const recentIds = new Set(log.slice(-3).map(e => e.id));
      const candidates = ABSORPTION_EXERCISES.filter(e => !recentIds.has(e.id));
      const pool = candidates.length ? candidates : ABSORPTION_EXERCISES;
      return pool[Math.floor(Math.random() * pool.length)];
    }
  
    // Storage helpers
    function _readAbsorptionLog() {
      try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ABSORPTION_LOG_KEY) || '[]'); } catch { return []; }
    }
    function _appendAbsorptionLog(entry) {
      const log = _readAbsorptionLog();
      log.push({ ts: Date.now(), ...entry });
      // Keep last 200 entries
      if (log.length > 200) log.splice(0, log.length - 200);
      try { localStorage.setItem(ABSORPTION_LOG_KEY, JSON.stringify(log)); } catch {}
    }
    function _readPrimingLog() {
      try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(PRIMING_LOG_KEY) || '[]'); } catch { return []; }
    }
    function _appendPrimingLog(state) {
      const log = _readPrimingLog();
      log.push({ ts: Date.now(), ...state });
      if (log.length > 200) log.splice(0, log.length - 200);
      try { localStorage.setItem(PRIMING_LOG_KEY, JSON.stringify(log)); } catch {}
    }
  
    /** Sparkline + stats for the absorption gym, rendered into the
     *  pf-extended details block. Only shown after ≥ 3 logged exercises. */
    function _refreshAbsorptionGymStats() {
      const wrap = $('absorptionGymStats');
      const cnv  = $('absorptionGymSparkline');
      const row  = $('absorptionGymStatsRow');
      if (!wrap || !cnv || !row) return;
      const log = _readAbsorptionLog();
      if (log.length < 3) { wrap.style.display = 'none'; return; }
      wrap.style.display = '';
  
      const ctx = cnv.getContext('2d');
      const W = cnv.width, H = cnv.height;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
      // Show last 30 entries as a small line chart (score 0-3 → 0..H)
      const points = log.slice(-30).map((e, i, arr) => ({
        x: arr.length > 1 ? (i / (arr.length - 1)) * (W - 8) + 4 : W / 2,
        y: H - 4 - (e.score / 3) * (H - 12),
        score: e.score, kind: e.kind,
      }));
      // Connecting line
      ctx.beginPath();
      points.forEach((p, i) => i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y) : ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y));
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,212,230,0.55)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.stroke();
      // Dots
      points.forEach(p => {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,212,230,0.85)'; ctx.fill();
      });
  
      // Stats row — average score + recent trend
      const recent  = points.slice(-7).reduce((a, p) => a + p.score, 0) / Math.min(7, points.length);
      const earlier = points.slice(0, -7).length
        ? points.slice(0, -7).reduce((a, p) => a + p.score, 0) / points.slice(0, -7).length
        : recent;
      const delta = recent - earlier;
      const trendTxt = Math.abs(delta) < 0.15 ? 'stable' : delta > 0 ? `+${delta.toFixed(1)} trending up` : `${delta.toFixed(1)} trending down`;
      row.innerHTML = `${log.length} entries · last 7 avg: <strong>${recent.toFixed(1)}/3</strong> · ${escapeHtml(trendTxt)}`;
    }
    _refreshAbsorptionGymStats();
  
    // Allow opening a one-off warm-up from the profile section
    $('absorptionGymOpenBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const tray = _ensurePrepTray();
      _renderPrepTray({
        showPriming: false,
        showAbsorption: true,
        offerWarmup: false,
        onDone: () => tray.classList.remove('visible'),
      });
      tray.classList.add('visible');
    });

  let _sosModalEl = null;
  function _ensureSosModal() {
    if (_sosModalEl) return _sosModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'sosModal';
    const cards = SOS_SESSIONS.map(s =>
      `<div class="sos-card" data-kind="${escapeHtml(s.kind)}">
         <div class="sos-icon">${s.icon}</div>
         <div class="sos-name">${escapeHtml(s.name)}</div>
         <div class="sos-desc">${escapeHtml(s.desc)}</div>
       </div>`
    ).join('');
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:6px">
          <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Quick Reset</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="sosCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
        </div>
        <div class="oq-intro" style="border-left-color:#d46a6a;background:rgba(212,106,106,0.05)">
          A short, pre-built session for acute distress. Each one runs ~90 seconds with no setup. Pick whichever fits — they all start the same way: a soft breath and being right where you are.
        </div>
        <div class="sos-grid">${cards}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-align:center;margin-top:12px">
          If you're in immediate danger or considering harm, please reach out — these sessions are not a substitute for crisis support.
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _sosModalEl = wrap;

    wrap.querySelectorAll('.sos-card').forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const kind = card.dataset.kind;
        const sos = SOS_SESSIONS.find(s => s.kind === kind);
        if (sos) {
          wrap.classList.remove('visible');
          launchSosSession(sos);
        }
      });
    });
    $('sosCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === wrap) wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    return wrap;
  }

  function launchSosSession(sos) {
    if (!sos) return;

    if (state._cooldownUntil && Date.now() < state._cooldownUntil) {
      const remaining = (typeof getEmergencyCooldownRemaining === 'function')
        ? getEmergencyCooldownRemaining() : null;
      notify.warn(remaining
        ? `Please wait ${remaining}s before starting another session.`
        : 'Please wait a moment before starting another session.');
      return;
    }
    try {

      state.selectedPersonaId = sos.persona;
      state.selectedMethodId  = sos.method;
      state.length            = sos.length;
      state.soundscape        = sos.soundscape;
      state.droneEnabled      = sos.soundscape !== 'none';
      state.intentionType     = sos.intention;
      if (sos.vizOverride) state.vizOverride = sos.vizOverride;
      state._phaseExtras      = [];
      state._sosKind          = sos.kind;
      state._sosLaunchedAt    = Date.now();

      const lengthSel = $('lengthSelect');     if (lengthSel) lengthSel.value = sos.length;
      const ssSelect  = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect)  ssSelect.value  = sos.soundscape;
      const vizSel    = $('vizSelect');        if (vizSel && sos.vizOverride) vizSel.value = sos.vizOverride;
      const intSel    = $('intentionType');    if (intSel)    intSel.value    = sos.intention;

      const scriptText = sos.script;
      const stEl = $('scriptText');            if (stEl) stEl.value = scriptText;
      state.fullScript   = scriptText;
      state.parsedScript = parseScript(scriptText);
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = state.parsedScript?.ordered || [];
      state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: true, 6: false };

      $('sidebar')?.classList.remove('open');
      $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');

      if (typeof renderPersonaGrid   === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
      if (typeof renderPersonaDetail === 'function') renderPersonaDetail();
      if (typeof renderMethodGrid    === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
      if (typeof renderMethodDetail  === 'function') renderMethodDetail();
      if (typeof updateIntentionHint === 'function') updateIntentionHint();
      if (typeof showScript          === 'function') showScript();

      startSession();
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[sos] launch failed:', e);
      notify.error('Could not start the SOS session — try again or use the wizard.');
    }
  }

  function openSosModal() { _ensureSosModal().classList.add('visible'); }
  $('sosBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openSosModal);

  $('sosCard')?.addEventListener('click', openSosModal);

  const MEDITATION_DURATIONS = [
    { value: 5,  label: '5 minutes' },
    { value: 10, label: '10 minutes' },
    { value: 15, label: '15 minutes' },
    { value: 20, label: '20 minutes' },
    { value: 30, label: '30 minutes' },
    { value: 45, label: '45 minutes' },
  ];
  const MEDITATION_BELL_INTERVALS = [
    { value: 0,  label: 'no interval bell' },
    { value: 1,  label: 'every minute' },
    { value: 5,  label: 'every 5 minutes' },
    { value: 10, label: 'every 10 minutes' },
  ];
  const MEDITATION_SOUNDSCAPES = [
    { value: 'none',      label: 'silence' },
    { value: 'rain',      label: 'rain' },
    { value: 'ocean',     label: 'ocean' },
    { value: 'forest',    label: 'forest' },
    { value: 'brown',     label: 'brown noise' },
    { value: 'pink',      label: 'pink noise' },
    { value: 'fire',      label: 'fire crackle' },
    { value: 'underwater', label: 'underwater' },
    { value: 'bowls',     label: 'singing bowls' },
    { value: 'drone',     label: 'drone' },
  ];

  let _medModalEl  = null;
  let _medRunning  = false;
  let _medInterval = null;
  let _medStartedAt = 0;
  let _medDurationMs = 0;
  let _medBellEveryMs = 0;
  let _medLastBellAt = 0;
  let _medBell = null;
  function _ensureMedModal() {
    if (_medModalEl) return _medModalEl;
    const opts = (arr, sel) => arr.map(o =>
      `<option value="${escapeHtml(String(o.value))}"${o.value === sel ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(o.label)}</option>`
    ).join('');
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'medModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
        <div id="medSetup">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Meditation Timer</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="medCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
          </div>
          <div class="oq-intro" style="border-left-color:var(--neon-amber);background:rgba(201,168,85,0.04)">
            Silent timer with optional soundscape and interval bells. No narrator. Visualizer runs the same as a regular session.
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="medDuration">Duration</label>
            <select id="medDuration">${opts(MEDITATION_DURATIONS, 10)}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="medSoundscape">Soundscape</label>
            <select id="medSoundscape">${opts(MEDITATION_SOUNDSCAPES, 'none')}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="medBell">Interval bell</label>
            <select id="medBell">${opts(MEDITATION_BELL_INTERVALS, 0)}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn primary" id="medStartBtn">begin</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="medActive" style="display:none">
          <div class="med-status">
            <span class="med-time" id="medTimeRemaining">00:00</span>
            <span class="med-label" id="medPhaseLabel">running</span>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-actions">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="medCancelBtn">end</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _medModalEl = wrap;
    $('medCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === wrap && !_medRunning) wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    $('medStartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', startMeditationTimer);
    $('medCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', endMeditationTimer);
    return wrap;
  }

  function _formatMedTime(ms) {
    const totalSec = Math.max(0, Math.round(ms / 1000));
    const mm = Math.floor(totalSec / 60);
    const ss = totalSec % 60;
    return `${mm.toString().padStart(2,'0')}:${ss.toString().padStart(2,'0')}`;
  }

  function _ringMedBell() {
    try {
      if (!_medBell) {
        const Ctx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
        if (!Ctx) return;
        _medBell = { ctx: new Ctx() };
      }
      const ctx = _medBell.ctx;
      const t0 = ctx.currentTime;
      const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
      const gain = ctx.createGain();
      osc.type = 'sine';
      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(880, t0);
      osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(440, t0 + 1.6);
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, t0);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.18, t0 + 0.02);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, t0 + 2.5);
      osc.connect(gain).connect(ctx.destination);
      osc.start(t0);
      osc.stop(t0 + 2.6);
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[med-bell]', e); }
  }

  async function startMeditationTimer() {
    const dur = parseInt($('medDuration')?.value || '10', 10);
    const ss  = $('medSoundscape')?.value || 'none';
    const bellMin = parseInt($('medBell')?.value || '0', 10);
    if (!Number.isFinite(dur) || dur <= 0) return;
    _medDurationMs   = dur * 60 * 1000;
    _medBellEveryMs  = bellMin > 0 ? bellMin * 60 * 1000 : 0;
    _medStartedAt    = Date.now();
    _medLastBellAt   = _medStartedAt;
    _medRunning      = true;
    state._medMode   = true;
    state._medStartedAt = _medStartedAt;
    state._medDurationMs = _medDurationMs;

    $('medSetup').style.display  = 'none';
    $('medActive').style.display = '';
    $('medTimeRemaining').textContent = _formatMedTime(_medDurationMs);

    try {
      if (ss && ss !== 'none' && typeof drone !== 'undefined' && drone.start) {
        state.soundscape = ss;
        state.droneEnabled = true;
        await drone.start(ss);
      }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[med] soundscape start failed:', e); }

    _medInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if (!_medRunning) return;
      const now = Date.now();
      const elapsed = now - _medStartedAt;
      const remaining = _medDurationMs - elapsed;
      const tEl = $('medTimeRemaining');
      if (tEl) tEl.textContent = _formatMedTime(Math.max(0, remaining));

      if (_medBellEveryMs > 0 && elapsed >= _medBellEveryMs && (now - _medLastBellAt) >= _medBellEveryMs - 500) {
        _ringMedBell();
        _medLastBellAt = now;
      }
      if (remaining <= 0) {

        _ringMedBell();
        endMeditationTimer(true);
      }
    }, 200);
    notify.info(`Meditation timer started — ${dur} minutes.`);
  }

  async function endMeditationTimer(completed = false) {
    if (!_medRunning) {

      _medModalEl?.classList.remove('visible');
      return;
    }
    _medRunning = false;
    state._medMode = false;
    if (_medInterval) { clearInterval(_medInterval); _medInterval = null; }
    try { if (typeof drone !== 'undefined' && drone.stop) await drone.stop(); } catch {}

    try {
      const elapsedMs = Date.now() - _medStartedAt;
      const minutes   = Math.max(1, Math.round(elapsedMs / 60000));
      const record = {
        date: _medStartedAt,
        guide:  'silent',
        method: 'meditation',
        length: 'custom',
        completed: completed,
        mode: 'meditation',
        durationMin: minutes,
        soundscape: state.soundscape || 'none',
        intention: 'trance',
      };
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      history.unshift(record);
      while (history.length > 500) history.pop();

      if (typeof _writeHistoryCompact === 'function') await _writeHistoryCompact(history);
      else await idbSet('stillness_history_v1', history);
      sdLog('meditation timer recorded', { minutes, completed });
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[med] record failed:', e); }

    if (_medModalEl) {
      _medModalEl.classList.remove('visible');
      const setupEl  = _medModalEl.querySelector('#medSetup');
      const activeEl = _medModalEl.querySelector('#medActive');
      if (setupEl)  setupEl.style.display  = '';
      if (activeEl) activeEl.style.display = 'none';
    }

    if (typeof renderSidebarStats === 'function') {
      try { renderSidebarStats(); } catch {}
    }
    if (completed) notify.success('Meditation complete.');
    else notify.info('Meditation ended.');
  }

  function openMeditationModal() { _ensureMedModal().classList.add('visible'); }
  $('meditationBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openMeditationModal);

  $('meditationCard')?.addEventListener('click', openMeditationModal);

  const POWER_NAP_DURATIONS = [
    { value: 15, label: '15 minutes' },
    { value: 20, label: '20 minutes' },
    { value: 25, label: '25 minutes' },
  ];

  function _buildPowerNapPrompt(duration) {

    return `You are writing a ${duration}-minute power nap session script in Ericksonian style. The user lies down, descends into a brief restorative trance, and wakes refreshed and alert.

Use these phase markers EXACTLY (uppercase, three equals on each side):

===SETTLING===
60 seconds, ~50 words. Gentle settling. The body finds its position. Eyes close. One or two slow breaths.

===INDUCTION===
90 seconds, ~80 words. Permissive Ericksonian language: "you might notice", "perhaps allowing", "as you continue to…". Body softens, awareness narrows. End with the user "drifting toward a quieter inner space".

===DEEPENER===
60 seconds, ~50 words. A single short staircase or count-down (5 to 1, or "deeper, and deeper still"). End at "the deepest comfortable rest".

===WORK===
This is the nap itself — about ${duration - 5} minutes of mostly silence. Write only ~40 short anchoring lines spread across many [PAUSE N] markers (N in seconds, between 60 and 180). The lines should be sparse, spacious, drifting. Examples:
  "Resting completely now. [PAUSE 120]"
  "Nothing to do. Nothing to think. [PAUSE 150]"
  "The body, knowing exactly what it needs. [PAUSE 180]"
The total run time of this phase including pauses must be ~${duration - 5} minutes.

===LIGHTENER===
40 seconds, ~30 words. The first hint of returning. Beginning to feel the surroundings again. Color and light returning to awareness.

===WAKE===
60 seconds, ~80 words. Alarm-style — clear, energizing, brisk. NOT a gentle drift. Direct language: "fully alert", "feel refreshed", "energy returning to every muscle", "ready and clear". The user has things to do. Count up 1 to 5 and have them open their eyes at 5.

===REINTRODUCTION===
30 seconds, ~30 words. Fully awake and oriented. Notice the room. Feel the alertness. Brief. Productive.

CRITICAL:
- Use [PAUSE N] markers (square brackets) for silences, where N is seconds. Don't use ellipsis or "..." for pauses — only [PAUSE N].
- Do NOT include any header, preamble, or commentary. Output starts with ===SETTLING=== and ends with the last reintroduction word.
- Do NOT write "twenty minutes" inside the script — just write the content for each phase.

Begin:`;
  }

  function _buildSleepStoryPrompt(theme, durationMin) {
    return `You are writing a ${durationMin}-minute bedtime sleep story on the theme: "${theme}".

STYLE:
- Pure descriptive narrative. Present tense. Second-person ("you walk along...") OR third-person observer ("the path winds...").
- ABSOLUTELY NO induction language. NEVER say "feel your body", "notice your breath", "relax your shoulders", "you may", "allowing yourself to", or anything else that sounds like hypnosis or guided meditation.
- ABSOLUTELY NO trance language. No "deeper", no "going down", no "letting go" instructions.
- Just describe the scene unfolding — slowly, sensory-rich early, sparser as time passes.
- The arc gradually winds down: vivid sensory detail in early phases, longer pauses and quieter description toward the end, fading into stillness at the close.
- Don't moralize, don't have characters speak about emotions, don't conclude with a lesson. Just the scene.

Use these phase markers EXACTLY:

===SETTLING===
30 seconds, ~30 words. Open the scene. Set mood with one vivid detail.

===WORK===
This is the story body — split it into 3-4 chunks within this single section, each separated by a [PAUSE N] marker (N in seconds, 8-30). Each chunk is roughly 60-100 words. Across the chunks:
  - First chunk: rich sensory detail. Sights, textures, ambient sounds.
  - Each subsequent chunk: less detail, more drift. Shorter sentences.
  - Final chunk: very sparse. Almost just imagery — "the moonlight, the soft creak of the oak". End on a still image.
The total work runtime should be about ${durationMin - 1} minutes including pauses.

===LIGHTENER===
20 seconds, ~15 words. One last quiet image. Stillness settling in.

CRITICAL:
- Use [PAUSE N] markers in square brackets, N in seconds.
- NO ===WAKE=== or ===REINTRODUCTION=== — this is sleep-intent, the user drifts off.
- Do NOT include header, preamble, or commentary. Output starts with ===SETTLING=== and ends mid-sentence or with a still image.

Begin:`;
  }

  function _showAiModeLoading(modal, label = 'Generating your script — about 10–20 seconds.') {
    const setupEl = modal.querySelector('.ai-mode-setup');
    const loadEl  = modal.querySelector('.ai-mode-loading');
    if (setupEl) setupEl.style.display = 'none';
    if (loadEl)  {
      loadEl.style.display = '';
      const status = loadEl.querySelector('.ai-mode-status');
      if (status) status.textContent = label;
    }
  }
  function _resetAiModeModal(modal) {
    const setupEl = modal.querySelector('.ai-mode-setup');
    const loadEl  = modal.querySelector('.ai-mode-loading');
    if (setupEl) setupEl.style.display = '';
    if (loadEl)  loadEl.style.display = 'none';
  }

  let _powerNapModalEl = null;
  function _ensurePowerNapModal() {
    if (_powerNapModalEl) return _powerNapModalEl;
    const opts = (arr, sel) => arr.map(o =>
      `<option value="${escapeHtml(String(o.value))}"${o.value === sel ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(o.label)}</option>`
    ).join('');
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'powerNapModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
        <div class="ai-mode-setup">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Power Nap</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="powerNapCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
          </div>
          <div class="oq-intro" style="border-left-color:var(--neon-purple);background:rgba(185,120,224,0.04)">
            Hypnosis-style power nap. Soft descent, brief deep rest, then a clear wake — you come back energized, not groggy. AI generates a fresh script per session.
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="powerNapDuration">Duration</label>
            <select id="powerNapDuration">${opts(POWER_NAP_DURATIONS, 20)}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="powerNapSoundscape">Soundscape</label>
            <select id="powerNapSoundscape">${opts(MEDITATION_SOUNDSCAPES, 'rain')}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn primary" id="powerNapStartBtn">begin</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-mode-loading" style="display:none">
          <div class="ai-mode-spinner"></div>
          <div>Writing your power nap session…</div>
          <div class="ai-mode-status">Generating your script — about 10–20 seconds.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _powerNapModalEl = wrap;
    $('powerNapCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { wrap.classList.remove('visible'); _resetAiModeModal(wrap); });
    wrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === wrap) { wrap.classList.remove('visible'); _resetAiModeModal(wrap); }
    });
    $('powerNapStartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', startPowerNap);
    return wrap;
  }

  async function startPowerNap() {
    const dur = parseInt($('powerNapDuration')?.value || '20', 10);
    const soundscape = $('powerNapSoundscape')?.value || 'rain';
    if (!Number.isFinite(dur) || dur <= 0) return;
    const modal = _powerNapModalEl;
    _showAiModeLoading(modal, `Writing a ${dur}-minute power nap script…`);
    try {
      const prompt = _buildPowerNapPrompt(dur);
      const data = await aiGenerate(prompt, {
        source: 'power-nap',
        maxTokens: 4096,
      });
      if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error' || !data.generatedText) {
        throw new Error(data?._note || 'empty AI response');
      }
      const script = data.generatedText.trim();

      if (!/===\s*SETTLING\s*===/i.test(script) || !/===\s*WORK\s*===/i.test(script) || !/===\s*WAKE\s*===/i.test(script)) {
        throw new Error('AI returned an incomplete script structure');
      }
      modal.classList.remove('visible');
      _resetAiModeModal(modal);

      _launchAiModeSession({
        kind: 'power-nap',
        script,
        persona: 'therapist',
        method: 'ericksonian',
        length: dur >= 25 ? 'medium' : 'short',
        soundscape,
        intention: 'release',
        vizOverride: 'aurora',
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[power-nap] generation failed:', e);
      notify.error('Power nap generation failed — try again, or check your AI provider settings.');
      _resetAiModeModal(modal);
    }
  }

  function openPowerNapModal() { _ensurePowerNapModal().classList.add('visible'); }

  $('powerNapCard')?.addEventListener('click', openPowerNapModal);

  const SLEEP_STORY_THEMES = [
    { value: 'forest-cabin',     label: '🌲 forest cabin in early autumn',  soundscape: 'rain' },
    { value: 'ocean-cottage',    label: '🌊 cottage by a quiet ocean',      soundscape: 'ocean' },
    { value: 'train-night',      label: '🚂 night train through countryside', soundscape: 'train' },
    { value: 'mountain-village', label: '⛰ snowy mountain village at dusk', soundscape: 'fire' },
    { value: 'old-library',      label: '📚 old library on a rainy night',  soundscape: 'rain' },
    { value: 'walled-garden',    label: '🌿 walled garden in summer',       soundscape: 'forest' },
    { value: 'lighthouse',       label: '🗼 lighthouse keeper\'s evening',  soundscape: 'ocean' },
    { value: 'desert-camp',      label: '🏜 desert camp under starlight',   soundscape: 'drone' },
    { value: 'river-boat',       label: '⛵ slow river boat at dawn',       soundscape: 'underwater' },
  ];
  const SLEEP_STORY_DURATIONS = [
    { value: 15, label: '15 minutes' },
    { value: 20, label: '20 minutes' },
    { value: 30, label: '30 minutes' },
  ];

  let _sleepStoryModalEl = null;
  function _ensureSleepStoryModal() {
    if (_sleepStoryModalEl) return _sleepStoryModalEl;
    const opts = (arr, sel) => arr.map(o =>
      `<option value="${escapeHtml(String(o.value))}"${o.value === sel ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(o.label)}</option>`
    ).join('');
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'sleepStoryModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
        <div class="ai-mode-setup">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:10px">
            <h2 style="margin:0;font-size:1.05rem">Sleep Story</h2>
            <button class="btn secondary" id="sleepStoryCloseBtn" style="padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.74rem">close</button>
          </div>
          <div class="oq-intro" style="border-left-color:var(--neon-purple);background:rgba(185,120,224,0.04)">
            Pure narrative — no induction language, no suggestions. Just a scene unfolding slowly, winding down to silence. Drifts off rather than ending.
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="sleepStoryTheme">Theme</label>
            <select id="sleepStoryTheme">${opts(SLEEP_STORY_THEMES, 'forest-cabin')}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="sleepStoryDuration">Duration</label>
            <select id="sleepStoryDuration">${opts(SLEEP_STORY_DURATIONS, 20)}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="med-row">
            <label for="sleepStorySoundscape">Soundscape</label>
            <select id="sleepStorySoundscape">${opts([{value:'auto',label:'auto (matches theme)'}, ...MEDITATION_SOUNDSCAPES], 'auto')}</select>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
            <button class="btn primary" id="sleepStoryStartBtn">begin</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-mode-loading" style="display:none">
          <div class="ai-mode-spinner"></div>
          <div>Writing your sleep story…</div>
          <div class="ai-mode-status">Generating — about 15–25 seconds.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _sleepStoryModalEl = wrap;
    $('sleepStoryCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { wrap.classList.remove('visible'); _resetAiModeModal(wrap); });
    wrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === wrap) { wrap.classList.remove('visible'); _resetAiModeModal(wrap); }
    });
    $('sleepStoryStartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', startSleepStory);
    return wrap;
  }

  async function startSleepStory() {
    const themeKey = $('sleepStoryTheme')?.value || 'forest-cabin';
    const dur = parseInt($('sleepStoryDuration')?.value || '20', 10);
    const ssChoice = $('sleepStorySoundscape')?.value || 'auto';
    const theme = SLEEP_STORY_THEMES.find(t => t.value === themeKey);
    if (!theme) return;
    const soundscape = ssChoice === 'auto' ? (theme.soundscape || 'rain') : ssChoice;
    const themeText = theme.label.replace(/^[^\sA-Za-z]+\s*/, '');
    const modal = _sleepStoryModalEl;
    _showAiModeLoading(modal, `Writing a ${dur}-minute story about ${themeText.toLowerCase()}…`);
    try {
      const prompt = _buildSleepStoryPrompt(themeText, dur);
      const data = await aiGenerate(prompt, {
        source: 'sleep-story',
        maxTokens: 4096,
      });
      if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error' || !data.generatedText) {
        throw new Error(data?._note || 'empty AI response');
      }
      const script = data.generatedText.trim();
      if (!/===\s*SETTLING\s*===/i.test(script) || !/===\s*WORK\s*===/i.test(script)) {
        throw new Error('AI returned an incomplete script structure');
      }
      modal.classList.remove('visible');
      _resetAiModeModal(modal);
      _launchAiModeSession({
        kind: 'sleep-story',
        script,
        persona: 'old-master',
        method: 'ericksonian',
        length: dur >= 25 ? 'long' : 'medium',
        soundscape,
        intention: 'sleep',
        vizOverride: 'aurora',
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[sleep-story] generation failed:', e);
      notify.error('Sleep story generation failed — try again, or check your AI provider settings.');
      _resetAiModeModal(modal);
    }
  }

  function openSleepStoryModal() { _ensureSleepStoryModal().classList.add('visible'); }

  $('sleepStoryCard')?.addEventListener('click', openSleepStoryModal);

  function _launchAiModeSession(cfg) {
    if (!cfg || !cfg.script) return;
    if (state._cooldownUntil && Date.now() < state._cooldownUntil) {
      const remaining = (typeof getEmergencyCooldownRemaining === 'function')
        ? getEmergencyCooldownRemaining() : null;
      notify.warn(remaining
        ? `Please wait ${remaining}s before starting another session.`
        : 'Please wait a moment before starting another session.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      state.selectedPersonaId = cfg.persona;
      state.selectedMethodId  = cfg.method;
      state.length            = cfg.length;
      state.soundscape        = cfg.soundscape;
      state.droneEnabled      = cfg.soundscape !== 'none';
      state.intentionType     = cfg.intention;
      if (cfg.vizOverride) state.vizOverride = cfg.vizOverride;
      state._phaseExtras      = [];
      state._sessionMode      = cfg.kind;
      state._sessionModeAt    = Date.now();
      const lengthSel = $('lengthSelect');     if (lengthSel) lengthSel.value = cfg.length;
      const ssSelect  = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect)  ssSelect.value  = cfg.soundscape;
      const vizSel    = $('vizSelect');        if (vizSel && cfg.vizOverride) vizSel.value = cfg.vizOverride;
      const intSel    = $('intentionType');    if (intSel)    intSel.value    = cfg.intention;
      const stEl = $('scriptText'); if (stEl) stEl.value = cfg.script;
      state.fullScript   = cfg.script;
      state.parsedScript = parseScript(cfg.script);
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = state.parsedScript?.ordered || [];
      state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: true, 6: false };
      $('sidebar')?.classList.remove('open');
      $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');
      if (typeof renderPersonaGrid   === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
      if (typeof renderPersonaDetail === 'function') renderPersonaDetail();
      if (typeof renderMethodGrid    === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
      if (typeof renderMethodDetail  === 'function') renderMethodDetail();
      if (typeof updateIntentionHint === 'function') updateIntentionHint();
      if (typeof showScript          === 'function') showScript();
      startSession();
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[ai-mode] launch failed:', e);
      notify.error('Could not start the session — try again or use the wizard.');
    }
  }

  const GLOSSARY = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.GLOSSARY) || [];

  const _GLOSS_LC = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(GLOSSARY).map(([k, v]) => [k.toLowerCase(), v]));

  let _glossPopoverEl = null;
  let _glossDismissTimer = null;
  function _ensureGlossPopover() {
    if (_glossPopoverEl) return _glossPopoverEl;
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'gloss-popover';
    el.id = 'glossPopover';
    el.setAttribute('role', 'tooltip');
    el.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
    document.body.appendChild(el);
    _glossPopoverEl = el;
    return el;
  }
  function _showGlossPopover(target, key) {
    const def = _GLOSS_LC[String(key || '').toLowerCase()];
    if (!def) return;
    clearTimeout(_glossDismissTimer);
    const pop = _ensureGlossPopover();
    const termLabel = target.textContent?.trim().slice(0, 60) || key;
    pop.innerHTML = `
      <div class="gloss-term-title">${escapeHtml(termLabel)}</div>
      <div class="gloss-defn">${escapeHtml(def)}</div>
    `;

    const r = target.getBoundingClientRect();
    pop.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    pop.classList.add('visible');
    const pw = pop.offsetWidth, ph = pop.offsetHeight;
    let left = r.left + r.width / 2 - pw / 2;
    let top = r.top - ph - 8;
    if (top < 8) top = r.bottom + 8;
    if (left < 8) left = 8;
    if (left + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) left = window.innerWidth - pw - 8;
    pop.style.left = left + 'px';
    pop.style.top = top + 'px';
    pop.style.visibility = '';
  }
  function _hideGlossPopover() {
    if (!_glossPopoverEl) return;
    _glossPopoverEl.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  document.addEventListener('mouseover', (e) => {
    const t = e.target.closest?.('.gloss-term');
    if (t) _showGlossPopover(t, t.dataset.gloss);
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseout', (e) => {
    const t = e.target.closest?.('.gloss-term');
    if (t) _glossDismissTimer = setTimeout(_hideGlossPopover, 200);
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const t = e.target.closest?.('.gloss-term');
    if (t) {
      e.preventDefault();
      const pop = _ensureGlossPopover();
      const same = pop.classList.contains('visible') && pop.dataset.activeKey === t.dataset.gloss;
      if (same) { _hideGlossPopover(); pop.dataset.activeKey = ''; return; }
      pop.dataset.activeKey = t.dataset.gloss;
      _showGlossPopover(t, t.dataset.gloss);
    } else if (_glossPopoverEl?.classList.contains('visible')
               && !e.target.closest?.('.gloss-popover')) {
      _hideGlossPopover();
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && _glossPopoverEl?.classList.contains('visible')) _hideGlossPopover();
  });

  function _validateUsername(username) {
    if (!username) return 'Username required.';
    if (username.length < 3) return 'Username must be at least 3 characters.';
    if (username.length > 24) return 'Username must be 24 characters or less.';
    if (!/^[a-z0-9_]+$/.test(username)) return 'Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.';
    return null;
  }
  function _validatePassword(password) {
    if (!password) return 'Password required.';
    if (password.length < 8) return 'Password must be at least 8 characters.';
    if (password.length > 200) return 'Password too long.';
    return null;
  }

  async function cloudSignUp(username, password, displayName) {
    username = (username || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const usernameErr = _validateUsername(username);
    if (usernameErr) { notify.warn(usernameErr); return false; }
    const passErr = _validatePassword(password);
    if (passErr) { notify.warn(passErr); return false; }
    try {
      const existing = await cloudDB.get('hne_users', 200, false);
      if (existing.some(u => (u.username || '').toLowerCase() === username)) {
        notify.warn(`Username "${username}" is taken — try another.`);
        return false;
      }
      const { hash, salt } = await _hashPassword(password);
      const record = {
        username,
        passHash: hash,
        salt,
        displayName: (displayName || username).slice(0, 40),
        createdAt: Date.now(),
      };
      const res = await cloudDB.add('hne_users', record);
      if (!res || res.error) { notify.error('Sign-up failed: ' + (res?.error || 'network')); return false; }
      const id = res.id || res._id || res.data?.id || res.data?._id;
      if (!id) { notify.error('Sign-up returned no record id.'); return false; }
      _setCloudUser({ id, username, displayName: record.displayName });
      cloudDB.clearCache('hne_users');
      notify.success(`Welcome, ${record.displayName}.`);
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[cloudSignUp]', e);
      notify.error('Sign-up failed: ' + e.message);
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function cloudSignIn(username, password) {
    username = (username || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!username || !password) { notify.warn('Username and password required.'); return false; }
    try {
      const users = await cloudDB.get('hne_users', 500, false);
      const found = users.find(u => (u.username || '').toLowerCase() === username);
      if (!found) { notify.warn('No account with that username.'); return false; }
      if (!found.salt || !found.passHash) {
        notify.error('Account record is malformed — contact support.');
        return false;
      }
      const { hash } = await _hashPassword(password, found.salt);
      if (hash !== found.passHash) { notify.warn('Incorrect password.'); return false; }
      _setCloudUser({
        id: found.id,
        username: found.username,
        displayName: found.displayName || found.username,
      });
      notify.success(`Welcome back, ${found.displayName || found.username}.`);
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[cloudSignIn]', e);
      notify.error('Sign-in failed: ' + e.message);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function cloudSignOut() {
    _stopPresenceBeacon();
    _clearCloudUser();
    notify.info('Signed out.');
  }

  async function cloudUploadContent(kind, name, payload) {
    if (!state.cloudUser) { notify.warn('Sign in to upload.'); return null; }
    const safeName = String(name || 'untitled').slice(0, 100);
    const record = {
      userId: state.cloudUser.id,
      username: state.cloudUser.username,
      kind: String(kind || 'misc').slice(0, 20),
      name: safeName,
      payload: typeof payload === 'string' ? payload : JSON.stringify(payload),
      updatedAt: Date.now(),
    };

    if (record.payload.length > 500_000) {
      notify.warn('Content too large to upload (>500 KB). Try a smaller item.');
      return null;
    }
    const res = await cloudDB.add('hne_user_content', record);
    if (!res || res.error) { notify.error('Upload failed: ' + (res?.error || 'network')); return null; }
    cloudDB.clearCache('hne_user_content');
    notify.success(`Uploaded ${kind}: ${safeName}`);

    if (typeof markFeatureUsed === 'function') {
      try { markFeatureUsed(FEAT.CLOUD_UPLOAD); } catch {}
    }
    return res.id || res._id || res.data?.id;
  }

  async function cloudListMyContent(kind = null) {
    if (!state.cloudUser) return [];
    const all = await cloudDB.get('hne_user_content', 500);
    return all.filter(r => r.userId === state.cloudUser.id && (!kind || r.kind === kind));
  }

  async function cloudDeleteContent(id) {
    if (!state.cloudUser) return false;
    const res = await cloudDB.delete('hne_user_content', id);
    cloudDB.clearCache('hne_user_content');
    return res && !res.error;
  }

  function renderCloudUserSlug() {
    const el = $('cloudUserSlug');
    if (!el) return;
    const u = state.cloudUser;
    if (!u) {
      el.innerHTML = `
        <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudSignInBtn" style="width:100%;font-size:0.78rem;padding:8px">
          👤 sign in / create account
        </button>
        <div id="cloudPresenceCount" class="cloud-presence-count" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-align:center"></div>
      `;
      $('cloudSignInBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openCloudSignInModal);
    } else {

      const avatarSvg = generateAvatarSvg(u.username || u.id || u.displayName || '?', 32);
      el.innerHTML = `
        <div class="cloud-user-card">
          <div class="cloud-user-avatar">${avatarSvg}</div>
          <div class="cloud-user-info">
            <div class="cloud-user-name">${escapeHtml(u.displayName || u.username)}</div>
            <div class="cloud-user-handle">@${escapeHtml(u.username)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="cloud-user-actions">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudMyContentBtn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.7rem;padding:6px">📁 my cloud</button>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudSignOutBtn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.7rem;padding:6px">sign out</button>
        </div>
        <div id="cloudPresenceCount" class="cloud-presence-count" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-align:center"></div>
      `;
      $('cloudMyContentBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openCloudContentModal);
      $('cloudSignOutBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (confirm('Sign out of cloud account? Local data stays on this device.')) cloudSignOut();
      });
    }
    _updatePresenceDisplay();
  }

  let _cloudSignInModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCloudSignInModal() {
    if (_cloudSignInModalEl) return _cloudSignInModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'cloudSignInModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:440px">
