        <h2>cloud account</h2>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:14px">
          Sign in to sync your guides, scripts, and settings across devices, and to comment in the community channel. Your password is hashed locally before being sent — the server never sees plaintext. <span style="color:var(--text-faint)">This is community-shared infrastructure (PerDB), not Anthropic-managed; treat anything you upload as semi-public.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cloud-tabs" style="display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)">
          <button type="button" class="cloud-tab active" data-tab="signin" style="flex:1;padding:10px;background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid var(--neon-cyan);font-size:0.82rem">sign in</button>
          <button type="button" class="cloud-tab" data-tab="signup" style="flex:1;padding:10px;background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--text-dim);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;font-size:0.82rem">create account</button>
        </div>
        <div id="cloudSignInPanel">
          <div class="pf-row"><label class="pf-label">Username</label><input type="text" id="cloudSignInUser" class="pf-input" maxlength="24" autocomplete="username" placeholder="lowercase, numbers, _"></div>
          <div class="pf-row"><label class="pf-label">Password</label><input type="password" id="cloudSignInPass" class="pf-input" autocomplete="current-password"></div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudSignInCancel">cancel</button>
            <button class="btn" id="cloudSignInGo">sign in</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="cloudSignUpPanel" style="display:none">
          <div class="pf-row"><label class="pf-label">Username</label><input type="text" id="cloudSignUpUser" class="pf-input" maxlength="24" autocomplete="username" placeholder="3-24 chars, a-z 0-9 _"></div>
          <div class="pf-row"><label class="pf-label">Display name (optional)</label><input type="text" id="cloudSignUpDisplay" class="pf-input" maxlength="40" placeholder="(defaults to username)"></div>
          <div class="pf-row"><label class="pf-label">Password</label><input type="password" id="cloudSignUpPass" class="pf-input" autocomplete="new-password" placeholder="8+ chars"></div>
          <div class="sublabel" style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:-4px">Use a strong, unique password. There is no password recovery — losing it means losing the account.</div>
          <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
            <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudSignUpCancel">cancel</button>
            <button class="btn" id="cloudSignUpGo">create account</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _cloudSignInModalEl = wrap;

    wrap.querySelectorAll('.cloud-tab').forEach(t => {
      t.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const tab = t.dataset.tab;
        wrap.querySelectorAll('.cloud-tab').forEach(x => {
          const active = x.dataset.tab === tab;
          x.classList.toggle('active', active);
          x.style.color = active ? 'var(--text)' : 'var(--text-dim)';
          x.style.borderBottomColor = active ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'transparent';
        });
        $('cloudSignInPanel').style.display = (tab === 'signin') ? '' : 'none';
        $('cloudSignUpPanel').style.display = (tab === 'signup') ? '' : 'none';
      });
    });

    $('cloudSignInGo').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const u = $('cloudSignInUser').value;
      const p = $('cloudSignInPass').value;
      setLoading('cloudSignInGo', true);
      try {
        const ok = await cloudSignIn(u, p);
        if (ok) closeCloudSignInModal();
      } finally { setLoading('cloudSignInGo', false, 'sign in'); }
    });

    $('cloudSignUpGo').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const u = $('cloudSignUpUser').value;
      const d = $('cloudSignUpDisplay').value;
      const p = $('cloudSignUpPass').value;
      setLoading('cloudSignUpGo', true);
      try {
        const ok = await cloudSignUp(u, p, d);
        if (ok) closeCloudSignInModal();
      } finally { setLoading('cloudSignUpGo', false, 'create account'); }
    });
    $('cloudSignInCancel').addEventListener('click', closeCloudSignInModal);
    $('cloudSignUpCancel').addEventListener('click', closeCloudSignInModal);
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'cloudSignInModal') closeCloudSignInModal();
    });

    ['cloudSignInPass'].forEach(id => $(id)?.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') $('cloudSignInGo').click();
    }));
    ['cloudSignUpPass'].forEach(id => $(id)?.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') $('cloudSignUpGo').click();
    }));
    return wrap;
  }
  function openCloudSignInModal() {
    _ensureCloudSignInModal().classList.add('visible');
    setTimeout(() => $('cloudSignInUser')?.focus(), 50);
  }
  function closeCloudSignInModal() {
    if (_cloudSignInModalEl) _cloudSignInModalEl.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  let _cloudContentModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCloudContentModal() {
    if (_cloudContentModalEl) return _cloudContentModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'cloudContentModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:600px">
        <h2>my cloud content</h2>
        <div id="cloudContentHeader" style="margin-bottom:12px"></div>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px">
          Items you've uploaded from this app. Use the buttons in each panel (saved scripts, custom personas, settings) to upload new items.
        </div>
        <div id="cloudContentList" style="max-height:55vh;overflow:auto"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="cloudContentRefresh">refresh</button>
          <button class="btn" id="cloudContentClose">done</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _cloudContentModalEl = wrap;
    $('cloudContentClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    $('cloudContentRefresh').addEventListener('click', () => _renderCloudContentList());
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'cloudContentModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    return wrap;
  }
  async function _renderCloudContentList() {
    const list = $('cloudContentList');
    if (!list) return;

    const header = $('cloudContentHeader');
    if (header && state.cloudUser) {
      const u = state.cloudUser;
      const avatarSvg = generateAvatarSvg(u.username || u.id || u.displayName || '?');
      header.innerHTML = `
        <div class="cloud-user-card">
          <div class="cloud-user-avatar">${avatarSvg}</div>
          <div class="cloud-user-info">
            <div class="cloud-user-name">${escapeHtml(u.displayName || u.username)}</div>
            <div class="cloud-user-handle">@${escapeHtml(u.username)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>`;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:20px">loading…</div>';
    cloudDB.clearCache('hne_user_content');
    const items = await cloudListMyContent();
    if (!items.length) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:20px">No cloud content yet. Upload from the Saved Scripts panel, the Persona editor, or via "back up settings".</div>';
      return;
    }
    items.sort((a, b) => (b.updatedAt || 0) - (a.updatedAt || 0));
    const ICON = { script: '📝', persona: '🧠', settings: '⚙', guide: '📖' };

    list.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
      <div class="cloud-item" style="padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <div style="font-size:1.4rem">${ICON[item.kind] || '📄'}</div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:120px">
          <div style="font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint)">${escapeHtml(item.kind)} · ${new Date(item.updatedAt || 0).toLocaleString()}</div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn secondary cloud-item-import" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem" title="Add this back into your local library">↓ import</button>
        <button class="btn secondary cloud-item-dl" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem" title="Download as a file">file</button>
        <button class="btn secondary icon sm cloud-item-del" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="color:#f87171" title="Delete from cloud">×</button>
      </div>
    `).join('');
    list.querySelectorAll('.cloud-item-import').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', async e => {
      const id = e.target.dataset.id;
      const item = items.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (!item) return;
      await _importCloudItemToLocal(item);
    }));
    list.querySelectorAll('.cloud-item-dl').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', async e => {
      const id = e.target.dataset.id;
      const item = items.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (!item) return;
      _downloadCloudItem(item);
    }));
    list.querySelectorAll('.cloud-item-del').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', async e => {
      const id = e.target.dataset.id;
      if (!confirm('Delete this item from cloud? This cannot be undone.')) return;
      const ok = await cloudDeleteContent(id);
      if (ok) { notify.success('Deleted.'); _renderCloudContentList(); }
      else notify.error('Delete failed.');
    }));
  }
  function _downloadCloudItem(item) {
    const blob = new Blob([item.payload], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const ext = item.kind === 'script' ? 'txt' : 'json';
    a.download = `${item.name.replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/gi, '_')}.${ext}`;
    a.click();
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 4000);
    notify.success(`Downloaded: ${item.name}`);
  }

  async function _importCloudItemToLocal(item) {
    if (!item || !item.payload) { notify.error('Item has no payload.'); return; }
    try {
      if (item.kind === 'script') {
        const data = JSON.parse(item.payload);
        const existing = (await idbGet('stillness_saved_scripts_v1')) || [];

        const collision = existing.find(e => (e.name || '').toLowerCase() === (data.name || '').toLowerCase());
        if (collision) {
          if (!confirm(`A script named "${data.name}" already exists locally. Replace it?`)) return;
        }
        const filtered = collision ? existing.filter(e => e.id !== collision.id) : existing;
        const newEntry = {
          id: collision?.id || ('script_' + Date.now()),
          name: data.name || item.name,
          script: data.script || '',
          sourceMeta: data.sourceMeta || {},
          savedAt: data.savedAt || Date.now(),
        };
        await idbSet('stillness_saved_scripts_v1', [newEntry, ...filtered]);
        if (typeof renderSavedScripts === 'function') renderSavedScripts();
        notify.success(`Imported script: ${newEntry.name}`);
      } else if (item.kind === 'persona') {
        const data = JSON.parse(item.payload);
        if (!data.name || !data.systemPrompt) { notify.error('Persona payload missing required fields.'); return; }
        const existing = loadCustomPersonas();
        const dup = existing.find(p => p.id === data.id);
        if (dup) {
          if (!confirm(`A persona with id "${data.id}" already exists. Replace it?`)) return;
          saveCustomPersonas(existing.filter(p => p.id !== data.id).concat([data]));
        } else {
          saveCustomPersonas([...existing, data]);
        }
        refreshPersonas();
        if (typeof renderPersonaGrid === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
        notify.success(`Imported persona: ${data.name}`);
      } else if (item.kind === 'settings') {
        if (!confirm('Replace your current settings with the cloud snapshot? Your active session config will be overwritten.')) return;
        const snap = JSON.parse(item.payload);

        if (snap.settings) {
          const merged = normalizeSettings({ ..._buildSettingsObj(), ...normalizeSettings(snap.settings) });
          try { localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_KEY, JSON.stringify(merged)); } catch {}
          await loadUserSettings();
          notify.success('Settings restored from cloud snapshot.');
        } else {
          notify.warn('Settings snapshot has no settings field.');
        }
      } else {

        notify.info(`Unknown kind "${item.kind}" — downloading as file instead.`);
        _downloadCloudItem(item);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[importCloudItem]', e);
      notify.error('Import failed: ' + (e.message || 'invalid payload'));
    }
  }
  function openCloudContentModal() {
    _ensureCloudContentModal().classList.add('visible');
    _renderCloudContentList();
  }

  function _startPresenceBeacon() {
    if (!state.cloudUser) return;
    _stopPresenceBeacon();
    _sendPresence();
    state._presenceTimer = setInterval(_sendPresence, PRESENCE_HEARTBEAT_MS);
    _refreshPresenceCount();
    state._presencePollTimer = setInterval(_refreshPresenceCount, PRESENCE_POLL_MS);
  }
  function _stopPresenceBeacon() {
    if (state._presenceTimer) { clearInterval(state._presenceTimer); state._presenceTimer = null; }
    if (state._presencePollTimer) { clearInterval(state._presencePollTimer); state._presencePollTimer = null; }
    state._presenceCount = 0;
    _updatePresenceDisplay();
  }
  async function _sendPresence() {
    if (!state.cloudUser) return;

    if (typeof document !== 'undefined' && document.hidden) return;
    try {

      await cloudDB.add('hne_presence', {
        userId: state.cloudUser.id,
        username: state.cloudUser.username,
        lastSeen: Date.now(),
      });
    } catch (e) {  }
  }
  async function _refreshPresenceCount() {
    try {
      cloudDB.clearCache('hne_presence');
      const recent = await cloudDB.get('hne_presence', 200, false);
      const cutoff = Date.now() - PRESENCE_WINDOW_MS;
      const distinctUsers = new Set();
      for (const r of recent) {
        if ((r.lastSeen || 0) >= cutoff && r.userId) distinctUsers.add(r.userId);
      }
      state._presenceCount = distinctUsers.size;
      _updatePresenceDisplay();
    } catch (e) {  }
  }
  function _updatePresenceDisplay() {
    const el = $('cloudPresenceCount');
    if (!el) return;
    if (!state.cloudUser) {
      el.textContent = '';
      return;
    }
    const n = state._presenceCount || 1;
    el.textContent = n === 1 ? '🟢 just you online right now' : `🟢 ${n} active in last 90s`;
  }

  let _commentsModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCommentsModal() {
    if (_commentsModalEl) return _commentsModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'commentsModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:640px;max-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">
          <h2 style="margin:0">community</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="commentsClose" style="padding:4px 12px">close</button>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.5">
          Public comments channel — anyone using HNE sees these. Be kind. <span style="color:var(--text-faint)">This is the perchance comments plugin; messages are persistent and moderated by Perchance. Don't share session content here unless you want it public.</span>
        </div>
        <div id="commentsHost" style="overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:8px"></div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _commentsModalEl = wrap;
    $('commentsClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'commentsModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    return wrap;
  }
  let _commentsInstance = null;
  function _embedCommentsPlugin() {
    if (_commentsInstance) return;
    const host = $('commentsHost');
    if (!host) return;
    if (typeof root === 'undefined' || typeof root.commentsPlugin !== 'function') {
      host.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint)">Comments plugin not available — make sure commentsPlugin is imported in perchance_1.txt.</div>';
      return;
    }
    try {

      const opts = {
        channel: 'hne-public',
        channelLabel: '🌙 HNE community',
        width: '100%',
        height: 520,
        newestCommentsAtTop: true,
      };

      const result = root.commentsPlugin(opts);
      host.innerHTML = String(result);
      _commentsInstance = result;

      if (state.cloudUser) {
        _deferUntilCommentsIframeReady(host, () => {
          if (typeof result.setNicknameForNextComment === 'function') {
            try { result.setNicknameForNextComment(state.cloudUser.displayName || state.cloudUser.username); } catch {}
          }
          if (typeof result.setAvatarUrlForNextComment === 'function') {
            try {
              const avatarUri = generateAvatarDataUri(state.cloudUser.username || state.cloudUser.id);
              result.setAvatarUrlForNextComment(avatarUri);
            } catch {}
          }
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[comments embed]', e);
      host.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint)">Comments plugin failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message || 'unknown')}</div>`;
    }
  }

  function _deferUntilCommentsIframeReady(host, fn) {
    const deadline = Date.now() + 5000;
    let attached = false;
    const tryNow = () => {
      const iframe = host.querySelector('iframe');
      if (iframe) {

        if (!attached) {
          attached = true;
          iframe.addEventListener('load', () => {

            setTimeout(fn, 50);
          }, { once: true });

          try {
            if (iframe.contentDocument && iframe.contentDocument.readyState === 'complete') {
              setTimeout(fn, 50);
            }
          } catch {  }
        }
        return;
      }
      if (Date.now() < deadline) {
        setTimeout(tryNow, 100);
      }

    };
    tryNow();
  }
  function openCommentsModal() {
    _ensureCommentsModal().classList.add('visible');
    _embedCommentsPlugin();
    if (typeof markFeatureUsed === 'function') {
      try { markFeatureUsed(FEAT.COMMENTS); } catch {}
    }
  }

  const COMMUNITY_KINDS_ALLOWED = ['persona', 'script'];
  state._communityBrowser = {
    filter: 'all',
    search: '',
    items: [],
    loading: false,
  };

  async function fetchCommunityContent() {
    state._communityBrowser.loading = true;
    try {
      cloudDB.clearCache('hne_user_content');
      const all = await cloudDB.get('hne_user_content', 200, false);

      const filtered = (all || []).filter(r => r && COMMUNITY_KINDS_ALLOWED.includes(r.kind));
      filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.updatedAt || 0) - (a.updatedAt || 0));
      state._communityBrowser.items = filtered;
      return filtered;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[community] fetch failed:', e);
      state._communityBrowser.items = [];
      return [];
    } finally {
      state._communityBrowser.loading = false;
    }
  }

  let _communityBrowserModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCommunityBrowserModal() {
    if (_communityBrowserModalEl) return _communityBrowserModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'communityBrowserModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:720px;max-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">
          <h2 style="margin:0">community gallery</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary icon sm" id="communityBrowserClose" title="close">×</button>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.5">
          Browse Guides and Scripts uploaded by other practitioners. <span style="color:var(--text-faint)">Settings and personal data are never shown here. Items are user-authored — review before importing.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="community-controls" style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;align-items:center">
          <div class="timeline-filter-row" id="communityFilterRow" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px">
            <button class="timeline-chip active" data-filter="all" type="button">All</button>
            <button class="timeline-chip" data-filter="persona" type="button">Guides</button>
            <button class="timeline-chip" data-filter="script" type="button">Scripts</button>
          </div>
          <input type="text" id="communitySearchInput" placeholder="search by name or author…" style="flex:1;min-width:160px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:0.74rem;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-family:inherit">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="communityRefreshBtn" style="font-size:0.7rem;padding:5px 12px" title="refresh from server">↻</button>
        </div>
        <div id="communityResultCount" style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:6px"></div>
        <div id="communityList" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:6px"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:10px">
          <button class="btn" id="communityBrowserDone">close</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _communityBrowserModalEl = wrap;
    $('communityBrowserClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    $('communityBrowserDone').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'communityBrowserModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });

    wrap.querySelectorAll('#communityFilterRow .timeline-chip').forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        state._communityBrowser.filter = chip.dataset.filter || 'all';
        wrap.querySelectorAll('#communityFilterRow .timeline-chip').forEach(c => {
          c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.filter === state._communityBrowser.filter);
        });
        renderCommunityBrowser();
      });
    });

    let searchTimer = null;
    $('communitySearchInput').addEventListener('input', e => {
      clearTimeout(searchTimer);
      searchTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        state._communityBrowser.search = (e.target.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
        renderCommunityBrowser();
      }, 180);
    });
    $('communityRefreshBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      $('communityList').innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:30px">refreshing…</div>';
      await fetchCommunityContent();
      renderCommunityBrowser();
    });
    return wrap;
  }

  function renderCommunityBrowser() {
    const list = $('communityList');
    const countEl = $('communityResultCount');
    if (!list) return;
    const { filter, search, items } = state._communityBrowser;
    let visible = items.slice();
    if (filter !== 'all') visible = visible.filter(r => r.kind === filter);
    if (search) {
      visible = visible.filter(r =>
        (r.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(search)
        || (r.username || '').toLowerCase().includes(search)
      );
    }
    if (countEl) {
      const total = items.length;
      countEl.textContent = visible.length === total
        ? `${total} item${total === 1 ? '' : 's'}`
        : `${visible.length} of ${total} item${total === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
    }
    if (!visible.length) {
      list.innerHTML = items.length
        ? '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:30px">No items match your filters.</div>'
        : '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:30px">No community uploads yet. Be the first — open a Guide editor or a saved Script and tap ☁ to share.</div>';
      return;
    }
    const ICON = { script: '📝', persona: '🧠' };
    const KIND_LABEL = { script: 'script', persona: 'guide' };
    const myId = state.cloudUser?.id;
    list.innerHTML = visible.map(item => {
      const author = item.username || 'unknown';
      const isMine = myId && item.userId === myId;
      const avatarSvg = generateAvatarSvg(author);
      const ageMs = Date.now() - (item.updatedAt || 0);
      const ageStr = (typeof _relTimeDB === 'function') ? _relTimeDB(item.updatedAt || 0) : 'recently';

      return `
        <div class="community-item" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div class="community-avatar" style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0">${avatarSvg}</div>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:140px">
            <div style="font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">
              <span style="font-size:1.1rem">${ICON[item.kind] || '📄'}</span>
              <span style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${escapeHtml(item.name || 'untitled')}</span>
              ${isMine ? '<span style="font-size:0.6rem;background:rgba(0,212,230,0.18);color:var(--neon-cyan);padding:1px 6px;letter-spacing:0.04em">YOU</span>' : ''}
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint)">${escapeHtml(KIND_LABEL[item.kind] || item.kind)} · by @${escapeHtml(author)} · ${escapeHtml(ageStr)}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn secondary community-preview" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem">preview</button>
          <button class="btn secondary community-import" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem">↓ import</button>
          ${isMine
            ? `<button class="btn secondary icon sm community-delete" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" style="color:#f87171" title="Delete (only you can delete your own)">×</button>`
            : `<button class="btn secondary icon sm community-report" data-id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}" title="Report this item">⚐</button>`}
        </div>`;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('.community-preview').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
      const item = visible.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (item) _previewCommunityItem(item);
    }));
    list.querySelectorAll('.community-import').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
      const item = visible.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (item) _importCloudItemToLocal(item);
    }));
    list.querySelectorAll('.community-delete').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', async e => {
      const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
      if (!confirm('Delete your upload from the community gallery? This cannot be undone.')) return;
      const ok = await cloudDeleteContent(id);
      if (ok) {
        notify.success('Deleted from community.');

        state._communityBrowser.items = state._communityBrowser.items.filter(r => r.id !== id);
        renderCommunityBrowser();
      } else notify.error('Delete failed.');
    }));
    list.querySelectorAll('.community-report').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
      const item = visible.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (item) _reportCommunityItem(item);
    }));
  }

  let _communityPreviewModalEl = null;
  function _ensureCommunityPreviewModal() {
    if (_communityPreviewModalEl) return _communityPreviewModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'communityPreviewModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:600px;max-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px">
          <h2 style="margin:0" id="communityPreviewTitle">preview</h2>
          <button class="btn secondary icon sm" id="communityPreviewClose" title="close">×</button>
        </div>
        <div id="communityPreviewBody" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:6px"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:10px">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="communityPreviewBack">back</button>
          <button class="btn" id="communityPreviewImport">↓ import to my library</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _communityPreviewModalEl = wrap;
    $('communityPreviewClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    $('communityPreviewBack').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'communityPreviewModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    return wrap;
  }
  function _previewCommunityItem(item) {
    _ensureCommunityPreviewModal();
    const titleEl = $('communityPreviewTitle');
    const bodyEl = $('communityPreviewBody');
    const importBtn = $('communityPreviewImport');
    if (!titleEl || !bodyEl || !importBtn) return;
    let parsed = null;
    try { parsed = JSON.parse(item.payload); } catch {}
    const author = item.username || 'unknown';
    const avatarSvg = generateAvatarSvg(author);
    const KIND_LABEL = { script: 'script', persona: 'guide' };
    titleEl.textContent = `${KIND_LABEL[item.kind] || item.kind} preview`;
    let body = '';
    if (item.kind === 'persona' && parsed) {
      const category = parsed.category || 'contemplative';
      const tagline = parsed.tagline || '';
      const systemPrompt = parsed.systemPrompt || '';
      body = `
        <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px">
          <div style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0">${avatarSvg}</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600">${escapeHtml(parsed.name || item.name)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint)">by @${escapeHtml(author)} · ${escapeHtml(category)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        ${tagline ? `<div style="font-style:italic;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:12px;padding:8px 12px;border-left:2px solid var(--neon-cyan);background:rgba(0,212,230,0.04)">${escapeHtml(tagline)}</div>` : ''}
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:4px">Voice instruction</div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace);font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.5;background:var(--bg-deep);padding:10px 12px;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto">${escapeHtml(systemPrompt)}</div>
      `;
    } else if (item.kind === 'script' && parsed) {
      const meta = parsed.sourceMeta || {};
      const metaBits = [];
      if (meta.persona) metaBits.push(`Guide: ${escapeHtml(meta.persona)}`);
      if (meta.method) metaBits.push(`Method: ${escapeHtml(meta.method)}`);
      if (meta.length) metaBits.push(`Length: ${escapeHtml(meta.length)}`);
      const scriptText = parsed.script || '';
      const charCount = scriptText.length;
      body = `
        <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px">
          <div style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0">${avatarSvg}</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600">${escapeHtml(parsed.name || item.name)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint)">by @${escapeHtml(author)} · ${charCount.toLocaleString()} chars</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        ${metaBits.length ? `<div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:10px">${metaBits.join(' · ')}</div>` : ''}
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:4px">Script</div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace);font-size:0.76rem;line-height:1.55;background:var(--bg-deep);padding:10px 12px;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto">${escapeHtml(scriptText)}</div>
      `;
    } else {
      body = `<div style="color:var(--text-faint);text-align:center;padding:20px">Unable to preview — payload may be corrupted.</div>`;
    }
    bodyEl.innerHTML = body;

    const newImport = importBtn.cloneNode(true);
    importBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newImport, importBtn);
    newImport.addEventListener('click', () => {
      _importCloudItemToLocal(item);
      _communityPreviewModalEl.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    _communityPreviewModalEl.classList.add('visible');
  }

  async function _reportCommunityItem(item) {
    if (!state.cloudUser) {
      notify.warn('Sign in to report content.');
      openCloudSignInModal();
      return;
    }
    const reason = prompt(
      `Report "${item.name}" by @${item.username}?\n\nReason (optional, max 200 chars):\n\nThis sends a report to the community moderators. Reported items are reviewed but not removed automatically.`,
      ''
    );
    if (reason === null) return;
    try {
      await cloudDB.add('hne_reports', {
        itemId: item.id,
        itemKind: item.kind,
        itemName: (item.name || '').slice(0, 100),
        authorId: item.userId,
        authorUsername: item.username || '',
        reporterId: state.cloudUser.id,
        reporterUsername: state.cloudUser.username,
        reason: (reason || '').slice(0, 200),
        ts: Date.now(),
      });
      notify.success('Report submitted. Thank you.');
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[community report]', e);
      notify.error('Could not submit report. Try again later.');
    }
  }

  async function openCommunityBrowserModal() {
    _ensureCommunityBrowserModal().classList.add('visible');

    const list = $('communityList');
    if (list) list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);padding:30px">loading…</div>';
    await fetchCommunityContent();
    renderCommunityBrowser();
  }

  function _hashSeed(str) {
    let h = 0x811c9dc5;
    for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
      h ^= str.charCodeAt(i);
      h = (h * 0x01000193) >>> 0;
    }
    return h >>> 0;
  }
  function _hashStream(seed) {

    let s = seed || 1;
    return {
      next() {
        s ^= s << 13; s >>>= 0;
        s ^= s >>> 17;
        s ^= s << 5; s >>>= 0;
        return s;
      }
    };
  }
  function generateAvatarSvg(seedStr, opts = {}) {
    const seed = _hashSeed(String(seedStr || 'anonymous'));
    const rng = _hashStream(seed);

    const hue = seed % 360;
    const sat = 55 + (rng.next() % 25);
    const bgL = 18 + (rng.next() % 12);
    const fgL = 62 + (rng.next() % 18);
    const bg = `hsl(${hue}, ${sat}%, ${bgL}%)`;
    const fg = `hsl(${(hue + 30) % 360}, ${Math.min(80, sat + 10)}%, ${fgL}%)`;

    const rows = 5, cols = 5;
    const cellSize = 100 / cols;
    const cells = [];
    for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
      for (let c = 0; c < 3; c++) {
        if ((rng.next() & 1) === 0) continue;

        cells.push([c, r]);
        if (c < 2) cells.push([cols - 1 - c, r]);
      }
    }
    const rects = cells.map(([c, r]) =>
      `<rect x="${c * cellSize}" y="${r * cellSize}" width="${cellSize}" height="${cellSize}" fill="${fg}"/>`
    ).join('');
    const padding = opts.padding === false ? 0 : 6;
    const inner = padding ? `<g transform="translate(${padding},${padding}) scale(${(100 - padding * 2) / 100})">${rects}</g>` : rects;
    return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
      <rect width="100" height="100" fill="${bg}"/>
      ${inner}
    </svg>`;
  }
  function generateAvatarDataUri(seedStr, _sizePxIgnored) {

    const svg = generateAvatarSvg(seedStr);
    return 'data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg);
  }

  function bootCloudUser() {
    const u = _loadCloudUser();
    if (u) {
      state.cloudUser = u;
      renderCloudUserSlug();
      _startPresenceBeacon();
    } else {
      renderCloudUserSlug();
    }
  }

  function _detectOS() {
    try {
      const ua = (navigator.userAgent || '').toLowerCase();

      const isIPadOS = /macintosh/.test(ua) && navigator.maxTouchPoints > 1;
      if (/iphone|ipad|ipod/.test(ua) || isIPadOS) return 'ios';
      if (/android/.test(ua)) return 'android';
      if (/mac os x|macintosh/.test(ua)) return 'macos';
      if (/windows nt|win64|win32/.test(ua)) return 'windows';
      if (/linux|x11|cros/.test(ua)) return 'linux';
    } catch {}
    return 'unknown';
  }

  const _FREE_VOICE_SECTIONS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__._FREE_VOICE_SECTIONS) || [];

  let _freeVoiceModalEl = null;
  function _ensureFreeVoiceModal() {
    if (_freeVoiceModalEl) return _freeVoiceModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'freeVoiceModal';

    const os = _detectOS();
    const priorityIds = {
      ios: ['ios', 'cloud-services', 'edge', 'ai-local'],
      macos: ['macos', 'edge', 'ai-local', 'cloud-services'],
      windows: ['windows', 'edge', 'ai-local', 'cloud-services'],
      android: ['android', 'edge', 'ai-local', 'cloud-services'],
      linux: ['linux', 'ai-local', 'edge', 'cloud-services'],
      unknown: ['ai-local', 'edge'],
    }[os] || [];

    const orderedSections = [
      ...priorityIds.map(id => _FREE_VOICE_SECTIONS.find(s => s.id === id)).filter(Boolean),
      ..._FREE_VOICE_SECTIONS.filter(s => !priorityIds.includes(s.id)),
    ];

    const osLabel = { ios:'iOS / iPadOS', macos:'macOS', windows:'Windows', android:'Android', linux:'Linux', unknown:'your device' }[os];
    const detectionLine = os === 'unknown'
      ? 'Showing all options.'
      : `Detected <strong>${osLabel}</strong>. Most relevant options shown first; if the detection is wrong, scroll down.`;

    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:680px;max-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0">free narrator voices for your device</h2>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:14px">
          ${detectionLine} Every option below is free. Once installed, voices appear automatically in HNE's voice picker (it reads from the standard Web&nbsp;Speech API).
        </div>
        <div id="freeVoiceSections" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:6px">
          ${orderedSections.map((s, i) => `
            <details class="fv-section" ${i === 0 ? 'open' : ''} style="margin-bottom:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02)">
              <summary style="cursor:pointer;padding:10px 12px;font-size:0.84rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);user-select:none">
                <span style="margin-right:6px">${s.icon}</span>${escapeHtml(s.label)}
              </summary>
              <div class="fv-section-body" style="padding:0 12px 12px 12px;font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.55">
                ${s.html}
              </div>
            </details>`).join('')}
        </div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:12px">
          <button class="btn" id="freeVoiceModalClose">close</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _freeVoiceModalEl = wrap;
    $('freeVoiceModalClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'freeVoiceModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });
    return wrap;
  }
  function openFreeVoiceModal() {
    _ensureFreeVoiceModal().classList.add('visible');
  }

  function _buildPaletteDynamicList() {
    const items = [];
    try {
      if (Array.isArray(PRESETS)) {
        for (const p of PRESETS) {
          items.push({
            kind: 'preset', label: `Preset: ${p.name}`, hint: p.desc || '', keywords: `preset ${p.id} ${p.name} ${p.desc || ''}`,
            run: () => {
              try {
                document.querySelector(`#presetGrid .preset-card[data-preset-id="${p.id}"]`)?.click();
              } catch {}
            },
          });
        }
      }
    } catch {}
    try {
      if (Array.isArray(BUILTIN_PERSONAS)) {
        for (const persona of BUILTIN_PERSONAS) {
          items.push({
            kind: 'persona', label: `Persona: ${persona.name}`, hint: persona.tagline || '', keywords: `persona guide ${persona.id} ${persona.name} ${persona.tagline || ''}`,
            run: () => {
              try {
                state.selectedPersonaId = persona.id;
                if (typeof renderPersonaGrid === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
                if (typeof renderPersonaDetail === 'function') renderPersonaDetail();
                document.querySelector(`#personaGrid .card[data-persona-id="${persona.id}"]`)?.scrollIntoView?.({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
              } catch {}
            },
          });
        }
      }
    } catch {}
    try {
      if (Array.isArray(METHODS)) {
        for (const method of METHODS) {
          items.push({
            kind: 'method', label: `Method: ${method.name}`, hint: method.tagline || '', keywords: `method induction ${method.id} ${method.name} ${method.tagline || ''} ${(method.tags || []).join(' ')}`,
            run: () => {
              try {
                state.selectedMethodId = method.id;
                if (typeof renderMethodGrid === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
                if (typeof renderMethodDetail === 'function') renderMethodDetail();
                document.querySelector(`#methodGrid .card[data-method-id="${method.id}"]`)?.scrollIntoView?.({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
              } catch {}
            },
          });
        }
      }
    } catch {}
    return items;
  }

  function _buildPaletteItems() {
    return [..._buildPaletteActionList(), ..._buildPaletteDynamicList()];
  }

  function _scorePaletteItem(item, tokens) {
    if (!tokens.length) return 1;
    const haystackLabel = (item.label || '').toLowerCase();
    const haystackAll   = (haystackLabel + ' ' + (item.keywords || '').toLowerCase());
    let score = 0;
    for (const t of tokens) {
      const pos = haystackAll.indexOf(t);
      if (pos < 0) return 0;
      score += 1;

      const labelPos = haystackLabel.indexOf(t);
      if (labelPos === 0) score += 3;
      else if (labelPos > 0 && /\s/.test(haystackLabel[labelPos - 1])) score += 2;
      else if (labelPos > 0) score += 1;
    }
    return score;
  }

  let _paletteEl = null;
  let _paletteState = { items: [], filtered: [], cursor: 0, query: '' };

  function _ensurePaletteModal() {
    if (_paletteEl) return _paletteEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'commandPaletteModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:560px;padding:0;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan);box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(0,212,230,0.18)">
        <div style="padding:14px 16px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <span style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-faint);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;flex:0 0 auto">⌘K</span>
          <input type="text" id="commandPaletteInput" autocomplete="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false"
                 placeholder="search actions, presets, personas, methods…"
                 style="flex:1;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:var(--text);font-size:0.92rem;padding:4px 0;font-family:var(--font-body)">
          <span id="commandPaletteCount" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);flex:0 0 auto"></span>
        </div>
        <div id="commandPaletteList" style="max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px 0"></div>
        <div style="padding:8px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);display:flex;justify-content:space-between">
          <span>↑↓ navigate · enter to run · esc to close</span>
          <span id="commandPaletteShortcut">⌘K</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _paletteEl = wrap;

    try {
      const isMac = /Mac|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.platform || navigator.userAgent || '');
      const sc = wrap.querySelector('#commandPaletteShortcut');
      if (sc) sc.textContent = isMac ? '⌘K' : 'Ctrl+K';
    } catch {}

    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === wrap) closeCommandPalette(); });

    const input = wrap.querySelector('#commandPaletteInput');
    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
      _paletteState.query  = input.value || '';
      _paletteState.cursor = 0;
      _renderPaletteList();
    });
    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') { e.preventDefault(); closeCommandPalette(); return; }
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); _movePaletteCursor(1); return; }
      if (e.key === 'ArrowUp')   { e.preventDefault(); _movePaletteCursor(-1); return; }
      if (e.key === 'Enter')     { e.preventDefault(); _runPaletteCursor(); return; }
    });

    wrap.querySelector('#commandPaletteList').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const row = e.target.closest?.('.cp-row');
      if (!row) return;
      const idx = Number(row.dataset.idx);
      if (Number.isFinite(idx) && _paletteState.filtered[idx]) {
        _paletteState.cursor = idx;
        _runPaletteCursor();
      }
    });
    return wrap;
  }

  function _movePaletteCursor(delta) {
    const n = _paletteState.filtered.length;
    if (!n) return;
    _paletteState.cursor = ((_paletteState.cursor + delta) % n + n) % n;
    _renderPaletteList(true);
  }

  const PALETTE_RECENTS_KEY = 'hne_palette_recents_v1';
  const PALETTE_RECENTS_CAP = 5;
  function _loadPaletteRecents() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(PALETTE_RECENTS_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr.filter(s => typeof s === 'string').slice(0, PALETTE_RECENTS_CAP) : [];
    } catch { return []; }
  }
  function _pushPaletteRecent(label) {
    if (!label) return;
    try {
      const cur = _loadPaletteRecents();
      const next = [label, ...cur.filter(l => l !== label)].slice(0, PALETTE_RECENTS_CAP);
      localStorage.setItem(PALETTE_RECENTS_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
    } catch {}
  }

  function _runPaletteCursor() {
    const item = _paletteState.filtered[_paletteState.cursor];
    if (!item) return;
    closeCommandPalette();

    if (item.kind === 'action') _pushPaletteRecent(item.label);
    try { item.run(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[command palette] run failed:', e); }
  }

  function _renderPaletteList(skipScore = false) {
    if (!_paletteEl) return;
    const list = _paletteEl.querySelector('#commandPaletteList');
    const count = _paletteEl.querySelector('#commandPaletteCount');
    if (!list) return;
    if (!skipScore) {

      const q = (_paletteState.query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      const tokens = q ? q.split(/\s+/) : [];

      if (!tokens.length) {
        const recentLabels = _loadPaletteRecents();
        const labelMap = new Map(_paletteState.items.map(it => [it.label, it]));
        const recents = recentLabels.map(l => labelMap.get(l)).filter(Boolean);
        const recentSet = new Set(recents.map(it => it.label));
        const others = _paletteState.items.filter(it => !recentSet.has(it.label));
        _paletteState.filtered = [...recents, ...others].slice(0, 12);
        _paletteState._recentCount = recents.length;
      } else {
        const scored = _paletteState.items
          .map(item => ({ item, score: _scorePaletteItem(item, tokens) }))
          .filter(x => x.score > 0)
          .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
        _paletteState.filtered = scored.slice(0, 12).map(x => x.item);
        _paletteState._recentCount = 0;
      }
    }
    if (count) {
      count.textContent = _paletteState.filtered.length
        ? `${_paletteState.filtered.length} match${_paletteState.filtered.length === 1 ? '' : 'es'}`
        : '';
    }
    if (!_paletteState.filtered.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:24px 16px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.78rem">no matches</div>`;
      return;
    }
    const recentCount = _paletteState._recentCount || 0;
    list.innerHTML = _paletteState.filtered.map((item, i) => {
      const active = i === _paletteState.cursor;
      const kindBadge = {
        action: 'rgba(0,212,230,0.15)',
        preset: 'rgba(201,168,85,0.14)',
        persona:'rgba(140,100,200,0.14)',
        method: 'rgba(120,200,150,0.14)',
      }[item.kind] || 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';

      const showDividerBefore = recentCount > 0 && i === recentCount;
      const recentMark = i < recentCount
        ? `<span style="font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-faint);flex:0 0 auto" title="recent">↩</span>`
        : '';
      return `
        ${showDividerBefore ? `<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);margin:4px 16px;opacity:0.5"></div>` : ''}
        <div class="cp-row" data-idx="${i}" style="
            padding:8px 16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
            background:${active ? 'rgba(0,212,230,0.10)' : 'transparent'};
            border-left:2px solid ${active ? 'var(--neon-cyan)' : 'transparent'};
            transition:background 0.08s">
          <span style="display:inline-block;font-size:0.55rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;padding:1px 6px;background:${kindBadge};color:var(--text-dim);min-width:46px;text-align:center;flex:0 0 auto">${escapeHtml(item.kind)}</span>
          <span style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${escapeHtml(item.label)}</div>
            ${item.hint ? `<div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${escapeHtml(item.hint)}</div>` : ''}
          </span>
          ${recentMark}
        </div>
      `;
    }).join('');

    if (skipScore) {
      const active = list.querySelector(`.cp-row[data-idx="${_paletteState.cursor}"]`);
      active?.scrollIntoView?.({ block: 'nearest' });
    }
  }

  function openCommandPalette() {
    const modal = _ensurePaletteModal();
    _paletteState.items    = _buildPaletteItems();
    _paletteState.query    = '';
    _paletteState.cursor   = 0;
    _paletteState.filtered = _paletteState.items.slice(0, 12);
    const input = modal.querySelector('#commandPaletteInput');
    if (input) { input.value = ''; }
    _renderPaletteList(true);
    modal.classList.add('visible');

    setTimeout(() => { try { input?.focus(); } catch {} }, 16);
  }

  function closeCommandPalette() {
    if (_paletteEl) _paletteEl.classList.remove('visible');
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    const isMac = /Mac|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.platform || '');
    const meta = isMac ? e.metaKey : e.ctrlKey;
    if (meta && !e.shiftKey && !e.altKey && (e.key === 'k' || e.key === 'K')) {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (_paletteEl?.classList?.contains('visible')) closeCommandPalette();
      else openCommandPalette();
      return;
    }
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && _paletteEl?.classList?.contains('visible')) {
      e.preventDefault();
      closeCommandPalette();
    }
  }, true);

  function vibrateBreath() {

    if (caps.vibration) navigator.vibrate([400, 3600, 400, 7600]);

    try { hapticBridge.pulse(0.3, 600); } catch {}
  }
  function vibrateSessionMarker() {
    if (caps.vibration) navigator.vibrate([100, 50, 100]);

    try {
      hapticBridge.pulse(0.5, 100);
      setTimeout(() => { try { hapticBridge.pulse(0.5, 100); } catch {} }, 150);
    } catch {}
  }

  const HAPTIC_INTIFACE_URL = 'ws://127.0.0.1:12345';

  function _hapticUrlOverride() {
    try {
      const el = document.getElementById('hapticIntifaceUrl');
      if (!el) return null;
      const v = (el.value || '').trim();
      if (!v) return null;
      if (!/^wss?:\/\//.test(v)) return null;
      return v;
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  const HAPTIC_BUTTPLUG_CDN = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/buttplug@4.0.1/+esm';

  const hapticBridge = (() => {
    let _client      = null;
    let _connector   = null;
    let _loadingMod  = null;
    let _bpMod       = null;
    let _connected   = false;
    let _enabled     = false;
    let _devices     = [];
    let _lastError   = null;
    let _level       = 0;
    let _activeUntil = 0;

    let _batteries   = new Map();
    let _batteryTimer = null;
    const BATTERY_POLL_MS = 60_000;

    function _setStatus(state, text) {
      const dot = document.getElementById('hapticStatusDot');
      const txt = document.getElementById('hapticStatusText');
      const test = document.getElementById('hapticTestBtn');
      const reco = document.getElementById('hapticReconnectBtn');
      const row = document.getElementById('hapticStatusRow');
      if (!dot || !txt || !row) return;
      row.style.display = _enabled ? '' : 'none';

      let readyText = text;
      if (state === 'ready' && !text && _batteries.size) {
        const lowest = Math.min(..._batteries.values());
        const pct = Math.round(lowest * 100);
        readyText = `ready · ${_devices.length} device${_devices.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} · ${pct}% 🔋`;
      }
      const palette = {
        idle:        ['#888',                  text || 'not connected'],
        connecting:  ['var(--neon-amber)',    text || 'connecting…'],
        connected:   ['#7dc87a',              text || 'connected'],
        scanning:    ['var(--neon-amber)',    text || 'scanning for devices…'],
        ready:       ['#7dc87a',              readyText || `ready · ${_devices.length} device${_devices.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`],
        error:       ['#ff6b6b',              text || (_lastError || 'error')],
      }[state] || palette?.idle;
      dot.style.background = palette[0];
      txt.textContent = palette[1];
      if (test) test.style.display = (state === 'ready' || state === 'connected') ? '' : 'none';
      if (reco) reco.style.display = (state === 'error' || state === 'idle') && _enabled ? '' : 'none';
    }

    async function _loadButtplugMod() {
      if (_loadingMod) return _loadingMod;
      _loadingMod = (async () => {
        try {
          const mod = await import( HAPTIC_BUTTPLUG_CDN);
          return mod;
        } catch (e) {
          _loadingMod = null;
          throw e;
        }
      })();
      return _loadingMod;
    }

    function _devHasOutput(dev, name) {
      try {
        const OT = _bpMod?.OutputType;
        if (!OT || typeof dev?.hasOutput !== 'function') return true;
        return dev.hasOutput(OT[name]);
      } catch { return true; }
    }
    function _devHasInput(dev, name) {
      try {
        const IT = _bpMod?.InputType;
        if (!IT || typeof dev?.hasInput !== 'function') return false;
        return dev.hasInput(IT[name]);
      } catch { return false; }
    }

    async function _refreshBatteries() {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const next = new Map();
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        if (!_devHasInput(dev, 'Battery')) continue;
        try {
          const v = await dev.battery();
          if (Number.isFinite(v)) next.set(dev.index, Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v)));
        } catch {  }
      }
      _batteries = next;

      if (_devices.length) _setStatus('ready');
    }

    function _startBatteryPoll() {
      if (_batteryTimer) return;

      setTimeout(() => { _refreshBatteries().catch(() => {}); }, 2000);
      _batteryTimer = setInterval(() => { _refreshBatteries().catch(() => {}); }, BATTERY_POLL_MS);
    }
    function _stopBatteryPoll() {
      if (_batteryTimer) { clearInterval(_batteryTimer); _batteryTimer = null; }
      _batteries.clear();
    }

    async function connect() {
      if (_connected) return true;
      _setStatus('connecting');
      try {
        const mod = await _loadButtplugMod();
        _bpMod = mod;
        const { ButtplugClient, ButtplugBrowserWebsocketClientConnector } = mod;
        if (!ButtplugClient || !ButtplugBrowserWebsocketClientConnector) {
          throw new Error('Buttplug client not available in module');
        }
        _client = new ButtplugClient('HNE');
        _client.addListener('deviceadded', (dev) => {
          if (!_devices.find(d => d.index === dev.index)) _devices.push(dev);
          _setStatus('ready');
        });
        _client.addListener('deviceremoved', (dev) => {
          _devices = _devices.filter(d => d.index !== dev.index);
          _batteries.delete(dev.index);
          _setStatus(_devices.length ? 'ready' : 'connected');
        });
        _client.addListener('disconnect', () => {
          _connected = false; _devices = []; _stopBatteryPoll(); _setStatus('idle');
        });
        _connector = new ButtplugBrowserWebsocketClientConnector(_hapticUrlOverride() || HAPTIC_INTIFACE_URL);
        await _client.connect(_connector);
        _connected = true;
        _setStatus('scanning');

        try { await _client.startScanning(); } catch {}
        setTimeout(async () => {
          try { if (_client?.isScanning) await _client.stopScanning(); } catch {}
          _setStatus(_devices.length ? 'ready' : 'connected', _devices.length ? null : 'connected · no devices');

          if (_devices.length) _startBatteryPoll();
        }, 5000);
        return true;
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[haptic] connect failed:', e);
        _lastError = (e && e.message) ? e.message : 'connect failed';
        _connected = false;

        let hint;
        const lower = _lastError.toLowerCase();
        if (lower.includes('websocket') || lower.includes('connect') || lower.includes('econnrefused')) {
          hint = 'no Intiface server (install + run intiface.com/central)';
        } else if (lower.includes('version') || lower.includes('spec') || lower.includes('init')) {
          hint = 'Intiface too old for protocol v4 — update intiface.com/central';
        } else {
          hint = _lastError;
        }
        _setStatus('error', hint);
        return false;
      }
    }

    async function disconnect() {
      _stopBatteryPoll();
      try { if (_client && _connected) await _client.disconnect(); } catch {}
      _client = null; _connector = null; _connected = false; _devices = []; _level = 0;
      _setStatus('idle');
    }

    function _devVibrate(dev, i) {
      try {
        const DO = _bpMod?.DeviceOutput;
        if (DO && typeof dev?.runOutput === 'function') {
          const cmd = DO.Vibrate.percent(i);
          const r = dev.runOutput(cmd);
          if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
          return;
        }

        if (typeof dev?.vibrate === 'function') {
          const r = dev.vibrate(i);
          if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
        }
      } catch {}
    }
    function _devStop(dev) {
      try {
        if (typeof dev?.stop === 'function') {
          const r = dev.stop();
          if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
        }
      } catch {}
    }

    function pulse(intensity, durationMs) {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const i = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(intensity) || 0));
      const d = Math.max(20, Math.min(5000, Number(durationMs) || 200));
      const expiry = Date.now() + d;
      _activeUntil = Math.max(_activeUntil, expiry);
      for (const dev of _devices) {

        if (_devHasOutput(dev, 'Vibrate')) _devVibrate(dev, i);
      }

      setTimeout(() => {
        if (Date.now() < _activeUntil - 5) return;
        if (_level > 0) {
          for (const dev of _devices) {
            if (_devHasOutput(dev, 'Vibrate')) _devVibrate(dev, _level);
          }
        } else {
          for (const dev of _devices) _devStop(dev);
        }
      }, d);
    }

    function setLevel(intensity) {
      if (!_connected) return;
      const i = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(intensity) || 0));
      _level = i;
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        if (i > 0) {
          if (_devHasOutput(dev, 'Vibrate')) _devVibrate(dev, i);
        } else {
          _devStop(dev);
        }
      }
    }

    function linear(pos01, durationMs) {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const p = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(pos01) || 0));
      const d = Math.max(20, Math.min(2000, Number(durationMs) || 100));
      const DO = _bpMod?.DeviceOutput;
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        try {

          if (DO && typeof dev.runOutput === 'function' && _devHasOutput(dev, 'HwPositionWithDuration')) {
            const r = dev.runOutput(DO.PositionWithDuration.percent(p, d));
            if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
            continue;
          }

          if (DO && typeof dev.runOutput === 'function' && _devHasOutput(dev, 'Position')) {
            const r = dev.runOutput(DO.Position.percent(p));
            if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
            continue;
          }

          if (_devHasOutput(dev, 'Vibrate')) {
            const intensity = Math.min(1, Math.abs(p - 0.5) * 2);
            _devVibrate(dev, intensity);
          }
        } catch {}
      }
    }

    function stop() { setLevel(0); }

    function isReady() { return _connected && _devices.length > 0; }
    function isEnabled() { return _enabled; }
    function setEnabled(v) { _enabled = !!v; _setStatus(_connected ? (_devices.length ? 'ready' : 'connected') : 'idle'); }

    function getDevices() {
      return _devices.map(d => ({
        index: d.index,
        name: d.name || 'device',
        outputs: {
          vibrate:  _devHasOutput(d, 'Vibrate'),
          rotate:   _devHasOutput(d, 'Rotate'),
          oscillate: _devHasOutput(d, 'Oscillate'),
          constrict: _devHasOutput(d, 'Constrict'),
          position: _devHasOutput(d, 'Position') || _devHasOutput(d, 'HwPositionWithDuration'),
        },
        inputs: {
          battery: _devHasInput(d, 'Battery'),
          rssi:    _devHasInput(d, 'RSSI'),
        },
        battery: _batteries.has(d.index) ? _batteries.get(d.index) : null,
      }));
    }

    async function refreshBatteries() {
      await _refreshBatteries();
      return new Map(_batteries);
    }

    function vibrate(intensity01, _durationMs) {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const i = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(intensity01) || 0));
      const DO = _bpMod?.DeviceOutput;
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        try {
          if (DO && typeof dev.runOutput === 'function' && _devHasOutput(dev, 'Vibrate')) {
            const r = dev.runOutput(DO.Vibrate.percent(i));
            if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
          }
        } catch {}
      }
    }
    function rotate(speed01, _durationMs) {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(speed01) || 0));
      const DO = _bpMod?.DeviceOutput;
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        try {
          if (DO && typeof dev.runOutput === 'function' && _devHasOutput(dev, 'Rotate')) {

            const cw = s >= 0.5;
            const speed = Math.abs(s - 0.5) * 2;
            const r = dev.runOutput(DO.Rotate.percent(speed, cw));
            if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
          }
        } catch {}
      }
    }
    function oscillate(speed01, _durationMs) {
      if (!_connected || !_devices.length) return;
      const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(speed01) || 0));
      const DO = _bpMod?.DeviceOutput;
      for (const dev of _devices) {
        try {
          if (DO && typeof dev.runOutput === 'function' && _devHasOutput(dev, 'Oscillate')) {
            const r = dev.runOutput(DO.Oscillate.percent(s));
            if (r && typeof r.catch === 'function') r.catch(() => {});
          }
        } catch {}
      }
    }

    return {
      connect, disconnect, pulse, setLevel, linear, vibrate, rotate, oscillate, stop,
      isReady, isEnabled, setEnabled, getDevices, refreshBatteries,
    };
  })();

  const HEATMAP_MAX_SPEED = 400;
  const HEATMAP_STOPS = Object.freeze([
    [0.00, [ 30,  60, 120]],
    [0.20, [ 40, 130, 180]],
    [0.40, [ 60, 200, 200]],
    [0.55, [ 90, 220, 100]],
    [0.70, [240, 220,  60]],
    [0.85, [240, 130,  40]],
    [1.00, [220,  60,  60]],
  ]);

  function _heatmapColor(t) {
    t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t));
    for (let i = 0; i < HEATMAP_STOPS.length - 1; i++) {
      const [p0, c0] = HEATMAP_STOPS[i];
      const [p1, c1] = HEATMAP_STOPS[i + 1];
      if (t <= p1) {
        const u = p1 > p0 ? (t - p0) / (p1 - p0) : 0;
        const r = Math.round(c0[0] + (c1[0] - c0[0]) * u);
        const g = Math.round(c0[1] + (c1[1] - c0[1]) * u);
        const b = Math.round(c0[2] + (c1[2] - c0[2]) * u);
        return `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`;
      }
    }
    const last = HEATMAP_STOPS[HEATMAP_STOPS.length - 1][1];
    return `rgb(${last[0]},${last[1]},${last[2]})`;
  }

  function _renderFunscriptHeatmap(track, canvas) {
    if (!canvas || !canvas.getContext) return;
    const dpr  = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const cssW = Math.max(1, canvas.clientWidth  || 600);
    const cssH = Math.max(1, canvas.clientHeight ||  22);
    canvas.width  = Math.max(1, Math.round(cssW * dpr));
    canvas.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(cssH * dpr));
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, cssW, cssH);

    const a = track && Array.isArray(track.actions) ? track.actions : null;
    if (!a || a.length < 2) {

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, cssW, cssH);
      return;
    }

    const t0 = a[0].at;
    const t1 = a[a.length - 1].at;
    const totalMs = t1 - t0;
    if (totalMs <= 0) return;

    const intervals = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < a.length - 1; i++) {
      const dt = a[i + 1].at - a[i].at;
      if (dt <= 0) continue;
      const dp = Math.abs(a[i + 1].pos - a[i].pos);
      intervals.push({ start: a[i].at, end: a[i + 1].at, speed: (dp / dt) * 1000 });
    }
    if (!intervals.length) {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, cssW, cssH);
      return;
    }

    const bucketMs = totalMs / cssW;
    let ivStart = 0;
    for (let col = 0; col < cssW; col++) {
      const bStart = t0 + col * bucketMs;
      const bEnd   = bStart + bucketMs;

      while (ivStart < intervals.length && intervals[ivStart].end <= bStart) ivStart++;
      let weightedSpeed = 0;
      let totalWeight   = 0;
      for (let j = ivStart; j < intervals.length; j++) {
        const iv = intervals[j];
        if (iv.start >= bEnd) break;
        const overlap = Math.min(iv.end, bEnd) - Math.max(iv.start, bStart);
        if (overlap <= 0) continue;
        weightedSpeed += iv.speed * overlap;
        totalWeight   += overlap;
      }
      const speed = totalWeight > 0 ? weightedSpeed / totalWeight : 0;
      const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, speed / HEATMAP_MAX_SPEED));
      ctx.fillStyle = _heatmapColor(t);
      ctx.fillRect(col, 0, 1, cssH);
    }
  }

  function _refreshFunscriptHeatmap() {
    const wrap   = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmapWrap');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmap');
    const label  = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmapLabel');
    if (!wrap || !canvas) return;
    const track = funscriptEngine?.getTrack?.();
    if (!track || !track.actions || track.actions.length < 2) {
      wrap.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    wrap.style.display = '';
    _renderFunscriptHeatmap(track, canvas);
    if (label) {
      const dur = _funscriptDuration(track);
      const m = Math.floor(dur / 60), s = Math.round(dur % 60);
      label.textContent = `${m}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')} · ${track.actions.length}pt`;
    }
  }

  let _heatmapResizeTimer = null;
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    if (_heatmapResizeTimer) clearTimeout(_heatmapResizeTimer);
    _heatmapResizeTimer = setTimeout(_refreshFunscriptHeatmap, 120);
  });

  let _heatmapPlayheadTimer = null;
  function _heatmapPlayheadTick() {
    const playhead = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmapPlayhead');
    const wrap     = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmapWrap');
    if (!playhead || !wrap) return;
    const track = funscriptEngine?.getTrack?.();
    const playing = funscriptEngine?.isPlaying?.();
    if (!track || !track.actions || track.actions.length < 2 || !playing) {
      playhead.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    const dur = (track.actions[track.actions.length - 1].at - track.actions[0].at) || 1;
    const elapsed = funscriptEngine.getElapsedMs?.() || 0;

    const t = track.loop
      ? Math.max(0, ((elapsed % dur) + dur) % dur) / dur
      : Math.max(0, Math.min(1, elapsed / dur));
    playhead.style.display = '';
    playhead.style.left = (t * 100).toFixed(2) + '%';
  }
  function _startHeatmapPlayhead() {
    if (_heatmapPlayheadTimer) return;
    _heatmapPlayheadTimer = setInterval(_heatmapPlayheadTick, 100);
  }
  function _stopHeatmapPlayhead() {
    if (_heatmapPlayheadTimer) {
      clearInterval(_heatmapPlayheadTimer);
      _heatmapPlayheadTimer = null;
    }
    const playhead = document.getElementById('funscriptHeatmapPlayhead');
    if (playhead) playhead.style.display = 'none';
  }

  const FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS    = 33;
  const FUNSCRIPT_MAX_BYTES  = 5 * 1024 * 1024;
  const FUNSCRIPT_MAX_POINTS = 200_000;

  function _parseFunScript(textOrObj) {
    const raw = (typeof textOrObj === 'string') ? JSON.parse(textOrObj) : textOrObj;
    if (!raw || typeof raw !== 'object') throw new Error('FunScript root must be an object');
    const rawActions = Array.isArray(raw.actions) ? raw.actions : [];
    if (rawActions.length > FUNSCRIPT_MAX_POINTS) {
      throw new Error(`Too many points (${rawActions.length} > ${FUNSCRIPT_MAX_POINTS})`);
    }
    const actions = rawActions
      .map(a => ({ at: Number(a?.at), pos: Number(a?.pos) }))
      .filter(a => Number.isFinite(a.at) && Number.isFinite(a.pos))
      .sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
    if (!actions.length) throw new Error('No valid action points');
    return {
      version:  raw.version  ?? 1,
      inverted: !!raw.inverted,
      range:    Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(raw.range) || 100)),
      actions,
    };
  }

  function _funscriptInterpolate(track, timeMs) {
    const a = track?.actions;
    if (!a || !a.length) return 0.5;
    if (!Number.isFinite(timeMs)) return 0.5;
    const inv = !!track.inverted, rng = track.range || 100;
    const apply = (pos) => {
      const scaled = (pos / 100) * (rng / 100);
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, inv ? (rng / 100) - scaled : scaled));
    };
    if (timeMs <= a[0].at) return apply(a[0].pos);
    if (timeMs >= a[a.length - 1].at) return apply(a[a.length - 1].pos);
    let lo = 0, hi = a.length - 1;
    while (hi - lo > 1) {
      const mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
      if (a[mid].at <= timeMs) lo = mid; else hi = mid;
    }
    const dAt = a[hi].at - a[lo].at;
    const t = dAt > 0 ? (timeMs - a[lo].at) / dAt : 0;
    const pos = a[lo].pos + t * (a[hi].pos - a[lo].pos);
    return apply(pos);
  }

  function _funscriptDuration(track) {
    const a = track?.actions;
    return (a && a.length) ? a[a.length - 1].at / 1000 : 0;
  }

  const LIVE_CONTROL_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
    intensityScale: 1.0,
    speedScale:     1.0,
    randomness:     0.0,
  });
  function _ensureLiveControl() {
    if (!state.liveControl) state.liveControl = { ...LIVE_CONTROL_DEFAULTS };
    return state.liveControl;
  }

  function _applyLiveControl(rawPos) {
    if (!Number.isFinite(rawPos)) return 50;
    const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
    const intensity = state._rampActiveIntensity ?? lc.intensityScale ?? 1;
    let pos = 50 + (rawPos - 50) * intensity;
    if (lc.randomness > 0) {
      pos += (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * lc.randomness * 10;
    }
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, pos));
  }

  function _liveSpeedAdjustedMs(elapsedMs) {
    const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
    const sp = Number.isFinite(lc.speedScale) && lc.speedScale > 0 ? lc.speedScale : 1;
    return elapsedMs * sp;
  }

  const RAMP_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
    enabled:   false,
    mode:      'time',
    startVal:  0.5,
    endVal:    1.5,
    curve:     'linear',
    steps:     [],
    blendMode: 'max',
  });
  const HNE_RAMP_KEY = 'hne_ramp_settings_v1';
  function loadRampSettings() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_RAMP_KEY);
      if (!raw) return { ...RAMP_DEFAULTS };
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return { ...RAMP_DEFAULTS, ...(parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {}) };
    } catch { return { ...RAMP_DEFAULTS }; }
  }
  function saveRampSettings(s) {
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_RAMP_KEY, JSON.stringify(s || {})); } catch {}
  }

  function _applyRampCurve(t01, curve) {
    t01 = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t01));
    if (curve === 'exponential') return t01 * t01;
    if (curve === 'sine')        return 0.5 - 0.5 * Math.cos(Math.PI * t01);
    return t01;
  }

  function _evaluateRamp() {
    const r = state.rampSettings;
    if (!r || !r.enabled) return null;
    const es = state.engineState || {};
    const elapsed = es.sessionSec ?? 0;
    const total   = es.totalSec || 600;
    const tFraction = total > 0 ? Math.min(1, elapsed / total) : 0;

    let target = r.startVal;
    if (r.mode === 'time') {
      target = r.startVal + (r.endVal - r.startVal) * _applyRampCurve(tFraction, r.curve);
    } else if (r.mode === 'engagement') {
      const eng = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, es.engagement ?? 0));
      target = r.startVal + (r.endVal - r.startVal) * _applyRampCurve(eng, r.curve);
    } else if (r.mode === 'step') {

      const steps = (Array.isArray(r.steps) ? r.steps : [])
        .filter(s => Number.isFinite(s.atSec) && Number.isFinite(s.intensity))
        .sort((a, b) => a.atSec - b.atSec);
      target = r.startVal;
      for (const s of steps) { if (s.atSec <= elapsed) target = s.intensity; else break; }
    } else if (r.mode === 'adaptive') {

      const eng = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, es.engagement ?? 0));
      const timeT = _applyRampCurve(tFraction, r.curve);
      const blend = (timeT + eng) / 2;
      target = r.startVal + (r.endVal - r.startVal) * blend;
    }
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(2, target));
  }

  function _tickRamp() {
    const target = _evaluateRamp();
    if (target == null) {
      delete state._rampActiveIntensity;
      return;
    }
    const manual = state.liveControl?.intensityScale ?? 1;
    const mode = state.rampSettings?.blendMode || 'max';
    let result;
    switch (mode) {
      case 'add':     result = manual + (target - 1); break;
      case 'replace': result = target;                break;
      case 'max':
      default:        result = Math.max(manual, target); break;
    }
    state._rampActiveIntensity = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, result));
  }

  const PACING_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
    enabled:       false,
    minSpeed:      0.5,
    maxSpeed:      2.0,
    smoothingSec:  4,
    curve:         'linear',
    lockDuringSec: 0,
  });
  const HNE_PACING_KEY = 'hne_pacing_settings_v1';
  function loadPacingSettings() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_PACING_KEY);
      if (!raw) return { ...PACING_DEFAULTS };
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return _normalizePacingSettings(parsed);
    } catch { return { ...PACING_DEFAULTS }; }
  }
  function savePacingSettings(s) {
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_PACING_KEY, JSON.stringify(s || {})); } catch {}
  }

  function _normalizePacingSettings(p) {
    if (!p || typeof p !== 'object') return { ...PACING_DEFAULTS };
    const base = PACING_DEFAULTS;
    return {
      enabled:       p.enabled === true,
      minSpeed:      Number.isFinite(p.minSpeed)      ? Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4,  p.minSpeed))      : base.minSpeed,
      maxSpeed:      Number.isFinite(p.maxSpeed)      ? Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4,  p.maxSpeed))      : base.maxSpeed,
      smoothingSec:  Number.isFinite(p.smoothingSec)  ? Math.max(0,    Math.min(30, p.smoothingSec))  : base.smoothingSec,
      curve:         ['linear','exponential','sine'].includes(p.curve) ? p.curve : base.curve,
      lockDuringSec: Number.isFinite(p.lockDuringSec) ? Math.max(0,    Math.min(60, p.lockDuringSec)) : base.lockDuringSec,
    };
  }

  let _pacingCurrentSpeed = 1.0;
  let _pacingLastChangeAt = 0;
  function _resetDynamicPacing() {
    _pacingCurrentSpeed = 1.0;
    _pacingLastChangeAt = 0;
  }

  function _tickDynamicPacing(frameSec) {
    const ps = state.pacingSettings;
    if (!ps?.enabled) return;
    const es = state.engineState;
    if (!es) return;

    const engagement = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(es.engagement) || 0));

    const sessionTime = es.sessionSec ?? es.sessionTime ?? 0;
    if (ps.lockDuringSec > 0 && (sessionTime - _pacingLastChangeAt) < ps.lockDuringSec) return;

    const t = _applyRampCurve(engagement, ps.curve);
    const targetSpeed = ps.minSpeed + t * (ps.maxSpeed - ps.minSpeed);

    const alpha = ps.smoothingSec > 0 ? Math.min(1, frameSec / ps.smoothingSec) : 1;
    const prevSpeed = _pacingCurrentSpeed;
    _pacingCurrentSpeed += alpha * (targetSpeed - _pacingCurrentSpeed);
    _pacingCurrentSpeed = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, _pacingCurrentSpeed));

    if (Math.abs(_pacingCurrentSpeed - prevSpeed) > 0.005) {
      const speed = +_pacingCurrentSpeed.toFixed(3);
      const slider = document.getElementById('liveCtrlSpeed');
      if (slider) {
        slider.value = speed;
        slider.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      }
      if (ps.lockDuringSec > 0) _pacingLastChangeAt = sessionTime;
    }
  }

  const funscriptEngine = (() => {
    let _track       = null;
    let _tickHandle  = null;
    let _startMs     = 0;
    let _pausedAtMs  = 0;
    let _pausedAccumMs = 0;
    let _pauseStartedAt = 0;
    let _filename    = '';
    let _onTrackChange = null;

    let _injection   = null;
    let _onInjection = null;

    const _secondaryTracks = new Map();
    let _onSecondaryChange = null;
    function _setSecondary(axis, track, name) {
      if (axis === 'linear') return;
      if (track) _secondaryTracks.set(axis, { track, name: name || '', axis });
