      else       _secondaryTracks.delete(axis);
      if (typeof _onSecondaryChange === 'function') _onSecondaryChange(axis, track);
    }
    function _clearAllSecondaries() {
      _secondaryTracks.clear();
      if (typeof _onSecondaryChange === 'function') _onSecondaryChange(null, null);
    }
    function _listSecondaries() {
      return Array.from(_secondaryTracks.values()).map(s => ({ axis: s.axis, name: s.name }));
    }

    function loadTrack(parsed, filename) {
      _track = parsed;
      _filename = filename || '';
      if (typeof _onTrackChange === 'function') _onTrackChange(_track, _filename);
    }

    function clearTrack() {
      stop();
      _track = null;
      _filename = '';
      if (typeof _onTrackChange === 'function') _onTrackChange(null, '');
    }

    function getTrack() { return _track; }
    function getFilename() { return _filename; }
    function setOnTrackChange(fn) { _onTrackChange = fn; }
    function setOnInjection(fn) { _onInjection = fn; }

    function isPlaying() { return !!_tickHandle; }
    function isInjecting() { return !!_injection; }

    function start() {
      if (!_track || _tickHandle) return;

      if (!hapticBridge.isReady?.()) return;
      _startMs = Date.now();
      _pausedAccumMs = 0;
      _pauseStartedAt = 0;
      _tickHandle = setInterval(_tick, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS);
    }

    function stop() {
      if (_tickHandle) { clearInterval(_tickHandle); _tickHandle = null; }
      _pauseStartedAt = 0;
      _injection = null;
    }

    function pause() {
      if (!_tickHandle || _pauseStartedAt) return;
      _pauseStartedAt = Date.now();
    }

    function resume() {
      if (!_pauseStartedAt) return;
      _pausedAccumMs += (Date.now() - _pauseStartedAt);
      _pauseStartedAt = 0;
    }

    function injectMacro(macro) {
      if (!macro || !Array.isArray(macro.actions) || !macro.actions.length) return;
      if (!hapticBridge.isReady?.()) return;

      let fromPos01 = 0.5;
      if (_track) {
        const elapsedMs = Date.now() - _startMs - _pausedAccumMs;
        fromPos01 = _funscriptInterpolate(_track, elapsedMs);
      }

      const macroDur = macro.actions[macro.actions.length - 1].at | 0;
      const totalMs  = MACRO_EASE_MS + macroDur + MACRO_EASE_MS;
      let toPos01 = 0.5;
      if (_track) {
        const futureMs = (Date.now() - _startMs - _pausedAccumMs) + totalMs;
        toPos01 = _funscriptInterpolate(_track, futureMs);
      }

      const fromPos100 = fromPos01 * 100;
      const toPos100   = toPos01 * 100;
      const target100  = macro.actions[0].pos;
      const final100   = macro.actions[macro.actions.length - 1].pos;
      const seq = [];
      const STEPS = 8;

      for (let i = 0; i <= STEPS; i++) {
        const t = i / STEPS;
        const p = fromPos100 + _macroEaseInOut(t) * (target100 - fromPos100);
        seq.push({ at: Math.round(t * MACRO_EASE_MS), pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(p))) });
      }

      for (const a of macro.actions) {
        seq.push({ at: a.at + MACRO_EASE_MS, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(a.pos))) });
      }

      const easeOutStart = MACRO_EASE_MS + macroDur;
      for (let i = 1; i <= STEPS; i++) {
        const t = i / STEPS;
        const p = final100 + _macroEaseInOut(t) * (toPos100 - final100);
        seq.push({ at: easeOutStart + Math.round(t * MACRO_EASE_MS), pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(p))) });
      }
      _injection = {
        actions: seq,
        startMs: Date.now(),
        totalMs,
        name: macro.name || macro.id || 'macro',
      };
      if (typeof _onInjection === 'function') _onInjection(_injection);

      if (!_tickHandle) {
        _tickHandle = setInterval(_tick, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS);
      }
    }

    function cancelInjection() {
      _injection = null;
      if (typeof _onInjection === 'function') _onInjection(null);

      if (!_track && _tickHandle) {
        clearInterval(_tickHandle); _tickHandle = null;
      }
    }

    function _tick() {
      if (_pauseStartedAt) return;
      if (state.paused) return;
      const now = Date.now();

      try { _tickRamp(); } catch {}

      if (_injection) {
        const injElapsed = now - _injection.startMs;
        if (injElapsed >= _injection.totalMs) {
          cancelInjection();

        } else {

          const a = _injection.actions;
          let pos100 = a[0].pos;
          if (injElapsed >= a[a.length - 1].at) {
            pos100 = a[a.length - 1].pos;
          } else {
            let lo = 0, hi = a.length - 1;
            while (hi - lo > 1) {
              const mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
              if (a[mid].at <= injElapsed) lo = mid; else hi = mid;
            }
            const dAt = a[hi].at - a[lo].at;
            const t = dAt > 0 ? (injElapsed - a[lo].at) / dAt : 0;
            pos100 = a[lo].pos + t * (a[hi].pos - a[lo].pos);
          }

          const adjPos100 = _applyLiveControl(pos100);
          const pos01 = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, adjPos100 / 100));
          try { hapticBridge.linear(pos01, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS); } catch {}
          return;
        }
      }
      if (!_track) return;

      const rawElapsedMs = now - _startMs - _pausedAccumMs;
      let elapsedMs = _liveSpeedAdjustedMs(rawElapsedMs);

      if (_track.loop && _track.actions.length >= 2) {
        const trackDur = _track.actions[_track.actions.length - 1].at - _track.actions[0].at;
        if (trackDur > 0) {
          elapsedMs = ((elapsedMs % trackDur) + trackDur) % trackDur;
        }
      }
      const pos01 = _funscriptInterpolate(_track, elapsedMs);

      const adjPos100 = _applyLiveControl(pos01 * 100);
      const adjPos01  = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, adjPos100 / 100));
      try { hapticBridge.linear(adjPos01, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS); } catch {}

      if (_secondaryTracks.size) {
        for (const sec of _secondaryTracks.values()) {
          const t = sec.track;
          if (!t || !Array.isArray(t.actions) || t.actions.length < 1) continue;
          let secMs = elapsedMs;
          if (t.loop && t.actions.length >= 2) {
            const dur = t.actions[t.actions.length - 1].at - t.actions[0].at;
            if (dur > 0) secMs = ((secMs % dur) + dur) % dur;
          }
          const sPos01 = _funscriptInterpolate(t, secMs);
          const sScaled = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, _applyLiveControl(sPos01 * 100) / 100));
          try {
            switch (sec.axis) {
              case 'vibrate':   hapticBridge.vibrate(sScaled, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS); break;
              case 'rotate':    hapticBridge.rotate(sScaled, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS); break;
              case 'oscillate': hapticBridge.oscillate(sScaled, FUNSCRIPT_TICK_MS); break;

            }
          } catch {}
        }
      }
    }

    return {
      loadTrack, clearTrack, getTrack, getFilename, setOnTrackChange, setOnInjection,
      start, stop, pause, resume, isPlaying, isInjecting,
      injectMacro, cancelInjection,

      setSecondaryTrack(axis, track, name) { _setSecondary(axis, track, name); },
      clearSecondaryTrack(axis)            { _setSecondary(axis, null, null); },
      clearAllSecondaries()                { _clearAllSecondaries(); },
      listSecondaries()                    { return _listSecondaries(); },
      setOnSecondaryChange(fn)             { _onSecondaryChange = (typeof fn === 'function') ? fn : null; },

      getElapsedMs() {
        if (!_tickHandle) return 0;
        const now = _pauseStartedAt || Date.now();
        const raw = now - _startMs - _pausedAccumMs;
        return _liveSpeedAdjustedMs(raw);
      },
    };
  })();

  const MACRO_EASE_MS = 350;
  function _macroEaseInOut(t) {
    return t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
  }

  const _fsPatHelpers = (() => {
    const clamp = v => Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(v)));
    const sample = (fn, durMs = 60_000, stepMs = 100) => {
      const out = [];
      for (let t = 0; t <= durMs; t += stepMs) out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(fn(t / durMs)) });
      return out;
    };
    const sine = (lo, hi, periodMs) => {
      const amp = (hi - lo) / 2, mid = lo + amp;
      return t => mid + amp * Math.sin((t * 2 * Math.PI * 60_000) / periodMs);
    };
    const ramp = (s, e) => t => s + (e - s) * t;
    return { clamp, sample, sine, ramp };
  })();

  const FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS = (() => {
    const { clamp, sample, sine, ramp } = _fsPatHelpers;
    return [
      {
        id: 'slow-pulse',
        name: 'Slow Pulse',
        icon: '〰',
        description: 'Smooth, unhurried oscillation between 10% and 90%. Good base layer for long sessions.',
        generate: () => sample(t => sine(10, 90, 4_000)(t)),
      },
      {
        id: 'breath-sync',
        name: 'Breath Sync',
        icon: '🧘',
        description: 'Matches a 6-second breathing cycle (4s in, brief hold, 4s out). Grounding, meditative.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [], cycle = 6_000;
          for (let t = 0; t <= 60_000; t += 100) {
            const phase = (t % cycle) / cycle;
            let pos;
            if (phase < 0.45)      pos = 15 + (phase / 0.45) * 65;
            else if (phase < 0.55) pos = 80;
            else                   pos = 80 - ((phase - 0.55) / 0.45) * 65;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(pos) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },
      {
        id: 'heartbeat',
        name: 'Heartbeat',
        icon: '💗',
        description: 'Double-beat pulse with a long rest — mirrors a cardiac rhythm. Intimate, settling.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [], cycle = 900;
          for (let t = 0; t <= 60_000; t += 25) {
            const phase = (t % (cycle * 2.5)) / cycle;
            let pos;
            if (phase < 0.15)      pos = phase / 0.15 * 90;
            else if (phase < 0.30) pos = 90 - (phase - 0.15) / 0.15 * 70;
            else if (phase < 0.45) pos = 20 + (phase - 0.30) / 0.15 * 80;
            else if (phase < 0.65) pos = 100 - (phase - 0.45) / 0.20 * 90;
            else                   pos = 10;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(pos) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },
      {
        id: 'wave-surge',
        name: 'Wave Surge',
        icon: '🌊',
        description: 'Layered slow + fast sine waves. Organic, less mechanical than a single oscillation.',
        generate: () => sample(t => sine(20, 80, 6_000)(t) * 0.65 + sine(0, 40, 1_600)(t) * 0.35),
      },
      {
        id: 'slow-build',
        name: 'Slow Build',
        icon: '📈',
        description: 'Starts subtle, widens range and quickens pace over 60s. Pairs with deepening or work phases.',
        generate: () => sample(t => {
          const lo = 50 - 40 * t, hi = 50 + 40 * t;
          const period = 5_000 - 3_200 * t;
          const amp = (hi - lo) / 2, mid = lo + amp;
          return mid + amp * Math.sin((t * 2 * Math.PI * 60_000) / Math.max(period, 100));
        }),
      },
      {
        id: 'deep-descent',
        name: 'Deep Descent',
        icon: '🌱',
        description: 'Begins at full intensity and winds down over 60s. Good for lightener / wake / closing scenes.',
        generate: () => sample(t => ramp(85, 15)(t) + sine(-20, 20, 3_000)(t)),
      },
      {
        id: 'featherlight',
        name: 'Featherlight',
        icon: '🪶',
        description: 'Barely-there strokes that tease the senses. Extremely gentle — ideal for warm-up / cool-down.',
        generate: () => sample(t => sine(5, 25, 4_000)(t) + sine(0, 8, 700)(t), 60_000, 50),
      },
      {
        id: 'long-slow-draw',
        name: 'Long Slow Draw',
        icon: '🌀',
        description: 'One very long, deep, slow stroke cycle — meditative, deeply grounding.',
        generate: () => sample(t => {
          const p = (t * 60_000 % 10_000) / 10_000;
          return p < 0.5 ? p * 2 * 100 : (1 - (p - 0.5) * 2) * 100;
        }, 60_000, 60),
      },
      {
        id: 'deep-pendulum',
        name: 'Deep Pendulum',
        icon: '⏳',
        description: 'Smooth cosine pendulum, 3s period. Hypnotic, even tempo for deep induction.',
        generate: () => sample(t => 50 + 48 * Math.cos((t * 60_000 / 3_000) * Math.PI * 2), 60_000, 60),
      },

      {
        id: 'edging-cycle',
        name: 'Edging Cycle',
        icon: '🔄',
        description: 'Tempo cycles slow→fast→slow over 60s, constant 15–85% amplitude. Frequency-modulated rather than amplitude-modulated.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [];
          const cycleDur = 60_000;
          const minPeriodMs = 1500;
          const maxPeriodMs = 8000;
          const lo = 15, hi = 85;
          const amp = (hi - lo) / 2, mid = lo + amp;
          let phase = 0;
          const stepMs = 50;
          for (let t = 0; t <= cycleDur; t += stepMs) {

            const cyclePos = (t / cycleDur) * Math.PI * 2;
            const slowness = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.cos(cyclePos);
            const period = minPeriodMs + (maxPeriodMs - minPeriodMs) * slowness;
            phase += (stepMs / period) * Math.PI * 2;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(mid + amp * Math.sin(phase)) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },
      {
        id: 'tempo-build',
        name: 'Tempo Build',
        icon: '⏫',
        description: 'Frequency monotonically increases — starts at 6s/stroke, ends at 1.2s/stroke. Different feel from the amplitude-based Slow Build.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [];
          const cycleDur = 60_000;
          const startPeriodMs = 6000;
          const endPeriodMs   = 1200;
          const lo = 20, hi = 80;
          const amp = (hi - lo) / 2, mid = lo + amp;
          let phase = 0;
          const stepMs = 50;
          for (let t = 0; t <= cycleDur; t += stepMs) {
            const f = t / cycleDur;

            const eased = f * f;
            const period = startPeriodMs + (endPeriodMs - startPeriodMs) * eased;
            phase += (stepMs / period) * Math.PI * 2;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(mid + amp * Math.sin(phase)) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },
      {
        id: 'session-arc',
        name: 'Session Arc',
        icon: '⛰',
        description: 'Warm-up → peak → wind-down across 60s. Both amplitude and tempo follow the arc — designed as a session-shape pattern rather than a uniform loop.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [];
          const cycleDur = 60_000;
          const stepMs = 50;

          const envelope = (f) => {
            if (f < 0.25) return f / 0.25;
            if (f < 0.75) return 1;
            return (1 - f) / 0.25;
          };
          let phase = 0;
          for (let t = 0; t <= cycleDur; t += stepMs) {
            const f = t / cycleDur;
            const env = envelope(f);

            const ampSpan = 5 + 85 * env;
            const mid = 50;

            const period = 6000 - 4500 * env;
            phase += (stepMs / period) * Math.PI * 2;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(mid + (ampSpan / 2) * Math.sin(phase)) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },

      {
        id: 'organic-jitter',
        name: 'Organic Jitter',
        icon: '🍃',
        description: 'Period + amplitude drift toward random targets every 2–4s. Less mechanical than steady oscillation — meant to feel alive, not predictable.',
        generate: () => {
          const out = [];

          let seed = 1234567;
          const rng = () => { seed = (seed * 48271) % 2147483647; return seed / 2147483647; };
          const totalMs = 60_000;
          const stepMs = 50;
          let phase = 0;
          let curPeriod  = 2200, targetPeriod  = 2200;
          let curAmpSpan = 50,   targetAmpSpan = 50;
          let nextRetargetMs = 0;
          for (let t = 0; t <= totalMs; t += stepMs) {
            if (t >= nextRetargetMs) {
              targetPeriod  = 1500 + rng() * 2500;
              targetAmpSpan = 30   + rng() * 55;
              nextRetargetMs = t + 2000 + rng() * 2000;
            }

            curPeriod  += (targetPeriod  - curPeriod)  * 0.04;
            curAmpSpan += (targetAmpSpan - curAmpSpan) * 0.04;
            phase += (stepMs / curPeriod) * Math.PI * 2;
            out.push({ at: t, pos: clamp(50 + (curAmpSpan / 2) * Math.sin(phase)) });
          }
          return out;
        },
      },
    ];
  })();

  function _funscriptFromPattern(patternId) {
    const p = FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS.find(x => x.id === patternId);
    if (!p) return null;
    return {
      version:  1,
      inverted: false,
      range:    100,

      loop:     true,
      actions:  p.generate(),
    };
  }

  const PHASE_FUNSCRIPT_PROFILE = Object.freeze({
    settling:        { ampSpan: 14,  mid: 50, periodMs: 6500, ampShape: 'rise' },
    induction:       { ampSpan: 26,  mid: 50, periodMs: 5500, ampShape: 'rise' },
    deepener:        { ampSpan: 38,  mid: 50, periodMs: 4500, ampShape: 'rise' },
    level:           { ampSpan: 30,  mid: 50, periodMs: 5000, ampShape: 'flat' },
    teaching:        { ampSpan: 24,  mid: 50, periodMs: 5000, ampShape: 'flat' },
    training:        { ampSpan: 36,  mid: 50, periodMs: 3500, ampShape: 'arc'  },
    work:            { ampSpan: 50,  mid: 50, periodMs: 3000, ampShape: 'arc'  },
    affirm:          { ampSpan: 30,  mid: 50, periodMs: 4000, ampShape: 'flat' },
    mission:         { ampSpan: 38,  mid: 50, periodMs: 3500, ampShape: 'arc'  },
    goal:            { ampSpan: 32,  mid: 50, periodMs: 4000, ampShape: 'flat' },
    lightener:       { ampSpan: 22,  mid: 50, periodMs: 5500, ampShape: 'fall' },
    wake:            { ampSpan: 12,  mid: 50, periodMs: 6500, ampShape: 'fall' },
    reintroduction:  { ampSpan: 6,   mid: 50, periodMs: 8000, ampShape: 'fall' },
  });

  const PHASE_FUNSCRIPT_DEFAULT = Object.freeze(
    { ampSpan: 24, mid: 50, periodMs: 5000, ampShape: 'flat' }
  );

  function _phaseBaseName(name) {
    if (!name || typeof name !== 'string') return '';
    const m = name.match(/^([a-z]+)/i);
    return m ? m[1].toLowerCase() : name.toLowerCase();
  }

  function _sessionLengthSec(len) {
    const map = {
      micro: 120, quick: 300, short: 720, medium: 1200,
      long: 1800, extended: 2700, deep: 3600, marathon: 5400,
    };
    return map[len] || 1200;
  }

  function buildAutoFunscriptForSession(opts = {}) {
    const length = opts.length || (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.length) || 'medium';
    const intentType = opts.intentionType || (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.intentionType) || 'general';
    let phases = opts.phases;
    if (!Array.isArray(phases) || !phases.length) {

      try { phases = (typeof getSessionPhaseBlueprint === 'function') ? getSessionPhaseBlueprint() : []; }
      catch { phases = []; }
    }
    if (!phases.length) {

      phases = ['settling', 'induction', 'deepener', 'work', 'lightener', 'wake', 'reintroduction'];
    }

    const totalSec = _sessionLengthSec(length);
    const totalMs  = totalSec * 1000;

    const weight = (basename) => ({
      settling: 0.5, induction: 1.5, deepener: 1.5, level: 1.0,
      teaching: 1.5, training: 2.0, work: 3.0, affirm: 0.6,
      mission: 1.5, goal: 1.5, lightener: 1.0, wake: 0.7,
      reintroduction: 0.4, sleep: 1.5,
    }[basename] ?? 1.0);

    const phaseEntries = phases.map(name => ({
      name,
      base: _phaseBaseName(name),
      profile: { ...(PHASE_FUNSCRIPT_PROFILE[_phaseBaseName(name)] || PHASE_FUNSCRIPT_DEFAULT) },
    }));

    if (intentType === 'sleep') {
      for (const e of phaseEntries) {
        if (e.base === 'wake' || e.base === 'reintroduction') {
          e.profile.ampSpan = 0;
        } else if (e.base === 'work' || e.base === 'affirm' || e.base === 'lightener') {
          e.profile.ampSpan = Math.max(4, e.profile.ampSpan * 0.55);
          e.profile.periodMs = Math.min(9000, e.profile.periodMs * 1.4);
        }
      }
    } else if (intentType === 'energy' || intentType === 'performance') {
      for (const e of phaseEntries) {
        if (e.base === 'work' || e.base === 'training') {
          e.profile.ampSpan = Math.min(70, e.profile.ampSpan * 1.25);
          e.profile.periodMs = Math.max(1800, e.profile.periodMs * 0.75);
        } else if (e.base === 'wake') {
          e.profile.ampSpan = Math.min(40, e.profile.ampSpan * 1.8);
        }
      }
    }
    const totalWeight = phaseEntries.reduce((s, e) => s + weight(e.base), 0) || 1;
    let cursor = 0;
    for (const e of phaseEntries) {
      const share = weight(e.base) / totalWeight;
      e.startMs = cursor;
      e.durMs   = share * totalMs;
      cursor   += e.durMs;
    }

    const stepMs = 100;
    const out = [];
    let phaseAcc = 0;
    let lastPhaseIdx = -1;
    for (let t = 0; t <= totalMs; t += stepMs) {

      let pIdx = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < phaseEntries.length; i++) {
        if (phaseEntries[i].startMs <= t) pIdx = i; else break;
      }
      const ph = phaseEntries[pIdx];
      const phT = (ph.durMs > 0) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (t - ph.startMs) / ph.durMs)) : 0;

      let ampScalar;
      switch (ph.profile.ampShape) {
        case 'rise': ampScalar = phT; break;
        case 'fall': ampScalar = 1 - phT; break;
        case 'arc':  ampScalar = Math.sin(phT * Math.PI); break;
        default:     ampScalar = 1; break;
      }

      if (pIdx !== lastPhaseIdx && phT < 0.04 && pIdx > 0) {
        const prev = phaseEntries[pIdx - 1];
        const prevProfile = prev.profile;
        let prevAmp;
        switch (prevProfile.ampShape) {
          case 'rise': prevAmp = 1; break;
          case 'fall': prevAmp = 0; break;
          case 'arc':  prevAmp = 0; break;
          default:     prevAmp = 1; break;
        }
        const blend = phT / 0.04;
        ampScalar = prevAmp * (1 - blend) + ampScalar * blend;
      }
      lastPhaseIdx = pIdx;
      const ampSpan = ph.profile.ampSpan * ampScalar;
      const period = ph.profile.periodMs;
      phaseAcc += (stepMs / period) * Math.PI * 2;
      const pos = ph.profile.mid + (ampSpan / 2) * Math.sin(phaseAcc);
      out.push({ at: t, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(pos))) });
    }

    return {
      version:  1,
      inverted: false,
      range:    100,

      loop:     false,
      actions:  out,

      _autoMeta: {
        kind: 'session-auto',
        length,
        intentionType: intentType,
        phaseCount: phaseEntries.length,
      },
    };
  }

  const HAPTIC_MACROS = (window.__HNE_DATA__ && window.__HNE_DATA__.HAPTIC_MACROS) || [];

  function _findHapticMacro(id) {
    if (!id || typeof id !== 'string') return null;
    const norm = id.trim().toLowerCase();

    const users = loadUserMacros();
    const u = users.find(m => m.id === norm);
    if (u) return u;
    return HAPTIC_MACROS.find(m => m.id === norm) || null;
  }

  const HNE_USER_MACROS_KEY = 'hne_user_haptic_macros_v1';

  function loadUserMacros() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_USER_MACROS_KEY);
      if (!raw) return [];
      const arr = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!Array.isArray(arr)) return [];
      return arr.filter(m => m && typeof m === 'object' && typeof m.id === 'string' && Array.isArray(m.actions));
    } catch { return []; }
  }
  function saveUserMacros(arr) {
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_USER_MACROS_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr || [])); }
    catch (e) { notify.warn?.('Could not save macros: ' + (e.message || 'storage full')); }
  }

  const HNE_MACRO_SLOTS_KEY = 'hne_macro_slots_v1';
  function loadMacroSlots() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_MACRO_SLOTS_KEY);
      if (!raw) return {};
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return {};
      const out = {};
      for (let s = 1; s <= 5; s++) {
        const v = parsed[s] || parsed[String(s)];
        if (typeof v === 'string' && v) out[s] = v;
      }
      return out;
    } catch { return {}; }
  }
  function saveMacroSlots(slots) {
    const clean = {};
    for (let s = 1; s <= 5; s++) {
      if (slots && typeof slots[s] === 'string' && slots[s]) clean[s] = slots[s];
    }
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_MACRO_SLOTS_KEY, JSON.stringify(clean)); }
    catch (e) { notify.warn?.('Could not save slot bindings: ' + (e.message || 'storage full')); }
  }
  function setMacroSlot(slot, macroId) {
    const n = Number(slot);
    if (!Number.isInteger(n) || n < 1 || n > 5) return;
    const slots = loadMacroSlots();
    if (macroId) slots[n] = String(macroId);
    else delete slots[n];
    saveMacroSlots(slots);
  }
  function getMacroSlot(slot) {
    return loadMacroSlots()[Number(slot)] || null;
  }

  function _normalizeUserMacro(raw, existingIds = new Set()) {
    const baseRaw = String(raw?.id || raw?.name || 'macro').toLowerCase().trim();
    const base = baseRaw.startsWith('u_') ? baseRaw : 'u_' + baseRaw.replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/g, '_').slice(0, 28);
    let id = base, suffix = 1;
    const builtinIds = new Set(HAPTIC_MACROS.map(m => m.id));
    while (existingIds.has(id) || builtinIds.has(id)) id = base + '-' + (++suffix);

    const actions = (Array.isArray(raw?.actions) ? raw.actions : [])
      .map(a => ({
        at:  Math.max(0, Math.min(60000, Number(a?.at)  || 0)),
        pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100,   Number(a?.pos) || 0)),
      }))
      .filter(a => Number.isFinite(a.at) && Number.isFinite(a.pos))
      .sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
    return {
      id,
      name:        String(raw?.name || 'Untitled').slice(0, 60),
      icon:        String(raw?.icon || '🎵').slice(0, 4),
      description: String(raw?.description || '').slice(0, 240),
      actions,
      _custom:     true,
      _created:    Number(raw?._created) || Date.now(),
    };
  }

  const SENSOR_BRIDGE_RECONNECT_MS  = 3000;
  const SENSOR_BRIDGE_STALE_MS      = 5000;
  const SENSOR_BRIDGE_DEFAULT_URL   = 'ws://localhost:8765';
  const SENSOR_BRIDGE_SIGNALS = new Set([

    'heartRate', 'hrv', 'gsr', 'breath', 'eegFocus',

    // Round 29 — `relaxation` is a DERIVED signal: drop in BPM from the
    // user's per-session baseline, normalized 0-1. Auto-computed when raw
    // BPM arrives via the HR-OBS protocol; user-supplied bridges can also
    // push it directly. For hypnosis/relaxation sessions this is far more
    // useful than raw heartRate (which monotonically increases with arousal).
    'relaxation',

    'custom1', 'custom2', 'custom3',
  ]);

  // Round 29 — heart rate normalization & baseline tracking constants.
  // BPM_NORM_MIN/MAX clamp raw BPM into the 0-1 engagement-signal space.
  // Defaults cover the realistic resting-to-vigorous range for adults; the
  // small dead-band at the bottom (40 vs typical 50 bpm resting) leaves
  // headroom for athletic/sleeping users without clipping.
  const HR_BPM_NORM_MIN          = 40;
  const HR_BPM_NORM_MAX          = 180;
  // Baseline learns over the first BASELINE_WARMUP_MS of valid samples
  // after connect or resetBaseline(). 30 s is enough for most users to
  // settle into a still-but-not-deeply-relaxed state, and short enough
  // that the relaxation signal becomes useful well within the first
  // induction phase.
  const HR_BASELINE_WARMUP_MS    = 30_000;
  const HR_BASELINE_MIN_SAMPLES  = 10;
  // Drop in BPM that maps to relaxation = 1.0. 20 bpm below baseline is
  // a substantial parasympathetic shift — typical of mid/deep trance for
  // most users. Clamped, so anything beyond saturates at 1.
  const HR_RELAXATION_FULL_DROP  = 20;
  // Protocol detection tag for HR-OBS Monitor v2 messages.
  const HR_OBS_MESSAGE_TYPE      = 'heart_rate';
  // Engagement-engine weight applied to auto-translated HR-OBS signals.
  // Default 0 = signals are populated for rule access and HUD display
  // but do NOT pollute the engagement score unless the user opts in via
  // a rule. Keeps "just plug in HR-OBS" non-disruptive for existing
  // sessions while making the data fully available everywhere it's useful.
  const HR_OBS_DEFAULT_WEIGHT    = 0;

  const sensorBridge = (() => {
    let _ws          = null;
    let _wsUrl       = null;
    let _autoReconn  = false;
    let _reconnTimer = null;
    let _reconnCount = 0;
    let _enabled     = false;
    let _lastError   = null;
    const _stamps    = Object.create(null);
    const _values    = Object.create(null);
    let _staleTimer  = null;

    // Round 29 — heart-rate state. Independent of the engagement-signal map
    // because we want to display raw BPM in the HUD/status row even when
    // the engagement weight is 0. _hrSamples is a small ring of recent
    // {bpm,t} entries used to smooth and to compute the baseline.
    const HR_SAMPLE_BUFFER_MAX = 64;
    let _hrCurrentBpm   = null;       // Most recent raw BPM (null if stale/none)
    let _hrCurrentAt    = 0;          // Timestamp of _hrCurrentBpm
    let _hrBaseline     = null;       // Median of warm-up samples; null until learned
    let _hrBaselineLockedAt = 0;
    let _hrFirstSampleAt = 0;
    const _hrSamples    = [];         // {bpm, t} ring

    function _setStatus(state, text) {
      const dot = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeDot');
      const txt = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeStatusText');
      const row = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeStatusRow');
      if (!dot || !txt || !row) return;
      row.style.display = _enabled ? '' : 'none';
      const palette = {
        idle:        ['#888',                text || 'not connected'],
        connecting:  ['var(--neon-amber)',   text || 'connecting…'],
        connected:   ['#7dc87a',             text || 'connected'],
        reconnecting:['var(--neon-amber)',   text || `reconnecting (attempt ${_reconnCount})…`],
        error:       ['#ff6b6b',             text || (_lastError || 'error')],
      }[state] || ['#888', text || 'unknown'];
      dot.style.background = palette[0];
      txt.textContent = palette[1];
    }

    function _renderSignalsLine() {
      const line = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeSignalsLine');
      if (!line) return;
      const names = Object.keys(_values);
      if (!names.length) { line.textContent = ''; return; }
      line.textContent = names.map(n => `${n}=${_values[n].toFixed(2)}`).join(' · ');
    }

    // Round 29 — render the live BPM badge in the status row. Hidden when
    // there's no recent reading; shows raw BPM with a small drop-from-baseline
    // hint once the baseline has locked in (e.g. "♥ 68 bpm  −7 base").
    function _renderBpmBadge() {
      const badge = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeBpmBadge');
      const valEl = document.getElementById('sensorBridgeBpmValue');
      if (!badge || !valEl) return;
      const bpm = getCurrentBpm();
      if (!Number.isFinite(bpm)) {
        badge.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
      badge.style.display = 'inline-flex';
      let label = `${Math.round(bpm)}`;
      if (Number.isFinite(_hrBaseline)) {
        const drop = _hrBaseline - bpm;
        const sign = drop >= 0 ? '−' : '+';
        label += `  ${sign}${Math.abs(Math.round(drop))} base`;
      } else if (_hrFirstSampleAt) {
        const learned = Math.round((Date.now() - _hrFirstSampleAt) / 1000);
        const remaining = Math.max(0, Math.round(HR_BASELINE_WARMUP_MS / 1000) - learned);
        if (remaining > 0) label += `  base in ${remaining}s`;
      }
      valEl.textContent = label;
    }

    // Round 29 — pure: take a copy of recent samples and return the median.
    // Median (vs mean) makes the baseline robust to spurious spikes from
    // motion artefacts (typical of optical wrist sensors during the first
    // 30 s of a session as the user settles in).
    function _medianOf(arr) {
      if (!arr.length) return null;
      const sorted = arr.slice().sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const mid = sorted.length >> 1;
      return sorted.length % 2 ? sorted[mid] : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
    }

    // Round 29 — ingest a raw BPM reading. Updates the sample ring, learns
    // the baseline once warm-up completes, and pushes derived signals into
    // the engagement engine. Rejects out-of-range values silently (a watch
    // briefly reporting 0 BPM during a sync glitch shouldn't reset the
    // baseline). Caller handles the wire-format translation.
    function _ingestRawBpm(bpm, weight) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(bpm) || bpm < 25 || bpm > 240) return;
      const now = Date.now();
      _hrCurrentBpm = bpm;
      _hrCurrentAt  = now;
      if (!_hrFirstSampleAt) _hrFirstSampleAt = now;

      _hrSamples.push({ bpm, t: now });
      if (_hrSamples.length > HR_SAMPLE_BUFFER_MAX) _hrSamples.shift();

      // Learn baseline once we've collected enough samples and let the
      // warm-up window elapse. Median over the warm-up window is the
      // anchor for the relaxation signal for the rest of the session
      // (or until resetBaseline is called).
      if (_hrBaseline === null) {
        const warmupSamples = _hrSamples.filter(s => s.t - _hrFirstSampleAt <= HR_BASELINE_WARMUP_MS);
        const elapsed = now - _hrFirstSampleAt;
        if (elapsed >= HR_BASELINE_WARMUP_MS && warmupSamples.length >= HR_BASELINE_MIN_SAMPLES) {
          _hrBaseline = _medianOf(warmupSamples.map(s => s.bpm));
          _hrBaselineLockedAt = now;
        }
      }

      // Normalized heartRate signal — 0 at rest-floor, 1 at vigorous-ceiling.
      const heartRateNorm = Math.max(0, Math.min(1,
        (bpm - HR_BPM_NORM_MIN) / (HR_BPM_NORM_MAX - HR_BPM_NORM_MIN)
      ));
      const w = Number.isFinite(weight) ? weight : HR_OBS_DEFAULT_WEIGHT;
      _applySignal('heartRate', heartRateNorm, w);

      // Derived relaxation — only meaningful once baseline is locked.
      // Until then we keep relaxation at 0 with weight 0 so it doesn't
      // skew engagement during the warm-up.
      if (Number.isFinite(_hrBaseline)) {
        const drop = _hrBaseline - bpm;
        const relax = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, drop / HR_RELAXATION_FULL_DROP));
        _applySignal('relaxation', relax, w);
      }

      _renderBpmBadge();
    }

    function _applySignal(signal, value, weight) {
      if (!SENSOR_BRIDGE_SIGNALS.has(signal)) return;
      if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return;
      const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));
      const w = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number.isFinite(weight) ? weight : 0.3));
      try { setEngineSignal(signal, v, w); } catch {}
      _stamps[signal] = Date.now();
      _values[signal] = v;
      _renderSignalsLine();
    }

    function _handleMessage(msg) {
      if (!msg || typeof msg !== 'object') return;
      // Round 29 — HR-OBS Monitor v2 protocol auto-detection.
      // The OBS overlay ships {"type":"heart_rate","data":{"bpm":N,...}}
      // on the same socket the dashboard uses. We translate transparently
      // to the engine's normalized signal space and feed both raw heartRate
      // and the derived relaxation signal — no separate translator process
      // required. The optional config_updated message from HR-OBS is a UI
      // hint for the OBS overlay only; we silently ignore it here.
      if (msg.type === HR_OBS_MESSAGE_TYPE && msg.data && Number.isFinite(Number(msg.data.bpm))) {
        _ingestRawBpm(Number(msg.data.bpm), undefined);
        return;
      }
      if (msg.type === 'config_updated') {
        return;
      }
      // Generic HNE protocol — batch form.
      if (Array.isArray(msg.signals)) {
        for (const s of msg.signals) {
          if (s && typeof s === 'object') {
            // Allow user-supplied bridges to push raw BPM through the
            // generic protocol via {signal:"heartRateBpm",value:72}. Same
            // ingestion path as HR-OBS — single source of truth for
            // baseline + relaxation.
            if (s.signal === 'heartRateBpm') {
              _ingestRawBpm(Number(s.value), Number(s.weight));
            } else {
              _applySignal(s.signal, Number(s.value), s.weight);
            }
          }
        }
        return;
      }
      // Generic HNE protocol — single signal form.
      if (typeof msg.signal === 'string') {
        if (msg.signal === 'heartRateBpm') {
          _ingestRawBpm(Number(msg.value), Number(msg.weight));
        } else {
          _applySignal(msg.signal, Number(msg.value), msg.weight);
        }
        return;
      }
    }

    function _stalePrune() {
      const now = Date.now();
      let pruned = false;
      for (const name of Object.keys(_stamps)) {
        if (now - _stamps[name] > SENSOR_BRIDGE_STALE_MS) {
          delete _stamps[name];
          delete _values[name];
          pruned = true;
        }
      }
      if (pruned) {

        try { for (const name of SENSOR_BRIDGE_SIGNALS) {
          if (!(name in _stamps)) setEngineSignal(name, 0, 0);
        } } catch {}
        _renderSignalsLine();
      }
      // Round 29 — invalidate raw BPM display when the source goes silent.
      // (Stays separate from _stamps so we can show "stale" on the badge
      // without zeroing the engine signals more than once.)
      if (_hrCurrentBpm !== null && now - _hrCurrentAt > SENSOR_BRIDGE_STALE_MS) {
        _hrCurrentBpm = null;
        _renderBpmBadge();
      }
    }

    function _doConnect() {
      _setStatus('connecting');
      try {
        _ws = new WebSocket(_wsUrl);
      } catch (e) {
        _lastError = e?.message || 'invalid URL';
        _setStatus('error');
        _scheduleReconnect();
        return;
      }
      _ws.addEventListener('open', () => {
        _reconnCount = 0;
        _setStatus('connected', `connected · ${_wsUrl}`);
        notify.info(`Sensor bridge connected: ${_wsUrl}`, 3000);
      });
      _ws.addEventListener('message', e => {
        try { _handleMessage(JSON.parse(e.data)); } catch {  }
      });
      _ws.addEventListener('close', () => {
        _ws = null;
        _setStatus('idle');
        _stalePrune();
        if (_autoReconn) _scheduleReconnect();
      });
      _ws.addEventListener('error', () => {

        _lastError = 'socket error';
      });
    }

    function _scheduleReconnect() {
      if (!_autoReconn) return;
      clearTimeout(_reconnTimer);
      _reconnCount++;
      const delay = Math.min(SENSOR_BRIDGE_RECONNECT_MS * _reconnCount, 30_000);
      _setStatus('reconnecting');
      _reconnTimer = setTimeout(() => { if (_autoReconn) _doConnect(); }, delay);
    }

    function connect(wsUrl) {
      disconnect();
      _wsUrl = wsUrl || SENSOR_BRIDGE_DEFAULT_URL;
      _autoReconn = true;
      _reconnCount = 0;
      _doConnect();

      if (!_staleTimer) _staleTimer = setInterval(_stalePrune, 1000);
    }

    function disconnect() {
      _autoReconn = false;
      clearTimeout(_reconnTimer); _reconnTimer = null;
      if (_staleTimer) { clearInterval(_staleTimer); _staleTimer = null; }
      if (_ws) {
        try { _ws.close(); } catch {}
        _ws = null;
      }

      try { for (const name of SENSOR_BRIDGE_SIGNALS) setEngineSignal(name, 0, 0); } catch {}
      for (const k of Object.keys(_stamps)) delete _stamps[k];
      for (const k of Object.keys(_values)) delete _values[k];
      _renderSignalsLine();
      // Round 29 — also clear HR-specific state so a fresh connect starts
      // with a clean baseline-learning window. resetBaseline() does the
      // same job mid-session without dropping the WS.
      _hrCurrentBpm = null; _hrCurrentAt = 0;
      _hrBaseline = null; _hrBaselineLockedAt = 0;
      _hrFirstSampleAt = 0;
      _hrSamples.length = 0;
      _renderBpmBadge();
      _setStatus('idle');
    }

    function isConnected() { return _ws?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN; }
    function setEnabled(v) { _enabled = !!v; _setStatus(isConnected() ? 'connected' : 'idle'); }

    // Round 29 — public read API. Exposed so the HUD, session-history
    // serializer, rules engine (via getEngineMetric), and the in-app
    // diagnostic chip can all read the same numbers without poking
    // private module state. Returns null when no fresh reading exists
    // — callers should treat null as "not available", not as zero.
    function getCurrentBpm() {
      if (!Number.isFinite(_hrCurrentBpm)) return null;
      if (Date.now() - _hrCurrentAt > SENSOR_BRIDGE_STALE_MS) return null;
      return _hrCurrentBpm;
    }
    function getBaseline() {
      return Number.isFinite(_hrBaseline) ? _hrBaseline : null;
    }
    function getRelaxationScore() {
      const bpm = getCurrentBpm();
      if (!Number.isFinite(bpm) || !Number.isFinite(_hrBaseline)) return 0;
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (_hrBaseline - bpm) / HR_RELAXATION_FULL_DROP));
    }
    // Round 29 — re-arm the baseline learning window. Called automatically
    // at startSession() so the baseline reflects the user's "settled in"
    // state at the start of the session, not the state when they first
    // turned on the bridge (which may have been minutes earlier while
    // they were still configuring the wizard).
    function resetBaseline() {
      _hrBaseline = null;
      _hrBaselineLockedAt = 0;
      _hrFirstSampleAt = _hrCurrentBpm !== null ? Date.now() : 0;
      _hrSamples.length = 0;
      // Don't clear _hrCurrentBpm — we want the badge to keep showing
      // the live BPM during the warm-up window, just without a baseline
      // hint until the new window completes.
      _renderBpmBadge();
    }

    return {
      connect, disconnect, isConnected, setEnabled,
      getCurrentBpm, getBaseline, getRelaxationScore, resetBaseline,
    };
  })();

  $('hapticOptInThisSession')?.addEventListener('change', async e => {
    const checked = e.target.checked;
    hapticBridge.setEnabled(checked);

    const fsRow = $('funscriptRow'); if (fsRow) fsRow.style.display = checked ? '' : 'none';
    if (checked) {
      const ok = await hapticBridge.connect();
      if (!ok) {
        notify.warn('Haptic device: could not connect. Install Intiface Central from intiface.com and start it before enabling.', 8000);
      } else if (!hapticBridge.isReady()) {
        notify.info('Haptic device: connected to Intiface, but no devices found. Add a device in Intiface and toggle off/on to rescan.', 7000);
      } else {
        notify.success(`Haptic device ready · ${hapticBridge.getDevices().length} connected.`);
      }
    } else {

      try { funscriptEngine.stop(); } catch {}

      try { _stopHeatmapPlayhead(); } catch {}
      await hapticBridge.disconnect();
    }
  });
  $('hapticTestBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    hapticBridge.pulse(0.5, 800);
    notify.info('Test pulse sent.');

    try { hapticBridge.refreshBatteries?.().catch(() => {}); } catch {}
  });
  $('hapticReconnectBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    await hapticBridge.disconnect();
    const ok = await hapticBridge.connect();
    if (!ok) notify.warn('Reconnect failed. Make sure Intiface Central is running.');
  });

  funscriptEngine.setOnTrackChange((track, filename) => {
    const status = $('funscriptStatus');
    const clear  = $('funscriptClearBtn');
    if (!status) return;
    if (track) {
      const dur = _funscriptDuration(track);
      const mins = Math.floor(dur / 60);
      const secs = Math.round(dur % 60);
      status.textContent = `loaded: ${filename || 'track'} · ${mins}:${String(secs).padStart(2,'0')} · ${track.actions.length} points`;
      status.style.fontStyle = 'normal';
      status.style.color = 'var(--text)';
      if (clear) clear.style.display = '';
    } else {
      status.textContent = 'no track loaded';
      status.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
      status.style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
      if (clear) clear.style.display = 'none';
    }

    try { _refreshFunscriptHeatmap(); } catch {}
  });
  $('funscriptFile')?.addEventListener('change', async e => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    if (file.size > FUNSCRIPT_MAX_BYTES) {
      notify.warn(`FunScript too large (${(file.size/1e6).toFixed(1)} MB). Max: ${FUNSCRIPT_MAX_BYTES/1e6} MB.`);
      e.target.value = ''; return;
    }
    try {
      const text = await file.text();
      const parsed = _parseFunScript(text);
      funscriptEngine.loadTrack(parsed, file.name);
      const dur = _funscriptDuration(parsed);
      notify.success(`FunScript loaded · ${parsed.actions.length} points · ${Math.round(dur)}s`);
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('[funscript] load failed:', err);
      notify.error(`FunScript load failed: ${err.message || 'invalid file'}`);
    }

    e.target.value = '';
  });
  $('funscriptClearBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    funscriptEngine.clearTrack();
    notify.info('FunScript cleared.');
  });

  $('hapticMacroLibraryBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    try { _openHapticMacroLibrary(); }
    catch (e) { notify.error('Macro library unavailable: ' + (e?.message || e)); }
  });

  $('funscriptEditorBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    try { _openPatternEditor(); }
    catch (e) { notify.error('Pattern editor unavailable: ' + (e?.message || e)); }
  });

  $('funscriptSessionAutoBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    try {
      const track = buildAutoFunscriptForSession();
      const meta  = track._autoMeta || {};
      const dur   = _funscriptDuration(track);
      const m = Math.floor(dur / 60), s = Math.round(dur % 60);
      const filename = `session-auto · ${meta.length || '?'}${meta.intentionType && meta.intentionType !== 'general' ? ' · ' + meta.intentionType : ''}`;
      funscriptEngine.loadTrack(track, filename);
      notify.success(`Auto-track ready · ${m}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')} · ${track.actions.length} points · ${meta.phaseCount} phases`);
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[funscript-auto] generation failed:', e);
      notify.error('Auto-track failed: ' + (e?.message || e));
    }
  });

  function buildBpmFunscript({
    bpm         = 80,
    durationSec = 60,
    shape       = 'sine',
    amplitude   = 90,
    baseline    = 10,
    barsPerBeat = 1,
  } = {}) {

    const safeBPM   = Number.isFinite(bpm)         ? bpm         : 80;
    const safeDur   = Number.isFinite(durationSec) ? durationSec : 60;
    const safeAmp   = Number.isFinite(amplitude)   ? amplitude   : 90;
    const safeBase  = Number.isFinite(baseline)    ? baseline    : 10;
    const safeBars  = Number.isFinite(barsPerBeat) ? barsPerBeat : 1;
    const clampBPM  = Math.max(30,  Math.min(240, safeBPM));
    const clampDur  = Math.max(1,   Math.min(7200, safeDur));
    const beatMs    = (60 / clampBPM) * 1000;
    const stepMs    = beatMs / Math.max(1, Math.min(8, safeBars));
    const totalMs   = clampDur * 1000;

    const lo = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.min(safeBase, safeAmp)));
    const hi = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.max(safeBase, safeAmp)));
    const amp = hi - lo;
    const SHAPES = {
      sine:     frac => lo + amp * (0.5 - 0.5 * Math.cos(frac * Math.PI * 2)),
      square:   frac => frac < 0.5 ? hi : lo,

      sawtooth: frac => frac < 0.7 ? lo + amp * (frac / 0.7) : hi - amp * ((frac - 0.7) / 0.3),

      bounce:   frac => {
        const x = frac * 2;
        if (x < 1) return lo + amp * (1 - (x - 1) * (x - 1));
        return lo + amp * 0.3 * Math.sin((x - 1) * Math.PI);
      },
    };
    const fn = SHAPES[shape] || SHAPES.sine;
    const actions = [];
    for (let t = 0; t <= totalMs; t += stepMs) {
      const beatFrac = (t % beatMs) / beatMs;
      const pos = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(fn(beatFrac))));
      actions.push({ at: Math.round(t), pos });
    }
    return {
      version:  1,
      inverted: false,
      range:    100,

      loop:     true,
      actions,
      _bpmMeta: { bpm: clampBPM, shape, amplitude: hi, baseline: lo, barsPerBeat: safeBars, durationSec: clampDur },
    };
  }

  $('funscriptBpmBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
      <h2>🥁 BPM-synced track</h2>
      <p style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:14px">
        Generate a tempo-locked haptic curve. The track loops, so a 30-second pattern at 80 BPM will repeat for the duration of any session.
      </p>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px 1fr 60px;gap:8px 12px;align-items:center;font-size:0.74rem">
        <label for="_bpm_bpm">BPM</label>
        <input type="range" id="_bpm_bpm" min="30" max="240" step="1" value="80" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_bpm_bpm_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">80</span>

        <label for="_bpm_duration">Duration (s)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_bpm_duration" min="5" max="600" step="5" value="60" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_bpm_duration_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">60</span>

        <label for="_bpm_amp">Amplitude (peak)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_bpm_amp" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="90" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_bpm_amp_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">90</span>

        <label for="_bpm_base">Baseline (low)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_bpm_base" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="10" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_bpm_base_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">10</span>

        <label for="_bpm_shape">Waveform</label>
        <select id="_bpm_shape" style="grid-column:span 2;padding:4px 8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
          <option value="sine">Sine — smooth in/out</option>
          <option value="square">Square — abrupt on/off</option>
          <option value="sawtooth">Sawtooth — slow rise, quick fall</option>
          <option value="bounce">Bounce — parabolic with after-tap</option>
        </select>

        <label for="_bpm_subdivision">Subdivision</label>
        <select id="_bpm_subdivision" style="grid-column:span 2;padding:4px 8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
          <option value="1">1× — one stroke per beat (quarter notes)</option>
          <option value="2">2× — eighth notes</option>
          <option value="4" selected>4× — sixteenth notes (smooth motion)</option>
          <option value="8">8× — thirty-second notes (intense)</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:18px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_bpm_cancel">cancel</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_bpm_apply">generate &amp; load</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
    const $$ = (id) => backdrop.querySelector('#' + id);

    const bind = (id, suffix = '') => {
      const slider = $$(id);
      const label  = $$(id + '_v');
      if (!slider || !label) return;
      const update = () => { label.textContent = slider.value + suffix; };
      slider.addEventListener('input', update);
      update();
    };
    bind('_bpm_bpm');
    bind('_bpm_duration');
    bind('_bpm_amp');
    bind('_bpm_base');
    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    $$('_bpm_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });
    $$('_bpm_apply').addEventListener('click', () => {
      try {
        const track = buildBpmFunscript({
          bpm:         parseFloat($$('_bpm_bpm').value),
          durationSec: parseFloat($$('_bpm_duration').value),
          shape:       $$('_bpm_shape').value,
          amplitude:   parseFloat($$('_bpm_amp').value),
          baseline:    parseFloat($$('_bpm_base').value),
          barsPerBeat: parseFloat($$('_bpm_subdivision').value),
        });
        const meta = track._bpmMeta || {};
        const filename = `bpm · ${meta.bpm}@${meta.shape} · ${meta.durationSec}s`;
        funscriptEngine.loadTrack(track, filename);
        close();
        notify.success(`BPM track loaded · ${meta.bpm} BPM ${meta.shape} · ${track.actions.length} points`);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[bpm-funscript]', e);
        notify.error('BPM generation failed: ' + (e?.message || e));
      }
    });
  });

  const _AUDIO_FS_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
    windowMs:     80,
    smoothPasses:  5,
    basePct:       5,
    peakPct:      95,
    onsetBoost:  1.0,
  });

  function _audioRmsWindow(samples, start, len) {
    let sum = 0;
    const end = Math.min(start + len, samples.length);
    for (let i = start; i < end; i++) sum += samples[i] * samples[i];
    return Math.sqrt(sum / Math.max(1, end - start));
  }

  function _audioMovingAverage(arr, radius) {
    const out = new Float32Array(arr.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
      let s = 0, n = 0;
      const lo = Math.max(0, i - radius);
      const hi = Math.min(arr.length - 1, i + radius);
      for (let j = lo; j <= hi; j++) { s += arr[j]; n++; }
      out[i] = s / n;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _audioEnhanceOnsets(envelope, boost) {
    if (boost <= 0) return envelope;
    const out = new Float32Array(envelope.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < envelope.length; i++) {
      const delta = i > 0 ? Math.max(0, envelope[i] - envelope[i - 1]) : 0;
      out[i] = envelope[i] + delta * boost;
    }
    return out;
  }

  async function analyzeAudioBuffer(arrayBuffer, opts = {}, onProgress = null) {
    const o = { ..._AUDIO_FS_DEFAULTS, ...opts };
    onProgress?.('Decoding audio…', 5);

    const Ctor = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
    if (!Ctor) throw new Error('Web Audio API not available in this browser');
    const ctx = new Ctor();
    let decoded;
    try { decoded = await ctx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer.slice(0)); }
    finally { try { await ctx.close(); } catch {} }

    const sampleRate  = decoded.sampleRate;
    const durationMs  = Math.round(decoded.duration * 1000);
    onProgress?.('Mixing to mono…', 15);

    const numCh  = decoded.numberOfChannels;
    const length = decoded.length;
    const mono   = new Float32Array(length);
    for (let ch = 0; ch < numCh; ch++) {
      const data = decoded.getChannelData(ch);
      for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) mono[i] += data[i] / numCh;
    }
    onProgress?.('Computing RMS envelope…', 30);
    const windowSamples = Math.max(1, Math.round((o.windowMs / 1000) * sampleRate));
    const hopSamples    = Math.max(1, Math.round(windowSamples / 2));
    const frameCount    = Math.ceil(length / hopSamples);
    const envelope      = new Float32Array(frameCount);
    for (let f = 0; f < frameCount; f++) {
      envelope[f] = _audioRmsWindow(mono, f * hopSamples, windowSamples);
      if (f % 500 === 0) onProgress?.('Analysing energy…', 30 + Math.round((f / frameCount) * 30));
    }
    onProgress?.('Detecting onsets…', 65);
    const boosted = _audioEnhanceOnsets(envelope, o.onsetBoost);
    onProgress?.('Smoothing envelope…', 72);
    let smoothed = boosted;
    const radius = Math.max(1, Math.round(o.smoothPasses * 2));
    const passes = Math.ceil(o.smoothPasses / 2);
    for (let p = 0; p < passes; p++) smoothed = _audioMovingAverage(smoothed, radius);
    onProgress?.('Normalising…', 82);

    const sorted = Float32Array.from(smoothed).sort();
    const minVal = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.01)] || 0;
    const maxVal = sorted[Math.max(0, Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.99) - 1)] || 1e-6;
    const range  = (maxVal - minVal) || 1e-6;
    const normalised = new Float32Array(smoothed.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < smoothed.length; i++) {
      normalised[i] = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (smoothed[i] - minVal) / range));
    }
    onProgress?.('Building funscript actions…', 90);

    const maxPoints  = 4000;
    const stepFrames = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(frameCount / maxPoints));
    const hopMs      = (hopSamples / sampleRate) * 1000;
    const actions = [];
    for (let f = 0; f < frameCount; f += stepFrames) {
      const t   = Math.round(f * hopMs);
      const val = normalised[f];
      const pos = Math.round(o.basePct + (o.peakPct - o.basePct) * val);
      actions.push({ at: t, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, pos)) });
    }

    if (!actions.length || actions[actions.length - 1].at < durationMs - 50) {
      actions.push({ at: durationMs, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(o.basePct))) });
    }
    onProgress?.('Done.', 100);
    return { actions, durationMs, envelope: normalised, hopMs };
  }

  function _drawAudioEnvelopePreview(canvas, envelope) {
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    if (!envelope || !envelope.length) return;

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, H);
    for (let i = 0; i < envelope.length; i++) {
      const x = (i / (envelope.length - 1)) * W;
      const y = H - envelope[i] * (H - 2) - 1;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, H);
      ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.lineTo(W, H);
    ctx.closePath();
    const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
    grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(127,176,255,0.7)');
    grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(64,100,200,0.2)');
    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let i = 0; i < envelope.length; i++) {
      const x = (i / (envelope.length - 1)) * W;
      const y = H - envelope[i] * (H - 2) - 1;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y); else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(127,176,255,0.9)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  $('funscriptFromAudioBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:560px">
      <h2>🎵 Generate from audio</h2>
      <p style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px">
        Drop an audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, etc.) — the haptic track will follow its energy envelope. Music drives the strokes by loudness; quiet parts pull back, peaks push forward. Max 50 MB.
      </p>
      <label for="_aud_file" class="btn secondary" style="display:inline-block;padding:6px 14px;font-size:0.74rem;cursor:pointer;margin:0 0 12px 0">📁 choose audio file</label>
      <input type="file" id="_aud_file" accept="audio/*" style="display:none">
      <div id="_aud_filename" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:10px;font-style:italic">no file selected</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px 1fr 60px;gap:8px 12px;align-items:center;font-size:0.74rem">
        <label for="_aud_base">Base pos (%)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_aud_base" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="5" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_aud_base_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">5</span>
        <label for="_aud_peak">Peak pos (%)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_aud_peak" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="95" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_aud_peak_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">95</span>
        <label for="_aud_window">Window (ms)</label>
        <input type="range" id="_aud_window" min="20" max="200" step="10" value="80" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_aud_window_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">80</span>
        <label for="_aud_onset">Onset boost</label>
        <input type="range" id="_aud_onset" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width:100%">
        <span id="_aud_onset_v" style="font-family:monospace;text-align:right">1.0</span>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px">
        <canvas id="_aud_preview" width="520" height="80" style="display:block;width:100%;height:80px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px"></canvas>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:10px;height:18px">
        <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);height:6px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden">
          <div id="_aud_progress_bar" style="height:100%;width:0%;background:var(--neon-cyan);transition:width 0.2s"></div>
        </div>
        <div id="_aud_progress_label" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:3px;font-family:monospace"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_aud_cancel">cancel</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_aud_analyze" disabled>analyze &amp; load</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
    const $$ = (id) => backdrop.querySelector('#' + id);
    const bind = (id) => {
      const slider = $$(id), label = $$(id + '_v');
      if (!slider || !label) return;
      const u = () => label.textContent = slider.value;
      slider.addEventListener('input', u); u();
    };
    ['_aud_base', '_aud_peak', '_aud_window', '_aud_onset'].forEach(bind);

    let _audFile = null;
    const fileEl = $$('_aud_file');
    const nameEl = $$('_aud_filename');
    const analyzeBtn = $$('_aud_analyze');
    fileEl.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
      const f = e.target.files?.[0];
      if (!f) return;

      if (f.size > 50 * 1024 * 1024) {
        notify.error('File too large (max 50 MB).');
        fileEl.value = '';
        return;
      }
      _audFile = f;
      nameEl.textContent = `${f.name} · ${(f.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB`;
      analyzeBtn.disabled = false;
    });

    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    $$('_aud_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });

    analyzeBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      if (!_audFile) return;
      analyzeBtn.disabled = true;
      const progBar = $$('_aud_progress_bar');
      const progLbl = $$('_aud_progress_label');
      const onProgress = (label, pct) => {
        progLbl.textContent = label || '';
        progBar.style.width = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, pct || 0)) + '%';
      };
      try {
        const arrayBuffer = await _audFile.arrayBuffer();
        const opts = {
          basePct:    parseFloat($$('_aud_base').value),
          peakPct:    parseFloat($$('_aud_peak').value),
          windowMs:   parseFloat($$('_aud_window').value),
          onsetBoost: parseFloat($$('_aud_onset').value),
        };
        const result = await analyzeAudioBuffer(arrayBuffer, opts, onProgress);

        const canvas = $$('_aud_preview');
        canvas.width = canvas.clientWidth || 520;
        _drawAudioEnvelopePreview(canvas, result.envelope);

        const track = {
          version: 1, inverted: false, range: 100, loop: false,
          actions: result.actions,
          _audioMeta: {
            source: _audFile.name,
            durationMs: result.durationMs,
            opts,
          },
        };
        const baseName = _audFile.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
        funscriptEngine.loadTrack(track, `audio: ${baseName}`);
        const m = Math.floor(result.durationMs / 60000);
        const s = Math.round((result.durationMs % 60000) / 1000);
        notify.success(`Audio track loaded · ${m}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')} · ${result.actions.length} points`);

        setTimeout(close, 800);
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[audio-funscript]', e);
        notify.error('Audio analysis failed: ' + (e?.message || e));
        analyzeBtn.disabled = false;
        progLbl.textContent = '';
        progBar.style.width = '0%';
      }
    });
  });

  function _populateSecondarySourceDropdown() {
    const sel = $('funscriptSecondarySource');
    if (!sel) return;
    const cur = sel.value;
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">choose source…</option>';

    const builtinGroup = document.createElement('optgroup');
    builtinGroup.label = 'Built-in patterns';
    for (const p of FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS) {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = 'builtin:' + p.id;
      opt.textContent = `${p.icon || '🎵'} ${p.name}`;
      builtinGroup.appendChild(opt);
    }
    sel.appendChild(builtinGroup);

    const userPatterns = (typeof loadUserPatterns === 'function') ? loadUserPatterns() : [];
    if (userPatterns.length) {
      const userGroup = document.createElement('optgroup');
      userGroup.label = 'Your patterns';
      for (const p of userPatterns) {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = 'user:' + p.id;
        opt.textContent = `${p.icon || '🎵'} ${p.name}`;
        userGroup.appendChild(opt);
      }
      sel.appendChild(userGroup);
    }
    sel.value = cur;
  }

  function _renderSecondaryTracksList() {
    const list = $('funscriptSecondariesList');
    const count = $('funscriptSecondariesCount');
    if (!list) return;
    const items = funscriptEngine.listSecondaries?.() || [];
    if (count) count.textContent = items.length ? `— ${items.length} active` : '— none';
    if (!items.length) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;padding:4px 0">No secondary tracks loaded.</div>';
      return;
    }
    const AXIS_ICON = { vibrate: '〰', rotate: '↻', oscillate: '↔' };
    list.innerHTML = items.map(s => {
      const ico = AXIS_ICON[s.axis] || '·';
      return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)">
        <span style="font-family:monospace;color:var(--text-dim);min-width:14px">${ico}</span>
        <span style="font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.05em;color:var(--neon-cyan);min-width:54px">${escapeHtml(s.axis)}</span>
        <span style="flex:1;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${escapeHtml(s.name || '(unnamed)')}</span>
        <button type="button" class="btn secondary fs-secondary-remove" data-axis="${escapeHtml(s.axis)}" style="padding:1px 8px;font-size:0.6rem">remove</button>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    list.querySelectorAll('.fs-secondary-remove').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const axis = btn.dataset.axis;
        funscriptEngine.clearSecondaryTrack(axis);
        _renderSecondaryTracksList();
      });
    });
  }

  try {
    funscriptEngine.setOnSecondaryChange?.(() => { _renderSecondaryTracksList(); });
  } catch {}

  $('funscriptSecondaryLoadBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const sel = $('funscriptSecondarySource');
    const axisSel = $('funscriptSecondaryAxis');
    if (!sel || !axisSel) return;
    const sourceId = sel.value;
    const axis = axisSel.value;
    if (!sourceId) { notify.warn('Pick a source pattern first.'); return; }
    if (!['vibrate','rotate','oscillate'].includes(axis)) { notify.warn('Invalid axis.'); return; }
    let track = null, name = '';
    if (sourceId.startsWith('builtin:')) {
      const id = sourceId.slice(8);
      track = _funscriptFromPattern(id);
      const p = FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS.find(x => x.id === id);
      name = p ? p.name : id;
    } else if (sourceId.startsWith('user:')) {
      const id = sourceId.slice(5);
      const userPatterns = (typeof loadUserPatterns === 'function') ? loadUserPatterns() : [];
      const p = userPatterns.find(x => x.id === id);
      if (p) { track = _trackFromAnyPattern(p); name = p.name; }
    }
    if (!track) { notify.error('Could not load that source.'); return; }
    funscriptEngine.setSecondaryTrack(axis, track, name);
    notify.success(`Secondary track loaded on ${axis}: ${name}`);
  });

  $('funscriptSecondaryFile')?.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
    const f = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!f) return;
    const axisSel = $('funscriptSecondaryAxis');
    const axis = axisSel?.value || 'vibrate';
    if (!['vibrate','rotate','oscillate'].includes(axis)) { notify.warn('Invalid axis.'); return; }
    if (f.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) { notify.error('File too large (max 5 MB).'); e.target.value = ''; return; }
    try {
      const text = await f.text();
      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
      const track = _parseFunScript(parsed);
      track.loop = false;
      const name = f.name.replace(/\.funscript$/i, '').slice(0, 60);
      funscriptEngine.setSecondaryTrack(axis, track, name);
      notify.success(`Secondary track loaded on ${axis}: ${name}`);
    } catch (err) {
      notify.error('Invalid funscript: ' + (err?.message || err));
    } finally {
      e.target.value = '';
    }
  });

  $('funscriptSecondaryClearAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    funscriptEngine.clearAllSecondaries();
    notify.info('All secondary tracks cleared.');
  });

  setTimeout(() => {
    try { _populateSecondarySourceDropdown(); _renderSecondaryTracksList(); }
    catch (e) { console.warn('[fs-secondary init]', e); }
  }, 100);

  function _refreshSpeedPresetChips() {
    const slider = document.getElementById('liveCtrlSpeed');
    if (!slider) return;
    const cur = parseFloat(slider.value);
    document.querySelectorAll('.speed-preset-chip').forEach(chip => {
      const v = parseFloat(chip.getAttribute('data-speed'));
      const active = Math.abs(v - cur) < 0.025;
      chip.classList.toggle('active', active);
    });
  }

  function _initLiveControlPanel() {
    const lc = _ensureLiveControl();
    const intensity = $('liveCtrlIntensity'), speed = $('liveCtrlSpeed'), random = $('liveCtrlRandom');
    if (!intensity) return;
    const setLabel = (el, fmt) => {
      const span = $(el.id + 'V');
      if (span) span.textContent = fmt(parseFloat(el.value));
    };
    intensity.value = lc.intensityScale;
    speed.value     = lc.speedScale;
    random.value    = lc.randomness;
    setLabel(intensity, v => v.toFixed(2) + '×');
    setLabel(speed,     v => v.toFixed(2) + '×');
    setLabel(random,    v => Math.round(v * 100) + '%');
    intensity.addEventListener('input', e => {
      lc.intensityScale = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      setLabel(e.target, v => v.toFixed(2) + '×');
    });
    speed.addEventListener('input', e => {
      lc.speedScale = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      setLabel(e.target, v => v.toFixed(2) + '×');
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('.speed-preset-chip').forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', e => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.currentTarget.getAttribute('data-speed'));
        if (!Number.isFinite(v)) return;
        speed.value = v;
        speed.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        _refreshSpeedPresetChips();
      });
    });

    speed.addEventListener('input', _refreshSpeedPresetChips);
    _refreshSpeedPresetChips();
    random.addEventListener('input', e => {
      lc.randomness = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      setLabel(e.target, v => Math.round(v * 100) + '%');
    });

    const ramp = state.rampSettings || (state.rampSettings = loadRampSettings());
    const enableEl = $('rampEnable');
    const panel    = $('rampPanel');
    if (!enableEl) return;
    enableEl.checked = !!ramp.enabled;
    if (panel) panel.style.display = ramp.enabled ? '' : 'none';
    $('rampMode').value = ramp.mode;
    $('rampCurve').value = ramp.curve;
    $('rampStart').value = ramp.startVal;
    $('rampEnd').value   = ramp.endVal;
    $('rampBlend').value = ramp.blendMode;
    const _persist = () => saveRampSettings(ramp);
    enableEl.addEventListener('change', e => {
      ramp.enabled = e.target.checked;
      if (panel) panel.style.display = ramp.enabled ? '' : 'none';
      _persist();
    });
    $('rampMode')?.addEventListener('change', e => { ramp.mode = e.target.value; _persist(); });
    $('rampCurve')?.addEventListener('change', e => { ramp.curve = e.target.value; _persist(); });
    $('rampStart')?.addEventListener('change', e => { ramp.startVal = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0.5)); e.target.value = ramp.startVal; _persist(); });
    $('rampEnd')?.addEventListener('change',   e => { ramp.endVal   = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 1.5)); e.target.value = ramp.endVal; _persist(); });
    $('rampBlend')?.addEventListener('change', e => { ramp.blendMode = e.target.value; _persist(); });

    setInterval(() => {
      const det = $('liveControlDetails');
      if (!det || !det.open) return;
      const line = $('rampStatusLine');
      if (!line) return;
      const eff = state._rampActiveIntensity;
      if (eff == null) {
        line.textContent = ramp.enabled ? 'ramp: starting…' : '';
      } else {
        line.textContent = `ramp target: ${eff.toFixed(2)}× (manual: ${(state.liveControl?.intensityScale || 1).toFixed(2)}×)`;
      }
    }, 500);

    const pacing = state.pacingSettings || (state.pacingSettings = loadPacingSettings());
    const pcEnable = $('pacingEnable');
    const pcPanel  = $('pacingPanel');
    if (pcEnable) {
      pcEnable.checked = !!pacing.enabled;
      if (pcPanel) pcPanel.style.display = pacing.enabled ? '' : 'none';
      const setIfPresent = (id, v) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = v; };
      setIfPresent('pacingMin',    pacing.minSpeed);
      setIfPresent('pacingMax',    pacing.maxSpeed);
      setIfPresent('pacingCurve',  pacing.curve);
      setIfPresent('pacingSmooth', pacing.smoothingSec);
      setIfPresent('pacingLock',   pacing.lockDuringSec);
      const _persistPacing = () => {
        state.pacingSettings = _normalizePacingSettings(pacing);
        savePacingSettings(state.pacingSettings);
      };
      pcEnable.addEventListener('change', e => {
        pacing.enabled = e.target.checked;
        if (pcPanel) pcPanel.style.display = pacing.enabled ? '' : 'none';

        if (pacing.enabled) {
          const s = $('liveCtrlSpeed');
          if (s) _pacingCurrentSpeed = parseFloat(s.value) || 1.0;
        }
        _persistPacing();
      });
      $('pacingMin')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        const v = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0.5));
        pacing.minSpeed = v; e.target.value = v; _persistPacing();
      });
      $('pacingMax')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        const v = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 2.0));
        pacing.maxSpeed = v; e.target.value = v; _persistPacing();
      });
      $('pacingCurve')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        pacing.curve = ['linear','exponential','sine'].includes(e.target.value) ? e.target.value : 'linear';
        _persistPacing();
      });
      $('pacingSmooth')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(30, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 4));
        pacing.smoothingSec = v; e.target.value = v; _persistPacing();
      });
      $('pacingLock')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
        const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(60, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0));
        pacing.lockDuringSec = v; e.target.value = v; _persistPacing();
      });

      setInterval(() => {
        const det = $('liveControlDetails');
        if (!det || !det.open) return;
        const line = $('pacingStatusLine');
        if (!line) return;
        if (!pacing.enabled) { line.textContent = ''; return; }
        const eng = state.engineState?.engagement;
        const engTxt = (typeof eng === 'number') ? eng.toFixed(2) : '—';
        line.textContent = `pacing: ${_pacingCurrentSpeed.toFixed(2)}× (engagement: ${engTxt})`;
      }, 500);
    }
  }

  setTimeout(() => { try { _initLiveControlPanel(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[live-control init]', e); } }, 50);

  $('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const checked = e.target.checked;
    sensorBridge.setEnabled(checked);
    if (checked) {
      const url = ($('sensorBridgeUrl')?.value || '').trim() || 'ws://localhost:8765';

      if (!/^wss?:\/\/(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1|\[::1\])(:\d+)?(\/|$)/i.test(url)) {
        notify.warn('Sensor bridge URL is not loopback. Local-only adapters are recommended.', 6000);
      }
      sensorBridge.connect(url);
    } else {
      sensorBridge.disconnect();
    }
  });
  $('sensorBridgeReconnectBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (!$('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession')?.checked) return;
    const url = ($('sensorBridgeUrl')?.value || '').trim() || 'ws://localhost:8765';
    sensorBridge.disconnect();
    sensorBridge.connect(url);
  });

  // Round 29 — URL preset chips. Tap to fill the URL field with the
  // common ports (generic 8765, HR-OBS 8080). If the bridge is already
  // active, also reconnect immediately so the change takes effect without
  // an extra tap on "reconnect". Delegated to the panel so future presets
  // (Polar adapter, Muse bridge, etc.) drop in without extra wiring.
  document.querySelectorAll('.sensor-bridge-preset').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const url = btn.getAttribute('data-url');
      if (!url) return;
      const input = $('sensorBridgeUrl');
      if (input) input.value = url;
      if ($('sensorBridgeOptInThisSession')?.checked) {
        sensorBridge.disconnect();
        sensorBridge.connect(url);
      } else {
        notify.info(`URL set to ${url} — toggle the bridge on to connect.`, 4000);
      }
    });
  });

  const HNE_USER_PATTERNS_KEY = 'hne_user_funscript_patterns_v1';

  function loadUserPatterns() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(HNE_USER_PATTERNS_KEY);
      if (!raw) return [];
      const arr = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!Array.isArray(arr)) return [];
      return arr.filter(p => p && typeof p === 'object' && typeof p.id === 'string' && Array.isArray(p.actions));
    } catch { return []; }
  }

  function saveUserPatterns(patterns) {
    try { localStorage.setItem(HNE_USER_PATTERNS_KEY, JSON.stringify(patterns || [])); }
    catch (e) { notify.warn('Could not save patterns: ' + (e.message || 'storage full')); }
  }

  function _normalizeUserPattern(p, existingIds = new Set()) {
    const safeIcon = typeof p.icon === 'string' && p.icon.length <= 4 ? p.icon : '🎵';
    const baseId = (typeof p.id === 'string' && /^[\w-]+$/.test(p.id)) ? p.id : ('user-' + Date.now().toString(36));
    let id = baseId;
    let suffix = 1;
    while (existingIds.has(id)) id = baseId + '-' + (++suffix);
    const range = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(p.range) || 100));
    const actions = (Array.isArray(p.actions) ? p.actions : [])
      .map(a => {
        const at = Number(a?.at);
        const pos = Number(a?.pos);
        if (!Number.isFinite(at) || !Number.isFinite(pos)) return null;
        const out = { at, pos };

        if (a?.h && Number.isFinite(a.h.dx) && Number.isFinite(a.h.dy)) {
          out.h = { dx: Number(a.h.dx), dy: Number(a.h.dy) };
        }
        return out;
      })
      .filter(Boolean)
      .sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
    return {
      id,
      name:        String(p.name || 'Untitled').slice(0, 80),
      icon:        safeIcon,
      description: String(p.description || '').slice(0, 240),

      creator:     String(p.creator || '').slice(0, 80) || undefined,
      tags:        Array.isArray(p.tags) ? p.tags.filter(t => typeof t === 'string').map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) : [],
      inverted:    !!p.inverted,
      range,
      actions,
      _user:       true,
      _created:    Number(p._created) || Date.now(),
    };
  }

  function _peParseTags(s) {
    if (!s || typeof s !== 'string') return [];
    const seen = new Set();
    const out = [];
    for (const raw of s.split(',')) {
      const t = raw.trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!t || seen.has(t)) continue;
      if (t.length > 30) continue;
      seen.add(t);
      out.push(t);
      if (out.length >= 20) break;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _trackFromAnyPattern(p) {
    if (p?._user) {
      return {
        version: 1,
        inverted: !!p.inverted,
        range: p.range || 100,
