        actions: _densifyTrackActions(p.actions || []),
      };
    }
    return _funscriptFromPattern(p.id);
  }

  function _densifyTrackActions(actions, sampleMs = 50) {
    if (!Array.isArray(actions) || actions.length === 0) return [];
    const hasCurves = actions.some(a => a && a.h);
    if (!hasCurves) {
      return actions.map(a => ({
        at: Math.round(Number(a.at) || 0),
        pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(Number(a.pos) || 0))),
      }));
    }
    const out = [];
    out.push({ at: Math.round(actions[0].at), pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(actions[0].pos))) });
    for (let i = 0; i < actions.length - 1; i++) {
      const p0 = actions[i], p1 = actions[i + 1];
      const dur = Math.max(0, p1.at - p0.at);
      if ((p0.h || p1.h) && dur > 0) {
        const steps = Math.max(2, Math.ceil(dur / sampleMs));
        const cp1at  = p0.at  + (p0.h ? p0.h.dx : 0);
        const cp1pos = p0.pos + (p0.h ? p0.h.dy : 0);
        const cp2at  = p1.at  - (p1.h ? p1.h.dx : 0);
        const cp2pos = p1.pos - (p1.h ? p1.h.dy : 0);
        for (let s = 1; s < steps; s++) {
          const t = s / steps, it = 1 - t, it2 = it * it, t2 = t * t;
          const at  = it2*it*p0.at  + 3*it2*t*cp1at  + 3*it*t2*cp2at  + t2*t*p1.at;
          const pos = it2*it*p0.pos + 3*it2*t*cp1pos + 3*it*t2*cp2pos + t2*t*p1.pos;
          out.push({
            at:  Math.round(at),
            pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(pos))),
          });
        }
      }
      out.push({
        at:  Math.round(p1.at),
        pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(p1.pos))),
      });
    }

    const seen = new Set();
    return out.filter(p => {
      if (seen.has(p.at)) return false;
      seen.add(p.at);
      return true;
    });
  }

  function _openPatternEditor({ patternId = null, fromBuiltinId = null } = {}) {
    let editing = null;
    let prefilledActions = null;
    if (patternId) {
      editing = loadUserPatterns().find(p => p.id === patternId);
      if (!editing) { notify.error('Pattern not found.'); return; }
    } else if (fromBuiltinId) {
      const bi = FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS.find(p => p.id === fromBuiltinId);
      if (!bi) { notify.error('Built-in not found.'); return; }

      prefilledActions = bi.generate();
      editing = {
        id: 'user-' + Date.now().toString(36),
        name: bi.name + ' (custom)',
        icon: bi.icon,
        description: bi.description,
        inverted: false,
        range: 100,
        actions: prefilledActions,
        _user: true,
      };
    }
    const isNew = !patternId;
    const init = editing || {
      id: 'user-' + Date.now().toString(36),
      name: '',
      icon: '🎵',
      description: '',
      inverted: false,
      range: 100,
      actions: [{ at: 0, pos: 0 }, { at: 1000, pos: 100 }, { at: 2000, pos: 0 }],
      _user: true,
    };

    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:720px">
      <h2>${isNew ? 'New pattern' : 'Edit pattern'}</h2>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:80px 1fr;gap:10px 14px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Icon</label>
        <input id="_pe_icon" type="text" maxlength="4" value="${escapeHtml(init.icon)}" style="width:60px;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:1.1rem;text-align:center">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Name</label>
        <input id="_pe_name" type="text" maxlength="80" placeholder="My pattern" value="${escapeHtml(init.name)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.84rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);align-self:start;margin-top:6px">Description</label>
        <textarea id="_pe_desc" maxlength="240" rows="2" placeholder="One-line description shown in the picker" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem;resize:vertical">${escapeHtml(init.description)}</textarea>
        <!-- Round 26 — funscript-standard metadata fields. Captured per
             user pattern and embedded in the metadata block when the
             pattern is exported as a .funscript file (see _pe_export
             below). Optional — defaults to empty. -->
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Creator</label>
        <input id="_pe_creator" type="text" maxlength="80" placeholder="Your name or handle (optional)" value="${escapeHtml(init.creator || '')}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Tags</label>
        <input id="_pe_tags" type="text" maxlength="200" placeholder="Comma-separated, e.g. sleep, breath, gentle" value="${escapeHtml(Array.isArray(init.tags) ? init.tags.join(', ') : (init.tags || ''))}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Range</label>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <input id="_pe_range" type="range" min="10" max="100" value="${init.range}" style="flex:1">
          <span id="_pe_range_v" style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text);min-width:36px">${init.range}%</span>
          <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:14px">
            <input id="_pe_invert" type="checkbox" ${init.inverted ? 'checked' : ''}> invert
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Round 25, Pass 15 — graphical curve editor. The canvas is the
           primary edit surface; the JSON textarea sits below as an
           advanced view (collapsible). Mouse: click empty area to add
           a point, drag a point to move it, right-click a point to
           delete. Modifier keys constrain the drag axis. -->
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px">
        <span style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Curve editor</span>
        <span id="_pe_actstats" style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-left:auto"></span>
      </div>
      <!-- Round 27 — Tool toggle row. Sets the default behaviour of a
           click-on-point. "Move" is the original behaviour; the other
           three are explicit type/state changes. The toggle pills are
           styled like terminal pills with an active-state background. -->
      <div id="_pe_tool_row" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center">
        <span style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-right:4px">Tool:</span>
        <button type="button" class="pe-tool-btn active" data-tool="move"   title="Click empty: add point. Click point: drag. Drag handle endpoint: adjust curvature.">🖐 move</button>
        <button type="button" class="pe-tool-btn"        data-tool="curve"  title="Click point: convert to a curve point (adds Bézier handles). Click empty: add new curve point. Drag handle to shape curvature.">〜 curve</button>
        <button type="button" class="pe-tool-btn"        data-tool="point"  title="Click curve point: convert back to straight (removes handles). Click empty: add straight point.">• point</button>
        <button type="button" class="pe-tool-btn"        data-tool="delete" title="Click point: delete it. Click empty: nothing.">✕ delete</button>
        <span style="flex:1"></span>
        <span id="_pe_tool_hint" style="font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-faint)">click empty to add · drag points to move · drag handles to shape</span>
      </div>
      <div style="position:relative;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
        <canvas id="_pe_canvas" width="680" height="220" style="display:block;width:100%;height:220px;cursor:crosshair"></canvas>
        <div id="_pe_canvas_tip" style="position:absolute;pointer-events:none;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);color:#fff;font-family:monospace;font-size:0.66rem;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;display:none;z-index:1;white-space:nowrap"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;align-items:center">
        <span style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint)">click: add · drag: move · alt+drag: marquee · shift+click: toggle select · del: delete selected · right-click: delete · ctrl: lock-y</span>
        <span style="flex:1"></span>
        <span style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint)">duration:</span>
        <input id="_pe_duration" type="number" min="500" max="600000" step="500" style="width:90px;padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.7rem;font-family:monospace" title="Pattern duration in milliseconds">
        <span style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint)">ms</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_normalize" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Rescale all timestamps so the last point lands on duration">normalize</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_reverse" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Reverse the curve so it plays backwards">reverse</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_invert_y" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Flip positions vertically (high becomes low)">flip</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_smooth" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Insert intermediate points to smooth sharp transitions">smooth</button>
        <!-- Round 26 — track-level modifiers ported from funscript-io.
             Offset shifts every action by a fixed time delta (sync
             correction). Remap rescales the position range from
             0..100 to a new sub-range (e.g. 30..80 for a gentler
             session). Limit caps stroke velocity so no transition
             exceeds N pos-units/sec — useful as a safety / comfort
             ceiling. All three operate in-place on _ceActions. -->
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_offset" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Shift all actions by a fixed time delta in ms (positive = later, negative = earlier)">offset…</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_remap" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Rescale the position range — e.g. compress 0–100 to 30–80 for a gentler session">remap…</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_limit" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Cap stroke velocity (pos-units per second). Reduces intensity without changing rhythm.">limit…</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_clear" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Clear all points (keeps two anchor points)">clear</button>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_paste_fs" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px" title="Replace curve with points from a .funscript file">↻ paste from .funscript</button>
      </div>
      <details id="_pe_json_details" style="margin-top:10px">
        <summary style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint);cursor:pointer;padding:4px 0">
          <span style="color:var(--text-dim)">▸ JSON view (advanced)</span>
        </summary>
        <div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-bottom:4px">Edit raw actions array. Save updates from this textarea by clicking <code>apply JSON</code>.</div>
        <textarea id="_pe_actions" rows="6" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-family:monospace;font-size:0.7rem;resize:vertical"></textarea>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_apply_json" style="font-size:0.62rem;padding:3px 8px">apply JSON</button>
          <span id="_pe_json_status" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);align-self:center"></span>
        </div>
      </details>
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_cancel">cancel</button>
        <!-- Round 26 — export as standard .funscript file. Writes a
             well-formed JSON document with metadata block (title,
             creator, description, tags, duration) so the file is
             interoperable with funscript-io, OFS, ScriptAxis, etc. -->
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_pe_export" title="Download this curve as a standard .funscript file with metadata">💾 export .funscript</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_pe_save">${isNew ? 'create' : 'save'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);

    const $$ = (id) => backdrop.querySelector('#' + id);

    function _sanitizeAction(a) {
      const at = Number(a?.at), pos = Number(a?.pos);
      if (!Number.isFinite(at) || !Number.isFinite(pos)) return null;
      const out = { at, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, pos)) };
      if (a && a.h && Number.isFinite(a.h.dx) && Number.isFinite(a.h.dy)) {
        out.h = { dx: Number(a.h.dx), dy: Number(a.h.dy) };
      }
      return out;
    }
    let _ceActions  = (init.actions || [])
      .map(_sanitizeAction)
      .filter(Boolean)
      .sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
    let _ceDuration = Math.max(1000, _ceActions.at(-1)?.at ?? 60000);
    let _ceDrag     = null;
    let _ceHover    = -1;

    let _ceSelected = new Set();
    let _ceMarquee  = null;
    let _ceGroupDrag = null;
    function _ceClearSelection() { _ceSelected.clear(); }

    let _ceTool       = 'move';
    let _ceHandleDrag = null;

    const canvas = $$('_pe_canvas');
    const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const tipEl  = $$('_pe_canvas_tip');

    function _ceResize() {
      const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      const w = Math.max(300, Math.round(rect.width));
      const h = Math.max(120, Math.round(rect.height));
      canvas.width = w * dpr;
      canvas.height = h * dpr;
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
      _ceRender();
    }

    const PAD = { l: 30, r: 8, t: 8, b: 18 };
    function _ceMetrics() {
      const w = canvas.width  / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
      const h = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
      return { w, h, plotW: w - PAD.l - PAD.r, plotH: h - PAD.t - PAD.b };
    }
    function _ceTimeToX(t) {
      const m = _ceMetrics();
      return PAD.l + (t / Math.max(1, _ceDuration)) * m.plotW;
    }
    function _cePosToY(p) {
      const m = _ceMetrics();

      return PAD.t + (1 - Math.max(0, Math.min(100, p)) / 100) * m.plotH;
    }
    function _ceXToTime(x) {
      const m = _ceMetrics();
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(_ceDuration, ((x - PAD.l) / Math.max(1, m.plotW)) * _ceDuration));
    }
    function _ceYToPos(y) {
      const m = _ceMetrics();
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (1 - (y - PAD.t) / Math.max(1, m.plotH)) * 100));
    }

    function _ceDefaultHandle(idx) {
      const a = _ceActions[idx];
      const prev = _ceActions[idx - 1];
      const next = _ceActions[idx + 1];
      let dx, dy;
      if (prev && next) {

        dx = (next.at  - prev.at)  / 6;
        dy = (next.pos - prev.pos) / 6;
      } else if (prev) {
        dx = Math.max(50, (a.at - prev.at) / 3);
        dy = 0;
      } else if (next) {
        dx = Math.max(50, (next.at - a.at) / 3);
        dy = 0;
      } else {
        dx = 200; dy = 0;
      }
      return { dx, dy };
    }
    function _ceMakeCurve(idx) {
      if (idx < 0 || idx >= _ceActions.length) return false;
      if (_ceActions[idx].h) return false;
      _ceActions[idx].h = _ceDefaultHandle(idx);
      return true;
    }
    function _ceMakeStraight(idx) {
      if (idx < 0 || idx >= _ceActions.length) return false;
      if (!_ceActions[idx].h) return false;
      delete _ceActions[idx].h;
      return true;
    }
    function _ceDeletePoint(idx) {
      if (idx < 0 || idx >= _ceActions.length) return false;

      if (_ceActions.length <= 1) return false;
      const obj = _ceActions[idx];
      _ceActions.splice(idx, 1);
      _ceSelected.delete(obj);
      return true;
    }

    function _ceHitTestHandle(x, y, tolPx = 7) {
      const tolSq = tolPx * tolPx;
      for (let i = 0; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const a = _ceActions[i];
        if (!a.h) continue;

        const ohx = _ceTimeToX(a.at + a.h.dx);
        const ohy = _cePosToY(a.pos + a.h.dy);
        const d1 = (x - ohx) * (x - ohx) + (y - ohy) * (y - ohy);
        if (d1 < tolSq) return { idx: i, side: 'out' };

        const ihx = _ceTimeToX(a.at - a.h.dx);
        const ihy = _cePosToY(a.pos - a.h.dy);
        const d2 = (x - ihx) * (x - ihx) + (y - ihy) * (y - ihy);
        if (d2 < tolSq) return { idx: i, side: 'in' };
      }
      return null;
    }

    function _ceCubicAt(p0, p1, t) {
      const cp1at  = p0.at  + (p0.h ? p0.h.dx : 0);
      const cp1pos = p0.pos + (p0.h ? p0.h.dy : 0);
      const cp2at  = p1.at  - (p1.h ? p1.h.dx : 0);
      const cp2pos = p1.pos - (p1.h ? p1.h.dy : 0);
      const it = 1 - t;
      const it2 = it * it, t2 = t * t;
      const at  = it2*it*p0.at  + 3*it2*t*cp1at  + 3*it*t2*cp2at  + t2*t*p1.at;
      const pos = it2*it*p0.pos + 3*it2*t*cp1pos + 3*it*t2*cp2pos + t2*t*p1.pos;
      return { at, pos };
    }

    function _ceDensifyForEngine(actions, sampleMs = 50) {
      const hasCurves = actions.some(a => a && a.h);
      if (!hasCurves) {
        return actions.map(a => ({ at: Math.round(a.at), pos: Math.round(a.pos) }));
      }
      const out = [];
      out.push({ at: Math.round(actions[0].at), pos: Math.round(actions[0].pos) });
      for (let i = 0; i < actions.length - 1; i++) {
        const p0 = actions[i], p1 = actions[i + 1];
        const dur = Math.max(0, p1.at - p0.at);
        if ((p0.h || p1.h) && dur > 0) {
          const steps = Math.max(2, Math.ceil(dur / sampleMs));
          for (let s = 1; s < steps; s++) {
            const sample = _ceCubicAt(p0, p1, s / steps);
            out.push({
              at:  Math.round(sample.at),
              pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(sample.pos))),
            });
          }
        }
        out.push({
          at:  Math.round(p1.at),
          pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(p1.pos))),
        });
      }

      const seen = new Set();
      return out.filter(p => {
        const k = p.at;
        if (seen.has(k)) return false;
        seen.add(k);
        return true;
      });
    }

    function _ceRender() {
      const m = _ceMetrics();
      const { w, h } = m;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.015)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let p = 0; p <= 1.001; p += 0.1) {
        const x = PAD.l + p * m.plotW;
        ctx.moveTo(x, PAD.t); ctx.lineTo(x, PAD.t + m.plotH);
      }

      for (let v = 0; v <= 100; v += 25) {
        const y = _cePosToY(v);
        ctx.moveTo(PAD.l, y); ctx.lineTo(PAD.l + m.plotW, y);
      }
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.fillStyle = 'var(--text-faint)';
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)';
      ctx.font = '10px monospace';
      ctx.textAlign = 'right';
      ctx.fillText('100', PAD.l - 4, _cePosToY(100) + 3);
      ctx.fillText('50',  PAD.l - 4, _cePosToY(50)  + 3);
      ctx.fillText('0',   PAD.l - 4, _cePosToY(0)   + 3);

      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText(`0s`,                           PAD.l, h - 5);
      ctx.fillText(`${(_ceDuration/2000).toFixed(1)}s`, PAD.l + m.plotW/2, h - 5);
      ctx.fillText(`${(_ceDuration/1000).toFixed(1)}s`, PAD.l + m.plotW, h - 5);

      if (_ceActions.length >= 2) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(_ceTimeToX(_ceActions[0].at), _cePosToY(0));
        ctx.lineTo(_ceTimeToX(_ceActions[0].at), _cePosToY(_ceActions[0].pos));
        for (let i = 1; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
          const p0 = _ceActions[i - 1], p1 = _ceActions[i];
          const x1 = _ceTimeToX(p1.at), y1 = _cePosToY(p1.pos);
          if (p0.h || p1.h) {
            const cp1x = _ceTimeToX(p0.at  + (p0.h ? p0.h.dx : 0));
            const cp1y = _cePosToY(p0.pos + (p0.h ? p0.h.dy : 0));
            const cp2x = _ceTimeToX(p1.at  - (p1.h ? p1.h.dx : 0));
            const cp2y = _cePosToY(p1.pos - (p1.h ? p1.h.dy : 0));
            ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, x1, y1);
          } else {
            ctx.lineTo(x1, y1);
          }
        }
        ctx.lineTo(_ceTimeToX(_ceActions.at(-1).at), _cePosToY(0));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(120,180,240,0.10)';
        ctx.fill();
      }

      if (_ceActions.length >= 1) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(_ceTimeToX(_ceActions[0].at), _cePosToY(_ceActions[0].pos));
        for (let i = 1; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
          const p0 = _ceActions[i - 1], p1 = _ceActions[i];
          const x1 = _ceTimeToX(p1.at), y1 = _cePosToY(p1.pos);
          if (p0.h || p1.h) {
            const cp1x = _ceTimeToX(p0.at  + (p0.h ? p0.h.dx : 0));
            const cp1y = _cePosToY(p0.pos + (p0.h ? p0.h.dy : 0));
            const cp2x = _ceTimeToX(p1.at  - (p1.h ? p1.h.dx : 0));
            const cp2y = _cePosToY(p1.pos - (p1.h ? p1.h.dy : 0));
            ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, x1, y1);
          } else {
            ctx.lineTo(x1, y1);
          }
        }
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(120,180,240,0.85)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.stroke();
      }

      for (let i = 0; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const a = _ceActions[i];
        if (!a.h) continue;
        const ax  = _ceTimeToX(a.at);
        const ay  = _cePosToY(a.pos);
        const ohx = _ceTimeToX(a.at + a.h.dx);
        const ohy = _cePosToY(a.pos + a.h.dy);
        const ihx = _ceTimeToX(a.at - a.h.dx);
        const ihy = _cePosToY(a.pos - a.h.dy);

        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ihx, ihy); ctx.lineTo(ax, ay); ctx.lineTo(ohx, ohy);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(200,200,220,0.45)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.stroke();

        for (const [hx, hy] of [[ohx, ohy], [ihx, ihy]]) {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(hx, hy, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(220,220,240,0.92)';
          ctx.fill();
          ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';
          ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }

      for (let i = 0; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const x = _ceTimeToX(_ceActions[i].at);
        const y = _cePosToY(_ceActions[i].pos);
        const isHover = i === _ceHover;
        const isDrag = _ceDrag && _ceDrag.idx === i;
        const isSelected = _ceSelected.has(_ceActions[i]);
        ctx.beginPath();

        const r = isDrag ? 6 : (isSelected ? 5.5 : (isHover ? 5 : 3.5));
        ctx.arc(x, y, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = isDrag ? '#7dc87a'
                        : (isSelected ? 'rgba(255,200,80,1)'
                        : (isHover ? 'rgba(120,180,240,1)' : 'rgba(120,180,240,0.8)'));
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
        ctx.stroke();
        if (isSelected) {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(x, y, r + 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,200,80,0.5)';
          ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }

      if (_ceMarquee) {
        const x = Math.min(_ceMarquee.x0, _ceMarquee.x1);
        const y = Math.min(_ceMarquee.y0, _ceMarquee.y1);
        const w = Math.abs(_ceMarquee.x1 - _ceMarquee.x0);
        const h = Math.abs(_ceMarquee.y1 - _ceMarquee.y0);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,200,80,0.10)';
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,200,80,0.6)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
        ctx.fillRect(x, y, w, h);
        ctx.strokeRect(x, y, w, h);
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
      }
    }

    function _ceHitTest(x, y, tolPx = 8) {
      let best = -1, bestD = tolPx * tolPx;
      for (let i = 0; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const px = _ceTimeToX(_ceActions[i].at);
        const py = _cePosToY(_ceActions[i].pos);
        const d = (x - px) * (x - px) + (y - py) * (y - py);
        if (d < bestD) { bestD = d; best = i; }
      }
      return best;
    }

    function _ceSyncToJson() {
      $$('_pe_actions').value = JSON.stringify(_ceActions, null, 2);
      $$('_pe_actstats').textContent = `${_ceActions.length} points · ${(_ceDuration/1000).toFixed(1)}s`;
    }

    function _ceSyncFromJson() {
      try {
        const arr = JSON.parse($$('_pe_actions').value);
        if (!Array.isArray(arr)) throw new Error('not array');
        const cleaned = arr
          .map(a => ({ at: Number(a?.at), pos: Number(a?.pos) }))
          .filter(a => Number.isFinite(a.at) && Number.isFinite(a.pos))
          .sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
        if (!cleaned.length) throw new Error('empty');
        _ceActions = cleaned;
        _ceDuration = Math.max(_ceDuration, _ceActions.at(-1).at);
        $$('_pe_duration').value = _ceDuration;
        $$('_pe_json_status').textContent = `applied · ${cleaned.length} points`;
        $$('_pe_json_status').style.color = '#7dc87a';
        _ceRender();
        _ceSyncToJson();
      } catch (e) {
        $$('_pe_json_status').textContent = 'invalid: ' + e.message;
        $$('_pe_json_status').style.color = '#ff6b6b';
      }
    }

    function _ceCanvasPos(e) {
      const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      return { x: (e.clientX - r.left) * (canvas.width / r.width)  / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1),
               y: (e.clientY - r.top)  * (canvas.height / r.height) / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1) };
    }

    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
      if (e.button === 2) return;
      const { x, y } = _ceCanvasPos(e);

      const handleHit = _ceHitTestHandle(x, y, 8);
      if (handleHit) {
        const a = _ceActions[handleHit.idx];
        _ceHandleDrag = {
          idx:    handleHit.idx,
          side:   handleHit.side,
          origDx: a.h.dx,
          origDy: a.h.dy,
          startX: x,
          startY: y,
        };
        return;
      }

      const hit = _ceHitTest(x, y, 10);

      if (_ceTool !== 'move' && hit >= 0 && !e.shiftKey && !e.altKey) {
        const obj = _ceActions[hit];
        if (_ceTool === 'curve') {

          _ceMakeCurve(hit);

          _ceHandleDrag = {
            idx: hit, side: 'out',
            origDx: obj.h.dx, origDy: obj.h.dy,
            startX: x, startY: y,
          };
          _ceSyncToJson();
          _ceRender();
          return;
        }
        if (_ceTool === 'point') {
          if (_ceMakeStraight(hit)) {
            _ceSyncToJson();
            _ceRender();
          }
          return;
        }
        if (_ceTool === 'delete') {
          if (_ceDeletePoint(hit)) {
            _ceSyncToJson();
            _ceRender();
          }
          return;
        }
      }

      if (hit >= 0) {
        const obj = _ceActions[hit];
        if (e.shiftKey) {

          if (_ceSelected.has(obj)) _ceSelected.delete(obj);
          else _ceSelected.add(obj);
          _ceRender();
          return;
        }
        if (_ceSelected.has(obj) && _ceSelected.size > 1) {

          const origPositions = new Map();
          for (const o of _ceSelected) origPositions.set(o, { at: o.at, pos: o.pos });
          _ceGroupDrag = {
            startX: x, startY: y,
            origPositions,
            lockX: false,
            lockY: e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey,
          };
        } else {

          if (!_ceSelected.has(obj)) _ceClearSelection();
          _ceDrag = {
            idx: hit, startX: x, startY: y,
            origAt: obj.at, origPos: obj.pos,
            lockX: false,
            lockY: e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey,
          };
        }
      } else if (e.altKey) {

        _ceMarquee = { x0: x, y0: y, x1: x, y1: y };
        if (!e.shiftKey) _ceClearSelection();
        _ceRender();
      } else if (_ceTool === 'delete') {

        return;
      } else {

        _ceClearSelection();
        const t = _ceXToTime(x), p = _ceYToPos(y);
        const newPoint = { at: Math.round(t), pos: Math.round(p) };
        _ceActions.push(newPoint);
        _ceActions.sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
        if (_ceTool === 'curve') {

          const newIdx = _ceActions.indexOf(newPoint);
          if (newIdx >= 0) _ceMakeCurve(newIdx);
        }
        _ceSyncToJson();
        _ceRender();
      }
    });

    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const { x, y } = _ceCanvasPos(e);
      if (_ceMarquee) {

        _ceMarquee.x1 = x; _ceMarquee.y1 = y;
        const xMin = Math.min(_ceMarquee.x0, _ceMarquee.x1);
        const xMax = Math.max(_ceMarquee.x0, _ceMarquee.x1);
        const yMin = Math.min(_ceMarquee.y0, _ceMarquee.y1);
        const yMax = Math.max(_ceMarquee.y0, _ceMarquee.y1);

        if (!e.shiftKey) _ceClearSelection();
        for (const a of _ceActions) {
          const px = _ceTimeToX(a.at), py = _cePosToY(a.pos);
          if (px >= xMin && px <= xMax && py >= yMin && py <= yMax) _ceSelected.add(a);
        }
        _ceRender();
        return;
      }
      if (_ceHandleDrag) {

        const m = _ceMetrics();
        const a = _ceActions[_ceHandleDrag.idx];
        if (!a || !a.h) {
          _ceHandleDrag = null;
        } else {
          const dxPx = x - _ceHandleDrag.startX;
          const dyPx = y - _ceHandleDrag.startY;
          const dxT  = (dxPx / m.plotW) * _ceDuration;
          const dyP  = -(dyPx / m.plotH) * 100;
          const sign = _ceHandleDrag.side === 'out' ? 1 : -1;
          a.h.dx = _ceHandleDrag.origDx + sign * dxT;
          a.h.dy = _ceHandleDrag.origDy + sign * dyP;

          const prev = _ceActions[_ceHandleDrag.idx - 1];
          const next = _ceActions[_ceHandleDrag.idx + 1];
          if (next) a.h.dx = Math.min(a.h.dx, (next.at - a.at) * 0.95);
          if (prev) a.h.dx = Math.max(a.h.dx, -(a.at - prev.at) * 0.95);
          a.h.dy = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, a.h.dy));
          tipEl.style.display = 'block';
          tipEl.textContent = `handle · Δt ${(a.h.dx/1000).toFixed(2)}s · Δp ${a.h.dy.toFixed(0)}`;
          const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
          tipEl.style.left = (e.clientX - r.left + 10) + 'px';
          tipEl.style.top  = (e.clientY - r.top  - 24) + 'px';
          _ceRender();
        }
        return;
      }
      if (_ceGroupDrag) {
        const dx = x - _ceGroupDrag.startX;
        const dy = y - _ceGroupDrag.startY;
        const m = _ceMetrics();
        const dT = _ceGroupDrag.lockX ? 0 : (dx / m.plotW) * _ceDuration;
        const dP = _ceGroupDrag.lockY ? 0 : -(dy / m.plotH) * 100;
        for (const [obj, orig] of _ceGroupDrag.origPositions) {
          obj.at  = Math.max(0, Math.min(_ceDuration, Math.round(orig.at + dT)));
          obj.pos = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(orig.pos + dP)));
        }
        tipEl.style.display = 'block';
        tipEl.textContent = `${_ceSelected.size} pts · Δ${(dT/1000).toFixed(2)}s · Δ${dP.toFixed(0)}`;
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        tipEl.style.left = (e.clientX - r.left + 10) + 'px';
        tipEl.style.top  = (e.clientY - r.top  - 24) + 'px';
        _ceRender();
        return;
      }
      if (_ceDrag) {
        const newT = _ceDrag.lockX ? _ceDrag.origAt : Math.round(_ceXToTime(x));
        const newP = _ceDrag.lockY ? _ceDrag.origPos : Math.round(_ceYToPos(y));
        _ceActions[_ceDrag.idx].at  = Math.max(0, Math.min(_ceDuration, newT));
        _ceActions[_ceDrag.idx].pos = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, newP));

        tipEl.style.display = 'block';
        tipEl.textContent = `${(_ceActions[_ceDrag.idx].at/1000).toFixed(2)}s · ${_ceActions[_ceDrag.idx].pos}`;
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        tipEl.style.left = (e.clientX - r.left + 10) + 'px';
        tipEl.style.top  = (e.clientY - r.top  - 24) + 'px';
        _ceRender();
      } else {

        const hit = _ceHitTest(x, y, 10);
        if (hit !== _ceHover) {
          _ceHover = hit;
          canvas.style.cursor = hit >= 0 ? 'grab' : (e.altKey ? 'cell' : 'crosshair');
          _ceRender();
        }
        if (hit >= 0) {
          tipEl.style.display = 'block';
          tipEl.textContent = `${(_ceActions[hit].at/1000).toFixed(2)}s · ${_ceActions[hit].pos}`;
          const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
          tipEl.style.left = (e.clientX - r.left + 10) + 'px';
          tipEl.style.top  = (e.clientY - r.top  - 24) + 'px';
        } else {
          tipEl.style.display = 'none';
        }
      }
    });

    function _endDrag() {
      let mutated = false;
      if (_ceMarquee) { _ceMarquee = null; mutated = true; }
      if (_ceGroupDrag) {
        _ceActions.sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
        _ceGroupDrag = null;
        mutated = true;
      }
      if (_ceDrag) {
        _ceActions.sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
        _ceDrag = null;
        mutated = true;
      }
      if (_ceHandleDrag) {

        _ceHandleDrag = null;
        mutated = true;
      }
      if (mutated) {
        tipEl.style.display = 'none';
        _ceSyncToJson();
        _ceRender();
      }
    }
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', _endDrag);
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { _ceHover = -1; tipEl.style.display = 'none'; _endDrag(); _ceRender(); });

    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const { x, y } = _ceCanvasPos(e);
      const hit = _ceHitTest(x, y, 10);
      if (hit >= 0) {
        const obj = _ceActions[hit];

        if (_ceSelected.has(obj) && _ceSelected.size > 1) {
          const remaining = _ceActions.filter(a => !_ceSelected.has(a));
          if (remaining.length < 2) { notify.warn('Need at least 2 points.'); return; }
          _ceActions = remaining;
          _ceClearSelection();
        } else {
          if (_ceActions.length <= 2) { notify.warn('Need at least 2 points.'); return; }
          _ceSelected.delete(obj);
          _ceActions.splice(hit, 1);
        }
        _ceSyncToJson();
        _ceRender();
      }
    });

    function _ceKeyHandler(e) {
      if (!document.body.contains(backdrop)) return;

      const tgt = e.target;
      if (tgt && (tgt.tagName === 'INPUT' || tgt.tagName === 'TEXTAREA')) return;
      if (e.key === 'Delete' || e.key === 'Backspace') {
        if (!_ceSelected.size) return;
        const remaining = _ceActions.filter(a => !_ceSelected.has(a));
        if (remaining.length < 2) { notify.warn('Need at least 2 points.'); return; }
        _ceActions = remaining;
        _ceClearSelection();
        _ceSyncToJson();
        _ceRender();
        e.preventDefault();
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape' && _ceSelected.size) {
        _ceClearSelection();
        _ceRender();
        e.preventDefault();
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', _ceKeyHandler);

    $$('_pe_normalize').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_ceActions.length < 2) return;
      const last = _ceActions.at(-1).at;
      if (last <= 0) return;
      const factor = _ceDuration / last;
      for (const a of _ceActions) a.at = Math.round(a.at * factor);
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });
    $$('_pe_reverse').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_ceActions.length < 2) return;
      const last = _ceActions.at(-1).at;
      _ceActions = _ceActions.map(a => ({ at: last - a.at, pos: a.pos })).sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });
    $$('_pe_invert_y').addEventListener('click', () => {
      _ceActions = _ceActions.map(a => ({ at: a.at, pos: 100 - a.pos }));
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });
    $$('_pe_smooth').addEventListener('click', () => {

      if (_ceActions.length < 2) return;
      const out = [_ceActions[0]];
      for (let i = 1; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const a = _ceActions[i - 1], b = _ceActions[i];
        out.push({ at: Math.round((a.at + b.at) / 2), pos: Math.round((a.pos + b.pos) / 2) });
        out.push(b);
      }
      _ceActions = out;
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });

    $$('_pe_offset').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_ceActions.length < 1) return;
      const raw = window.prompt('Time offset in milliseconds (positive = later, negative = earlier):', '0');
      if (raw == null) return;
      const ms = parseInt(raw, 10);
      if (!Number.isFinite(ms) || ms === 0) return;

      const shifted = _ceActions.map(a => ({ at: a.at + ms, pos: a.pos }));
      const minAt = Math.min(...shifted.map(a => a.at));
      const correction = minAt < 0 ? -minAt : 0;
      _ceActions = shifted.map(a => ({ at: a.at + correction, pos: a.pos })).sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at);

      const lastAt = _ceActions.at(-1).at;
      if (lastAt > _ceDuration) {
        _ceDuration = lastAt;
        const dInput = $$('_pe_duration'); if (dInput) dInput.value = _ceDuration;
      }
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });

    $$('_pe_remap').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_ceActions.length < 1) return;
      const rawMin = window.prompt('Remap — new minimum position (0–100):', '20');
      if (rawMin == null) return;
      const rawMax = window.prompt('Remap — new maximum position (0–100):', '80');
      if (rawMax == null) return;
      const newMin = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(rawMin)));
      const newMax = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(rawMax)));
      if (!Number.isFinite(newMin) || !Number.isFinite(newMax) || newMax <= newMin) {
        notify.warn('Remap: max must be greater than min, both in 0–100.');
        return;
      }
      const span = newMax - newMin;
      _ceActions = _ceActions.map(a => ({
        at: a.at,
        pos: Math.round(newMin + (a.pos / 100) * span),
      }));
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });

    $$('_pe_limit').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (_ceActions.length < 2) return;
      const raw = window.prompt('Velocity limit in position-units per second (typical: 200–600). Above this, stroke depth is clamped to keep rhythm intact:', '400');
      if (raw == null) return;
      const maxSpeed = parseFloat(raw);
      if (!Number.isFinite(maxSpeed) || maxSpeed <= 0) {
        notify.warn('Limit: speed must be a positive number.');
        return;
      }
      const maxPosPerMs = maxSpeed / 1000;
      const limited = [{ at: _ceActions[0].at, pos: _ceActions[0].pos }];
      for (let i = 1; i < _ceActions.length; i++) {
        const prev = limited[limited.length - 1];
        const cur  = _ceActions[i];
        const dt = cur.at - prev.at;
        if (dt <= 0) {

          limited.push({ at: cur.at, pos: cur.pos });
          continue;
        }
        const dp = cur.pos - prev.pos;
        const maxDp = maxPosPerMs * dt;
        if (Math.abs(dp) <= maxDp) {
          limited.push({ at: cur.at, pos: cur.pos });
        } else {
          const newPos = prev.pos + Math.sign(dp) * maxDp;
          limited.push({ at: cur.at, pos: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(newPos))) });
        }
      }
      _ceActions = limited;
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });
    $$('_pe_clear').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const ok = await confirmAsync('Clear all points? This keeps two anchor points (0% and 100% time, both pos 50).', { okText: 'clear', cancelText: 'keep' });
      if (!ok) return;
      _ceActions = [{ at: 0, pos: 50 }, { at: _ceDuration, pos: 50 }];
      _ceClearSelection();
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });

    $$('_pe_duration').value = _ceDuration;
    $$('_pe_duration').addEventListener('change', e => {
      const v = Math.max(500, Math.min(600000, parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 60000));
      _ceDuration = v;
      e.target.value = v;

      for (const a of _ceActions) a.at = Math.min(a.at, _ceDuration);
      _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
    });

    $$('_pe_apply_json').addEventListener('click', _ceSyncFromJson);

    $$('_pe_range').addEventListener('input', e => $$('_pe_range_v').textContent = e.target.value + '%');
    $$('_pe_paste_fs').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.funscript,.json');
      if (!file) return;
      try {
        const parsed = _parseFunScript(file.text);
        _ceActions = parsed.actions.slice();
        _ceClearSelection();
        _ceDuration = Math.max(1000, _ceActions.at(-1)?.at ?? 60000);
        $$('_pe_duration').value = _ceDuration;
        $$('_pe_invert').checked = !!parsed.inverted;
        $$('_pe_range').value = parsed.range;
        $$('_pe_range_v').textContent = parsed.range + '%';
        if (!$$('_pe_name').value) $$('_pe_name').value = file.name.replace(/\.funscript$/i, '');
        _ceSyncToJson(); _ceRender();
        notify.success(`Imported ${parsed.actions.length} points from ${file.name}`);
      } catch (e) { notify.error('FunScript parse failed: ' + e.message); }
    });

    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    $$('_pe_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });

    $$('_pe_save').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const name = $$('_pe_name').value.trim();
      if (!name) { notify.warn('Name required.'); return; }
      if (!_ceActions.length) { notify.error('At least one point required.'); return; }

      const all = loadUserPatterns();
      const existingIds = new Set(all.map(p => p.id).filter(id => id !== init.id));
      const updated = _normalizeUserPattern({
        id: init.id,
        name,
        icon: $$('_pe_icon').value || '🎵',
        description: $$('_pe_desc').value,

        creator: ($$('_pe_creator')?.value || '').trim().slice(0, 80),
        tags:    _peParseTags($$('_pe_tags')?.value || ''),
        inverted: $$('_pe_invert').checked,
        range: Number($$('_pe_range').value) || 100,
        actions: _ceActions,
        _created: init._created,
      }, existingIds);

      const idx = all.findIndex(p => p.id === init.id);
      if (idx >= 0) all[idx] = updated; else all.push(updated);
      saveUserPatterns(all);
      close();
      notify.success(isNew ? `Pattern "${updated.name}" created.` : `Pattern saved.`);
      _renderPatternPicker();
    });

    $$('_pe_export').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (!_ceActions.length) { notify.warn('Add at least one point before exporting.'); return; }
      const name = ($$('_pe_name').value || 'pattern').trim() || 'pattern';
      const tags = _peParseTags($$('_pe_tags')?.value || '');

      const actions = _ceDensifyForEngine(
        _ceActions.slice().sort((a, b) => a.at - b.at)
      );
      const lastAt = actions.length ? actions[actions.length - 1].at : 0;
      const fs = {
        version: '1.0',
        inverted: !!$$('_pe_invert').checked,
        range: Number($$('_pe_range').value) || 100,
        actions,
        metadata: {
          title: name,
          creator: ($$('_pe_creator')?.value || '').trim() || undefined,
          description: ($$('_pe_desc')?.value || '').trim() || undefined,
          duration: Math.round(lastAt / 1000),
          tags: tags.length ? tags : undefined,
          script_url: undefined,
          original_name: undefined,
          original_total_duration_ms: lastAt,

          generator: 'HNE Pattern Editor',
        },
      };

      for (const k of Object.keys(fs.metadata)) {
        if (fs.metadata[k] === undefined) delete fs.metadata[k];
      }
      const json = JSON.stringify(fs, null, 2);
      const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
      const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const safeName = name.replace(/[^\w\-. ]+/g, '_').slice(0, 60) || 'pattern';
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = url;
      a.download = `${safeName}.funscript`;
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      a.remove();

      setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
      notify.success(`Exported ${safeName}.funscript (${actions.length} points)`);
    });

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      _ceResize();
      _ceSyncToJson();
    });

    const _peToolButtons = backdrop.querySelectorAll('.pe-tool-btn');
    const _peToolHint = $$('_pe_tool_hint');
    function _setPeTool(t) {
      if (!['move','curve','point','delete'].includes(t)) return;
      _ceTool = t;
      for (const btn of _peToolButtons) {
        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.tool === t);
      }

      const cursorMap = { move: 'crosshair', curve: 'crosshair', point: 'pointer', delete: 'not-allowed' };
      canvas.style.cursor = cursorMap[t] || 'crosshair';
      const hintMap = {
        move:   'click empty to add · drag points to move · drag handles to shape',
        curve:  'click points to add curvature · click empty to add curve point',
        point:  'click curve points to remove handles · click empty to add straight point',
        delete: 'click points to delete · empty space ignored',
      };
      if (_peToolHint) _peToolHint.textContent = hintMap[t] || '';
    }
    for (const btn of _peToolButtons) {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => _setPeTool(btn.dataset.tool));
    }

    const _ceResizeHandler = () => _ceResize();
    window.addEventListener('resize', _ceResizeHandler);

    const _ceObs = new MutationObserver(() => {
      if (!document.body.contains(backdrop)) {
        window.removeEventListener('resize', _ceResizeHandler);
        document.removeEventListener('keydown', _ceKeyHandler);
        _ceObs.disconnect();
      }
    });
    _ceObs.observe(document.body, { childList: true });
  }

  function _openHapticMacroLibrary() {
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:680px">
      <h2>Haptic macro library</h2>
      <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:10px">
        Short reusable haptic clips. Fire with <code>[HAPTIC:macro=id]</code> in a script,
        or call <code>injectMacro(macro)</code> from a rule action. Built-ins are read-only;
        your custom macros support full CRUD + share.
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px">
        <button type="button" id="_macroNewBtn"      class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">+ new</button>
        <button type="button" id="_macroImportBtn"   class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">import</button>
        <button type="button" id="_macroExportAllBtn" class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">export all</button>
        <button type="button" id="_macroShareAllBtn"  class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">share bundle</button>
      </div>
      <!-- Round 28 — Slot bindings. Five slots, one per number key 1-5.
           Each binds a macro id; pressing the matching key during
           session playback injects that macro instantly. Stored
           independently from the macro list so deleting a bound macro
           silently makes the slot a no-op (rather than corrupting
           state). UX: dropdown picker per slot showing all macros,
           plus an "—" option to unbind. -->
      <details style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.025);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:4px">
        <summary style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-dim);cursor:pointer">▸ keyboard slots <span id="_macroSlotsCountLabel" style="color:var(--text-faint);font-weight:normal">— bind 1–5 to inject macros instantly</span></summary>
        <div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:8px">
          Press number keys <code>1</code>–<code>5</code> during a session to fire the bound macro. Useful for partner-led training where the operator wants instant manual triggers without reaching for a menu. Bindings persist across sessions.
        </div>
        <div id="_macroSlotsList" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:38px 1fr 60px;gap:6px 10px;align-items:center"></div>
      </details>
      <div id="_macroLibraryList" style="max-height:60vh;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding:4px"></div>
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_macroLibClose">close</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);

    function _renderList() {
      const list = backdrop.querySelector('#_macroLibraryList');
      list.innerHTML = '';
      const userMacros = loadUserMacros();

      const makeSection = (label, count) => {
        const h = document.createElement('div');
        h.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.66rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--text-faint);margin:8px 0 4px;font-weight:600';
        h.textContent = `${label} · ${count}`;
        list.appendChild(h);
      };

      const makeRow = (m, isUser) => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:5px';
        const dur = m.actions?.length ? (m.actions[m.actions.length - 1].at / 1000).toFixed(2) : '0.00';
        const thumb = _patternThumbSVG(m.actions || [], 70, 22);
        row.innerHTML = `
          <div style="font-size:1.3rem;line-height:1;margin-top:1px">${escapeHtml(m.icon || '🎵')}</div>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
              <div style="font-size:0.74rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${escapeHtml(m.name)}</div>
              <code style="font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-faint);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:2px">${escapeHtml(m.id)}</code>
              <span style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);font-family:monospace">${dur}s</span>
              ${thumb ? `<div style="opacity:0.85">${thumb}</div>` : ''}
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.4;margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(m.description || '')}</div>
            <div class="_mr_actions" style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
          </div>`;
        const actions = row.querySelector('._mr_actions');
        const mkBtn = (label, handler, primary = false) => {
          const b = document.createElement('button');
          b.type = 'button'; b.className = primary ? 'btn' : 'btn secondary';
          b.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 8px';
          b.textContent = label;
          b.addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); handler(); });
          actions.appendChild(b);
        };
        mkBtn('preview', () => {
          if (!hapticBridge.isReady?.()) {
            notify.warn('Connect a haptic device first.');
            return;
          }
          try { funscriptEngine.injectMacro(m); notify.success(`Previewing "${m.name}"…`); }
          catch (e) { notify.error('Preview failed: ' + (e?.message || e)); }
        }, true);
        if (isUser) {
          mkBtn('edit', () => _openHapticMacroEditor(m.id, _renderList));
          mkBtn('duplicate', () => {
            const all = loadUserMacros();
            const dup = _normalizeUserMacro({ ...m, id: '', name: m.name + ' (copy)', _created: Date.now() }, new Set(all.map(x => x.id)));
            saveUserMacros([...all, dup]);
            _renderList();
            notify.success(`Duplicated as "${dup.name}".`);
          });
          mkBtn('share', async () => {
            await shareKit.shareEnvelope(shareKit.envelope('haptic-macro', m), { fileLabel: 'macro', modalTitle: `Share macro · ${m.name}` });
            await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
          });
          mkBtn('export', () => shareKit.downloadJson(`hne-macro-${m.id}`, shareKit.envelope('haptic-macro', m)));
          mkBtn('×', async () => {
            const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete macro "${m.name}"?`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
            if (!ok) return;
            saveUserMacros(loadUserMacros().filter(x => x.id !== m.id));
            _renderList();
            notify.info(`Deleted "${m.name}".`);
          });
        } else {
          mkBtn('duplicate to mine', () => {
            const all = loadUserMacros();
            const dup = _normalizeUserMacro({ ...m, id: '', name: m.name + ' (custom)', _created: Date.now() }, new Set(all.map(x => x.id)));
            saveUserMacros([...all, dup]);
            _renderList();
            notify.success(`Forked as "${dup.name}".`);
          });
        }
        list.appendChild(row);
      };

      makeSection('Built-in', HAPTIC_MACROS.length);
      HAPTIC_MACROS.forEach(m => makeRow(m, false));
      makeSection('Mine', userMacros.length);
      if (!userMacros.length) {
        const empty = document.createElement('div');
        empty.style.cssText = 'color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;font-size:0.66rem;padding:8px 4px';
        empty.textContent = 'No custom macros yet. Click "+ new" to author one.';
        list.appendChild(empty);
      } else {
        userMacros.forEach(m => makeRow(m, true));
      }
    }

    backdrop.querySelector('#_macroNewBtn').addEventListener('click', () => _openHapticMacroEditor(null, _renderList));
    backdrop.querySelector('#_macroImportBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const choice = await confirmAsync('Import macros from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
      let parsed = null;
      if (choice) {
        const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json');
        if (!file) return;
        try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); } catch (e) { notify.error('Not valid JSON: ' + e.message); return; }
      } else {
        parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import haptic macros');
        if (!parsed) return;
      }
      await _importHapticMacroEnvelope(parsed);
      _renderList();
    });
    backdrop.querySelector('#_macroExportAllBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const all = loadUserMacros();
      if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom macros to export.'); return; }
      shareKit.downloadJson('hne-macros-bundle', shareKit.envelope('haptic-macro-bundle', all));
    });
    backdrop.querySelector('#_macroShareAllBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const all = loadUserMacros();
      if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom macros to share.'); return; }
      await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
        shareKit.envelope('haptic-macro-bundle', all),
        { fileLabel: 'macros', modalTitle: `Share ${all.length} macro${all.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` }
      );
      await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
    });

    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    backdrop.querySelector('#_macroLibClose').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });

    function _renderSlots() {
      const slotsEl = backdrop.querySelector('#_macroSlotsList');
      const countEl = backdrop.querySelector('#_macroSlotsCountLabel');
      if (!slotsEl) return;
      const slots = loadMacroSlots();
      const allMacros = [
        ...HAPTIC_MACROS.map(m => ({ id: m.id, name: m.name, builtin: true })),
        ...loadUserMacros().map(m => ({ id: m.id, name: m.name, builtin: false })),
      ];
      const boundCount = Object.keys(slots).filter(k => slots[k]).length;
      if (countEl) {
        countEl.textContent = boundCount
          ? `— ${boundCount} of 5 bound`
          : '— bind 1–5 to inject macros instantly';
      }
      slotsEl.innerHTML = '';
      for (let s = 1; s <= 5; s++) {
        const keyEl = document.createElement('div');
        keyEl.style.cssText = 'font-family:monospace;font-size:0.78rem;text-align:center;color:var(--neon-cyan);background:rgba(0,212,230,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,230,0.3);border-radius:3px;padding:3px 0';
        keyEl.textContent = String(s);
        const sel = document.createElement('select');
        sel.style.cssText = 'padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.72rem;width:100%';
        const noneOpt = document.createElement('option');
        noneOpt.value = ''; noneOpt.textContent = '— unbound —';
        sel.appendChild(noneOpt);
        for (const m of allMacros) {
          const opt = document.createElement('option');
          opt.value = m.id;
          opt.textContent = `${m.builtin ? '🔧 ' : '✏ '}${m.name}`;
          if (slots[s] === m.id) opt.selected = true;
          sel.appendChild(opt);
        }
        sel.addEventListener('change', () => {
          setMacroSlot(s, sel.value || null);
          _renderSlots();
        });

        const testBtn = document.createElement('button');
        testBtn.type = 'button';
        testBtn.className = 'btn secondary';
        testBtn.style.cssText = 'padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.62rem';
        testBtn.textContent = '▶ test';
        testBtn.disabled = !slots[s];
        testBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          const macro = _findHapticMacro(slots[s]);
          if (macro) {
            try { funscriptEngine.injectMacro(macro); notify.info?.(`Testing slot ${s}: ${macro.name}`); }
            catch (err) { notify.error?.('Test failed: ' + (err?.message || err)); }
          }
        });
        slotsEl.appendChild(keyEl);
        slotsEl.appendChild(sel);
        slotsEl.appendChild(testBtn);
      }
    }

    _renderSlots();
    _renderList();
  }

  function _openHapticMacroEditor(id, onSave) {
    const all = loadUserMacros();
    let editing = id ? all.find(m => m.id === id) : null;
    const isNew = !editing;
    const init = editing || { id: '', name: '', icon: '🎵', description: '', actions: [{ at: 0, pos: 50 }, { at: 1000, pos: 50 }] };
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:560px">
      <h2>${isNew ? 'New macro' : 'Edit macro'}</h2>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:80px 1fr;gap:10px 14px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Icon</label>
        <input id="_mh_icon" type="text" maxlength="4" value="${escapeHtml(init.icon)}" style="width:60px;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:1.1rem;text-align:center">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Name</label>
        <input id="_mh_name" type="text" maxlength="60" placeholder="My macro" value="${escapeHtml(init.name)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.84rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);align-self:start;margin-top:6px">Description</label>
        <textarea id="_mh_desc" maxlength="240" rows="2" placeholder="One-line description shown in the library" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem;resize:vertical">${escapeHtml(init.description || '')}</textarea>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:6px">Actions (JSON, [{at:ms, pos:0..100}, …])</div>
      <textarea id="_mh_actions" rows="6" style="width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-family:monospace;font-size:0.7rem;resize:vertical">${escapeHtml(JSON.stringify(init.actions, null, 2))}</textarea>
      <div id="_mh_status" style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:4px"></div>
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_mh_cancel">cancel</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_mh_save">${isNew ? 'create' : 'save'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
    const $$ = sel => backdrop.querySelector(sel);
    const updateStatus = () => {
      try {
        const arr = JSON.parse($$('#_mh_actions').value);
        if (!Array.isArray(arr) || !arr.length) throw new Error('need at least one point');
        const last = arr.at(-1).at;
        $$('#_mh_status').textContent = `${arr.length} points · ${(last / 1000).toFixed(2)}s`;
        $$('#_mh_status').style.color = 'var(--text-faint)';
      } catch (e) {
        $$('#_mh_status').textContent = 'invalid: ' + e.message;
        $$('#_mh_status').style.color = '#ff6b6b';
      }
    };
    $$('#_mh_actions').addEventListener('input', updateStatus);
    updateStatus();

    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    $$('#_mh_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });
    $$('#_mh_save').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const name = $$('#_mh_name').value.trim();
      if (!name) { notify.warn('Name required.'); return; }
      let actions;
      try { actions = JSON.parse($$('#_mh_actions').value); }
      catch (e) { notify.error('Actions JSON invalid: ' + e.message); return; }
      if (!Array.isArray(actions) || !actions.length) { notify.error('Need at least one action point.'); return; }
      const list = loadUserMacros();
      const otherIds = new Set(list.map(x => x.id).filter(x => x !== init.id));
      const updated = _normalizeUserMacro({
        id: init.id, name, icon: $$('#_mh_icon').value, description: $$('#_mh_desc').value,
        actions, _created: init._created,
      }, otherIds);
      const idx = list.findIndex(x => x.id === init.id);
      if (idx >= 0) list[idx] = updated; else list.push(updated);
      saveUserMacros(list);
      close();
      notify.success(isNew ? `Macro "${updated.name}" created.` : 'Macro saved.');
      if (typeof onSave === 'function') onSave();
    });
  }

  async function _importHapticMacroEnvelope(parsed) {
    let items = [];
    try {
      if (parsed?.kind === 'haptic-macro') items = [parsed.data];
      else if (parsed?.kind === 'haptic-macro-bundle') {
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.data)) throw new Error('Bundle data must be an array');
        items = parsed.data;
      } else if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.every(x => x?.actions && x?.name)) {
        items = parsed;
      } else if (parsed?.actions && parsed?.name) {
        items = [parsed];
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected haptic-macro or bundle');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }
    const existing = loadUserMacros();
    const ids = new Set(existing.map(x => x.id));
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const raw of items) {
      const norm = _normalizeUserMacro(raw, new Set([...ids].filter(x => x !== raw?.id)));
      const dup = existing.find(x => x.id === norm.id);
      if (dup) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Macro "${norm.name}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!ok) continue;
        existing[existing.findIndex(x => x.id === norm.id)] = norm;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing.push(norm); ids.add(norm.id); added++;
      }
    }
    saveUserMacros(existing);
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
  }

  function _renderPatternPicker() {
    const list = $('funscriptPatternList');
    if (!list) return;
    const userPatterns = loadUserPatterns();
    list.innerHTML = '';

    const makeSection = (label, count) => {
      const h = document.createElement('div');
      h.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--text-faint);margin:10px 0 6px;font-weight:600';
      h.textContent = `${label}${count != null ? ` · ${count}` : ''}`;
      list.appendChild(h);
    };

    function _patternThumbSVG(actions, w = 90, h = 28) {
      if (!Array.isArray(actions) || actions.length < 2) return '';
      const last = actions.at(-1).at || 1;
      const pad = 1;
      const points = actions.map(a => {
        const x = pad + (a.at / last) * (w - pad * 2);
        const y = pad + (1 - Math.max(0, Math.min(100, a.pos)) / 100) * (h - pad * 2);
        return `${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`;
      }).join(' ');
      return `<svg width="${w}" height="${h}" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:block">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="${w}" height="${h}" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.03)" rx="2"/>
        <polyline points="${points}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(120,180,240,0.85)" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>`;
    }

    function _patternActions(p) {
      if (Array.isArray(p?.actions)) return p.actions;
      if (typeof p?.generate === 'function') {
        if (!p._cached) { try { p._cached = p.generate() || []; } catch { p._cached = []; } }
        return p._cached;
      }
      return [];
    }

    const makeRow = (p, isUser) => {
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:0.5px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1));border-radius:6px';
      const thumbActions = _patternActions(p);
      const thumb = thumbActions.length >= 2 ? _patternThumbSVG(thumbActions) : '';
      row.innerHTML = `
        <div style="font-size:1.4rem;line-height:1;margin-top:1px">${escapeHtml(p.icon || '🎵')}</div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</div>
            ${thumb ? `<div title="curve preview" style="opacity:0.85">${thumb}</div>` : ''}
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.4;margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(p.description || '')}</div>
          <div class="_pp_actions" style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
        </div>`;
      const actions = row.querySelector('._pp_actions');
      const mkBtn = (label, handler, secondary = true) => {
        const b = document.createElement('button');
        b.type = 'button';
        b.className = secondary ? 'btn secondary' : 'btn';
        b.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.66rem;padding:3px 9px';
        b.textContent = label;
        b.addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); handler(); });
        actions.appendChild(b);
      };
      mkBtn('use', () => {
        const track = _trackFromAnyPattern(p);
        if (!track) { notify.error('Pattern build failed.'); return; }
        funscriptEngine.loadTrack(track, `pattern: ${p.name}`);
        notify.success(`Loaded · ${p.name} · ${track.actions.length} points`);
        $('funscriptPatternModal').style.display = 'none';
      }, false);
      if (isUser) {
        mkBtn('edit',      () => _openPatternEditor({ patternId: p.id }));
        mkBtn('duplicate', () => {
          const all = loadUserPatterns();
          const ids = new Set(all.map(x => x.id));
          const copy = _normalizeUserPattern({ ...p, id: p.id + '-copy', name: p.name + ' (copy)', _created: Date.now() }, ids);
          all.push(copy); saveUserPatterns(all);
          notify.success('Pattern duplicated.');
          _renderPatternPicker();
        });
        mkBtn('share', async () => {
          await shareKit.shareEnvelope(shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern', p), { fileLabel: 'pattern', modalTitle: `Share pattern · ${p.name}` });
        });
        mkBtn('export', () => {
          shareKit.downloadJson(`hne-pattern-${p.id}`, shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern', p));
        });
        mkBtn('delete', async () => {
          const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete pattern "${p.name}"?`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
          if (!ok) return;
          saveUserPatterns(loadUserPatterns().filter(x => x.id !== p.id));
          notify.info('Pattern deleted.');
          _renderPatternPicker();
        });
      } else {
        mkBtn('duplicate to mine', () => _openPatternEditor({ fromBuiltinId: p.id }));
        mkBtn('export', () => {

          const materialized = {
            id: 'user-' + p.id,
            name: p.name,
            icon: p.icon,
            description: p.description,
            inverted: false,
            range: 100,
            actions: p.generate(),
            _user: true,
            _created: Date.now(),
          };
          shareKit.downloadJson(`hne-pattern-${p.id}`, shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern', materialized));
        });
      }
      list.appendChild(row);
    };

    makeSection('Built-in', FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS.length);
    for (const p of FUNSCRIPT_PATTERNS) makeRow(p, false);
    makeSection('Mine', userPatterns.length);
    if (!userPatterns.length) {
      const empty = document.createElement('div');
      empty.style.cssText = 'padding:14px 12px;font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;text-align:center;border:0.5px dashed var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.15));border-radius:6px';
      empty.textContent = 'No user patterns yet. Use "+ new" above, "duplicate to mine" on a built-in, or "import" to get started.';
      list.appendChild(empty);
    } else {
      for (const p of userPatterns) makeRow(p, true);
    }
  }

  $('funscriptPatternBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    let modal = $('funscriptPatternModal');
    if (!modal) {
      modal = document.createElement('div');
      modal.id = 'funscriptPatternModal';
      modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px';
      modal.innerHTML = `
        <div style="background:var(--bg-elev,#1a1a22);border:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1));border-radius:10px;max-width:640px;width:100%;max-height:88vh;overflow:auto;padding:20px">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
            <div style="font-size:0.95rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">Haptic patterns</div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">
              <button type="button" id="funscriptPatternNewBtn"      class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">+ new</button>
              <button type="button" id="funscriptPatternImportBtn"   class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">import</button>
              <button type="button" id="funscriptPatternExportAllBtn" class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">export all</button>
              <button type="button" id="funscriptPatternShareAllBtn"  class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">share bundle</button>
              <button type="button" id="funscriptPatternModalClose"  class="btn secondary" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.66rem">close</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hint" style="font-size:0.66rem;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:10px">
            Built-ins are read-only — duplicate to edit. User patterns live in this browser only; export or share to back them up or send to others.
          </div>
          <div id="funscriptPatternList" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px"></div>
        </div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(modal);
      modal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === modal) modal.style.display = 'none'; });
      modal.querySelector('#funscriptPatternModalClose').addEventListener('click', () => { modal.style.display = 'none'; });

      modal.querySelector('#funscriptPatternNewBtn').addEventListener('click', () => _openPatternEditor());

      modal.querySelector('#funscriptPatternImportBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const choice = await confirmAsync('Import a pattern from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
        let parsed = null;
        if (choice) {
          const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json,.funscript');
          if (!file) return;
          try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); }
          catch (e) {

            try {
              const fs = _parseFunScript(file.text);
              parsed = shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern', _normalizeUserPattern({
                id: 'user-' + Date.now().toString(36),
                name: file.name.replace(/\.(funscript|json)$/i, ''),
                icon: '🎵',
                description: 'Imported from ' + file.name,
                inverted: fs.inverted, range: fs.range, actions: fs.actions,
              }));
            } catch (e2) { notify.error('Could not parse: ' + e2.message); return; }
          }
        } else {
          parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import pattern JSON');
          if (!parsed) return;
        }
        await _importPatternEnvelope(parsed);
      });

      modal.querySelector('#funscriptPatternExportAllBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
        const userPatterns = loadUserPatterns();
        if (!userPatterns.length) { notify.warn('No user patterns to export.'); return; }
        shareKit.downloadJson('hne-patterns-bundle', shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern-bundle', userPatterns));
      });

      modal.querySelector('#funscriptPatternShareAllBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const userPatterns = loadUserPatterns();
        if (!userPatterns.length) { notify.warn('No user patterns to share.'); return; }
        await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
          shareKit.envelope('funscript-pattern-bundle', userPatterns),
          { fileLabel: 'patterns', modalTitle: `Share ${userPatterns.length} patterns` }
        );
      });
    }
    _renderPatternPicker();
    modal.style.display = 'flex';
  });

  async function _importPatternEnvelope(parsed) {
    let patterns = [];
    try {

      if (parsed?.kind === 'funscript-pattern') {
        patterns = [parsed.data];
      } else if (parsed?.kind === 'funscript-pattern-bundle') {
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.data)) throw new Error('Bundle data must be an array');
        patterns = parsed.data;
      } else if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.every(p => p?.actions)) {
        patterns = parsed;
      } else if (parsed?.actions) {
        patterns = [parsed];
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected funscript-pattern or bundle');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }

    const existing = loadUserPatterns();
    const ids = new Set(existing.map(p => p.id));
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const p of patterns) {
      const norm = _normalizeUserPattern(p, new Set([...ids].filter(id => id !== p.id)));
      const dup = existing.find(x => x.id === norm.id);
      if (dup) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Pattern "${norm.name}" (id ${norm.id}) already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!ok) continue;
        const idx = existing.findIndex(x => x.id === norm.id);
        existing[idx] = norm;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing.push(norm);
        ids.add(norm.id);
        added++;
      }
    }
    saveUserPatterns(existing);
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
    _renderPatternPicker();
  }

  const FIXATION_POS_KEY = 'hne_fixation_pos_v1';

  function _applyFixationPos(pos) {
    const stage = $('stage');
    if (!stage) return;
    if (pos && Number.isFinite(pos.x) && Number.isFinite(pos.y)) {
      stage.style.setProperty('--fixation-x', (pos.x * 100).toFixed(2) + '%');
      stage.style.setProperty('--fixation-y', (pos.y * 100).toFixed(2) + '%');
      $('fixationDot')?.classList.add('repositioned');
    } else {
      stage.style.removeProperty('--fixation-x');
      stage.style.removeProperty('--fixation-y');
      $('fixationDot')?.classList.remove('repositioned');
    }
  }

  function _restoreFixationPos() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY);
      if (!raw) return;
      const pos = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!pos || typeof pos !== 'object') return;
      const x = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.95, Number(pos.x)));
      const y = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.95, Number(pos.y)));
      if (Number.isFinite(x) && Number.isFinite(y)) _applyFixationPos({ x, y });
    } catch {}
  }

  $('stage')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (!e.shiftKey) return;
    if (!document.body.classList.contains('in-session')) return;
    const stage = $('stage');
    if (!stage) return;
    const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width <= 0 || rect.height <= 0) return;
    const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
    const y = (e.clientY - rect.top)  / rect.height;

    const cx = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.95, x));
    const cy = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.95, y));
    _applyFixationPos({ x: cx, y: cy });
    try { localStorage.setItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY, JSON.stringify({ x: cx, y: cy })); } catch {}

    stage.classList.add('fixation-relocate-hint');
    setTimeout(() => stage.classList.remove('fixation-relocate-hint'), 1300);

    try {
      if (!localStorage.getItem('hne_fixation_hint_shown_v1')) {
        notify.info('Fixation dot moved. Double-click the dot to reset.', 5000);
        localStorage.setItem('hne_fixation_hint_shown_v1', '1');
      }
    } catch {}
    e.stopPropagation();
  });

  $('fixationDot')?.addEventListener('dblclick', (e) => {
    _applyFixationPos(null);
    try { localStorage.removeItem(FIXATION_POS_KEY); } catch {}
    notify.info('Fixation dot reset to default position.');
    e.stopPropagation();
  });

  _restoreFixationPos();

  $('crisisLink')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const msg = 'If you are in crisis or experiencing distress:\n\n' +
      '🇺🇸 USA: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — call or text 988\n' +
      '🇬🇧 UK/IE: Samaritans — 116 123 (free, 24/7)\n' +
      '🇦🇺 Australia: Lifeline — 13 11 14\n' +
      '🇨🇦 Canada: Talk Suicide — 1-833-456-4566\n' +
      '🌍 International: findahelpline.com\n\n' +
      'This tool is not a substitute for professional care.';
    alertModal('Crisis Resources', msg);
  });

  $('sidebarToggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    $('sidebar')?.classList.toggle('open');
    $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.toggle('open');
  });
  $('sidebarOverlay')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    $('sidebar')?.classList.remove('open');
    $('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');
  });
