      if (typeof renderMethodGrid  === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
      if (typeof renderPresets     === 'function') renderPresets();
      if (typeof renderPrograms    === 'function') renderPrograms();
    } catch {}
  });

  $('pfAdultUnlock')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    try {

      if (typeof saveProfile === 'function') saveProfile();
      if (e.target.checked) {

        notify.info?.('Mature content enabled. Additional session modes are now visible.');
      } else {

        const m = SESSION_MODES.find(x => x.id === state.activeSessionMode);
        if (m?.adultGated) {
          applySessionMode('standard');
          notify.info?.('Mature content disabled. Session mode reset to Standard.');
        }

        if (state.personaFilter === 'adult') {
          state.personaFilter = 'all';
          document.querySelectorAll('#personaFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(t => {
            t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.filter === 'all');
          });
        }
      }
      if (typeof _renderSessionModeDropdown === 'function') _renderSessionModeDropdown();
      if (typeof _renderContentPacksGrid === 'function') _renderContentPacksGrid();

      if (typeof _refreshAdultFilterVisibility === 'function') _refreshAdultFilterVisibility();
      if (typeof renderPersonaGrid === 'function') renderPersonaGrid();
      if (typeof renderMethodGrid  === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
      if (typeof renderPresets     === 'function') renderPresets();
      if (typeof renderPrograms    === 'function') renderPrograms();
    } catch (err) { console.warn('[adult-unlock toggle]', err); }
  });

  function _refreshAdultFilterVisibility() {
    const tab = document.getElementById('personaFilterAdult');
    if (!tab) return;
    const eligible = (typeof _userIsAdultEligible === 'function') ? _userIsAdultEligible() : false;
    tab.style.display = eligible ? '' : 'none';
  }

  setTimeout(() => { try { _refreshAdultFilterVisibility(); } catch {} }, 500);

  $('pfPracticeSpace')?.addEventListener('change', () => {
    if (typeof _refreshSoundscapeHint === 'function') _refreshSoundscapeHint();
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('#timelineFilterRow .timeline-chip').forEach(chip => {
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      _timelineFilter = chip.dataset.filter || 'all';
      document.querySelectorAll('#timelineFilterRow .timeline-chip').forEach(c => {
        c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.filter === _timelineFilter);
      });
      renderTimeline();
    });
  });

  let _timelineFullModalEl = null;
  function _ensureTimelineFullModal() {
    if (_timelineFullModalEl) return _timelineFullModalEl;
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'modal-backdrop';
    wrap.id = 'timelineFullModal';
    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="modal" style="max-width:720px;max-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0">activity timeline</h2>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:10px">
          Full chronological feed of profile edits, AI calls, and sessions. Newer entries are brighter (matches what the AI weights heaviest). Filter chips below narrow the view.
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-filter-row" id="timelineFullFilterRow" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <button class="timeline-chip active" data-filter="all" type="button">All</button>
          <button class="timeline-chip" data-filter="profile" type="button">Profile edits</button>
          <button class="timeline-chip" data-filter="ai" type="button">AI calls</button>
          <button class="timeline-chip" data-filter="session" type="button">Sessions</button>
        </div>
        <div id="timelineFullList" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.5;padding-right:4px"></div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
          <button class="btn" id="timelineFullClose">close</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
    _timelineFullModalEl = wrap;
    $('timelineFullClose').addEventListener('click', () => wrap.classList.remove('visible'));
    wrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.id === 'timelineFullModal') wrap.classList.remove('visible');
    });

    let modalFilter = 'all';
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.timeline-chip').forEach(chip => {
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        modalFilter = chip.dataset.filter || 'all';
        wrap.querySelectorAll('.timeline-chip').forEach(c => {
          c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.filter === modalFilter);
        });
        _renderFullTimeline(modalFilter);
      });
    });
    return wrap;
  }
  async function _renderFullTimeline(filter = 'all') {
    const list = $('timelineFullList');
    if (!list) return;
    list.innerHTML = '<div class="tl-empty">loading…</div>';

    if (typeof _loadAuditLog === 'function' && !_aiAuditLoaded) {
      try { await _loadAuditLog(); } catch {}
    }
    const profileEntries = (_profileChangeLog || []).map(e => ({
      ts: e.ts, category: 'profile', sourceId: e.source, type: e.type, diff: e.diff,
    }));
    const aiEntries = (_aiAuditLog || []).map(e => ({
      ts: e.ts, category: 'ai', provider: e.provider, sourceId: e.source, bytes: e.bytes,
      contextBytes: e.contextBytes, taskBytes: e.taskBytes,
    }));
    let sessionEntries = [];
    try {
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      sessionEntries = history.map(s => ({
        ts: s.date || 0, category: 'session', guide: s.guide || '?', method: s.method || '?',
        duration: Math.round((s.durationSec || 0) / 60), completed: !!s.completed,
        preMood: s.preMood, postMood: s.postMood,
      }));
    } catch {}
    const all = [...profileEntries, ...aiEntries, ...sessionEntries].sort((a, b) => (b.ts || 0) - (a.ts || 0));
    const filtered = (filter === 'all') ? all : all.filter(e => e.category === filter);
    if (!filtered.length) {
      list.innerHTML = `<div class="tl-empty">no ${filter === 'all' ? '' : filter + ' '}entries.</div>`;
      return;
    }
    const now = Date.now();
    const dayMs = 86400000;
    list.innerHTML = filtered.map(e => _renderTimelineEntry(e, now, dayMs)).join('');
  }
  $('timelineExpandBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    _ensureTimelineFullModal().classList.add('visible');
    _renderFullTimeline('all');
  });

  async function getSessionCount() {
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    return history.filter(s => s.completed).length;
  }

  async function applyMethodGating() {
    const count = await getSessionCount();
    const skip = state._debug?.skipMethodGating;
    if (skip) sdLog('method gating bypassed — debug mode on');

    const prevLockedCats = state._methodLockState?.lockedCats;
    const newLockedCats = skip ? new Set() : new Set([
      ...(count < 3 ? ['rapid'] : []),
      ...(count < 7 ? ['advanced'] : []),
    ]);

    state._methodLockState = {
      sessionCount: count,
      skip: !!skip,
      lockedCats: newLockedCats,
      reasonFor: (cat) => {
        if (skip) return '';
        if (cat === 'rapid' && count < 3) return `Unlocks after 3 completed sessions (${count} so far)`;
        if (cat === 'advanced' && count < 7) return `Unlocks after 7 completed sessions (${count} so far)`;
        return '';
      },
    };

    if (prevLockedCats) {
      const newlyUnlocked = [];
      for (const cat of prevLockedCats) {
        if (!newLockedCats.has(cat)) newlyUnlocked.push(cat);
      }
      if (newlyUnlocked.length) {

        const labels = { rapid: 'Rapid induction', advanced: 'Advanced' };
        const desc = newlyUnlocked.map(c => labels[c] || c).join(' & ');
        const msg = newlyUnlocked.length === 1
          ? `✦ ${desc} methods unlocked! Find them in Step 2 → category filter.`
          : `✦ New method categories unlocked: ${desc}. Step 2 → category filter.`;
        try {
          notify.success(msg, 8000);
        } catch {
          notify.success(msg);
        }
      }
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('#methodFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(tab => {
      const cat = tab.dataset.filter;
      if (!skip && cat === 'rapid' && count < 3) {
        tab.style.opacity = '0.4';
        tab.title = `Unlocks after 3 completed sessions (${count} so far)`;
      } else if (!skip && cat === 'advanced' && count < 7) {
        tab.style.opacity = '0.4';
        tab.title = `Unlocks after 7 completed sessions (${count} so far)`;
      } else {
        tab.style.opacity = '';
        tab.title = skip && (cat === 'rapid' || cat === 'advanced') ? 'Debug: unlocked' : '';
      }
    });

    if (typeof renderMethodGrid === 'function') renderMethodGrid();
  }

  const HIDDEN_PERSONA_UNLOCKS = {
    'cartographer': {
      hint: 'Visits a few different guides — variety reveals new paths',
      check: m => m.completedSessions >= 5 && m.uniquePersonasUsed >= 3,
    },
    'witness': {
      hint: 'Stays the course over many sessions',
      check: m => m.completedSessions >= 10,
    },
    'conductor': {
      hint: 'Listens to several different soundscapes',
      check: m => m.uniqueSoundscapesUsed >= 3,
    },
    'riverman': {
      hint: 'Returns for sleep, again and again',
      check: m => m.sleepIntentionSessions >= 4,
    },
    'dreamer': {
      hint: 'Spends real time in trance',
      check: m => m.longSessions >= 2,
    },
    'echo': {
      hint: 'Steps away — and comes back',
      check: m => m.returnedAfterAbsence === true,
    },
    'cipher': {
      hint: 'Explores different methods within a short window',
      check: m => m.methodsInLastWeek >= 3,
    },
    'lighthouse': {
      hint: 'Long-term steadiness — sessions completed cleanly',
      check: m => m.completedSessions >= 15 && m.emergencyExits === 0,
    },
  };

  async function _buildUnlockMetrics() {
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    const completed = history.filter(s => s.completed);
    const personas = new Set();
    const soundscapes = new Set();
    let sleepCount = 0;
    let longSessions = 0;
    let emergencyExits = 0;

    const methodEvents = [];
    for (const s of history) {
      if (s.personaId) personas.add(s.personaId);
      if (s.soundscape && s.soundscape !== 'none') soundscapes.add(s.soundscape);
      if (s.intentionType === 'sleep' && s.completed) sleepCount++;
      if (s.completed && (s.metrics?.estimatedMin >= 30 || s.actualDurationMin >= 30)) longSessions++;
      if (s.emergencyExit || s.wasEmergency) emergencyExits++;
      const ts = Number(s.date || s.id || 0);
      if (s.methodId && Number.isFinite(ts) && ts > 0) methodEvents.push({ methodId: s.methodId, ts });
    }

    let maxMethodsInWindow = 0;
    methodEvents.sort((a, b) => a.ts - b.ts);
    const WEEK_MS = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    for (let i = 0; i < methodEvents.length; i++) {
      const windowEnd = methodEvents[i].ts;
      const seen = new Set();
      for (let j = i; j >= 0 && (windowEnd - methodEvents[j].ts) <= WEEK_MS; j--) {
        seen.add(methodEvents[j].methodId);
      }
      if (seen.size > maxMethodsInWindow) maxMethodsInWindow = seen.size;
    }

    let returnedAfterAbsence = false;
    const completedSorted = completed
      .map(s => Number(s.date || s.id || 0))
      .filter(n => Number.isFinite(n) && n > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => a - b);
    for (let i = 1; i < completedSorted.length; i++) {
      if ((completedSorted[i] - completedSorted[i-1]) >= WEEK_MS) {
        returnedAfterAbsence = true;
        break;
      }
    }
    return {
      completedSessions:    completed.length,
      uniquePersonasUsed:   personas.size,
      uniqueSoundscapesUsed: soundscapes.size,
      sleepIntentionSessions: sleepCount,
      longSessions,
      emergencyExits,
      methodsInLastWeek:    maxMethodsInWindow,
      returnedAfterAbsence,
    };
  }

  async function checkPersonaUnlocks() {
    if (!state._unlocks || typeof state._unlocks !== 'object') state._unlocks = {};
    let metrics;
    try { metrics = await _buildUnlockMetrics(); } catch (e) { return; }
    const newlyUnlocked = [];
    for (const [pid, def] of Object.entries(HIDDEN_PERSONA_UNLOCKS)) {
      if (state._unlocks[pid]) continue;
      let pass = false;
      try { pass = !!def.check(metrics); } catch (e) { pass = false; }
      if (!pass) continue;
      state._unlocks[pid] = { unlockedAt: Date.now() };
      newlyUnlocked.push(pid);
    }
    if (newlyUnlocked.length) {
      try { await idbSet('stillness_unlocks_v1', state._unlocks); } catch {}

      try { renderPersonaGrid(); } catch {}

      try { _showPersonaUnlockReveal(newlyUnlocked); } catch (e) { console.warn('unlock reveal:', e); }
    }
  }

  function _showPersonaUnlockReveal(personaIds) {
    const personas = personaIds
      .map(id => BUILTIN_PERSONAS.find(p => p.id === id))
      .filter(Boolean);
    if (!personas.length) return;
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    const isMulti = personas.length > 1;
    const cards = personas.map(p => `
      <div style="padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border, #2a2f3a);background:var(--bg-deep, #0e1218);margin-bottom:10px">
        <div style="font-size:0.66rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-warm, #d4a772);margin-bottom:6px">✦ new guide unlocked</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.04rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text, #e8edf2);margin-bottom:4px">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim, #98a2b3);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:8px">${escapeHtml(p.tagline)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-faint, #6c7689);line-height:1.45">${escapeHtml(p.systemPrompt.split('. ').slice(0, 2).join('. ') + '.')}</div>
      </div>
    `).join('');
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.1rem">${isMulti ? `${personas.length} guides revealed` : 'A new guide reveals itself'}</h2>
      <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-dim, #98a2b3);margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.5">
        Your practice has earned ${isMulti ? 'these voices' : 'this voice'}. ${isMulti ? 'They\'re' : 'It\'s'} now available in Step 1.
      </div>
      ${cards}
      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
        <button class="btn-ghost" id="_unlockRevealLater">later</button>
        <button class="btn-primary" id="_unlockRevealView">meet ${isMulti ? 'them' : 'them'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
    const close = () => { try { backdrop.remove(); } catch {} };
    backdrop.querySelector('#_unlockRevealLater')?.addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.querySelector('#_unlockRevealView')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      close();

      try {
        state.selectedPersonaId = personas[0].id;
        if (typeof goToStep === 'function') goToStep(1);
        renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail();
      } catch {}
    });

    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });
  }

  function renderHiddenPersonaHint() {
    const grid = $('personaGrid');
    if (!grid) return;

    grid.querySelectorAll('.hidden-guide-hint').forEach(el => el.remove());
    const lockedIds = Object.keys(HIDDEN_PERSONA_UNLOCKS).filter(id => !state._unlocks?.[id]);
    if (!lockedIds.length) return;
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'card hidden-guide-hint';
    card.style.cssText = 'border:1px dashed var(--border, #2a2f3a);background:transparent;cursor:help;opacity:0.72;';
    const hints = lockedIds.map(id => `<div style="font-size:0.66rem;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text-faint, #6c7689);padding:2px 0">· ${escapeHtml(HIDDEN_PERSONA_UNLOCKS[id].hint)}</div>`).join('');
    card.innerHTML = `<div class="card-category-label" style="color:var(--text-faint, #6c7689)">${lockedIds.length} hidden</div>
      <div class="card-name" style="color:var(--text-dim, #98a2b3)">🔒 not yet revealed</div>
      <div class="card-tagline" style="font-size:0.7rem;margin-top:6px">Each guide unlocks through a different rhythm of practice. Hover for hints.</div>
      <div style="margin-top:8px;display:none" class="hidden-guide-hint-detail">${hints}</div>`;

    let expanded = false;
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      expanded = !expanded;
      const det = card.querySelector('.hidden-guide-hint-detail');
      if (det) det.style.display = expanded ? '' : 'none';
    });
    grid.appendChild(card);
  }

  $('personaCancelBtn').addEventListener('click', closePersonaEditor);
  $('personaSaveBtn').addEventListener('click', savePersonaFromForm);
  $('personaShareBtn')?.addEventListener('click', shareCurrentPersona);
  $('personaCloudBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!state.cloudUser) {
      notify.warn('Sign in to upload personas to cloud.');
      openCloudSignInModal();
      return;
    }
    const name = $('personaFormName')?.value?.trim();
    const systemPrompt = $('personaFormPrompt')?.value?.trim();
    if (!name || !systemPrompt) { notify.warn('Fill in name and voice instruction first.'); return; }
    const payload = {
      id: state.editingPersonaId || ('p_' + Date.now()),
      name,
      tagline: $('personaFormTagline')?.value?.trim() || '',
      category: $('personaFormCategory')?.value || 'contemplative',
      systemPrompt,
      isCustom: true,
    };
    setLoading('personaCloudBtn', true);
    try {
      await cloudUploadContent('persona', name, JSON.stringify(payload));
    } finally {
      setLoading('personaCloudBtn', false, '☁ cloud');
    }
  });
  $('personaModal').addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.id === 'personaModal') closePersonaEditor(); });

  async function _importPersonaEnvelope(parsed) {
    let personas = [];
    try {
      if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-persona') {

        personas = parsed.persona ? [parsed.persona] : (parsed.data ? [parsed.data] : []);
      } else if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-persona-bundle') {
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.data)) throw new Error('Bundle data must be an array');
        personas = parsed.data;
      } else if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.every(p => p?.systemPrompt || p?.name)) {
        personas = parsed;
      } else if (parsed?.systemPrompt || parsed?.name) {
        personas = [parsed];
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected custom-persona or bundle');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }

    const reviewMsg = personas.length === 1
      ? `Import persona "${personas[0]?.name || '(unnamed)'}"?\n\nReview the voice instruction before using. Shared personas may describe sensitive themes. If you are under 18, click cancel.`
      : `Import ${personas.length} personas?\n\nReview before using. Shared personas may describe sensitive themes. If you are under 18, click cancel.`;
    const ok = await confirmAsync(reviewMsg, { okText: 'review & add', cancelText: 'cancel' });
    if (!ok) return;

    const existing = loadCustomPersonas();
    const ids = new Set(existing.map(p => p.id));
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const p of personas) {
      if (!p || !p.systemPrompt || !p.name) continue;
      const safe = {
        id: (typeof p.id === 'string' && p.id) ? p.id : ('p_' + Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 5)),
        name: String(p.name).slice(0, 80),
        tagline: String(p.tagline || '').slice(0, 200),
        category: ['contemplative', 'showman', 'somatic', 'authoritarian'].includes(p.category) ? p.category : 'contemplative',
        systemPrompt: String(p.systemPrompt).slice(0, 8000),
        isCustom: true,
      };
      const dup = existing.find(x => x.id === safe.id);
      if (dup) {
        const replace = await confirmAsync(`Persona "${safe.name}" already exists with id ${safe.id}. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!replace) continue;
        const idx = existing.findIndex(x => x.id === safe.id);
        existing[idx] = safe;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing.push(safe);
        ids.add(safe.id);
        added++;
      }
    }
    saveCustomPersonas(existing);
    state.personas = [...BUILTIN_PERSONAS, ...loadCustomPersonas()];
    renderPersonaGrid?.();
    renderPersonaDetail?.();
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
  }

  $('personaImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const choice = await confirmAsync('Import personas from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
    let parsed = null;
    if (choice) {
      const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json');
      if (!file) return;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); }
      catch (e) { notify.error('Not valid JSON: ' + e.message); return; }
    } else {
      parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import personas');
      if (!parsed) return;
    }
    await _importPersonaEnvelope(parsed);
  });
  $('personaExportAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const all = loadCustomPersonas();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom personas to export.'); return; }
    shareKit.downloadJson('hne-personas-bundle', shareKit.envelope('custom-persona-bundle', all));
  });
  $('personaShareAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const all = loadCustomPersonas();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom personas to share.'); return; }
    await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
      shareKit.envelope('custom-persona-bundle', all),
      { fileLabel: 'personas', modalTitle: `Share ${all.length} persona${all.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` }
    );
    await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
  });

  function _renderCustomIntentionsList() {
    const list = $('customIntentionsList');
    const count = $('customIntentionsCount');
    if (!list) return;
    const all = loadCustomIntentions();
    if (count) count.textContent = `(${all.length})`;
    if (!all.length) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;padding:6px 0;font-size:0.66rem">No custom intentions yet.</div>';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '';
    for (const ci of all) {
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:4px;font-size:0.7rem';
      row.innerHTML = `
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div style="color:var(--text);font-weight:500">${escapeHtml(ci.label)}</div>
          <div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem;margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(ci.hint || ci.guidance.slice(0, 80) + '…')}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="_ci_actions" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0"></div>`;
      const actions = row.querySelector('._ci_actions');
      const mkBtn = (label, handler) => {
        const b = document.createElement('button');
        b.type = 'button';
        b.className = 'btn secondary';
        b.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px';
        b.textContent = label;
        b.addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); handler(); });
        actions.appendChild(b);
      };
      mkBtn('edit', () => _openCustomIntentionEditor(ci.id));
      mkBtn('share', async () => {
        await shareKit.shareEnvelope(shareKit.envelope('custom-intention', ci), { fileLabel: 'intention', modalTitle: `Share intention · ${ci.label}` });
        await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
      });
      mkBtn('export', () => shareKit.downloadJson(`hne-intention-${ci.id}`, shareKit.envelope('custom-intention', ci)));
      mkBtn('×', async () => {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete intention "${ci.label}"?`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
        if (!ok) return;
        const arr = loadCustomIntentions().filter(x => x.id !== ci.id);
        saveCustomIntentions(arr);

        if (state.intentionType === ci.id) state.intentionType = 'trigger';
        _refreshCustomIntentions();
        notify.info(`Deleted intention "${ci.label}".`);
      });
      list.appendChild(row);
    }
  }

  function _openCustomIntentionEditor(id = null) {
    let editing = null;
    if (id) {
      editing = loadCustomIntentions().find(x => x.id === id);
      if (!editing) { notify.error('Intention not found.'); return; }
    }
    const isNew = !editing;
    const init = editing || { id: '', label: '', hint: '', guidance: '', group: 'Custom' };
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:680px">
      <h2>${isNew ? 'New custom intention' : 'Edit intention'}</h2>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 1fr;gap:10px 14px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Label</label>
        <input id="_ci_label" type="text" maxlength="80" placeholder="e.g. Self-compassion practice" value="${escapeHtml(init.label)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.84rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Group</label>
        <input id="_ci_group" type="text" maxlength="30" placeholder="Custom" value="${escapeHtml(init.group || 'Custom')}" style="width:160px;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);align-self:start;margin-top:6px">Hint</label>
        <input id="_ci_hint" type="text" maxlength="200" placeholder="One-line tip shown under the dropdown" value="${escapeHtml(init.hint)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);align-self:start;margin-top:6px">Guidance</label>
        <textarea id="_ci_guidance" maxlength="6000" rows="9" placeholder="Detailed guidance the AI follows when generating with this intention. Reference structure, language patterns, what to avoid. Look at built-ins (Foundation/Performance/Body groups) for examples — the AI uses this verbatim as a system instruction.">${escapeHtml(init.guidance)}</textarea>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px">
        Custom intentions become available in the dropdown above and to the AI during generation. The Guidance field is what gets injected into prompts — it's worth being thorough.
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_ci_cancel">cancel</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_ci_save">${isNew ? 'create' : 'save'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);

    backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_guidance').style.cssText = 'width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.74rem;line-height:1.5;resize:vertical';
    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });
    backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_save').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const label = backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_label').value.trim();
      const guidance = backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_guidance').value.trim();
      if (!label) { notify.warn('Label required.'); return; }
      if (!guidance || guidance.length < 30) { notify.warn('Guidance must be at least 30 characters — the AI needs context to work with.'); return; }
      const arr = loadCustomIntentions();
      const otherIds = new Set(arr.map(x => x.id).filter(x => x !== init.id));
      const updated = _normalizeCustomIntention({
        id: init.id || label,
        label,
        hint: backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_hint').value,
        guidance,
        group: backdrop.querySelector('#_ci_group').value,
        _created: init._created,
      }, otherIds);
      const idx = arr.findIndex(x => x.id === init.id);
      if (idx >= 0) arr[idx] = updated; else arr.push(updated);
      saveCustomIntentions(arr);
      _refreshCustomIntentions();
      close();
      notify.success(isNew ? `Intention "${updated.label}" created.` : 'Intention saved.');
    });
  }

  async function _importCustomIntentionEnvelope(parsed) {
    let items = [];
    try {
      if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-intention') items = [parsed.data];
      else if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-intention-bundle') {
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.data)) throw new Error('Bundle data must be an array');
        items = parsed.data;
      } else if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.every(x => x?.label && x?.guidance)) {
        items = parsed;
      } else if (parsed?.label && parsed?.guidance) {
        items = [parsed];
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected custom-intention or bundle');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }
    const existing = loadCustomIntentions();
    const ids = new Set(existing.map(x => x.id));
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const raw of items) {
      const norm = _normalizeCustomIntention(raw, new Set([...ids].filter(x => x !== raw?.id)));
      const dup = existing.find(x => x.id === norm.id);
      if (dup) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Intention "${norm.label}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!ok) continue;
        const idx = existing.findIndex(x => x.id === norm.id);
        existing[idx] = norm;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing.push(norm);
        ids.add(norm.id);
        added++;
      }
    }
    saveCustomIntentions(existing);
    _refreshCustomIntentions();
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
  }

  $('customIntentionNewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => _openCustomIntentionEditor());

  $('customIntentionDupBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const current = state.intentionType;
    const src = INTENTION_TYPES[current];
    if (!src) { notify.warn('Select an intention to duplicate first.'); return; }
    _openCustomIntentionEditor();
    setTimeout(() => {
      const $$ = id => document.getElementById(id);
      if ($$('_ci_label') && !$$('_ci_label').value) {
        const label = (src.label || current) + ' (copy)';
        $$('_ci_label').value = label;
        const hint = $$('_ci_hint');         if (hint) hint.value = src.hint || '';
        const grp  = $$('_ci_group');        if (grp)  grp.value = src._group || (src._custom ? 'Custom' : 'Forked');
        const guid = $$('_ci_guidance');     if (guid) guid.value = src.guidance || '';
      }
    }, 60);
  });
  $('customIntentionImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const choice = await confirmAsync('Import intentions from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
    let parsed = null;
    if (choice) {
      const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json');
      if (!file) return;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); } catch (e) { notify.error('Not valid JSON: ' + e.message); return; }
    } else {
      parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import custom intentions');
      if (!parsed) return;
    }
    await _importCustomIntentionEnvelope(parsed);
  });
  $('customIntentionExportAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const all = loadCustomIntentions();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom intentions to export.'); return; }
    shareKit.downloadJson('hne-intentions-bundle', shareKit.envelope('custom-intention-bundle', all));
  });
  $('customIntentionShareAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const all = loadCustomIntentions();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom intentions to share.'); return; }
    await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
      shareKit.envelope('custom-intention-bundle', all),
      { fileLabel: 'intentions', modalTitle: `Share ${all.length} intention${all.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` }
    );
    await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
  });

  function _renderCustomMethodsList() {
    const list = $('customMethodsList');
    const count = $('customMethodsCount');
    if (!list) return;
    const all = loadCustomMethods();
    if (count) count.textContent = `(${all.length})`;
    if (!all.length) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-style:italic;padding:6px 0;font-size:0.66rem">No custom methods yet.</div>';
      return;
    }
    list.innerHTML = '';
    for (const cm of all) {
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:4px;font-size:0.7rem';
      const tagsLine = (cm.tags || []).slice(0, 4).map(t => `#${t}`).join(' ');
      row.innerHTML = `
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div style="color:var(--text);font-weight:500">${escapeHtml(cm.name)} <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem;font-weight:normal">· ${escapeHtml(cm.category)}</span></div>
          <div style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem;margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(cm.tagline || '')}${tagsLine ? ' · ' + escapeHtml(tagsLine) : ''}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="_cm_actions" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0"></div>`;
      const actions = row.querySelector('._cm_actions');
      const mkBtn = (label, handler) => {
        const b = document.createElement('button');
        b.type = 'button'; b.className = 'btn secondary';
        b.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px';
        b.textContent = label;
        b.addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); handler(); });
        actions.appendChild(b);
      };
      mkBtn('edit', () => _openCustomMethodEditor(cm.id));
      mkBtn('share', async () => {
        await shareKit.shareEnvelope(shareKit.envelope('custom-method', cm), { fileLabel: 'method', modalTitle: `Share method · ${cm.name}` });
        await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
      });
      mkBtn('export', () => shareKit.downloadJson(`hne-method-${cm.id}`, shareKit.envelope('custom-method', cm)));
      mkBtn('×', async () => {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete method "${cm.name}"?`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
        if (!ok) return;
        const arr = loadCustomMethods().filter(x => x.id !== cm.id);
        saveCustomMethods(arr);
        if (state.selectedMethodId === cm.id) {

          state.selectedMethodId = METHODS.find(m => !m._custom)?.id || METHODS[0]?.id;
          if (typeof saveUserSettings === 'function') saveUserSettings();
        }
        _refreshCustomMethods();
        notify.info(`Deleted method "${cm.name}".`);
      });
      list.appendChild(row);
    }
  }

  function _openCustomMethodEditor(id = null) {
    let editing = null;
    if (id) {
      editing = loadCustomMethods().find(x => x.id === id);
      if (!editing) { notify.error('Method not found.'); return; }
    }
    const isNew = !editing;
    const init = editing || {
      id: '', name: '', tagline: '', tags: [], category: 'therapeutic',
      detail: '', visual: 'colorwash', drone: false, pacing: 'permissive',
    };

    const vizOptions = (typeof VIZ_RENDERERS === 'object')
      ? Object.keys(VIZ_RENDERERS).sort()
      : ['none','breathing','candle','colorwash','spiral','tunnel','vortex','mandala','aurora','rain','smoke','fireflies','ripples','pulse','pendulum-viz','hand-pendulum','pocket-watch','spinning-coin'];
    const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
    backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
    backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:680px">
      <h2>${isNew ? 'New custom method' : 'Edit method'}</h2>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 1fr;gap:10px 14px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Name</label>
        <input id="_cm_name" type="text" maxlength="60" placeholder="e.g. Body-scan reset" value="${escapeHtml(init.name)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.84rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Tagline</label>
        <input id="_cm_tagline" type="text" maxlength="200" placeholder="One-line description" value="${escapeHtml(init.tagline)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Tags</label>
        <input id="_cm_tags" type="text" maxlength="120" placeholder="Comma-separated, e.g. somatic, sleep, beginner" value="${escapeHtml((init.tags || []).join(', '))}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Category</label>
        <select id="_cm_category" style="padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
          ${VALID_METHOD_CATEGORIES.map(c => `<option value="${c}"${c === init.category ? ' selected' : ''}>${c}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Visualizer</label>
        <select id="_cm_visual" style="padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem">
          ${vizOptions.map(v => `<option value="${escapeHtml(v)}"${v === init.visual ? ' selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(v)}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Pacing</label>
        <input id="_cm_pacing" type="text" maxlength="30" placeholder="permissive, focused, monotony, body-scan, narrative…" value="${escapeHtml(init.pacing)}" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.78rem;font-family:monospace">
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)">Drone</label>
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer">
          <input id="_cm_drone" type="checkbox" ${init.drone ? 'checked' : ''}>
          add ambient drone by default
        </label>
        <label style="font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim);align-self:start;margin-top:6px">Detail</label>
        <textarea id="_cm_detail" maxlength="4000" rows="6" placeholder="What this method does, how it works, when to use it. Shown in the method detail panel; also informs the AI when generating.">${escapeHtml(init.detail)}</textarea>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-faint);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px">
        Custom methods appear in the grid above alongside built-ins, participate in selection / time-of-day rotation / usage stats.
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button class="btn secondary" id="_cm_cancel">cancel</button>
        <button class="btn" id="_cm_save">${isNew ? 'create' : 'save'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
    backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_detail').style.cssText = 'width:100%;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--text);font-size:0.74rem;line-height:1.5;resize:vertical';
    const close = () => backdrop.remove();
    backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
    backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) close(); });
    backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_save').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const name = backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_name').value.trim();
      const detail = backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_detail').value.trim();
      if (!name) { notify.warn('Name required.'); return; }
      if (!detail || detail.length < 30) { notify.warn('Detail must be at least 30 chars — it shows in the method panel and informs the AI.'); return; }
      const tags = backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_tags').value
        .split(',').map(s => s.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 8);
      const arr = loadCustomMethods();
      const otherIds = new Set(arr.map(x => x.id).filter(x => x !== init.id));
      const updated = _normalizeCustomMethod({
        id: init.id || name,
        name, tagline: backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_tagline').value,
        tags, category: backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_category').value,
        detail, visual: backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_visual').value,
        drone: backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_drone').checked,
        pacing: backdrop.querySelector('#_cm_pacing').value || 'permissive',
        _created: init._created,
      }, otherIds);
      const idx = arr.findIndex(x => x.id === init.id);
      if (idx >= 0) arr[idx] = updated; else arr.push(updated);
      saveCustomMethods(arr);
      _refreshCustomMethods();
      close();
      notify.success(isNew ? `Method "${updated.name}" created.` : 'Method saved.');
    });
  }

  async function _importCustomMethodEnvelope(parsed) {
    let items = [];
    try {
      if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-method') items = [parsed.data];
      else if (parsed?.kind === 'custom-method-bundle') {
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.data)) throw new Error('Bundle data must be an array');
        items = parsed.data;
      } else if (Array.isArray(parsed) && parsed.every(x => x?.name && x?.detail)) {
        items = parsed;
      } else if (parsed?.name && parsed?.detail) {
        items = [parsed];
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unrecognized payload — expected custom-method or bundle');
      }
    } catch (e) { notify.error('Import failed: ' + e.message); return; }
    const existing = loadCustomMethods();
    const ids = new Set(existing.map(x => x.id));
    let added = 0, replaced = 0;
    for (const raw of items) {
      const norm = _normalizeCustomMethod(raw, new Set([...ids].filter(x => x !== raw?.id)));
      const dup = existing.find(x => x.id === norm.id);
      if (dup) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(`Method "${norm.name}" already exists. Replace it?`, { okText: 'replace', cancelText: 'skip' });
        if (!ok) continue;
        existing[existing.findIndex(x => x.id === norm.id)] = norm;
        replaced++;
      } else {
        existing.push(norm); ids.add(norm.id); added++;
      }
    }
    saveCustomMethods(existing);
    _refreshCustomMethods();
    notify.success(`Imported · ${added} added${replaced ? `, ${replaced} replaced` : ''}.`);
  }

  $('customMethodNewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => _openCustomMethodEditor());
  $('customMethodImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const choice = await confirmAsync('Import methods from a file or paste JSON?', { okText: 'file', cancelText: 'paste' });
    let parsed = null;
    if (choice) {
      const file = await shareKit.pickFile('.json');
      if (!file) return;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(file.text); } catch (e) { notify.error('Not valid JSON: ' + e.message); return; }
    } else {
      parsed = await shareKit.promptForJson('Import custom methods');
      if (!parsed) return;
    }
    await _importCustomMethodEnvelope(parsed);
  });
  $('customMethodExportAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const all = loadCustomMethods();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom methods to export.'); return; }
    shareKit.downloadJson('hne-methods-bundle', shareKit.envelope('custom-method-bundle', all));
  });
  $('customMethodShareAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const all = loadCustomMethods();
    if (!all.length) { notify.warn('No custom methods to share.'); return; }
    await shareKit.shareEnvelope(
      shareKit.envelope('custom-method-bundle', all),
      { fileLabel: 'methods', modalTitle: `Share ${all.length} method${all.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` }
    );
    await markFeatureUsed?.(FEAT.SHARE);
  });

  (async function init() {
    detectCaps();
    await _initStorage();
    refreshPersonas();

    try { _refreshCustomIntentions(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[custom-intentions]', e); }

    try { _refreshCustomMethods(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[custom-methods]', e); }
    const hadSavedSettings = await loadUserSettings();
    await loadProfile();

    if (typeof _refreshOnboardingQuizVisibility === 'function') {
      _refreshOnboardingQuizVisibility();
    }

    if (!hadSavedSettings && typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function' && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed()) {
      if (!state.playbackDynamics) state.playbackDynamics = { ...PLAYBACK_DYNAMICS_DEFAULTS };
      state.playbackDynamics.enabled = true;
    }
    initDiffBouncers();
    if (typeof loadVoices === 'function') { loadVoices(); applySavedVoiceSelection(); updateVoiceInfo(); }

    try { bootCloudUser(); } catch (e) { console.warn('[bootCloudUser]', e); }

    try { _refreshCommunityNavVisibility(); } catch {}

    window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e) => {
      const msg = String(e.reason?.message || e.reason || '');
      if (msg.includes("postMessage") && (
        msg.includes('setNicknameForNextComment') ||
        msg.includes('setAvatarUrlForNextComment') ||
        msg.includes('stringObj') ||
        msg.includes("Cannot read properties of undefined")
      )) {
        e.preventDefault();
        console.debug('[comments-plugin race, suppressed]', msg);
      }
    });

    $('openCommentsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openCommentsModal);

    $('openCommunityBrowserBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openCommunityBrowserModal);
    renderPersonaGrid();
    renderPersonaDetail();
    renderMethodGrid();
    renderMethodDetail();

    document.querySelectorAll('#personaFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.filter === state.personaFilter));
    document.querySelectorAll('#methodFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.filter === state.methodFilter));
    renderPresets();
    if (typeof _renderContentPacksGrid === 'function') _renderContentPacksGrid();
    renderPrograms();
    renderSessionHistory();
    renderHeatmap();
    renderSidebarStats();
    updateIntentionHint();

    bgCacheGetManifest().then(m => { const el = $('bgCacheCount'); if (el) el.textContent = m.length; });

    if (!hadSavedSettings) {
      const defaultMethod = getMethod();
      state.soundscape = defaultMethod.drone ? 'drone' : 'none';
      state.droneEnabled = defaultMethod.drone;
      const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect');
      if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = state.soundscape;
    }

    try {
      if (!hadSavedSettings) {
        const prm = matchMedia?.('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')?.matches;
        const safetiesRelaxed = typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function' && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
        if (prm && !safetiesRelaxed) {

          if (state.vizSettings) {
            state.vizSettings.intensity = (state.vizSettings.intensity || 1.0) * 0.5;
            state.vizSettings.speed     = (state.vizSettings.speed     || 1.0) * 0.5;
          }

          state.vizOverride = 'candle';
          const vs = $('vizSelect'); if (vs) vs.value = 'candle';

          if (state.audioReactiveMode === 'dramatic' && typeof setAudioReactiveMode === 'function') {
            setAudioReactiveMode('subtle');
          }

          if (typeof saveUserSettings === 'function') saveUserSettings();
          if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
            notify.info('Reduced-motion preference detected — gentler defaults applied. Adjust in Step 5 if you prefer.');
          }
        }
      }
    } catch {  }
    updateStepUI();

    await loadSharedConfig();

    if (typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.aiTextPlugin) {
      if (window.innerWidth < 500) setTimeout(() => root.aiTextPlugin({ preload: true }), 5000);
      else root.aiTextPlugin({ preload: true });
    }

    if (shouldShowTour()) setTimeout(startTour, 800);

    try {
      const PROFILE_EXPANSION_NUDGE_KEY = 'stillness_profile_expansion_nudge_v1';
      const seen = localStorage.getItem(PROFILE_EXPANSION_NUDGE_KEY);
      if (!seen && hadSavedSettings) {
        const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        const completedCount = history.filter(s => s?.completed).length;
        if (completedCount >= 1) {
          setTimeout(() => {
            try {
              if (typeof notify !== 'undefined') {
                notify.info('New profile fields available — practice context, current life themes, personal anchors. The AI uses these to shape sessions more specifically. Open Your Details in the sidebar to set them.', 12000);
              }
              localStorage.setItem(PROFILE_EXPANSION_NUDGE_KEY, '1');
            } catch {}
          }, 3000);
        }
      }
    } catch {  }

    try {
      const intro = $('appIntro');
      if (intro) {
        const stored = localStorage.getItem('stillness_intro_open_v1');
        if (stored === '0') intro.open = false;
        else if (stored === '1') intro.open = true;
        else {

          const hist = await idbGet('stillness_history_v1');
          intro.open = !Array.isArray(hist) || hist.length === 0;
        }
        intro.addEventListener('toggle', () => {
          try { localStorage.setItem('stillness_intro_open_v1', intro.open ? '1' : '0'); } catch {}
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {  }

    renderSparkline();
    renderHipSparkline();

    applyMethodGating();

    try { _applyAdvancedBgControlGating(); } catch {}

    try {
      const stored = await idbGet('stillness_unlocks_v1');
      if (stored && typeof stored === 'object') state._unlocks = stored;
    } catch {}
    try { renderPersonaGrid(); } catch {}

    setTimeout(() => { checkPersonaUnlocks().catch(() => {}); }, 1200);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (history.length < 2) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        const SEVEN_DAYS = 7 * 86400000;
        const cutoff = now - SEVEN_DAYS;
        const recent = history.filter(r => r.date >= cutoff);
        if (recent.length < 2) return;
        const completed = recent.filter(r => r.completed).length;
        const completionPct = Math.round((completed / recent.length) * 100);
        const withMood = recent.filter(r => r.preMood != null && r.postMood != null);
        const avgDelta = withMood.length
          ? (withMood.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.postMood - r.preMood), 0) / withMood.length)
          : null;
        const personaCount = {}, methodCount = {};
        for (const r of recent) {
          if (r.guide) personaCount[r.guide] = (personaCount[r.guide] || 0) + 1;
          if (r.method) methodCount[r.method] = (methodCount[r.method] || 0) + 1;
        }
        const topPersona = Object.entries(personaCount).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0];
        const topMethod  = Object.entries(methodCount).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0];

        state._weeklyDigest = {
          sessionCount: recent.length,
          completionPct,
          avgMoodDelta: avgDelta,
          topPersona: topPersona || null,
          topMethod:  topMethod || null,
          windowDays: 7,
          generatedAt: now,
        };

        try { renderSidebarStats(); } catch {}
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[weekly-digest] failed:', e); }
    }, 2500);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (!history.length) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        const ONE_DAY = 86400000;
        const cutoffOld = now - 3 * ONE_DAY;
        const cutoffYoung = now - 0.75 * ONE_DAY;
        const candidate = history.find(r =>
          r.date >= cutoffOld && r.date <= cutoffYoung &&
          r.completed &&
          r.craftedSuggestion?.trigger &&
          r.craftedSuggestion.trigger !== 'ongoing state'
        );
        if (!candidate) return;

        try {
          const fires = (await idbGet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY)) || {};
          const slot = fires[candidate.craftedSuggestion.trigger];
          if (slot?.firedDates?.length) {
            const lastFire = new Date(slot.firedDates[0]).getTime();
            if (lastFire > candidate.date) return;
          }
        } catch {}

        state._pendingRecallProbe = {
          trigger: candidate.craftedSuggestion.trigger,
          daysAgo: Math.round((now - candidate.date) / ONE_DAY),
          sessionDate: candidate.date,
        };
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[recall-probe] failed:', e); }
    }, 4500);

    _syncDebugState();

    {
      const _dbgOn = !!$('debugMode')?.checked;
      const _sh = $('sessionHistoryDetails');
      if (_sh) _sh.style.display = _dbgOn ? '' : 'none';
      const _da = $('directorAuditDetails');
      if (_da) _da.style.display = _dbgOn ? '' : 'none';
    }
    _updateDirectorBiasUI();
    _refreshAffirmationsBtnState();

    const INTENSE_VIZUALS = new Set(['flowfield', 'plasma', 'kaleidoscope-flow', 'kaleidoscope-plasma', 'starfield', 'tunnel', 'vortex', 'gamma-flicker']);

    if (state.caps.reducedMotion && !_audioVizSafetiesRelaxed()) {

      const vizSel = $('vizSelect');
      if (vizSel) {

        const groups = Array.from(vizSel.querySelectorAll('optgroup'));
        const looseOptions = Array.from(vizSel.children).filter(c => c.tagName === 'OPTION');

        document.querySelectorAll('#vizSelect option').forEach(opt => {
          if (INTENSE_VIZUALS.has(opt.value)) {
            opt.textContent = '⚠ ' + opt.textContent + ' (motion-heavy)';
          }
        });

        groups.forEach(g => {
          const opts = Array.from(g.children);
          opts.forEach(o => { if (INTENSE_VIZUALS.has(o.value)) g.appendChild(o); });
        });

        groups.forEach(g => {
          const opts = Array.from(g.children);
          const intenseRatio = opts.filter(o => INTENSE_VIZUALS.has(o.value)).length / Math.max(opts.length, 1);
          if (intenseRatio >= 0.5) vizSel.appendChild(g);
        });

        looseOptions.forEach(o => { if (INTENSE_VIZUALS.has(o.value)) vizSel.appendChild(o); });
      }
      if (!hadSavedSettings) {

        state.vizOverride = 'candle';
        const vs = $('vizSelect'); if (vs) vs.value = 'candle';
        state.vizSettings.intensity = (state.vizSettings.intensity || 1.0) * 0.5;
        state.vizSettings.speed     = (state.vizSettings.speed     || 1.0) * 0.5;
        if (state.audioReactiveMode === 'dramatic') state.audioReactiveMode = 'subtle';
        notify.info('Reduced-motion preference detected — gentler visualizer defaults applied.');
      }
    }

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (navigator.storage?.persist) {
        navigator.storage.persist().catch(() => {});
      }
    }, 5000);

    let _emergencyExportShown = false;
    function _showEmergencyExportButton() {
      if (_emergencyExportShown) return;
      _emergencyExportShown = true;
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'emergencyExportFailsafe';
      btn.textContent = '⚠ download backup (page may be stuck)';
      btn.title = 'If the app seems frozen, click to download your session history before reloading.';
      btn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;right:14px;z-index:99999;background:rgba(80,20,20,0.95);color:#fff;border:1px solid #ff6b6b;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:6px;font-size:0.78rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-body);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);';
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (typeof exportBackup === 'function') exportBackup();
        else notify.warn('exportBackup unavailable — try refreshing.');
      });
      document.body.appendChild(btn);
    }
    setTimeout(() => {

      const onStep1     = document.body.classList.contains('step-1');
      const inSession   = !!document.querySelector('.in-session');
      const hasScript   = !!document.querySelector('#scriptPreview.visible');
      const stillStuck  = onStep1 && !inSession && !hasScript;
      if (stillStuck && !_emergencyExportShown) _showEmergencyExportButton();
    }, 10000);

    document.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = document.getElementById('emergencyExportFailsafe');
      if (btn) btn.remove();
      _emergencyExportShown = true;
    }, { once: true, capture: true });
  })();
</script>
